verses.hebrewText: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי־הָאִ֗ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹ֥א הָלַךְ֮ בַּעֲצַ֪ת רְשָׁ֫עִ֥ים וּבְדֶ֣רֶךְ חַ֭טָּאִים לֹ֥א עָמָ֑ד וּבְמֹושַׁ֥ב לֵ֝צִ֗ים לֹ֣א יָשָֽׁב׃
verses.englishText: BOOK I HAPPY IS the man that hath not walked in the counsel of the wicked, nor stood in the way of sinners, nor sat in the seat of the scornful.

jps.text: BOOK I HAPPY IS the man that hath not walked in the counsel of the wicked, nor stood in the way of sinners, nor sat in the seat of the scornful.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אִ֥ם בְּתֹורַ֥ת יְהוָ֗ה חֶ֫פְצֹ֥ו וּֽבְתֹורָתֹ֥ו יֶהְגֶּ֗ה יֹומָ֥ם וָלָֽיְלָה׃
verses.englishText: But his delight is in the law of the LORD; and in His law doth he meditate day and night.

jps.text: But his delight is in the law of the LORD; and in His law doth he meditate day and night.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽהָיָ֗ה כְּעֵץ֮ שָׁת֪וּל עַֽל־פַּלְגֵ֫י מָ֥יִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר פִּרְיֹ֨ו ׀ יִתֵּ֬ן בְּעִתֹּ֗ו וְעָלֵ֥הוּ לֹֽא־יִבֹּ֑ול וְכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה יַצְלִֽיחַ׃
verses.englishText: And he shall be like a tree planted by streams of water, that bringeth forth its fruit in its season, and whose leaf doth not wither; and in whatsoever he doeth he shall prosper.

jps.text: And he shall be like a tree planted by streams of water, that bringeth forth its fruit in its season, and whose leaf doth not wither; and in whatsoever he doeth he shall prosper.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־כֵ֥ן הָרְשָׁעִ֑ים כִּ֥י אִם־כַּ֝מֹּ֗ץ אֲ‍ֽשֶׁר־תִּדְּפֶ֥נּוּ רֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: Not so the wicked; but they are like the chaff which the wind driveth away.

jps.text: Not so the wicked; but they are like the chaff which the wind driveth away.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ לֹא־יָקֻ֣מוּ רְ֭שָׁעִים בַּמִּשְׁפָּ֑ט וְ֝חַטָּאִ֗ים בַּעֲדַ֥ת צַדִּיקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Therefore the wicked shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.

jps.text: Therefore the wicked shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יֹודֵ֣עַ יְ֭הוָה דֶּ֣רֶךְ צַדִּיקִ֑ים וְדֶ֖רֶךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֹּאבֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD regardeth the way of the righteous; but the way of the wicked shall perish.

jps.text: For the LORD regardeth the way of the righteous; but the way of the wicked shall perish.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭מָּה רָגְשׁ֣וּ גֹויִ֑ם וּ֝לְאֻמִּ֗ים יֶהְגּוּ־רִֽיק׃
verses.englishText: Why are the nations in an uproar? And why do the peoples mutter in vain?

jps.text: Why are the nations in an uproar? And why do the peoples mutter in vain?

verses.hebrewText: יִ֥תְיַצְּב֨וּ ׀ מַלְכֵי־אֶ֗רֶץ וְרֹוזְנִ֥ים נֹֽוסְדוּ־יָ֑חַד עַל־יְ֝הוָה וְעַל־מְשִׁיחֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The kings of the earth stand up, and the rulers take counsel together, against the LORD, and against His anointed:

jps.text: The kings of the earth stand up, and the rulers take counsel together, against the LORD, and against His anointed:

verses.hebrewText: נְֽ֭נַתְּקָה אֶת־מֹֽוסְרֹותֵ֑ימֹו וְנַשְׁלִ֖יכָה מִמֶּ֣נּוּ עֲבֹתֵֽימֹו׃
verses.englishText: 'Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us.'

jps.text: 'Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us.'

verses.hebrewText: יֹושֵׁ֣ב בַּשָּׁמַ֣יִם יִשְׂחָ֑ק אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י יִלְעַג־לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: He that sitteth in heaven laugheth, the Lord hath them in derision.

jps.text: He that sitteth in heaven laugheth, the Lord hath them in derision.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֤ז יְדַבֵּ֣ר אֵלֵ֣ימֹו בְאַפֹּ֑ו וּֽבַחֲרֹונֹ֥ו יְבַהֲלֵֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Then will He speak unto them in His wrath, and affright them in His sore displeasure:

jps.text: Then will He speak unto them in His wrath, and affright them in His sore displeasure:

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭אֲנִי נָסַ֣כְתִּי מַלְכִּ֑י עַל־צִ֝יֹּ֗ון הַר־קָדְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: 'Truly it is I that have established My king upon Zion, My holy mountain.'

jps.text: 'Truly it is I that have established My king upon Zion, My holy mountain.'

verses.hebrewText: אֲסַפְּרָ֗ה אֶֽ֫ל חֹ֥ק יְֽהוָ֗ה אָמַ֘ר אֵלַ֥י בְּנִ֥י אַ֑תָּה אֲ֝נִ֗י הַיֹּ֥ום יְלִדְתִּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will tell of the decree: the LORD said unto me: 'Thou art My son, this day have I begotten thee.

jps.text: I will tell of the decree: the LORD said unto me: 'Thou art My son, this day have I begotten thee.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁאַ֤ל מִמֶּ֗נִּי וְאֶתְּנָ֣ה גֹ֭ויִם נַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ וַ֝אֲחֻזָּתְךָ֗ אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Ask of Me, and I will give the nations for thine inheritance, and the ends of the earth for thy possession.

jps.text: Ask of Me, and I will give the nations for thine inheritance, and the ends of the earth for thy possession.

verses.hebrewText: תְּ֭רֹעֵם בְּשֵׁ֣בֶט בַּרְזֶ֑ל כִּכְלִ֖י יֹוצֵ֣ר תְּנַפְּצֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel.'

jps.text: Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel.'

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭עַתָּה מְלָכִ֣ים הַשְׂכִּ֑ילוּ הִ֝וָּסְר֗וּ שֹׁ֣פְטֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Now therefore, O ye kings, be wise; be admonished, ye judges of the earth.

jps.text: Now therefore, O ye kings, be wise; be admonished, ye judges of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: עִבְד֣וּ אֶת־יְהוָ֣ה בְּיִרְאָ֑ה וְ֝גִ֗ילוּ בִּרְעָדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.

jps.text: Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.

verses.hebrewText: נַשְּׁקוּ־בַ֡ר פֶּן־יֶאֱנַ֤ף ׀ וְתֹ֬אבְדוּ דֶ֗רֶךְ כִּֽי־יִבְעַ֣ר כִּמְעַ֣ט אַפֹּ֑ו אַ֝שְׁרֵ֗י כָּל־חֹ֥וסֵי בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Do homage in purity, lest He be angry, and ye perish in the way, when suddenly His wrath is kindled. Happy are all they that take refuge in Him.

jps.text: Do homage in purity, lest He be angry, and ye perish in the way, when suddenly His wrath is kindled. Happy are all they that take refuge in Him.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִ֑ד בְּ֝בָרְחֹ֗ו מִפְּנֵ֤י ׀ אַבְשָׁלֹ֬ום בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David, when he fled from Absalom his son.

jps.text: A Psalm of David, when he fled from Absalom his son.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה מָֽה־רַבּ֣וּ צָרָ֑י רַ֝בִּ֗ים קָמִ֥ים עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: LORD, how many are mine adversaries become! Many are they that rise up against me.

jps.text: LORD, how many are mine adversaries become! Many are they that rise up against me.

verses.hebrewText: רַבִּים֮ אֹמְרִ֪ים לְנַ֫פְשִׁ֥י אֵ֤ין יְֽשׁוּעָ֓תָה לֹּ֬ו בֵֽאלֹהִ֬ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Many there are that say of my soul: 'There is no salvation for him in God.' Selah

jps.text: Many there are that say of my soul: 'There is no salvation for him in God.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה יְ֭הוָה מָגֵ֣ן בַּעֲדִ֑י כְּ֝בֹודִ֗י וּמֵרִ֥ים רֹאשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: But thou, O LORD, art a shield about me; my glory, and the lifter up of my head.

jps.text: But thou, O LORD, art a shield about me; my glory, and the lifter up of my head.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֭ולִי אֶל־יְהוָ֣ה אֶקְרָ֑א וַיַּֽעֲנֵ֨נִי מֵהַ֖ר קָדְשֹׁ֣ו סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: With my voice I call unto the LORD, and He answereth me out of His holy mountain. Selah

jps.text: With my voice I call unto the LORD, and He answereth me out of His holy mountain. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אֲנִ֥י שָׁכַ֗בְתִּי וָֽאִ֫ישָׁ֥נָה הֱקִיצֹ֑ותִי כִּ֖י יְהוָ֣ה יִסְמְכֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I lay me down, and I sleep; I awake, for the LORD sustaineth me.

jps.text: I lay me down, and I sleep; I awake, for the LORD sustaineth me.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־אִ֭ירָא מֵרִבְבֹ֥ות עָ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר סָ֝בִ֗יב שָׁ֣תוּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I am not afraid of ten thousands of people, that have set themselves against me round about.

jps.text: I am not afraid of ten thousands of people, that have set themselves against me round about.

verses.hebrewText: ק֘וּמָ֤ה יְהוָ֨ה ׀ הֹושִׁ֘יעֵ֤נִי אֱלֹהַ֗י כִּֽי־הִכִּ֣יתָ אֶת־כָּל־אֹיְבַ֣י לֶ֑חִי שִׁנֵּ֖י רְשָׁעִ֣ים שִׁבַּֽרְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O LORD; save me, O my God; for Thou hast smitten all mine enemies upon the cheek, Thou hast broken the teeth of the wicked.

jps.text: Arise, O LORD; save me, O my God; for Thou hast smitten all mine enemies upon the cheek, Thou hast broken the teeth of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: לַיהוָ֥ה הַיְשׁוּעָ֑ה עַֽל־עַמְּךָ֖ בִרְכָתֶ֣ךָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Salvation belongeth unto the LORD; Thy blessing be upon Thy people. Selah

jps.text: Salvation belongeth unto the LORD; Thy blessing be upon Thy people. Selah

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ בִּנְגִינֹ֗ות מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: בְּקָרְאִ֡י עֲנֵ֤נִי ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י צִדְקִ֗י בַּ֭צָּר הִרְחַ֣בְתָּ לִּ֑י חָ֝נֵּ֗נִי וּשְׁמַ֥ע תְּפִלָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Answer me when I call, O God of my righteousness, Thou who didst set me free when I was in distress; be gracious unto me, and hear my prayer.

jps.text: Answer me when I call, O God of my righteousness, Thou who didst set me free when I was in distress; be gracious unto me, and hear my prayer.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֥י אִ֡ישׁ עַד־מֶ֬ה כְבֹודִ֣י לִ֭כְלִמָּה תֶּאֱהָב֣וּן רִ֑יק תְּבַקְשׁ֖וּ כָזָ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: O ye sons of men, how long shall my glory be put to shame, in that ye love vanity, and seek after falsehood? Selah

jps.text: O ye sons of men, how long shall my glory be put to shame, in that ye love vanity, and seek after falsehood? Selah

verses.hebrewText: וּדְע֗וּ כִּֽי־הִפְלָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה חָסִ֣יד לֹ֑ו יְהוָ֥ה יִ֝שְׁמַ֗ע בְּקָרְאִ֥י אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: But know that the LORD hath set apart the godly man as His own; the LORD will hear when I call unto Him.

jps.text: But know that the LORD hath set apart the godly man as His own; the LORD will hear when I call unto Him.

verses.hebrewText: רִגְז֗וּ וְֽאַל־תֶּ֫חֱטָ֥אוּ אִמְר֣וּ בִ֭לְבַבְכֶם עַֽל־מִשְׁכַּבְכֶ֗ם וְדֹ֣מּוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Tremble, and sin not; commune with your own heart upon your bed, and be still. Selah

jps.text: Tremble, and sin not; commune with your own heart upon your bed, and be still. Selah

verses.hebrewText: זִבְח֥וּ זִבְחֵי־צֶ֑דֶק וּ֝בִטְח֗וּ אֶל־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, and put your trust in the LORD.

jps.text: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, and put your trust in the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: רַבִּ֥ים אֹמְרִים֮ מִֽי־יַרְאֵ֪נוּ֫ טֹ֥וב נְֽסָה־עָ֭לֵינוּ אֹ֨ור פָּנֶ֬יךָ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Many there are that say: 'Oh that we could see some good!' LORD, lift Thou up the light of Thy countenance upon us.

jps.text: Many there are that say: 'Oh that we could see some good!' LORD, lift Thou up the light of Thy countenance upon us.

verses.hebrewText: נָתַ֣תָּה שִׂמְחָ֣ה בְלִבִּ֑י מֵעֵ֬ת דְּגָנָ֖ם וְתִֽירֹושָׁ֣ם רָֽבּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast put gladness in my heart, more than when their corn and their wine increase.

jps.text: Thou hast put gladness in my heart, more than when their corn and their wine increase.

verses.hebrewText: בְּשָׁלֹ֣ום יַחְדָּו֮ אֶשְׁכְּבָ֪ה וְאִ֫ישָׁ֥ן כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה יְהוָ֣ה לְבָדָ֑ד לָ֝בֶ֗טַח תֹּושִׁיבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: In peace will I both lay me down and sleep; for Thou, LORD, makest me dwell alone in safety.

jps.text: In peace will I both lay me down and sleep; for Thou, LORD, makest me dwell alone in safety.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ אֶֽל־הַנְּחִילֹ֗ות מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon the Nehiloth. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon the Nehiloth. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: אֲמָרַ֖י הַאֲזִ֥ינָה ׀ יְהוָ֗ה בִּ֣ינָה הֲגִֽיגִי׃
verses.englishText: Give ear to my words, O LORD, consider my meditation.

jps.text: Give ear to my words, O LORD, consider my meditation.

verses.hebrewText: הַקְשִׁ֤יבָה ׀ לְקֹ֬ול שַׁוְעִ֗י מַלְכִּ֥י וֵאלֹהָ֑י כִּֽי־אֵ֝לֶ֗יךָ אֶתְפַּלָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: Hearken unto the voice of my cry, my King, and my God; for unto Thee do I pray.

jps.text: Hearken unto the voice of my cry, my King, and my God; for unto Thee do I pray.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה בֹּ֖קֶר תִּשְׁמַ֣ע קֹולִ֑י בֹּ֥קֶר אֶֽעֱרָךְ־לְ֝ךָ֗ וַאֲצַפֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, in the morning shalt Thou hear my voice; in the morning will I order my prayer unto Thee, and will look forward.

jps.text: O LORD, in the morning shalt Thou hear my voice; in the morning will I order my prayer unto Thee, and will look forward.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹ֤א אֵֽל־חָפֵ֘ץ רֶ֥שַׁע ׀ אָ֑תָּה לֹ֖א יְגֻרְךָ֣ רָֽע׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art not a God that hath pleasure in wickedness; evil shall not sojourn with Thee.

jps.text: For Thou art not a God that hath pleasure in wickedness; evil shall not sojourn with Thee.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יִתְיַצְּב֣וּ הֹֽ֭ולְלִים לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינֶ֑יךָ שָׂ֝נֵ֗אתָ כָּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: The boasters shall not stand in Thy sight; Thou hatest all workers of iniquity.

jps.text: The boasters shall not stand in Thy sight; Thou hatest all workers of iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: תְּאַבֵּד֮ דֹּבְרֵ֪י כָ֫זָ֥ב אִישׁ־דָּמִ֥ים וּמִרְמָ֗ה יְתָ֘עֵ֥ב ׀ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou destroyest them that speak falsehood; the LORD abhorreth the man of blood and of deceit.

jps.text: Thou destroyest them that speak falsehood; the LORD abhorreth the man of blood and of deceit.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֗י בְּרֹ֣ב חַ֭סְדְּךָ אָבֹ֣וא בֵיתֶ֑ךָ אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֥ה אֶל־הֽ͏ֵיכַל־קָ֝דְשְׁךָ֗ בְּיִרְאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, in the abundance of Thy lovingkindness will I come into Thy house; I will bow down toward Thy holy temple in the fear of Thee.

jps.text: But as for me, in the abundance of Thy lovingkindness will I come into Thy house; I will bow down toward Thy holy temple in the fear of Thee.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ נְחֵ֬נִי בְצִדְקָתֶ֗ךָ לְמַ֥עַן שֹׁורְרָ֑י *הֹושַׁר (הַיְשַׁ֖ר) לְפָנַ֣י דַּרְכֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, lead me in Thy righteousness because of them that lie in wait for me; make Thy way straight before my face.

jps.text: O LORD, lead me in Thy righteousness because of them that lie in wait for me; make Thy way straight before my face.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֪ין בְּפִ֡יהוּ נְכֹונָה֮ קִרְבָּ֪ם הַ֫וֹּ֥ות קֶֽבֶר־פָּת֥וּחַ גְּרֹונָ֑ם לְ֝שֹׁונָ֗ם יַחֲלִֽיקוּן׃
verses.englishText: For there is no sincerity in their mouth; their inward part is a yawning gulf, their throat is an open sepulchre; they make smooth their tongue.

jps.text: For there is no sincerity in their mouth; their inward part is a yawning gulf, their throat is an open sepulchre; they make smooth their tongue.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽאֲשִׁימֵ֨ם ׀ אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים יִפְּלוּ֮ מִֽמֹּעֲצֹ֪ותֵ֫יהֶ֥ם בְּרֹ֣ב פִּ֭שְׁעֵיהֶם הַדִּיחֵ֑מֹו כִּי־מָ֥רוּ בָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Hold them guilty, O God, let them fall by their own counsels; cast them down in the multitude of their transgressions; for they have rebelled against Thee.

jps.text: Hold them guilty, O God, let them fall by their own counsels; cast them down in the multitude of their transgressions; for they have rebelled against Thee.

verses.hebrewText: וְיִשְׂמְח֨וּ כָל־חֹ֪וסֵי בָ֡ךְ לְעֹולָ֣ם יְ֭רַנֵּנוּ וְתָסֵ֣ךְ עָלֵ֑ימֹו וְֽיַעְלְצ֥וּ בְ֝ךָ֗ אֹהֲבֵ֥י שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: So shall all those that take refuge in Thee rejoice, they shall ever shout for joy, and Thou shalt shelter them; let them also that love Thy name exult in Thee.

jps.text: So shall all those that take refuge in Thee rejoice, they shall ever shout for joy, and Thou shalt shelter them; let them also that love Thy name exult in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּה֮ תְּבָרֵ֪ךְ צַ֫דִּ֥יק יְהוָ֑ה כַּ֝צִּנָּ֗ה רָצֹ֥ון תַּעְטְרֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: For Thou dost bless the righteous; O LORD, Thou dost encompass him with favour as with a shield.

jps.text: For Thou dost bless the righteous; O LORD, Thou dost encompass him with favour as with a shield.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֣חַ בִּ֭נְגִינֹות עַֽל־הַשְּׁמִינִ֗ית מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music; on the Sheminith. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music; on the Sheminith. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה אַל־בְּאַפְּךָ֥ תֹוכִיחֵ֑נִי וְֽאַל־בַּחֲמָתְךָ֥ תְיַסְּרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, rebuke me not in Thine anger, neither chasten me in Thy wrath.

jps.text: O LORD, rebuke me not in Thine anger, neither chasten me in Thy wrath.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֥נִי יְהוָה֮ כִּ֤י אֻמְלַ֫ל אָ֥נִי רְפָאֵ֥נִי יְהוָ֑ה כִּ֖י נִבְהֲל֣וּ עֲצָמֽ͏ָי׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, for I languish away; heal me, O LORD, for my bones are affrighted.

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, for I languish away; heal me, O LORD, for my bones are affrighted.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭נַפְשִׁי נִבְהֲלָ֣ה מְאֹ֑ד *וְאַתְּ (וְאַתָּ֥ה) יְ֝הוָ֗ה עַד־מָתָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My soul also is sore affrighted; and Thou, O LORD, how long?

jps.text: My soul also is sore affrighted; and Thou, O LORD, how long?

verses.hebrewText: שׁוּבָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה חַלְּצָ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י הֹ֝ושִׁיעֵ֗נִי לְמַ֣עַן חַסְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Return, O LORD, deliver my soul; save me for Thy mercy's sake.

jps.text: Return, O LORD, deliver my soul; save me for Thy mercy's sake.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֣ין בַּמָּ֣וֶת זִכְרֶ֑ךָ בִּ֝שְׁאֹ֗ול מִ֣י יֹֽודֶה־לָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For in death there is no remembrance of Thee; in the nether-world who will give Thee thanks?

jps.text: For in death there is no remembrance of Thee; in the nether-world who will give Thee thanks?

verses.hebrewText: יָגַ֤עְתִּי ׀ בְּֽאַנְחָתִ֗י אַשְׂחֶ֣ה בְכָל־לַ֭יְלָה מִטָּתִ֑י בְּ֝דִמְעָתִ֗י עַרְשִׂ֥י אַמְסֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: I am weary with my groaning; every night make I my bed to swim; I melt away my couch with my tears.

jps.text: I am weary with my groaning; every night make I my bed to swim; I melt away my couch with my tears.

verses.hebrewText: עָֽשְׁשָׁ֣ה מִכַּ֣עַס עֵינִ֑י עָֽ֝תְקָ֗ה בְּכָל־צֹורְרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Mine eye is dimmed because of vexation; it waxeth old because of all mine adversaries.

jps.text: Mine eye is dimmed because of vexation; it waxeth old because of all mine adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: ס֣וּרוּ מִ֭מֶּנִּי כָּל־פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן כִּֽי־שָׁמַ֥ע יְ֝הוָ֗ה קֹ֣ול בִּכְיִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Depart from me, all ye workers of iniquity; for the LORD hath heard the voice of my weeping.

jps.text: Depart from me, all ye workers of iniquity; for the LORD hath heard the voice of my weeping.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמַ֣ע יְ֭הוָה תְּחִנָּתִ֑י יְ֝הוָ֗ה תְּֽפִלָּתִ֥י יִקָּֽח׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath heard my supplication; the LORD receiveth my prayer.

jps.text: The LORD hath heard my supplication; the LORD receiveth my prayer.

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֤שׁוּ ׀ וְיִבָּהֲל֣וּ מְ֭אֹד כָּל־אֹיְבָ֑י יָ֝שֻׁ֗בוּ יֵבֹ֥שׁוּ רָֽגַע׃
verses.englishText: All mine enemies shall be ashamed and sore affrighted; they shall turn back, they shall be ashamed suddenly.

jps.text: All mine enemies shall be ashamed and sore affrighted; they shall turn back, they shall be ashamed suddenly.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁגָּיֹ֗ון לְדָ֫וִ֥ד אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֥ר לַיהוָ֑ה עַל־דִּבְרֵי־כ֝֗וּשׁ בֶּן־יְמִינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Shiggaion of David, which he sang unto the LORD, concerning Cush a Benjamite.

jps.text: Shiggaion of David, which he sang unto the LORD, concerning Cush a Benjamite.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהַי בְּךָ֣ חָסִ֑יתִי הֹושִׁיעֵ֥נִי מִכָּל־רֹ֝דְפַ֗י וְהַצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD my God, in Thee have I taken refuge; save me from all them that pursue me, and deliver me;

jps.text: O LORD my God, in Thee have I taken refuge; save me from all them that pursue me, and deliver me;

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־יִטְרֹ֣ף כְּאַרְיֵ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י פֹּ֝רֵ֗ק וְאֵ֣ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Lest he tear my soul like a lion, rending it in pieces, while there is none to deliver.

jps.text: Lest he tear my soul like a lion, rending it in pieces, while there is none to deliver.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהַי אִם־עָשִׂ֣יתִי זֹ֑את אִֽם־יֶשׁ־עָ֥וֶל בְּכַפָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD my God, if I have done this; if there be iniquity in my hands;

jps.text: O LORD my God, if I have done this; if there be iniquity in my hands;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־גָּ֭מַלְתִּי שֹֽׁולְמִ֥י רָ֑ע וָאֲחַלְּצָ֖ה צֹורְרִ֣י רֵיקָֽם׃
verses.englishText: If I have requited him that did evil unto me, or spoiled mine adversary unto emptiness;

jps.text: If I have requited him that did evil unto me, or spoiled mine adversary unto emptiness;

verses.hebrewText: יִֽרַדֹּ֥ף אֹויֵ֨ב ׀ נַפְשִׁ֡י וְיַשֵּׂ֗ג וְיִרְמֹ֣ס לָאָ֣רֶץ חַיָּ֑י וּכְבֹודִ֓י ׀ לֶעָפָ֖ר יַשְׁכֵּ֣ן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Let the enemy pursue my soul, and overtake it, and tread my life down to the earth; yea, let him lay my glory in the dust. Selah

jps.text: Let the enemy pursue my soul, and overtake it, and tread my life down to the earth; yea, let him lay my glory in the dust. Selah

verses.hebrewText: ק֘וּמָ֤ה יְהוָ֨ה ׀ בְּאַפֶּ֗ךָ הִ֭נָּשֵׂא בְּעַבְרֹ֣ות צֹורְרָ֑י וְע֥וּרָה אֵ֝לַ֗י מִשְׁפָּ֥ט צִוִּֽיתָ׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O LORD, in Thine anger, lift up Thyself in indignation against mine adversaries; yea, awake for me at the judgment which Thou hast commanded.

jps.text: Arise, O LORD, in Thine anger, lift up Thyself in indignation against mine adversaries; yea, awake for me at the judgment which Thou hast commanded.

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲדַ֣ת לְ֭אֻמִּים תְּסֹובְבֶ֑ךָּ וְ֝עָלֶ֗יהָ לַמָּרֹ֥ום שֽׁוּבָה׃
verses.englishText: And let the congregation of the peoples compass Thee about, and over them return Thou on high.

jps.text: And let the congregation of the peoples compass Thee about, and over them return Thou on high.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָה֮ יָדִ֪ין עַ֫מִּ֥ים שָׁפְטֵ֥נִי יְהוָ֑ה כְּצִדְקִ֖י וּכְתֻמִּ֣י עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, who ministerest judgment to the peoples, judge me, O LORD, according to my righteousness, and according to mine integrity that is in me.

jps.text: O LORD, who ministerest judgment to the peoples, judge me, O LORD, according to my righteousness, and according to mine integrity that is in me.

verses.hebrewText: יִגְמָר־נָ֬א רַ֨ע ׀ רְשָׁעִים֮ וּתְכֹונֵ֪ן צַ֫דִּ֥יק וּבֹחֵ֣ן לִ֭בֹּ֗ות וּכְלָיֹ֗ות אֱלֹהִ֥ים צַדּֽ͏ִיק׃
verses.englishText: Oh that a full measure of evil might come upon the wicked, and that Thou wouldest establish the righteous; for the righteous God trieth the heart and reins.

jps.text: Oh that a full measure of evil might come upon the wicked, and that Thou wouldest establish the righteous; for the righteous God trieth the heart and reins.

verses.hebrewText: מָֽגִנִּ֥י עַל־אֱלֹהִ֑ים מֹ֝ושִׁ֗יעַ יִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: My shield is with God, who saveth the upright in heart.

jps.text: My shield is with God, who saveth the upright in heart.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים שֹׁופֵ֣ט צַדִּ֑יק וְ֝אֵ֗ל זֹעֵ֥ם בְּכָל־יֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: God is a righteous judge, yea, a God that hath indignation every day:

jps.text: God is a righteous judge, yea, a God that hath indignation every day:

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֣א יָ֭שׁוּב חַרְבֹּ֣ו יִלְטֹ֑ושׁ קַשְׁתֹּ֥ו דָ֝רַ֗ךְ וַֽיְכֹונְנֶֽהָ׃
verses.englishText: If a man turn not, He will whet His sword, He hath bent His bow, and made it ready;

jps.text: If a man turn not, He will whet His sword, He hath bent His bow, and made it ready;

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭לֹו הֵכִ֣ין כְּלֵי־מָ֑וֶת חִ֝צָּ֗יו לְֽדֹלְקִ֥ים יִפְעָֽל׃
verses.englishText: He hath also prepared for him the weapons of death, yea, His arrows which He made sharp.

jps.text: He hath also prepared for him the weapons of death, yea, His arrows which He made sharp.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֥ה יְחַבֶּל־אָ֑וֶן וְהָרָ֥ה עָ֝מָ֗ל וְיָ֣לַד שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: Behold, he travaileth with iniquity; yea, he conceiveth mischief, and bringeth forth falsehood.

jps.text: Behold, he travaileth with iniquity; yea, he conceiveth mischief, and bringeth forth falsehood.

verses.hebrewText: בֹּ֣ור כָּ֭רָֽה וַֽיַּחְפְּרֵ֑הוּ וַ֝יִּפֹּ֗ל בְּשַׁ֣חַת יִפְעָֽל׃
verses.englishText: He hath digged a pit, and hollowed it, and is fallen into the ditch which he made.

jps.text: He hath digged a pit, and hollowed it, and is fallen into the ditch which he made.

verses.hebrewText: יָשׁ֣וּב עֲמָלֹ֣ו בְרֹאשֹׁ֑ו וְעַ֥ל קָ֝דְקֳדֹ֗ו חֲמָסֹ֥ו יֵרֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: His mischief shall return upon his own head, and his violence shall come down upon his own pate.

jps.text: His mischief shall return upon his own head, and his violence shall come down upon his own pate.

verses.hebrewText: אֹודֶ֣ה יְהוָ֣ה כְּצִדְקֹ֑ו וַ֝אֲזַמְּרָ֗ה שֵֽׁם־יְהוָ֥ה עֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto the LORD according to His righteousness; and will sing praise to the name of the LORD Most High.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto the LORD according to His righteousness; and will sing praise to the name of the LORD Most High.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ עַֽל־הַגִּתִּ֗ית מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה אֲדֹנֵ֗ינוּ מָֽה־אַדִּ֣יר שִׁ֭מְךָ בְּכָל־הָאָ֑רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר תְּנָ֥ה הֹ֝ודְךָ֗ עַל־הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, our Lord, how glorious is Thy name in all the earth! whose majesty is rehearsed above the heavens.

jps.text: O LORD, our Lord, how glorious is Thy name in all the earth! whose majesty is rehearsed above the heavens.

verses.hebrewText: מִפִּ֤י עֹֽולְלִ֨ים ׀ וְֽיֹנְקִים֮ יִסַּ֪דְתָּ֫ עֹ֥ז לְמַ֥עַן צֹורְרֶ֑יךָ לְהַשְׁבִּ֥ית אֹ֝ויֵ֗ב וּמִתְנַקֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast Thou founded strength, because of Thine adversaries; that Thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger.

jps.text: Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast Thou founded strength, because of Thine adversaries; that Thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אֶרְאֶ֣ה שָׁ֭מֶיךָ מַעֲשֵׂ֣י אֶצְבְּעֹתֶ֑יךָ יָרֵ֥חַ וְ֝כֹוכָבִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר כֹּונָֽנְתָּה׃
verses.englishText: When I behold Thy heavens, the work of Thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which Thou hast established;

jps.text: When I behold Thy heavens, the work of Thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which Thou hast established;

verses.hebrewText: מָֽה־אֱנֹ֥ושׁ כִּֽי־תִזְכְּרֶ֑נּוּ וּבֶן־אָ֝דָ֗ם כִּ֣י תִפְקְדֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: What is man, that Thou art mindful of him? and the son of man, that Thou thinkest of him?

jps.text: What is man, that Thou art mindful of him? and the son of man, that Thou thinkest of him?

verses.hebrewText: וַתְּחַסְּרֵ֣הוּ מְּ֭עַט מֵאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְכָבֹ֖וד וְהָדָ֣ר תְּעַטְּרֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yet Thou hast made him but little lower than the angels, and hast crowned him with glory and honour.

jps.text: Yet Thou hast made him but little lower than the angels, and hast crowned him with glory and honour.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֭מְשִׁילֵהוּ בְּמַעֲשֵׂ֣י יָדֶ֑יךָ כֹּ֝ל שַׁ֣תָּה תַֽחַת־רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast made him to have dominion over the works of Thy hands; Thou hast put all things under His feet:

jps.text: Thou hast made him to have dominion over the works of Thy hands; Thou hast put all things under His feet:

verses.hebrewText: צֹנֶ֣ה וַאֲלָפִ֣ים כֻּלָּ֑ם וְ֝גַ֗ם בַּהֲמֹ֥ות שָׂדָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Sheep and oxen, all of them, yea, and the beasts of the field;

jps.text: Sheep and oxen, all of them, yea, and the beasts of the field;

verses.hebrewText: צִפֹּ֣ור שָׁ֭מַיִם וּדְגֵ֣י הַיָּ֑ם עֹ֝בֵ֗ר אָרְחֹ֥ות יַמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea; whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas.

jps.text: The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea; whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה אֲדֹנֵ֑ינוּ מָֽה־אַדִּ֥יר שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ בְּכָל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, our Lord, how glorious is Thy name in all the earth!

jps.text: O LORD, our Lord, how glorious is Thy name in all the earth!

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ עַלְמ֥וּת לַבֵּ֗ן מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Muthlabben. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Muthlabben. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: אֹודֶ֣ה יְ֭הוָה בְּכָל־לִבִּ֑י אֲ֝סַפְּרָ֗ה כָּל־נִפְלְאֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto the LORD with my whole heart; I will tell of all Thy marvellous works.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto the LORD with my whole heart; I will tell of all Thy marvellous works.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׂמְחָ֣ה וְאֶעֶלְצָ֣ה בָ֑ךְ אֲזַמְּרָ֖ה שִׁמְךָ֣ עֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: I will be glad and exult in Thee; I will sing praise to Thy name, O Most High:

jps.text: I will be glad and exult in Thee; I will sing praise to Thy name, O Most High:

verses.hebrewText: בְּשׁוּב־אֹויְבַ֥י אָחֹ֑ור יִכָּשְׁל֥וּ וְ֝יֹאבְד֗וּ מִפָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: When mine enemies are turned back, they stumble and perish at Thy presence;

jps.text: When mine enemies are turned back, they stumble and perish at Thy presence;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עָ֭שִׂיתָ מִשְׁפָּטִ֣י וְדִינִ֑י יָשַׁ֥בְתָּ לְ֝כִסֵּ֗א שֹׁופֵ֥ט צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: For Thou hast maintained my right and my cause; Thou sattest upon the throne as the righteous Judge.

jps.text: For Thou hast maintained my right and my cause; Thou sattest upon the throne as the righteous Judge.

verses.hebrewText: גָּעַ֣רְתָּ גֹ֭ויִם אִבַּ֣דְתָּ רָשָׁ֑ע שְׁמָ֥ם מָ֝חִ֗יתָ לְעֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast rebuked the nations, Thou hast destroyed the wicked, Thou hast blotted out their name for ever and ever.

jps.text: Thou hast rebuked the nations, Thou hast destroyed the wicked, Thou hast blotted out their name for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: הָֽאֹויֵ֨ב ׀ תַּ֥מּוּ חֳרָבֹ֗ות לָ֫נֶ֥צַח וְעָרִ֥ים נָתַ֑שְׁתָּ אָבַ֖ד זִכְרָ֣ם הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.englishText: O thou enemy, the waste places are come to an end for ever; and the cities which thou didst uproot, their very memorial is perished.

jps.text: O thou enemy, the waste places are come to an end for ever; and the cities which thou didst uproot, their very memorial is perished.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יהוָה לְעֹולָ֣ם יֵשֵׁ֑ב כֹּונֵ֖ן לַמִּשְׁפָּ֣ט כִּסְאֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: But the LORD is enthroned for ever; He hath established His throne for judgment.

jps.text: But the LORD is enthroned for ever; He hath established His throne for judgment.

verses.hebrewText: וְה֗וּא יִשְׁפֹּֽט־תֵּבֵ֥ל בְּצֶ֑דֶק יָדִ֥ין לְ֝אֻמִּ֗ים בְּמֵישָׁרֽ͏ִים׃
verses.englishText: And He will judge the world in righteousness, He will minister judgment to the peoples with equity.

jps.text: And He will judge the world in righteousness, He will minister judgment to the peoples with equity.

verses.hebrewText: וִ֘יהִ֤י יְהוָ֣ה מִשְׂגָּ֣ב לַדָּ֑ךְ מִ֝שְׂגָּ֗ב לְעִתֹּ֥ות בַּצָּרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD also will be a high tower for the oppressed, a high tower in times of trouble;

jps.text: The LORD also will be a high tower for the oppressed, a high tower in times of trouble;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִבְטְח֣וּ בְ֭ךָ יֹודְעֵ֣י שְׁמֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹֽא־עָזַ֖בְתָּ דֹרְשֶׁ֣יךָ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And they that know Thy name will put their trust in Thee; for thou, LORD, hast not forsaken them that seek Thee.

jps.text: And they that know Thy name will put their trust in Thee; for thou, LORD, hast not forsaken them that seek Thee.

verses.hebrewText: זַמְּר֗וּ לַ֭יהוָה יֹשֵׁ֣ב צִיֹּ֑ון הַגִּ֥ידוּ בָ֝עַמִּ֗ים עֲלִֽילֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Sing praises to the LORD, who dwelleth in Zion; declare among the peoples His doings.

jps.text: Sing praises to the LORD, who dwelleth in Zion; declare among the peoples His doings.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־דֹרֵ֣שׁ דָּ֭מִים אֹותָ֣ם זָכָ֑ר לֹֽא־שָׁ֝כַ֗ח צַעֲקַ֥ת *עֲנִיִּים (עֲנָוֽ͏ִים)׃
verses.englishText: For He that avengeth blood hath remembered them; He hath not forgotten the cry of the humble.

jps.text: For He that avengeth blood hath remembered them; He hath not forgotten the cry of the humble.

verses.hebrewText: חָֽנְנֵ֬נִי יְהוָ֗ה רְאֵ֣ה עָ֭נְיִי מִשֹּׂנְאָ֑י מְ֝רֹומְמִ֗י מִשַּׁ֥עֲרֵי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, behold mine affliction at the hands of them that hate me; Thou that liftest me up from the gates of death;

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, behold mine affliction at the hands of them that hate me; Thou that liftest me up from the gates of death;

verses.hebrewText: לְמַ֥עַן אֲסַפְּרָ֗ה כָּֽל־תְּהִלָּ֫תֶ֥יךָ בְּשַֽׁעֲרֵ֥י בַת־צִיֹּ֑ון אָ֝גִ֗ילָה בִּישׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: That I may tell of all Thy praise in the gates of the daughter of Zion, that I may rejoice in Thy salvation.

jps.text: That I may tell of all Thy praise in the gates of the daughter of Zion, that I may rejoice in Thy salvation.

verses.hebrewText: טָבְע֣וּ גֹ֭ויִם בְּשַׁ֣חַת עָשׂ֑וּ בְּרֶֽשֶׁת־ז֥וּ טָ֝מָ֗נוּ נִלְכְּדָ֥ה רַגְלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The nations are sunk down in the pit that they made; in the net which they hid is their own foot taken.

jps.text: The nations are sunk down in the pit that they made; in the net which they hid is their own foot taken.

verses.hebrewText: נֹ֤ודַ֨ע ׀ יְהוָה֮ מִשְׁפָּ֪ט עָ֫שָׂ֥ה בְּפֹ֣עַל כַּ֭פָּיו נֹוקֵ֣שׁ רָשָׁ֑ע הִגָּיֹ֥ון סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath made Himself known, He hath executed judgment, the wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah

jps.text: The LORD hath made Himself known, He hath executed judgment, the wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah

verses.hebrewText: יָשׁ֣וּבוּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים לִשְׁאֹ֑ולָה כָּל־גֹּ֝ויִ֗ם שְׁכֵחֵ֥י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The wicked shall return to the nether-world, even all the nations that forget God.

jps.text: The wicked shall return to the nether-world, even all the nations that forget God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א לָ֭נֶצַח יִשָּׁכַ֣ח אֶבְיֹ֑ון תִּקְוַ֥ת *עֲנָוִים (עֲ֝נִיִּ֗ים) תֹּאבַ֥ד לָעַֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the needy shall not alway be forgotten, nor the expectation of the poor perish for ever.

jps.text: For the needy shall not alway be forgotten, nor the expectation of the poor perish for ever.

verses.hebrewText: קוּמָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה אַל־יָעֹ֣ז אֱנֹ֑ושׁ יִשָּׁפְט֥וּ גֹ֝ויִ֗ם עַל־פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O LORD, let not man prevail; let the nations be judged in Thy sight.

jps.text: Arise, O LORD, let not man prevail; let the nations be judged in Thy sight.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֘יתָ֤ה יְהוָ֨ה ׀ מֹורָ֗ה לָ֫הֶ֥ם יֵדְע֥וּ גֹויִ֑ם אֱנֹ֖ושׁ הֵ֣מָּה סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Set terror over them, O LORD; let the nations know they are but men. Selah

jps.text: Set terror over them, O LORD; let the nations know they are but men. Selah

verses.hebrewText: לָמָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה תַּעֲמֹ֣ד בְּרָחֹ֑וק תַּ֝עְלִ֗ים לְעִתֹּ֥ות בַּצָּרֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: Why standest Thou afar off, O LORD? Why hidest Thou Thyself in times of trouble?

jps.text: Why standest Thou afar off, O LORD? Why hidest Thou Thyself in times of trouble?

verses.hebrewText: בְּגַאֲוַ֣ת רָ֭שָׁע יִדְלַ֣ק עָנִ֑י יִתָּפְשׂ֓וּ ׀ בִּמְזִמֹּ֖ות ז֣וּ חָשָֽׁבוּ׃
verses.englishText: Through the pride of the wicked the poor is hotly pursued, they are taken in the devices that they have imagined.

jps.text: Through the pride of the wicked the poor is hotly pursued, they are taken in the devices that they have imagined.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִלֵּ֣ל רָ֭שָׁע עַל־תַּאֲוַ֣ת נַפְשֹׁ֑ו וּבֹצֵ֥עַ בֵּ֝רֵ֗ךְ נִ֘אֵ֥ץ ׀ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the wicked boasteth of his heart's desire, and the covetous vaunteth himself, though he contemn the LORD.

jps.text: For the wicked boasteth of his heart's desire, and the covetous vaunteth himself, though he contemn the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: רָשָׁ֗ע כְּגֹ֣בַהּ אַ֭פֹּו בַּל־יִדְרֹ֑שׁ אֵ֥ין אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים כָּל־מְזִמֹּותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The wicked, in the pride of his countenance, saith: 'He will not require'; all his thoughts are: 'There is no God.'

jps.text: The wicked, in the pride of his countenance, saith: 'He will not require'; all his thoughts are: 'There is no God.'

verses.hebrewText: יָ֘חִ֤ילוּ *דָרְכּו (דְרָכָ֨יו) ׀ בְּכָל־עֵ֗ת מָרֹ֣ום מִ֭שְׁפָּטֶיךָ מִנֶּגְדֹּ֑ו כָּל־צֹ֝ורְרָ֗יו יָפִ֥יחַ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: His ways prosper at all times; Thy judgments are far above out of his sight; as for all his adversaries, he puffeth at them.

jps.text: His ways prosper at all times; Thy judgments are far above out of his sight; as for all his adversaries, he puffeth at them.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣ר בְּ֭לִבֹּו בַּל־אֶמֹּ֑וט לְדֹ֥ר וָ֝דֹ֗ר אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹֽא־בְרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: He saith in his heart: 'I shall not be moved, I who to all generations shall not be in adversity.'

jps.text: He saith in his heart: 'I shall not be moved, I who to all generations shall not be in adversity.'

verses.hebrewText: אָלָ֤ה פִּ֣יהוּ מָ֭לֵא וּמִרְמֹ֣ות וָתֹ֑ךְ תַּ֥חַת לְ֝שֹׁונֹ֗ו עָמָ֥ל וָאָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: His mouth is full of cursing and deceit and oppression; under his tongue is mischief and iniquity.

jps.text: His mouth is full of cursing and deceit and oppression; under his tongue is mischief and iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: יֵשֵׁ֤ב ׀ בְּמַאְרַ֬ב חֲצֵרִ֗ים בַּֽ֭מִּסְתָּרִים יַהֲרֹ֣ג נָקִ֑י עֵ֝ינָ֗יו לְֽחֵלְכָ֥ה יִצְפֹּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: He sitteth in the lurking-places of the villages; in secret places doth he slay the innocent; his eyes are on the watch for the helpless.

jps.text: He sitteth in the lurking-places of the villages; in secret places doth he slay the innocent; his eyes are on the watch for the helpless.

verses.hebrewText: יֶאֱרֹ֬ב בַּמִּסְתָּ֨ר ׀ כְּאַרְיֵ֬ה בְסֻכֹּ֗ה יֶ֭אֱרֹב לַחֲטֹ֣וף עָנִ֑י יַחְטֹ֥ף עָ֝נִ֗י בְּמָשְׁכֹ֥ו בְרִשְׁתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He lieth in wait in a secret place as a lion in his lair, he lieth in wait to catch the poor; he doth catch the poor, when he draweth him up in his net.

jps.text: He lieth in wait in a secret place as a lion in his lair, he lieth in wait to catch the poor; he doth catch the poor, when he draweth him up in his net.

verses.hebrewText: *וַדָּכַה (יִדְכֶּ֥ה) יָשֹׁ֑חַ וְנָפַ֥ל בַּ֝עֲצוּמָ֗יו *חֶלְכָּאִים (חֵ֣יל כָּאִֽים)׃
verses.englishText: He croucheth, he boweth down, and the helpless fall into his mighty claws.

jps.text: He croucheth, he boweth down, and the helpless fall into his mighty claws.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣ר בְּ֭לִבֹּו שָׁ֣כַֽח אֵ֑ל הִסְתִּ֥יר פָּ֝נָ֗יו בַּל־רָאָ֥ה לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.englishText: He hath said in his heart: 'God hath forgotten; He hideth His face; He will never see.'

jps.text: He hath said in his heart: 'God hath forgotten; He hideth His face; He will never see.'

verses.hebrewText: קוּמָ֤ה יְהוָ֗ה אֵ֭ל נְשָׂ֣א יָדֶ֑ךָ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ח *עֲנִיִּים (עֲנָוֽ͏ִים)׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O LORD; O God, lift up Thy hand; forget not the humble.

jps.text: Arise, O LORD; O God, lift up Thy hand; forget not the humble.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־מֶ֤ה ׀ נִאֵ֖ץ רָשָׁ֥ע ׀ אֱלֹהִ֑ים אָמַ֥ר בְּ֝לִבֹּ֗ו לֹ֣א תִּדְרֹֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore doth the wicked contemn God, and say in his heart: 'Thou wilt not require'?

jps.text: Wherefore doth the wicked contemn God, and say in his heart: 'Thou wilt not require'?

verses.hebrewText: רָאִ֡תָה כִּֽי־אַתָּ֤ה ׀ עָ֘מָ֤ל וָכַ֨עַס ׀ תַּבִּיט֮ לָתֵ֪ת בְּיָ֫דֶ֥ךָ עָ֭לֶיךָ יַעֲזֹ֣ב חֵלֶ֑כָה יָ֝תֹ֗ום אַתָּ֤ה ׀ הָיִ֬יתָ עֹוזֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast seen; for Thou beholdest trouble and vexation, to requite them with Thy hand; unto Thee the helpless committeth himself; Thou hast been the helper of the fatherless.

jps.text: Thou hast seen; for Thou beholdest trouble and vexation, to requite them with Thy hand; unto Thee the helpless committeth himself; Thou hast been the helper of the fatherless.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁ֭בֹר זְרֹ֣ועַ רָשָׁ֑ע וָ֝רָ֗ע תִּֽדְרֹושׁ־רִשְׁעֹ֥ו בַל־תִּמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Break Thou the arm of the wicked; and as for the evil man, search out his wickedness, till none be found.

jps.text: Break Thou the arm of the wicked; and as for the evil man, search out his wickedness, till none be found.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה מֶ֭לֶךְ עֹולָ֣ם וָעֶ֑ד אָבְד֥וּ גֹ֝ויִ֗ם מֵֽאַרְצֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is King for ever and ever; the nations are perished out of His land.

jps.text: The LORD is King for ever and ever; the nations are perished out of His land.

verses.hebrewText: תַּאֲוַ֬ת עֲנָוִ֣ים שָׁמַ֣עְתָּ יְהוָ֑ה תָּכִ֥ין לִ֝בָּ֗ם תַּקְשִׁ֥יב אָזְנֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: LORD, Thou hast heard the desire of the humble: Thou wilt direct their heart, Thou wilt cause Thine ear to attend;

jps.text: LORD, Thou hast heard the desire of the humble: Thou wilt direct their heart, Thou wilt cause Thine ear to attend;

verses.hebrewText: לִשְׁפֹּ֥ט יָתֹ֗ום וָ֫דָ֥ךְ בַּל־יֹוסִ֥יף עֹ֑וד לַעֲרֹ֥ץ אֱ֝נֹ֗ושׁ מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: To right the fatherless and the oppressed, that man who is of the earth may be terrible no more.

jps.text: To right the fatherless and the oppressed, that man who is of the earth may be terrible no more.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ לְדָ֫וִ֥ד בַּֽיהוָ֨ה ׀ חָסִ֗יתִי אֵ֭יךְ תֹּאמְר֣וּ לְנַפְשִׁ֑י *נוּדוּ (נ֝֗וּדִי) הַרְכֶ֥ם צִפֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. In the LORD have I taken refuge; how say ye to my soul: 'Flee thou! to your mountain, ye birds'?

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. In the LORD have I taken refuge; how say ye to my soul: 'Flee thou! to your mountain, ye birds'?

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י הִנֵּ֪ה הָרְשָׁעִ֡ים יִדְרְכ֬וּן קֶ֗שֶׁת כֹּונְנ֣וּ חִצָּ֣ם עַל־יֶ֑תֶר לִירֹ֥ות בְּמֹו־אֹ֝֗פֶל לְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: For, lo, the wicked bend the bow, they have made ready their arrow upon the string, that they may shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.

jps.text: For, lo, the wicked bend the bow, they have made ready their arrow upon the string, that they may shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י הַ֭שָּׁתֹות יֵֽהָרֵס֑וּן צַ֝דִּ֗יק מַה־פָּעָֽל׃
verses.englishText: When the foundations are destroyed, what hath the righteous wrought?

jps.text: When the foundations are destroyed, what hath the righteous wrought?

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ בְּֽהֵ֘יכַ֤ל קָדְשֹׁ֗ו יְהוָה֮ בַּשָּׁמַ֪יִם כִּ֫סְאֹ֥ו עֵינָ֥יו יֶחֱז֑וּ עַפְעַפָּ֥יו יִ֝בְחֲנ֗וּ בְּנֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is in His holy temple, the LORD, His throne is in heaven; His eyes behold, His eyelids try, the children of men.

jps.text: The LORD is in His holy temple, the LORD, His throne is in heaven; His eyes behold, His eyelids try, the children of men.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָה֮ צַדִּ֪יק יִ֫בְחָ֥ן וְ֭רָשָׁע וְאֹהֵ֣ב חָמָ֑ס שָֽׂנְאָ֥ה נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD trieth the righteous; but the wicked and him that loveth violence His soul hateth.

jps.text: The LORD trieth the righteous; but the wicked and him that loveth violence His soul hateth.

verses.hebrewText: יַמְטֵ֥ר עַל־רְשָׁעִ֗ים פַּ֫חִ֥ים אֵ֣שׁ וְ֭גָפְרִית וְר֥וּחַ זִלְעָפֹ֗ות מְנָ֣ת כֹּוסָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Upon the wicked He will cause to rain coals; fire and brimstone and burning wind shall be the portion of their cup.

jps.text: Upon the wicked He will cause to rain coals; fire and brimstone and burning wind shall be the portion of their cup.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־צַדִּ֣יק יְ֭הוָה צְדָקֹ֣ות אָהֵ֑ב יָ֝שָׁ֗ר יֶחֱז֥וּ פָנֵֽימֹו׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD is righteous, He loveth righteousness; the upright shall behold His face.

jps.text: For the LORD is righteous, He loveth righteousness; the upright shall behold His face.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ עַֽל־הַשְּׁמִינִ֗ית מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; on the Sheminith. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; on the Sheminith. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: הֹושִׁ֣יעָה יְ֭הוָה כִּי־גָמַ֣ר חָסִ֑יד כִּי־פַ֥סּוּ אֱ֝מוּנִ֗ים מִבְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Help, LORD; for the godly man ceaseth; for the faithful fail from among the children of men.

jps.text: Help, LORD; for the godly man ceaseth; for the faithful fail from among the children of men.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤וְא ׀ יְֽדַבְּרוּ֮ אִ֤ישׁ אֶת־רֵ֫עֵ֥הוּ שְׂפַ֥ת חֲלָקֹ֑ות בְּלֵ֖ב וָלֵ֣ב יְדַבֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: They speak falsehood every one with his neighbour; with flattering lip, and with a double heart, do they speak.

jps.text: They speak falsehood every one with his neighbour; with flattering lip, and with a double heart, do they speak.

verses.hebrewText: יַכְרֵ֣ת יְ֭הוָה כָּל־שִׂפְתֵ֣י חֲלָקֹ֑ות לָ֝שֹׁ֗ון מְדַבֶּ֥רֶת גְּדֹלֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: May the LORD cut off all flattering lips, the tongue that speaketh proud things!

jps.text: May the LORD cut off all flattering lips, the tongue that speaketh proud things!

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר אָֽמְר֨וּ ׀ לִלְשֹׁנֵ֣נוּ נַ֭גְבִּיר שְׂפָתֵ֣ינוּ אִתָּ֑נוּ מִ֖י אָדֹ֣ון לָֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Who have said: 'Our tongue will we make mighty; our lips are with us: who is lord over us?'

jps.text: Who have said: 'Our tongue will we make mighty; our lips are with us: who is lord over us?'

verses.hebrewText: מִשֹּׁ֥ד עֲנִיִּים֮ מֵאַנְקַ֪ת אֶבְיֹ֫ונִ֥ים עַתָּ֣ה אָ֭קוּם יֹאמַ֣ר יְהוָ֑ה אָשִׁ֥ית בְּ֝יֵ֗שַׁע יָפִ֥יחַֽ לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'For the oppression of the poor, for the sighing of the needy, now will I arise', saith the LORD; 'I will set him in safety at whom they puff.'

jps.text: 'For the oppression of the poor, for the sighing of the needy, now will I arise', saith the LORD; 'I will set him in safety at whom they puff.'

verses.hebrewText: אִֽמֲרֹ֣ות יְהוָה֮ אֲמָרֹ֪ות טְהֹ֫רֹ֥ות כֶּ֣סֶף צָ֭רוּף בַּעֲלִ֣יל לָאָ֑רֶץ מְ֝זֻקָּ֗ק שִׁבְעָתָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: The words of the LORD are pure words, as silver tried in a crucible on the earth, refined seven times.

jps.text: The words of the LORD are pure words, as silver tried in a crucible on the earth, refined seven times.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּֽה־יְהוָ֥ה תִּשְׁמְרֵ֑ם תִּצְּרֶ֓נּוּ ׀ מִן־הַדֹּ֖ור ז֣וּ לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou wilt keep them, O LORD; Thou wilt preserve us from this generation for ever.

jps.text: Thou wilt keep them, O LORD; Thou wilt preserve us from this generation for ever.

verses.hebrewText: סָבִ֗יב רְשָׁעִ֥ים יִתְהַלָּכ֑וּן כְּרֻ֥ם זֻ֝לּ֗וּת לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The wicked walk on every side, when vileness is exalted among the sons of men.

jps.text: The wicked walk on every side, when vileness is exalted among the sons of men.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. How long, O LORD, wilt Thou forget me for ever? How long wilt Thou hide Thy face from me?

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. How long, O LORD, wilt Thou forget me for ever? How long wilt Thou hide Thy face from me?

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֣נָה יְ֭הוָה תִּשְׁכָּחֵ֣נִי נֶ֑צַח עַד־אָ֓נָה ׀ תַּסְתִּ֖יר אֶת־פָּנֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, having sorrow in my heart by day? How long shall mine enemy be exalted over me?

jps.text: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, having sorrow in my heart by day? How long shall mine enemy be exalted over me?

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֨נָה אָשִׁ֪ית עֵצֹ֡ות בְּנַפְשִׁ֗י יָגֹ֣ון בִּלְבָבִ֣י יֹומָ֑ם עַד־אָ֓נָה ׀ יָר֖וּם אֹיְבִ֣י עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Behold Thou, and answer me, O LORD my God; lighten mine eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of death;

jps.text: Behold Thou, and answer me, O LORD my God; lighten mine eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of death;

verses.hebrewText: הַבִּ֣יטָֽה עֲ֭נֵנִי יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑י הָאִ֥ירָה עֵ֝ינַ֗י פֶּן־אִישַׁ֥ן הַמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Lest mine enemy say: 'I have prevailed against him'; lest mine adversaries rejoice when I am moved.

jps.text: Lest mine enemy say: 'I have prevailed against him'; lest mine adversaries rejoice when I am moved.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּן־יֹאמַ֣ר אֹיְבִ֣י יְכָלְתִּ֑יו צָרַ֥י יָ֝גִ֗ילוּ כִּ֣י אֶמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, in Thy mercy do I trust; my heart shall rejoice in Thy salvation.

jps.text: But as for me, in Thy mercy do I trust; my heart shall rejoice in Thy salvation.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ בְּחַסְדְּךָ֣ בָטַחְתִּי֮ יָ֤גֵ֥ל לִבִּ֗י בִּֽישׁוּעָ֫תֶ֥ךָ אָשִׁ֥ירָה לַיהוָ֑ה כִּ֖י גָמַ֣ל עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will sing unto the LORD, because He hath dealt bountifully with me.

jps.text: I will sing unto the LORD, because He hath dealt bountifully with me.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ לְדָ֫וִ֥ד אָ֘מַ֤ר נָבָ֣ל בְּ֭לִבֹּו אֵ֣ין אֱלֹהִ֑ים הִֽשְׁחִ֗יתוּ הִֽתְעִ֥יבוּ עֲלִילָ֗ה אֵ֣ין עֹֽשֵׂה־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. The fool hath said in his heart: 'There is no God'; they have dealt corruptly, they have done abominably; there is none that doeth good.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. The fool hath said in his heart: 'There is no God'; they have dealt corruptly, they have done abominably; there is none that doeth good.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה מִשָּׁמַיִם֮ הִשְׁקִ֪יף עַֽל־בְּנֵי־אָ֫דָ֥ם לִ֭רְאֹות הֲיֵ֣שׁ מַשְׂכִּ֑יל דֹּ֝רֵשׁ אֶת־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD looked forth from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any man of understanding, that did seek after God.

jps.text: The LORD looked forth from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any man of understanding, that did seek after God.

verses.hebrewText: הַכֹּ֥ל סָר֮ יַחְדָּ֪ו נֶ֫אֱלָ֥חוּ אֵ֤ין עֹֽשֵׂה־טֹ֑וב אֵ֝֗ין גַּם־אֶחָֽד׃
verses.englishText: They are all corrupt, they are together become impure; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.

jps.text: They are all corrupt, they are together become impure; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֥א יָדְעוּ֮ כָּל־פֹּ֪עֲלֵ֫י אָ֥וֶן אֹכְלֵ֣י עַ֭מִּי אָ֣כְלוּ לֶ֑חֶם יְ֝הוָ֗ה לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: 'Shall not all the workers of iniquity know it, who eat up My people as they eat bread, and call not upon the LORD?'

jps.text: 'Shall not all the workers of iniquity know it, who eat up My people as they eat bread, and call not upon the LORD?'

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤ם ׀ פָּ֣חֲדוּ פָ֑חַד כִּֽי־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים בְּדֹ֣ור צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: There are they in great fear; for God is with the righteous generation.

jps.text: There are they in great fear; for God is with the righteous generation.

verses.hebrewText: עֲצַת־עָנִ֥י תָבִ֑ישׁוּ כִּ֖י יְהוָ֣ה מַחְסֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Ye would put to shame the counsel of the poor, but the LORD is his refuge.

jps.text: Ye would put to shame the counsel of the poor, but the LORD is his refuge.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֥י יִתֵּ֣ן מִצִּיֹּון֮ יְשׁוּעַ֪ת יִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל בְּשׁ֣וּב יְ֭הוָה שְׁב֣וּת עַמֹּ֑ו יָגֵ֥ל יַ֝עֲקֹ֗ב יִשְׂמַ֥ח יִשְׂרֽ͏ָאֵל׃
verses.englishText: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When the LORD turneth the captivity of His people, let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.

jps.text: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When the LORD turneth the captivity of His people, let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְדָ֫וִ֥ד יְ֭הֹוָה מִי־יָג֣וּר בְּאָהֳלֶ֑ךָ מִֽי־יִ֝שְׁכֹּ֗ן בְּהַ֣ר קָדְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. LORD, who shall sojourn in Thy tabernacle? Who shall dwell upon Thy holy mountain?

jps.text: A Psalm of David. LORD, who shall sojourn in Thy tabernacle? Who shall dwell upon Thy holy mountain?

verses.hebrewText: הֹולֵ֣ךְ תָּ֭מִים וּפֹעֵ֥ל צֶ֑דֶק וְדֹבֵ֥ר אֱ֝מֶ֗ת בִּלְבָבֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, and speaketh truth in his heart;

jps.text: He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, and speaketh truth in his heart;

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־רָגַ֨ל ׀ עַל־לְשֹׁנֹ֗ו לֹא־עָשָׂ֣ה לְרֵעֵ֣הוּ רָעָ֑ה וְ֝חֶרְפָּ֗ה לֹא־נָשָׂ֥א עַל־קְרֹֽבֹו׃
verses.englishText: That hath no slander upon his tongue, nor doeth evil to his fellow, nor taketh up a reproach against his neighbour;

jps.text: That hath no slander upon his tongue, nor doeth evil to his fellow, nor taketh up a reproach against his neighbour;

verses.hebrewText: נִבְזֶ֤ה ׀ בְּֽעֵ֘ינָ֤יו נִמְאָ֗ס וְאֶת־יִרְאֵ֣י יְהוָ֣ה יְכַבֵּ֑ד נִשְׁבַּ֥ע לְ֝הָרַ֗ע וְלֹ֣א יָמִֽר׃
verses.englishText: In whose eyes a vile person is despised, but he honoureth them that fear the LORD; he that sweareth to his own hurt, and changeth not;

jps.text: In whose eyes a vile person is despised, but he honoureth them that fear the LORD; he that sweareth to his own hurt, and changeth not;

verses.hebrewText: כַּסְפֹּ֤ו ׀ לֹא־נָתַ֣ן בְּנֶשֶׁךְ֮ וְשֹׁ֥חַד עַל־נָקִ֗י לֹ֥א לָ֫קָ֥ח עֹֽשֵׂה־אֵ֑לֶּה לֹ֖א יִמֹּ֣וט לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He that putteth not out his money on interest, nor taketh a bribe against the innocent. He that doeth these things shall never be moved.

jps.text: He that putteth not out his money on interest, nor taketh a bribe against the innocent. He that doeth these things shall never be moved.

verses.hebrewText: מִכְתָּ֥ם לְדָוִ֑ד שָֽׁמְרֵ֥נִי אֵ֝֗ל כִּֽי־חָסִ֥יתִי בָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Michtam of David. Keep me, O God; for I have taken refuge in Thee.

jps.text: Michtam of David. Keep me, O God; for I have taken refuge in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣רְתְּ לַֽ֭יהוָה אֲדֹנָ֣י אָ֑תָּה טֹ֝ובָתִ֗י בַּל־עָלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have said unto the LORD: 'Thou art my Lord; I have no good but in Thee';

jps.text: I have said unto the LORD: 'Thou art my Lord; I have no good but in Thee';

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭קְדֹושִׁים אֲשֶׁר־בָּאָ֣רֶץ הֵ֑מָּה וְ֝אַדִּירֵ֗י כָּל־חֶפְצִי־בָֽם׃
verses.englishText: As for the holy that are in the earth, they are the excellent in whom is all my delight.

jps.text: As for the holy that are in the earth, they are the excellent in whom is all my delight.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְבּ֥וּ עַצְּבֹותָם֮ אַחֵ֪ר מָ֫הָ֥רוּ בַּל־אַסִּ֣יךְ נִסְכֵּיהֶ֣ם מִדָּ֑ם וּֽבַל־אֶשָּׂ֥א אֶת־שְׁ֝מֹותָ֗ם עַל־שְׂפָתָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let the idols of them be multiplied that make suit unto another; their drink-offerings of blood will I not offer, nor take their names upon my lips.

jps.text: Let the idols of them be multiplied that make suit unto another; their drink-offerings of blood will I not offer, nor take their names upon my lips.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה מְנָת־חֶלְקִ֥י וְכֹוסִ֑י אַ֝תָּ֗ה תֹּומִ֥יךְ גֹּורָלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, the portion of mine inheritance and of my cup, Thou maintainest my lot.

jps.text: O LORD, the portion of mine inheritance and of my cup, Thou maintainest my lot.

verses.hebrewText: חֲבָלִ֣ים נָֽפְלוּ־לִ֭י בַּנְּעִמִ֑ים אַף־נַ֝חֲלָ֗ת שָֽׁפְרָ֥ה עָלֽ͏ָי׃
verses.englishText: The lines are fallen unto me in pleasant places; yea, I have a goodly heritage.

jps.text: The lines are fallen unto me in pleasant places; yea, I have a goodly heritage.

verses.hebrewText: אֲבָרֵ֗ךְ אֶת־יְ֭הוָה אֲשֶׁ֣ר יְעָצָ֑נִי אַף־לֵ֝ילֹ֗ות יִסְּר֥וּנִי כִלְיֹותָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will bless the LORD, who hath given me counsel; yea, in the night seasons my reins instruct me.

jps.text: I will bless the LORD, who hath given me counsel; yea, in the night seasons my reins instruct me.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁוִּ֬יתִי יְהוָ֣ה לְנֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִ֑יד כִּ֥י מִֽ֝ימִינִ֗י בַּל־אֶמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: I have set the LORD always before me; surely He is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.

jps.text: I have set the LORD always before me; surely He is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.

verses.hebrewText: לָכֵ֤ן ׀ שָׂמַ֣ח לִ֭בִּי וַיָּ֣גֶל כְּבֹודִ֑י אַף־בְּ֝שָׂרִ֗י יִשְׁכֹּ֥ן לָבֶֽטַח׃
verses.englishText: Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoiceth; my flesh also dwelleth in safety;

jps.text: Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoiceth; my flesh also dwelleth in safety;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־תַעֲזֹ֣ב נַפְשִׁ֣י לִשְׁאֹ֑ול לֹֽא־תִתֵּ֥ן חֲ֝סִידְךָ֗ לִרְאֹ֥ות שָֽׁחַת׃
verses.englishText: For Thou wilt not abandon my soul to the nether-world; neither wilt Thou suffer Thy godly one to see the pit.

jps.text: For Thou wilt not abandon my soul to the nether-world; neither wilt Thou suffer Thy godly one to see the pit.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּֽודִיעֵנִי֮ אֹ֤רַח חַ֫יִּ֥ים שֹׂ֣בַע שְׂ֭מָחֹות אֶת־פָּנֶ֑יךָ נְעִמֹ֖ות בִּימִינְךָ֣ נֶֽצַח׃
verses.englishText: Thou makest me to know the path of life; in Thy presence is fulness of joy, in Thy right hand bliss for evermore.

jps.text: Thou makest me to know the path of life; in Thy presence is fulness of joy, in Thy right hand bliss for evermore.

verses.hebrewText: תְּפִלָּ֗ה לְדָ֫וִ֥ד שִׁמְעָ֤ה יְהוָ֨ה ׀ צֶ֗דֶק הַקְשִׁ֥יבָה רִנָּתִ֗י הַאֲזִ֥ינָה תְפִלָּתִ֑י בְּ֝לֹ֗א שִׂפְתֵ֥י מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A Prayer of David. Hear the right, O LORD, attend unto my cry; give ear unto my prayer from lips without deceit.

jps.text: A Prayer of David. Hear the right, O LORD, attend unto my cry; give ear unto my prayer from lips without deceit.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭לְּפָנֶיךָ מִשְׁפָּטִ֣י יֵצֵ֑א עֵ֝ינֶ֗יךָ תֶּחֱזֶ֥ינָה מֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Let my judgment come forth from Thy presence; let Thine eyes behold equity.

jps.text: Let my judgment come forth from Thy presence; let Thine eyes behold equity.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֘חַ֤נְתָּ לִבִּ֨י ׀ פָּ֘קַ֤דְתָּ לַּ֗יְלָה צְרַפְתַּ֥נִי בַל־תִּמְצָ֑א זַ֝מֹּתִ֗י בַּל־יַעֲבָר־פִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast tried my heart, Thou hast visited it in the night; Thou hast tested me, and Thou findest not that I had a thought which should not pass my mouth.

jps.text: Thou hast tried my heart, Thou hast visited it in the night; Thou hast tested me, and Thou findest not that I had a thought which should not pass my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: לִפְעֻלֹּ֣ות אָ֭דָם בִּדְבַ֣ר שְׂפָתֶ֑יךָ אֲנִ֥י שָׁ֝מַ֗רְתִּי אָרְחֹ֥ות פָּרִֽיץ׃
verses.englishText: As for the doings of men, by the word of Thy lips I have kept me from the ways of the violent.

jps.text: As for the doings of men, by the word of Thy lips I have kept me from the ways of the violent.

verses.hebrewText: תָּמֹ֣ךְ אֲ֭שֻׁרַי בְּמַעְגְּלֹותֶ֑יךָ בַּל־נָמֹ֥וטּוּ פְעָמָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My steps have held fast to Thy paths, my feet have not slipped.

jps.text: My steps have held fast to Thy paths, my feet have not slipped.

verses.hebrewText: אֲנִֽי־קְרָאתִ֣יךָ כִֽי־תַעֲנֵ֣נִי אֵ֑ל הַֽט־אָזְנְךָ֥ לִ֝֗י שְׁמַ֣ע אִמְרָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: As for me, I call upon Thee, for Thou wilt answer me, O God; incline Thine ear unto me, hear my speech.

jps.text: As for me, I call upon Thee, for Thou wilt answer me, O God; incline Thine ear unto me, hear my speech.

verses.hebrewText: הַפְלֵ֣ה חֲ֭סָדֶיךָ מֹושִׁ֣יעַ חֹוסִ֑ים מִ֝מִּתְקֹומְמִ֗ים בִּֽימִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Make passing great Thy mercies, O Thou that savest by Thy right hand from assailants them that take refuge in Thee.

jps.text: Make passing great Thy mercies, O Thou that savest by Thy right hand from assailants them that take refuge in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֭מְרֵנִי כְּאִישֹׁ֣ון בַּת־עָ֑יִן בְּצֵ֥ל כְּ֝נָפֶ֗יךָ תַּסְתִּירֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Keep me as the apple of the eye, hide me in the shadow of Thy wings,

jps.text: Keep me as the apple of the eye, hide me in the shadow of Thy wings,

verses.hebrewText: מִפְּנֵ֣י רְ֭שָׁעִים ז֣וּ שַׁדּ֑וּנִי אֹיְבַ֥י בְּ֝נֶ֗פֶשׁ יַקִּ֥יפוּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: From the wicked that oppress, my deadly enemies, that compass me about.

jps.text: From the wicked that oppress, my deadly enemies, that compass me about.

verses.hebrewText: חֶלְבָּ֥מֹו סָּגְר֑וּ פִּ֝֗ימֹו דִּבְּר֥וּ בְגֵאֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: Their gross heart they have shut tight, with their mouth they speak proudly.

jps.text: Their gross heart they have shut tight, with their mouth they speak proudly.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭שֻּׁרֵינוּ עַתָּ֣ה *סְבָבוּנִי (סְבָב֑וּנוּ) עֵינֵיהֶ֥ם יָ֝שִׁ֗יתוּ לִנְטֹ֥ות בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: At our every step they have now encompassed us; they set their eyes to cast us down to the earth.

jps.text: At our every step they have now encompassed us; they set their eyes to cast us down to the earth.

verses.hebrewText: דִּמְיֹנֹ֗ו כְּ֭אַרְיֵה יִכְסֹ֣וף לִטְרֹ֑וף וְ֝כִכְפִ֗יר יֹשֵׁ֥ב בְּמִסְתָּרֽ͏ִים׃
verses.englishText: He is like a lion that is eager to tear in pieces, and like a young lion lurking in secret places.

jps.text: He is like a lion that is eager to tear in pieces, and like a young lion lurking in secret places.

verses.hebrewText: קוּמָ֤ה יְהוָ֗ה קַדְּמָ֣ה פָ֭נָיו הַכְרִיעֵ֑הוּ פַּלְּטָ֥ה נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י מֵרָשָׁ֥ע חַרְבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O LORD, confront him, cast him down; deliver my soul from the wicked, by Thy sword;

jps.text: Arise, O LORD, confront him, cast him down; deliver my soul from the wicked, by Thy sword;

verses.hebrewText: מִֽמְתִ֥ים יָדְךָ֨ ׀ יְהוָ֡ה מִֽמְתִ֬ים מֵחֶ֗לֶד חֶלְקָ֥ם בַּֽחַיִּים֮ *וּצְפִינְךָ (וּֽצְפוּנְךָ֮) תְּמַלֵּ֪א בִ֫טְנָ֥ם יִשְׂבְּע֥וּ בָנִ֑ים וְהִנִּ֥יחוּ יִ֝תְרָ֗ם לְעֹולְלֵיהֽ͏ֶם׃
verses.englishText: From men, by Thy hand, O LORD, from men of the world, whose portion is in this life, and whose belly Thou fillest with Thy treasure; who have children in plenty, and leave their abundance to their babes.

jps.text: From men, by Thy hand, O LORD, from men of the world, whose portion is in this life, and whose belly Thou fillest with Thy treasure; who have children in plenty, and leave their abundance to their babes.

verses.hebrewText: אֲנִ֗י בְּ֭צֶדֶק אֶחֱזֶ֣ה פָנֶ֑יךָ אֶשְׂבְּעָ֥ה בְ֝הָקִ֗יץ תְּמוּנָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: As for me, I shall behold Thy face in righteousness; I shall be satisfied, when I awake, with Thy likeness.

jps.text: As for me, I shall behold Thy face in righteousness; I shall be satisfied, when I awake, with Thy likeness.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֤חַ ׀ לְעֶ֥בֶד יְהוָ֗ה לְדָ֫וִ֥ד אֲשֶׁ֤ר דִּבֶּ֨ר ׀ לַיהוָ֗ה אֶת־דִּ֭בְרֵי הַשִּׁירָ֣ה הַזֹּ֑את בְּיֹ֤ום הִֽצִּיל־יְהוָ֘ה אֹותֹ֥ו מִכַּ֥ף כָּל־אֹ֝יְבָ֗יו וּמִיַּ֥ד שָׁאֽוּל׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David the servant of the LORD, who spoke unto the LORD the words of this song in the day that the LORD delivered him from the hand of all his enemies, and from the hand of Saul;

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David the servant of the LORD, who spoke unto the LORD the words of this song in the day that the LORD delivered him from the hand of all his enemies, and from the hand of Saul;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּאמַ֡ר אֶרְחָמְךָ֖ יְהוָ֣ה חִזְקִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And he said: I love thee, O LORD, my strength.

jps.text: And he said: I love thee, O LORD, my strength.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ סַֽלְעִ֥י וּמְצוּדָתִ֗י וּמְפַ֫לְטִ֥י אֵלִ֣י צ֭וּרִי אֶֽחֱסֶה־בֹּ֑ו מָֽגִנִּ֥י וְקֶֽרֶן־יִ֝שְׁעִ֗י מִשְׂגַּבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in Him I take refuge; my shield, and my horn of salvation, my high tower.

jps.text: The LORD is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in Him I take refuge; my shield, and my horn of salvation, my high tower.

verses.hebrewText: מְ֭הֻלָּל אֶקְרָ֣א יְהוָ֑ה וּמִן־אֹ֝יְבַ֗י אִוָּשֵֽׁעַ׃
verses.englishText: Praised, I cry, is the LORD, and I am saved from mine enemies.

jps.text: Praised, I cry, is the LORD, and I am saved from mine enemies.

verses.hebrewText: אֲפָפ֥וּנִי חֶבְלֵי־מָ֑וֶת וְֽנַחֲלֵ֖י בְלִיַּ֣עַל יְבַֽעֲתֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: The cords of Death compassed me, and the floods of Belial assailed me.

jps.text: The cords of Death compassed me, and the floods of Belial assailed me.

verses.hebrewText: חֶבְלֵ֣י שְׁאֹ֣ול סְבָב֑וּנִי קִ֝דְּמ֗וּנִי מֹ֣וקְשֵׁי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: The cords of Sheol surrounded me; the snares of Death confronted me.

jps.text: The cords of Sheol surrounded me; the snares of Death confronted me.

verses.hebrewText: בַּצַּר־לִ֤י ׀ אֶֽקְרָ֣א יְהוָה֮ וְאֶל־אֱלֹהַ֪י אֲשַׁ֫וֵּ֥עַ יִשְׁמַ֣ע מֵהֵיכָלֹ֣ו קֹולִ֑י וְ֝שַׁוְעָתִ֗י לְפָנָ֤יו ׀ תָּבֹ֬וא בְאָזְנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: In my distress I called upon the LORD, and cried unto my God; out of His temple He heard my voice, and my cry came before Him unto His ears.

jps.text: In my distress I called upon the LORD, and cried unto my God; out of His temple He heard my voice, and my cry came before Him unto His ears.

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּגְעַ֬שׁ וַתִּרְעַ֨שׁ ׀ הָאָ֗רֶץ וּמֹוסְדֵ֣י הָרִ֣ים יִרְגָּ֑זוּ וַ֝יִּתְגָּֽעֲשׁ֗וּ כִּי־חָ֥רָה לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Then the earth did shake and quake, the foundations also of the mountains did tremble; they were shaken, because He was wroth.

jps.text: Then the earth did shake and quake, the foundations also of the mountains did tremble; they were shaken, because He was wroth.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֘לָ֤ה עָשָׁ֨ן ׀ בְּאַפֹּ֗ו וְאֵשׁ־מִפִּ֥יו תֹּאכֵ֑ל גֶּ֝חָלִ֗ים בָּעֲר֥וּ מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Smoke arose up in His nostrils, and fire out of His mouth did devour; coals flamed forth from Him.

jps.text: Smoke arose up in His nostrils, and fire out of His mouth did devour; coals flamed forth from Him.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּ֣ט שָׁ֭מַיִם וַיֵּרַ֑ד וַ֝עֲרָפֶ֗ל תַּ֣חַת רַגְלֽ͏ָיו׃
verses.englishText: He bowed the heavens also, and came down; and thick darkness was under His feet.

jps.text: He bowed the heavens also, and came down; and thick darkness was under His feet.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּרְכַּ֣ב עַל־כְּ֭רוּב וַיָּעֹ֑ף וַ֝יֵּ֗דֶא עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: And He rode upon a cherub, and did fly; yea, He did swoop down upon the wings of the wind.

jps.text: And He rode upon a cherub, and did fly; yea, He did swoop down upon the wings of the wind.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֤שֶׁת חֹ֨שֶׁךְ ׀ סִתְרֹ֗ו סְבִֽיבֹותָ֥יו סֻכָּתֹ֑ו חֶשְׁכַת־מַ֝֗יִם עָבֵ֥י שְׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He made darkness His hiding-place, His pavilion round about Him; darkness of waters, thick clouds of the skies.

jps.text: He made darkness His hiding-place, His pavilion round about Him; darkness of waters, thick clouds of the skies.

verses.hebrewText: מִנֹּ֗גַהּ נֶ֫גְדֹּ֥ו עָבָ֥יו עָבְר֑וּ בָּ֝רָ֗ד וְגַֽחֲלֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: At the brightness before Him, there passed through His thick clouds hailstones and coals of fire.

jps.text: At the brightness before Him, there passed through His thick clouds hailstones and coals of fire.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּרְעֵ֬ם בַּשָּׁמַ֨יִם ׀ יְֽהוָ֗ה וְ֭עֶלְיֹון יִתֵּ֣ן קֹלֹ֑ו בָּ֝רָ֗ד וְגַֽחֲלֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD also thundered in the heavens, and the Most High gave forth His voice; hailstones and coals of fire.

jps.text: The LORD also thundered in the heavens, and the Most High gave forth His voice; hailstones and coals of fire.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח חִ֭צָּיו וַיְפִיצֵ֑ם וּבְרָקִ֥ים רָ֝ב וַיְהֻמֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: And He sent out His arrows, and scattered them; and He shot forth lightnings, and discomfited them.

jps.text: And He sent out His arrows, and scattered them; and He shot forth lightnings, and discomfited them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּ֤רָא֨וּ ׀ אֲפִ֥יקֵי מַ֗יִם וַֽיִּגָּלוּ֮ מֹוסְדֹ֪ות תֵּ֫בֵ֥ל מִגַּעֲרָ֣תְךָ֣ יְהוָ֑ה מִ֝נִּשְׁמַ֗ת ר֣וּחַ אַפֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And the channels of waters appeared, and the foundations of the world were laid bare, at Thy rebuke, O LORD, at the blast of the breath of Thy nostrils.

jps.text: And the channels of waters appeared, and the foundations of the world were laid bare, at Thy rebuke, O LORD, at the blast of the breath of Thy nostrils.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁלַ֣ח מִ֭מָּרֹום יִקָּחֵ֑נִי יַֽ֝מְשֵׁ֗נִי מִמַּ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: He sent from on high, He took me; He drew me out of many waters.

jps.text: He sent from on high, He took me; He drew me out of many waters.

verses.hebrewText: יַצִּילֵ֗נִי מֵאֹיְבִ֥י עָ֑ז וּ֝מִשֹּׂנְאַ֗י כִּֽי־אָמְצ֥וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: He delivered me from mine enemy most strong, and from them that hated me, for they were too mighty for me.

jps.text: He delivered me from mine enemy most strong, and from them that hated me, for they were too mighty for me.

verses.hebrewText: יְקַדְּמ֥וּנִי בְיֹום־אֵידִ֑י וַֽיְהִי־יְהוָ֖ה לְמִשְׁעָ֣ן לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: They confronted me in the day of my calamity; but the LORD was a stay unto me.

jps.text: They confronted me in the day of my calamity; but the LORD was a stay unto me.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּוצִיאֵ֥נִי לַמֶּרְחָ֑ב יְ֝חַלְּצֵ֗נִי כִּ֘י חָ֥פֵֽץ בִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: He brought me forth also into a large place; He delivered me, because He delighted in me.

jps.text: He brought me forth also into a large place; He delivered me, because He delighted in me.

verses.hebrewText: יִגְמְלֵ֣נִי יְהוָ֣ה כְּצִדְקִ֑י כְּבֹ֥ר יָ֝דַ֗י יָשִׁ֥יב לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The LORD rewarded me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands hath He recompensed me.

jps.text: The LORD rewarded me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands hath He recompensed me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שָׁ֭מַרְתִּי דַּרְכֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה וְלֹֽא־רָ֝שַׁ֗עְתִּי מֵאֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For I have kept the ways of the LORD, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

jps.text: For I have kept the ways of the LORD, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י כָל־מִשְׁפָּטָ֣יו לְנֶגְדִּ֑י וְ֝חֻקֹּתָ֗יו לֹא־אָסִ֥יר מֶֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: For all His ordinances were before me, and I put not away His statutes from me.

jps.text: For all His ordinances were before me, and I put not away His statutes from me.

verses.hebrewText: וָאֱהִ֣י תָמִ֣ים עִמֹּ֑ו וָ֝אֶשְׁתַּמֵּ֗ר מֵעֲוֹנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And I was single-hearted with Him, and I kept myself from mine iniquity.

jps.text: And I was single-hearted with Him, and I kept myself from mine iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּֽשֶׁב־יְהוָ֣ה לִ֣י כְצִדְקִ֑י כְּבֹ֥ר יָ֝דַ֗י לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Therefore hath the LORD recompensed me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in His eyes.

jps.text: Therefore hath the LORD recompensed me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in His eyes.

verses.hebrewText: עִם־חָסִ֥יד תִּתְחַסָּ֑ד עִם־גְּבַ֥ר תָּ֝מִ֗ים תִּתַּמָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: With the merciful Thou dost show Thyself merciful, with the upright man Thou dost show Thyself upright;

jps.text: With the merciful Thou dost show Thyself merciful, with the upright man Thou dost show Thyself upright;

verses.hebrewText: עִם־נָבָ֥ר תִּתְבָּרָ֑ר וְעִם־עִ֝קֵּ֗שׁ תִּתְפַּתָּֽל׃
verses.englishText: With the pure Thou dost show Thyself pure; and with the crooked Thou dost show Thyself subtle.

jps.text: With the pure Thou dost show Thyself pure; and with the crooked Thou dost show Thyself subtle.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה עַם־עָנִ֣י תֹושִׁ֑יעַ וְעֵינַ֖יִם רָמֹ֣ות תַּשְׁפִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: For Thou dost save the afflicted people; but the haughty eyes Thou dost humble.

jps.text: For Thou dost save the afflicted people; but the haughty eyes Thou dost humble.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה תָּאִ֣יר נֵרִ֑י יְהוָ֥ה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י יַגִּ֥יהַּ חָשְׁכִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: For Thou dost light my lamp; the LORD my God doth lighten my darkness.

jps.text: For Thou dost light my lamp; the LORD my God doth lighten my darkness.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־בְ֭ךָ אָרֻ֣ץ גְּד֑וּד וּ֝בֵֽאלֹהַ֗י אֲדַלֶּג־שֽׁוּר׃
verses.englishText: For by Thee I run upon a troop; and by my God do I scale a wall.

jps.text: For by Thee I run upon a troop; and by my God do I scale a wall.

verses.hebrewText: הָאֵל֮ תָּמִ֪ים דַּ֫רְכֹּ֥ו אִמְרַֽת־יְהוָ֥ה צְרוּפָ֑ה מָגֵ֥ן ה֝֗וּא לְכֹ֤ל ׀ הַחֹסִ֬ים בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: As for God, His way is perfect; the word of the LORD is tried; He is a shield unto all them that take refuge in Him.

jps.text: As for God, His way is perfect; the word of the LORD is tried; He is a shield unto all them that take refuge in Him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מִ֣י אֱ֭לֹוהַּ מִבַּלְעֲדֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה וּמִ֥י צ֝֗וּר זוּלָתִ֥י אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: For who is God, save the LORD? And who is a Rock, except our God?

jps.text: For who is God, save the LORD? And who is a Rock, except our God?

verses.hebrewText: הָ֭אֵל הַמְאַזְּרֵ֣נִי חָ֑יִל וַיִּתֵּ֖ן תָּמִ֣ים דַּרְכִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: The God that girdeth me with strength, and maketh my way straight;

jps.text: The God that girdeth me with strength, and maketh my way straight;

verses.hebrewText: מְשַׁוֶּ֣ה רַ֭גְלַי כָּאַיָּלֹ֑ות וְעַ֥ל בָּ֝מֹתַ֗י יַעֲמִידֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Who maketh my feet like hinds', and setteth me upon my high places;

jps.text: Who maketh my feet like hinds', and setteth me upon my high places;

verses.hebrewText: מְלַמֵּ֣ד יָ֭דַי לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה וְֽנִחֲתָ֥ה קֶֽשֶׁת־נְ֝חוּשָׁ֗ה זְרֹועֹתָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Who traineth my hands for war, so that mine arms do bend a bow of brass.

jps.text: Who traineth my hands for war, so that mine arms do bend a bow of brass.

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּתֶּן־לִי֮ מָגֵ֪ן יִ֫שְׁעֶ֥ךָ וִֽימִינְךָ֥ תִסְעָדֵ֑נִי וְֽעַנְוַתְךָ֥ תַרְבֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast also given me Thy shield of salvation, and Thy right hand hath holden me up; and Thy condescension hath made me great.

jps.text: Thou hast also given me Thy shield of salvation, and Thy right hand hath holden me up; and Thy condescension hath made me great.

verses.hebrewText: תַּרְחִ֣יב צַעֲדִ֣י תַחְתָּ֑י וְלֹ֥א מָ֝עֲד֗וּ קַרְסֻלָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast enlarged my steps under me, and my feet have not slipped.

jps.text: Thou hast enlarged my steps under me, and my feet have not slipped.

verses.hebrewText: אֶרְדֹּ֣וף אֹ֭ויְבַי וְאַשִּׂיגֵ֑ם וְלֹֽא־אָ֝שׁוּב עַד־כַּלֹּותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: I have pursued mine enemies, and overtaken them; neither did I turn back till they were consumed.

jps.text: I have pursued mine enemies, and overtaken them; neither did I turn back till they were consumed.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭מְחָצֵם וְלֹא־יֻ֣כְלוּ ק֑וּם יִ֝פְּל֗וּ תַּ֣חַת רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I have smitten them through, so that they are not able to rise; they are fallen under my feet.

jps.text: I have smitten them through, so that they are not able to rise; they are fallen under my feet.

verses.hebrewText: וַתְּאַזְּרֵ֣נִי חַ֭יִל לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה תַּכְרִ֖יעַ קָמַ֣י תַּחְתָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: For Thou hast girded me with strength unto the battle; Thou hast subdued under me those that rose up against me.

jps.text: For Thou hast girded me with strength unto the battle; Thou hast subdued under me those that rose up against me.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאֹיְבַ֗י נָתַ֣תָּה לִּ֣י עֹ֑רֶף וּ֝מְשַׂנְאַ֗י אַצְמִיתֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast also made mine enemies turn their backs unto me, and I did cut off them that hate me.

jps.text: Thou hast also made mine enemies turn their backs unto me, and I did cut off them that hate me.

verses.hebrewText: יְשַׁוְּע֥וּ וְאֵין־מֹושִׁ֑יעַ עַל־יְ֝הוָ֗ה וְלֹ֣א עָנָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They cried, but there was none to save; even unto the LORD, but He answered them not.

jps.text: They cried, but there was none to save; even unto the LORD, but He answered them not.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאֶשְׁחָקֵ֗ם כְּעָפָ֥ר עַל־פְּנֵי־ר֑וּחַ כְּטִ֖יט חוּצֹ֣ות אֲרִיקֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Then did I beat them small as the dust before the wind; I did cast them out as the mire of the streets.

jps.text: Then did I beat them small as the dust before the wind; I did cast them out as the mire of the streets.

verses.hebrewText: תְּפַלְּטֵנִי֮ מֵרִ֪יבֵ֫י עָ֥ם תְּ֭שִׂימֵנִי לְרֹ֣אשׁ גֹּויִ֑ם עַ֖ם לֹא־יָדַ֣עְתִּי יַֽעַבְדֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast delivered me from the contentions of the people; Thou hast made me the head of the nations; a people whom I have not known serve me.

jps.text: Thou hast delivered me from the contentions of the people; Thou hast made me the head of the nations; a people whom I have not known serve me.

verses.hebrewText: לְשֵׁ֣מַֽע אֹ֭זֶן יִשָּׁ֣מְעוּ לִ֑י בְּנֵֽי־נֵ֝כָ֗ר יְכַחֲשׁוּ־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: As soon as they hear of me, they obey me; the sons of the stranger dwindle away before me.

jps.text: As soon as they hear of me, they obey me; the sons of the stranger dwindle away before me.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵי־נֵכָ֥ר יִבֹּ֑לוּ וְ֝יַחְרְג֗וּ מִֽמִּסְגְּרֹֽותֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The sons of the stranger fade away, and come trembling out of their close places.

jps.text: The sons of the stranger fade away, and come trembling out of their close places.

verses.hebrewText: חַי־יְ֭הוָה וּבָר֣וּךְ צוּרִ֑י וְ֝יָר֗וּם אֱלֹוהֵ֥י יִשְׁעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The LORD liveth, and blessed be my Rock; and exalted be the God of my salvation;

jps.text: The LORD liveth, and blessed be my Rock; and exalted be the God of my salvation;

verses.hebrewText: הָאֵ֗ל הַנֹּותֵ֣ן נְקָמֹ֣ות לִ֑י וַיַּדְבֵּ֖ר עַמִּ֣ים תַּחְתָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Even the God that executeth vengeance for me, and subdueth peoples under me.

jps.text: Even the God that executeth vengeance for me, and subdueth peoples under me.

verses.hebrewText: מְפַלְּטִ֗י מֵאֹ֫יְבָ֥י אַ֣ף מִן־קָ֭מַי תְּרֹומְמֵ֑נִי מֵאִ֥ישׁ חָ֝מָ֗ס תַּצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: He delivereth me from mine enemies; yea, Thou liftest me up above them that rise up against me; Thou deliverest me from the violent man.

jps.text: He delivereth me from mine enemies; yea, Thou liftest me up above them that rise up against me; Thou deliverest me from the violent man.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ אֹודְךָ֖ בַגֹּויִ֥ם ׀ יְהוָ֑ה וּלְשִׁמְךָ֥ אֲזַמֵּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: Therefore I will give thanks unto Thee, O LORD, among the nations, and will sing praises unto Thy name.

jps.text: Therefore I will give thanks unto Thee, O LORD, among the nations, and will sing praises unto Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: *מִגְדֹּל (מַגְדִּיל֮) יְשׁוּעֹ֪ות מַ֫לְכֹּ֥ו וְעֹ֤שֶׂה חֶ֨סֶד ׀ לִמְשִׁיחֹ֗ו לְדָוִ֥ד וּלְזַרְעֹ֗ו עַד־עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Great salvation giveth He to His king; and showeth mercy to His anointed, to David and to his seed, for evermore.

jps.text: Great salvation giveth He to His king; and showeth mercy to His anointed, to David and to his seed, for evermore.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: הַשָּׁמַ֗יִם מְֽסַפְּרִ֥ים כְּבֹֽוד־אֵ֑ל וּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֥ה יָ֝דָ֗יו מַגִּ֥יד הָרָקִֽיעַ׃
verses.englishText: The heavens declare the glory of God, and the firmament showeth His handiwork;

jps.text: The heavens declare the glory of God, and the firmament showeth His handiwork;

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֣ום לְ֭יֹום יַבִּ֣יעַֽ אֹ֑מֶר וְלַ֥יְלָה לְּ֝לַ֗יְלָה יְחַוֶּה־דָּֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: Day unto day uttereth speech, and night unto night revealeth knowledge;

jps.text: Day unto day uttereth speech, and night unto night revealeth knowledge;

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽין־אֹ֭מֶר וְאֵ֣ין דְּבָרִ֑ים בְּ֝לִ֗י נִשְׁמָ֥ע קֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: There is no speech, there are no words, neither is their voice heard.

jps.text: There is no speech, there are no words, neither is their voice heard.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־הָאָ֨רֶץ ׀ יָ֘צָ֤א קַוָּ֗ם וּבִקְצֵ֣ה תֵ֭בֵל מִלֵּיהֶ֑ם לַ֝שֶּׁ֗מֶשׁ שָֽׂם־אֹ֥הֶל בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their line is gone out through all the earth, and their words to the end of the world. In them hath He set a tent for the sun,

jps.text: Their line is gone out through all the earth, and their words to the end of the world. In them hath He set a tent for the sun,

verses.hebrewText: וְה֗וּא כְּ֭חָתָן יֹצֵ֣א מֵחֻפָּתֹ֑ו יָשִׂ֥ישׂ כְּ֝גִבֹּ֗ור לָר֥וּץ אֹֽרַח׃
verses.englishText: Which is as a bridegroom coming out of his chamber, and rejoiceth as a strong man to run his course.

jps.text: Which is as a bridegroom coming out of his chamber, and rejoiceth as a strong man to run his course.

verses.hebrewText: מִקְצֵ֤ה הַשָּׁמַ֨יִם ׀ מֹֽוצָאֹ֗ו וּתְקוּפָתֹ֥ו עַל־קְצֹותָ֑ם וְאֵ֥ין נִ֝סְתָּ֗ר מֵֽחַמָּתֹו׃
