verses.englishText: His going forth is from the end of the heaven, and his circuit unto the ends of it; and there is nothing hid from the heat thereof.

jps.text: His going forth is from the end of the heaven, and his circuit unto the ends of it; and there is nothing hid from the heat thereof.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּ֘ורַ֤ת יְהוָ֣ה תְּ֭מִימָה מְשִׁ֣יבַת נָ֑פֶשׁ עֵד֥וּת יְהוָ֥ה נֶ֝אֱמָנָ֗ה מַחְכִּ֥ימַת פֶּֽתִי׃
verses.englishText: The law of the LORD is perfect, restoring the soul; the testimony of the LORD is sure, making wise the simple.

jps.text: The law of the LORD is perfect, restoring the soul; the testimony of the LORD is sure, making wise the simple.

verses.hebrewText: פִּקּ֘וּדֵ֤י יְהוָ֣ה יְ֭שָׁרִים מְשַׂמְּחֵי־לֵ֑ב מִצְוַ֥ת יְהוָ֥ה בָּ֝רָ֗ה מְאִירַ֥ת עֵינָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: The precepts of the LORD are right, rejoicing the heart; the commandment of the LORD is pure, enlightening the eyes.

jps.text: The precepts of the LORD are right, rejoicing the heart; the commandment of the LORD is pure, enlightening the eyes.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאַ֤ת יְהוָ֨ה ׀ טְהֹורָה֮ עֹומֶ֪דֶת לָ֫עַ֥ד מִֽשְׁפְּטֵי־יְהוָ֥ה אֱמֶ֑ת צָֽדְק֥וּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is clean, enduring for ever; the ordinances of the LORD are true, they are righteous altogether;

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is clean, enduring for ever; the ordinances of the LORD are true, they are righteous altogether;

verses.hebrewText: הַֽנֶּחֱמָדִ֗ים מִ֭זָּהָב וּמִפַּ֣ז רָ֑ב וּמְתוּקִ֥ים מִ֝דְּבַ֗שׁ וְנֹ֣פֶת צוּפִֽים׃
verses.englishText: More to be desired are they than gold, yea, than much fine gold; sweeter also than honey and the honeycomb.

jps.text: More to be desired are they than gold, yea, than much fine gold; sweeter also than honey and the honeycomb.

verses.hebrewText: גַּֽם־עַ֭בְדְּךָ נִזְהָ֣ר בָּהֶ֑ם בְּ֝שָׁמְרָ֗ם עֵ֣קֶב רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Moreover by them is Thy servant warned; in keeping of them there is great reward.

jps.text: Moreover by them is Thy servant warned; in keeping of them there is great reward.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁגִיאֹ֥ות מִֽי־יָבִ֑ין מִֽנִּסְתָּרֹ֥ות נַקֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Who can discern his errors? Clear Thou me from hidden faults.

jps.text: Who can discern his errors? Clear Thou me from hidden faults.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם מִזֵּדִ֨ים ׀ חֲשֹׂ֬ךְ עַבְדֶּ֗ךָ אַֽל־יִמְשְׁלוּ־בִ֣י אָ֣ז אֵיתָ֑ם וְ֝נִקֵּ֗יתִי מִפֶּ֥שַֽׁע רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Keep back Thy servant also from presumptuous sins, that they may not have dominion over me; then shall I be faultless, and I shall be clear from great transgression.

jps.text: Keep back Thy servant also from presumptuous sins, that they may not have dominion over me; then shall I be faultless, and I shall be clear from great transgression.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽהְי֥וּ לְרָצֹ֨ון ׀ אִמְרֵי־פִ֡י וְהֶגְיֹ֣ון לִבִּ֣י לְפָנֶ֑יךָ יְ֝הוָ֗ה צוּרִ֥י וְגֹאֲלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable before Thee, O LORD, my Rock, and my Redeemer.

jps.text: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable before Thee, O LORD, my Rock, and my Redeemer.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: יַֽעַנְךָ֣ יְ֭הוָה בְּיֹ֣ום צָרָ֑ה יְ֝שַׂגֶּבְךָ֗ שֵׁ֤ם ׀ אֱלֹהֵ֬י יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: The LORD answer thee in the day of trouble; the name of the God of Jacob set thee up on high;

jps.text: The LORD answer thee in the day of trouble; the name of the God of Jacob set thee up on high;

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁלַֽח־עֶזְרְךָ֥ מִקֹּ֑דֶשׁ וּ֝מִצִּיֹּ֗ון יִסְעָדֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Send forth thy help from the sanctuary, and support thee out of Zion;

jps.text: Send forth thy help from the sanctuary, and support thee out of Zion;

verses.hebrewText: יִזְכֹּ֥ר כָּל־מִנְחֹתֶ֑ךָ וְעֹולָתְךָ֖ יְדַשְּׁנֶ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Receive the memorial of all thy meal-offerings, and accept the fat of thy burnt-sacrifice; Selah

jps.text: Receive the memorial of all thy meal-offerings, and accept the fat of thy burnt-sacrifice; Selah

verses.hebrewText: יִֽתֶּן־לְךָ֥ כִלְבָבֶ֑ךָ וְֽכָל־עֲצָתְךָ֥ יְמַלֵּֽא׃
verses.englishText: Grant thee according to thine own heart, and fulfil all thy counsel.

jps.text: Grant thee according to thine own heart, and fulfil all thy counsel.

verses.hebrewText: נְרַנְּנָ֤ה ׀ בִּ֘ישׁ֤וּעָתֶ֗ךָ וּבְשֵֽׁם־אֱלֹהֵ֥ינוּ נִדְגֹּ֑ל יְמַלֵּ֥א יְ֝הוָ֗ה כָּל־מִשְׁאֲלֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: We will shout for joy in thy victory, and in the name of our God we will set up our standards; the LORD fulfil all thy petitions.

jps.text: We will shout for joy in thy victory, and in the name of our God we will set up our standards; the LORD fulfil all thy petitions.

verses.hebrewText: עַתָּ֤ה יָדַ֗עְתִּי כִּ֤י הֹושִׁ֥יעַ ׀ יְהוָ֗ה מְשִׁ֫יחֹ֥ו יַ֭עֲנֵהוּ מִשְּׁמֵ֣י קָדְשֹׁ֑ו בִּ֝גְבֻרֹ֗ות יֵ֣שַׁע יְמִינֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Now know I that the LORD saveth His anointed; He will answer him from His holy heaven with the mighty acts of His saving right hand.

jps.text: Now know I that the LORD saveth His anointed; He will answer him from His holy heaven with the mighty acts of His saving right hand.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣לֶּה בָ֭רֶכֶב וְאֵ֣לֶּה בַסּוּסִ֑ים וַאֲנַ֓חְנוּ ׀ בְּשֵׁם־יְהוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣ינוּ נַזְכִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: Some trust in chariots, and some in horses; but we will make mention of the name of the LORD our God.

jps.text: Some trust in chariots, and some in horses; but we will make mention of the name of the LORD our God.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֭מָּה כָּרְע֣וּ וְנָפָ֑לוּ וַאֲנַ֥חְנוּ קַּ֝֗מְנוּ וַנִּתְעֹודָֽד׃
verses.englishText: They are bowed down and fallen; but we are risen, and stand upright.

jps.text: They are bowed down and fallen; but we are risen, and stand upright.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה הֹושִׁ֑יעָה הַ֝מֶּ֗לֶךְ יַעֲנֵ֥נוּ בְיֹום־קָרְאֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Save, LORD; let the King answer us in the day that we call.

jps.text: Save, LORD; let the King answer us in the day that we call.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה בְּעָזְּךָ֥ יִשְׂמַח־מֶ֑לֶךְ וּ֝בִישׁ֥וּעָתְךָ֗ מַה־יָּ֥גֶיל מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, in Thy strength the king rejoiceth; and in Thy salvation how greatly doth he exult!

jps.text: O LORD, in Thy strength the king rejoiceth; and in Thy salvation how greatly doth he exult!

verses.hebrewText: תַּאֲוַ֣ת לִ֭בֹּו נָתַ֣תָּה לֹּ֑ו וַאֲרֶ֥שֶׁת שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו בַּל־מָנַ֥עְתָּ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast given him his heart's desire, and the request of his lips Thou hast not withholden. Selah

jps.text: Thou hast given him his heart's desire, and the request of his lips Thou hast not withholden. Selah

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תְ֭קַדְּמֶנּוּ בִּרְכֹ֣ות טֹ֑וב תָּשִׁ֥ית לְ֝רֹאשֹׁ֗ו עֲטֶ֣רֶת פָּֽז׃
verses.englishText: For Thou meetest him with choicest blessings; Thou settest a crown of fine gold on his head.

jps.text: For Thou meetest him with choicest blessings; Thou settest a crown of fine gold on his head.

verses.hebrewText: חַיִּ֤ים ׀ שָׁאַ֣ל מִ֭מְּךָ נָתַ֣תָּה לֹּ֑ו אֹ֥רֶךְ יָ֝מִ֗ים עֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: He asked life of Thee, Thou gavest it him; even length of days for ever and ever.

jps.text: He asked life of Thee, Thou gavest it him; even length of days for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: גָּדֹ֣ול כְּ֭בֹודֹו בִּישׁוּעָתֶ֑ךָ הֹ֥וד וְ֝הָדָר תְּשַׁוֶּ֥ה עָלָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: His glory is great through Thy salvation; honour and majesty dost Thou lay upon him.

jps.text: His glory is great through Thy salvation; honour and majesty dost Thou lay upon him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תְשִׁיתֵ֣הוּ בְרָכֹ֣ות לָעַ֑ד תְּחַדֵּ֥הוּ בְ֝שִׂמְחָ֗ה אֶת־פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thou makest him most blessed for ever; Thou makest him glad with joy in Thy presence.

jps.text: For Thou makest him most blessed for ever; Thou makest him glad with joy in Thy presence.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הַ֭מֶּלֶךְ בֹּטֵ֣חַ בַּיהוָ֑ה וּבְחֶ֥סֶד עֶ֝לְיֹ֗ון בַּל־יִמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: For the king trusteth in the LORD, yea, in the mercy of the Most High; he shall not be moved.

jps.text: For the king trusteth in the LORD, yea, in the mercy of the Most High; he shall not be moved.

verses.hebrewText: תִּמְצָ֣א יָ֭דְךָ לְכָל־אֹיְבֶ֑יךָ יְ֝מִֽינְךָ תִּמְצָ֥א שֹׂנְאֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thy hand shall be equal to all thine enemies; thy right hand shall overtake those that hate thee.

jps.text: Thy hand shall be equal to all thine enemies; thy right hand shall overtake those that hate thee.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשִׁיתֵ֤מֹו ׀ כְּתַנּ֥וּר אֵשׁ֮ לְעֵ֪ת פָּ֫נֶ֥יךָ יְ֭הוָה בְּאַפֹּ֣ו יְבַלְּעֵ֑ם וְֽתֹאכְלֵ֥ם אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt make them as a fiery furnace in the time of thine anger; the LORD shall swallow them up in His wrath, and the fire shall devour them.

jps.text: Thou shalt make them as a fiery furnace in the time of thine anger; the LORD shall swallow them up in His wrath, and the fire shall devour them.

verses.hebrewText: פִּ֭רְיָמֹו מֵאֶ֣רֶץ תְּאַבֵּ֑ד וְ֝זַרְעָ֗ם מִבְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their fruit shalt thou destroy from the earth, and their seed from among the children of men.

jps.text: Their fruit shalt thou destroy from the earth, and their seed from among the children of men.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־נָט֣וּ עָלֶ֣יךָ רָעָ֑ה חָֽשְׁב֥וּ מְ֝זִמָּ֗ה בַּל־יוּכָֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: For they intended evil against thee, they imagined a device, wherewith they shall not prevail.

jps.text: For they intended evil against thee, they imagined a device, wherewith they shall not prevail.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י תְּשִׁיתֵ֣מֹו שֶׁ֑כֶם בְּ֝מֵֽיתָרֶ֗יךָ תְּכֹונֵ֥ן עַל־פְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: For thou shalt make them turn their back, thou shalt make ready with thy bowstrings against the face of them.

jps.text: For thou shalt make them turn their back, thou shalt make ready with thy bowstrings against the face of them.

verses.hebrewText: ר֣וּמָה יְהוָ֣ה בְעֻזֶּ֑ךָ נָשִׁ֥ירָה וּֽ֝נְזַמְּרָה גְּבוּרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Be Thou exalted, O LORD, in Thy strength; so will we sing and praise Thy power.

jps.text: Be Thou exalted, O LORD, in Thy strength; so will we sing and praise Thy power.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ עַל־אַיֶּ֥לֶת הַשַּׁ֗חַר מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Aijeleth ha-Shahar. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Aijeleth ha-Shahar. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: אֵלִ֣י אֵ֭לִי לָמָ֣ה עֲזַבְתָּ֑נִי רָחֹ֥וק מִֽ֝ישׁוּעָתִ֗י דִּבְרֵ֥י שַׁאֲגָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My God, my God, why hast Thou forsaken me, and art far from my help at the words of my cry?

jps.text: My God, my God, why hast Thou forsaken me, and art far from my help at the words of my cry?

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהַ֗י אֶקְרָ֣א יֹ֖ומָם וְלֹ֣א תַעֲנֶ֑ה וְ֝לַ֗יְלָה וְֽלֹא־דֽוּמִיָּ֥ה לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: O my God, I call by day, but Thou answerest not; and at night, and there is no surcease for me.

jps.text: O my God, I call by day, but Thou answerest not; and at night, and there is no surcease for me.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֥ה קָדֹ֑ושׁ יֹ֝ושֵׁ֗ב תְּהִלֹּ֥ות יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Yet Thou art holy, O Thou that art enthroned upon the praises of Israel.

jps.text: Yet Thou art holy, O Thou that art enthroned upon the praises of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭ךָ בָּטְח֣וּ אֲבֹתֵ֑ינוּ בָּ֝טְח֗וּ וַֽתְּפַלְּטֵֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: In Thee did our fathers trust; they trusted, and Thou didst deliver them.

jps.text: In Thee did our fathers trust; they trusted, and Thou didst deliver them.

verses.hebrewText: אֵלֶ֣יךָ זָעֲק֣וּ וְנִמְלָ֑טוּ בְּךָ֖ בָטְח֣וּ וְלֹא־בֹֽושׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: Unto Thee they cried, and escaped; in Thee did they trust, and were not ashamed.

jps.text: Unto Thee they cried, and escaped; in Thee did they trust, and were not ashamed.

verses.hebrewText: וְאָנֹכִ֣י תֹולַ֣עַת וְלֹא־אִ֑ישׁ חֶרְפַּ֥ת אָ֝דָ֗ם וּבְז֥וּי עָֽם׃
verses.englishText: But I am a worm, and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people.

jps.text: But I am a worm, and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־רֹ֭אַי יַלְעִ֣גוּ לִ֑י יַפְטִ֥ירוּ בְ֝שָׂפָ֗ה יָנִ֥יעוּ רֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.englishText: All they that see me laugh me to scorn; they shoot out the lip, they shake the head:

jps.text: All they that see me laugh me to scorn; they shoot out the lip, they shake the head:

verses.hebrewText: גֹּ֣ל אֶל־יְהוָ֣ה יְפַלְּטֵ֑הוּ יַ֝צִּילֵ֗הוּ כִּ֘י חָ֥פֵֽץ בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'Let him commit himself unto the LORD! let Him rescue him; let Him deliver him, seeing He delighteth in him.'

jps.text: 'Let him commit himself unto the LORD! let Him rescue him; let Him deliver him, seeing He delighteth in him.'

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה גֹחִ֣י מִבָּ֑טֶן מַ֝בְטִיחִ֗י עַל־שְׁדֵ֥י אִמִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art He that took me out of the womb; Thou madest me trust when I was upon my mother's breasts.

jps.text: For Thou art He that took me out of the womb; Thou madest me trust when I was upon my mother's breasts.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭לֶיךָ הָשְׁלַ֣כְתִּי מֵרָ֑חֶם מִבֶּ֥טֶן אִ֝מִּ֗י אֵ֣לִי אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Upon Thee I have been cast from my birth; Thou art my God from my mother's womb.

jps.text: Upon Thee I have been cast from my birth; Thou art my God from my mother's womb.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּרְחַ֣ק מִ֭מֶּנִּי כִּי־צָרָ֣ה קְרֹובָ֑ה כִּי־אֵ֥ין עֹוזֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help.

jps.text: Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help.

verses.hebrewText: סְ֭בָבוּנִי פָּרִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים אַבִּירֵ֖י בָשָׁ֣ן כִּתְּרֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: Many bulls have encompassed me; strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round.

jps.text: Many bulls have encompassed me; strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round.

verses.hebrewText: פָּצ֣וּ עָלַ֣י פִּיהֶ֑ם אַ֝רְיֵ֗ה טֹרֵ֥ף וְשֹׁאֵֽג׃
verses.englishText: They open wide their mouth against me, as a ravening and a roaring lion.

jps.text: They open wide their mouth against me, as a ravening and a roaring lion.

verses.hebrewText: כַּמַּ֥יִם נִשְׁפַּכְתִּי֮ וְהִתְפָּֽרְד֗וּ כָּֽל־עַצְמֹ֫ותָ֥י הָיָ֣ה לִ֭בִּי כַּדֹּונָ֑ג נָ֝מֵ֗ס בְּתֹ֣וךְ מֵעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint; my heart is become like wax; it is melted in mine inmost parts.

jps.text: I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint; my heart is become like wax; it is melted in mine inmost parts.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֘בֵ֤שׁ כַּחֶ֨רֶשׂ ׀ כֹּחִ֗י וּ֖לְשֹׁונִי מֻדְבָּ֣ק מַלְקֹוחָ֑י וְֽלַעֲפַר־מָ֥וֶת תִּשְׁפְּתֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my throat; and Thou layest me in the dust of death.

jps.text: My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my throat; and Thou layest me in the dust of death.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֥י סְבָב֗וּנִי כְּלָ֫בִ֥ים עֲדַ֣ת מְ֭רֵעִים הִקִּיפ֑וּנִי כָּ֝אֲרִ֗י יָדַ֥י וְרַגְלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For dogs have encompassed me; a company of evil-doers have inclosed me; like a lion, they are at my hands and my feet.

jps.text: For dogs have encompassed me; a company of evil-doers have inclosed me; like a lion, they are at my hands and my feet.

verses.hebrewText: אֲסַפֵּ֥ר כָּל־עַצְמֹותָ֑י הֵ֥מָּה יַ֝בִּ֗יטוּ יִרְאוּ־בִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I may count all my bones; they look and gloat over me.

jps.text: I may count all my bones; they look and gloat over me.

verses.hebrewText: יְחַלְּק֣וּ בְגָדַ֣י לָהֶ֑ם וְעַל־לְ֝בוּשִׁ֗י יַפִּ֥ילוּ גֹורָֽל׃
verses.englishText: They part my garments among them, and for my vesture do they cast lots.

jps.text: They part my garments among them, and for my vesture do they cast lots.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה יְ֭הוָה אַל־תִּרְחָ֑ק אֱ֝יָלוּתִ֗י לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי חֽוּשָׁה׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O LORD, be not far off; O Thou my strength, hasten to help me.

jps.text: But Thou, O LORD, be not far off; O Thou my strength, hasten to help me.

verses.hebrewText: הַצִּ֣ילָה מֵחֶ֣רֶב נַפְשִׁ֑י מִיַּד־כֶּ֝֗לֶב יְחִידָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver my soul from the sword; mine only one from the power of the dog.

jps.text: Deliver my soul from the sword; mine only one from the power of the dog.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֭ושִׁיעֵנִי מִפִּ֣י אַרְיֵ֑ה וּמִקַּרְנֵ֖י רֵמִ֣ים עֲנִיתָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Save me from the lion's mouth; yea, from the horns of the wild-oxen do Thou answer me.

jps.text: Save me from the lion's mouth; yea, from the horns of the wild-oxen do Thou answer me.

verses.hebrewText: אֲסַפְּרָ֣ה שִׁמְךָ֣ לְאֶחָ֑י בְּתֹ֖וךְ קָהָ֣ל אֲהַלְלֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: I will declare Thy name unto my brethren; in the midst of the congregation will I praise Thee.

jps.text: I will declare Thy name unto my brethren; in the midst of the congregation will I praise Thee.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאֵ֤י יְהוָ֨ה ׀ הַֽלְל֗וּהוּ כָּל־זֶ֣רַע יַעֲקֹ֣ב כַּבְּד֑וּהוּ וְג֥וּרוּ מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ כָּל־זֶ֥רַע יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: 'Ye that fear the LORD, praise Him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify Him; and stand in awe of Him, all ye the seed of Israel.

jps.text: 'Ye that fear the LORD, praise Him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify Him; and stand in awe of Him, all ye the seed of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹֽא־בָזָ֨ה וְלֹ֪א שִׁקַּ֡ץ עֱנ֬וּת עָנִ֗י וְלֹא־הִסְתִּ֣יר פָּנָ֣יו מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וּֽבְשַׁוְּעֹ֖ו אֵלָ֣יו שָׁמֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: For He hath not despised nor abhorred the lowliness of the poor; neither hath He hid His face from him; but when he cried unto Him, He heard.'

jps.text: For He hath not despised nor abhorred the lowliness of the poor; neither hath He hid His face from him; but when he cried unto Him, He heard.'

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֥אִתְּךָ֗ תְֽהִלָּ֫תִ֥י בְּקָהָ֥ל רָ֑ב נְדָרַ֥י אֲ֝שַׁלֵּ֗ם נֶ֣גֶד יְרֵאָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: From Thee cometh my praise in the great congregation; I will pay my vows before them that fear Him.

jps.text: From Thee cometh my praise in the great congregation; I will pay my vows before them that fear Him.

verses.hebrewText: יֹאכְל֬וּ עֲנָוִ֨ים ׀ וְיִשְׂבָּ֗עוּ יְהַֽלְל֣וּ יְ֭הוָה דֹּ֣רְשָׁ֑יו יְחִ֖י לְבַבְכֶ֣ם לָעַֽד׃
verses.englishText: Let the humble eat and be satisfied; let them praise the LORD that seek after Him; may your heart be quickened for ever!

jps.text: Let the humble eat and be satisfied; let them praise the LORD that seek after Him; may your heart be quickened for ever!

verses.hebrewText: יִזְכְּר֤וּ ׀ וְיָשֻׁ֣בוּ אֶל־יְ֭הוָה כָּל־אַפְסֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְיִֽשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ לְ֝פָנֶ֗יךָ כָּֽל־מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ות גֹּויִֽם׃
verses.englishText: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn unto the LORD; and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before Thee.

jps.text: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn unto the LORD; and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י לַ֭יהוָה הַמְּלוּכָ֑ה וּ֝מֹשֵׁ֗ל בַּגֹּויִֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the kingdom is the LORD'S; and He is the ruler over the nations.

jps.text: For the kingdom is the LORD'S; and He is the ruler over the nations.

verses.hebrewText: אָכְל֬וּ וַיִּֽשְׁתַּחֲוּ֨וּ ׀ כָּֽל־דִּשְׁנֵי־אֶ֗רֶץ לְפָנָ֣יו יִ֭כְרְעוּ כָּל־יֹורְדֵ֣י עָפָ֑ר וְ֝נַפְשֹׁ֗ו לֹ֣א חִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: All the fat ones of the earth shall eat and worship; all they that go down to the dust shall kneel before Him, even he that cannot keep his soul alive.

jps.text: All the fat ones of the earth shall eat and worship; all they that go down to the dust shall kneel before Him, even he that cannot keep his soul alive.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֥רַע יַֽעַבְדֶ֑נּוּ יְסֻפַּ֖ר לַֽאדֹנָ֣י לַדֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: A seed shall serve him; it shall be told of the Lord unto the next generation.

jps.text: A seed shall serve him; it shall be told of the Lord unto the next generation.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭בֹאוּ וְיַגִּ֣ידוּ צִדְקָתֹ֑ו לְעַ֥ם נֹ֝ולָ֗ד כִּ֣י עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: They shall come and shall declare His righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that He hath done it.

jps.text: They shall come and shall declare His righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that He hath done it.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִ֑ד יְהוָ֥ה רֹ֝עִ֗י לֹ֣א אֶחְסָֽר׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.

verses.hebrewText: בִּנְאֹ֣ות דֶּ֭שֶׁא יַרְבִּיצֵ֑נִי עַל־מֵ֖י מְנֻחֹ֣ות יְנַהֲלֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures; He leadeth me beside the still waters.

jps.text: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures; He leadeth me beside the still waters.

verses.hebrewText: נַפְשִׁ֥י יְשֹׁובֵ֑ב יַֽנְחֵ֥נִי בְמַעְגְּלֵי־צֶ֝֗דֶק לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He restoreth my soul; He guideth me in straight paths for His name's sake.

jps.text: He restoreth my soul; He guideth me in straight paths for His name's sake.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם כִּֽי־אֵלֵ֨ךְ בְּגֵ֪יא צַלְמָ֡וֶת לֹא־אִ֘ירָ֤א רָ֗ע כִּי־אַתָּ֥ה עִמָּדִ֑י שִׁבְטְךָ֥ וּ֝מִשְׁעַנְתֶּ֗ךָ הֵ֣מָּה יְנַֽחֲמֻֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for Thou art with me; Thy rod and Thy staff, they comfort me.

jps.text: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for Thou art with me; Thy rod and Thy staff, they comfort me.

verses.hebrewText: תַּעֲרֹ֬ךְ לְפָנַ֨י ׀ שֻׁלְחָ֗ן נֶ֥גֶד צֹרְרָ֑י דִּשַּׁ֖נְתָּ בַשֶּׁ֥מֶן רֹ֝אשִׁ֗י כֹּוסִ֥י רְוָיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies; Thou hast anointed my head with oil; my cup runneth over.

jps.text: Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies; Thou hast anointed my head with oil; my cup runneth over.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֤ךְ ׀ טֹ֤וב וָחֶ֣סֶד יִ֭רְדְּפוּנִי כָּל־יְמֵ֣י חַיָּ֑י וְשַׁבְתִּ֥י בְּבֵית־יְ֝הוָ֗ה לְאֹ֣רֶךְ יָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life; and I shall dwell in the house of the LORD for ever.

jps.text: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life; and I shall dwell in the house of the LORD for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֗ד מִ֫זְמֹ֥ור לַֽ֭יהוָה הָאָ֣רֶץ וּמְלֹואָ֑הּ תֵּ֝בֵ֗ל וְיֹ֣שְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. The earth is the LORD'S, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. The earth is the LORD'S, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־ה֖וּא עַל־יַמִּ֣ים יְסָדָ֑הּ וְעַל־נְ֝הָרֹ֗ות יְכֹונְנֶֽהָ׃
verses.englishText: For He hath founded it upon the seas, and established it upon the floods.

jps.text: For He hath founded it upon the seas, and established it upon the floods.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יַעֲלֶ֥ה בְהַר־יְהוָ֑ה וּמִי־יָ֝קוּם בִּמְקֹ֥ום קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Who shall ascend into the mountain of the LORD? and who shall stand in His holy place?

jps.text: Who shall ascend into the mountain of the LORD? and who shall stand in His holy place?

verses.hebrewText: נְקִ֥י כַפַּ֗יִם וּֽבַר־לֵ֫בָ֥ב אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹא־נָשָׂ֣א לַשָּׁ֣וְא נַפְשִׁ֑י וְלֹ֖א נִשְׁבַּ֣ע לְמִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He that hath clean hands, and a pure heart; who hath not taken My name in vain, and hath not sworn deceitfully.

jps.text: He that hath clean hands, and a pure heart; who hath not taken My name in vain, and hath not sworn deceitfully.

verses.hebrewText: יִשָּׂ֣א בְ֭רָכָה מֵאֵ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה מֵאֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׁעֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He shall receive a blessing from the LORD, and righteousness from the God of his salvation.

jps.text: He shall receive a blessing from the LORD, and righteousness from the God of his salvation.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֭ה דֹּ֣ור *דֹּרְשֹׁו (דֹּרְשָׁ֑יו) מְבַקְשֵׁ֨י פָנֶ֖יךָ יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Such is the generation of them that seek after Him, that seek Thy face, even Jacob. Selah

jps.text: Such is the generation of them that seek after Him, that seek Thy face, even Jacob. Selah

verses.hebrewText: שְׂא֤וּ שְׁעָרִ֨ים ׀ רָֽאשֵׁיכֶ֗ם וְֽ֭הִנָּשְׂאוּ פִּתְחֵ֣י עֹולָ֑ם וְ֝יָבֹ֗וא מֶ֣לֶךְ הַכָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: Lift up your heads, O ye gates, and be ye lifted up, ye everlasting doors; that the King of glory may come in.

jps.text: Lift up your heads, O ye gates, and be ye lifted up, ye everlasting doors; that the King of glory may come in.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֥י זֶה֮ מֶ֤לֶךְ הַכָּ֫בֹ֥וד יְ֭הוָה עִזּ֣וּז וְגִבֹּ֑ור יְ֝הוָ֗ה גִּבֹּ֥ור מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: 'Who is the King of glory?' 'The LORD strong and mighty, the LORD mighty in battle.'

jps.text: 'Who is the King of glory?' 'The LORD strong and mighty, the LORD mighty in battle.'

verses.hebrewText: שְׂא֤וּ שְׁעָרִ֨ים ׀ רָֽאשֵׁיכֶ֗ם וּ֭שְׂאוּ פִּתְחֵ֣י עֹולָ֑ם וְ֝יָבֹא מֶ֣לֶךְ הַכָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: Lift up your heads, O ye gates, yea, lift them up, ye everlasting doors; that the King of glory may come in.

jps.text: Lift up your heads, O ye gates, yea, lift them up, ye everlasting doors; that the King of glory may come in.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י ה֣וּא זֶה֮ מֶ֤לֶךְ הַכָּ֫בֹ֥וד יְהוָ֥ה צְבָאֹ֑ות ה֤וּא מֶ֖לֶךְ הַכָּבֹ֣וד סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: 'Who then is the King of glory?' 'The LORD of hosts; He is the King of glory.' Selah

jps.text: 'Who then is the King of glory?' 'The LORD of hosts; He is the King of glory.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֡ד אֵלֶ֥יךָ יְ֝הוָ֗ה נַפְשִׁ֥י אֶשָּֽׂא׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Unto Thee, O LORD, do I lift up my soul.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Unto Thee, O LORD, do I lift up my soul.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהַ֗י בְּךָ֣ בָ֭טַחְתִּי אַל־אֵבֹ֑ושָׁה אַל־יַֽעַלְצ֖וּ אֹיְבַ֣י לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: O my God, in Thee have I trusted, let me not be ashamed; let not mine enemies triumph over me.

jps.text: O my God, in Thee have I trusted, let me not be ashamed; let not mine enemies triumph over me.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֣ם כָּל־קֹ֭וֶיךָ לֹ֣א יֵבֹ֑שׁוּ יֵ֝בֹ֗שׁוּ הַבֹּוגְדִ֥ים רֵיקָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Yea, none that wait for Thee shall be ashamed; they shall be ashamed that deal treacherously without cause.

jps.text: Yea, none that wait for Thee shall be ashamed; they shall be ashamed that deal treacherously without cause.

verses.hebrewText: דְּרָכֶ֣יךָ יְ֭הוָה הֹודִיעֵ֑נִי אֹ֖רְחֹותֶ֣יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Show me Thy ways, O LORD; teach me Thy paths.

jps.text: Show me Thy ways, O LORD; teach me Thy paths.

verses.hebrewText: הַדְרִ֘יכֵ֤נִי בַאֲמִתֶּ֨ךָ ׀ וְֽלַמְּדֵ֗נִי כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׁעִ֑י אֹותְךָ֥ קִ֝וִּ֗יתִי כָּל־הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: Guide me in Thy truth, and teach me; for Thou art the God of my salvation; for Thee do I wait all the day.

jps.text: Guide me in Thy truth, and teach me; for Thou art the God of my salvation; for Thee do I wait all the day.

verses.hebrewText: זְכֹר־רַחֲמֶ֣יךָ יְ֭הוָה וַחֲסָדֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י מֵעֹולָ֣ם הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.englishText: Remember, O LORD, Thy compassions and Thy mercies; for they have been from of old.

jps.text: Remember, O LORD, Thy compassions and Thy mercies; for they have been from of old.

verses.hebrewText: חַטֹּ֤אות נְעוּרַ֨י ׀ וּפְשָׁעַ֗י אַל־תִּ֫זְכֹּ֥ר כְּחַסְדְּךָ֥ זְכָר־לִי־אַ֑תָּה לְמַ֖עַן טוּבְךָ֣ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Remember not the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions; according to Thy mercy remember Thou me, for Thy goodness' sake, O LORD.

jps.text: Remember not the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions; according to Thy mercy remember Thou me, for Thy goodness' sake, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: טֹוב־וְיָשָׁ֥ר יְהוָ֑ה עַל־כֵּ֤ן יֹורֶ֖ה חַטָּאִ֣ים בַּדָּֽרֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: Good and upright is the LORD; therefore doth He instruct sinners in the way.

jps.text: Good and upright is the LORD; therefore doth He instruct sinners in the way.

verses.hebrewText: יַדְרֵ֣ךְ עֲ֭נָוִים בַּמִּשְׁפָּ֑ט וִֽילַמֵּ֖ד עֲנָוִ֣ים דַּרְכֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He guideth The humble in justice; and He teacheth the humble His way.

jps.text: He guideth The humble in justice; and He teacheth the humble His way.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־אָרְחֹ֣ות יְ֭הוָה חֶ֣סֶד וֶאֱמֶ֑ת לְנֹצְרֵ֥י בְ֝רִיתֹ֗ו וְעֵדֹתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: All the paths of the LORD are mercy and truth unto such as keep His covenant and His testimonies.

jps.text: All the paths of the LORD are mercy and truth unto such as keep His covenant and His testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: לְמַֽעַן־שִׁמְךָ֥ יְהוָ֑ה וְֽסָלַחְתָּ֥ לַ֝עֲוֹנִ֗י כִּ֣י רַב־הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: For Thy name's sake, O LORD, pardon mine iniquity, for it is great.

jps.text: For Thy name's sake, O LORD, pardon mine iniquity, for it is great.

verses.hebrewText: מִי־זֶ֣ה הָ֭אִישׁ יְרֵ֣א יְהוָ֑ה יֹ֝ורֶ֗נּוּ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ יִבְחָֽר׃
verses.englishText: What man is he that feareth the LORD? him will He instruct in the way that He should choose.

jps.text: What man is he that feareth the LORD? him will He instruct in the way that He should choose.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֭פְשֹׁו בְּטֹ֣וב תָּלִ֑ין וְ֝זַרְעֹ֗ו יִ֣ירַשׁ אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: His soul shall abide in prosperity; and his seed shall inherit the land.

jps.text: His soul shall abide in prosperity; and his seed shall inherit the land.

verses.hebrewText: סֹ֣וד יְ֭הוָה לִירֵאָ֑יו וּ֝בְרִיתֹ֗ו לְהֹודִיעָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The counsel of the LORD is with them that fear Him; and His covenant, to make them know it.

jps.text: The counsel of the LORD is with them that fear Him; and His covenant, to make them know it.

verses.hebrewText: עֵינַ֣י תָּ֭מִיד אֶל־יְהוָ֑ה כִּ֤י הֽוּא־יֹוצִ֖יא מֵרֶ֣שֶׁת רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Mine eyes are ever toward the LORD; for He will bring forth my feet out of the net.

jps.text: Mine eyes are ever toward the LORD; for He will bring forth my feet out of the net.

verses.hebrewText: פְּנֵה־אֵלַ֥י וְחָנֵּ֑נִי כִּֽי־יָחִ֖יד וְעָנִ֣י אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Turn Thee unto me, and be gracious unto me; for I am solitary and afflicted.

jps.text: Turn Thee unto me, and be gracious unto me; for I am solitary and afflicted.

verses.hebrewText: צָרֹ֣ות לְבָבִ֣י הִרְחִ֑יבוּ מִ֝מְּצֽוּקֹותַ֗י הֹוצִיאֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: The troubles of my heart are enlarged; O bring Thou me out of my distresses.

jps.text: The troubles of my heart are enlarged; O bring Thou me out of my distresses.

verses.hebrewText: רְאֵ֣ה עָ֭נְיִי וַעֲמָלִ֑י וְ֝שָׂ֗א לְכָל־חַטֹּאותָֽי׃
verses.englishText: See mine affliction and my travail; and forgive all my sins.

jps.text: See mine affliction and my travail; and forgive all my sins.

verses.hebrewText: רְאֵֽה־אֹויְבַ֥י כִּי־רָ֑בּוּ וְשִׂנְאַ֖ת חָמָ֣ס שְׂנֵאֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: Consider how many are mine enemies, and the cruel hatred wherewith they hate me.

jps.text: Consider how many are mine enemies, and the cruel hatred wherewith they hate me.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמְרָ֣ה נַ֭פְשִׁי וְהַצִּילֵ֑נִי אַל־אֵ֝בֹ֗ושׁ כִּֽי־חָסִ֥יתִי בָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: O keep my soul, and deliver me; let me not be ashamed, for I have taken refuge in Thee.

jps.text: O keep my soul, and deliver me; let me not be ashamed, for I have taken refuge in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּם־וָיֹ֥שֶׁר יִצְּר֑וּנִי כִּ֝֗י קִוִּיתִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, because I wait for Thee.

jps.text: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, because I wait for Thee.

verses.hebrewText: פְּדֵ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִ֝כֹּ֗ל צָֽרֹותָיו׃
verses.englishText: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.

jps.text: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ שָׁפְטֵ֤נִי יְהוָ֗ה כִּֽי־אֲ֭נִי בְּתֻמִּ֣י הָלַ֑כְתִּי וּבַיהוָ֥ה בָּ֝טַ֗חְתִּי לֹ֣א אֶמְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Judge me, O LORD, for I have walked in mine integrity, and I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Judge me, O LORD, for I have walked in mine integrity, and I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.

verses.hebrewText: בְּחָנֵ֣נִי יְהוָ֣ה וְנַסֵּ֑נִי *צְרֹופָה (צָרְפָ֖ה) כִלְיֹותַ֣י וְלִבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Examine me, O LORD, and try me; test my reins and my heart.

jps.text: Examine me, O LORD, and try me; test my reins and my heart.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חַ֭סְדְּךָ לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָ֑י וְ֝הִתְהַלַּ֗כְתִּי בַּאֲמִתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thy mercy is before mine eyes; and I have walked in Thy truth.

jps.text: For Thy mercy is before mine eyes; and I have walked in Thy truth.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־יָ֭שַׁבְתִּי עִם־מְתֵי־שָׁ֑וְא וְעִ֥ם נַ֝עֲלָמִ֗ים לֹ֣א אָבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: I have not sat with men of falsehood; neither will I go in with dissemblers.

jps.text: I have not sat with men of falsehood; neither will I go in with dissemblers.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂ֭נֵאתִי קְהַ֣ל מְרֵעִ֑ים וְעִם־רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים לֹ֣א אֵשֵֽׁב׃
verses.englishText: I hate the gathering of evil doers, and will not sit with the wicked.

jps.text: I hate the gathering of evil doers, and will not sit with the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: אֶרְחַ֣ץ בְּנִקָּיֹ֣ון כַּפָּ֑י וַאֲסֹבְבָ֖ה אֶת־מִזְבַּחֲךָ֣ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I will wash my hands in innocency; so will I compass Thine altar, O LORD,

jps.text: I will wash my hands in innocency; so will I compass Thine altar, O LORD,

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭שְׁמִעַ בְּקֹ֣ול תֹּודָ֑ה וּ֝לְסַפֵּ֗ר כָּל־נִפְלְאֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: That I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard, and tell of all Thy wondrous works.

jps.text: That I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard, and tell of all Thy wondrous works.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה אָ֭הַבְתִּי מְעֹ֣ון בֵּיתֶ֑ךָ וּ֝מְקֹ֗ום מִשְׁכַּ֥ן כְּבֹודֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: LORD, I love the habitation of Thy house, and the place where Thy glory dwelleth.

jps.text: LORD, I love the habitation of Thy house, and the place where Thy glory dwelleth.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תֶּאֱסֹ֣ף עִם־חַטָּאִ֣ים נַפְשִׁ֑י וְעִם־אַנְשֵׁ֖י דָמִ֣ים חַיָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Gather not my soul with sinners, nor my life with men of blood;

jps.text: Gather not my soul with sinners, nor my life with men of blood;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־בִּידֵיהֶ֥ם זִמָּ֑ה וִֽ֝ימִינָ֗ם מָ֣לְאָה שֹּֽׁחַד׃
verses.englishText: In whose hands is craftiness, and their right hand is full of bribes.

jps.text: In whose hands is craftiness, and their right hand is full of bribes.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭אֲנִי בְּתֻמִּ֥י אֵלֵ֗ךְ פְּדֵ֣נִי וְחָנֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I will walk in mine integrity; redeem me, and be gracious unto me.

jps.text: But as for me, I will walk in mine integrity; redeem me, and be gracious unto me.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭גְלִי עָֽמְדָ֣ה בְמִישֹׁ֑ור בְּ֝מַקְהֵלִ֗ים אֲבָרֵ֥ךְ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: My foot standeth in an even place; in the congregations will I bless the LORD.

jps.text: My foot standeth in an even place; in the congregations will I bless the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ יְהוָ֤ה ׀ אֹורִ֣י וְ֭יִשְׁעִי מִמִּ֣י אִירָ֑א יְהוָ֥ה מָֽעֹוז־חַ֝יַּ֗י מִמִּ֥י אֶפְחָֽד׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? The LORD is the stronghold of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?

jps.text: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? The LORD is the stronghold of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?

verses.hebrewText: בִּקְרֹ֤ב עָלַ֨י ׀ מְרֵעִים֮ לֶאֱכֹ֪ל אֶת־בְּשָׂ֫רִ֥י צָרַ֣י וְאֹיְבַ֣י לִ֑י הֵ֖מָּה כָשְׁל֣וּ וְנָפָֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: When evil-doers came upon me to eat up my flesh, even mine adversaries and my foes, they stumbled and fell.

jps.text: When evil-doers came upon me to eat up my flesh, even mine adversaries and my foes, they stumbled and fell.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תַּחֲנֶ֬ה עָלַ֨י ׀ מַחֲנֶה֮ לֹֽא־יִירָ֪א לִ֫בִּ֥י אִם־תָּק֣וּם עָ֭לַי מִלְחָמָ֑ה בְּ֝זֹ֗את אֲנִ֣י בֹוטֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: Though a host should encamp against me, my heart shall not fear; though war should rise up against me, even then will I be confident.

jps.text: Though a host should encamp against me, my heart shall not fear; though war should rise up against me, even then will I be confident.

verses.hebrewText: אַחַ֤ת ׀ שָׁאַ֣לְתִּי מֵֽאֵת־יְהוָה֮ אֹותָ֪הּ אֲבַ֫קֵּ֥שׁ שִׁבְתִּ֣י בְּבֵית־יְ֭הוָה כָּל־יְמֵ֣י חַיַּ֑י לַחֲזֹ֥ות בְּנֹֽעַם־יְ֝הוָ֗ה וּלְבַקֵּ֥ר בְּהֵיכָלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: One thing have I asked of the LORD, that will I seek after: that I may dwell in the house of the LORD all the days of my life, to behold the graciousness of the LORD, and to visit early in His temple.

jps.text: One thing have I asked of the LORD, that will I seek after: that I may dwell in the house of the LORD all the days of my life, to behold the graciousness of the LORD, and to visit early in His temple.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יִצְפְּנֵ֨נִי ׀ בְּסֻכֹּה֮ בְּיֹ֪ום רָ֫עָ֥ה יַ֭סְתִּרֵנִי בְּסֵ֣תֶר אָהֳלֹ֑ו בְּ֝צ֗וּר יְרֹומְמֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: For He concealeth me in His pavilion in the day of evil; He hideth me in the covert of His tent; He lifteth me up upon a rock.

jps.text: For He concealeth me in His pavilion in the day of evil; He hideth me in the covert of His tent; He lifteth me up upon a rock.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֨ה יָר֪וּם רֹאשִׁ֡י עַ֤ל אֹֽיְבַ֬י סְֽבִיבֹותַ֗י וְאֶזְבְּחָ֣ה בְ֭אָהֳלֹו זִבְחֵ֣י תְרוּעָ֑ה אָשִׁ֥ירָה וַ֝אֲזַמְּרָ֗ה לַיהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And now shall my head be lifted up above mine enemies round about me; and I will offer in His tabernacle sacrifices with trumpet-sound; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises unto the LORD.

jps.text: And now shall my head be lifted up above mine enemies round about me; and I will offer in His tabernacle sacrifices with trumpet-sound; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises unto the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַע־יְהוָ֖ה קֹולִ֥י אֶקְרָ֗א וְחָנֵּ֥נִי וַעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Hear, O LORD, when I call with my voice, and be gracious unto me, and answer me.

jps.text: Hear, O LORD, when I call with my voice, and be gracious unto me, and answer me.

verses.hebrewText: לְךָ֤ ׀ אָמַ֣ר לִ֭בִּי בַּקְּשׁ֣וּ פָנָ֑י אֶת־פָּנֶ֖יךָ יְהוָ֣ה אֲבַקֵּֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: In Thy behalf my heart hath said: 'Seek ye My face'; Thy face, LORD, will I seek.

jps.text: In Thy behalf my heart hath said: 'Seek ye My face'; Thy face, LORD, will I seek.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּסְתֵּ֬ר פָּנֶ֨יךָ ׀ מִמֶּנִּי֮ אַֽל־תַּט־בְּאַ֗ף עַ֫בְדֶּ֥ךָ עֶזְרָתִ֥י הָיִ֑יתָ אַֽל־תִּטְּשֵׁ֥נִי וְאַל־תַּֽ֝עַזְבֵ֗נִי אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׁעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hide not Thy face from me; put not Thy servant away in anger; Thou hast been my help; cast me not off, neither forsake me, O God of my salvation.

jps.text: Hide not Thy face from me; put not Thy servant away in anger; Thou hast been my help; cast me not off, neither forsake me, O God of my salvation.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־אָבִ֣י וְאִמִּ֣י עֲזָב֑וּנִי וַֽיהוָ֣ה יַֽאַסְפֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: For though my father and my mother have forsaken me, the LORD will take me up.

jps.text: For though my father and my mother have forsaken me, the LORD will take me up.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֤ורֵ֥נִי יְהוָ֗ה דַּ֫רְכֶּ֥ךָ וּ֭נְחֵנִי בְּאֹ֣רַח מִישֹׁ֑ור לְ֝מַ֗עַן שֹׁורְרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Teach me Thy way, O LORD; and lead me in an even path, because of them that lie in wait for me.

jps.text: Teach me Thy way, O LORD; and lead me in an even path, because of them that lie in wait for me.

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תִּ֭תְּנֵנִי בְּנֶ֣פֶשׁ צָרָ֑י כִּ֥י קָֽמוּ־בִ֥י עֵֽדֵי־שֶׁ֝֗קֶר וִיפֵ֥חַ חָמָֽס׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me not over unto the will of mine adversaries; for false witnesses are risen up against me, and such as breathe out violence.

jps.text: Deliver me not over unto the will of mine adversaries; for false witnesses are risen up against me, and such as breathe out violence.

verses.hebrewText: ל̣ׄוּלֵ̣֗ׄא̣ׄ הֶ֭אֱמַנְתִּי לִרְאֹ֥ות בְּֽטוּב־יְהוָ֗ה בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: If I had not believed to look upon the goodness of the LORD in the land of the living! —

jps.text: If I had not believed to look upon the goodness of the LORD in the land of the living! —

verses.hebrewText: קַוֵּ֗ה אֶל־יְה֫וָ֥ה חֲ֭זַק וְיַאֲמֵ֣ץ לִבֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝קַוֵּ֗ה אֶל־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wait on the LORD; be strong, and let thy heart take courage; yea, wait thou for the LORD.

jps.text: Wait on the LORD; be strong, and let thy heart take courage; yea, wait thou for the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֡ד אֵ֘לֶ֤יךָ יְהוָ֨ה ׀ אֶקְרָ֗א צוּרִי֮ אַֽל־תֶּחֱרַ֪שׁ מִ֫מֶּ֥נִּי פֶּן־תֶּֽחֱשֶׁ֥ה מִמֶּ֑נִּי וְ֝נִמְשַׁ֗לְתִּי עִם־יֹ֥ורְדֵי בֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Unto thee, O LORD, do I call; my Rock, be not Thou deaf unto me; lest, if Thou be silent unto me, I become like them that go down into the pit.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Unto thee, O LORD, do I call; my Rock, be not Thou deaf unto me; lest, if Thou be silent unto me, I become like them that go down into the pit.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַ֤ע קֹ֣ול תַּ֭חֲנוּנַי בְּשַׁוְּעִ֣י אֵלֶ֑יךָ בְּנָשְׂאִ֥י יָ֝דַ֗י אֶל־דְּבִ֥יר קָדְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.englishText: Hear the voice of my supplications, when I cry unto Thee, when I lift up my hands toward Thy holy Sanctuary.

jps.text: Hear the voice of my supplications, when I cry unto Thee, when I lift up my hands toward Thy holy Sanctuary.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּמְשְׁכֵ֣נִי עִם־רְשָׁעִים֮ וְעִם־פֹּ֪עֲלֵ֫י אָ֥וֶן דֹּבְרֵ֣י שָׁ֭לֹום עִם־רֵֽעֵיהֶ֑ם וְ֝רָעָ֗ה בִּלְבָבָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Draw me not away with the wicked, and with the workers of iniquity; who speak peace with their neighbours, but evil is in their hearts.

jps.text: Draw me not away with the wicked, and with the workers of iniquity; who speak peace with their neighbours, but evil is in their hearts.

verses.hebrewText: תֶּן־לָהֶ֣ם כְּפָעֳלָם֮ וּכְרֹ֪עַ מַֽעַלְלֵ֫יהֶ֥ם כְּמַעֲשֵׂ֣ה יְ֭דֵיהֶם תֵּ֣ן לָהֶ֑ם הָשֵׁ֖ב גְּמוּלָ֣ם לָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Give them according to their deeds, and according to the evil of their endeavours; give them after the work of their hands; render to them their desert.

jps.text: Give them according to their deeds, and according to the evil of their endeavours; give them after the work of their hands; render to them their desert.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֤א יָבִ֡ינוּ אֶל־פְּעֻלֹּ֣ת יְ֭הוָה וְאֶל־מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה יָדָ֑יו יֶ֝הֶרְסֵ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יִבְנֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Because they give no heed to the works of the LORD, nor to the operation of His hands; He will break them down and not build them up.

jps.text: Because they give no heed to the works of the LORD, nor to the operation of His hands; He will break them down and not build them up.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֥וּךְ יְהוָ֑ה כִּי־שָׁ֝מַע קֹ֣ול תַּחֲנוּנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD, because He hath heard the voice of my supplications.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD, because He hath heard the voice of my supplications.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ עֻזִּ֥י וּמָגִנִּי֮ בֹּ֤ו בָטַ֥ח לִבִּ֗י וְֽנֶ֫עֱזָ֥רְתִּי וַיַּעֲלֹ֥ז לִבִּ֑י וּֽמִשִּׁירִ֥י אֲהֹודֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is my strength and my shield, in Him hath my heart trusted, and I am helped; therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth, and with my song will I praise Him.

jps.text: The LORD is my strength and my shield, in Him hath my heart trusted, and I am helped; therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth, and with my song will I praise Him.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה עֹֽז־לָ֑מֹו וּמָ֘עֹ֤וז יְשׁוּעֹ֖ות מְשִׁיחֹ֣ו הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is a strength unto them; and He is a stronghold of salvation to His anointed.

jps.text: The LORD is a strength unto them; and He is a stronghold of salvation to His anointed.

verses.hebrewText: הֹושִׁ֤יעָה ׀ אֶת־עַמֶּ֗ךָ וּבָרֵ֥ךְ אֶת־נַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ וּֽרְעֵ֥ם וְ֝נַשְּׂאֵ֗ם עַד־הָעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Save Thy people, and bless Thine inheritance; and tend them, and carry them for ever.

jps.text: Save Thy people, and bless Thine inheritance; and tend them, and carry them for ever.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְדָ֫וִ֥ד הָב֣וּ לֽ͏ַ֭יהוָה בְּנֵ֣י אֵלִ֑ים הָב֥וּ לַ֝יהוָ֗ה כָּבֹ֥וד וָעֹֽז׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Ascribe unto the LORD, O ye sons of might, ascribe unto the LORD glory and strength.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Ascribe unto the LORD, O ye sons of might, ascribe unto the LORD glory and strength.

verses.hebrewText: הָב֣וּ לַֽ֭יהוָה כְּבֹ֣וד שְׁמֹ֑ו הִשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ לַ֝יהוָ֗ה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Ascribe unto the LORD the glory due unto His name; worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.

jps.text: Ascribe unto the LORD the glory due unto His name; worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֥ול יְהוָ֗ה עַל־הַ֫מָּ֥יִם אֵֽל־הַכָּבֹ֥וד הִרְעִ֑ים יְ֝הוָ֗ה עַל־מַ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the LORD is upon the waters; the God of glory thundereth, even the LORD upon many waters.

jps.text: The voice of the LORD is upon the waters; the God of glory thundereth, even the LORD upon many waters.

verses.hebrewText: קֹול־יְהוָ֥ה בַּכֹּ֑חַ קֹ֥ול יְ֝הוָ֗ה בֶּהָדָֽר׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the LORD is powerful; the voice of the LORD is full of majesty.

jps.text: The voice of the LORD is powerful; the voice of the LORD is full of majesty.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֣ול יְ֭הוָה שֹׁבֵ֣ר אֲרָזִ֑ים וַיְשַׁבֵּ֥ר יְ֝הוָ֗ה אֶת־אַרְזֵ֥י הַלְּבָנֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the LORD breaketh the cedars; yea, the LORD breaketh in pieces the cedars of Lebanon.

jps.text: The voice of the LORD breaketh the cedars; yea, the LORD breaketh in pieces the cedars of Lebanon.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּרְקִידֵ֥ם כְּמֹו־עֵ֑גֶל לְבָנֹ֥ון וְ֝שִׂרְיֹ֗ן כְּמֹ֣ו בֶן־רְאֵמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He maketh them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young wild-ox.

jps.text: He maketh them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young wild-ox.

verses.hebrewText: קֹול־יְהוָ֥ה חֹצֵ֗ב לַהֲבֹ֥ות אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the LORD heweth out flames of fire.

jps.text: The voice of the LORD heweth out flames of fire.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֣ול יְ֭הוָה יָחִ֣יל מִדְבָּ֑ר יָחִ֥יל יְ֝הוָ֗ה מִדְבַּ֥ר קָדֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the LORD shaketh the wilderness; the LORD shaketh the wilderness of Kadesh.

jps.text: The voice of the LORD shaketh the wilderness; the LORD shaketh the wilderness of Kadesh.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֤ול יְהוָ֨ה ׀ יְחֹולֵ֣ל אַיָּלֹות֮ וַֽיֶּחֱשֹׂ֪ף יְעָ֫רֹ֥ות וּבְהֵיכָלֹ֑ו כֻּ֝לֹּ֗ו אֹמֵ֥ר כָּבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: The voice of the LORD maketh the hinds to calve, and strippeth the forests bare; and in His temple all say: 'Glory.'

jps.text: The voice of the LORD maketh the hinds to calve, and strippeth the forests bare; and in His temple all say: 'Glory.'

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה לַמַּבּ֣וּל יָשָׁ֑ב וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב יְ֝הוָ֗ה מֶ֣לֶךְ לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The LORD sat enthroned at the flood; yea, the LORD sitteth as King for ever.

jps.text: The LORD sat enthroned at the flood; yea, the LORD sitteth as King for ever.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה עֹ֖ז לְעַמֹּ֣ו יִתֵּ֑ן יְהוָ֓ה ׀ יְבָרֵ֖ךְ אֶת־עַמֹּ֣ו בַשָּׁלֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: The LORD will give strength unto His people; the LORD will bless his people with peace.

jps.text: The LORD will give strength unto His people; the LORD will bless his people with peace.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֡ור שִׁיר־חֲנֻכַּ֖ת הַבַּ֣יִת לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm; a Song at the Dedication of the House; of David.

jps.text: A Psalm; a Song at the Dedication of the House; of David.

verses.hebrewText: אֲרֹומִמְךָ֣ יְ֭הוָה כִּ֣י דִלִּיתָ֑נִי וְלֹא־שִׂמַּ֖חְתָּ אֹיְבַ֣י לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will extol thee, O LORD, for Thou hast raised me up, and hast not suffered mine enemies to rejoice over me.

jps.text: I will extol thee, O LORD, for Thou hast raised me up, and hast not suffered mine enemies to rejoice over me.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָ֑י שִׁוַּ֥עְתִּי אֵ֝לֶ֗יךָ וַתִּרְפָּאֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD my God, I cried unto Thee, and Thou didst heal me;

jps.text: O LORD my God, I cried unto Thee, and Thou didst heal me;

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה הֶֽעֱלִ֣יתָ מִן־שְׁאֹ֣ול נַפְשִׁ֑י חִ֝יִּיתַ֗נִי *מִיֹּורְדֵי־ (מִיָּֽרְדִי)־בֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, Thou broughtest up my soul from the nether-world; Thou didst keep me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.

jps.text: O LORD, Thou broughtest up my soul from the nether-world; Thou didst keep me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.

verses.hebrewText: זַמְּר֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה חֲסִידָ֑יו וְ֝הֹוד֗וּ לְזֵ֣כֶר קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Sing praise unto the LORD, O ye His godly ones, and give thanks to His holy name.

jps.text: Sing praise unto the LORD, O ye His godly ones, and give thanks to His holy name.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י רֶ֨גַע ׀ בְּאַפֹּו֮ חַיִּ֪ים בִּרְצֹ֫ונֹ֥ו בָּ֭עֶרֶב יָלִ֥ין בֶּ֗כִי וְלַבֹּ֥קֶר רִנָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: For His anger is but for a moment, His favour is for a life-time; weeping may tarry for the night, but joy cometh in the morning.

jps.text: For His anger is but for a moment, His favour is for a life-time; weeping may tarry for the night, but joy cometh in the morning.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭אֲנִי אָמַ֣רְתִּי בְשַׁלְוִ֑י בַּל־אֶמֹּ֥וט לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Now I had said in my security: 'I shall never be moved.'

jps.text: Now I had said in my security: 'I shall never be moved.'

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה בִּרְצֹונְךָ֮ הֶעֱמַ֪דְתָּה לְֽהַרְרִ֫י עֹ֥ז הִסְתַּ֥רְתָּ פָנֶ֗יךָ הָיִ֥יתִי נִבְהָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Thou hadst established, O LORD, in Thy favour my mountain as a stronghold — Thou didst hide Thy face; I was affrighted.

jps.text: Thou hadst established, O LORD, in Thy favour my mountain as a stronghold — Thou didst hide Thy face; I was affrighted.

verses.hebrewText: אֵלֶ֣יךָ יְהוָ֣ה אֶקְרָ֑א וְאֶל־אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י אֶתְחַנָּֽן׃
verses.englishText: Unto Thee, O LORD, did I call, and unto the LORD I made supplication:

jps.text: Unto Thee, O LORD, did I call, and unto the LORD I made supplication:

verses.hebrewText: מַה־בֶּ֥צַע בְּדָמִי֮ בְּרִדְתִּ֪י אֶ֫ל־שָׁ֥חַת הֲיֹודְךָ֥ עָפָ֑ר הֲיַגִּ֥יד אֲמִתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: 'What profit is there in my blood, when I go down to the pit? Shall the dust praise Thee? shall it declare Thy truth?

jps.text: 'What profit is there in my blood, when I go down to the pit? Shall the dust praise Thee? shall it declare Thy truth?

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַע־יְהוָ֥ה וְחָנֵּ֑נִי יְ֝הוָה הֱ‍ֽיֵה־עֹזֵ֥ר לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hear, O LORD, and be gracious unto me; LORD, be Thou my helper.'

jps.text: Hear, O LORD, and be gracious unto me; LORD, be Thou my helper.'

verses.hebrewText: הָפַ֣כְתָּ מִסְפְּדִי֮ לְמָחֹ֪ול לִ֥י פִּתַּ֥חְתָּ שַׂקִּ֑י וַֽתְּאַזְּרֵ֥נִי שִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst turn for me my mourning into dancing; Thou didst loose my sackcloth, and gird me with gladness;

jps.text: Thou didst turn for me my mourning into dancing; Thou didst loose my sackcloth, and gird me with gladness;

verses.hebrewText: לְמַ֤עַן ׀ יְזַמֶּרְךָ֣ כָ֭בֹוד וְלֹ֣א יִדֹּ֑ם יְהוָ֥ה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י לְעֹולָ֥ם אֹודֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: So that my glory may sing praise to Thee, and not be silent; O LORD my God, I will give thanks unto Thee for ever.

jps.text: So that my glory may sing praise to Thee, and not be silent; O LORD my God, I will give thanks unto Thee for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: בְּךָ֖ יְהוָ֣ה חָ֭סִיתִי אַל־אֵבֹ֣ושָׁה לְעֹולָ֑ם בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֥ פַלְּטֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: In thee, O LORD, have I taken refuge; let me never be ashamed; deliver me in Thy righteousness.

jps.text: In thee, O LORD, have I taken refuge; let me never be ashamed; deliver me in Thy righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: הַטֵּ֤ה אֵלַ֨י ׀ אָזְנְךָ֮ מְהֵרָ֪ה הַצִּ֫ילֵ֥נִי הֱיֵ֤ה לִ֨י ׀ לְֽצוּר־מָ֭עֹוז לְבֵ֥ית מְצוּדֹ֗ות לְהֹושִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Incline Thine ear unto me, deliver me speedily; be Thou to me a rock of refuge, even a fortress of defence, to save me.

jps.text: Incline Thine ear unto me, deliver me speedily; be Thou to me a rock of refuge, even a fortress of defence, to save me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־סַלְעִ֣י וּמְצוּדָתִ֣י אָ֑תָּה וּלְמַ֥עַן שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ תַּֽנְחֵ֥נִי וּֽתְנַהֲלֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art my rock and my fortress; therefore for Thy name's sake lead me and guide me.

jps.text: For Thou art my rock and my fortress; therefore for Thy name's sake lead me and guide me.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּוצִיאֵ֗נִי מֵרֶ֣שֶׁת ז֭וּ טָ֣מְנוּ לִ֑י כִּֽי־אַ֝תָּה מָֽעוּזִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Bring me forth out of the net that they have hidden for me; for Thou art my stronghold.

jps.text: Bring me forth out of the net that they have hidden for me; for Thou art my stronghold.

verses.hebrewText: בְּיָדְךָ֮ אַפְקִ֪יד ר֫וּחִ֥י פָּדִ֖יתָה אֹותִ֥י יְהוָ֗ה אֵ֣ל אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.englishText: Into Thy hand I commit my spirit; Thou hast redeemed me, O LORD, Thou God of truth.

jps.text: Into Thy hand I commit my spirit; Thou hast redeemed me, O LORD, Thou God of truth.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂנֵ֗אתִי הַשֹּׁמְרִ֥ים הַבְלֵי־שָׁ֑וְא וַ֝אֲנִ֗י אֶל־יְהוָ֥ה בָּטָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I hate them that regard lying vanities; but I trust in the LORD.

jps.text: I hate them that regard lying vanities; but I trust in the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: אָגִ֥ילָה וְאֶשְׂמְחָ֗ה בְּחַ֫סְדֶּ֥ךָ אֲשֶׁ֣ר רָ֭אִיתָ אֶת־עָנְיִ֑י יָ֝דַ֗עְתָּ בְּצָרֹ֥ות נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: I will be glad and rejoice in Thy lovingkindness; for Thou hast seen mine affliction, Thou hast taken cognizance of the troubles of my soul,

jps.text: I will be glad and rejoice in Thy lovingkindness; for Thou hast seen mine affliction, Thou hast taken cognizance of the troubles of my soul,

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹ֣א הִ֭סְגַּרְתַּנִי בְּיַד־אֹויֵ֑ב הֶֽעֱמַ֖דְתָּ בַמֶּרְחָ֣ב רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: And Thou hast not given me over into the hand of the enemy; Thou hast set my feet in a broad place.

jps.text: And Thou hast not given me over into the hand of the enemy; Thou hast set my feet in a broad place.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֥נִי יְהוָה֮ כִּ֤י צַ֫ר־לִ֥י עָשְׁשָׁ֖ה בְכַ֥עַס עֵינִ֗י נַפְשִׁ֥י וּבִטְנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, for I am in distress; mine eye wasteth away with vexation, yea, my soul and my body.

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, for I am in distress; mine eye wasteth away with vexation, yea, my soul and my body.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י כָל֪וּ בְיָגֹ֡ון חַיַּי֮ וּשְׁנֹותַ֪י בַּאֲנָ֫חָ֥ה כָּשַׁ֣ל בַּעֲוֹנִ֣י כֹחִ֑י וַעֲצָמַ֥י עָשֵֽׁשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: For my life is spent in sorrow, and my years in sighing; my strength faileth because of mine iniquity, and my bones are wasted away.

jps.text: For my life is spent in sorrow, and my years in sighing; my strength faileth because of mine iniquity, and my bones are wasted away.

verses.hebrewText: מִכָּל־צֹרְרַ֨י הָיִ֪יתִי חֶרְפָּ֡ה וְלִשֲׁכֵנַ֨י ׀ מְאֹד֮ וּפַ֪חַד לִֽמְיֻדָּ֫עָ֥י רֹאַ֥י בַּח֑וּץ נָדְד֥וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Because of all mine adversaries I am become a reproach, yea, unto my neighbours exceedingly, and a dread to mine acquaintance; they that see me without flee from me.

jps.text: Because of all mine adversaries I am become a reproach, yea, unto my neighbours exceedingly, and a dread to mine acquaintance; they that see me without flee from me.

verses.hebrewText: נִ֭שְׁכַּחְתִּי כְּמֵ֣ת מִלֵּ֑ב הָ֝יִ֗יתִי כִּכְלִ֥י אֹבֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: I am forgotten as a dead man out of mind; I am like a useless vessel.

jps.text: I am forgotten as a dead man out of mind; I am like a useless vessel.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שָׁמַ֨עְתִּי ׀ דִּבַּ֥ת רַבִּים֮ מָגֹ֪ור מִסָּ֫בִ֥יב בְּהִוָּסְדָ֣ם יַ֣חַד עָלַ֑י לָקַ֖חַת נַפְשִׁ֣י זָמָֽמוּ׃
verses.englishText: For I have heard the whispering of many, terror on every side; while they took counsel together against me, they devised to take away my life.

jps.text: For I have heard the whispering of many, terror on every side; while they took counsel together against me, they devised to take away my life.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ עָלֶ֣יךָ בָטַ֣חְתִּי יְהוָ֑ה אָ֝מַ֗רְתִּי אֱלֹהַ֥י אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I have trusted in Thee, O LORD; I have said: 'Thou art my God.'

jps.text: But as for me, I have trusted in Thee, O LORD; I have said: 'Thou art my God.'

verses.hebrewText: בְּיָדְךָ֥ עִתֹּתָ֑י הַצִּ֘ילֵ֤נִי מִיַּד־אֹ֝ויְבַ֗י וּמֵרֹדְפָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My times are in Thy hand; deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.

jps.text: My times are in Thy hand; deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.

verses.hebrewText: הָאִ֣ירָה פָ֭נֶיךָ עַל־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ הֹ֖ושִׁיעֵ֣נִי בְחַסְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Make Thy face to shine upon Thy servant; save me in Thy lovingkindness.

jps.text: Make Thy face to shine upon Thy servant; save me in Thy lovingkindness.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה אַל־אֵ֭בֹושָׁה כִּ֣י קְרָאתִ֑יךָ יֵבֹ֥שׁוּ רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יִדְּמ֥וּ לִשְׁאֹֽול׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, let me not be ashamed, for I have called upon Thee; let the wicked be ashamed, let them be put to silence in the nether-world.

jps.text: O LORD, let me not be ashamed, for I have called upon Thee; let the wicked be ashamed, let them be put to silence in the nether-world.

verses.hebrewText: תֵּ֥אָלַ֗מְנָה שִׂפְתֵ֫י שָׁ֥קֶר הַדֹּבְרֹ֖ות עַל־צַדִּ֥יק עָתָ֗ק בְּגַאֲוָ֥ה וָבֽוּז׃
verses.englishText: Let the lying lips be dumb, which speak arrogantly against the righteous, with pride and contempt.

jps.text: Let the lying lips be dumb, which speak arrogantly against the righteous, with pride and contempt.

verses.hebrewText: מָ֤ה רַֽב־טוּבְךָ֮ אֲשֶׁר־צָפַ֪נְתָּ לִּֽירֵ֫אֶ֥יךָ פָּ֭עַלְתָּ לַחֹסִ֣ים בָּ֑ךְ נֶ֝֗גֶד בְּנֵ֣י אָדָם׃
verses.englishText: Oh how abundant is Thy goodness, which Thou hast laid up for them that fear Thee; which Thou hast wrought for them that take their refuge in Thee, in the sight of the sons of men!

jps.text: Oh how abundant is Thy goodness, which Thou hast laid up for them that fear Thee; which Thou hast wrought for them that take their refuge in Thee, in the sight of the sons of men!

verses.hebrewText: תַּסְתִּירֵ֤ם ׀ בְּסֵ֥תֶר פָּנֶיךָ֮ מֵֽרֻכְסֵ֫י אִ֥ישׁ תִּצְפְּנֵ֥ם בְּסֻכָּ֗ה מֵרִ֥יב לְשֹׁנֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Thou hidest them in the covert of Thy presence from the plottings of man; Thou concealest them in a pavilion from the strife of tongues.

jps.text: Thou hidest them in the covert of Thy presence from the plottings of man; Thou concealest them in a pavilion from the strife of tongues.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֥וּךְ יְהוָ֑ה כִּ֥י הִפְלִ֘יא חַסְדֹּ֥ו לִ֝֗י בְּעִ֣יר מָצֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD; for He hath shown me His wondrous lovingkindness in an entrenched city.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD; for He hath shown me His wondrous lovingkindness in an entrenched city.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ אָ֘מַ֤רְתִּי בְחָפְזִ֗י נִגְרַזְתִּי֮ מִנֶּ֪גֶד עֵ֫ינֶ֥יךָ אָכֵ֗ן שָׁ֭מַעְתָּ קֹ֥ול תַּחֲנוּנַ֗י בְּשַׁוְּעִ֥י אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: As for me, I said in my haste: 'I am cut off from before Thine eyes'; nevertheless Thou heardest the voice of my supplications when I cried unto Thee.

jps.text: As for me, I said in my haste: 'I am cut off from before Thine eyes'; nevertheless Thou heardest the voice of my supplications when I cried unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אֽ͏ֶהֱב֥וּ אֶת־יְהוָ֗ה כָּֽל־חֲסִ֫ידָ֥יו אֱ֭מוּנִים נֹצֵ֣ר יְהוָ֑ה וּמְשַׁלֵּ֥ם עַל־יֶ֝֗תֶר עֹשֵׂ֥ה גַאֲוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: O love the LORD, all ye His godly ones; the LORD preserveth the faithful, and plentifully repayeth him that acteth haughtily.

jps.text: O love the LORD, all ye His godly ones; the LORD preserveth the faithful, and plentifully repayeth him that acteth haughtily.

verses.hebrewText: חִ֭זְקוּ וְיַאֲמֵ֣ץ לְבַבְכֶ֑ם כָּל־הַ֝מְיַחֲלִ֗ים לַיהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all ye that wait for the LORD.

jps.text: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all ye that wait for the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֗ד מַ֫שְׂכִּ֥יל אַשְׁרֵ֥י נְֽשׂוּי־פֶּ֗שַׁע כְּס֣וּי חֲטָאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Maschil. Happy is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is pardoned.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Maschil. Happy is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is pardoned.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי אָדָ֗ם לֹ֤א יַחְשֹׁ֬ב יְהוָ֣ה לֹ֣ו עָוֹ֑ן וְאֵ֖ין בְּרוּחֹ֣ו רְמִיָּה׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man unto whom the LORD counteth not iniquity, and in whose spirit there is no guile.

jps.text: Happy is the man unto whom the LORD counteth not iniquity, and in whose spirit there is no guile.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הֶ֭חֱרַשְׁתִּי בָּל֣וּ עֲצָמָ֑י בְּ֝שַׁאֲגָתִ֗י כָּל־הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: When I kept silence, my bones wore away through my groaning all the day long.

jps.text: When I kept silence, my bones wore away through my groaning all the day long.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ יֹומָ֣ם וָלַיְלָה֮ תִּכְבַּ֥ד עָלַ֗י יָ֫דֶ֥ךָ נֶהְפַּ֥ךְ לְשַׁדִּ֑י בְּחַרְבֹ֖נֵי קַ֣יִץ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: For day and night Thy hand was heavy upon me; my sap was turned as in the droughts of summer. Selah

jps.text: For day and night Thy hand was heavy upon me; my sap was turned as in the droughts of summer. Selah

verses.hebrewText: חַטָּאתִ֨י אֹודִ֪יעֲךָ֡ וַעֲוֹ֘נִ֤י לֹֽא־כִסִּ֗יתִי אָמַ֗רְתִּי אֹודֶ֤ה עֲלֵ֣י פְ֭שָׁעַי לַיהוָ֑ה וְאַתָּ֨ה נָ֘שָׂ֤אתָ עֲוֹ֖ן חַטָּאתִ֣י סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: I acknowledged my sin unto Thee, and mine iniquity have I not hid; I said: 'I will make confession concerning my transgressions unto the LORD' — and Thou, Thou forgavest the iniquity of my sin. Selah

jps.text: I acknowledged my sin unto Thee, and mine iniquity have I not hid; I said: 'I will make confession concerning my transgressions unto the LORD' — and Thou, Thou forgavest the iniquity of my sin. Selah

verses.hebrewText: עַל־זֹ֡את יִתְפַּלֵּ֬ל כָּל־חָסִ֨יד ׀ אֵלֶיךָ֮ לְעֵ֪ת מְ֫צֹ֥א רַ֗ק לְ֭שֵׁטֶף מַ֣יִם רַבִּ֑ים אֵ֝לָ֗יו לֹ֣א יַגִּֽיעוּ׃
verses.englishText: For this let every one that is godly pray unto Thee in a time when Thou mayest be found; surely, when the great waters overflow, they will not reach unto him.

jps.text: For this let every one that is godly pray unto Thee in a time when Thou mayest be found; surely, when the great waters overflow, they will not reach unto him.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה ׀ סֵ֥תֶר לִי֮ מִצַּ֪ר תִּ֫צְּרֵ֥נִי רָנֵּ֥י פַלֵּ֑ט תְּסֹ֖ובְבֵ֣נִי סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou art my hiding-place; Thou wilt preserve me from the adversary; with songs of deliverance Thou wilt compass me about. Selah

jps.text: Thou art my hiding-place; Thou wilt preserve me from the adversary; with songs of deliverance Thou wilt compass me about. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׂכִּֽילְךָ֨ ׀ וְֽאֹורְךָ֗ בְּדֶֽרֶךְ־ז֥וּ תֵלֵ֑ךְ אִֽיעֲצָ֖ה עָלֶ֣יךָ עֵינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: 'I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go; I will give counsel, Mine eye being upon thee.'

jps.text: 'I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go; I will give counsel, Mine eye being upon thee.'

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּֽהְי֤וּ ׀ כְּס֥וּס כְּפֶרֶד֮ אֵ֤ין הָ֫בִ֥ין בְּמֶֽתֶג־וָרֶ֣סֶן עֶדְיֹ֣ו לִבְלֹ֑ום בַּ֝֗ל קְרֹ֣ב אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Be ye not as the horse, or as the mule, which have no understanding; whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, that they come not near unto thee.

jps.text: Be ye not as the horse, or as the mule, which have no understanding; whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, that they come not near unto thee.

verses.hebrewText: רַבִּ֥ים מַכְאֹובִ֗ים לָרָ֫שָׁ֥ע וְהַבֹּוטֵ֥חַ בַּיהוָ֑ה חֶ֝֗סֶד יְסֹובְבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Many are the sorrows of the wicked; but he that trusteth in the LORD, mercy compasseth him about.

jps.text: Many are the sorrows of the wicked; but he that trusteth in the LORD, mercy compasseth him about.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂמְח֬וּ בַֽיהוָ֣ה וְ֭גִילוּ צַדִּיקִ֑ים וְ֝הַרְנִ֗ינוּ כָּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: Be glad in the LORD, and rejoice, ye righteous; and shout for joy, all ye that are upright in heart.

jps.text: Be glad in the LORD, and rejoice, ye righteous; and shout for joy, all ye that are upright in heart.

verses.hebrewText: רַנְּנ֣וּ צַ֭דִּיקִים בַּֽיהוָ֑ה לַ֝יְשָׁרִ֗ים נָאוָ֥ה תְהִלָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Rejoice in the LORD, O ye righteous, praise is comely for the upright.

jps.text: Rejoice in the LORD, O ye righteous, praise is comely for the upright.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה בְּכִנֹּ֑ור בְּנֵ֥בֶל עָ֝שֹׂ֗ור זַמְּרוּ־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Give thanks unto the LORD with harp, sing praises unto Him with the psaltery of ten strings.

jps.text: Give thanks unto the LORD with harp, sing praises unto Him with the psaltery of ten strings.

verses.hebrewText: שִֽׁירוּ־לֹ֖ו שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֑שׁ הֵיטִ֥יבוּ נַ֝גֵּ֗ן בִּתְרוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Sing unto Him a new song; play skilfully amid shouts of joy.

jps.text: Sing unto Him a new song; play skilfully amid shouts of joy.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יָשָׁ֥ר דְּבַר־יְהוָ֑ה וְכָל־מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗הוּ בֶּאֱמוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the word of the LORD is upright; and all His work is done in faithfulness.

jps.text: For the word of the LORD is upright; and all His work is done in faithfulness.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֭הֵב צְדָקָ֣ה וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט חֶ֥סֶד יְ֝הוָ֗ה מָלְאָ֥ה הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: He loveth righteousness and justice; the earth is full of the lovingkindness of the LORD.

jps.text: He loveth righteousness and justice; the earth is full of the lovingkindness of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: בִּדְבַ֣ר יְ֭הוָה שָׁמַ֣יִם נַעֲשׂ֑וּ וּבְר֥וּחַ פִּ֝֗יו כָּל־צְבָאָֽם׃
verses.englishText: By the word of the LORD were the heavens made; and all the host of them by the breath of His mouth.

jps.text: By the word of the LORD were the heavens made; and all the host of them by the breath of His mouth.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּנֵ֣ס כַּ֭נֵּד מֵ֣י הַיָּ֑ם נֹתֵ֖ן בְּאֹצָרֹ֣ות תְּהֹומֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: He gathereth the waters of the sea together as a heap; He layeth up the deeps in storehouses.

jps.text: He gathereth the waters of the sea together as a heap; He layeth up the deeps in storehouses.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽירְא֣וּ מֵ֭יְהוָה כָּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ מִמֶּ֥נּוּ יָ֝ג֗וּרוּ כָּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֥י תֵבֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Let all the earth fear the LORD; let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of Him.

jps.text: Let all the earth fear the LORD; let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of Him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ה֣וּא אָמַ֣ר וַיֶּ֑הִי הֽוּא־צִ֝וָּ֗ה וֽ͏ַיַּעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: For He spoke, and it was; He commanded, and it stood.

jps.text: For He spoke, and it was; He commanded, and it stood.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה הֵפִ֥יר עֲצַת־גֹּויִ֑ם הֵ֝נִ֗יא מַחְשְׁבֹ֥ות עַמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD bringeth the counsel of the nations to nought; He maketh the thoughts of the peoples to be of no effect.

jps.text: The LORD bringeth the counsel of the nations to nought; He maketh the thoughts of the peoples to be of no effect.

verses.hebrewText: עֲצַ֣ת יְ֭הוָה לְעֹולָ֣ם תַּעֲמֹ֑ד מַחְשְׁבֹ֥ות לִ֝בֹּ֗ו לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: The counsel of the LORD standeth for ever, the thoughts of His heart to all generations.

jps.text: The counsel of the LORD standeth for ever, the thoughts of His heart to all generations.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֣י הַ֭גֹּוי אֲשֶׁר־יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑יו הָעָ֓ם ׀ בָּחַ֖ר לְנַחֲלָ֣ה לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the nation whose God is the LORD; the people whom He hath chosen for His own inheritance.

jps.text: Happy is the nation whose God is the LORD; the people whom He hath chosen for His own inheritance.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭שָּׁמַיִם הִבִּ֣יט יְהוָ֑ה רָ֝אָ֗ה אֶֽת־כָּל־בְּנֵ֥י הָאָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The LORD looketh from heaven; He beholdeth all the sons of men;

jps.text: The LORD looketh from heaven; He beholdeth all the sons of men;

verses.hebrewText: מִֽמְּכֹון־שִׁבְתֹּ֥ו הִשְׁגִּ֑יחַ אֶ֖ל כָּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: From the place of His habitation He looketh intently upon all the inhabitants of the earth;

jps.text: From the place of His habitation He looketh intently upon all the inhabitants of the earth;

verses.hebrewText: הַיֹּצֵ֣ר יַ֣חַד לִבָּ֑ם הַ֝מֵּבִ֗ין אֶל־כָּל־מַעֲשֵׂיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: He that fashioneth the hearts of them all, that considereth all their doings.

jps.text: He that fashioneth the hearts of them all, that considereth all their doings.

verses.hebrewText: אֵֽין־הַ֭מֶּלֶךְ נֹושָׁ֣ע בְּרָב־חָ֑יִל גִּ֝בֹּ֗ור לֹֽא־יִנָּצֵ֥ל בְּרָב־כֹּֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: A king is not saved by the multitude of a host; a mighty man is not delivered by great strength.

jps.text: A king is not saved by the multitude of a host; a mighty man is not delivered by great strength.

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֣קֶר הַ֭סּוּס לִתְשׁוּעָ֑ה וּבְרֹ֥ב חֵ֝ילֹ֗ו לֹ֣א יְמַלֵּֽט׃
verses.englishText: A horse is a vain thing for safety; neither doth it afford escape by its great strength.

jps.text: A horse is a vain thing for safety; neither doth it afford escape by its great strength.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה עֵ֣ין יְ֭הוָה אֶל־יְרֵאָ֑יו לַֽמְיַחֲלִ֥ים לְחַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Behold, the eye of the LORD is toward them that fear Him, toward them that wait for His mercy;

jps.text: Behold, the eye of the LORD is toward them that fear Him, toward them that wait for His mercy;

verses.hebrewText: לְהַצִּ֣יל מִמָּ֣וֶת נַפְשָׁ֑ם וּ֝לְחַיֹּותָ֗ם בָּרָעָֽב׃
verses.englishText: To deliver their soul from death, and to keep them alive in famine.

jps.text: To deliver their soul from death, and to keep them alive in famine.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֭פְשֵׁנוּ חִכְּתָ֣ה לַֽיהוָ֑ה עֶזְרֵ֖נוּ וּמָגִנֵּ֣נוּ הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: Our soul hath waited for the LORD; He is our help and our shield.

jps.text: Our soul hath waited for the LORD; He is our help and our shield.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־בֹ֭ו יִשְׂמַ֣ח לִבֵּ֑נוּ כִּ֤י בְשֵׁ֖ם קָדְשֹׁ֣ו בָטָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For in Him doth our heart rejoice, because we have trusted in His holy name.

jps.text: For in Him doth our heart rejoice, because we have trusted in His holy name.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִֽי־חַסְדְּךָ֣ יְהוָ֣ה עָלֵ֑ינוּ כַּ֝אֲשֶׁ֗ר יִחַ֥לְנוּ לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Let Thy mercy, O LORD, be upon us, according as we have waited for Thee.

jps.text: Let Thy mercy, O LORD, be upon us, according as we have waited for Thee.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֗ד בְּשַׁנֹּותֹ֣ו אֶת־טַ֭עְמֹו לִפְנֵ֣י אֲבִימֶ֑לֶךְ וֽ͏ַ֝יְגָרֲשֵׁ֗הוּ וַיֵּלַֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David; when he changed his demeanour before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed.

jps.text: A Psalm of David; when he changed his demeanour before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed.

verses.hebrewText: אֲבָרֲכָ֣ה אֶת־יְהוָ֣ה בְּכָל־עֵ֑ת תָּ֝מִ֗יד תְּֽהִלָּתֹ֥ו בְּפִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will bless the LORD at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth.

jps.text: I will bless the LORD at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭יהוָה תִּתְהַלֵּ֣ל נַפְשִׁ֑י יִשְׁמְע֖וּ עֲנָוִ֣ים וְיִשְׂמָֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: My soul shall glory in the LORD; the humble shall hear thereof, and be glad.

jps.text: My soul shall glory in the LORD; the humble shall hear thereof, and be glad.

verses.hebrewText: גַּדְּל֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה אִתִּ֑י וּנְרֹומְמָ֖ה שְׁמֹ֣ו יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O magnify the LORD with me, and let us exalt His name together.

jps.text: O magnify the LORD with me, and let us exalt His name together.

verses.hebrewText: דָּרַ֣שְׁתִּי אֶת־יְהוָ֣ה וְעָנָ֑נִי וּמִכָּל־מְ֝גוּרֹותַ֗י הִצִּילָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I sought the LORD, and He answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.

jps.text: I sought the LORD, and He answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.

verses.hebrewText: הִבִּ֣יטוּ אֵלָ֣יו וְנָהָ֑רוּ וּ֝פְנֵיהֶ֗ם אַל־יֶחְפָּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: They looked unto Him, and were radiant; and their faces shall never be abashed.

jps.text: They looked unto Him, and were radiant; and their faces shall never be abashed.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֤ה עָנִ֣י קָ֭רָא וַיהוָ֣ה שָׁמֵ֑עַ וּמִכָּל־צָ֝רֹותָ֗יו הֹושִׁיעֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard, and saved him out of all his troubles.

jps.text: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard, and saved him out of all his troubles.

verses.hebrewText: חֹנֶ֤ה מַלְאַךְ־יְהוָ֓ה סָ֘בִ֤יב לִֽירֵאָ֗יו וַֽיְחַלְּצֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: The angel of the LORD encampeth round about them that fear Him, and delivereth them.

jps.text: The angel of the LORD encampeth round about them that fear Him, and delivereth them.

verses.hebrewText: טַעֲמ֣וּ וּ֭רְאוּ כִּי־טֹ֣וב יְהוָ֑ה אַֽשְׁרֵ֥י הַ֝גֶּ֗בֶר יֶחֱסֶה־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O consider and see that the LORD is good; happy is the man that taketh refuge in Him.

jps.text: O consider and see that the LORD is good; happy is the man that taketh refuge in Him.

verses.hebrewText: יְר֣אוּ אֶת־יְהוָ֣ה קְדֹשָׁ֑יו כִּי־אֵ֥ין מַ֝חְסֹ֗ור לִירֵאָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: O fear the LORD, ye His holy ones; for there is no want to them that fear Him.

jps.text: O fear the LORD, ye His holy ones; for there is no want to them that fear Him.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭פִירִים רָשׁ֣וּ וְרָעֵ֑בוּ וְדֹרְשֵׁ֥י יְ֝הוָ֗ה לֹא־יַחְסְר֥וּ כָל־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger; but they that seek the LORD want not any good thing.

jps.text: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger; but they that seek the LORD want not any good thing.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽכוּ־בָ֭נִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִ֑י יִֽרְאַ֥ת יְ֝הוָ֗ה אֲלַמֶּדְכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Come, ye children, hearken unto me; I will teach you the fear of the LORD.

jps.text: Come, ye children, hearken unto me; I will teach you the fear of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־הָ֭אִישׁ הֶחָפֵ֣ץ חַיִּ֑ים אֹהֵ֥ב יָ֝מִ֗ים לִרְאֹ֥ות טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Who is the man that desireth life, and loveth days, that he may see good therein?

jps.text: Who is the man that desireth life, and loveth days, that he may see good therein?

verses.hebrewText: נְצֹ֣ר לְשֹׁונְךָ֣ מֵרָ֑ע וּ֝שְׂפָתֶ֗יךָ מִדַּבֵּ֥ר מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Keep thy tongue from evil, and thy lips from speaking guile.

jps.text: Keep thy tongue from evil, and thy lips from speaking guile.

verses.hebrewText: ס֣וּר מֵ֭רָע וַעֲשֵׂה־טֹ֑וב בַּקֵּ֖שׁ שָׁלֹ֣ום וְרָדְפֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.

jps.text: Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.

verses.hebrewText: עֵינֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה אֶל־צַדִּיקִ֑ים וְ֝אָזְנָ֗יו אֶל־שַׁוְעָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous, and His ears are open unto their cry.

jps.text: The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous, and His ears are open unto their cry.

verses.hebrewText: פְּנֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה בְּעֹ֣שֵׂי רָ֑ע לְהַכְרִ֖ית מֵאֶ֣רֶץ זִכְרָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The face of the LORD is against them that do evil, to cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.

jps.text: The face of the LORD is against them that do evil, to cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.

verses.hebrewText: צָעֲק֣וּ וַיהוָ֣ה שָׁמֵ֑עַ וּמִכָּל־צָ֝רֹותָ֗ם הִצִּילָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They cried, and the LORD heard, and delivered them out of all their troubles.

jps.text: They cried, and the LORD heard, and delivered them out of all their troubles.

verses.hebrewText: קָרֹ֣וב יְ֭הוָה לְנִשְׁבְּרֵי־לֵ֑ב וְֽאֶת־דַּכְּאֵי־ר֥וּחַ יֹושִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart, and saveth such as are of a contrite spirit.

jps.text: The LORD is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart, and saveth such as are of a contrite spirit.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭בֹּות רָעֹ֣ות צַדִּ֑יק וּ֝מִכֻּלָּ֗ם יַצִּילֶ֥נּוּ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Many are the ills of the righteous, but the LORD delivereth him out of them all.

jps.text: Many are the ills of the righteous, but the LORD delivereth him out of them all.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁמֵ֥ר כָּל־עַצְמֹותָ֑יו אַחַ֥ת מֵ֝הֵ֗נָּה לֹ֣א נִשְׁבָּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: He keepeth all his bones; not one of them is broken.

jps.text: He keepeth all his bones; not one of them is broken.

verses.hebrewText: תְּמֹותֵ֣ת רָשָׁ֣ע רָעָ֑ה וְשֹׂנְאֵ֖י צַדִּ֣יק יֶאְשָֽׁמוּ׃
verses.englishText: Evil shall kill the wicked; and they that hate the righteous shall be held guilty.

jps.text: Evil shall kill the wicked; and they that hate the righteous shall be held guilty.

verses.hebrewText: פֹּודֶ֣ה יְ֭הוָה נֶ֣פֶשׁ עֲבָדָ֑יו וְלֹ֥א יֶ֝אְשְׁמ֗וּ כָּֽל־הַחֹסִ֥ים בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD redeemeth the soul of His servants; and none of them that take refuge in Him shall be desolate.

jps.text: The LORD redeemeth the soul of His servants; and none of them that take refuge in Him shall be desolate.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ רִיבָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה אֶת־יְרִיבַ֑י לְ֝חַ֗ם אֶת־לֹֽחֲמָֽי׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Strive, O LORD, with them that strive with me; fight against them that fight against me.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Strive, O LORD, with them that strive with me; fight against them that fight against me.

verses.hebrewText: הַחֲזֵ֣ק מָגֵ֣ן וְצִנָּ֑ה וְ֝ק֗וּמָה בְּעֶזְרָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Take hold of shield and buckler, and rise up to my help.

jps.text: Take hold of shield and buckler, and rise up to my help.

verses.hebrewText: וְהָ֘רֵ֤ק חֲנִ֣ית וּ֭סְגֹר לִקְרַ֣את רֹדְפָ֑י אֱמֹ֥ר לְ֝נַפְשִׁ֗י יְֽשֻׁעָתֵ֥ךְ אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Draw out also the spear, and the battle-axe, against them that pursue me; say unto my soul: 'I am Thy salvation.'

jps.text: Draw out also the spear, and the battle-axe, against them that pursue me; say unto my soul: 'I am Thy salvation.'

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ וְיִכָּלְמוּ֮ מְבַקְשֵׁ֪י נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י יִסֹּ֣גוּ אָחֹ֣ור וְיַחְפְּר֑וּ חֹ֝שְׁבֵ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and brought to confusion that seek after my soul; let them be turned back and be abashed that devise my hurt.

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and brought to confusion that seek after my soul; let them be turned back and be abashed that devise my hurt.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽהְי֗וּ כְּמֹ֥ץ לִפְנֵי־ר֑וּחַ וּמַלְאַ֖ךְ יְהוָ֣ה דֹּוחֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let them be as chaff before the wind, the angel of the LORD thrusting them.

jps.text: Let them be as chaff before the wind, the angel of the LORD thrusting them.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהִי־דַרְכָּ֗ם חֹ֥שֶׁךְ וַחֲלַקְלַקֹּ֑ות וּמַלְאַ֥ךְ יְ֝הוָ֗ה רֹדְפָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let their way be dark and slippery, the angel of the LORD pursuing them.

jps.text: Let their way be dark and slippery, the angel of the LORD pursuing them.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חִנָּ֣ם טָֽמְנוּ־לִ֭י שַׁ֣חַת רִשְׁתָּ֑ם חִ֝נָּ֗ם חָפְר֥וּ לְנַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: For without cause have they hid for me the pit, even their net, without cause have they digged for my soul.

jps.text: For without cause have they hid for me the pit, even their net, without cause have they digged for my soul.

verses.hebrewText: תְּבֹואֵ֣הוּ שֹׁואָה֮ לֹֽא־יֵ֫דָ֥ע וְרִשְׁתֹּ֣ו אֲשֶׁר־טָמַ֣ן תִּלְכְּדֹ֑ו בְּ֝שֹׁואָ֗ה יִפָּל־בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Let destruction come upon him unawares; and let his net that he hath hid catch himself; with destruction let him fall therein.
