jps.text: Let destruction come upon him unawares; and let his net that he hath hid catch himself; with destruction let him fall therein.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭נַפְשִׁי תָּגִ֣יל בַּיהוָ֑ה תָּ֝שִׂישׂ בִּישׁוּעָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And my soul shall be joyful in the LORD; it shall rejoice in His salvation.

jps.text: And my soul shall be joyful in the LORD; it shall rejoice in His salvation.

verses.hebrewText: כָּ֥ל עַצְמֹותַ֨י ׀ תֹּאמַרְנָה֮ יְהוָ֗ה מִ֥י כָ֫מֹ֥וךָ מַצִּ֣יל עָ֭נִי מֵחָזָ֣ק מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וְעָנִ֥י וְ֝אֶבְיֹ֗ון מִגֹּזְלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: All my bones shall say: 'LORD, who is like unto Thee, who deliverest the poor from him that is too strong for him, yea, the poor and the needy from him that spoileth him?'

jps.text: All my bones shall say: 'LORD, who is like unto Thee, who deliverest the poor from him that is too strong for him, yea, the poor and the needy from him that spoileth him?'

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭קוּמוּן עֵדֵ֣י חָמָ֑ס אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־יָ֝דַ֗עְתִּי יִשְׁאָלֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: Unrighteous witnesses rise up; they ask me of things that I know not.

jps.text: Unrighteous witnesses rise up; they ask me of things that I know not.

verses.hebrewText: יְשַׁלְּמ֣וּנִי רָ֭עָה תַּ֥חַת טֹובָ֗ה שְׁכֹ֣ול לְנַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: They repay me evil for good; bereavement is come to my soul.

jps.text: They repay me evil for good; bereavement is come to my soul.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ בַּחֲלֹותָ֡ם לְב֬וּשִׁי שָׂ֗ק עִנֵּ֣יתִי בַצֹּ֣ום נַפְשִׁ֑י וּ֝תְפִלָּתִ֗י עַל־חֵיקִ֥י תָשֽׁוּב׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth, I afflicted my soul with fasting; and my prayer, may it return into mine own bosom.

jps.text: But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth, I afflicted my soul with fasting; and my prayer, may it return into mine own bosom.

verses.hebrewText: כְּרֵֽעַ־כְּאָ֣ח לִ֭י הִתְהַלָּ֑כְתִּי כַּאֲבֶל־אֵ֝֗ם קֹדֵ֥ר שַׁחֹֽותִי׃
verses.englishText: I went about as though it had been my friend or my brother; I bowed down mournful, as one that mourneth for his mother.

jps.text: I went about as though it had been my friend or my brother; I bowed down mournful, as one that mourneth for his mother.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְצַלְעִי֮ שָׂמְח֪וּ וְֽנֶאֱ֫סָ֥פוּ נֶאֶסְפ֬וּ עָלַ֣י נֵ֭כִים וְלֹ֣א יָדַ֑עְתִּי קָֽרְע֥וּ וְלֹא־דָֽמּוּ׃
verses.englishText: But when I halt they rejoice, and gather themselves together; the abjects gather themselves together against me, and those whom I know not; they tear me, and cease not;

jps.text: But when I halt they rejoice, and gather themselves together; the abjects gather themselves together against me, and those whom I know not; they tear me, and cease not;

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭חַנְפֵי לַעֲגֵ֣י מָעֹ֑וג חָרֹ֖ק עָלַ֣י שִׁנֵּֽימֹו׃
verses.englishText: With the profanest mockeries of backbiting they gnash at me with their teeth.

jps.text: With the profanest mockeries of backbiting they gnash at me with their teeth.

verses.hebrewText: אֲדֹנָי֮ כַּמָּ֪ה תִּ֫רְאֶ֥ה הָשִׁ֣יבָה נַ֭פְשִׁי מִשֹּׁאֵיהֶ֑ם מִ֝כְּפִירִ֗ים יְחִידָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Lord, how long wilt Thou look on? Rescue my soul from their destructions, mine only one from the lions.

jps.text: Lord, how long wilt Thou look on? Rescue my soul from their destructions, mine only one from the lions.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֭ודְךָ בְּקָהָ֣ל רָ֑ב בְּעַ֖ם עָצ֣וּם אֲהַֽלְלֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: I will give Thee thanks in the great congregation; I will praise Thee among a numerous people.

jps.text: I will give Thee thanks in the great congregation; I will praise Thee among a numerous people.

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִ֣י אֹיְבַ֣י שֶׁ֑קֶר שֹׂנְאַ֥י חִ֝נָּ֗ם יִקְרְצוּ־עָֽיִן׃
verses.englishText: Let not them that are wrongfully mine enemies rejoice over me; neither let them wink with the eye that hate me without a cause.

jps.text: Let not them that are wrongfully mine enemies rejoice over me; neither let them wink with the eye that hate me without a cause.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֥א שָׁלֹ֗ום יְדַ֫בֵּ֥רוּ וְעַ֥ל רִגְעֵי־אֶ֑רֶץ דִּבְרֵ֥י מִ֝רְמֹות יַחֲשֹׁבֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: For they speak not peace; but they devise deceitful matters against them that are quiet in the land.

jps.text: For they speak not peace; but they devise deceitful matters against them that are quiet in the land.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּרְחִ֥יבוּ עָלַ֗י פִּ֫יהֶ֥ם אָ֭מְרוּ הֶאָ֣ח ׀ הֶאָ֑ח רָאֲתָ֥ה עֵינֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, they open their mouth wide against me; they say: 'Aha, aha, our eye hath seen it.'

jps.text: Yea, they open their mouth wide against me; they say: 'Aha, aha, our eye hath seen it.'

verses.hebrewText: רָאִ֣יתָה יְ֭הוָה אַֽל־תֶּחֱרַ֑שׁ אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י אֲל־תִּרְחַ֥ק מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast seen, O LORD; keep not silence; O Lord, be not far from me.

jps.text: Thou hast seen, O LORD; keep not silence; O Lord, be not far from me.

verses.hebrewText: הָעִ֣ירָה וְ֭הָקִיצָה לְמִשְׁפָּטִ֑י אֱלֹהַ֖י וַֽאדֹנָ֣י לְרִיבִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Rouse Thee, and awake to my judgment, even unto my cause, my God and my Lord.

jps.text: Rouse Thee, and awake to my judgment, even unto my cause, my God and my Lord.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁפְטֵ֣נִי כְ֭צִדְקְךָ יְהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָ֗י וְאַל־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Judge me, O LORD my God, according to Thy righteousness; and let them not rejoice over me.

jps.text: Judge me, O LORD my God, according to Thy righteousness; and let them not rejoice over me.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יֹאמְר֣וּ בְ֭לִבָּם הֶאָ֣ח נַפְשֵׁ֑נוּ אַל־יֹ֝אמְר֗וּ בִּֽלַּעֲנֽוּהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them not say in their heart: 'Aha, we have our desire'; let them not say: 'We have swallowed him up.'

jps.text: Let them not say in their heart: 'Aha, we have our desire'; let them not say: 'We have swallowed him up.'

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֘בֹ֤שׁוּ וְיַחְפְּר֨וּ ׀ יַחְדָּו֮ שְׂמֵחֵ֪י רָעָ֫תִ֥י יִֽלְבְּשׁוּ־בֹ֥שֶׁת וּכְלִמָּ֑ה הַֽמַּגְדִּילִ֥ים עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and abashed together that rejoice at my hurt; let them be clothed with shame and confusion that magnify themselves against me.

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and abashed together that rejoice at my hurt; let them be clothed with shame and confusion that magnify themselves against me.

verses.hebrewText: יָרֹ֣נּוּ וְיִשְׂמְחוּ֮ חֲפֵצֵ֪י צִ֫דְקִ֥י וְיֹאמְר֣וּ תָ֭מִיד יִגְדַּ֣ל יְהוָ֑ה הֶ֝חָפֵ֗ץ שְׁלֹ֣ום עַבְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let them shout for joy, and be glad, that delight in my righteousness; yea, let them say continually: 'Magnified be the LORD, who delighteth in the peace of His servant.'

jps.text: Let them shout for joy, and be glad, that delight in my righteousness; yea, let them say continually: 'Magnified be the LORD, who delighteth in the peace of His servant.'

verses.hebrewText: וּ֭לְשֹׁונִי תֶּהְגֶּ֣ה צִדְקֶ֑ךָ כָּל־הַ֝יֹּום תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And my tongue shall speak of Thy righteousness, and of Thy praise all the day.

jps.text: And my tongue shall speak of Thy righteousness, and of Thy praise all the day.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ ׀ לְעֶֽבֶד־יְהוָ֬ה לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David the servant of the LORD.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David the servant of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: נְאֻֽם־פֶּ֣שַׁע לָ֭רָשָׁע בְּקֶ֣רֶב לִבִּ֑י אֵֽין־פַּ֥חַד אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Transgression speaketh to the wicked, methinks — there is no fear of God before his eyes.

jps.text: Transgression speaketh to the wicked, methinks — there is no fear of God before his eyes.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הֶחֱלִ֣יק אֵלָ֣יו בְּעֵינָ֑יו לִמְצֹ֖א עֲוֹנֹ֣ו לִשְׂנֹֽא׃
verses.englishText: For it flattereth him in his eyes, until his iniquity be found, and he be hated.

jps.text: For it flattereth him in his eyes, until his iniquity be found, and he be hated.

verses.hebrewText: דִּבְרֵי־פִ֭יו אָ֣וֶן וּמִרְמָ֑ה חָדַ֖ל לְהַשְׂכִּ֣יל לְהֵיטִֽיב׃
verses.englishText: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit; he hath left off to be wise, to do good.

jps.text: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit; he hath left off to be wise, to do good.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֤וֶן ׀ יַחְשֹׁ֗ב עַֽל־מִשְׁכָּ֫בֹ֥ו יִ֭תְיַצֵּב עַל־דֶּ֣רֶךְ לֹא־טֹ֑וב רָ֝֗ע לֹ֣א יִמְאָֽס׃
verses.englishText: He deviseth iniquity upon his bed; he setteth himself in a way that is not good; he abhorreth not evil.

jps.text: He deviseth iniquity upon his bed; he setteth himself in a way that is not good; he abhorreth not evil.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה בְּהַשָּׁמַ֣יִם חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ אֱ֝מֽוּנָתְךָ֗ עַד־שְׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thy lovingkindness, O LORD, is in the heavens; Thy faithfulness reacheth unto the skies.

jps.text: Thy lovingkindness, O LORD, is in the heavens; Thy faithfulness reacheth unto the skies.

verses.hebrewText: צִדְקָֽתְךָ֨ ׀ כְּֽהַרְרֵי־אֵ֗ל מִ֭שְׁפָּטֶךָ תְּהֹ֣ום רַבָּ֑ה אָ֤דָֽם־וּבְהֵמָ֖ה תֹושִׁ֣יעַ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thy righteousness is like the mighty mountains; Thy judgments are like the great deep; man and beast Thou preservest, O LORD.

jps.text: Thy righteousness is like the mighty mountains; Thy judgments are like the great deep; man and beast Thou preservest, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־יָּקָ֥ר חַסְדְּךָ֗ אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים וּבְנֵ֥י אָדָ֑ם בְּצֵ֥ל כְּ֝נָפֶ֗יךָ יֶחֱסָיֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: How precious is Thy lovingkindness, O God! and the children of men take refuge in the shadow of Thy wings.

jps.text: How precious is Thy lovingkindness, O God! and the children of men take refuge in the shadow of Thy wings.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭רְוְיֻן מִדֶּ֣שֶׁן בֵּיתֶ֑ךָ וְנַ֖חַל עֲדָנֶ֣יךָ תַשְׁקֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: They are abundantly satisfied with the fatness of Thy house; and Thou makest them drink of the river of Thy pleasures.

jps.text: They are abundantly satisfied with the fatness of Thy house; and Thou makest them drink of the river of Thy pleasures.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עִ֭מְּךָ מְקֹ֣ור חַיִּ֑ים בְּ֝אֹורְךָ֗ נִרְאֶה־אֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For with Thee is the fountain of life; in Thy light do we see light.

jps.text: For with Thee is the fountain of life; in Thy light do we see light.

verses.hebrewText: מְשֹׁ֣ךְ חַ֭סְדְּךָ לְיֹדְעֶ֑יךָ וְ֝צִדְקָֽתְךָ֗ לְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: O continue Thy lovingkindness unto them that know Thee; and Thy righteousness to the upright in heart.

jps.text: O continue Thy lovingkindness unto them that know Thee; and Thy righteousness to the upright in heart.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תְּ֭בֹואֵנִי רֶ֣גֶל גַּאֲוָ֑ה וְיַד־רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים אַל־תְּנִדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Let not the foot of pride overtake me, and let not the hand of the wicked drive me away.

jps.text: Let not the foot of pride overtake me, and let not the hand of the wicked drive me away.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֣ם נָ֭פְלוּ פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן דֹּ֝ח֗וּ וְלֹא־יָ֥כְלוּ קֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: There are the workers of iniquity fallen; they are thrust down, and are not able to rise.

jps.text: There are the workers of iniquity fallen; they are thrust down, and are not able to rise.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ אַל־תִּתְחַ֥ר בַּמְּרֵעִ֑ים אַל־תְּ֝קַנֵּ֗א בְּעֹשֵׂ֥י עַוְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Fret not thyself because of evil-doers, neither be thou envious against them that work unrighteousness.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Fret not thyself because of evil-doers, neither be thou envious against them that work unrighteousness.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י כֶ֭חָצִיר מְהֵרָ֣ה יִמָּ֑לוּ וּכְיֶ֥רֶק דֶּ֝֗שֶׁא יִבֹּולֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: For they shall soon wither like the grass, and fade as the green herb.

jps.text: For they shall soon wither like the grass, and fade as the green herb.

verses.hebrewText: בְּטַ֣ח בַּֽ֭יהוָה וַעֲשֵׂה־טֹ֑וב שְׁכָן־אֶ֝֗רֶץ וּרְעֵ֥ה אֱמוּנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Trust in the LORD, and do good; dwell in the land, and cherish faithfulness.

jps.text: Trust in the LORD, and do good; dwell in the land, and cherish faithfulness.

verses.hebrewText: וְהִתְעַנַּ֥ג עַל־יְהוָ֑ה וְיִֽתֶּן־לְ֝ךָ֗ מִשְׁאֲלֹ֥ת לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: So shalt thou delight thyself in the LORD; and He shall give thee the petitions of thy heart.

jps.text: So shalt thou delight thyself in the LORD; and He shall give thee the petitions of thy heart.

verses.hebrewText: גֹּ֣ול עַל־יְהוָ֣ה דַּרְכֶּ֑ךָ וּבְטַ֥ח עָ֝לָ֗יו וְה֣וּא יַעֲשֶֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in Him, and He will bring it to pass.

jps.text: Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in Him, and He will bring it to pass.

verses.hebrewText: וְהֹוצִ֣יא כָאֹ֣ור צִדְקֶ֑ךָ וּ֝מִשְׁפָּטֶ֗ךָ כַּֽצָּהֳרָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: And He will make thy righteousness to go forth as the light, and thy right as the noonday.

jps.text: And He will make thy righteousness to go forth as the light, and thy right as the noonday.

verses.hebrewText: דֹּ֤ום ׀ לַיהוָה֮ וְהִתְחֹ֪ולֵ֫ל לֹ֥ו אַל־תִּ֭תְחַר בְּמַצְלִ֣יחַ דַּרְכֹּ֑ו בְּ֝אִ֗ישׁ עֹשֶׂ֥ה מְזִמֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: Resign thyself unto the LORD, and wait patiently for Him; fret not thyself because of him who prospereth in his way, because of the man who bringeth wicked devices to pass.

jps.text: Resign thyself unto the LORD, and wait patiently for Him; fret not thyself because of him who prospereth in his way, because of the man who bringeth wicked devices to pass.

verses.hebrewText: הֶ֣רֶף מֵ֭אַף וַעֲזֹ֣ב חֵמָ֑ה אַל־תִּ֝תְחַ֗ר אַךְ־לְהָרֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath; fret not thyself, it tendeth only to evil-doing.

jps.text: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath; fret not thyself, it tendeth only to evil-doing.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־מְ֭רֵעִים יִכָּרֵת֑וּן וְקֹוֵ֥י יְ֝הוָ֗ה הֵ֣מָּה יִֽירְשׁוּ־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: For evil-doers shall be cut off; but those that wait for the LORD, they shall inherit the land.

jps.text: For evil-doers shall be cut off; but those that wait for the LORD, they shall inherit the land.

verses.hebrewText: וְעֹ֣וד מְ֭עַט וְאֵ֣ין רָשָׁ֑ע וְהִתְבֹּונַ֖נְתָּ עַל־מְקֹומֹ֣ו וְאֵינֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: And yet a little while, and the wicked is no more; yea, thou shalt look well at his place, and he is not.

jps.text: And yet a little while, and the wicked is no more; yea, thou shalt look well at his place, and he is not.

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲנָוִ֥ים יִֽירְשׁוּ־אָ֑רֶץ וְ֝הִתְעַנְּג֗וּ עַל־רֹ֥ב שָׁלֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: But the humble shall inherit the land, and delight themselves in the abundance of peace.

jps.text: But the humble shall inherit the land, and delight themselves in the abundance of peace.

verses.hebrewText: זֹמֵ֣ם רָ֭שָׁע לַצַּדִּ֑יק וְחֹרֵ֖ק עָלָ֣יו שִׁנָּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The wicked plotteth against the righteous, and gnasheth at him with his teeth.

jps.text: The wicked plotteth against the righteous, and gnasheth at him with his teeth.

verses.hebrewText: אֲדֹנָ֥י יִשְׂחַק־לֹ֑ו כִּֽי־רָ֝אָ֗ה כִּֽי־יָבֹ֥א יֹומֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The Lord doth laugh at him; for He seeth that his day is coming.

jps.text: The Lord doth laugh at him; for He seeth that his day is coming.

verses.hebrewText: חֶ֤רֶב ׀ פָּֽתְח֣וּ רְשָׁעִים֮ וְדָרְכ֪וּ קַ֫שְׁתָּ֥ם לְ֭הַפִּיל עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְיֹ֑ון לִ֝טְבֹ֗וחַ יִשְׁרֵי־דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow; to cast down the poor and needy, to slay such as are upright in the way;

jps.text: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow; to cast down the poor and needy, to slay such as are upright in the way;

verses.hebrewText: חַ֭רְבָּם תָּבֹ֣וא בְלִבָּ֑ם וְ֝קַשְּׁתֹותָ֗ם תִּשָּׁבַֽרְנָה׃
verses.englishText: Their sword shall enter into their own heart, and their bows shall be broken.

jps.text: Their sword shall enter into their own heart, and their bows shall be broken.

verses.hebrewText: טֹוב־מְ֭עַט לַצַּדִּ֑יק מֵ֝הֲמֹ֗ון רְשָׁעִ֥ים רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Better is a little that the righteous hath than the abundance of many wicked.

jps.text: Better is a little that the righteous hath than the abundance of many wicked.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י זְרֹועֹ֣ות רְ֭שָׁעִים תִּשָּׁבַ֑רְנָה וְסֹומֵ֖ךְ צַדִּיקִ֣ים יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken; but the LORD upholdeth the righteous.

jps.text: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken; but the LORD upholdeth the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: יֹודֵ֣עַ יְ֭הוָה יְמֵ֣י תְמִימִ֑ם וְ֝נַחֲלָתָ֗ם לְעֹולָ֥ם תִּהְיֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD knoweth the days of them that are wholehearted; and their inheritance shall be for ever.

jps.text: The LORD knoweth the days of them that are wholehearted; and their inheritance shall be for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יֵ֭בֹשׁוּ בְּעֵ֣ת רָעָ֑ה וּבִימֵ֖י רְעָבֹ֣ון יִשְׂבָּֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: They shall not be ashamed in the time of evil; and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.

jps.text: They shall not be ashamed in the time of evil; and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י רְשָׁעִ֨ים ׀ יֹאבֵ֗דוּ וְאֹיְבֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה כִּיקַ֣ר כָּרִ֑ים כָּל֖וּ בֶעָשָׁ֣ן כָּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: For the wicked shall perish, and the enemies of the LORD shall be as the fat of lambs — they shall pass away in smoke, they shall pass away.

jps.text: For the wicked shall perish, and the enemies of the LORD shall be as the fat of lambs — they shall pass away in smoke, they shall pass away.

verses.hebrewText: לֹוֶ֣ה רָ֭שָׁע וְלֹ֣א יְשַׁלֵּ֑ם וְ֝צַדִּ֗יק חֹונֵ֥ן וְנֹותֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: The wicked borroweth, and payeth not; but the righteous dealeth graciously, and giveth.

jps.text: The wicked borroweth, and payeth not; but the righteous dealeth graciously, and giveth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י מְ֭בֹרָכָיו יִ֣ירְשׁוּ אָ֑רֶץ וּ֝מְקֻלָּלָ֗יו יִכָּרֵֽתוּ׃
verses.englishText: For such as are blessed of Him shall inherit the land; and they that are cursed of Him shall be cut off.

jps.text: For such as are blessed of Him shall inherit the land; and they that are cursed of Him shall be cut off.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭יְהוָה מִֽצְעֲדֵי־גֶ֥בֶר כֹּונָ֗נוּ וְדַרְכֹּ֥ו יֶחְפָּֽץ׃
verses.englishText: It is of the LORD that a man's goings are established; and He delighted in his way.

jps.text: It is of the LORD that a man's goings are established; and He delighted in his way.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יִפֹּ֥ל לֹֽא־יוּטָ֑ל כִּֽי־יְ֝הוָ֗ה סֹומֵ֥ךְ יָדֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down; for the LORD upholdeth his hand.

jps.text: Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down; for the LORD upholdeth his hand.

verses.hebrewText: נַ֤עַר ׀ הָיִ֗יתִי גַּם־זָ֫קַ֥נְתִּי וְֽלֹא־רָ֭אִיתִי צַדִּ֣יק נֶעֱזָ֑ב וְ֝זַרְעֹ֗ו מְבַקֶּשׁ־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: I have been young, and now am old; yet have I not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his seed begging bread.

jps.text: I have been young, and now am old; yet have I not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his seed begging bread.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הַ֭יֹּום חֹונֵ֣ן וּמַלְוֶ֑ה וְ֝זַרְעֹ֗ו לִבְרָכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: All the day long he dealeth graciously, and lendeth; and his seed is blessed.

jps.text: All the day long he dealeth graciously, and lendeth; and his seed is blessed.

verses.hebrewText: ס֣וּר מֵ֭רָע וַעֲשֵׂה־טֹ֗וב וּשְׁכֹ֥ן לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Depart from evil, and do good; and dwell for evermore.

jps.text: Depart from evil, and do good; and dwell for evermore.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יְהוָ֨ה ׀ אֹ֘הֵ֤ב מִשְׁפָּ֗ט וְלֹא־יַעֲזֹ֣ב אֶת־חֲ֭סִידָיו לְעֹולָ֣ם נִשְׁמָ֑רוּ וְזֶ֖רַע רְשָׁעִ֣ים נִכְרָֽת׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD loveth justice, and forsaketh not His saints; they are preserved for ever; but the seed of the wicked shall be cut off.

jps.text: For the LORD loveth justice, and forsaketh not His saints; they are preserved for ever; but the seed of the wicked shall be cut off.

verses.hebrewText: צַדִּיקִ֥ים יִֽירְשׁוּ־אָ֑רֶץ וְיִשְׁכְּנ֖וּ לָעַ֣ד עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: The righteous shall inherit the land, and dwell therein for ever.

jps.text: The righteous shall inherit the land, and dwell therein for ever.

verses.hebrewText: פִּֽי־צַ֭דִּיק יֶהְגֶּ֣ה חָכְמָ֑ה וּ֝לְשֹׁונֹ֗ו תְּדַבֵּ֥ר מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: The mouth of the righteous uttereth wisdom, and his tongue speaketh justice.

jps.text: The mouth of the righteous uttereth wisdom, and his tongue speaketh justice.

verses.hebrewText: תֹּורַ֣ת אֱלֹהָ֣יו בְּלִבֹּ֑ו לֹ֖א תִמְעַ֣ד אֲשֻׁרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The law of his God is in his heart; none of his steps slide.

jps.text: The law of his God is in his heart; none of his steps slide.

verses.hebrewText: צֹופֶ֣ה רָ֭שָׁע לַצַּדִּ֑יק וּ֝מְבַקֵּ֗שׁ לַהֲמִיתֹו׃
verses.englishText: The wicked watcheth the righteous, and seeketh to slay him.

jps.text: The wicked watcheth the righteous, and seeketh to slay him.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה לֹא־יַעַזְבֶ֣נּוּ בְיָדֹ֑ו וְלֹ֥א יַ֝רְשִׁיעֶ֗נּוּ בְּהִשָּׁפְטֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD will not leave him in his hand, nor suffer him to be condemned when he is judged.

jps.text: The LORD will not leave him in his hand, nor suffer him to be condemned when he is judged.

verses.hebrewText: קַוֵּ֤ה אֶל־יְהוָ֨ה ׀ וּשְׁמֹ֬ר דַּרְכֹּ֗ו וִֽ֭ירֹומִמְךָ לָרֶ֣שֶׁת אָ֑רֶץ בְּהִכָּרֵ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wait for the LORD, and keep His way, and He will exalt thee to inherit the land; when the wicked are cut off, thou shalt see it.

jps.text: Wait for the LORD, and keep His way, and He will exalt thee to inherit the land; when the wicked are cut off, thou shalt see it.

verses.hebrewText: רָ֭אִיתִי רָשָׁ֣ע עָרִ֑יץ וּ֝מִתְעָרֶ֗ה כְּאֶזְרָ֥ח רַעֲנָֽן׃
verses.englishText: I have seen the wicked in great power, and spreading himself like a leafy tree in its native soil.

jps.text: I have seen the wicked in great power, and spreading himself like a leafy tree in its native soil.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יּֽ͏ַעֲבֹר וְהִנֵּ֣ה אֵינֶ֑נּוּ וָֽ֝אֲבַקְשֵׁ֗הוּ וְלֹ֣א נִמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: But one passed by, and, lo, he was not; yea, I sought him, but he could not be found.

jps.text: But one passed by, and, lo, he was not; yea, I sought him, but he could not be found.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמָר־תָּ֭ם וּרְאֵ֣ה יָשָׁ֑ר כִּֽי־אַחֲרִ֖ית לְאִ֣ישׁ שָׁלֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Mark the man of integrity, and behold the upright; for there is a future for the man of peace.

jps.text: Mark the man of integrity, and behold the upright; for there is a future for the man of peace.

verses.hebrewText: וּֽ֭פֹשְׁעִים נִשְׁמְד֣וּ יַחְדָּ֑ו אַחֲרִ֖ית רְשָׁעִ֣ים נִכְרָֽתָה׃
verses.englishText: But transgressors shall be destroyed together; the future of the wicked shall be cut off.

jps.text: But transgressors shall be destroyed together; the future of the wicked shall be cut off.

verses.hebrewText: וּתְשׁוּעַ֣ת צַ֭דִּיקִים מֵיְהוָ֑ה מָֽ֝עוּזָּ֗ם בְּעֵ֣ת צָרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: But the salvation of the righteous is of the LORD; He is their stronghold in the time of trouble.

jps.text: But the salvation of the righteous is of the LORD; He is their stronghold in the time of trouble.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיַּעְזְרֵ֥ם יְהוָ֗ה וַֽיְפַ֫לְּטֵ֥ם יְפַלְּטֵ֣ם מֵ֭רְשָׁעִים וְיֹושִׁיעֵ֑ם כִּי־חָ֥סוּ בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And the LORD helpeth them, and delivereth them; He delivereth them from the wicked, and saveth them, because they have taken refuge in Him.

jps.text: And the LORD helpeth them, and delivereth them; He delivereth them from the wicked, and saveth them, because they have taken refuge in Him.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֖ור לְדָוִ֣ד לְהַזְכִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David, to make memorial.

jps.text: A Psalm of David, to make memorial.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה אַל־בְּקֶצְפְּךָ֥ תֹוכִיחֵ֑נִי וּֽבַחֲמָתְךָ֥ תְיַסְּרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, rebuke me not in Thine anger; neither chasten me in Thy wrath.

jps.text: O LORD, rebuke me not in Thine anger; neither chasten me in Thy wrath.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חִ֭צֶּיךָ נִ֣חֲתוּ בִ֑י וַתִּנְחַ֖ת עָלַ֣י יָדֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thine arrows are gone deep into me, and Thy hand is come down upon me.

jps.text: For Thine arrows are gone deep into me, and Thy hand is come down upon me.

verses.hebrewText: אֵין־מְתֹ֣ם בִּ֭בְשָׂרִי מִפְּנֵ֣י זַעְמֶ֑ךָ אֵין־שָׁלֹ֥ום בַּ֝עֲצָמַ֗י מִפְּנֵ֥י חַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: There is no soundness in my flesh because of Thine indignation; neither is there any health in my bones because of my sin.

jps.text: There is no soundness in my flesh because of Thine indignation; neither is there any health in my bones because of my sin.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י עֲ֭וֹנֹתַי עָבְר֣וּ רֹאשִׁ֑י כְּמַשָּׂ֥א כָ֝בֵ֗ד יִכְבְּד֥וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: For mine iniquities are gone over my head; as a heavy burden they are too heavy for me.

jps.text: For mine iniquities are gone over my head; as a heavy burden they are too heavy for me.

verses.hebrewText: הִבְאִ֣ישׁוּ נָ֭מַקּוּ חַבּוּרֹתָ֑י מִ֝פְּנֵ֗י אִוַּלְתִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: My wounds are noisome, they fester, because of my foolishness.

jps.text: My wounds are noisome, they fester, because of my foolishness.

verses.hebrewText: נַעֲוֵ֣יתִי שַׁחֹ֣תִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום קֹדֵ֥ר הִלָּֽכְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I am bent and bowed down greatly; I go mourning all the day.

jps.text: I am bent and bowed down greatly; I go mourning all the day.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־כְ֭סָלַי מָלְא֣וּ נִקְלֶ֑ה וְאֵ֥ין מְ֝תֹ֗ם בִּבְשָׂרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For my loins are filled with burning; and there is no soundness in my flesh.

jps.text: For my loins are filled with burning; and there is no soundness in my flesh.

verses.hebrewText: נְפוּגֹ֣ותִי וְנִדְכֵּ֣יתִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד שָׁ֝אַ֗גְתִּי מִֽנַּהֲמַ֥ת לִבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I am benumbed and sore crushed; I groan by reason of the moaning of my heart.

jps.text: I am benumbed and sore crushed; I groan by reason of the moaning of my heart.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ‍ֽדֹנָי נֶגְדְּךָ֥ כָל־תַּאֲוָתִ֑י וְ֝אַנְחָתִ֗י מִמְּךָ֥ לֹא־נִסְתָּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: Lord, all my desire is before Thee; and my sighing is not hid from Thee.

jps.text: Lord, all my desire is before Thee; and my sighing is not hid from Thee.

verses.hebrewText: לִבִּ֣י סְ֭חַרְחַר עֲזָבַ֣נִי כֹחִ֑י וְֽאֹור־עֵינַ֥י גַּם־הֵ֝֗ם אֵ֣ין אִתִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: My heart fluttereth, my strength faileth me; as for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.

jps.text: My heart fluttereth, my strength faileth me; as for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.

verses.hebrewText: אֹֽהֲבַ֨י ׀ וְרֵעַ֗י מִנֶּ֣גֶד נִגְעִ֣י יַעֲמֹ֑דוּ וּ֝קְרֹובַ֗י מֵרָחֹ֥ק עָמָֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: My friends and my companions stand aloof from my plague; and my kinsmen stand afar off.

jps.text: My friends and my companions stand aloof from my plague; and my kinsmen stand afar off.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְנַקְשׁ֤וּ ׀ מְבַקְשֵׁ֬י נַפְשִׁ֗י וְדֹרְשֵׁ֣י רָ֭עָתִי דִּבְּר֣וּ הַוֹּ֑ות וּ֝מִרְמֹ֗ות כָּל־הַיֹּ֥ום יֶהְגּֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: They also that seek after my life lay snares for me; and they that seek my hurt speak crafty devices, and utter deceits all the day.

jps.text: They also that seek after my life lay snares for me; and they that seek my hurt speak crafty devices, and utter deceits all the day.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֣י כְ֭חֵרֵשׁ לֹ֣א אֶשְׁמָ֑ע וּ֝כְאִלֵּ֗ם לֹ֣א יִפְתַּח־פִּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: But I am as a deaf man, I hear not; and I am as a dumb man that openeth not his mouth.

jps.text: But I am as a deaf man, I hear not; and I am as a dumb man that openeth not his mouth.

verses.hebrewText: וָאֱהִ֗י כְּ֭אִישׁ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־שֹׁמֵ֑עַ וְאֵ֥ין בְּ֝פִ֗יו תֹּוכָחֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Yea, I am become as a man that heareth not, and in whose mouth are no arguments.

jps.text: Yea, I am become as a man that heareth not, and in whose mouth are no arguments.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־לְךָ֣ יְהוָ֣ה הֹוחָ֑לְתִּי אַתָּ֥ה תַ֝עֲנֶ֗ה אֲדֹנָ֥י אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For in Thee, O LORD, do I hope; Thou wilt answer, O Lord my God.

jps.text: For in Thee, O LORD, do I hope; Thou wilt answer, O Lord my God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי פֶּן־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִ֑י בְּמֹ֥וט רַ֝גְלִ֗י עָלַ֥י הִגְדִּֽילוּ׃
verses.englishText: For I said: 'Lest they rejoice over me; when my foot slippeth, they magnify themselves against me.'

jps.text: For I said: 'Lest they rejoice over me; when my foot slippeth, they magnify themselves against me.'

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אֲ֭נִי לְצֶ֣לַע נָכֹ֑ון וּמַכְאֹובִ֖י נֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: For I am ready to halt, and my pain is continually before me.

jps.text: For I am ready to halt, and my pain is continually before me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עֲוֹנִ֥י אַגִּ֑יד אֶ֝דְאַ֗ג מֵֽחַטָּאתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For I do declare mine iniquity; I am full of care because of my sin.

jps.text: For I do declare mine iniquity; I am full of care because of my sin.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭אֹיְבַי חַיִּ֣ים עָצֵ֑מוּ וְרַבּ֖וּ שֹׂנְאַ֣י שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: But mine enemies are strong in health; and they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.

jps.text: But mine enemies are strong in health; and they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.

verses.hebrewText: וּמְשַׁלְּמֵ֣י רָ֭עָה תַּ֣חַת טֹובָ֑ה יִ֝שְׂטְנ֗וּנִי תַּ֣חַת *רְדֹופִי־ (רָֽדְפִי)־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: They also that repay evil for good are adversaries unto me, because I follow the thing that is good.

jps.text: They also that repay evil for good are adversaries unto me, because I follow the thing that is good.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּֽעַזְבֵ֥נִי יְהוָ֑ה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אַל־תִּרְחַ֥ק מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Forsake me not, O LORD; O my God, be not far from me.

jps.text: Forsake me not, O LORD; O my God, be not far from me.

verses.hebrewText: ח֥וּשָׁה לְעֶזְרָתִ֑י אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י תְּשׁוּעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Make haste to help me, O LORD, my salvation.

jps.text: Make haste to help me, O LORD, my salvation.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ *לִידִיתוּן (לִֽידוּת֗וּן) מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader, for Jeduthun. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader, for Jeduthun. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֗רְתִּי אֶֽשְׁמְרָ֣ה דְרָכַי֮ מֵחֲטֹ֪וא בִלְשֹׁ֫ונִ֥י אֶשְׁמְרָ֥ה לְפִ֥י מַחְסֹ֑ום בְּעֹ֖ד רָשָׁ֣ע לְנֶגְדִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I said: 'I will take heed to my ways, that I sin not with my tongue; I will keep a curb upon my mouth, while the wicked is before me.'

jps.text: I said: 'I will take heed to my ways, that I sin not with my tongue; I will keep a curb upon my mouth, while the wicked is before me.'

verses.hebrewText: נֶאֱלַ֣מְתִּי ד֭וּמִיָּה הֶחֱשֵׁ֣יתִי מִטֹּ֑וב וּכְאֵבִ֥י נֶעְכָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: I was dumb with silence; I held my peace, had no comfort; and my pain was held in check.

jps.text: I was dumb with silence; I held my peace, had no comfort; and my pain was held in check.

verses.hebrewText: חַם־לִבִּ֨י ׀ בְּקִרְבִּ֗י בַּהֲגִיגִ֥י תִבְעַר־אֵ֑שׁ דִּ֝בַּ֗רְתִּי בִּלְשֹֽׁונִי׃
verses.englishText: My heart waxed hot within me; while I was musing, the fire kindled; then spoke I with my tongue:

jps.text: My heart waxed hot within me; while I was musing, the fire kindled; then spoke I with my tongue:

verses.hebrewText: הֹודִ֘יעֵ֤נִי יְהוָ֨ה ׀ קִצִּ֗י וּמִדַּ֣ת יָמַ֣י מַה־הִ֑יא אֵ֝דְעָ֗ה מֶה־חָדֵ֥ל אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: 'LORD, make me to know mine end, and the measure of my days, what it is; let me know how short-lived I am.

jps.text: 'LORD, make me to know mine end, and the measure of my days, what it is; let me know how short-lived I am.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה טְפָחֹ֨ות ׀ נָ֘תַ֤תָּה יָמַ֗י וְחֶלְדִּ֣י כְאַ֣יִן נֶגְדֶּ֑ךָ אַ֥ךְ כָּֽל־הֶ֥בֶל כָּל־אָ֝דָ֗ם נִצָּ֥ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Behold, Thou hast made my days as hand-breadths; and mine age is as nothing before Thee; surely every man at his best estate is altogether vanity. Selah

jps.text: Behold, Thou hast made my days as hand-breadths; and mine age is as nothing before Thee; surely every man at his best estate is altogether vanity. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־בְּצֶ֤לֶם ׀ יִֽתְהַלֶּךְ־אִ֗ישׁ אַךְ־הֶ֥בֶל יֶהֱמָי֑וּן יִ֝צְבֹּ֗ר וְֽלֹא־יֵדַ֥ע מִי־אֹסְפָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Surely man walketh as a mere semblance; surely for vanity they are in turmoil; he heapeth up riches, and knoweth not who shall gather them.

jps.text: Surely man walketh as a mere semblance; surely for vanity they are in turmoil; he heapeth up riches, and knoweth not who shall gather them.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתָּ֣ה מַה־קִּוִּ֣יתִי אֲדֹנָ֑י תֹּ֝וחַלְתִּ֗י לְךָ֣ הִֽיא׃
verses.englishText: And now, Lord, what wait I for? My hope, it is in Thee.

jps.text: And now, Lord, what wait I for? My hope, it is in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: מִכָּל־פְּשָׁעַ֥י הַצִּילֵ֑נִי חֶרְפַּ֥ת נָ֝בָ֗ל אַל־תְּשִׂימֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me from all my transgressions; make me not the reproach of the base.

jps.text: Deliver me from all my transgressions; make me not the reproach of the base.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֭אֱלַמְתִּי לֹ֣א אֶפְתַּח־פִּ֑י כִּ֖י אַתָּ֣ה עָשִֽׂיתָ׃
verses.englishText: I am dumb, I open not my mouth; because Thou hast done it.

jps.text: I am dumb, I open not my mouth; because Thou hast done it.

verses.hebrewText: הָסֵ֣ר מֵעָלַ֣י נִגְעֶ֑ךָ מִתִּגְרַ֥ת יָ֝דְךָ֗ אֲנִ֣י כָלִֽיתִי׃
verses.englishText: Remove Thy stroke from off me; I am consumed by the blow of Thy hand.

jps.text: Remove Thy stroke from off me; I am consumed by the blow of Thy hand.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽתֹוכָ֘חֹ֤ות עַל־עָוֹ֨ן ׀ יִסַּ֬רְתָּ אִ֗ישׁ וַתֶּ֣מֶס כָּעָ֣שׁ חֲמוּדֹ֑ו אַ֤ךְ הֶ֖בֶל כָּל־אָדָ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: With rebukes dost Thou chasten man for iniquity, and like a moth Thou makest his beauty to consume away; surely every man is vanity. Selah

jps.text: With rebukes dost Thou chasten man for iniquity, and like a moth Thou makest his beauty to consume away; surely every man is vanity. Selah

verses.hebrewText: שִֽׁמְעָ֥ה־תְפִלָּתִ֨י ׀ יְהוָ֡ה וְשַׁוְעָתִ֨י ׀ הַאֲזִינָה֮ אֶֽל־דִּמְעָתִ֗י אַֽל־תֶּ֫חֱרַ֥שׁ כִּ֤י גֵ֣ר אָנֹכִ֣י עִמָּ֑ךְ תֹּ֝ושָׁ֗ב כְּכָל־אֲבֹותָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hear my prayer, O LORD, and give ear unto my cry; keep not silence at my tears; for I am a stranger with Thee, a sojourner, as all my fathers were.

jps.text: Hear my prayer, O LORD, and give ear unto my cry; keep not silence at my tears; for I am a stranger with Thee, a sojourner, as all my fathers were.

verses.hebrewText: הָשַׁ֣ע מִמֶּ֣נִּי וְאַבְלִ֑יגָה בְּטֶ֖רֶם אֵלֵ֣ךְ וְאֵינֶֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Look away from me, that I may take comfort, before I go hence, and be no more.'

jps.text: Look away from me, that I may take comfort, before I go hence, and be no more.'

verses.hebrewText: לַ֝מְנַצֵּ֗חַ לְדָוִ֥ד מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: קַוֹּ֣ה קִוִּ֣יתִי יְהוָ֑ה וַיֵּ֥ט אֵ֝לַ֗י וַיִּשְׁמַ֥ע שַׁוְעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I waited patiently for the LORD; and He inclined unto me, and heard my cry.

jps.text: I waited patiently for the LORD; and He inclined unto me, and heard my cry.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּעֲלֵ֤נִי ׀ מִבֹּ֥ור שָׁאֹון֮ מִטִּ֪יט הַיָּ֫וֵ֥ן וַיָּ֖קֶם עַל־סֶ֥לַע רַגְלַ֗י כֹּונֵ֥ן אֲשֻׁרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: He brought me up also out of the tumultuous pit, out of the miry clay; and He set my feet upon a rock, He established my goings.

jps.text: He brought me up also out of the tumultuous pit, out of the miry clay; and He set my feet upon a rock, He established my goings.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֬ן בְּפִ֨י ׀ שִׁ֥יר חָדָשׁ֮ תְּהִלָּ֪ה לֵֽאלֹ֫הֵ֥ינוּ יִרְא֣וּ רַבִּ֣ים וְיִירָ֑אוּ וְ֝יִבְטְח֗וּ בַּיהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And He hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God; many shall see, and fear, and shall trust in the LORD.

jps.text: And He hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God; many shall see, and fear, and shall trust in the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי הַגֶּ֗בֶר אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֣ם יְ֭הֹוָה מִבְטַחֹ֑ו וְֽלֹא־פָנָ֥ה אֶל־רְ֝הָבִ֗ים וְשָׂטֵ֥י כָזָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man that hath made the LORD his trust, and hath not turned unto the arrogant, nor unto such as fall away treacherously.

jps.text: Happy is the man that hath made the LORD his trust, and hath not turned unto the arrogant, nor unto such as fall away treacherously.

verses.hebrewText: רַבֹּ֤ות עָשִׂ֨יתָ ׀ אַתָּ֤ה ׀ יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהַי֮ נִֽפְלְאֹתֶ֥יךָ וּמַחְשְׁבֹתֶ֗יךָ אֵ֫לֵ֥ינוּ אֵ֤ין ׀ עֲרֹ֬ךְ אֵלֶ֗יךָ אַגִּ֥ידָה וַאֲדַבֵּ֑רָה עָ֝צְמ֗וּ מִסַּפֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Many things hast Thou done, O LORD my God, even Thy wonderful works, and Thy thoughts toward us; there is none to be compared unto Thee! If I would declare and speak of them, they are more than can be told.

jps.text: Many things hast Thou done, O LORD my God, even Thy wonderful works, and Thy thoughts toward us; there is none to be compared unto Thee! If I would declare and speak of them, they are more than can be told.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֤בַח וּמִנְחָ֨ה ׀ לֹֽא־חָפַ֗צְתָּ אָ֭זְנַיִם כָּרִ֣יתָ לִּ֑י עֹולָ֥ה וַ֝חֲטָאָ֗ה לֹ֣א שָׁאָֽלְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Sacrifice and meal-offering Thou hast no delight in; mine ears hast Thou opened; burnt-offering and sin-offering hast Thou not required.

jps.text: Sacrifice and meal-offering Thou hast no delight in; mine ears hast Thou opened; burnt-offering and sin-offering hast Thou not required.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֣ז אָ֭מַרְתִּי הִנֵּה־בָ֑אתִי בִּמְגִלַּת־סֵ֝֗פֶר כָּת֥וּב עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Then said I: 'Lo, I am come with the roll of a book which is prescribed for me;

jps.text: Then said I: 'Lo, I am come with the roll of a book which is prescribed for me;

verses.hebrewText: לַֽעֲשֹֽׂות־רְצֹונְךָ֣ אֱלֹהַ֣י חָפָ֑צְתִּי וְ֝תֹ֥ורָתְךָ֗ בְּתֹ֣וךְ מֵעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I delight to do Thy will, O my God; yea, Thy law is in my inmost parts.'

jps.text: I delight to do Thy will, O my God; yea, Thy law is in my inmost parts.'

verses.hebrewText: בִּשַּׂ֤רְתִּי צֶ֨דֶק ׀ בְּקָ֘הָ֤ל רָ֗ב הִנֵּ֣ה שְׂ֭פָתַי לֹ֣א אֶכְלָ֑א יְ֝הוָ֗ה אַתָּ֥ה יָדָֽעְתָּ׃
verses.englishText: I have preached righteousness in the great congregation, lo, I did not refrain my lips; O LORD, Thou knowest.

jps.text: I have preached righteousness in the great congregation, lo, I did not refrain my lips; O LORD, Thou knowest.

verses.hebrewText: צִדְקָתְךָ֬ לֹא־כִסִּ֨יתִי ׀ בְּתֹ֬וךְ לִבִּ֗י אֱמוּנָתְךָ֣ וּתְשׁוּעָתְךָ֣ אָמָ֑רְתִּי לֹא־כִחַ֥דְתִּי חַסְדְּךָ֥ וַ֝אֲמִתְּךָ֗ לְקָהָ֥ל רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: I have not hid Thy righteousness within my heart; I have declared Thy faithfulness and Thy salvation; I have not concealed Thy mercy and Thy truth from the great congregation.

jps.text: I have not hid Thy righteousness within my heart; I have declared Thy faithfulness and Thy salvation; I have not concealed Thy mercy and Thy truth from the great congregation.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה יְהוָ֗ה לֹא־תִכְלָ֣א רַחֲמֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּ֑נִּי חַסְדְּךָ֥ וַ֝אֲמִתְּךָ֗ תָּמִ֥יד יִצְּרֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou, O LORD, wilt not withhold Thy compassions from me; let Thy mercy and Thy truth continually preserve me.

jps.text: Thou, O LORD, wilt not withhold Thy compassions from me; let Thy mercy and Thy truth continually preserve me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אָפְפ֥וּ־עָלַ֨י ׀ רָעֹ֡ות עַד־אֵ֬ין מִסְפָּ֗ר הִשִּׂיג֣וּנִי עֲ֭וֹנֹתַי וְלֹא־יָכֹ֣לְתִּי לִרְאֹ֑ות עָצְמ֥וּ מִשַּֽׂעֲרֹ֥ות רֹ֝אשִׁ֗י וְלִבִּ֥י עֲזָבָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: For innumerable evils have compassed me about, mine iniquities have overtaken me, so that I am not able to look up; they are more than the hairs of my head, and my heart hath failed me.

jps.text: For innumerable evils have compassed me about, mine iniquities have overtaken me, so that I am not able to look up; they are more than the hairs of my head, and my heart hath failed me.

verses.hebrewText: רְצֵ֣ה יְ֭הוָה לְהַצִּילֵ֑נִי יְ֝הוָ֗ה לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי חֽוּשָׁה׃
verses.englishText: Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me; O LORD, make haste to help me.

jps.text: Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me; O LORD, make haste to help me.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֘בֹ֤שׁוּ וְיַחְפְּר֨וּ ׀ יַחַד֮ מְבַקְשֵׁ֥י נַפְשִׁ֗י לִסְפֹּ֫ותָ֥הּ יִסֹּ֣גוּ אָ֭חֹור וְיִכָּלְמ֑וּ חֲ֝פֵצֵ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and abashed together that seek after my soul to sweep it away; let them be turned backward and brought to confusion that delight in my hurt.

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and abashed together that seek after my soul to sweep it away; let them be turned backward and brought to confusion that delight in my hurt.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭שֹׁמּוּ עַל־עֵ֣קֶב בָּשְׁתָּ֑ם הָאֹמְרִ֥ים לִ֝֗י הֶאָ֥ח ׀ הֶאָֽח׃
verses.englishText: Let them be appalled by reason of their shame that say unto me: 'Aha, aha.'

jps.text: Let them be appalled by reason of their shame that say unto me: 'Aha, aha.'

verses.hebrewText: יָ֘שִׂ֤ישׂוּ וְיִשְׂמְח֨וּ ׀ בְּךָ֗ כָּֽל־מְבַ֫קְשֶׁ֥יךָ יֹאמְר֣וּ תָ֭מִיד יִגְדַּ֣ל יְהוָ֑ה אֹֽ֝הֲבֵ֗י תְּשׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let all those that seek Thee rejoice and be glad in Thee; let such as love Thy salvation say continually: 'The LORD be magnified.'

jps.text: Let all those that seek Thee rejoice and be glad in Thee; let such as love Thy salvation say continually: 'The LORD be magnified.'

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְיֹון֮ אֲדֹנָ֪י יַחֲשָׁ֫ב לִ֥י עֶזְרָתִ֣י וּמְפַלְטִ֣י אַ֑תָּה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אַל־תְּאַחַֽר׃
verses.englishText: But, as for me, that am poor and needy, the Lord will account it unto me; Thou art my help and my deliverer; O my God, tarry not.

jps.text: But, as for me, that am poor and needy, the Lord will account it unto me; Thou art my help and my deliverer; O my God, tarry not.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭שְׁרֵי מַשְׂכִּ֣יל אֶל־דָּ֑ל בְּיֹ֥ום רָ֝עָ֗ה יְֽמַלְּטֵ֥הוּ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Happy is he that considereth the poor; the LORD will deliver him in the day of evil.

jps.text: Happy is he that considereth the poor; the LORD will deliver him in the day of evil.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ יִשְׁמְרֵ֣הוּ וִֽ֭יחַיֵּהוּ *יֶאְשֹּׁר (וְאֻשַּׁ֣ר) בָּאָ֑רֶץ וְאַֽל־תִּ֝תְּנֵ֗הוּ בְּנֶ֣פֶשׁ אֹיְבָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD preserve him, and keep him alive, let him be called happy in the land; and deliver not Thou him unto the greed of his enemies.

jps.text: The LORD preserve him, and keep him alive, let him be called happy in the land; and deliver not Thou him unto the greed of his enemies.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה יִ֭סְעָדֶנּוּ עַל־עֶ֣רֶשׂ דְּוָ֑י כָּל־מִ֝שְׁכָּבֹ֗ו הָפַ֥כְתָּ בְחָלְיֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD support him upon the bed of illness; mayest Thou turn all his lying down in his sickness.

jps.text: The LORD support him upon the bed of illness; mayest Thou turn all his lying down in his sickness.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ‍ֽנִי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי יְהוָ֣ה חָנֵּ֑נִי רְפָאָ֥ה נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י כִּי־חָטָ֥אתִי לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: As for me, I said: 'O LORD, be gracious unto me; heal my soul; for I have sinned against Thee.'

jps.text: As for me, I said: 'O LORD, be gracious unto me; heal my soul; for I have sinned against Thee.'

verses.hebrewText: אֹויְבַ֗י יֹאמְר֣וּ רַ֣ע לִ֑י מָתַ֥י יָ֝מ֗וּת וְאָבַ֥ד שְׁמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Mine enemies speak evil of me: 'When shall he die, and his name perish?'

jps.text: Mine enemies speak evil of me: 'When shall he die, and his name perish?'

verses.hebrewText: וְאִם־בָּ֤א לִרְאֹ֨ות ׀ שָׁ֤וְא יְדַבֵּ֗ר לִבֹּ֗ו יִקְבָּץ־אָ֥וֶן לֹ֑ו יֵצֵ֖א לַח֣וּץ יְדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: And if one come to see me, he speaketh falsehood; his heart gathereth iniquity to itself; when he goeth abroad, he speaketh of it.

jps.text: And if one come to see me, he speaketh falsehood; his heart gathereth iniquity to itself; when he goeth abroad, he speaketh of it.

verses.hebrewText: יַ֗חַד עָלַ֣י יִ֭תְלַחֲשׁוּ כָּל־שֹׂנְאָ֑י עָלַ֓י ׀ יַחְשְׁב֖וּ רָעָ֣ה לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: All that hate me whisper together against me, against me do they devise my hurt:

jps.text: All that hate me whisper together against me, against me do they devise my hurt:

verses.hebrewText: דְּֽבַר־בְּ֭לִיַּעַל יָצ֣וּק בֹּ֑ו וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׁ֝כַ֗ב לֹא־יֹוסִ֥יף לָקֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: 'An evil thing cleaveth fast unto him; and now that he lieth, he shall rise up no more.'

jps.text: 'An evil thing cleaveth fast unto him; and now that he lieth, he shall rise up no more.'

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אִ֤ישׁ שְׁלֹומִ֨י ׀ אֲשֶׁר־בָּטַ֣חְתִּי בֹ֖ו אֹוכֵ֣ל לַחְמִ֑י הִגְדִּ֖יל עָלַ֣י עָקֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: Yea, mine own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, who did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his heel against me.

jps.text: Yea, mine own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, who did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his heel against me.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֤ה יְהוָ֗ה חָנֵּ֥נִי וַהֲקִימֵ֑נִי וַֽאֲשַׁלְּמָ֥ה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O LORD, be gracious unto me, and raise me up, that I may requite them.

jps.text: But Thou, O LORD, be gracious unto me, and raise me up, that I may requite them.

verses.hebrewText: בְּזֹ֣את יָ֭דַעְתִּי כִּֽי־חָפַ֣צְתָּ בִּ֑י כִּ֤י לֹֽא־יָרִ֖יעַ אֹיְבִ֣י עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: By this I know that Thou delightest in me, that mine enemy doth not triumph over me.

jps.text: By this I know that Thou delightest in me, that mine enemy doth not triumph over me.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֗י בְּ֭תֻמִּי תָּמַ֣כְתָּ בִּ֑י וַתַּצִּיבֵ֖נִי לְפָנֶ֣יךָ לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And as for me, Thou upholdest me because of mine integrity, and settest me before Thy face for ever.

jps.text: And as for me, Thou upholdest me because of mine integrity, and settest me before Thy face for ever.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֘ר֤וּךְ יְהוָ֨ה ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל מֵֽ֭הָעֹולָם וְעַ֥ד הָעֹולָ֗ם אָ֘מֵ֥ן ׀ וְאָמֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting and to everlasting. Amen, and Amen.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting and to everlasting. Amen, and Amen.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מַשְׂכִּ֥יל לִבְנֵי־קֹֽרַח׃
verses.englishText: BOOK II For the Leader; Maschil of the sons of Korah.

jps.text: BOOK II For the Leader; Maschil of the sons of Korah.

verses.hebrewText: כְּאַיָּ֗ל תַּעֲרֹ֥ג עַל־אֲפִֽיקֵי־מָ֑יִם כֵּ֤ן נַפְשִׁ֨י תַעֲרֹ֖ג אֵלֶ֣יךָ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: As the hart panteth after the water brooks, so panteth my soul after Thee, O God.

jps.text: As the hart panteth after the water brooks, so panteth my soul after Thee, O God.

verses.hebrewText: צָמְאָ֬ה נַפְשִׁ֨י ׀ לֵאלֹהִים֮ לְאֵ֪ל חָ֥י מָתַ֥י אָבֹ֑וא וְ֝אֵרָאֶ֗ה פְּנֵ֣י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: My soul thirsteth for God, for the living God: 'When shall I come and appear before God?'

jps.text: My soul thirsteth for God, for the living God: 'When shall I come and appear before God?'

verses.hebrewText: הָֽיְתָה־לִּ֬י דִמְעָתִ֣י לֶ֭חֶם יֹומָ֣ם וָלָ֑יְלָה בֶּאֱמֹ֥ר אֵלַ֥י כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום אַיֵּ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: My tears have been my food day and night, while they say unto me all the day: 'Where is Thy God?'

jps.text: My tears have been my food day and night, while they say unto me all the day: 'Where is Thy God?'

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֤לֶּה אֶזְכְּרָ֨ה ׀ וְאֶשְׁפְּכָ֬ה עָלַ֨י ׀ נַפְשִׁ֗י כִּ֤י אֶֽעֱבֹ֨ר ׀ בַּסָּךְ֮ אֶדַּדֵּ֗ם עַד־בֵּ֥ית אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים בְּקֹול־רִנָּ֥ה וְתֹודָ֗ה הָמֹ֥ון חֹוגֵֽג׃
verses.englishText: These things I remember, and pour out my soul within me, how I passed on with the throng, and led them to the house of God, with the voice of joy and praise, a multitude keeping holyday.

jps.text: These things I remember, and pour out my soul within me, how I passed on with the throng, and led them to the house of God, with the voice of joy and praise, a multitude keeping holyday.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־תִּשְׁתֹּ֬וחֲחִ֨י ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ וַתֶּהֱמִ֪י עָ֫לָ֥י הֹוחִ֣ילִי לֵֽ֭אלֹהִים כִּי־עֹ֥וד אֹודֶ֗נּוּ יְשׁוּעֹ֥ות פָּנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him for the salvation of His countenance.

jps.text: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him for the salvation of His countenance.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהַ֗י עָלַי֮ נַפְשִׁ֪י תִשְׁתֹּ֫וחָ֥ח עַל־כֵּ֗ן אֶ֭זְכָּרְךָ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ יַרְדֵּ֑ן וְ֝חֶרְמֹונִ֗ים מֵהַ֥ר מִצְעָֽר׃
verses.englishText: O my God, my soul is cast down within me; therefore do I remember Thee from the land of Jordan, and the Hermons, from the hill Mizar.

jps.text: O my God, my soul is cast down within me; therefore do I remember Thee from the land of Jordan, and the Hermons, from the hill Mizar.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהֹֽום־אֶל־תְּהֹ֣ום קֹ֭ורֵא לְקֹ֣ול צִנֹּורֶ֑יךָ כָּֽל־מִשְׁבָּרֶ֥יךָ וְ֝גַלֶּ֗יךָ עָלַ֥י עָבָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Deep calleth unto deep at the voice of Thy cataracts; all Thy waves and Thy billows are gone over me.

jps.text: Deep calleth unto deep at the voice of Thy cataracts; all Thy waves and Thy billows are gone over me.

verses.hebrewText: יֹומָ֤ם ׀ יְצַוֶּ֬ה יְהוָ֨ה ׀ חַסְדֹּ֗ו וּ֭בַלַּיְלָה *שִׁירָהּ (שִׁירֹ֣ו) עִמִּ֑י תְּ֝פִלָּ֗ה לְאֵ֣ל חַיָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: By day the LORD will command His lovingkindness, and in the night His song shall be with me, even a prayer unto the God of my life.

jps.text: By day the LORD will command His lovingkindness, and in the night His song shall be with me, even a prayer unto the God of my life.

verses.hebrewText: אֹומְרָ֤ה ׀ לְאֵ֥ל סַלְעִי֮ לָמָ֪ה שְׁכַ֫חְתָּ֥נִי לָֽמָּה־קֹדֵ֥ר אֵלֵ֗ךְ בְּלַ֣חַץ אֹויֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: I will say unto God my Rock: 'Why hast Thou forgotten me? Why go I mourning under the oppression of the enemy?'

jps.text: I will say unto God my Rock: 'Why hast Thou forgotten me? Why go I mourning under the oppression of the enemy?'

verses.hebrewText: בְּרֶ֤צַח ׀ בְּֽעַצְמֹותַ֗י חֵרְפ֥וּנִי צֹורְרָ֑י בְּאָמְרָ֥ם אֵלַ֥י כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום אַיֵּ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: As with a crushing in my bones, mine adversaries taunt me; while they say unto me all the day: 'Where is Thy God?'

jps.text: As with a crushing in my bones, mine adversaries taunt me; while they say unto me all the day: 'Where is Thy God?'

verses.hebrewText: מַה־תִּשְׁתֹּ֬וחֲחִ֨י ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ וּֽמַה־תֶּהֱמִ֪י עָ֫לָ֥י הֹוחִ֣ילִי לֽ͏ֵ֭אלֹהִים כִּי־עֹ֣וד אֹודֶ֑נּוּ יְשׁוּעֹ֥ת פָּ֝נַ֗י וֵֽאלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him, the salvation of my countenance, and my God.

jps.text: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him, the salvation of my countenance, and my God.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁפְטֵ֤נִי אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ וְרִ֘יבָ֤ה רִיבִ֗י מִגֹּ֥וי לֹא־חָסִ֑יד מֵ֤אִישׁ־מִרְמָ֖ה וְעַוְלָ֣ה תְפַלְּטֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Be Thou my judge, O God, and plead my cause against an ungodly nation; O deliver me from the deceitful and unjust man.

jps.text: Be Thou my judge, O God, and plead my cause against an ungodly nation; O deliver me from the deceitful and unjust man.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֤ה ׀ אֱלֹהֵ֣י מָֽעוּזִּי֮ לָמָ֪ה זְנַ֫חְתָּ֥נִי לָֽמָּה־קֹדֵ֥ר אֶתְהַלֵּ֗ךְ בְּלַ֣חַץ אֹויֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art the God of my strength; why hast Thou cast me off? Why go I mourning under the oppression of the enemy?

jps.text: For Thou art the God of my strength; why hast Thou cast me off? Why go I mourning under the oppression of the enemy?

verses.hebrewText: שְׁלַח־אֹורְךָ֣ וַ֭אֲמִתְּךָ הֵ֣מָּה יַנְח֑וּנִי יְבִיא֥וּנִי אֶל־הַֽר־קָ֝דְשְׁךָ֗ וְאֶל־מִשְׁכְּנֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: O send out Thy light and Thy truth; let them lead me; let them bring me unto Thy holy mountain, and to Thy dwelling-places.

jps.text: O send out Thy light and Thy truth; let them lead me; let them bring me unto Thy holy mountain, and to Thy dwelling-places.

verses.hebrewText: וְאָבֹ֤ואָה ׀ אֶל־מִזְבַּ֬ח אֱלֹהִ֗ים אֶל־אֵל֮ שִׂמְחַ֪ת גִּ֫ילִ֥י וְאֹודְךָ֥ בְכִנֹּ֗ור אֱלֹהִ֥ים אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Then will I go unto the altar of God, unto God, my exceeding joy; and praise Thee upon the harp, O God, my God.

jps.text: Then will I go unto the altar of God, unto God, my exceeding joy; and praise Thee upon the harp, O God, my God.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־תִּשְׁתֹּ֬וחֲחִ֨י ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ וּֽמַה־תֶּהֱמִ֪י עָ֫לָ֥י הֹוחִ֣ילִי לֽ͏ֵ֭אלֹהִים כִּי־עֹ֣וד אֹודֶ֑נּוּ יְשׁוּעֹ֥ת פָּ֝נַ֗י וֵֽאלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him, the salvation of my countenance, and my God.

jps.text: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? and why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him, the salvation of my countenance, and my God.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ לִבְנֵי־קֹ֬רַח מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; a Psalm of the sons of Korah. Maschil.

jps.text: For the Leader; a Psalm of the sons of Korah. Maschil.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ בְּאָזְנֵ֬ינוּ שָׁמַ֗עְנוּ אֲבֹותֵ֥ינוּ סִפְּרוּ־לָ֑נוּ פֹּ֥עַל פָּעַ֥לְתָּ בִֽ֝ימֵיהֶ֗ם בִּ֣ימֵי קֶֽדֶם׃
verses.englishText: O God, we have heard with our ears, our fathers have told us; a work Thou didst in their days, in the days of old.

jps.text: O God, we have heard with our ears, our fathers have told us; a work Thou didst in their days, in the days of old.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה ׀ יָדְךָ֡ גֹּויִ֣ם הֹ֭ורַשְׁתָּ וַתִּטָּעֵ֑ם תָּרַ֥ע לְ֝אֻמִּ֗ים וַֽתְּשַׁלְּחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou with Thy hand didst drive out the nations, and didst plant them in; Thou didst break the peoples, and didst spread them abroad.

jps.text: Thou with Thy hand didst drive out the nations, and didst plant them in; Thou didst break the peoples, and didst spread them abroad.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֪א בְחַרְבָּ֡ם יָ֥רְשׁוּ אָ֗רֶץ וּזְרֹועָם֮ לֹא־הֹושִׁ֪יעָ֫ה לָּ֥מֹו כִּֽי־יְמִֽינְךָ֣ וּ֭זְרֹועֲךָ וְאֹ֥ור פָּנֶ֗יךָ כִּ֣י רְצִיתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For not by their own sword did they get the land in possession, neither did their own arm save them; but Thy right hand, and Thine arm, and the light of Thy countenance, because Thou wast favourable unto them.

jps.text: For not by their own sword did they get the land in possession, neither did their own arm save them; but Thy right hand, and Thine arm, and the light of Thy countenance, because Thou wast favourable unto them.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּה־ה֣וּא מַלְכִּ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים צַ֝וֵּ֗ה יְשׁוּעֹ֥ות יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: Thou art my King, O God; command the salvation of Jacob.

jps.text: Thou art my King, O God; command the salvation of Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭ךָ צָרֵ֣ינוּ נְנַגֵּ֑חַ בְּ֝שִׁמְךָ֗ נָב֥וּס קָמֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Through Thee do we push down our adversaries; through Thy name do we tread them under that rise up against us.

jps.text: Through Thee do we push down our adversaries; through Thy name do we tread them under that rise up against us.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א בְקַשְׁתִּ֣י אֶבְטָ֑ח וְ֝חַרְבִּ֗י לֹ֣א תֹושִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: For I trust not in my bow, neither can my sword save me.

jps.text: For I trust not in my bow, neither can my sword save me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י הֹ֭ושַׁעְתָּנוּ מִצָּרֵ֑ינוּ וּמְשַׂנְאֵ֥ינוּ הֱבִישֹֽׁותָ׃
verses.englishText: But Thou hast saved us from our adversaries, and hast put them to shame that hate us.

jps.text: But Thou hast saved us from our adversaries, and hast put them to shame that hate us.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּֽ֭אלֹהִים הִלַּלְ֣נוּ כָל־הַיֹּ֑ום וְשִׁמְךָ֓ ׀ לְעֹולָ֖ם נֹודֶ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: In God have we gloried all the day, and we will give thanks unto Thy name for ever. Selah

jps.text: In God have we gloried all the day, and we will give thanks unto Thy name for ever. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַף־זָ֭נַחְתָּ וַתַּכְלִימֵ֑נוּ וְלֹא־תֵ֝צֵ֗א בְּצִבְאֹותֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yet Thou hast cast off, and brought us to confusion; and goest not forth with our hosts.

jps.text: Yet Thou hast cast off, and brought us to confusion; and goest not forth with our hosts.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשִׁיבֵ֣נוּ אָ֭חֹור מִנִּי־צָ֑ר וּ֝מְשַׂנְאֵ֗ינוּ שָׁ֣סוּ לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Thou makest us to turn back from the adversary; and they that hate us spoil at their will.

jps.text: Thou makest us to turn back from the adversary; and they that hate us spoil at their will.

verses.hebrewText: תִּ֭תְּנֵנוּ כְּצֹ֣אן מַאֲכָ֑ל וּ֝בַגֹּויִ֗ם זֵרִיתָֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast given us like sheep to be eaten; and hast scattered us among the nations.

jps.text: Thou hast given us like sheep to be eaten; and hast scattered us among the nations.

verses.hebrewText: תִּמְכֹּֽר־עַמְּךָ֥ בְלֹא־הֹ֑ון וְלֹ֥א־רִ֝בִּ֗יתָ בִּמְחִירֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou sellest Thy people for small gain, and hast not set their prices high.

jps.text: Thou sellest Thy people for small gain, and hast not set their prices high.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשִׂימֵ֣נוּ חֶ֭רְפָּה לִשְׁכֵנֵ֑ינוּ לַ֥עַג וָ֝קֶ֗לֶס לִסְבִיבֹותֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thou makest us a taunt to our neighbours, a scorn and a derision to them that are round about us.

jps.text: Thou makest us a taunt to our neighbours, a scorn and a derision to them that are round about us.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשִׂימֵ֣נוּ מָ֭שָׁל בַּגֹּויִ֑ם מְנֹֽוד־רֹ֝֗אשׁ בַּל־אֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thou makest us a byword among the nations, a shaking of the head among the peoples.

jps.text: Thou makest us a byword among the nations, a shaking of the head among the peoples.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הַ֭יֹּום כְּלִמָּתִ֣י נֶגְדִּ֑י וּבֹ֖שֶׁת פָּנַ֣י כִּסָּֽתְנִי׃
verses.englishText: All the day is my confusion before me, and the shame of my face hath covered me,

jps.text: All the day is my confusion before me, and the shame of my face hath covered me,

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭קֹּול מְחָרֵ֣ף וּמְגַדֵּ֑ף מִפְּנֵ֥י אֹ֝ויֵ֗ב וּמִתְנַקֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the voice of him that taunteth and blasphemeth; by reason of the enemy and the revengeful.

jps.text: For the voice of him that taunteth and blasphemeth; by reason of the enemy and the revengeful.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־זֹ֣את בָּ֭אַתְנוּ וְלֹ֣א שְׁכַחֲנ֑וּךָ וְלֹֽא־שִׁ֝קַּ֗רְנוּ בִּבְרִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: All this is come upon us; yet have we not forgotten Thee, neither have we been false to Thy covenant.

jps.text: All this is come upon us; yet have we not forgotten Thee, neither have we been false to Thy covenant.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־נָסֹ֣וג אָחֹ֣ור לִבֵּ֑נוּ וַתֵּ֥ט אֲשֻׁרֵ֗ינוּ מִנִּ֥י אָרְחֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Our heart is not turned back, neither have our steps declined from Thy path;

jps.text: Our heart is not turned back, neither have our steps declined from Thy path;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י דִ֭כִּיתָנוּ בִּמְקֹ֣ום תַּנִּ֑ים וַתְּכַ֖ס עָלֵ֣ינוּ בְצַלְמָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Though Thou hast crushed us into a place of jackals, and covered us with the shadow of death.

jps.text: Though Thou hast crushed us into a place of jackals, and covered us with the shadow of death.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־שָׁ֭כַחְנוּ שֵׁ֣ם אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ וַנִּפְרֹ֥שׂ כַּ֝פֵּ֗ינוּ לְאֵ֣ל זָֽר׃
verses.englishText: If we had forgotten the name of our God, or spread forth our hands to a strange god;

jps.text: If we had forgotten the name of our God, or spread forth our hands to a strange god;

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֣א אֱ֭לֹהִים יַֽחֲקָר־זֹ֑את כִּֽי־ה֥וּא יֹ֝דֵ֗עַ תַּעֲלֻמֹ֥ות לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: Would not God search this out? For He knoweth the secrets of the heart.

jps.text: Would not God search this out? For He knoweth the secrets of the heart.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עָ֭לֶיךָ הֹרַ֣גְנוּ כָל־הַיֹּ֑ום נֶ֝חְשַׁ֗בְנוּ כְּצֹ֣אן טִבְחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Nay, but for Thy sake are we killed all the day; we are accounted as sheep for the slaughter.

jps.text: Nay, but for Thy sake are we killed all the day; we are accounted as sheep for the slaughter.

verses.hebrewText: ע֤וּרָה ׀ לָ֖מָּה תִישַׁ֥ן ׀ אֲדֹנָ֑י הָ֝קִ֗יצָה אַל־תִּזְנַ֥ח לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.englishText: Awake, why sleepest Thou, O Lord? Arouse Thyself, cast not off for ever.

jps.text: Awake, why sleepest Thou, O Lord? Arouse Thyself, cast not off for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לָֽמָּה־פָנֶ֥יךָ תַסְתִּ֑יר תִּשְׁכַּ֖ח עָנְיֵ֣נוּ וְֽלַחֲצֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore hidest Thou Thy face, and forgettest our affliction and our oppression?

jps.text: Wherefore hidest Thou Thy face, and forgettest our affliction and our oppression?

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שָׁ֣חָה לֶעָפָ֣ר נַפְשֵׁ֑נוּ דָּבְקָ֖ה לָאָ֣רֶץ בִּטְנֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For our soul is bowed down to the dust; our belly cleaveth unto the earth.

jps.text: For our soul is bowed down to the dust; our belly cleaveth unto the earth.

verses.hebrewText: ק֭וּמָֽה עֶזְרָ֣תָה לָּ֑נוּ וּ֝פְדֵ֗נוּ לְמַ֣עַן חַסְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Arise for our help, and redeem us for Thy mercy's sake.

jps.text: Arise for our help, and redeem us for Thy mercy's sake.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֣חַ עַל־שֹׁ֭שַׁנִּים לִבְנֵי־קֹ֑רַח מַ֝שְׂכִּ֗יל שִׁ֣יר יְדִידֹֽת׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim; a Psalm of the sons of Korah. Maschil. A Song of loves.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim; a Psalm of the sons of Korah. Maschil. A Song of loves.

verses.hebrewText: רָ֘חַ֤שׁ לִבִּ֨י ׀ דָּ֘בָ֤ר טֹ֗וב אֹמֵ֣ר אָ֭נִי מַעֲשַׂ֣י לְמֶ֑לֶךְ לְ֝שֹׁונִ֗י עֵ֤ט ׀ סֹופֵ֬ר מָהִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: My heart overfloweth with a goodly matter; I say: 'My work is concerning a king'; my tongue is the pen of a ready writer.

jps.text: My heart overfloweth with a goodly matter; I say: 'My work is concerning a king'; my tongue is the pen of a ready writer.

verses.hebrewText: יָפְיָפִ֡יתָ מִבְּנֵ֬י אָדָ֗ם ה֣וּצַק חֵ֭ן בְּשְׂפְתֹותֶ֑יךָ עַל־כֵּ֤ן בֵּֽרַכְךָ֖ אֱלֹהִ֣ים לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou art fairer than the children of men; grace is poured upon thy lips; therefore God hath blessed thee for ever.

jps.text: Thou art fairer than the children of men; grace is poured upon thy lips; therefore God hath blessed thee for ever.

verses.hebrewText: חֲגֹֽור־חַרְבְּךָ֣ עַל־יָרֵ֣ךְ גִּבֹּ֑ור הֹ֝ודְךָ֗ וַהֲדָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Gird thy sword upon thy thigh, O mighty one, thy glory and thy majesty.

jps.text: Gird thy sword upon thy thigh, O mighty one, thy glory and thy majesty.

verses.hebrewText: וַהֲדָ֬רְךָ֨ ׀ צְלַ֬ח רְכַ֗ב עַֽל־דְּבַר־אֱ֭מֶת וְעַנְוָה־צֶ֑דֶק וְתֹורְךָ֖ נֹורָאֹ֣ות יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And in thy majesty prosper, ride on, in behalf of truth and meekness and righteousness; and let thy right hand teach thee tremendous things.

jps.text: And in thy majesty prosper, ride on, in behalf of truth and meekness and righteousness; and let thy right hand teach thee tremendous things.

verses.hebrewText: חִצֶּ֗יךָ שְׁנ֫וּנִ֥ים עַ֭מִּים תַּחְתֶּ֣יךָ יִפְּל֑וּ בְּ֝לֵ֗ב אֹויְבֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: Thine arrows are sharp — the peoples fall under thee — they sink into the heart of the king's enemies.

jps.text: Thine arrows are sharp — the peoples fall under thee — they sink into the heart of the king's enemies.

verses.hebrewText: כִּסְאֲךָ֣ אֱ֭לֹהִים עֹולָ֣ם וָעֶ֑ד שֵׁ֥בֶט מִ֝ישֹׁ֗ר שֵׁ֣בֶט מַלְכוּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thy throne given of God is for ever and ever; a sceptre of equity is the sceptre of thy kingdom.

jps.text: Thy throne given of God is for ever and ever; a sceptre of equity is the sceptre of thy kingdom.

verses.hebrewText: אָהַ֣בְתָּ צֶּדֶק֮ וַתִּשְׂנָ֫א רֶ֥שַׁע עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ מְשָׁחֲךָ֡ אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֱ֭לֹהֶיךָ שֶׁ֥מֶן שָׂשֹׂ֗ון מֵֽחֲבֵרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated wickedness; therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.

jps.text: Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated wickedness; therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.

verses.hebrewText: מֹר־וַאֲהָלֹ֣ות קְ֭צִיעֹות כָּל־בִּגְדֹתֶ֑יךָ מִֽן־הֵ֥יכְלֵי שֵׁ֝֗ן מִנִּ֥י שִׂמְּחֽוּךָ׃
verses.englishText: Myrrh, and aloes, and cassia are all thy garments; out of ivory palaces stringed instruments have made thee glad.

jps.text: Myrrh, and aloes, and cassia are all thy garments; out of ivory palaces stringed instruments have made thee glad.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֹ֣ות מְ֭לָכִים בְּיִקְּרֹותֶ֑יךָ נִצְּבָ֥ה שֵׁגַ֥ל לִֽ֝ימִינְךָ֗ בְּכֶ֣תֶם אֹופִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: Kings' daughters are among thy favourites; at thy right hand doth stand the queen in gold of Ophir.

jps.text: Kings' daughters are among thy favourites; at thy right hand doth stand the queen in gold of Ophir.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְעִי־בַ֣ת וּ֭רְאִי וְהַטִּ֣י אָזְנֵ֑ךְ וְשִׁכְחִ֥י עַ֝מֵּ֗ךְ וּבֵ֥ית אָבִֽיךְ׃
verses.englishText: 'Hearken, O daughter, and consider, and incline thine ear; forget also thine own people, and thy father's house;

jps.text: 'Hearken, O daughter, and consider, and incline thine ear; forget also thine own people, and thy father's house;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִתְאָ֣ו הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ יָפְיֵ֑ךְ כִּי־ה֥וּא אֲ֝דֹנַ֗יִךְ וְהִשְׁתַּֽחֲוִי־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: So shall the king desire thy beauty; for he is thy lord; and do homage unto him.

jps.text: So shall the king desire thy beauty; for he is thy lord; and do homage unto him.

verses.hebrewText: וּבַֽת־צֹ֨ר ׀ בְּ֭מִנְחָה פָּנַ֥יִךְ יְחַלּ֗וּ עֲשִׁ֣ירֵי עָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And, O daughter of Tyre, the richest of the people shall entreat thy favour with a gift.'

jps.text: And, O daughter of Tyre, the richest of the people shall entreat thy favour with a gift.'

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־כְּבוּדָּ֣ה בַת־מֶ֣לֶךְ פְּנִ֑ימָה מִֽמִּשְׁבְּצֹ֖ות זָהָ֣ב לְבוּשָֽׁהּ׃
verses.englishText: All glorious is the king's daughter within the palace; her raiment is of chequer work inwrought with gold.

jps.text: All glorious is the king's daughter within the palace; her raiment is of chequer work inwrought with gold.

verses.hebrewText: לִרְקָמֹות֮ תּוּבַ֪ל לַ֫מֶּ֥לֶךְ בְּתוּלֹ֣ות אַ֭חֲרֶיהָ רֵעֹותֶ֑יהָ מ֖וּבָאֹ֣ות לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: She shall be led unto the king on richly woven stuff; the virgins her companions in her train being brought unto thee.

jps.text: She shall be led unto the king on richly woven stuff; the virgins her companions in her train being brought unto thee.

verses.hebrewText: תּ֖וּבַלְנָה בִּשְׂמָחֹ֣ת וָגִ֑יל תְּ֝בֹאֶ֗ינָה בְּהֵ֣יכַל מֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: They shall be led with gladness and rejoicing; they shall enter into the king's palace.

jps.text: They shall be led with gladness and rejoicing; they shall enter into the king's palace.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֣חַת אֲ֭בֹתֶיךָ יִהְי֣וּ בָנֶ֑יךָ תְּשִׁיתֵ֥מֹו לְ֝שָׂרִ֗ים בְּכָל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Instead of thy fathers shall be thy sons, whom thou shalt make princes in all the land.

jps.text: Instead of thy fathers shall be thy sons, whom thou shalt make princes in all the land.

verses.hebrewText: אַזְכִּ֣ירָה שִׁ֭מְךָ בְּכָל־דֹּ֣ר וָדֹ֑ר עַל־כֵּ֥ן עַמִּ֥ים יְ֝הֹודֻ֗ךָ לְעֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: I will make thy name to be remembered in all generations; therefore shall the peoples praise thee for ever and ever.

jps.text: I will make thy name to be remembered in all generations; therefore shall the peoples praise thee for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ לִבְנֵי־קֹ֑רַח עַֽל־עֲלָמֹ֥ות שִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; a Psalm of the sons of Korah; upon Alamoth. A Song.

jps.text: For the Leader; a Psalm of the sons of Korah; upon Alamoth. A Song.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֣ים לָ֭נוּ מַחֲסֶ֣ה וָעֹ֑ז עֶזְרָ֥ה בְ֝צָרֹ֗ות נִמְצָ֥א מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

jps.text: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֣ן לֹא־נִ֭ירָא בְּהָמִ֣יר אָ֑רֶץ וּבְמֹ֥וט הָ֝רִ֗ים בְּלֵ֣ב יַמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Therefore will we not fear, though the earth do change, and though the mountains be moved into the heart of the seas;

jps.text: Therefore will we not fear, though the earth do change, and though the mountains be moved into the heart of the seas;

verses.hebrewText: יֶהֱמ֣וּ יֶחְמְר֣וּ מֵימָ֑יו יִֽרְעֲשֽׁוּ־הָרִ֖ים בְּגַאֲוָתֹ֣ו סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Though the waters thereof roar and foam, though the mountains shake at the swelling thereof. Selah

jps.text: Though the waters thereof roar and foam, though the mountains shake at the swelling thereof. Selah

verses.hebrewText: נָהָ֗ר פְּלָגָ֗יו יְשַׂמְּח֥וּ עִיר־אֱלֹהִ֑ים קְ֝דֹ֗שׁ מִשְׁכְּנֵ֥י עֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: There is a river, the streams whereof make glad the city of God, the holiest dwelling-place of the Most High.

jps.text: There is a river, the streams whereof make glad the city of God, the holiest dwelling-place of the Most High.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֣ים בְּ֭קִרְבָּהּ בַּל־תִּמֹּ֑וט יַעְזְרֶ֥הָ אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לִפְנֹ֥ות בֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: God is in the midst of her, she shall not be moved; God shall help her, at the approach of morning.

jps.text: God is in the midst of her, she shall not be moved; God shall help her, at the approach of morning.

verses.hebrewText: הָמ֣וּ גֹ֖ויִם מָ֣טוּ מַמְלָכֹ֑ות נָתַ֥ן בְּ֝קֹולֹ֗ו תָּמ֥וּג אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Nations were in tumult, kingdoms were moved; He uttered His voice, the earth melted.

jps.text: Nations were in tumult, kingdoms were moved; He uttered His voice, the earth melted.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה צְבָאֹ֣ות עִמָּ֑נוּ מִשְׂגָּֽב־לָ֝נוּ אֱלֹהֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our high tower. Selah

jps.text: The LORD of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our high tower. Selah

verses.hebrewText: לְֽכוּ־חֲ֭זוּ מִפְעֲלֹ֣ות יְהוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֖ם שַׁמֹּ֣ות בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Come, behold the works of the LORD, who hath made desolations in the earth.

jps.text: Come, behold the works of the LORD, who hath made desolations in the earth.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׁבִּ֥ית מִלְחָמֹות֮ עַד־קְצֵ֪ה הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ קֶ֣שֶׁת יְ֭שַׁבֵּר וְקִצֵּ֣ץ חֲנִ֑ית עֲ֝גָלֹ֗ות יִשְׂרֹ֥ף בָּאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: He maketh wars to cease unto the end of the earth; He breaketh the bow, and cutteth the spear in sunder; He burneth the chariots in the fire.

jps.text: He maketh wars to cease unto the end of the earth; He breaketh the bow, and cutteth the spear in sunder; He burneth the chariots in the fire.

verses.hebrewText: הַרְפּ֣וּ וּ֭דְעוּ כִּי־אָנֹכִ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים אָר֥וּם בַּ֝גֹּויִ֗ם אָר֥וּם בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: 'Let be, and know that I am God; I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.'

jps.text: 'Let be, and know that I am God; I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.'

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה צְבָאֹ֣ות עִמָּ֑נוּ מִשְׂגָּֽב־לָ֝נוּ אֱלֹהֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our high tower. Selah

jps.text: The LORD of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our high tower. Selah

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ ׀ לִבְנֵי־קֹ֬רַח מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; a Psalm for the sons of Korah.

jps.text: For the Leader; a Psalm for the sons of Korah.

verses.hebrewText: כָּֽל־הָ֭עַמִּים תִּקְעוּ־כָ֑ף הָרִ֥יעוּ לֵ֝אלֹהִ֗ים בְּקֹ֣ול רִנָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: O clap your hands, all ye peoples; shout unto God with the voice of triumph.

jps.text: O clap your hands, all ye peoples; shout unto God with the voice of triumph.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יְהוָ֣ה עֶלְיֹ֣ון נֹורָ֑א מֶ֥לֶךְ גָּ֝דֹול עַל־כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD is most high, awful; a great King over all the earth.

jps.text: For the LORD is most high, awful; a great King over all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: יַדְבֵּ֣ר עַמִּ֣ים תַּחְתֵּ֑ינוּ וּ֝לְאֻמִּ֗ים תַּ֣חַת רַגְלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: He subdueth peoples under us, and nations under our feet.

jps.text: He subdueth peoples under us, and nations under our feet.

verses.hebrewText: יִבְחַר־לָ֥נוּ אֶת־נַחֲלָתֵ֑נוּ אֶ֥ת גְּאֹ֨ון יַעֲקֹ֖ב אֲשֶׁר־אָהֵ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: He chooseth our inheritance for us, the pride of Jacob whom He loveth. Selah

jps.text: He chooseth our inheritance for us, the pride of Jacob whom He loveth. Selah

verses.hebrewText: עָלָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים בִּתְרוּעָ֑ה יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה בְּקֹ֣ול שֹׁופָֽר׃
verses.englishText: God is gone up amidst shouting, the LORD amidst the sound of the horn.

jps.text: God is gone up amidst shouting, the LORD amidst the sound of the horn.

verses.hebrewText: זַמְּר֣וּ אֱלֹהִ֣ים זַמֵּ֑רוּ זַמְּר֖וּ לְמַלְכֵּ֣נוּ זַמֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Sing praises to God, sing praises; sing praises unto our King, sing praises.

jps.text: Sing praises to God, sing praises; sing praises unto our King, sing praises.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מֶ֖לֶךְ כָּל־הָאָ֥רֶץ אֱלֹהִ֗ים זַמְּר֥וּ מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: For God is the King of all the earth; sing ye praises in a skilful song.

jps.text: For God is the King of all the earth; sing ye praises in a skilful song.

verses.hebrewText: מָלַ֣ךְ אֱ֭לֹהִים עַל־גֹּויִ֑ם אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים יָשַׁ֤ב ׀ עַל־כִּסֵּ֬א קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: God reigneth over the nations; God sitteth upon His holy throne.

jps.text: God reigneth over the nations; God sitteth upon His holy throne.

verses.hebrewText: נְדִ֘יבֵ֤י עַמִּ֨ים ׀ נֶאֱסָ֗פוּ עַם֮ אֱלֹהֵ֪י אַבְרָ֫הָ֥ם כִּ֣י לֵֽ֭אלֹהִים מָֽגִנֵּי־אֶ֗רֶץ מְאֹ֣ד נַעֲלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The princes of the peoples are gathered together, the people of the God of Abraham; for unto God belong the shields of the earth; He is greatly exalted.

jps.text: The princes of the peoples are gathered together, the people of the God of Abraham; for unto God belong the shields of the earth; He is greatly exalted.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר מִ֝זְמֹור לִבְנֵי־קֹֽרַח׃
verses.englishText: A Song; a Psalm of the sons of Korah.

jps.text: A Song; a Psalm of the sons of Korah.

verses.hebrewText: גָּ֘דֹ֤ול יְהוָ֣ה וּמְהֻלָּ֣ל מְאֹ֑ד בְּעִ֥יר אֱ֝לֹהֵ֗ינוּ הַר־קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised, in the city of our God, His holy mountain,

jps.text: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised, in the city of our God, His holy mountain,

verses.hebrewText: יְפֵ֥ה נֹוף֮ מְשֹׂ֪ושׂ כָּל־הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ הַר־צִ֭יֹּון יַרְכְּתֵ֣י צָפֹ֑ון קִ֝רְיַ֗ת מֶ֣לֶךְ רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Fair in situation, the joy of the whole earth; even mount Zion, the uttermost parts of the north, the city of the great King.

jps.text: Fair in situation, the joy of the whole earth; even mount Zion, the uttermost parts of the north, the city of the great King.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֥ים בְּאַרְמְנֹותֶ֗יהָ נֹודַ֥ע לְמִשְׂגָּֽב׃
verses.englishText: God in her palaces hath made Himself known for a stronghold.

jps.text: God in her palaces hath made Himself known for a stronghold.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֣ה הַ֭מְּלָכִים נֹֽועֲד֑וּ עָבְר֥וּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.englishText: For, lo, the kings assembled themselves, they came onward together.

jps.text: For, lo, the kings assembled themselves, they came onward together.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣מָּה רָ֭אוּ כֵּ֣ן תָּמָ֑הוּ נִבְהֲל֥וּ נֶחְפָּֽזוּ׃
verses.englishText: They saw, straightway they were amazed; they were affrighted, they hasted away.

jps.text: They saw, straightway they were amazed; they were affrighted, they hasted away.

verses.hebrewText: רְ֭עָדָה אֲחָזָ֣תַם שָׁ֑ם חִ֝֗יל כַּיֹּולֵֽדָה׃
verses.englishText: Trembling took hold of them there, pangs, as of a woman in travail.

jps.text: Trembling took hold of them there, pangs, as of a woman in travail.

verses.hebrewText: בְּר֥וּחַ קָדִ֑ים תְּ֝שַׁבֵּ֗ר אֳנִיֹּ֥ות תַּרְשִֽׁישׁ׃
verses.englishText: With the east wind Thou breakest the ships of Tarshish.

jps.text: With the east wind Thou breakest the ships of Tarshish.

verses.hebrewText: כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר שָׁמַ֨עְנוּ ׀ כֵּ֤ן רָאִ֗ינוּ בְּעִיר־יְהוָ֣ה צְ֭בָאֹות בְּעִ֣יר אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ אֱלֹ֘הִ֤ים יְכֹונְנֶ֖הָ עַד־עֹולָ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: As we have heard, so have we seen in the city of the LORD of hosts, in the city of our God — God establish it for ever. Selah

jps.text: As we have heard, so have we seen in the city of the LORD of hosts, in the city of our God — God establish it for ever. Selah

verses.hebrewText: דִּמִּ֣ינוּ אֱלֹהִ֣ים חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ בְּ֝קֶ֗רֶב הֵיכָלֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: We have thought on Thy lovingkindness, O God, in the midst of Thy temple.

jps.text: We have thought on Thy lovingkindness, O God, in the midst of Thy temple.

verses.hebrewText: כְּשִׁמְךָ֤ אֱלֹהִ֗ים כֵּ֣ן תְּ֭הִלָּתְךָ עַל־קַצְוֵי־אֶ֑רֶץ צֶ֝֗דֶק מָלְאָ֥ה יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: As is Thy name, O God, so is Thy praise unto the ends of the earth; Thy right hand is full of righteousness.

jps.text: As is Thy name, O God, so is Thy praise unto the ends of the earth; Thy right hand is full of righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂמַ֤ח ׀ הַר־צִיֹּ֗ון תָּ֭גֵלְנָה בְּנֹ֣ות יְהוּדָ֑ה לְ֝מַ֗עַן מִשְׁפָּטֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let mount Zion be glad, let the daughters of Judah rejoice, because of Thy judgments.

jps.text: Let mount Zion be glad, let the daughters of Judah rejoice, because of Thy judgments.

verses.hebrewText: סֹ֣בּוּ צִ֭יֹּון וְהַקִּיפ֑וּהָ סִ֝פְר֗וּ מִגְדָּלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Walk about Zion, and go round about her; count the towers thereof.

jps.text: Walk about Zion, and go round about her; count the towers thereof.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֤יתוּ לִבְּכֶ֨ם ׀ לְֽחֵילָ֗ה פַּסְּג֥וּ אַרְמְנֹותֶ֑יהָ לְמַ֥עַן תְּ֝סַפְּר֗וּ לְדֹ֣ור אַחֲרֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Mark ye well her ramparts, traverse her palaces; that ye may tell it to the generation following.

jps.text: Mark ye well her ramparts, traverse her palaces; that ye may tell it to the generation following.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י זֶ֨ה ׀ אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֱ֭לֹהֵינוּ עֹולָ֣ם וָעֶ֑ד ה֖וּא יְנַהֲגֵ֣נוּ עַל־מֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: For such is God, our God, for ever and ever; He will guide us eternally.

jps.text: For such is God, our God, for ever and ever; He will guide us eternally.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ ׀ לִבְנֵי־קֹ֬רַח מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; a Psalm of the sons of Korah.

jps.text: For the Leader; a Psalm of the sons of Korah.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְעוּ־זֹ֭את כָּל־הָֽעַמִּ֑ים הַ֝אֲזִ֗ינוּ כָּל־יֹ֥שְׁבֵי חָֽלֶד׃
verses.englishText: Hear this, all ye peoples; give ear, all ye inhabitants of the world,

jps.text: Hear this, all ye peoples; give ear, all ye inhabitants of the world,

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־בְּנֵ֣י אָ֭דָם גַּם־בְּנֵי־אִ֑ישׁ יַ֝֗חַד עָשִׁ֥יר וְאֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Both low and high, rich and poor together.

jps.text: Both low and high, rich and poor together.

verses.hebrewText: פִּ֭י יְדַבֵּ֣ר חָכְמֹ֑ות וְהָג֖וּת לִבִּ֣י תְבוּנֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: My mouth shall speak wisdom, and the meditation of my heart shall be understanding.

jps.text: My mouth shall speak wisdom, and the meditation of my heart shall be understanding.

verses.hebrewText: אַטֶּ֣ה לְמָשָׁ֣ל אָזְנִ֑י אֶפְתַּ֥ח בְּ֝כִנֹּ֗ור חִידָתֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: I will incline mine ear to a parable; I will open my dark saying upon the harp.

jps.text: I will incline mine ear to a parable; I will open my dark saying upon the harp.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֣מָּה אִ֭ירָא בִּ֣ימֵי רָ֑ע עֲוֹ֖ן עֲקֵבַ֣י יְסוּבֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore should I fear in the days of evil, when the iniquity of my supplanters compasseth me about,

jps.text: Wherefore should I fear in the days of evil, when the iniquity of my supplanters compasseth me about,

verses.hebrewText: הַבֹּטְחִ֥ים עַל־חֵילָ֑ם וּבְרֹ֥ב עָ֝שְׁרָ֗ם יִתְהַלָּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: Of them that trust in their wealth, and boast themselves in the multitude of their riches?

jps.text: Of them that trust in their wealth, and boast themselves in the multitude of their riches?

verses.hebrewText: אָ֗ח לֹא־פָדֹ֣ה יִפְדֶּ֣ה אִ֑ישׁ לֹא־יִתֵּ֖ן לֵאלֹהִ֣ים כָּפְרֹֽו׃
