verses.englishText: No man can by any means redeem his brother, nor give to God a ransom for him —

jps.text: No man can by any means redeem his brother, nor give to God a ransom for him —

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭יֵקַר פִּדְיֹ֥ון נַפְשָׁ֗ם וְחָדַ֥ל לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For too costly is the redemption of their soul, and must be let alone for ever —

jps.text: For too costly is the redemption of their soul, and must be let alone for ever —

verses.hebrewText: וִֽיחִי־עֹ֥וד לָנֶ֑צַח לֹ֖א יִרְאֶ֣ה הַשָּֽׁחַת׃
verses.englishText: That he should still live alway, that he should not see the pit.

jps.text: That he should still live alway, that he should not see the pit.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יִרְאֶ֨ה ׀ חֲכָ֘מִ֤ים יָמ֗וּתוּ יַ֤חַד כְּסִ֣יל וָבַ֣עַר יֹאבֵ֑דוּ וְעָזְב֖וּ לַאֲחֵרִ֣ים חֵילָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For he seeth that wise men die, the fool and the brutish together perish, and leave their wealth to others.

jps.text: For he seeth that wise men die, the fool and the brutish together perish, and leave their wealth to others.

verses.hebrewText: קִרְבָּ֤ם בָּתֵּ֨ימֹו ׀ לְֽעֹולָ֗ם מִ֭שְׁכְּנֹתָם לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹ֑ר קָֽרְא֥וּ בִ֝שְׁמֹותָ֗ם עֲלֵ֣י אֲדָמֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Their inward thought is, that their houses shall continue for ever, and their dwelling-places to all generations; they call their lands after their own names.

jps.text: Their inward thought is, that their houses shall continue for ever, and their dwelling-places to all generations; they call their lands after their own names.

verses.hebrewText: וְאָדָ֣ם בִּ֭יקָר בַּל־יָלִ֑ין נִמְשַׁ֖ל כַּבְּהֵמֹ֣ות נִדְמֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: But man abideth not in honour; he is like the beasts that perish.

jps.text: But man abideth not in honour; he is like the beasts that perish.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֣ה דַ֭רְכָּם כֵּ֣סֶל לָ֑מֹו וְאַחֲרֵיהֶ֓ם ׀ בְּפִיהֶ֖ם יִרְצ֣וּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: This is the way of them that are foolish, and of those who after them approve their sayings. Selah

jps.text: This is the way of them that are foolish, and of those who after them approve their sayings. Selah

verses.hebrewText: כַּצֹּ֤אן ׀ לִֽשְׁאֹ֣ול שַׁתּוּ֮ מָ֤וֶת יִ֫רְעֵ֥ם וַיִּרְדּ֘וּ בָ֤ם יְשָׁרִ֨ים ׀ לַבֹּ֗קֶר *וְצִירָם (וְ֭צוּרָם) לְבַלֹּ֥ות שְׁאֹ֗ול מִזְּבֻ֥ל לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Like sheep they are appointed for the nether-world; death shall be their shepherd; and the upright shall have dominion over them in the morning; and their form shall be for the nether-world to wear away, that there be no habitation for it.

jps.text: Like sheep they are appointed for the nether-world; death shall be their shepherd; and the upright shall have dominion over them in the morning; and their form shall be for the nether-world to wear away, that there be no habitation for it.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִפְדֶּ֣ה נַ֭פְשִׁי מִֽיַּד־שְׁאֹ֑ול כִּ֖י יִקָּחֵ֣נִי סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: But God will redeem my soul from the power of the nether-world; for He shall receive me. Selah

jps.text: But God will redeem my soul from the power of the nether-world; for He shall receive me. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּ֭ירָא כִּֽי־יַעֲשִׁ֣ר אִ֑ישׁ כִּֽי־יִ֝רְבֶּה כְּבֹ֣וד בֵּיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Be not thou afraid when one waxeth rich, when the wealth of his house is increased;

jps.text: Be not thou afraid when one waxeth rich, when the wealth of his house is increased;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א בְ֭מֹותֹו יִקַּ֣ח הַכֹּ֑ל לֹא־יֵרֵ֖ד אַחֲרָ֣יו כְּבֹודֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For when he dieth he shall carry nothing away; his wealth shall not descend after him.

jps.text: For when he dieth he shall carry nothing away; his wealth shall not descend after him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־נַ֭פְשֹׁו בְּחַיָּ֣יו יְבָרֵ֑ךְ וְ֝יֹודֻ֗ךָ כִּי־תֵיטִ֥יב לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Though while he lived he blessed his soul: 'Men will praise thee, when thou shalt do well to thyself';

jps.text: Though while he lived he blessed his soul: 'Men will praise thee, when thou shalt do well to thyself';

verses.hebrewText: תָּ֭בֹוא עַד־דֹּ֣ור אֲבֹותָ֑יו עַד־נֵ֝֗צַח לֹ֣א יִרְאוּ־אֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: It shall go to the generation of his fathers; they shall never see the light.

jps.text: It shall go to the generation of his fathers; they shall never see the light.

verses.hebrewText: אָדָ֣ם בִּ֭יקָר וְלֹ֣א יָבִ֑ין נִמְשַׁ֖ל כַּבְּהֵמֹ֣ות נִדְמֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: Man that is in honour understandeth not; he is like the beasts that perish.

jps.text: Man that is in honour understandeth not; he is like the beasts that perish.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אֵ֤ל ׀ אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֡ים יְֽהוָ֗ה דִּבֶּ֥ר וַיִּקְרָא־אָ֑רֶץ מִמִּזְרַח־שֶׁ֝֗מֶשׁ עַד־מְבֹאֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. God, God, the LORD, hath spoken, and called the earth from the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof.

jps.text: A Psalm of Asaph. God, God, the LORD, hath spoken, and called the earth from the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof.

verses.hebrewText: מִצִּיֹּ֥ון מִכְלַל־יֹ֗פִי אֱלֹהִ֥ים הֹופִֽיעַ׃
verses.englishText: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God hath shined forth.

jps.text: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God hath shined forth.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֤בֹ֥א אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְֽאַל־יֶ֫חֱרַ֥שׁ אֵשׁ־לְפָנָ֥יו תֹּאכֵ֑ל וּ֝סְבִיבָ֗יו נִשְׂעֲרָ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Our God cometh, and doth not keep silence; a fire devoureth before Him, and round about Him it stormeth mightily.

jps.text: Our God cometh, and doth not keep silence; a fire devoureth before Him, and round about Him it stormeth mightily.

verses.hebrewText: יִקְרָ֣א אֶל־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם מֵעָ֑ל וְאֶל־הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ לָדִ֥ין עַמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He calleth to the heavens above, and to the earth, that He may judge His people:

jps.text: He calleth to the heavens above, and to the earth, that He may judge His people:

verses.hebrewText: אִסְפוּ־לִ֥י חֲסִידָ֑י כֹּרְתֵ֖י בְרִיתִ֣י עֲלֵי־זָֽבַח׃
verses.englishText: 'Gather My saints together unto Me; those that have made a covenant with Me by sacrifice.'

jps.text: 'Gather My saints together unto Me; those that have made a covenant with Me by sacrifice.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּגִּ֣ידוּ שָׁמַ֣יִם צִדְקֹ֑ו כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֓ים ׀ שֹׁפֵ֖ט ה֣וּא סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: And the heavens declare His righteousness; for God, He is judge. Selah

jps.text: And the heavens declare His righteousness; for God, He is judge. Selah

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְעָ֤ה עַמִּ֨י ׀ וַאֲדַבֵּ֗רָה יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל וְאָעִ֣ידָה בָּ֑ךְ אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֱלֹהֶ֣יךָ אָנֹֽכִי׃
verses.englishText: 'Hear, O My people, and I will speak; O Israel, and I will testify against thee: God, thy God, am I.

jps.text: 'Hear, O My people, and I will speak; O Israel, and I will testify against thee: God, thy God, am I.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֣א עַל־זְ֭בָחֶיךָ אֹוכִיחֶ֑ךָ וְעֹולֹתֶ֖יךָ לְנֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: I will not reprove thee for thy sacrifices; and thy burnt-offerings are continually before Me.

jps.text: I will not reprove thee for thy sacrifices; and thy burnt-offerings are continually before Me.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־אֶקַּ֣ח מִבֵּיתְךָ֣ פָ֑ר מִ֝מִּכְלְאֹתֶ֗יךָ עַתּוּדִֽים׃
verses.englishText: I will take no bullock out of thy house, nor he-goats out of thy folds.

jps.text: I will take no bullock out of thy house, nor he-goats out of thy folds.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־לִ֥י כָל־חַיְתֹו־יָ֑עַר בְּ֝הֵמֹ֗ות בְּהַרְרֵי־אָֽלֶף׃
verses.englishText: For every beast of the forest is Mine, and the cattle upon a thousand hills.

jps.text: For every beast of the forest is Mine, and the cattle upon a thousand hills.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭דַעְתִּי כָּל־עֹ֣וף הָרִ֑ים וְזִ֥יז שָׂ֝דַ֗י עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I know all the fowls of the mountains; and the wild beasts of the field are Mine.

jps.text: I know all the fowls of the mountains; and the wild beasts of the field are Mine.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶ֭רְעַב לֹא־אֹ֣מַר לָ֑ךְ כִּי־לִ֥י תֵ֝בֵ֗ל וּמְלֹאָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: If I were hungry, I would not tell thee; for the world is Mine, and the fulness thereof.

jps.text: If I were hungry, I would not tell thee; for the world is Mine, and the fulness thereof.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭אֹוכַל בְּשַׂ֣ר אַבִּירִ֑ים וְדַ֖ם עַתּוּדִ֣ים אֶשְׁתֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Do I eat the flesh of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?

jps.text: Do I eat the flesh of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?

verses.hebrewText: זְבַ֣ח לֵאלֹהִ֣ים תֹּודָ֑ה וְשַׁלֵּ֖ם לְעֶלְיֹ֣ון נְדָרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Offer unto God the sacrifice of thanksgiving; and pay thy vows unto the Most High;

jps.text: Offer unto God the sacrifice of thanksgiving; and pay thy vows unto the Most High;

verses.hebrewText: וּ֭קְרָאֵנִי בְּיֹ֣ום צָרָ֑ה אֲ֝חַלֶּצְךָ֗ וּֽתְכַבְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: And call upon Me in the day of trouble; I will deliver thee, and thou shalt honour Me.'

jps.text: And call upon Me in the day of trouble; I will deliver thee, and thou shalt honour Me.'

verses.hebrewText: וְלָ֤רָשָׁ֨ע ׀ אָ֘מַ֤ר אֱלֹהִ֗ים מַה־לְּ֭ךָ לְסַפֵּ֣ר חֻקָּ֑י וַתִּשָּׂ֖א בְרִיתִ֣י עֲלֵי־פִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: But unto the wicked God saith: 'What hast thou to do to declare My statutes, and that thou hast taken My covenant in thy mouth?

jps.text: But unto the wicked God saith: 'What hast thou to do to declare My statutes, and that thou hast taken My covenant in thy mouth?

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭אַתָּה שָׂנֵ֣אתָ מוּסָ֑ר וַתַּשְׁלֵ֖ךְ דְּבָרַ֣י אַחֲרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Seeing thou hatest instruction, and castest My words behind thee.

jps.text: Seeing thou hatest instruction, and castest My words behind thee.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־רָאִ֣יתָ גַ֭נָּב וַתִּ֣רֶץ עִמֹּ֑ו וְעִ֖ם מְנָאֲפִ֣ים חֶלְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: When thou sawest a thief, thou hadst company with him, and with adulterers was thy portion.

jps.text: When thou sawest a thief, thou hadst company with him, and with adulterers was thy portion.

verses.hebrewText: פִּ֭יךָ שָׁלַ֣חְתָּ בְרָעָ֑ה וּ֝לְשֹׁונְךָ֗ תַּצְמִ֥יד מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast let loose thy mouth for evil, and thy tongue frameth deceit.

jps.text: Thou hast let loose thy mouth for evil, and thy tongue frameth deceit.

verses.englishText: Thou sittest and speakest against thy brother; thou slanderest thine own mother's son.

jps.text: Thou sittest and speakest against thy brother; thou slanderest thine own mother's son.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֤לֶּה עָשִׂ֨יתָ ׀ וְֽהֶחֱרַ֗שְׁתִּי דִּמִּ֗יתָ הֱ‌ֽיֹות־אֶֽהְיֶ֥ה כָמֹ֑וךָ אֹוכִיחֲךָ֖ וְאֶֽעֶרְכָ֣ה לְעֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: These things hast thou done, and should I have kept silence? Thou hadst thought that I was altogether such a one as thyself; but I will reprove thee, and set the cause before thine eyes.

jps.text: These things hast thou done, and should I have kept silence? Thou hadst thought that I was altogether such a one as thyself; but I will reprove thee, and set the cause before thine eyes.

verses.hebrewText: בִּֽינוּ־נָ֣א זֹ֭את שֹׁכְחֵ֣י אֱלֹ֑והַּ פֶּן־אֶ֝טְרֹ֗ף וְאֵ֣ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Now consider this, ye that forget God, lest I tear in pieces, and there be none to deliver.

jps.text: Now consider this, ye that forget God, lest I tear in pieces, and there be none to deliver.

verses.hebrewText: זֹבֵ֥חַ תֹּודָ֗ה יְֽכַ֫בְּדָ֥נְנִי וְשָׂ֥ם דֶּ֑רֶךְ אַ֝רְאֶ֗נּוּ בְּיֵ֣שַׁע אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Whoso offereth the sacrifice of thanksgiving honoureth Me; and to him that ordereth his way aright will I show the salvation of God.'

jps.text: Whoso offereth the sacrifice of thanksgiving honoureth Me; and to him that ordereth his way aright will I show the salvation of God.'

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David;

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David;

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽבֹוא־אֵ֭לָיו נָתָ֣ן הַנָּבִ֑יא כַּֽאֲשֶׁר־בָּ֝֗א אֶל־בַּת־שָֽׁבַע׃
verses.englishText: When Nathan the prophet came unto him, after he had gone in to Bath-sheba.

jps.text: When Nathan the prophet came unto him, after he had gone in to Bath-sheba.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֣נִי אֱלֹהִ֣ים כְּחַסְדֶּ֑ךָ כְּרֹ֥ב רַ֝חֲמֶ֗יךָ מְחֵ֣ה פְשָׁעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O God, according to Thy mercy; according to the multitude of Thy compassions blot out my transgressions.

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O God, according to Thy mercy; according to the multitude of Thy compassions blot out my transgressions.

verses.hebrewText: *הַרְבֵּה (הֶ֭רֶב) כַּבְּסֵ֣נִי מֵעֲוֹנִ֑י וּֽמֵחַטָּאתִ֥י טַהֲרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Wash me thoroughly from mine iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin.

jps.text: Wash me thoroughly from mine iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־פְ֭שָׁעַי אֲנִ֣י אֵדָ֑ע וְחַטָּאתִ֖י נֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: For I know my transgressions; and my sin is ever before me.

jps.text: For I know my transgressions; and my sin is ever before me.

verses.hebrewText: לְךָ֤ לְבַדְּךָ֨ ׀ חָטָאתִי֮ וְהָרַ֥ע בְּעֵינֶ֗יךָ עָ֫שִׂ֥יתִי לְ֭מַעַן תִּצְדַּ֥ק בְּדָבְרֶ֗ךָ תִּזְכֶּ֥ה בְשָׁפְטֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Against Thee, Thee only, have I sinned, and done that which is evil in Thy sight; that Thou mayest be justified when Thou speakest, and be in the right when Thou judgest.

jps.text: Against Thee, Thee only, have I sinned, and done that which is evil in Thy sight; that Thou mayest be justified when Thou speakest, and be in the right when Thou judgest.

verses.hebrewText: הֵן־בְּעָוֹ֥ון חֹולָ֑לְתִּי וּ֝בְחֵ֗טְא יֶֽחֱמַ֥תְנִי אִמִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I was brought forth in iniquity, and in sin did my mother conceive me.

jps.text: Behold, I was brought forth in iniquity, and in sin did my mother conceive me.

verses.hebrewText: הֵן־אֱ֭מֶת חָפַ֣צְתָּ בַטֻּחֹ֑ות וּ֝בְסָתֻ֗ם חָכְמָ֥ה תֹודִיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Behold, Thou desirest truth in the inward parts; make me, therefore, to know wisdom in mine inmost heart.

jps.text: Behold, Thou desirest truth in the inward parts; make me, therefore, to know wisdom in mine inmost heart.

verses.hebrewText: תְּחַטְּאֵ֣נִי בְאֵזֹ֣וב וְאֶטְהָ֑ר תְּ֝כַבְּסֵ֗נִי וּמִשֶּׁ֥לֶג אַלְבִּֽין׃
verses.englishText: Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean; wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.

jps.text: Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean; wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֭שְׁמִיעֵנִי שָׂשֹׂ֣ון וְשִׂמְחָ֑ה תָּ֝גֵ֗לְנָה עֲצָמֹ֥ות דִּכִּֽיתָ׃
verses.englishText: Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which Thou hast crushed may rejoice.

jps.text: Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which Thou hast crushed may rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: הַסְתֵּ֣ר פָּ֭נֶיךָ מֵחֲטָאָ֑י וְֽכָל־עֲוֹ֖נֹתַ֣י מְחֵֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hide Thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities.

jps.text: Hide Thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities.

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֣ב טָ֭הֹור בְּרָא־לִ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְר֥וּחַ נָ֝כֹ֗ון חַדֵּ֥שׁ בְּקִרְבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Create me a clean heart, O God; and renew a stedfast spirit within me.

jps.text: Create me a clean heart, O God; and renew a stedfast spirit within me.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּשְׁלִיכֵ֥נִי מִלְּפָנֶ֑יךָ וְר֥וּחַ קָ֝דְשְׁךָ֗ אַל־תִּקַּ֥ח מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Cast me not away from Thy presence; and take not Thy holy spirit from me.

jps.text: Cast me not away from Thy presence; and take not Thy holy spirit from me.

verses.hebrewText: הָשִׁ֣יבָה לִּ֭י שְׂשֹׂ֣ון יִשְׁעֶ֑ךָ וְר֖וּחַ נְדִיבָ֣ה תִסְמְכֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Restore unto me the joy of Thy salvation; and let a willing spirit uphold me.

jps.text: Restore unto me the joy of Thy salvation; and let a willing spirit uphold me.

verses.hebrewText: אֲלַמְּדָ֣ה פֹשְׁעִ֣ים דְּרָכֶ֑יךָ וְ֝חַטָּאִ֗ים אֵלֶ֥יךָ יָשֽׁוּבוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then will I teach transgressors Thy ways; and sinners shall return unto Thee.

jps.text: Then will I teach transgressors Thy ways; and sinners shall return unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: הַצִּ֘ילֵ֤נִי מִדָּמִ֨ים ׀ אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים אֱלֹהֵ֥י תְּשׁוּעָתִ֑י תְּרַנֵּ֥ן לְשֹׁונִ֗י צִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O God, Thou God of my salvation; so shall my tongue sing aloud of Thy righteousness.

jps.text: Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O God, Thou God of my salvation; so shall my tongue sing aloud of Thy righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭דֹנָי שְׂפָתַ֣י תִּפְתָּ֑ח וּ֝פִ֗י יַגִּ֥יד תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: O Lord, open Thou my lips; and my mouth shall declare Thy praise.

jps.text: O Lord, open Thou my lips; and my mouth shall declare Thy praise.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־תַחְפֹּ֣ץ זֶ֣בַח וְאֶתֵּ֑נָה עֹ֝ולָ֗ה לֹ֣א תִרְצֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: For Thou delightest not in sacrifice, else would I give it; Thou hast no pleasure in burnt-offering.

jps.text: For Thou delightest not in sacrifice, else would I give it; Thou hast no pleasure in burnt-offering.

verses.hebrewText: זִֽבְחֵ֣י אֱלֹהִים֮ ר֪וּחַ נִשְׁבָּ֫רָ֥ה לֵב־נִשְׁבָּ֥ר וְנִדְכֶּ֑ה אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לֹ֣א תִבְזֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit; a broken and a contrite heart, O God, Thou wilt not despise.

jps.text: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit; a broken and a contrite heart, O God, Thou wilt not despise.

verses.hebrewText: הֵיטִ֣יבָה בִ֭רְצֹונְךָ אֶת־צִיֹּ֑ון תִּ֝בְנֶ֗ה חֹומֹ֥ות יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.englishText: Do good in Thy favour unto Zion; build Thou the walls of Jerusalem.

jps.text: Do good in Thy favour unto Zion; build Thou the walls of Jerusalem.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֤ז תַּחְפֹּ֣ץ זִבְחֵי־צֶ֭דֶק עֹולָ֣ה וְכָלִ֑יל אָ֤ז יַעֲל֖וּ עַל־מִזְבַּחֲךָ֣ פָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Then wilt Thou delight in the sacrifices of righteousness, in burnt-offering and whole offering; then will they offer bullocks upon Thine altar.

jps.text: Then wilt Thou delight in the sacrifices of righteousness, in burnt-offering and whole offering; then will they offer bullocks upon Thine altar.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מַשְׂכִּ֥יל לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. Maschil of David;

jps.text: For the Leader. Maschil of David;

verses.hebrewText: בְּבֹ֤וא ׀ דֹּואֵ֣ג הָאֲדֹמִי֮ וַיַּגֵּ֪ד לְשָׁ֫א֥וּל וַיֹּ֥אמֶר לֹ֑ו בָּ֥א דָ֝וִ֗ד אֶל־בֵּ֥ית אֲחִימֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: when Doeg the Edomite came and told Saul, and said unto him: 'David is come to the house of Ahimelech.'

jps.text: when Doeg the Edomite came and told Saul, and said unto him: 'David is come to the house of Ahimelech.'

verses.hebrewText: מַה־תִּתְהַלֵּ֣ל בְּ֭רָעָה הַגִּבֹּ֑ור חֶ֥סֶד אֵ֝֗ל כָּל־הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: Why boastest thou thyself of evil, O mighty man? The mercy of God endureth continually.

jps.text: Why boastest thou thyself of evil, O mighty man? The mercy of God endureth continually.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭וֹּות תַּחְשֹׁ֣ב לְשֹׁונֶ֑ךָ כְּתַ֥עַר מְ֝לֻטָּ֗שׁ עֹשֵׂ֥ה רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thy tongue deviseth destruction; like a sharp razor, working deceitfully.

jps.text: Thy tongue deviseth destruction; like a sharp razor, working deceitfully.

verses.hebrewText: אָהַ֣בְתָּ רָּ֣ע מִטֹּ֑וב שֶׁ֓קֶר ׀ מִדַּבֵּ֖ר צֶ֣דֶק סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou lovest evil more than good; falsehood rather than speaking righteousness. Selah

jps.text: Thou lovest evil more than good; falsehood rather than speaking righteousness. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אָהַ֥בְתָּ כָֽל־דִּבְרֵי־בָ֗לַע לְשֹׁ֣ון מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou lovest all devouring words, the deceitful tongue.

jps.text: Thou lovest all devouring words, the deceitful tongue.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אֵל֮ יִתָּצְךָ֪ לָ֫נֶ֥צַח יַחְתְּךָ֣ וְיִסָּחֲךָ֣ מֵאֹ֑הֶל וְשֵֽׁרֶשְׁךָ֙ מֵאֶ֖רֶץ חַיִּ֣ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: God will likewise break thee for ever, He will take thee up, and pluck thee out of thy tent, and root thee out of the land of the living. Selah

jps.text: God will likewise break thee for ever, He will take thee up, and pluck thee out of thy tent, and root thee out of the land of the living. Selah

verses.hebrewText: וְיִרְא֖וּ צַדִּיקִ֥ים וְיִירָ֗אוּ וְעָלָ֥יו יִשְׂחָֽקוּ׃
verses.englishText: The righteous also shall see, and fear, and shall laugh at him:

jps.text: The righteous also shall see, and fear, and shall laugh at him:

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה הַגֶּ֗בֶר לֹ֤א יָשִׂ֥ים אֱלֹהִ֗ים מָֽע֫וּזֹּ֥ו וַ֭יִּבְטַח בְּרֹ֣ב עָשְׁרֹ֑ו יָ֝עֹ֗ז בְּהַוָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'Lo, this is the man that made not God his stronghold; but trusted in the abundance of his riches, and strengthened himself in his wickedness.'

jps.text: 'Lo, this is the man that made not God his stronghold; but trusted in the abundance of his riches, and strengthened himself in his wickedness.'

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ כְּזַ֣יִת רַ֭עֲנָן בְּבֵ֣ית אֱלֹהִ֑ים בָּטַ֥חְתִּי בְחֶֽסֶד־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים עֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I am like a leafy olive-tree in the house of God; I trust in the mercy of God for ever and ever.

jps.text: But as for me, I am like a leafy olive-tree in the house of God; I trust in the mercy of God for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: אֹודְךָ֣ לְ֭עֹולָם כִּ֣י עָשִׂ֑יתָ וַאֲקַוֶּ֖ה שִׁמְךָ֥ כִֽי־טֹ֝֗וב נֶ֣גֶד חֲסִידֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will give Thee thanks for ever, because Thou hast done it; and I will wait for Thy name, for it is good, in the presence of Thy saints.

jps.text: I will give Thee thanks for ever, because Thou hast done it; and I will wait for Thy name, for it is good, in the presence of Thy saints.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ עַֽל־מָחֲלַ֗ת מַשְׂכִּ֥יל לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Mahalath. Maschil of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Mahalath. Maschil of David.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֘מַ֤ר נָבָ֣ל בְּ֭לִבֹּו אֵ֣ין אֱלֹהִ֑ים הִֽ֝שְׁחִ֗יתוּ וְהִֽתְעִ֥יבוּ עָ֝֗וֶל אֵ֣ין עֹֽשֵׂה־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: The fool hath said in his heart: 'There is no God'; they have dealt corruptly, and have done abominable iniquity; there is none that doeth good.

jps.text: The fool hath said in his heart: 'There is no God'; they have dealt corruptly, and have done abominable iniquity; there is none that doeth good.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים מִשָּׁמַיִם֮ הִשְׁקִ֪יף עַֽל־בְּנֵ֫י אָדָ֥ם לִ֭רְאֹות הֲיֵ֣שׁ מַשְׂכִּ֑יל דֹּ֝רֵ֗שׁ אֶת־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: God looked forth from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any man of understanding, that did seek after God.

jps.text: God looked forth from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any man of understanding, that did seek after God.

verses.hebrewText: כֻּלֹּ֥ו סָג֮ יַחְדָּ֪ו נֶ֫אֱלָ֥חוּ אֵ֤ין עֹֽשֵׂה־טֹ֑וב אֵ֝֗ין גַּם־אֶחָֽד׃
verses.englishText: Every one of them is unclean, they are together become impure; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.

jps.text: Every one of them is unclean, they are together become impure; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹ֥א יָדְעוּ֮ פֹּ֤עֲלֵ֫י אָ֥וֶן אֹכְלֵ֣י עַ֭מִּי אָ֣כְלוּ לֶ֑חֶם אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: 'Shall not the workers of iniquity know it, who eat up My people as they eat bread, and call not upon God?'

jps.text: 'Shall not the workers of iniquity know it, who eat up My people as they eat bread, and call not upon God?'

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤ם ׀ פָּֽחֲדוּ־פַחַד֮ לֹא־הָ֪יָה֫ פָ֥חַד כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֗ים פִּ֭זַּר עַצְמֹ֣ות חֹנָ֑ךְ הֱ֝בִשֹׁ֗תָה כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֥ים מְאָסָֽם׃
verses.englishText: There are they in great fear, where no fear was; for God hath scattered the bones of him that encampeth against thee; Thou hast put them to shame, because God hath rejected them.

jps.text: There are they in great fear, where no fear was; for God hath scattered the bones of him that encampeth against thee; Thou hast put them to shame, because God hath rejected them.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֥י יִתֵּ֣ן מִצִּיֹּון֮ יְשֻׁעֹ֪ות יִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל בְּשׁ֣וּב אֱ֭לֹהִים שְׁב֣וּת עַמֹּ֑ו יָגֵ֥ל יַ֝עֲקֹ֗ב יִשְׂמַ֥ח יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When God turneth the captivity of His people, let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.

jps.text: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When God turneth the captivity of His people, let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ בִּנְגִינֹ֗ת מַשְׂכִּ֥יל לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. Maschil of David:

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music. Maschil of David:

verses.hebrewText: בְּבֹ֣וא הַ֭זִּיפִים וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ לְשָׁא֑וּל הֲלֹ֥א דָ֝וִ֗ד מִסְתַּתֵּ֥ר עִמָּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: when the Ziphites came and said to Saul: 'Doth not David hide himself with us?'

jps.text: when the Ziphites came and said to Saul: 'Doth not David hide himself with us?'

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים בְּשִׁמְךָ֣ הֹושִׁיעֵ֑נִי וּבִגְבוּרָתְךָ֥ תְדִינֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: O God, save me by Thy name, and right me by Thy might.

jps.text: O God, save me by Thy name, and right me by Thy might.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים שְׁמַ֣ע תְּפִלָּתִ֑י הַ֝אֲזִ֗ינָה לְאִמְרֵי־פִֽי׃
verses.englishText: O God, hear my prayer; give ear to the words of my mouth.

jps.text: O God, hear my prayer; give ear to the words of my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י זָרִ֨ים ׀ קָ֤מוּ עָלַ֗י וְֽ֭עָרִיצִים בִּקְשׁ֣וּ נַפְשִׁ֑י לֹ֤א שָׂ֨מוּ אֱלֹהִ֖ים לְנֶגְדָּ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: For strangers are risen up against me, and violent men have sought after my soul; they have not set God before them. Selah

jps.text: For strangers are risen up against me, and violent men have sought after my soul; they have not set God before them. Selah

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים עֹזֵ֣ר לִ֑י אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י בְּֽסֹמְכֵ֥י נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Behold, God is my helper; the Lord is for me as the upholder of my soul.

jps.text: Behold, God is my helper; the Lord is for me as the upholder of my soul.

verses.hebrewText: *יָשֹׁוב (יָשִׁ֣יב) הָ֭רַע לְשֹׁרְרָ֑י בַּ֝אֲמִתְּךָ֗ הַצְמִיתֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: He will requite the evil unto them that lie in wait for me; destroy Thou them in Thy truth.

jps.text: He will requite the evil unto them that lie in wait for me; destroy Thou them in Thy truth.

verses.hebrewText: בִּנְדָבָ֥ה אֶזְבְּחָה־לָּ֑ךְ אֹ֤ודֶה שִּׁמְךָ֖ יְהוָ֣ה כִּי־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: With a freewill-offering will I sacrifice unto Thee; I will give thanks unto Thy name, O LORD, for it is good.

jps.text: With a freewill-offering will I sacrifice unto Thee; I will give thanks unto Thy name, O LORD, for it is good.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י מִכָּל־צָ֭רָה הִצִּילָ֑נִי וּ֝בְאֹיְבַ֗י רָאֲתָ֥ה עֵינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: For He hath delivered me out of all trouble; and mine eye hath gazed upon mine enemies.

jps.text: For He hath delivered me out of all trouble; and mine eye hath gazed upon mine enemies.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ בִּנְגִינֹ֗ת מַשְׂכִּ֥יל לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. Maschil of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music. Maschil of David.

verses.hebrewText: הַאֲזִ֣ינָה אֱ֭לֹהִים תְּפִלָּתִ֑י וְאַל־תִּ֝תְעַלַּ֗ם מִתְּחִנָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Give ear, O God, to my prayer; and hide not Thyself from my supplication.

jps.text: Give ear, O God, to my prayer; and hide not Thyself from my supplication.

verses.hebrewText: הַקְשִׁ֣יבָה לִּ֣י וַעֲנֵ֑נִי אָרִ֖יד בְּשִׂיחִ֣י וְאָהִֽימָה׃
verses.englishText: Attend unto me, and hear me; I am distraught in my complaint, and will moan;

jps.text: Attend unto me, and hear me; I am distraught in my complaint, and will moan;

verses.hebrewText: מִקֹּ֤ול אֹויֵ֗ב מִפְּנֵ֣י עָקַ֣ת רָשָׁ֑ע כִּי־יָמִ֥יטוּ עָלַ֥י אָ֝֗וֶן וּבְאַ֥ף יִשְׂטְמֽוּנִי׃
verses.englishText: Because of the voice of the enemy, because of the oppression of the wicked; for they cast mischief upon me, and in anger they persecute me.

jps.text: Because of the voice of the enemy, because of the oppression of the wicked; for they cast mischief upon me, and in anger they persecute me.

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭בִּי יָחִ֣יל בְּקִרְבִּ֑י וְאֵימֹ֥ות מָ֝֗וֶת נָפְל֥וּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My heart doth writhe within me; and the terrors of death are fallen upon me.

jps.text: My heart doth writhe within me; and the terrors of death are fallen upon me.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאָ֣ה וָ֭רַעַד יָ֣בֹא בִ֑י וַ֝תְּכַסֵּ֗נִי פַּלָּצֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: Fear and trembling come upon me, and horror hath overwhelmed me.

jps.text: Fear and trembling come upon me, and horror hath overwhelmed me.

verses.hebrewText: וָאֹמַ֗ר מִֽי־יִתֶּן־לִּ֣י אֵ֭בֶר כַּיֹּונָ֗ה אָע֥וּפָה וְאֶשְׁכֹּֽנָה׃
verses.englishText: And I said: 'Oh that I had wings like a dove! then would I fly away, and be at rest.

jps.text: And I said: 'Oh that I had wings like a dove! then would I fly away, and be at rest.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭נֵּה אַרְחִ֣יק נְדֹ֑ד אָלִ֖ין בַּמִּדְבָּ֣ר סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Lo, then would I wander far off, I would lodge in the wilderness. Selah

jps.text: Lo, then would I wander far off, I would lodge in the wilderness. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אָחִ֣ישָׁה מִפְלָ֣ט לִ֑י מֵר֖וּחַ סֹעָ֣ה מִסָּֽעַר׃
verses.englishText: I would haste me to a shelter from the stormy wind and tempest.'

jps.text: I would haste me to a shelter from the stormy wind and tempest.'

verses.hebrewText: בַּלַּ֣ע אֲ֭דֹנָי פַּלַּ֣ג לְשֹׁונָ֑ם כִּֽי־רָאִ֨יתִי חָמָ֖ס וְרִ֣יב בָּעִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: Destroy, O Lord, and divide their tongue; for I have seen violence and strife in the city.

jps.text: Destroy, O Lord, and divide their tongue; for I have seen violence and strife in the city.

verses.hebrewText: יֹומָ֤ם וָלַ֗יְלָה יְסֹובְבֻ֥הָ עַל־חֹומֹתֶ֑יהָ וְאָ֖וֶן וְעָמָ֣ל בְּקִרְבָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Day and night they go about it upon the walls thereof; iniquity also and mischief are in the midst of it.

jps.text: Day and night they go about it upon the walls thereof; iniquity also and mischief are in the midst of it.

verses.hebrewText: הַוֹּ֥ות בְּקִרְבָּ֑הּ וְֽלֹא־יָמִ֥ישׁ מֵ֝רְחֹבָ֗הּ תֹּ֣ךְ וּמִרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Wickedness is in the midst thereof; oppression and guile depart not from her broad place.

jps.text: Wickedness is in the midst thereof; oppression and guile depart not from her broad place.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹֽא־אֹויֵ֥ב יְחָֽרְפֵ֗נִי וְאֶ֫שָּׂ֥א לֹֽא־מְ֭שַׂנְאִי עָלַ֣י הִגְדִּ֑יל וְאֶסָּתֵ֥ר מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: For it was not an enemy that taunted me, then I could have borne it; neither was it mine adversary that did magnify himself against me, then I would have hid myself from him.

jps.text: For it was not an enemy that taunted me, then I could have borne it; neither was it mine adversary that did magnify himself against me, then I would have hid myself from him.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה אֱנֹ֣ושׁ כְּעֶרְכִּ֑י אַ֝לּוּפִ֗י וּמְיֻדָּֽעִי׃
verses.englishText: But it was thou, a man mine equal, my companion, and my familiar friend;

jps.text: But it was thou, a man mine equal, my companion, and my familiar friend;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר יַ֭חְדָּו נַמְתִּ֣יק סֹ֑וד בְּבֵ֥ית אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים נְהַלֵּ֥ךְ בְּרָֽגֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: We took sweet counsel together, in the house of God we walked with the throng.

jps.text: We took sweet counsel together, in the house of God we walked with the throng.

verses.hebrewText: *יַשִּׁימָוֶת (יַשִּׁ֤י מָ֨וֶת) ׀ עָלֵ֗ימֹו יֵרְד֣וּ שְׁאֹ֣ול חַיִּ֑ים כִּֽי־רָעֹ֖ות בִּמְגוּרָ֣ם בְּקִרְבָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: May He incite death against them, let them go down alive into the nether-world; for evil is in their dwelling, and within them.

jps.text: May He incite death against them, let them go down alive into the nether-world; for evil is in their dwelling, and within them.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭נִי אֶל־אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֶקְרָ֑א וַ֝יהוָ֗ה יֹושִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: As for me, I will call upon God; and the LORD shall save me.

jps.text: As for me, I will call upon God; and the LORD shall save me.

verses.hebrewText: עֶ֤רֶב וָבֹ֣קֶר וְ֭צָהֳרַיִם אָשִׂ֣יחָה וְאֶהֱמֶ֑ה וַיִּשְׁמַ֥ע קֹולִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Evening, and morning, and at noon, will I complain, and moan; and He hath heard my voice.

jps.text: Evening, and morning, and at noon, will I complain, and moan; and He hath heard my voice.

verses.hebrewText: פָּ֘דָ֤ה בְשָׁלֹ֣ום נַ֭פְשִׁי מִקֲּרָב־לִ֑י כִּֽי־בְ֝רַבִּ֗ים הָי֥וּ עִמָּדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: He hath redeemed my soul in peace so that none came nigh me; for they were many that strove with me.

jps.text: He hath redeemed my soul in peace so that none came nigh me; for they were many that strove with me.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁמַ֤ע ׀ אֵ֨ל ׀ וֽ͏ְיַעֲנֵם֮ וְיֹ֤שֵׁ֥ב קֶ֗דֶם סֶ֥לָה אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֵ֣ין חֲלִיפֹ֣ות לָ֑מֹו וְלֹ֖א יָרְא֣וּ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: God shall hear, and humble them, even He that is enthroned of old, Selah, such as have no changes, and fear not God.

jps.text: God shall hear, and humble them, even He that is enthroned of old, Selah, such as have no changes, and fear not God.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁלַ֣ח יָ֭דָיו בִּשְׁלֹמָ֗יו חִלֵּ֥ל בְּרִיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He hath put forth his hands against them that were at peace with him; he hath profaned his covenant.

jps.text: He hath put forth his hands against them that were at peace with him; he hath profaned his covenant.

verses.hebrewText: חָלְק֤וּ ׀ מַחְמָאֹ֣ת פִּיו֮ וּֽקֲרָב־לִ֫בֹּ֥ו רַכּ֖וּ דְבָרָ֥יו מִשֶּׁ֗מֶן וְהֵ֣מָּה פְתִחֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Smoother than cream were the speeches of his mouth, but his heart was war; his words were softer than oil, yet were they keen-edged swords.

jps.text: Smoother than cream were the speeches of his mouth, but his heart was war; his words were softer than oil, yet were they keen-edged swords.

verses.hebrewText: הַשְׁלֵ֤ךְ עַל־יְהוָ֨ה ׀ יְהָבְךָ֮ וְה֪וּא יְכַ֫לְכְּלֶ֥ךָ לֹא־יִתֵּ֖ן לְעֹולָ֥ם מֹ֗וט לַצַּדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: Cast thy burden upon the LORD, and He will sustain thee; He will never suffer the righteous to be moved.

jps.text: Cast thy burden upon the LORD, and He will sustain thee; He will never suffer the righteous to be moved.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֤ה אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ תֹּורִדֵ֬ם ׀ לִבְאֵ֬ר שַׁ֗חַת אַנְשֵׁ֤י דָמִ֣ים וּ֭מִרְמָה לֹא־יֶחֱצ֣וּ יְמֵיהֶ֑ם וַ֝אֲנִ֗י אֶבְטַח־בָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O God, wilt bring them down into the nethermost pit; men of blood and deceit shall not live out half their days; but as for me, I will trust in Thee.

jps.text: But Thou, O God, wilt bring them down into the nethermost pit; men of blood and deceit shall not live out half their days; but as for me, I will trust in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֤חַ ׀ עַל־יֹ֬ונַת אֵ֣לֶם רְ֭חֹקִים לְדָוִ֣ד מִכְתָּ֑ם בֶּֽאֱחֹ֨ז אֹתֹ֖ו פְלִשְׁתִּ֣ים בְּגַֽת׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Jonath-elem-rehokim. A Psalm of David; Michtam; when the Philistines took him in Gath.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Jonath-elem-rehokim. A Psalm of David; Michtam; when the Philistines took him in Gath.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֣נִי אֱ֭לֹהִים כִּֽי־שְׁאָפַ֣נִי אֱנֹ֑ושׁ כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום לֹחֵ֥ם יִלְחָצֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O God, for man would swallow me up; all the day he fighting oppresseth me.

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O God, for man would swallow me up; all the day he fighting oppresseth me.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁאֲפ֣וּ שֹׁ֭ורְרַי כָּל־הַיֹּ֑ום כִּֽי־רַבִּ֨ים לֹחֲמִ֖ים לִ֣י מָרֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: They that lie in wait for me would swallow me up all the day; for they are many that fight against me, O Most High,

jps.text: They that lie in wait for me would swallow me up all the day; for they are many that fight against me, O Most High,

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֥ום אִירָ֑א אֲ֝נִ֗י אֵלֶ֥יךָ אֶבְטָֽח׃
verses.englishText: In the day that I am afraid, I will put my trust in Thee.

jps.text: In the day that I am afraid, I will put my trust in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּאלֹהִים֮ אֲהַלֵּ֪ל דְּבָ֫רֹ֥ו בֵּאלֹהִ֣ים בָּ֭טַחְתִּי לֹ֣א אִירָ֑א מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה בָשָׂ֣ר לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: In God — I will praise His word — in God do I trust, I will not be afraid; what can flesh do unto me?

jps.text: In God — I will praise His word — in God do I trust, I will not be afraid; what can flesh do unto me?

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הַ֭יֹּום דְּבָרַ֣י יְעַצֵּ֑בוּ עָלַ֖י כָּל־מַחְשְׁבֹתָ֣ם לָרָֽע׃
verses.englishText: All the day they trouble mine affairs; all their thoughts are against me for evil.

jps.text: All the day they trouble mine affairs; all their thoughts are against me for evil.

verses.hebrewText: יָג֤וּרוּ ׀ *יַצְפִּינוּ (יִצְפֹּ֗ונוּ) הֵ֭מָּה עֲקֵבַ֣י יִשְׁמֹ֑רוּ כַּ֝אֲשֶׁ֗ר קִוּ֥וּ נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: They gather themselves together, they hide themselves, they mark my steps; according as they have waited for my soul.

jps.text: They gather themselves together, they hide themselves, they mark my steps; according as they have waited for my soul.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־אָ֥וֶן פַּלֶּט־לָ֑מֹו בְּ֝אַ֗ף עַמִּ֤ים ׀ הֹורֵ֬ד אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Because of iniquity cast them out; in anger bring down the peoples, O God.

jps.text: Because of iniquity cast them out; in anger bring down the peoples, O God.

verses.hebrewText: נֹדִי֮ סָפַ֪רְתָּ֫ה אָ֥תָּה שִׂ֣ימָה דִמְעָתִ֣י בְנֹאדֶ֑ךָ הֲ֝לֹ֗א בְּסִפְרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou has counted my wanderings; put Thou my tears into Thy bottle; are they not in Thy book?

jps.text: Thou has counted my wanderings; put Thou my tears into Thy bottle; are they not in Thy book?

verses.hebrewText: אָ֥֨ז יָ֘שׁ֤וּבוּ אֹויְבַ֣י אָ֭חֹור בְּיֹ֣ום אֶקְרָ֑א זֶה־יָ֝דַ֗עְתִּי כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֥ים לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Then shall mine enemies turn back in the day that I call; this I know, that God is for me.

jps.text: Then shall mine enemies turn back in the day that I call; this I know, that God is for me.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּֽ֭אלֹהִים אֲהַלֵּ֣ל דָּבָ֑ר בַּ֝יהוָ֗ה אֲהַלֵּ֥ל דָּבָֽר׃
verses.englishText: In God — I will praise His word — in the LORD — I will praise His word —

jps.text: In God — I will praise His word — in the LORD — I will praise His word —

verses.hebrewText: בֵּֽאלֹהִ֣ים בָּ֭טַחְתִּי לֹ֣א אִירָ֑א מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה אָדָ֣ם לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: In God do I trust, I will not be afraid; what can man do unto me?

jps.text: In God do I trust, I will not be afraid; what can man do unto me?

verses.hebrewText: עָלַ֣י אֱלֹהִ֣ים נְדָרֶ֑יךָ אֲשַׁלֵּ֖ם תֹּודֹ֣ת לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Thy vows are upon me, O God; I will render thank-offerings unto Thee.

jps.text: Thy vows are upon me, O God; I will render thank-offerings unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י הִצַּ֪לְתָּ נַפְשִׁ֡י מִמָּוֶת֮ הֲלֹ֥א רַגְלַ֗י מִ֫דֶּ֥חִי לְ֭הִֽתְהַלֵּךְ לִפְנֵ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים בְּ֝אֹ֗ור הֽ͏ַחַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: For thou hast delivered my soul from death; hast Thou not delivered my feet from stumbling? that I may walk before God in the light of the living.

jps.text: For thou hast delivered my soul from death; hast Thou not delivered my feet from stumbling? that I may walk before God in the light of the living.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֣חַ אַל־תַּ֭שְׁחֵת לְדָוִ֣ד מִכְתָּ֑ם בְּבָרְחֹ֥ו מִפְּנֵי־שָׁ֝א֗וּל בַּמְּעָרֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of David; Michtam; when he fled from Saul, in the cave.

jps.text: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of David; Michtam; when he fled from Saul, in the cave.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֤נִי אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ חָנֵּ֗נִי כִּ֥י בְךָ֮ חָסָ֪יָה נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י וּבְצֵֽל־כְּנָפֶ֥יךָ אֶחְסֶ֑ה עַ֝֗ד יַעֲבֹ֥ר הַוֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O God, be gracious unto me, for in Thee hath my soul taken refuge; yea, in the shadow of Thy wings will I take refuge, until calamities be overpast.

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O God, be gracious unto me, for in Thee hath my soul taken refuge; yea, in the shadow of Thy wings will I take refuge, until calamities be overpast.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭קְרָא לֵֽאלֹהִ֣ים עֶלְיֹ֑ון לָ֝אֵ֗ל גֹּמֵ֥ר עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will cry unto God Most high; unto God that accomplisheth it for me.

jps.text: I will cry unto God Most high; unto God that accomplisheth it for me.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁלַ֤ח מִשָּׁמַ֨יִם ׀ וְֽיֹושִׁיעֵ֗נִי חֵרֵ֣ף שֹׁאֲפִ֣י סֶ֑לָה יִשְׁלַ֥ח אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים חַסְדֹּ֥ו וַאֲמִתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He will send from heaven, and save me, when he that would swallow me up taunteth; Selah; God shall send forth His mercy and His truth.

jps.text: He will send from heaven, and save me, when he that would swallow me up taunteth; Selah; God shall send forth His mercy and His truth.

verses.hebrewText: נַפְשִׁ֤י ׀ בְּתֹ֥וךְ לְבָאִם֮ אֶשְׁכְּבָ֪ה לֹ֫הֲטִ֥ים בְּֽנֵי־אָדָ֗ם שִׁ֭נֵּיהֶם חֲנִ֣ית וְחִצִּ֑ים וּ֝לְשֹׁונָ֗ם חֶ֣רֶב חַדָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: My soul is among lions, I do lie down among them that are aflame; even the sons of men, whose teeth are spears and arrows, and their tongue a sharp sword.

jps.text: My soul is among lions, I do lie down among them that are aflame; even the sons of men, whose teeth are spears and arrows, and their tongue a sharp sword.

verses.hebrewText: ר֣וּמָה עַל־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם אֱלֹהִ֑ים עַ֖ל כָּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ כְּבֹודֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; Thy glory be above all the earth.

jps.text: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; Thy glory be above all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: רֶ֤שֶׁת ׀ הֵכִ֣ינוּ לִפְעָמַי֮ כָּפַ֪ף נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י כָּר֣וּ לְפָנַ֣י שִׁיחָ֑ה נָפְל֖וּ בְתֹוכָ֣הּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: They have prepared a net for my steps, my soul is bowed down; they have digged a pit before me, they are fallen into the midst thereof themselves. Selah

jps.text: They have prepared a net for my steps, my soul is bowed down; they have digged a pit before me, they are fallen into the midst thereof themselves. Selah

verses.hebrewText: נָ֘כֹ֤ון לִבִּ֣י אֱ֭לֹהִים נָכֹ֣ון לִבִּ֑י אָ֝שִׁ֗ירָה וַאֲזַמֵּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: My heart is stedfast, O God, my heart is stedfast; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises.

jps.text: My heart is stedfast, O God, my heart is stedfast; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises.

verses.hebrewText: ע֤וּרָה כְבֹודִ֗י ע֭וּרָֽה הַנֵּ֥בֶל וְכִנֹּ֗ור אָעִ֥ירָה שָּֽׁחַר׃
verses.englishText: Awake, my glory; awake, psaltery and harp; I will awake the dawn.

jps.text: Awake, my glory; awake, psaltery and harp; I will awake the dawn.

verses.hebrewText: אֹודְךָ֖ בָעַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֲדֹנָ֑י אֲ֝זַמֶּרְךָ֗ בַּל־אֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, O Lord, among the peoples; I will sing praises unto Thee among the nations.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto Thee, O Lord, among the peoples; I will sing praises unto Thee among the nations.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־גָדֹ֣ל עַד־שָׁמַ֣יִם חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ וְֽעַד־שְׁחָקִ֥ים אֲמִתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thy mercy is great unto the heavens, and Thy truth unto the skies.

jps.text: For Thy mercy is great unto the heavens, and Thy truth unto the skies.

verses.hebrewText: ר֣וּמָה עַל־שָׁמַ֣יִם אֱלֹהִ֑ים עַ֖ל כָּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ כְּבֹודֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; Thy glory be above all the earth.

jps.text: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; Thy glory be above all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵ֗ת לְדָוִ֥ד מִכְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of David; Michtam.

jps.text: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of David; Michtam.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽאֻמְנָ֗ם אֵ֣לֶם צֶ֭דֶק תְּדַבֵּר֑וּן מֵישָׁרִ֥ים תִּ֝שְׁפְּט֗וּ בְּנֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Do ye indeed speak as a righteous company? Do ye judge with equity the sons of men?

jps.text: Do ye indeed speak as a righteous company? Do ye judge with equity the sons of men?

verses.hebrewText: אַף־בְּלֵב֮ עֹולֹ֪ת תִּפְעָ֫ל֥וּן בָּאָ֡רֶץ חֲמַ֥ס יְ֝דֵיכֶ֗ם תְּפַלֵּֽסֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Yea, in heart ye work wickedness; ye weigh out in the earth the violence of your hands.

jps.text: Yea, in heart ye work wickedness; ye weigh out in the earth the violence of your hands.

verses.hebrewText: זֹ֣רוּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים מֵרָ֑חֶם תָּע֥וּ מִ֝בֶּ֗טֶן דֹּבְרֵ֥י כָזָֽב׃
verses.englishText: The wicked are estranged from the womb; the speakers of lies go astray as soon as they are born.

jps.text: The wicked are estranged from the womb; the speakers of lies go astray as soon as they are born.

verses.hebrewText: חֲמַת־לָ֗מֹו כִּדְמ֥וּת חֲמַת־נָחָ֑שׁ כְּמֹו־פֶ֥תֶן חֵ֝רֵ֗שׁ יַאְטֵ֥ם אָזְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Their venom is like the venom of a serpent; they are like the deaf asp that stoppeth her ear;

jps.text: Their venom is like the venom of a serpent; they are like the deaf asp that stoppeth her ear;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־יִ֭שְׁמַע לְקֹ֣ול מְלַחֲשִׁ֑ים חֹובֵ֖ר חֲבָרִ֣ים מְחֻכָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Which hearkeneth not to the voice of charmers, or of the most cunning binder of spells.

jps.text: Which hearkeneth not to the voice of charmers, or of the most cunning binder of spells.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים הֲרָס־שִׁנֵּ֥ימֹו בְּפִ֑ימֹו מַלְתְּעֹ֥ות כְּ֝פִירִ֗ים נְתֹ֣ץ ׀ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Break their teeth, O God, in their mouth; break out the cheek-teeth of the young lions, O LORD.

jps.text: Break their teeth, O God, in their mouth; break out the cheek-teeth of the young lions, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יִמָּאֲס֣וּ כְמֹו־מַ֭יִם יִתְהַלְּכוּ־לָ֑מֹו יִדְרֹ֥ךְ *חִצֹּו (חִ֝צָּ֗יו) כְּמֹ֣ו יִתְמֹלָֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them melt away as water that runneth apace; when he aimeth his arrows, let them be as though they were cut off.

jps.text: Let them melt away as water that runneth apace; when he aimeth his arrows, let them be as though they were cut off.

verses.hebrewText: כְּמֹ֣ו שַׁ֭בְּלוּל תֶּ֣מֶס יַהֲלֹ֑ךְ נֵ֥פֶל אֵ֝֗שֶׁת בַּל־חָ֥זוּ שָֽׁמֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Let them be as a snail which melteth and passeth away; like the untimely births of a woman, that have not seen the sun.

jps.text: Let them be as a snail which melteth and passeth away; like the untimely births of a woman, that have not seen the sun.

verses.hebrewText: בְּטֶ֤רֶם יָבִ֣ינוּ סִּֽירֹתֵיכֶ֣ם אָטָ֑ד כְּמֹו־חַ֥י כְּמֹו־חָ֝רֹ֗ון יִשְׂעָרֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Before your pots can feel the thorns, He will sweep it away with a whirlwind, the raw and the burning alike.

jps.text: Before your pots can feel the thorns, He will sweep it away with a whirlwind, the raw and the burning alike.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂמַ֣ח צַ֭דִּיק כִּי־חָזָ֣ה נָקָ֑ם פְּעָמָ֥יו יִ֝רְחַ֗ץ בְּדַ֣ם הָרָשָֽׁע׃
verses.englishText: The righteous shall rejoice when he seeth the vengeance; he shall wash his feet in the blood of the wicked.

jps.text: The righteous shall rejoice when he seeth the vengeance; he shall wash his feet in the blood of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹאמַ֣ר אָ֭דָם אַךְ־פְּרִ֣י לַצַּדִּ֑יק אַ֥ךְ יֵשׁ־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים שֹׁפְטִ֥ים בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: And men shall say: 'Verily there is a reward for the righteous; verily there is a God that judgeth in the earth.'

jps.text: And men shall say: 'Verily there is a reward for the righteous; verily there is a God that judgeth in the earth.'

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֣חַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵת֮ לְדָוִ֪ד מִ֫כְתָּ֥ם בִּשְׁלֹ֥חַ שָׁא֑וּל וַֽיִּשְׁמְר֥וּ אֶת־הַ֝בַּ֗יִת לַהֲמִיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of David; Michtam; when Saul sent, and they watched the house to kill him.

jps.text: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of David; Michtam; when Saul sent, and they watched the house to kill him.

verses.hebrewText: הַצִּילֵ֖נִי מֵאֹיְבַ֥י ׀ אֱלֹהָ֑י מִּמִתְקֹומְמַ֥י תְּשַׂגְּבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me from mine enemies, O my God; set me on high from them that rise up against me.

jps.text: Deliver me from mine enemies, O my God; set me on high from them that rise up against me.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭צִּילֵנִי מִפֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן וּֽמֵאַנְשֵׁ֥י דָ֝מִ֗ים הֹושִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me from the workers of iniquity, and save me from the men of blood.

jps.text: Deliver me from the workers of iniquity, and save me from the men of blood.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י הִנֵּ֪ה אָֽרְב֡וּ לְנַפְשִׁ֗י יָג֣וּרוּ עָלַ֣י עַזִ֑ים לֹא־פִשְׁעִ֖י וְלֹא־חַטָּאתִ֣י יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For, lo, they lie in wait for my soul; the impudent gather themselves together against me; not for my transgression, nor for my sin, O LORD.

jps.text: For, lo, they lie in wait for my soul; the impudent gather themselves together against me; not for my transgression, nor for my sin, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽלִי־עָ֭וֹן יְרוּצ֣וּן וְיִכֹּונָ֑נוּ ע֖וּרָה לִקְרָאתִ֣י וּרְאֵה׃
verses.englishText: Without my fault, they run and prepare themselves; awake Thou to help me, and behold.

jps.text: Without my fault, they run and prepare themselves; awake Thou to help me, and behold.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֤ה יְהוָֽה־אֱלֹהִ֥ים ׀ צְבָאֹ֡ות אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל הָקִ֗יצָה לִפְקֹ֥ד כָּֽל־הַגֹּויִ֑ם אַל־תָּחֹ֨ן כָּל־בֹּ֖גְדֵי אָ֣וֶן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou therefore, O LORD God of hosts, the God of Israel, arouse Thyself to punish all the nations; show no mercy to any iniquitous traitors. Selah

jps.text: Thou therefore, O LORD God of hosts, the God of Israel, arouse Thyself to punish all the nations; show no mercy to any iniquitous traitors. Selah

verses.hebrewText: יָשׁ֣וּבוּ לָ֭עֶרֶב יֶהֱמ֥וּ כַכָּ֗לֶב וִיסֹ֥ובְבוּ עִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: They return at evening, they howl like a dog, and go round about the city.

jps.text: They return at evening, they howl like a dog, and go round about the city.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה ׀ יַבִּ֘יע֤וּן בְּפִיהֶ֗ם חֲ֭רָבֹות בְּשִׂפְתֹותֵיהֶ֑ם כִּי־מִ֥י שֹׁמֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, they belch out with their mouth; swords are in their lips: 'For who doth hear?'

jps.text: Behold, they belch out with their mouth; swords are in their lips: 'For who doth hear?'

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה יְ֭הוָה תִּשְׂחַק־לָ֑מֹו תִּ֝לְעַ֗ג לְכָל־גֹּויִֽם׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O LORD, shalt laugh at them; Thou shalt have all the nations in derision.

jps.text: But Thou, O LORD, shalt laugh at them; Thou shalt have all the nations in derision.

verses.hebrewText: עֻ֭זֹּו אֵלֶ֣יךָ אֶשְׁמֹ֑רָה כִּֽי־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים מִשְׂגַּבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Because of his strength, I will wait for Thee; for God is my high tower.

jps.text: Because of his strength, I will wait for Thee; for God is my high tower.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהֵ֣י *חַסְדֹּו (חַסְדִּ֣י) יְקַדְּמֵ֑נִי אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים יַרְאֵ֥נִי בְשֹׁרְרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: The God of my mercy will come to meet me; God will let me gaze upon mine adversaries.

jps.text: The God of my mercy will come to meet me; God will let me gaze upon mine adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּהַרְגֵ֤ם ׀ פֶּֽן־יִשְׁכְּח֬וּ עַמִּ֗י הֲנִיעֵ֣מֹו בְ֭חֵילְךָ וְהֹורִידֵ֑מֹו מָֽגִנֵּ֣נוּ אֲדֹנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Slay them not, lest my people forget, make them wander to and fro by Thy power, and bring them down, O Lord our shield.

jps.text: Slay them not, lest my people forget, make them wander to and fro by Thy power, and bring them down, O Lord our shield.

verses.hebrewText: חַטַּאת־פִּ֗ימֹו דְּֽבַר־שְׂפָ֫תֵ֥ימֹו וְיִלָּכְד֥וּ בִגְאֹונָ֑ם וּמֵאָלָ֖ה וּמִכַּ֣חַשׁ יְסַפֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: For the sin of their mouth, and the words of their lips, let them even be taken in their pride, and for cursing and lying which they speak.

jps.text: For the sin of their mouth, and the words of their lips, let them even be taken in their pride, and for cursing and lying which they speak.

verses.hebrewText: כַּלֵּ֥ה בְחֵמָה֮ כַּלֵּ֪ה וְֽאֵ֫ינֵ֥מֹו וְֽיֵדְע֗וּ כִּֽי־אֱ֭לֹהִים מֹשֵׁ֣ל בְּיַעֲקֹ֑ב לְאַפְסֵ֖י הָאָ֣רֶץ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Consume them in wrath, consume them, that they be no more; and let them know that God ruleth in Jacob, unto the ends of the earth. Selah

jps.text: Consume them in wrath, consume them, that they be no more; and let them know that God ruleth in Jacob, unto the ends of the earth. Selah

verses.hebrewText: וְיָשׁ֣וּבוּ לָ֭עֶרֶב יֶהֱמ֥וּ כַכָּ֗לֶב וִיסֹ֥ובְבוּ עִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: And they return at evening, they howl like a dog, and go round about the city;

jps.text: And they return at evening, they howl like a dog, and go round about the city;

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֭מָּה *יְנוּעוּן (יְנִיע֣וּן) לֶאֱכֹ֑ל אִם־לֹ֥א יִ֝שְׂבְּע֗וּ וַיָּלִֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: They wander up and down to devour, and tarry all night if they have not their fill.

jps.text: They wander up and down to devour, and tarry all night if they have not their fill.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ אָשִׁ֣יר עֻזֶּךָ֮ וַאֲרַנֵּ֥ן לַבֹּ֗קֶר חַ֫סְדֶּ֥ךָ כִּֽי־הָיִ֣יתָ מִשְׂגָּ֣ב לִ֑י וּ֝מָנֹ֗וס בְּיֹ֣ום צַר־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I will sing of Thy strength; yea, I will sing aloud of Thy mercy in the morning; for Thou hast been my high tower, and a refuge in the day of my distress.

jps.text: But as for me, I will sing of Thy strength; yea, I will sing aloud of Thy mercy in the morning; for Thou hast been my high tower, and a refuge in the day of my distress.

verses.hebrewText: עֻ֭זִּי אֵלֶ֣יךָ אֲזַמֵּ֑רָה כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֥ים מִ֝שְׂגַּבִּ֗י אֱלֹהֵ֥י חַסְדִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: O my strength, unto Thee will I sing praises; for God is my high tower, the God of my mercy.

jps.text: O my strength, unto Thee will I sing praises; for God is my high tower, the God of my mercy.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ עַל־שׁוּשַׁ֣ן עֵד֑וּת מִכְתָּ֖ם לְדָוִ֣ד לְלַמֵּֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Shushan Eduth; Michtam of David, to teach;

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Shushan Eduth; Michtam of David, to teach;

verses.hebrewText: בְּהַצֹּותֹ֨ו ׀ אֶ֥ת אֲרַ֣ם נַהֲרַיִם֮ וְאֶת־אֲרַ֪ם צֹ֫ובָ֥ה וַיָּ֤שָׁב יֹואָ֗ב וַיַּ֣ךְ אֶת־אֱדֹ֣ום בְּגֵיא־מֶ֑לַח שְׁנֵ֖ים עָשָׂ֣ר אָֽלֶף׃
verses.englishText: when he strove with Aram-naharaim and with Aram-zobah, and Joab returned, and smote of Edom in the Valley of Salt twelve thousand.

jps.text: when he strove with Aram-naharaim and with Aram-zobah, and Joab returned, and smote of Edom in the Valley of Salt twelve thousand.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים זְנַחְתָּ֣נוּ פְרַצְתָּ֑נוּ אָ֝נַ֗פְתָּ תְּשֹׁ֣ובֵ֥ב לָֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: O God, Thou hast cast us off, Thou hast broken us down; Thou hast been angry; O restore us.

jps.text: O God, Thou hast cast us off, Thou hast broken us down; Thou hast been angry; O restore us.

verses.hebrewText: הִרְעַ֣שְׁתָּה אֶ֣רֶץ פְּצַמְתָּ֑הּ רְפָ֖ה שְׁבָרֶ֣יהָ כִי־מָֽטָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast made the land to shake, Thou hast cleft it; heal the breaches thereof; for it tottereth.

jps.text: Thou hast made the land to shake, Thou hast cleft it; heal the breaches thereof; for it tottereth.

verses.hebrewText: הִרְאִ֣יתָה עַמְּךָ֣ קָשָׁ֑ה הִ֝שְׁקִיתָ֗נוּ יַ֣יִן תַּרְעֵלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast made Thy people to see hard things; Thou hast made us to drink the wine of staggering.

jps.text: Thou hast made Thy people to see hard things; Thou hast made us to drink the wine of staggering.

verses.hebrewText: נָ֘תַ֤תָּה לִּירֵאֶ֣יךָ נֵּ֭ס לְהִתְנֹוסֵ֑ס מִ֝פְּנֵ֗י קֹ֣שֶׁט סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast given a banner to them that fear Thee, that it may be displayed because of the truth. Selah

jps.text: Thou hast given a banner to them that fear Thee, that it may be displayed because of the truth. Selah

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭מַעַן יֵחָלְצ֣וּן יְדִידֶ֑יךָ הֹושִׁ֖יעָה יְמִֽינְךָ֣ *וַעֲנֵנוּ (וַעֲנֵֽנִי)׃
verses.englishText: That Thy beloved may be delivered, save with Thy right hand, and answer me.

jps.text: That Thy beloved may be delivered, save with Thy right hand, and answer me.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ דִּבֶּ֥ר בְּקָדְשֹׁ֗ו אֶ֫עְלֹ֥זָה אֲחַלְּקָ֥ה שְׁכֶ֑ם וְעֵ֖מֶק סֻכֹּ֣ות אֲמַדֵּֽד׃
verses.englishText: God spoke in His holiness, that I would exult; that I would divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.

jps.text: God spoke in His holiness, that I would exult; that I would divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.

verses.hebrewText: לִ֤י גִלְעָ֨ד ׀ וְלִ֬י מְנַשֶּׁ֗ה וְ֭אֶפְרַיִם מָעֹ֣וז רֹאשִׁ֑י יְ֝הוּדָ֗ה מְחֹֽקְקִי׃
verses.englishText: Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the defence of my head; Judah is my sceptre.

jps.text: Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the defence of my head; Judah is my sceptre.

verses.hebrewText: מֹואָ֤ב ׀ סִ֬יר רַחְצִ֗י עַל־אֱ֭דֹום אַשְׁלִ֣יךְ נַעֲלִ֑י עָ֝לַ֗י פְּלֶ֣שֶׁת הִתְרֹעָֽעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Moab is my washpot; upon Edom do I cast my shoe; Philistia, cry aloud because of me!

jps.text: Moab is my washpot; upon Edom do I cast my shoe; Philistia, cry aloud because of me!

verses.hebrewText: מִ֣י יֹ֭בִלֵנִי עִ֣יר מָצֹ֑ור מִ֖י נָחַ֣נִי עַד־אֱדֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who will lead me unto Edom?

jps.text: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who will lead me unto Edom?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹֽא־אַתָּ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים זְנַחְתָּ֑נוּ וְֽלֹא־תֵצֵ֥א אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים בְּצִבְאֹותֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Hast not Thou, O God, cast us off? And Thou goest not forth, O God, with our hosts.

jps.text: Hast not Thou, O God, cast us off? And Thou goest not forth, O God, with our hosts.

verses.hebrewText: הָֽבָה־לָּ֣נוּ עֶזְרָ֣ת מִצָּ֑ר וְ֝שָׁ֗וְא תְּשׁוּעַ֥ת אָדָם׃
verses.englishText: Give us help against the adversary; for vain is the help of man.

jps.text: Give us help against the adversary; for vain is the help of man.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּֽאלֹהִ֥ים נַעֲשֶׂה־חָ֑יִל וְ֝ה֗וּא יָב֥וּס צָרֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Through God we shall do valiantly; for He it is that will tread down our adversaries.

jps.text: Through God we shall do valiantly; for He it is that will tread down our adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ ׀ עַֽל־נְגִינַ֬ת לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְעָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים רִנָּתִ֑י הַ֝קְשִׁ֗יבָה תְּפִלָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hear my cry, O God; attend unto my prayer.

jps.text: Hear my cry, O God; attend unto my prayer.

verses.hebrewText: מִקְצֵ֤ה הָאָ֨רֶץ ׀ אֵלֶ֣יךָ אֶ֭קְרָא בַּעֲטֹ֣ף לִבִּ֑י בְּצוּר־יָר֖וּם מִמֶּ֣נִּי תַנְחֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: From the end of the earth will I call unto Thee, when my heart fainteth; lead me to a rock that is too high for me.

jps.text: From the end of the earth will I call unto Thee, when my heart fainteth; lead me to a rock that is too high for me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הָיִ֣יתָ מַחְסֶ֣ה לִ֑י מִגְדַּל־עֹ֝֗ז מִפְּנֵ֥י אֹויֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: For Thou hast been a refuge for me, a tower of strength in the face of the enemy.

jps.text: For Thou hast been a refuge for me, a tower of strength in the face of the enemy.

verses.hebrewText: אָג֣וּרָה בְ֭אָהָלְךָ עֹולָמִ֑ים אֶֽחֱסֶ֨ה בְסֵ֖תֶר כְּנָפֶ֣יךָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: I will dwell in Thy Tent for ever; I will take refuge in the covert of Thy wings. Selah

jps.text: I will dwell in Thy Tent for ever; I will take refuge in the covert of Thy wings. Selah

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים שָׁמַ֣עְתָּ לִנְדָרָ֑י נָתַ֥תָּ יְ֝רֻשַּׁ֗ת יִרְאֵ֥י שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thou, O God, hast heard my vows; Thou hast granted the heritage of those that fear Thy name.

jps.text: For Thou, O God, hast heard my vows; Thou hast granted the heritage of those that fear Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: יָמִ֣ים עַל־יְמֵי־מֶ֣לֶךְ תֹּוסִ֑יף שְׁ֝נֹותָ֗יו כְּמֹו־דֹ֥ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: Mayest Thou add days unto the king's days! May his years be as many generations!

jps.text: Mayest Thou add days unto the king's days! May his years be as many generations!

verses.hebrewText: יֵשֵׁ֣ב עֹ֭ולָם לִפְנֵ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים חֶ֥סֶד וֶ֝אֱמֶ֗ת מַ֣ן יִנְצְרֻֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: May he be enthroned before God for ever! Appoint mercy and truth, that they may preserve him.

jps.text: May he be enthroned before God for ever! Appoint mercy and truth, that they may preserve him.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֤ן אֲזַמְּרָ֣ה שִׁמְךָ֣ לָעַ֑ד לְֽשַׁלְּמִ֥י נְדָרַ֗י יֹ֣ום ׀ יֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: So will I sing praise unto Thy name for ever, that I may daily perform my vows.

jps.text: So will I sing praise unto Thy name for ever, that I may daily perform my vows.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ עַֽל־יְדוּת֗וּן מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; for Jeduthun. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; for Jeduthun. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ךְ אֶל־אֱ֭לֹהִים דּֽוּמִיָּ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ יְשׁוּעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Only for God doth my soul wait in stillness; from Him cometh my salvation.

jps.text: Only for God doth my soul wait in stillness; from Him cometh my salvation.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־ה֣וּא צ֭וּרִי וִֽישׁוּעָתִ֑י מִ֝שְׂגַּבִּ֗י לֹא־אֶמֹּ֥וט רַבָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He only is my rock and my salvation, my high tower, I shall not be greatly moved.

jps.text: He only is my rock and my salvation, my high tower, I shall not be greatly moved.

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֤נָה ׀ תְּהֹֽותְת֣וּ עַל אִישׁ֮ תְּרָצְּח֪וּ כֻ֫לְּכֶ֥ם כְּקִ֥יר נָט֑וּי גָּ֝דֵ֗ר הַדְּחוּיֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: How long will ye set upon a man, that ye may slay him, all of you, as a leaning wall, a tottering fence?

jps.text: How long will ye set upon a man, that ye may slay him, all of you, as a leaning wall, a tottering fence?

verses.hebrewText: אַ֤ךְ מִשְּׂאֵתֹ֨ו ׀ יָעֲצ֣וּ לְהַדִּיחַ֮ יִרְצ֪וּ כָ֫זָ֥ב בְּפִ֥יו יְבָרֵ֑כוּ וּ֝בְקִרְבָּ֗ם יְקַלְלוּ־סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: They only devise to thrust him down from his height, delighting in lies; they bless with their mouth, but they curse inwardly. Selah

jps.text: They only devise to thrust him down from his height, delighting in lies; they bless with their mouth, but they curse inwardly. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ךְ לֵ֭אלֹהִים דֹּ֣ומִּי נַפְשִׁ֑י כִּי־מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ תִּקְוָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Only for God wait thou in stillness, my soul; for from Him cometh my hope.

jps.text: Only for God wait thou in stillness, my soul; for from Him cometh my hope.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־ה֣וּא צ֭וּרִי וִֽישׁוּעָתִ֑י מִ֝שְׂגַּבִּ֗י לֹ֣א אֶמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: He only is my rock and my salvation, my high tower, I shall not be moved.

jps.text: He only is my rock and my salvation, my high tower, I shall not be moved.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־אֱ֭לֹהִים יִשְׁעִ֣י וּכְבֹודִ֑י צוּר־עֻזִּ֥י מַ֝חְסִ֗י בֵּֽאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Upon God resteth my salvation and my glory; the rock of my strength, and my refuge, is in God.

jps.text: Upon God resteth my salvation and my glory; the rock of my strength, and my refuge, is in God.

verses.hebrewText: בִּטְח֘וּ בֹ֤ו בְכָל־עֵ֨ת ׀ עָ֗ם שִׁפְכֽוּ־לְפָנָ֥יו לְבַבְכֶ֑ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים מַחֲסֶה־לָּ֣נוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Trust in Him at all times, ye people; pour out your heart before Him; God is a refuge for us. Selah

jps.text: Trust in Him at all times, ye people; pour out your heart before Him; God is a refuge for us. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַ֤ךְ ׀ הֶ֥בֶל בְּנֵֽי־אָדָם֮ כָּזָ֪ב בְּנֵ֫י אִ֥ישׁ בְּמֹאזְנַ֥יִם לַעֲלֹ֑ות הֵ֝֗מָּה מֵהֶ֥בֶל יָֽחַד׃
verses.englishText: Men of low degree are vanity, and men of high degree are a lie; if they be laid in the balances, they are together lighter than vanity.

jps.text: Men of low degree are vanity, and men of high degree are a lie; if they be laid in the balances, they are together lighter than vanity.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּבְטְח֣וּ בְעֹשֶׁק֮ וּבְגָזֵ֪ל אַל־תֶּ֫הְבָּ֥לוּ חַ֤יִל ׀ כִּֽי־יָנ֑וּב אַל־תָּשִׁ֥יתוּ לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: Trust not in oppression, and put not vain hope in robbery; if riches increase, set not your heart thereon.

jps.text: Trust not in oppression, and put not vain hope in robbery; if riches increase, set not your heart thereon.

verses.hebrewText: אַחַ֤ת ׀ דִּבֶּ֬ר אֱלֹהִ֗ים שְׁתַּֽיִם־ז֥וּ שָׁמָ֑עְתִּי כִּ֥י עֹ֝֗ז לֵאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: God hath spoken once, twice have I heard this: that strength belongeth unto God;

jps.text: God hath spoken once, twice have I heard this: that strength belongeth unto God;

verses.hebrewText: וּלְךָֽ־אֲדֹנָ֥י חָ֑סֶד כִּֽי־אַתָּ֨ה תְשַׁלֵּ֖ם לְאִ֣ישׁ כְּֽמַעֲשֵֽׂהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Also unto Thee, O Lord, belongeth mercy; for Thou renderest to every man according to his work.

jps.text: Also unto Thee, O Lord, belongeth mercy; for Thou renderest to every man according to his work.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִ֑ד בִּ֝הְיֹותֹ֗ו בְּמִדְבַּ֥ר יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David, when he was in the wilderness of Judah.

jps.text: A Psalm of David, when he was in the wilderness of Judah.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ אֵלִ֥י אַתָּ֗ה אֲ‍ֽשַׁחֲ֫רֶ֥ךָּ צָמְאָ֬ה לְךָ֨ ׀ נַפְשִׁ֗י כָּמַ֣הּ לְךָ֣ בְשָׂרִ֑י בְּאֶֽרֶץ־צִיָּ֖ה וְעָיֵ֣ף בְּלִי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: O God, Thou art my God, earnestly will I seek Thee; my soul thirsteth for Thee, my flesh longeth for Thee, in a dry and weary land, where no water is.

jps.text: O God, Thou art my God, earnestly will I seek Thee; my soul thirsteth for Thee, my flesh longeth for Thee, in a dry and weary land, where no water is.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֭ן בַּקֹּ֣דֶשׁ חֲזִיתִ֑יךָ לִרְאֹ֥ות עֻ֝זְּךָ֗ וּכְבֹודֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: So have I looked for Thee in the sanctuary, to see Thy power and Thy glory.

jps.text: So have I looked for Thee in the sanctuary, to see Thy power and Thy glory.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־טֹ֣וב חַ֭סְדְּךָ מֵֽחַיִּ֗ים שְׂפָתַ֥י יְשַׁבְּחֽוּנְךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thy lovingkindness is better than life; my lips shall praise Thee.

jps.text: For Thy lovingkindness is better than life; my lips shall praise Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֣ן אֲבָרֶכְךָ֣ בְחַיָּ֑י בְּ֝שִׁמְךָ אֶשָּׂ֥א כַפָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: So will I bless Thee as long as I live; in Thy name will I lift up my hands.

jps.text: So will I bless Thee as long as I live; in Thy name will I lift up my hands.

verses.hebrewText: כְּמֹ֤ו חֵ֣לֶב וָ֭דֶשֶׁן תִּשְׂבַּ֣ע נַפְשִׁ֑י וְשִׂפְתֵ֥י רְ֝נָנֹ֗ות יְהַלֶּל־פִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: My soul is satisfied as with marrow and fatness; and my mouth doth praise Thee with joyful lips;

jps.text: My soul is satisfied as with marrow and fatness; and my mouth doth praise Thee with joyful lips;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־זְכַרְתִּ֥יךָ עַל־יְצוּעָ֑י בְּ֝אַשְׁמֻרֹ֗ות אֶהְגֶּה־בָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: When I remember Thee upon my couch, and meditate on Thee in the night-watches.

jps.text: When I remember Thee upon my couch, and meditate on Thee in the night-watches.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הָיִ֣יתָ עֶזְרָ֣תָה לִּ֑י וּבְצֵ֖ל כְּנָפֶ֣יךָ אֲרַנֵּֽן׃
verses.englishText: For Thou hast been my help, and in the shadow of Thy wings do I rejoice.

jps.text: For Thou hast been my help, and in the shadow of Thy wings do I rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: דָּבְקָ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֣י אַחֲרֶ֑יךָ בִּ֝֗י תָּמְכָ֥ה יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My soul cleaveth unto Thee; Thy right hand holdeth me fast.

jps.text: My soul cleaveth unto Thee; Thy right hand holdeth me fast.

verses.hebrewText: וְהֵ֗מָּה לְ֭שֹׁואָה יְבַקְשׁ֣וּ נַפְשִׁ֑י יָ֝בֹ֗אוּ בְּֽתַחְתִּיֹּ֥ות הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: But those that seek my soul, to destroy it, shall go into the nethermost parts of the earth.

jps.text: But those that seek my soul, to destroy it, shall go into the nethermost parts of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: יַגִּירֻ֥הוּ עַל־יְדֵי־חָ֑רֶב מְנָ֖ת שֻׁעָלִ֣ים יִהְיֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: They shall be hurled to the power of the sword; they shall be a portion for foxes.

jps.text: They shall be hurled to the power of the sword; they shall be a portion for foxes.

verses.hebrewText: וְהַמֶּלֶךְ֮ יִשְׂמַ֪ח בֵּאלֹ֫הִ֥ים יִ֭תְהַלֵּל כָּל־הַנִּשְׁבָּ֣ע בֹּ֑ו כִּ֥י יִ֝סָּכֵ֗ר פִּ֣י דֹֽובְרֵי־שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: But the king shall rejoice in God; every one that sweareth by Him shall glory; for the mouth of them that speak lies shall be stopped.

jps.text: But the king shall rejoice in God; every one that sweareth by Him shall glory; for the mouth of them that speak lies shall be stopped.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַע־אֱלֹהִ֣ים קֹולִ֣י בְשִׂיחִ֑י מִפַּ֥חַד אֹ֝ויֵ֗ב תִּצֹּ֥ר חַיָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hear my voice, O God, in my complaint; preserve my life from the terror of the enemy.

jps.text: Hear my voice, O God, in my complaint; preserve my life from the terror of the enemy.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֭סְתִּירֵנִי מִסֹּ֣וד מְרֵעִ֑ים מֵ֝רִגְשַׁ֗ת פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Hide me from the council of evil-doers; from the tumult of the workers of iniquity;

jps.text: Hide me from the council of evil-doers; from the tumult of the workers of iniquity;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר שָׁנְנ֣וּ כַחֶ֣רֶב לְשֹׁונָ֑ם דָּרְכ֥וּ חִ֝צָּ֗ם דָּבָ֥ר מָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Who have whet their tongue like a sword, and have aimed their arrow, a poisoned word;

jps.text: Who have whet their tongue like a sword, and have aimed their arrow, a poisoned word;

verses.hebrewText: לִירֹ֣ות בַּמִּסְתָּרִ֣ים תָּ֑ם פִּתְאֹ֥ם יֹ֝רֻ֗הוּ וְלֹ֣א יִירָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: That they may shoot in secret places at the blameless; suddenly do they shoot at him, and fear not.

jps.text: That they may shoot in secret places at the blameless; suddenly do they shoot at him, and fear not.

verses.hebrewText: יְחַזְּקוּ־לָ֨מֹו ׀ דָּ֘בָ֤ר רָ֗ע יְֽ֭סַפְּרוּ לִטְמֹ֣ון מֹוקְשִׁ֑ים אָ֝מְר֗וּ מִ֣י יִרְאֶה־לָּֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: They encourage one another in an evil matter; they converse of laying snares secretly; they ask, who would see them.

jps.text: They encourage one another in an evil matter; they converse of laying snares secretly; they ask, who would see them.

verses.hebrewText: יַֽחְפְּֽשׂוּ־עֹולֹ֗ת תַּ֭מְנוּ חֵ֣פֶשׂ מְחֻפָּ֑שׂ וְקֶ֥רֶב אִ֝֗ישׁ וְלֵ֣ב עָמֹֽק׃
verses.englishText: They search out iniquities, they have accomplished a diligent search; even in the inward thought of every one, and the deep heart.

jps.text: They search out iniquities, they have accomplished a diligent search; even in the inward thought of every one, and the deep heart.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּרֵ֗ם אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים חֵ֥ץ פִּתְאֹ֑ום הָ֝י֗וּ מַכֹּותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: But God doth shoot at them with an arrow suddenly; thence are their wounds.

jps.text: But God doth shoot at them with an arrow suddenly; thence are their wounds.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּכְשִׁיל֣וּהוּ עָלֵ֣ימֹו לְשֹׁונָ֑ם יִ֝תְנֹדֲד֗וּ כָּל־רֹ֥אֵה בָֽם׃
verses.englishText: So they make their own tongue a stumbling unto themselves; all that see them shake the head.

jps.text: So they make their own tongue a stumbling unto themselves; all that see them shake the head.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּֽירְא֗וּ כָּל־אָ֫דָ֥ם וַ֭יַּגִּידוּ פֹּ֥עַל אֱלֹהִ֗ים וּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֥הוּ הִשְׂכִּֽילוּ׃
verses.englishText: And all men fear; and they declare the work of God, and understand His doing.

jps.text: And all men fear; and they declare the work of God, and understand His doing.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂמַ֬ח צַדִּ֣יק בַּ֭יהוָה וְחָ֣סָה בֹ֑ו וְ֝יִתְהַֽלְל֗וּ כָּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: The righteous shall be glad in the LORD, and shall take refuge in Him; and all the upright in heart shall glory.

jps.text: The righteous shall be glad in the LORD, and shall take refuge in Him; and all the upright in heart shall glory.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ מִזְמֹ֗ור לְדָוִ֥ד שִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm. A Song of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm. A Song of David.

verses.hebrewText: לְךָ֤ דֻֽמִיָּ֬ה תְהִלָּ֓ה אֱלֹ֘הִ֥ים בְּצִיֹּ֑ון וּ֝לְךָ֗ יְשֻׁלַּם־נֶֽדֶר׃
verses.englishText: Praise waiteth for Thee, O God, in Zion; and unto Thee the vow is performed.

jps.text: Praise waiteth for Thee, O God, in Zion; and unto Thee the vow is performed.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁמֵ֥עַ תְּפִלָּ֑ה עָ֝דֶ֗יךָ כָּל־בָּשָׂ֥ר יָבֹֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: O Thou that hearest prayer, unto Thee doth all flesh come.

jps.text: O Thou that hearest prayer, unto Thee doth all flesh come.

verses.hebrewText: דִּבְרֵ֣י עֲ֭וֹנֹת גָּ֣בְרוּ מֶ֑נִּי פְּ֝שָׁעֵ֗ינוּ אַתָּ֥ה תְכַפְּרֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: The tale of iniquities is too heavy for me; as for our transgressions, Thou wilt pardon them.

jps.text: The tale of iniquities is too heavy for me; as for our transgressions, Thou wilt pardon them.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֤י ׀ תִּֽבְחַ֣ר וּתְקָרֵב֮ יִשְׁכֹּ֪ן חֲצֵ֫רֶ֥יךָ נִ֭שְׂבְּעָה בְּט֣וּב בֵּיתֶ֑ךָ קְ֝דֹ֗שׁ הֵיכָלֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man whom Thou choosest, and bringest near, that he may dwell in Thy courts; may we be satisfied with the goodness of Thy house, the holy place of Thy temple!

jps.text: Happy is the man whom Thou choosest, and bringest near, that he may dwell in Thy courts; may we be satisfied with the goodness of Thy house, the holy place of Thy temple!

verses.hebrewText: נֹ֤ורָאֹ֨ות ׀ בְּצֶ֣דֶק תַּ֭עֲנֵנוּ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׁעֵ֑נוּ מִבְטָ֥ח כָּל־קַצְוֵי־אֶ֝֗רֶץ וְיָ֣ם רְחֹקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: With wondrous works dost Thou answer us in righteousness, O God of our salvation; Thou the confidence of all the ends of the earth, and of the far distant seas;

jps.text: With wondrous works dost Thou answer us in righteousness, O God of our salvation; Thou the confidence of all the ends of the earth, and of the far distant seas;

verses.hebrewText: מֵכִ֣ין הָרִ֣ים בְּכֹחֹ֑ו נֶ֝אְזָ֗ר בִּגְבוּרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who by Thy strength settest fast the mountains, who art girded about with might;

jps.text: Who by Thy strength settest fast the mountains, who art girded about with might;

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׁבִּ֤יחַ ׀ שְׁאֹ֣ון יַ֭מִּים שְׁאֹ֥ון גַּלֵּיהֶ֗ם וַהֲמֹ֥ון לְאֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Who stillest the roaring of the seas, the roaring of their waves, and the tumult of the peoples;

jps.text: Who stillest the roaring of the seas, the roaring of their waves, and the tumult of the peoples;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּ֤ירְא֨וּ ׀ יֹשְׁבֵ֣י קְ֭צָוֹת מֵאֹותֹתֶ֑יךָ מֹ֤וצָֽאֵי־בֹ֖קֶר וָעֶ֣רֶב תַּרְנִֽין׃
verses.englishText: So that they that dwell in the uttermost parts stand in awe of Thy signs; Thou makest the outgoings of the morning and evening to rejoice.

jps.text: So that they that dwell in the uttermost parts stand in awe of Thy signs; Thou makest the outgoings of the morning and evening to rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: פָּקַ֥דְתָּ הָאָ֨רֶץ ׀ וַתְּשֹׁ֪קְקֶ֡הָ רַבַּ֬ת תַּעְשְׁרֶ֗נָּה פֶּ֣לֶג אֱ֭לֹהִים מָ֣לֵא מָ֑יִם תָּכִ֥ין דְּ֝גָנָ֗ם כִּי־כֵ֥ן תְּכִינֶֽהָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast remembered the earth, and watered her, greatly enriching her, with the river of God that is full of water; Thou preparest them corn, for so preparest Thou her.

jps.text: Thou hast remembered the earth, and watered her, greatly enriching her, with the river of God that is full of water; Thou preparest them corn, for so preparest Thou her.

verses.hebrewText: תְּלָמֶ֣יהָ רַ֭וֵּה נַחֵ֣ת גְּדוּדֶ֑יהָ בִּרְבִיבִ֥ים תְּ֝מֹגְגֶ֗נָּה צִמְחָ֥הּ תְּבָרֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Watering her ridges abundantly, settling down the furrows thereof, Thou makest her soft with showers; Thou blessest the growth thereof.

jps.text: Watering her ridges abundantly, settling down the furrows thereof, Thou makest her soft with showers; Thou blessest the growth thereof.

verses.hebrewText: עִ֭טַּרְתָּ שְׁנַ֣ת טֹובָתֶ֑ךָ וּ֝מַעְגָּלֶ֗יךָ יִרְעֲפ֥וּן דָּֽשֶׁן׃
verses.englishText: Thou crownest the year with Thy goodness; and Thy paths drop fatness.

jps.text: Thou crownest the year with Thy goodness; and Thy paths drop fatness.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭רְעֲפוּ נְאֹ֣ות מִדְבָּ֑ר וְ֝גִ֗יל גְּבָעֹ֥ות תַּחְגֹּֽרְנָה׃
verses.englishText: The pastures of the wilderness do drop; and the hills are girded with joy.

jps.text: The pastures of the wilderness do drop; and the hills are girded with joy.

verses.hebrewText: לָבְשׁ֬וּ כָרִ֨ים ׀ הַצֹּ֗אן וַעֲמָקִ֥ים יַֽעַטְפוּ־בָ֑ר יִ֝תְרֹועֲע֗וּ אַף־יָשִֽׁירוּ׃
verses.englishText: The meadows are clothed with flocks; the valleys also are covered over with corn; they shout for joy, yea, they sing.

jps.text: The meadows are clothed with flocks; the valleys also are covered over with corn; they shout for joy, yea, they sing.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ שִׁ֣יר מִזְמֹ֑ור הָרִ֥יעוּ לֵ֝אלֹהִים כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Song, a Psalm. Shout unto God, all the earth;

jps.text: For the Leader. A Song, a Psalm. Shout unto God, all the earth;

verses.hebrewText: זַמְּר֥וּ כְבֹֽוד־שְׁמֹ֑ו שִׂ֥ימוּ כָ֝בֹ֗וד תְּהִלָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Sing praises unto the glory of His name; make His praise glorious.

jps.text: Sing praises unto the glory of His name; make His praise glorious.

verses.hebrewText: אִמְר֣וּ לֵ֭אלֹהִים מַה־נֹּורָ֣א מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ בְּרֹ֥ב עֻ֝זְּךָ֗ יְֽכַחֲשׁ֖וּ לְךָ֣ אֹיְבֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Say unto God: 'How tremendous is Thy work! Through the greatness of Thy power shall Thine enemies dwindle away before Thee.

jps.text: Say unto God: 'How tremendous is Thy work! Through the greatness of Thy power shall Thine enemies dwindle away before Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הָאָ֤רֶץ ׀ יִשְׁתַּחֲו֣וּ לְ֭ךָ וִֽיזַמְּרוּ־לָ֑ךְ יְזַמְּר֖וּ שִׁמְךָ֣ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: All the earth shall worship Thee, and shall sing praises unto Thee; they shall sing praises to Thy name.' Selah

jps.text: All the earth shall worship Thee, and shall sing praises unto Thee; they shall sing praises to Thy name.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: לְכ֣וּ וּ֭רְאוּ מִפְעֲלֹ֣ות אֱלֹהִ֑ים נֹורָ֥א עֲ֝לִילָ֗ה עַל־בְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Come, and see the works of God; He is terrible in His doing toward the children of men.

jps.text: Come, and see the works of God; He is terrible in His doing toward the children of men.

verses.hebrewText: הָ֤פַךְ יָ֨ם ׀ לְֽיַבָּשָׁ֗ה בַּ֭נָּהָר יַֽעַבְר֣וּ בְרָ֑גֶל שָׁ֝֗ם נִשְׂמְחָה־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He turned the sea into dry land; they went through the river on foot; there let us rejoice in Him!

jps.text: He turned the sea into dry land; they went through the river on foot; there let us rejoice in Him!

verses.hebrewText: מֹ֘שֵׁ֤ל בִּגְבוּרָתֹ֨ו ׀ עֹולָ֗ם עֵ֭ינָיו בַּגֹּויִ֣ם תִּצְפֶּ֑ינָה הַסֹּורְרִ֓ים ׀ אַל־*יָרִימוּ (יָר֖וּמוּ) לָ֣מֹו סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Who ruleth by His might for ever; His eyes keep watch upon the nations; let not the rebellious exalt themselves. Selah

jps.text: Who ruleth by His might for ever; His eyes keep watch upon the nations; let not the rebellious exalt themselves. Selah

verses.hebrewText: בָּרְכ֖וּ עַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ וְ֝הַשְׁמִ֗יעוּ קֹ֣ול תְּהִלָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Bless our God, ye peoples, and make the voice of His praise to be heard;

jps.text: Bless our God, ye peoples, and make the voice of His praise to be heard;

verses.hebrewText: הַשָּׂ֣ם נַ֭פְשֵׁנוּ בַּֽחַיִּ֑ים וְלֹֽא־נָתַ֖ן לַמֹּ֣וט רַגְלֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Who hath set our soul in life, and suffered not our foot to be moved,

jps.text: Who hath set our soul in life, and suffered not our foot to be moved,

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־בְחַנְתָּ֥נוּ אֱלֹהִ֑ים צְ֝רַפְתָּ֗נוּ כִּצְרָף־כָּֽסֶף׃
verses.englishText: For Thou, O God, hast tried us; Thou hast refined us, as silver is refined.

jps.text: For Thou, O God, hast tried us; Thou hast refined us, as silver is refined.

verses.hebrewText: הֲבֵאתָ֥נוּ בַמְּצוּדָ֑ה שַׂ֖מְתָּ מוּעָקָ֣ה בְמָתְנֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst bring us into the hold; Thou didst lay constraint upon our loins.

jps.text: Thou didst bring us into the hold; Thou didst lay constraint upon our loins.

verses.hebrewText: הִרְכַּ֥בְתָּ אֱנֹ֗ושׁ לְרֹ֫אשֵׁ֥נוּ בָּֽאנוּ־בָאֵ֥שׁ וּבַמַּ֑יִם וַ֝תֹּוצִיאֵ֗נוּ לָֽרְוָיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast caused men to ride over our heads; we went through fire and through water; but Thou didst bring us out unto abundance.

jps.text: Thou hast caused men to ride over our heads; we went through fire and through water; but Thou didst bring us out unto abundance.

verses.hebrewText: אָבֹ֣וא בֵיתְךָ֣ בְעֹולֹ֑ות אֲשַׁלֵּ֖ם לְךָ֣ נְדָרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will come into Thy house with burnt-offerings, I will perform unto Thee my vows,
