jps.text: I will come into Thy house with burnt-offerings, I will perform unto Thee my vows,

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־פָּצ֥וּ שְׂפָתָ֑י וְדִבֶּר־פִּ֝֗י בַּצַּר־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Which my lips have uttered, and my mouth hath spoken, when I was in distress.

jps.text: Which my lips have uttered, and my mouth hath spoken, when I was in distress.

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֘לֹ֤ות מֵחִ֣ים אַעֲלֶה־לָּ֭ךְ עִם־קְטֹ֣רֶת אֵילִ֑ים אֶ֥עֱשֶֽׂה בָקָ֖ר עִם־עַתּוּדִ֣ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: I will offer unto Thee burnt-offerings of fatlings, with the sweet smoke of rams; I will offer bullocks with goats. Selah

jps.text: I will offer unto Thee burnt-offerings of fatlings, with the sweet smoke of rams; I will offer bullocks with goats. Selah

verses.hebrewText: לְכֽוּ־שִׁמְע֣וּ וַ֭אֲסַפְּרָה כָּל־יִרְאֵ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר עָשָׂ֣ה לְנַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Come, and hearken, all ye that fear God, and I will declare what He hath done for my soul.

jps.text: Come, and hearken, all ye that fear God, and I will declare what He hath done for my soul.

verses.hebrewText: אֵלָ֥יו פִּֽי־קָרָ֑אתִי וְ֝רֹומַ֗ם תַּ֣חַת לְשֹׁונִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I cried unto Him with my mouth, and He was extolled with my tongue.

jps.text: I cried unto Him with my mouth, and He was extolled with my tongue.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭וֶן אִם־רָאִ֣יתִי בְלִבִּ֑י לֹ֖א יִשְׁמַ֣ע ׀ אֲדֹנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: If I had regarded iniquity in my heart, the Lord would not hear;

jps.text: If I had regarded iniquity in my heart, the Lord would not hear;

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭כֵן שָׁמַ֣ע אֱלֹהִ֑ים הִ֝קְשִׁ֗יב בְּקֹ֣ול תְּפִלָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But verily God hath heard; He hath attended to the voice of my prayer.

jps.text: But verily God hath heard; He hath attended to the voice of my prayer.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֥וּךְ אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־הֵסִ֘יר תְּפִלָּתִ֥י וְ֝חַסְדֹּ֗ו מֵאִתִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be God, who hath not turned away my prayer, nor His mercy from me.

jps.text: Blessed be God, who hath not turned away my prayer, nor His mercy from me.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥ח בִּנְגִינֹ֗ת מִזְמֹ֥ור שִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm, a Song.

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm, a Song.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֗ים יְחָנֵּ֥נוּ וִֽיבָרְכֵ֑נוּ יָ֤אֵ֥ר פָּנָ֖יו אִתָּ֣נוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: God be gracious unto us, and bless us; may He cause His face to shine toward us; Selah

jps.text: God be gracious unto us, and bless us; may He cause His face to shine toward us; Selah

verses.hebrewText: לָדַ֣עַת בָּאָ֣רֶץ דַּרְכֶּ֑ךָ בְּכָל־גֹּ֝ויִ֗ם יְשׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: That Thy way may be known upon earth, Thy salvation among all nations.

jps.text: That Thy way may be known upon earth, Thy salvation among all nations.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֖וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֱלֹהִ֑ים יֹ֝וד֗וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, O God; let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, all of them.

jps.text: Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, O God; let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, all of them.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽשְׂמְח֥וּ וִֽירַנְּנ֗וּ לְאֻ֫מִּ֥ים כִּֽי־תִשְׁפֹּ֣ט עַמִּ֣ים מִישֹׁ֑ור וּלְאֻמִּ֓ים ׀ בָּאָ֖רֶץ תַּנְחֵ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: O let the nations be glad and sing for joy; for Thou wilt judge the peoples with equity, and lead the nations upon earth. Selah

jps.text: O let the nations be glad and sing for joy; for Thou wilt judge the peoples with equity, and lead the nations upon earth. Selah

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֖וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֱלֹהִ֑ים יֹ֝וד֗וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, O God; let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, all of them.

jps.text: Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, O God; let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, all of them.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭רֶץ נָתְנָ֣ה יְבוּלָ֑הּ יְ֝בָרְכֵ֗נוּ אֱלֹהִ֥ים אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: The earth hath yielded her increase; may God, our own God, bless us.

jps.text: The earth hath yielded her increase; may God, our own God, bless us.

verses.hebrewText: יְבָרְכֵ֥נוּ אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְיִֽירְא֥וּ אֹ֝תֹ֗ו כָּל־אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: May God bless us; and let all the ends of the earth fear Him.

jps.text: May God bless us; and let all the ends of the earth fear Him.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ לְדָוִ֗ד מִזְמֹ֥ור שִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David, a Song.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David, a Song.

verses.hebrewText: יָק֣וּם אֱ֭לֹהִים יָפ֣וּצוּ אֹויְבָ֑יו וְיָנ֥וּסוּ מְ֝שַׂנְאָ֗יו מִפָּנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Let God arise, let His enemies be scattered; and let them that hate Him flee before Him.

jps.text: Let God arise, let His enemies be scattered; and let them that hate Him flee before Him.

verses.hebrewText: כְּהִנְדֹּ֥ף עָשָׁ֗ן תִּ֫נְדֹּ֥ף כְּהִמֵּ֣ס דֹּ֭ונַג מִפְּנֵי־אֵ֑שׁ יֹאבְד֥וּ רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים מִפְּנֵ֥י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: As smoke is driven away, so drive them away; as wax melteth before the fire, so let the wicked perish at the presence of God.

jps.text: As smoke is driven away, so drive them away; as wax melteth before the fire, so let the wicked perish at the presence of God.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽצַדִּיקִ֗ים יִשְׂמְח֣וּ יַֽ֭עַלְצוּ לִפְנֵ֥י אֱלֹהִ֗ים וְיָשִׂ֥ישׂוּ בְשִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: But let the righteous be glad, let them exult before God; yea, let them rejoice with gladness.

jps.text: But let the righteous be glad, let them exult before God; yea, let them rejoice with gladness.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֤ירוּ ׀ לֵֽאלֹהִים֮ זַמְּר֪וּ שְׁ֫מֹ֥ו סֹ֡לּוּ לָרֹכֵ֣ב בָּ֭עֲרָבֹות בְּיָ֥הּ שְׁמֹ֗ו וְעִלְז֥וּ לְפָנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Sing unto God, sing praises to His name; extol Him that rideth upon the skies, whose name is the LORD; and exult ye before Him.

jps.text: Sing unto God, sing praises to His name; extol Him that rideth upon the skies, whose name is the LORD; and exult ye before Him.

verses.hebrewText: אֲבִ֣י יְ֭תֹומִים וְדַיַּ֣ן אַלְמָנֹ֑ות אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים בִּמְעֹ֥ון קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: A father of the fatherless, and a judge of the widows, is God in His holy habitation.

jps.text: A father of the fatherless, and a judge of the widows, is God in His holy habitation.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ מֹ֘ושִׁ֤יב יְחִידִ֨ים ׀ בַּ֗יְתָה מֹוצִ֣יא אֲ֭סִירִים בַּכֹּושָׁרֹ֑ות אַ֥ךְ סֹ֝ורֲרִ֗ים שָׁכְנ֥וּ צְחִיחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: God maketh the solitary to dwell in a house; He bringeth out the prisoners into prosperity; the rebellious dwell but in a parched land.

jps.text: God maketh the solitary to dwell in a house; He bringeth out the prisoners into prosperity; the rebellious dwell but in a parched land.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים בְּ֭צֵאתְךָ לִפְנֵ֣י עַמֶּ֑ךָ בְּצַעְדְּךָ֖ בִֽישִׁימֹ֣ון סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: O God, when Thou wentest forth before Thy people, when Thou didst march through the wilderness; Selah

jps.text: O God, when Thou wentest forth before Thy people, when Thou didst march through the wilderness; Selah

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֤רֶץ רָעָ֨שָׁה ׀ אַף־שָׁמַ֣יִם נָטְפוּ֮ מִפְּנֵ֪י אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים זֶ֥ה סִינַ֑י מִפְּנֵ֥י אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: The earth trembled, the heavens also dropped at the presence of God; even yon Sinai trembled at the presence of God, the God of Israel.

jps.text: The earth trembled, the heavens also dropped at the presence of God; even yon Sinai trembled at the presence of God, the God of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: גֶּ֣שֶׁם נְ֭דָבֹות תָּנִ֣יף אֱלֹהִ֑ים נַחֲלָתְךָ֥ וְ֝נִלְאָ֗ה אַתָּ֥ה כֹֽונַנְתּֽ͏ָהּ׃
verses.englishText: A bounteous rain didst Thou pour down, O God; when Thine inheritance was weary, Thou didst confirm it.

jps.text: A bounteous rain didst Thou pour down, O God; when Thine inheritance was weary, Thou didst confirm it.

verses.hebrewText: חַיָּתְךָ֥ יָֽשְׁבוּ־בָ֑הּ תָּ֤כִ֥ין בְּטֹובָתְךָ֖ לֶעָנִ֣י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thy flock settled therein; Thou didst prepare in Thy goodness for the poor, O God.

jps.text: Thy flock settled therein; Thou didst prepare in Thy goodness for the poor, O God.

verses.hebrewText: אֲדֹנָ֥י יִתֶּן־אֹ֑מֶר הַֽ֝מְבַשְּׂרֹ֗ות צָבָ֥א רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: The Lord giveth the word; the women that proclaim the tidings are a great host.

jps.text: The Lord giveth the word; the women that proclaim the tidings are a great host.

verses.hebrewText: מַלְכֵ֣י צְ֭בָאֹות יִדֹּד֣וּן יִדֹּד֑וּן וּנְוַת בַּ֝֗יִת תְּחַלֵּ֥ק שָׁלָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Kings of armies flee, they flee; and she that tarrieth at home divideth the spoil.

jps.text: Kings of armies flee, they flee; and she that tarrieth at home divideth the spoil.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽם־תִּשְׁכְּבוּן֮ בֵּ֪ין שְׁפַ֫תָּ֥יִם כַּנְפֵ֣י יֹ֭ונָה נֶחְפָּ֣ה בַכֶּ֑סֶף וְ֝אֶבְרֹותֶ֗יהָ בִּֽירַקְרַ֥ק חָרֽוּץ׃
verses.englishText: When ye lie among the sheepfolds, the wings of the dove are covered with silver, and her pinions with the shimmer of gold.

jps.text: When ye lie among the sheepfolds, the wings of the dove are covered with silver, and her pinions with the shimmer of gold.

verses.hebrewText: בְּפָ֘רֵ֤שׂ שַׁדַּ֓י מְלָ֘כִ֤ים בָּ֗הּ תַּשְׁלֵ֥ג בְּצַלְמֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: When the Almighty scattereth kings therein, it snoweth in Zalmon.

jps.text: When the Almighty scattereth kings therein, it snoweth in Zalmon.

verses.hebrewText: הַר־אֱ֭לֹהִים הַר־בָּשָׁ֑ן הַ֥ר גַּ֝בְנֻנִּ֗ים הַר־בָּשָֽׁן׃
verses.englishText: A mountain of God is the mountain of Bashan; a mountain of peaks is the mountain of Bashan.

jps.text: A mountain of God is the mountain of Bashan; a mountain of peaks is the mountain of Bashan.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֤מָּה ׀ תְּֽרַצְּדוּן֮ הָרִ֪ים גַּבְנֻ֫נִּ֥ים הָהָ֗ר חָמַ֣ד אֱלֹהִ֣ים לְשִׁבְתֹּ֑ו אַף־יְ֝הוָ֗ה יִשְׁכֹּ֥ן לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.englishText: Why look ye askance, ye mountains of peaks, at the mountain which God hath desired for His abode? Yea, the LORD will dwell therein for ever.

jps.text: Why look ye askance, ye mountains of peaks, at the mountain which God hath desired for His abode? Yea, the LORD will dwell therein for ever.

verses.hebrewText: רֶ֤כֶב אֱלֹהִ֗ים רִבֹּתַ֣יִם אַלְפֵ֣י שִׁנְאָ֑ן אֲדֹנָ֥י בָ֝֗ם סִינַ֥י בַּקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: The chariots of God are myriads, even thousands upon thousands; the Lord is among them, as in Sinai, in holiness.

jps.text: The chariots of God are myriads, even thousands upon thousands; the Lord is among them, as in Sinai, in holiness.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֘לִ֤יתָ לַמָּרֹ֨ום ׀ שָׁ֘בִ֤יתָ שֶּׁ֗בִי לָקַ֣חְתָּ מַ֭תָּנֹות בָּאָדָ֑ם וְאַ֥ף סֹ֝ורְרִ֗ים לִשְׁכֹּ֤ן ׀ יָ֬הּ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast ascended on high, Thou hast led captivity captive; Thou hast received gifts among men, yea, among the rebellious also, that the LORD God might dwell there.

jps.text: Thou hast ascended on high, Thou hast led captivity captive; Thou hast received gifts among men, yea, among the rebellious also, that the LORD God might dwell there.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֤ר֣וּךְ אֲדֹנָי֮ יֹ֤ום ׀ יֹ֥ום יַֽעֲמָס־לָ֗נוּ הָ֘אֵ֤ל יְֽשׁוּעָתֵ֬נוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the Lord, day by day He beareth our burden, even the God who is our salvation. Selah

jps.text: Blessed be the Lord, day by day He beareth our burden, even the God who is our salvation. Selah

verses.hebrewText: הָ֤אֵ֣ל ׀ לָנוּ֮ אֵ֤ל לְֽמֹושָׁ֫עֹ֥ות וְלֵיהוִ֥ה אֲדֹנָ֑י לַ֝מָּ֗וֶת תֹּוצָאֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: God is unto us a God of deliverances; and unto GOD the Lord belong the issues of death.

jps.text: God is unto us a God of deliverances; and unto GOD the Lord belong the issues of death.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִמְחַץ֮ רֹ֤אשׁ אֹ֫יְבָ֥יו קָדְקֹ֥ד שֵׂעָ֑ר מִ֝תְהַלֵּ֗ךְ בַּאֲשָׁמָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Surely God will smite through the head of His enemies, the hairy scalp of him that goeth about in his guiltiness.

jps.text: Surely God will smite through the head of His enemies, the hairy scalp of him that goeth about in his guiltiness.

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣ר אֲ֭דֹנָי מִבָּשָׁ֣ן אָשִׁ֑יב אָ֝שִׁ֗יב מִֽמְּצֻלֹ֥ות יָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The Lord said: 'I will bring back from Bashan, I will bring them back from the depths of the sea;

jps.text: The Lord said: 'I will bring back from Bashan, I will bring them back from the depths of the sea;

verses.hebrewText: לְמַ֤עַן ׀ תִּֽמְחַ֥ץ רַגְלְךָ֗ בְּ֫דָ֥ם לְשֹׁ֥ון כְּלָבֶ֑יךָ מֵאֹיְבִ֥ים מִנֵּֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: That thy foot may wade through blood, that the tongue of thy dogs may have its portion from thine enemies.'

jps.text: That thy foot may wade through blood, that the tongue of thy dogs may have its portion from thine enemies.'

verses.hebrewText: רָא֣וּ הֲלִיכֹותֶ֣יךָ אֱלֹהִ֑ים הֲלִ֘יכֹ֤ות אֵלִ֖י מַלְכִּ֣י בַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: They see Thy goings, O God, even the goings of my God, my King, in holiness.

jps.text: They see Thy goings, O God, even the goings of my God, my King, in holiness.

verses.hebrewText: קִדְּמ֣וּ שָׁ֭רִים אַחַ֣ר נֹגְנִ֑ים בְּתֹ֥וךְ עֲ֝לָמֹ֗ות תֹּופֵפֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: The singers go before, the minstrels follow after, in the midst of damsels playing upon timbrels.

jps.text: The singers go before, the minstrels follow after, in the midst of damsels playing upon timbrels.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽ֭מַקְהֵלֹות בָּרְכ֣וּ אֱלֹהִ֑ים יְ֝הוָ֗ה מִמְּקֹ֥ור יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: 'Bless ye God in full assemblies, even the Lord, ye that are from the fountain of Israel.'

jps.text: 'Bless ye God in full assemblies, even the Lord, ye that are from the fountain of Israel.'

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤ם בִּנְיָמִ֨ן ׀ צָעִ֡יר רֹדֵ֗ם שָׂרֵ֣י יְ֭הוּדָה רִגְמָתָ֑ם שָׂרֵ֥י זְ֝בֻל֗וּן שָׂרֵ֥י נַפְתָּלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: There is Benjamin, the youngest, ruling them, the princes of Judah their council, the princes of Zebulun, the princes of Naphtali.

jps.text: There is Benjamin, the youngest, ruling them, the princes of Judah their council, the princes of Zebulun, the princes of Naphtali.

verses.hebrewText: צִוָּ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֗יךָ עֻ֫זֶּ֥ךָ עוּזָּ֥ה אֱלֹהִ֑ים ז֝֗וּ פָּעַ֥לְתָּ לָּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thy God hath commanded thy strength; be strong, O God, Thou that hast wrought for us

jps.text: Thy God hath commanded thy strength; be strong, O God, Thou that hast wrought for us

verses.hebrewText: מֵֽ֭הֵיכָלֶךָ עַל־יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם לְךָ֤ יֹובִ֖ילוּ מְלָכִ֣ים שָֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Out of Thy temple at Jerusalem, whither kings shall bring presents unto Thee.

jps.text: Out of Thy temple at Jerusalem, whither kings shall bring presents unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: גְּעַ֨ר חַיַּ֪ת קָנֶ֡ה עֲדַ֤ת אַבִּירִ֨ים ׀ בְּעֶגְלֵ֬י עַמִּ֗ים מִתְרַפֵּ֥ס בְּרַצֵּי־כָ֑סֶף בִּזַּ֥ר עַ֝מִּ֗ים קְרָבֹ֥ות יֶחְפָּֽצוּ׃
verses.englishText: Rebuke the wild beast of the reeds, the multitude of the bulls, with the calves of the peoples, every one submitting himself with pieces of silver; He hath scattered the peoples that delight in war!

jps.text: Rebuke the wild beast of the reeds, the multitude of the bulls, with the calves of the peoples, every one submitting himself with pieces of silver; He hath scattered the peoples that delight in war!

verses.hebrewText: יֶאֱתָ֣יוּ חַ֭שְׁמַנִּים מִנִּ֣י מִצְרָ֑יִם כּ֥וּשׁ תָּרִ֥יץ יָ֝דָ֗יו לֵאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Nobles shall come out of Egypt; Ethiopia shall hasten to stretch out her hands unto God.

jps.text: Nobles shall come out of Egypt; Ethiopia shall hasten to stretch out her hands unto God.

verses.hebrewText: מַמְלְכֹ֣ות הָ֭אָרֶץ שִׁ֣ירוּ לֵאלֹהִ֑ים זַמְּר֖וּ אֲדֹנָ֣י סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Sing unto God, ye kingdoms of the earth; O sing praises unto the Lord; Selah

jps.text: Sing unto God, ye kingdoms of the earth; O sing praises unto the Lord; Selah

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭רֹכֵב בִּשְׁמֵ֣י שְׁמֵי־קֶ֑דֶם הֵ֥ן יִתֵּ֥ן בְּ֝קֹולֹו קֹ֣ול עֹֽז׃
verses.englishText: To Him that rideth upon the heavens of heavens, which are of old; lo, He uttereth His voice, a mighty voice.

jps.text: To Him that rideth upon the heavens of heavens, which are of old; lo, He uttereth His voice, a mighty voice.

verses.hebrewText: תְּנ֥וּ עֹ֗ז לֵֽאלֹ֫הִ֥ים עַֽל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל גַּאֲוָתֹ֑ו וְ֝עֻזֹּ֗ו בַּשְּׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Ascribe ye strength unto God; His majesty is over Israel, and His strength is in the skies.

jps.text: Ascribe ye strength unto God; His majesty is over Israel, and His strength is in the skies.

verses.hebrewText: נֹ֤ורָ֥א אֱלֹהִ֗ים מִֽמִּקְדָּ֫שֶׁ֥יךָ אֵ֤ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל ה֤וּא נֹתֵ֨ן ׀ עֹ֖ז וְתַעֲצֻמֹ֥ות לָעָ֗ם בָּר֥וּךְ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Awful is God out of thy holy places; the God of Israel, He giveth strength and power unto the people; blessed be God.

jps.text: Awful is God out of thy holy places; the God of Israel, He giveth strength and power unto the people; blessed be God.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ עַֽל־שֹׁושַׁנִּ֬ים לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: הֹושִׁיעֵ֥נִי אֱלֹהִ֑ים כִּ֤י בָ֖אוּ מַ֣יִם עַד־נָֽפֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Save me, O God; for the waters are come in even unto the soul.

jps.text: Save me, O God; for the waters are come in even unto the soul.

verses.hebrewText: טָבַ֤עְתִּי ׀ בִּיוֵ֣ן מְ֭צוּלָה וְאֵ֣ין מָעֳמָ֑ד בָּ֥אתִי בְמַעֲמַקֵּי־מַ֝֗יִם וְשִׁבֹּ֥לֶת שְׁטָפָֽתְנִי׃
verses.englishText: I am sunk in deep mire, where there is no standing; I am come into deep waters, and the flood overwhelmeth me.

jps.text: I am sunk in deep mire, where there is no standing; I am come into deep waters, and the flood overwhelmeth me.

verses.hebrewText: יָגַ֣עְתִּי בְקָרְאִי֮ נִחַ֪ר גְּרֹ֫ונִ֥י כָּל֥וּ עֵינַ֑י מְ֝יַחֵ֗ל לֵאלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I am weary of my crying; my throat is dried; mine eyes fail while I wait for my God.

jps.text: I am weary of my crying; my throat is dried; mine eyes fail while I wait for my God.

verses.hebrewText: רַבּ֤וּ ׀ מִשַּׂעֲרֹ֣ות רֹאשִׁי֮ שֹׂנְאַ֪י חִ֫נָּ֥ם עָצְמ֣וּ מַ֭צְמִיתַי אֹיְבַ֣י שֶׁ֑קֶר אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־גָ֝זַ֗לְתִּי אָ֣ז אָשִֽׁיב׃
verses.englishText: They that hate me without a cause are more than the hairs of my head; they that would cut me off, being mine enemies wrongfully, are many; should I restore that which I took not away?

jps.text: They that hate me without a cause are more than the hairs of my head; they that would cut me off, being mine enemies wrongfully, are many; should I restore that which I took not away?

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים אַתָּ֣ה יָ֭דַעְתָּ לְאִוַּלְתִּ֑י וְ֝אַשְׁמֹותַ֗י מִמְּךָ֥ לֹא־נִכְחָֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: O God, Thou knowest my folly; and my trespasses are not hid from Thee.

jps.text: O God, Thou knowest my folly; and my trespasses are not hid from Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יֵ֘בֹ֤שׁוּ בִ֨י ׀ קֹוֶיךָ֮ אֲדֹנָ֥י יְהוִ֗ה צְבָ֫אֹ֥ות אַל־יִכָּ֣לְמוּ בִ֣י מְבַקְשֶׁ֑יךָ אֱ֝לֹהֵ֗י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Let not them that wait for Thee be ashamed through me, O Lord GOD of hosts; let not those that seek Thee be brought to confusion through me, O God of Israel.

jps.text: Let not them that wait for Thee be ashamed through me, O Lord GOD of hosts; let not those that seek Thee be brought to confusion through me, O God of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עָ֭לֶיךָ נָשָׂ֣אתִי חֶרְפָּ֑ה כִּסְּתָ֖ה כְלִמָּ֣ה פָנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Because for Thy sake I have borne reproach; confusion hath covered my face.

jps.text: Because for Thy sake I have borne reproach; confusion hath covered my face.

verses.hebrewText: מ֖וּזָר הָיִ֣יתִי לְאֶחָ֑י וְ֝נָכְרִ֗י לִבְנֵ֥י אִמִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I am become a stranger unto my brethren, and an alien unto my mother's children.

jps.text: I am become a stranger unto my brethren, and an alien unto my mother's children.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־קִנְאַ֣ת בֵּיתְךָ֣ אֲכָלָ֑תְנִי וְחֶרְפֹּ֥ות חֹ֝ורְפֶ֗יךָ נָפְל֥וּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Because zeal for Thy house hath eaten me up, and the reproaches of them that reproach Thee are fallen upon me.

jps.text: Because zeal for Thy house hath eaten me up, and the reproaches of them that reproach Thee are fallen upon me.

verses.hebrewText: וָאֶבְכֶּ֣ה בַצֹּ֣ום נַפְשִׁ֑י וַתְּהִ֖י לַחֲרָפֹ֣ות לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And I wept with my soul fasting, and that became unto me a reproach.

jps.text: And I wept with my soul fasting, and that became unto me a reproach.

verses.hebrewText: וָאֶתְּנָ֣ה לְבוּשִׁ֣י שָׂ֑ק וָאֱהִ֖י לָהֶ֣ם לְמָשָֽׁל׃
verses.englishText: I made sackcloth also my garment, and I became a byword unto them.

jps.text: I made sackcloth also my garment, and I became a byword unto them.

verses.hebrewText: יָשִׂ֣יחוּ בִ֭י יֹ֣שְׁבֵי שָׁ֑עַר וּ֝נְגִינֹ֗ות שֹׁותֵ֥י שֵׁכָֽר׃
verses.englishText: They that sit in the gate talk of me; and I am the song of the drunkards.

jps.text: They that sit in the gate talk of me; and I am the song of the drunkards.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י תְפִלָּתִֽי־לְךָ֨ ׀ יְהוָ֡ה עֵ֤ת רָצֹ֗ון אֱלֹהִ֥ים בְּרָב־חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ עֲ֝נֵ֗נִי בֶּאֱמֶ֥ת יִשְׁעֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, let my prayer be unto Thee, O LORD, in an acceptable time; O God, in the abundance of Thy mercy, answer me with the truth of Thy salvation.

jps.text: But as for me, let my prayer be unto Thee, O LORD, in an acceptable time; O God, in the abundance of Thy mercy, answer me with the truth of Thy salvation.

verses.hebrewText: הַצִּילֵ֣נִי מִ֭טִּיט וְאַל־אֶטְבָּ֑עָה אִנָּצְלָ֥ה מִ֝שֹּֽׂנְאַ֗י וּמִמַּֽעֲמַקֵּי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink; let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.

jps.text: Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink; let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּשְׁטְפֵ֤נִי ׀ שִׁבֹּ֣לֶת מַ֭יִם וְאַל־תִּבְלָעֵ֣נִי מְצוּלָ֑ה וְאַל־תֶּאְטַר־עָלַ֖י בְּאֵ֣ר פִּֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Let not the waterflood overwhelm me, neither let the deep swallow me up; and let not the pit shut her mouth upon me.

jps.text: Let not the waterflood overwhelm me, neither let the deep swallow me up; and let not the pit shut her mouth upon me.

verses.hebrewText: עֲנֵ֣נִי יְ֭הוָה כִּי־טֹ֣וב חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ כְּרֹ֥ב רַ֝חֲמֶ֗יךָ פְּנֵ֣ה אֵלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Answer me, O LORD, for Thy mercy is good; according to the multitude of Thy compassions turn Thou unto me.

jps.text: Answer me, O LORD, for Thy mercy is good; according to the multitude of Thy compassions turn Thou unto me.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַל־תַּסְתֵּ֣ר פָּ֭נֶיךָ מֵֽעַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּֽי־צַר־לִ֝֗י מַהֵ֥ר עֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: And hide not Thy face from Thy servant; for I am in distress; answer me speedily.

jps.text: And hide not Thy face from Thy servant; for I am in distress; answer me speedily.

verses.hebrewText: קָרְבָ֣ה אֶל־נַפְשִׁ֣י גְאָלָ֑הּ לְמַ֖עַן אֹיְבַ֣י פְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Draw nigh unto my soul, and redeem it; ransom me because of mine enemies.

jps.text: Draw nigh unto my soul, and redeem it; ransom me because of mine enemies.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה יָדַ֗עְתָּ חֶרְפָּתִ֣י וּ֭בָשְׁתִּי וּכְלִמָּתִ֑י נֶ֝גְדְּךָ֗ כָּל־צֹורְרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thou knowest my reproach, and my shame, and my confusion; mine adversaries are all before Thee.

jps.text: Thou knowest my reproach, and my shame, and my confusion; mine adversaries are all before Thee.

verses.hebrewText: חֶרְפָּ֤ה ׀ שָֽׁבְרָ֥ה לִבִּ֗י וָֽאָ֫נ֥וּשָׁה וָאֲקַוֶּ֣ה לָנ֣וּד וָאַ֑יִן וְ֝לַמְנַחֲמִ֗ים וְלֹ֣א מָצָֽאתִי׃
verses.englishText: Reproach hath broken my heart; and I am sore sick; and I looked for some to show compassion, but there was none; and for comforters, but I found none.

jps.text: Reproach hath broken my heart; and I am sore sick; and I looked for some to show compassion, but there was none; and for comforters, but I found none.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְּנ֣וּ בְּבָרוּתִ֣י רֹ֑אשׁ וְ֝לִצְמָאִ֗י יַשְׁק֥וּנִי חֹֽמֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, they put poison into my food; and in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.

jps.text: Yea, they put poison into my food; and in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִֽי־שֻׁלְחָנָ֣ם לִפְנֵיהֶ֣ם לְפָ֑ח וְלִשְׁלֹומִ֥ים לְמֹוקֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Let their table before them become a snare; and when they are in peace, let it become a trap.

jps.text: Let their table before them become a snare; and when they are in peace, let it become a trap.

verses.hebrewText: תֶּחְשַׁ֣כְנָה עֵ֭ינֵיהֶם מֵרְאֹ֑ות וּ֝מָתְנֵ֗יהֶם תָּמִ֥יד הַמְעַֽד׃
verses.englishText: Let their eyes be darkened, that they see not; and make their loins continually to totter.

jps.text: Let their eyes be darkened, that they see not; and make their loins continually to totter.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁפָךְ־עֲלֵיהֶ֥ם זַעְמֶ֑ךָ וַחֲרֹ֥ון אַ֝פְּךָ֗ יַשִּׂיגֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Pour out Thine indignation upon them, and let the fierceness of Thine anger overtake them.

jps.text: Pour out Thine indignation upon them, and let the fierceness of Thine anger overtake them.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהִי־טִֽירָתָ֥ם נְשַׁמָּ֑ה בְּ֝אָהֳלֵיהֶ֗ם אַל־יְהִ֥י יֹשֵֽׁב׃
verses.englishText: Let their encampment be desolate; let none dwell in their tents.

jps.text: Let their encampment be desolate; let none dwell in their tents.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה אֲשֶׁר־הִכִּ֣יתָ רָדָ֑פוּ וְאֶל־מַכְאֹ֖וב חֲלָלֶ֣יךָ יְסַפֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: For they persecute him whom Thou hast smitten; and they tell of the pain of those whom Thou hast wounded.

jps.text: For they persecute him whom Thou hast smitten; and they tell of the pain of those whom Thou hast wounded.

verses.hebrewText: תְּֽנָה־עָ֭וֹן עַל־עֲוֹנָ֑ם וְאַל־יָ֝בֹ֗אוּ בְּצִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Add iniquity unto their iniquity; and let them not come into Thy righteousness.

jps.text: Add iniquity unto their iniquity; and let them not come into Thy righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭מָּחֽוּ מִסֵּ֣פֶר חַיִּ֑ים וְעִ֥ם צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים אַל־יִכָּתֵֽבוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them be blotted out of the book of the living, and not be written with the righteous.

jps.text: Let them be blotted out of the book of the living, and not be written with the righteous.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭אֲנִי עָנִ֣י וְכֹואֵ֑ב יְשׁוּעָתְךָ֖ אֱלֹהִ֣ים תְּשַׂגְּבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: But I am afflicted and in pain; let Thy salvation, O God, set me up on high.

jps.text: But I am afflicted and in pain; let Thy salvation, O God, set me up on high.

verses.hebrewText: אֲהַֽלְלָ֣ה שֵׁם־אֱלֹהִ֣ים בְּשִׁ֑יר וַאֲגַדְּלֶ֥נּוּ בְתֹודָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I will praise the name of God with a song, and will magnify Him with thanksgiving.

jps.text: I will praise the name of God with a song, and will magnify Him with thanksgiving.

verses.hebrewText: וְתִיטַ֣ב לַֽ֭יהוָה מִשֹּׁ֥ור פָּ֗ר מַקְרִ֥ן מַפְרִֽיס׃
verses.englishText: And it shall please the LORD better than a bullock that hath horns and hoofs.

jps.text: And it shall please the LORD better than a bullock that hath horns and hoofs.

verses.hebrewText: רָא֣וּ עֲנָוִ֣ים יִשְׂמָ֑חוּ דֹּרְשֵׁ֥י אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים וִיחִ֥י לְבַבְכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The humble shall see it, and be glad; ye that seek after God, let your heart revive.

jps.text: The humble shall see it, and be glad; ye that seek after God, let your heart revive.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שֹׁמֵ֣עַ אֶל־אֶבְיֹונִ֣ים יְהוָ֑ה וְאֶת־אֲ֝סִירָ֗יו לֹ֣א בָזָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD hearkeneth unto the needy, and despiseth not His prisoners.

jps.text: For the LORD hearkeneth unto the needy, and despiseth not His prisoners.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽ֭הַלְלוּהוּ שָׁמַ֣יִם וָאָ֑רֶץ יַ֝מִּ֗ים וְֽכָל־רֹמֵ֥שׂ בָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let heaven and earth praise Him, the seas, and every thing that moveth therein.

jps.text: Let heaven and earth praise Him, the seas, and every thing that moveth therein.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ יֹ֘ושִׁ֤יעַ צִיֹּ֗ון וְ֭יִבְנֶה עָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וְיָ֥שְׁבוּ שָׁ֝֗ם וִירֵשֽׁוּהָ׃
verses.englishText: For God will save Zion, and build the cities of Judah; and they shall abide there, and have it in possession.

jps.text: For God will save Zion, and build the cities of Judah; and they shall abide there, and have it in possession.

verses.hebrewText: וְזֶ֣רַע עֲ֭בָדָיו יִנְחָל֑וּהָ וְאֹהֲבֵ֥י שְׁ֝מֹ֗ו יִשְׁכְּנוּ־בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: The seed also of His servants shall inherit it; and they that love His name shall dwell therein.

jps.text: The seed also of His servants shall inherit it; and they that love His name shall dwell therein.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֝מְנַצֵּ֗חַ לְדָוִ֥ד לְהַזְכִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David; to make memorial.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David; to make memorial.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֥ים לְהַצִּילֵ֑נִי יְ֝הוָ֗ה לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי חֽוּשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: O God, to deliver me, O LORD, to help me, make haste.

jps.text: O God, to deliver me, O LORD, to help me, make haste.

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ וְיַחְפְּרוּ֮ מְבַקְשֵׁ֪י נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י יִסֹּ֣גוּ אָ֭חֹור וְיִכָּלְמ֑וּ חֲ֝פֵצֵ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and abashed that seek after my soul; let them be turned backward and brought to confusion that delight in my hurt.

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and abashed that seek after my soul; let them be turned backward and brought to confusion that delight in my hurt.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭שׁוּבוּ עַל־עֵ֣קֶב בָּשְׁתָּ֑ם הָ֝אֹמְרִ֗ים הֶ֘אָ֥ח ׀ הֶאָֽח׃
verses.englishText: Let them be turned back by reason of their shame that say: 'Aha, aha.'

jps.text: Let them be turned back by reason of their shame that say: 'Aha, aha.'

verses.hebrewText: יָ֘שִׂ֤ישׂוּ וְיִשְׂמְח֨וּ ׀ בְּךָ֗ כָּֽל־מְבַ֫קְשֶׁ֥יךָ וְיֹאמְר֣וּ תָ֭מִיד יִגְדַּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֹ֝הֲבֵ֗י יְשׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let all those that seek Thee rejoice and be glad in Thee; and let such as love Thy salvation say continually: 'Let God be magnified.'

jps.text: Let all those that seek Thee rejoice and be glad in Thee; and let such as love Thy salvation say continually: 'Let God be magnified.'

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְיֹון֮ אֱלֹהִ֪ים חֽוּשָׁ֫ה־לִּ֥י עֶזְרִ֣י וּמְפַלְטִ֣י אַ֑תָּה יְ֝הוָ֗ה אַל־תְּאַחַֽר׃
verses.englishText: But I am poor and needy; O God, make haste unto me; Thou art my help and my deliverer; O LORD, tarry not.

jps.text: But I am poor and needy; O God, make haste unto me; Thou art my help and my deliverer; O LORD, tarry not.

verses.hebrewText: בְּךָֽ־יְהוָ֥ה חָסִ֑יתִי אַל־אֵבֹ֥ושָׁה לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: In Thee, O LORD, have I taken refuge; let me never be ashamed.

jps.text: In Thee, O LORD, have I taken refuge; let me never be ashamed.

verses.hebrewText: בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֗ תַּצִּילֵ֥נִי וּֽתְפַלְּטֵ֑נִי הַטֵּֽה־אֵלַ֥י אָ֝זְנְךָ֗ וְהֹושִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me in Thy righteousness, and rescue me; incline Thine ear unto me, and save me.

jps.text: Deliver me in Thy righteousness, and rescue me; incline Thine ear unto me, and save me.

verses.hebrewText: הֱיֵ֤ה לִ֨י ׀ לְצ֥וּר מָעֹ֡ון לָבֹ֗וא תָּמִ֗יד צִוִּ֥יתָ לְהֹושִׁיעֵ֑נִי כִּֽי־סַלְעִ֖י וּמְצוּדָתִ֣י אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Be Thou to me a sheltering rock, whereunto I may continually resort, which Thou hast appointed to save me; for Thou art my rock and my fortress.

jps.text: Be Thou to me a sheltering rock, whereunto I may continually resort, which Thou hast appointed to save me; for Thou art my rock and my fortress.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהַ֗י פַּ֭לְּטֵנִי מִיַּ֣ד רָשָׁ֑ע מִכַּ֖ף מְעַוֵּ֣ל וְחֹומֵץ׃
verses.englishText: O my God, rescue me out of the hand of the wicked, out of the grasp of the unrighteous and ruthless man.

jps.text: O my God, rescue me out of the hand of the wicked, out of the grasp of the unrighteous and ruthless man.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה תִקְוָתִ֑י אֲדֹנָ֥י יְ֝הוִ֗ה מִבְטַחִ֥י מִנְּעוּרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art my hope; O Lord GOD, my trust from my youth.

jps.text: For Thou art my hope; O Lord GOD, my trust from my youth.

verses.hebrewText: עָלֶ֤יךָ ׀ נִסְמַ֬כְתִּי מִבֶּ֗טֶן מִמְּעֵ֣י אִ֭מִּי אַתָּ֣ה גֹוזִ֑י בְּךָ֖ תְהִלָּתִ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: Upon Thee have I stayed myself from birth; Thou art He that took me out of my mother's womb; my praise is continually of Thee.

jps.text: Upon Thee have I stayed myself from birth; Thou art He that took me out of my mother's womb; my praise is continually of Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭מֹופֵת הָיִ֣יתִי לְרַבִּ֑ים וְ֝אַתָּ֗ה מַֽחֲסִי־עֹֽז׃
verses.englishText: I am as a wonder unto many; but Thou art my strong refuge.

jps.text: I am as a wonder unto many; but Thou art my strong refuge.

verses.hebrewText: יִמָּ֣לֵא פִ֭י תְּהִלָּתֶ֑ךָ כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום תִּפְאַרְתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My mouth shall be filled with Thy praise, and with Thy glory all the day.

jps.text: My mouth shall be filled with Thy praise, and with Thy glory all the day.

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תַּ֭שְׁלִיכֵנִי לְעֵ֣ת זִקְנָ֑ה כִּכְלֹ֥ות כֹּ֝חִ֗י אֽ͏ַל־תַּעַזְבֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Cast me not off in the time of old age; when my strength faileth, forsake me not.

jps.text: Cast me not off in the time of old age; when my strength faileth, forsake me not.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָמְר֣וּ אֹויְבַ֣י לִ֑י וְשֹׁמְרֵ֥י נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י נֹועֲצ֥וּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.englishText: For mine enemies speak concerning me, and they that watch for my soul take counsel together,

jps.text: For mine enemies speak concerning me, and they that watch for my soul take counsel together,

verses.hebrewText: לֵ֭אמֹר אֱלֹהִ֣ים עֲזָבֹ֑ו רִֽדְפ֥וּ וְ֝תִפְשׂ֗וּהוּ כִּי־אֵ֥ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.englishText: Saying: 'God hath forsaken him; pursue and take him; for there is none to deliver.'

jps.text: Saying: 'God hath forsaken him; pursue and take him; for there is none to deliver.'

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים אַל־תִּרְחַ֣ק מִמֶּ֑נִּי אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי *חִישָׁה (חֽוּשָׁה)׃
verses.englishText: O God, be not far from me; O my God, make haste to help me.

jps.text: O God, be not far from me; O my God, make haste to help me.

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ יִכְלוּ֮ שֹׂטְנֵ֪י נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י יַֽעֲט֣וּ חֶ֭רְפָּה וּכְלִמָּ֑ה מְ֝בַקְשֵׁ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and consumed that are adversaries to my soul; let them be covered with reproach and confusion that seek my hurt.

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and consumed that are adversaries to my soul; let them be covered with reproach and confusion that seek my hurt.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭אֲנִי תָּמִ֣יד אֲיַחֵ֑ל וְ֝הֹוסַפְתִּ֗י עַל־כָּל־תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I will hope continually, and will praise Thee yet more and more.

jps.text: But as for me, I will hope continually, and will praise Thee yet more and more.

verses.hebrewText: פִּ֤י ׀ יְסַפֵּ֬ר צִדְקָתֶ֗ךָ כָּל־הַיֹּ֥ום תְּשׁוּעָתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹ֖א יָדַ֣עְתִּי סְפֹרֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: My mouth shall tell of Thy righteousness, and of Thy salvation all the day; for I know not the numbers thereof.

jps.text: My mouth shall tell of Thy righteousness, and of Thy salvation all the day; for I know not the numbers thereof.

verses.hebrewText: אָבֹ֗וא בִּ֭גְבֻרֹות אֲדֹנָ֣י יְהוִ֑ה אַזְכִּ֖יר צִדְקָתְךָ֣ לְבַדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will come with Thy mighty acts, O Lord GOD; I will make mention of Thy righteousness, even of Thine only.

jps.text: I will come with Thy mighty acts, O Lord GOD; I will make mention of Thy righteousness, even of Thine only.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים לִמַּדְתַּ֥נִי מִנְּעוּרָ֑י וְעַד־הֵ֝֗נָּה אַגִּ֥יד נִפְלְאֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: O God, Thou hast taught me from my youth; and until now do I declare Thy wondrous works.

jps.text: O God, Thou hast taught me from my youth; and until now do I declare Thy wondrous works.

verses.hebrewText: וְגַ֤ם עַד־זִקְנָ֨ה ׀ וְשֵׂיבָה֮ אֱלֹהִ֪ים אַֽל־תַּעַ֫זְבֵ֥נִי עַד־אַגִּ֣יד זְרֹועֲךָ֣ לְדֹ֑ור לְכָל־יָ֝בֹ֗וא גְּבוּרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And even unto old age and hoary hairs, O God, forsake me not; until I have declared Thy strength unto the next generation, Thy might to every one that is to come.

jps.text: And even unto old age and hoary hairs, O God, forsake me not; until I have declared Thy strength unto the next generation, Thy might to every one that is to come.

verses.hebrewText: וְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ אֱלֹהִ֗ים עַד־מָ֫רֹ֥ום אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂ֥יתָ גְדֹלֹ֑ות אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים מִ֣י כָמֹֽוךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thy righteousness also, O God, which reacheth unto high heaven; Thou who hast done great things, O God, who is like unto Thee?

jps.text: Thy righteousness also, O God, which reacheth unto high heaven; Thou who hast done great things, O God, who is like unto Thee?

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר *הִרְאִיתַנוּ (הִרְאִיתַ֨נִי ׀) צָרֹ֥ות רַבֹּ֗ות וְרָ֫עֹ֥ות תָּשׁ֥וּב *תְּחַיֵּינוּ (תְּחַיֵּ֑ינִי) וּֽמִתְּהֹמֹ֥ות הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ תָּשׁ֥וּב תַּעֲלֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou, who hast made me to see many and sore troubles, wilt quicken me again, and bring me up again from the depths of the earth.

jps.text: Thou, who hast made me to see many and sore troubles, wilt quicken me again, and bring me up again from the depths of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: תֶּ֤רֶב ׀ גְּֽדֻלָּתִ֗י וְתִסֹּ֥ב תְּֽנַחֲמֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou wilt increase my greatness, and turn and comfort me.

jps.text: Thou wilt increase my greatness, and turn and comfort me.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אֲנִ֤י ׀ אֹודְךָ֣ בִכְלִי־נֶבֶל֮ אֲמִתְּךָ֪ אֱלֹ֫הָ֥י אֲזַמְּרָ֣ה לְךָ֣ בְכִנֹּ֑ור קְ֝דֹ֗ושׁ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: I also will give thanks unto Thee with the psaltery, even unto Thy truth, O my God; I will sing praises unto Thee with the harp, O Thou Holy One of Israel.

jps.text: I also will give thanks unto Thee with the psaltery, even unto Thy truth, O my God; I will sing praises unto Thee with the harp, O Thou Holy One of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: תְּרַנֵּ֣נָּ֣ה שְׂ֭פָתַי כִּ֣י אֲזַמְּרָה־לָּ֑ךְ וְ֝נַפְשִׁ֗י אֲשֶׁ֣ר פָּדִֽיתָ׃
verses.englishText: My lips shall greatly rejoice when I sing praises unto Thee; and my soul, which Thou hast redeemed.

jps.text: My lips shall greatly rejoice when I sing praises unto Thee; and my soul, which Thou hast redeemed.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־לְשֹׁונִ֗י כָּל־הַ֭יֹּום תֶּהְגֶּ֣ה צִדְקָתֶ֑ךָ כִּי־בֹ֥שׁוּ כִֽי־חָ֝פְר֗וּ מְבַקְשֵׁ֥י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My tongue also shall tell of Thy righteousness all the day; for they are ashamed, for they are abashed, that seek my hurt.

jps.text: My tongue also shall tell of Thy righteousness all the day; for they are ashamed, for they are abashed, that seek my hurt.

verses.hebrewText: לִשְׁלֹמֹ֨ה ׀ אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים מִ֭שְׁפָּטֶיךָ לְמֶ֣לֶךְ תֵּ֑ן וְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ לְבֶן־מֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of Solomon. Give the king Thy judgments, O God, and Thy righteousness unto the king's son;

jps.text: A Psalm of Solomon. Give the king Thy judgments, O God, and Thy righteousness unto the king's son;

verses.hebrewText: יָדִ֣ין עַמְּךָ֣ בְצֶ֑דֶק וַעֲנִיֶּ֥יךָ בְמִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: That he may judge Thy people with righteousness, and Thy poor with justice.

jps.text: That he may judge Thy people with righteousness, and Thy poor with justice.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂא֤וּ הָרִ֓ים שָׁ֘לֹ֥ום לָעָ֑ם וּ֝גְבָעֹ֗ות בִּצְדָקָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let the mountains bear peace to the people, and the hills, through righteousness.

jps.text: Let the mountains bear peace to the people, and the hills, through righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁפֹּ֤ט ׀ עֲ‍ֽנִיֵּי־עָ֗ם יֹ֭ושִׁיעַ לִבְנֵ֣י אֶבְיֹ֑ון וִֽידַכֵּ֣א עֹושֵֽׁק׃
verses.englishText: May he judge the poor of the people, and save the children of the needy, and crush the oppressor.

jps.text: May he judge the poor of the people, and save the children of the needy, and crush the oppressor.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽירָא֥וּךָ עִם־שָׁ֑מֶשׁ וְלִפְנֵ֥י יָ֝רֵ֗חַ דֹּ֣ור דֹּורִֽים׃
verses.englishText: They shall fear Thee while the sun endureth, and so long as the moon, throughout all generations.

jps.text: They shall fear Thee while the sun endureth, and so long as the moon, throughout all generations.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֭רֵד כְּמָטָ֣ר עַל־גֵּ֑ז כִּ֝רְבִיבִ֗ים זַרְזִ֥יף אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: May he come down like rain upon the mown grass, as showers that water the earth.

jps.text: May he come down like rain upon the mown grass, as showers that water the earth.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽפְרַח־בְּיָמָ֥יו צַדִּ֑יק וְרֹ֥ב שָׁ֝לֹ֗ום עַד־בְּלִ֥י יָרֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: In his days let the righteous flourish, and abundance of peace, till the moon be no more.

jps.text: In his days let the righteous flourish, and abundance of peace, till the moon be no more.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭יֵרְדְּ מִיָּ֣ם עַד־יָ֑ם וּ֝מִנָּהָ֗ר עַד־אַפְסֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: May he have dominion also from sea to sea, and from the River unto the ends of the earth.

jps.text: May he have dominion also from sea to sea, and from the River unto the ends of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭פָנָיו יִכְרְע֣וּ צִיִּ֑ים וְ֝אֹיְבָ֗יו עָפָ֥ר יְלַחֵֽכוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them that dwell in the wilderness bow before him; and his enemies lick the dust.

jps.text: Let them that dwell in the wilderness bow before him; and his enemies lick the dust.

verses.hebrewText: מַלְכֵ֬י תַרְשִׁ֣ישׁ וְ֭אִיִּים מִנְחָ֣ה יָשִׁ֑יבוּ מַלְכֵ֥י שְׁבָ֥א וּ֝סְבָ֗א אֶשְׁכָּ֥ר יַקְרִֽיבוּ׃
verses.englishText: The kings of Tarshish and of the isles shall render tribute; the kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts.

jps.text: The kings of Tarshish and of the isles shall render tribute; the kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts.

verses.hebrewText: וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ־לֹ֥ו כָל־מְלָכִ֑ים כָּל־גֹּויִ֥ם יַֽעַבְדֽוּהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, all kings shall prostrate themselves before him; all nations shall serve him.

jps.text: Yea, all kings shall prostrate themselves before him; all nations shall serve him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יַ֭צִּיל אֶבְיֹ֣ון מְשַׁוֵּ֑עַ וְ֝עָנִ֗י וְֽאֵין־עֹזֵ֥ר לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For he will deliver the needy when he crieth; the poor also, and him that hath no helper.

jps.text: For he will deliver the needy when he crieth; the poor also, and him that hath no helper.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭חֹס עַל־דַּ֣ל וְאֶבְיֹ֑ון וְנַפְשֹׁ֖ות אֶבְיֹונִ֣ים יֹושִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.englishText: He will have pity on the poor and needy, and the souls of the needy he will save.

jps.text: He will have pity on the poor and needy, and the souls of the needy he will save.

verses.hebrewText: מִתֹּ֣וךְ וּ֭מֵחָמָס יִגְאַ֣ל נַפְשָׁ֑ם וְיֵיקַ֖ר דָּמָ֣ם בְּעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He will redeem their soul from oppression and violence, and precious will their blood be in his sight;

jps.text: He will redeem their soul from oppression and violence, and precious will their blood be in his sight;

verses.hebrewText: וִיחִ֗י וְיִתֶּן־לֹו֮ מִזְּהַ֪ב שְׁ֫בָ֥א וְיִתְפַּלֵּ֣ל בַּעֲדֹ֣ו תָמִ֑יד כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום יְבָרֲכֶֽנְהֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: That they may live, and that he may give them of the gold of Sheba, that they may pray for him continually, yea, bless him all the day.

jps.text: That they may live, and that he may give them of the gold of Sheba, that they may pray for him continually, yea, bless him all the day.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִ֤י פִסַּת־בַּ֨ר ׀ בָּאָרֶץ֮ בְּרֹ֪אשׁ הָ֫רִ֥ים יִרְעַ֣שׁ כַּלְּבָנֹ֣ון פִּרְיֹ֑ו וְיָצִ֥יצוּ מֵ֝עִ֗יר כְּעֵ֣שֶׂב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: May he be as a rich cornfield in the land upon the top of the mountains; may his fruit rustle like Lebanon; and may they blossom out of the city like grass of the earth.

jps.text: May he be as a rich cornfield in the land upon the top of the mountains; may his fruit rustle like Lebanon; and may they blossom out of the city like grass of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִ֤י שְׁמֹ֨ו לְֽעֹולָ֗ם לִפְנֵי־שֶׁמֶשׁ֮ *יָנִין (יִנֹּ֪ון) שְׁ֫מֹ֥ו וְיִתְבָּ֥רְכוּ בֹ֑ו כָּל־גֹּויִ֥ם יְאַשְּׁרֽוּהוּ׃
verses.englishText: May his name endure for ever; may his name be continued as long as the sun; may men also bless themselves by him; may all nations call him happy.

jps.text: May his name endure for ever; may his name be continued as long as the sun; may men also bless themselves by him; may all nations call him happy.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֤וּךְ ׀ יְהוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל עֹשֵׂ֖ה נִפְלָאֹ֣ות לְבַדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD God, the God of Israel, who only doeth wondrous things;

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD God, the God of Israel, who only doeth wondrous things;

verses.hebrewText: וּבָר֤וּךְ ׀ שֵׁ֥ם כְּבֹודֹ֗ו לְעֹ֫ולָ֥ם וְיִמָּלֵ֣א כְ֭בֹודֹו אֶת־כֹּ֥ל הָאָ֗רֶץ אָ֘מֵ֥ן ׀ וְאָמֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: And blessed be His glorious name for ever; and let the whole earth be filled with His glory. Amen, and Amen.

jps.text: And blessed be His glorious name for ever; and let the whole earth be filled with His glory. Amen, and Amen.

verses.hebrewText: כָּלּ֥וּ תְפִלֹּ֑ות דָּ֝וִ֗ד בֶּן־יִשָֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.

jps.text: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אַ֤ךְ טֹ֭וב לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל אֱלֹהִ֗ים לְבָרֵ֥י לֵבָֽב׃
verses.englishText: BOOK III A Psalm of Asaph. Surely God is good to Israel, even to such as are pure in heart.

jps.text: BOOK III A Psalm of Asaph. Surely God is good to Israel, even to such as are pure in heart.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֗י כִּ֭מְעַט *נָטוּי (נָטָ֣יוּ) רַגְלָ֑י כְּ֝אַ֗יִן *שֻׁפְּכָה (שֻׁפְּכ֥וּ) אֲשֻׁרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, my feet were almost gone; my steps had well nigh slipped.

jps.text: But as for me, my feet were almost gone; my steps had well nigh slipped.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־קִ֭נֵּאתִי בַּֽהֹולְלִ֑ים שְׁלֹ֖ום רְשָׁעִ֣ים אֶרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: For I was envious at the arrogant, when I saw the prosperity of the wicked.

jps.text: For I was envious at the arrogant, when I saw the prosperity of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֖ין חַרְצֻבֹּ֥ות לְמֹותָ֗ם וּבָרִ֥יא אוּלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For there are no pangs at their death, and their body is sound.

jps.text: For there are no pangs at their death, and their body is sound.

verses.hebrewText: בַּעֲמַ֣ל אֱנֹ֣ושׁ אֵינֵ֑מֹו וְעִם־אָ֝דָ֗ם לֹ֣א יְנֻגָּֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: In the trouble of man they are not; neither are they plagued like men.

jps.text: In the trouble of man they are not; neither are they plagued like men.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭כֵן עֲנָקַ֣תְמֹו גַאֲוָ֑ה יַעֲטָף־שִׁ֝֗ית חָמָ֥ס לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Therefore pride is as a chain about their neck; violence covereth them as a garment.

jps.text: Therefore pride is as a chain about their neck; violence covereth them as a garment.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭צָא מֵחֵ֣לֶב עֵינֵ֑מֹו עָ֝בְר֗וּ מַשְׂכִּיֹּ֥ות לֵבָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Their eyes stand forth from fatness; they are gone beyond the imaginations of their heart.

jps.text: Their eyes stand forth from fatness; they are gone beyond the imaginations of their heart.

verses.hebrewText: יָמִ֤יקוּ ׀ וִידַבְּר֣וּ בְרָ֣ע עֹ֑שֶׁק מִמָּרֹ֥ום יְדַבֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: They scoff, and in wickedness utter oppression; they speak as if there were none on high.

jps.text: They scoff, and in wickedness utter oppression; they speak as if there were none on high.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁתּ֣וּ בַשָּׁמַ֣יִם פִּיהֶ֑ם וּ֝לְשֹׁונָ֗ם תִּֽהֲלַ֥ךְ בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: They have set their mouth against the heavens, and their tongue walketh through the earth.

jps.text: They have set their mouth against the heavens, and their tongue walketh through the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לָכֵ֤ן ׀ *יָשִׁיב (יָשׁ֣וּב) עַמֹּ֣ו הֲלֹ֑ם וּמֵ֥י מָ֝לֵ֗א יִמָּ֥צוּ לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Therefore His people return hither; and waters of fullness are drained out by them.

jps.text: Therefore His people return hither; and waters of fullness are drained out by them.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאָמְר֗וּ אֵיכָ֥ה יָדַֽע־אֵ֑ל וְיֵ֖שׁ דֵּעָ֣ה בְעֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: And they say: 'How doth God know? And is there knowledge in the Most High?'

jps.text: And they say: 'How doth God know? And is there knowledge in the Most High?'

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּה־אֵ֥לֶּה רְשָׁעִ֑ים וְשַׁלְוֵ֥י עֹ֝ולָ֗ם הִשְׂגּוּ־חָֽיִל׃
verses.englishText: Behold, such are the wicked; and they that are always at ease increase riches.

jps.text: Behold, such are the wicked; and they that are always at ease increase riches.

verses.hebrewText: אַךְ־רִ֭יק זִכִּ֣יתִי לְבָבִ֑י וָאֶרְחַ֖ץ בְּנִקָּיֹ֣ון כַּפָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Surely in vain have I cleansed my heart, and washed my hands in innocency;

jps.text: Surely in vain have I cleansed my heart, and washed my hands in innocency;

verses.hebrewText: וָאֱהִ֣י נָ֭גוּעַ כָּל־הַיֹּ֑ום וְ֝תֹוכַחְתִּ֗י לַבְּקָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For all the day have I been plagued, and my chastisement came every morning.

jps.text: For all the day have I been plagued, and my chastisement came every morning.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אָ֭מַרְתִּי אֲסַפְּרָ֥ה כְמֹ֑ו הִנֵּ֤ה דֹ֭ור בָּנֶ֣יךָ בָגָֽדְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: If I had said: 'I will speak thus', behold, I had been faithless to the generation of Thy children.

jps.text: If I had said: 'I will speak thus', behold, I had been faithless to the generation of Thy children.

verses.hebrewText: וָֽ֭אֲחַשְּׁבָה לָדַ֣עַת זֹ֑את עָמָ֖ל *הִיא (ה֣וּא) בְעֵינָֽי׃
verses.englishText: And when I pondered how I might know this, it was wearisome in mine eyes;

jps.text: And when I pondered how I might know this, it was wearisome in mine eyes;

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אָ֭בֹוא אֶל־מִקְדְּשֵׁי־אֵ֑ל אָ֝בִ֗ינָה לְאַחֲרִיתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Until I entered into the sanctuary of God, and considered their end.

jps.text: Until I entered into the sanctuary of God, and considered their end.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ךְ בַּ֭חֲלָקֹות תָּשִׁ֣ית לָ֑מֹו הִ֝פַּלְתָּ֗ם לְמַשּׁוּאֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Surely Thou settest them in slippery places; Thou hurlest them down to utter ruin.

jps.text: Surely Thou settest them in slippery places; Thou hurlest them down to utter ruin.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֤יךְ הָי֣וּ לְשַׁמָּ֣ה כְרָ֑גַע סָ֥פוּ תַ֝֗מּוּ מִן־בַּלָּהֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: How are they become a desolation in a moment! They are wholly consumed by terrors.

jps.text: How are they become a desolation in a moment! They are wholly consumed by terrors.

verses.hebrewText: כַּחֲלֹ֥ום מֵהָקִ֑יץ אֲ֝דֹנָי בָּעִ֤יר ׀ צַלְמָ֬ם תִּבְזֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: As a dream when one awaketh, so, O Lord, when Thou arousest Thyself, Thou wilt despise their semblance.

jps.text: As a dream when one awaketh, so, O Lord, when Thou arousest Thyself, Thou wilt despise their semblance.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י יִתְחַמֵּ֣ץ לְבָבִ֑י וְ֝כִלְיֹותַ֗י אֶשְׁתֹּונָֽן׃
verses.englishText: For my heart was in a ferment, and I was pricked in my reins.

jps.text: For my heart was in a ferment, and I was pricked in my reins.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִי־בַ֭עַר וְלֹ֣א אֵדָ֑ע בְּ֝הֵמֹ֗ות הָיִ֥יתִי עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: But I was brutish, and ignorant; I was as a beast before Thee.

jps.text: But I was brutish, and ignorant; I was as a beast before Thee.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֣י תָמִ֣יד עִמָּ֑ךְ אָ֝חַ֗זְתָּ בְּיַד־יְמִינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Nevertheless I am continually with Thee; Thou holdest my right hand.

jps.text: Nevertheless I am continually with Thee; Thou holdest my right hand.

verses.hebrewText: בַּעֲצָתְךָ֥ תַנְחֵ֑נִי וְ֝אַחַ֗ר כָּבֹ֥וד תִּקָּחֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou wilt guide me with Thy counsel, and afterward receive me with glory.

jps.text: Thou wilt guide me with Thy counsel, and afterward receive me with glory.

verses.hebrewText: מִי־לִ֥י בַשָּׁמָ֑יִם וְ֝עִמְּךָ֗ לֹא־חָפַ֥צְתִּי בָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Whom have I in heaven but Thee? And beside Thee I desire none upon earth.

jps.text: Whom have I in heaven but Thee? And beside Thee I desire none upon earth.

verses.hebrewText: כָּלָ֥ה שְׁאֵרִ֗י וּלְבָ֫בִ֥י צוּר־לְבָבִ֥י וְחֶלְקִ֗י אֱלֹהִ֥ים לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: My flesh and my heart faileth; but God is the rock of my heart and my portion for ever.

jps.text: My flesh and my heart faileth; but God is the rock of my heart and my portion for ever.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֣ה רְחֵקֶ֣יךָ יֹאבֵ֑דוּ הִ֝צְמַ֗תָּה כָּל־זֹונֶ֥ה מִמֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: For, lo, they that go far from Thee shall perish; Thou dost destroy all them that go astray from Thee.

jps.text: For, lo, they that go far from Thee shall perish; Thou dost destroy all them that go astray from Thee.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ קִֽרֲבַ֥ת אֱלֹהִ֗ים לִ֫י־טֹ֥וב שַׁתִּ֤י ׀ בַּאדֹנָ֣י יְהֹוִ֣ה מַחְסִ֑י לְ֝סַפֵּ֗ר כָּל־מַלְאֲכֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, the nearness of God is my good; I have made the Lord GOD my refuge, that I may tell of all Thy works.

jps.text: But as for me, the nearness of God is my good; I have made the Lord GOD my refuge, that I may tell of all Thy works.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׂכִּ֗יל לְאָ֫סָ֥ף לָמָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים זָנַ֣חְתָּ לָנֶ֑צַח יֶעְשַׁ֥ן אַ֝פְּךָ֗ בְּצֹ֣אן מַרְעִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Maschil of Asaph. Why, O God, hast Thou cast us off for ever? Why doth Thine anger smoke against the flock of Thy pasture?

jps.text: Maschil of Asaph. Why, O God, hast Thou cast us off for ever? Why doth Thine anger smoke against the flock of Thy pasture?

verses.hebrewText: זְכֹ֤ר עֲדָתְךָ֨ ׀ קָ֘נִ֤יתָ קֶּ֗דֶם גָּ֭אַלְתָּ שֵׁ֣בֶט נַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ הַר־צִ֝יֹּ֗ון זֶ֤ה ׀ שָׁכַ֬נְתָּ בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Remember Thy congregation, which Thou hast gotten of old, which Thou hast redeemed to be the tribe of Thine inheritance; and mount Zion, wherein Thou hast dwelt.

jps.text: Remember Thy congregation, which Thou hast gotten of old, which Thou hast redeemed to be the tribe of Thine inheritance; and mount Zion, wherein Thou hast dwelt.

verses.hebrewText: הָרִ֣ימָה פְ֭עָמֶיךָ לְמַשֻּׁאֹ֣ות נֶ֑צַח כָּל־הֵרַ֖ע אֹויֵ֣ב בַּקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Lift up Thy steps because of the perpetual ruins, even all the evil that the enemy hath done in the sanctuary.

jps.text: Lift up Thy steps because of the perpetual ruins, even all the evil that the enemy hath done in the sanctuary.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁאֲג֣וּ צֹ֭רְרֶיךָ בְּקֶ֣רֶב מֹועֲדֶ֑ךָ שָׂ֖מוּ אֹותֹתָ֣ם אֹתֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Thine adversaries have roared in the midst of Thy meeting-place; they have set up their own signs for signs.

jps.text: Thine adversaries have roared in the midst of Thy meeting-place; they have set up their own signs for signs.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭וָּדַע כְּמֵבִ֣יא לְמָ֑עְלָה בִּֽסֲבָךְ־עֵ֝֗ץ קַרְדֻּמֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: It seemed as when men wield upwards axes in a thicket of trees.

jps.text: It seemed as when men wield upwards axes in a thicket of trees.

verses.hebrewText: *וְעֵת (וְ֭עַתָּה) פִּתּוּחֶ֣יהָ יָּ֑חַד בְּכַשִּׁ֥יל וְ֝כֵֽילַפֹּ֗ת יַהֲלֹמֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: And now all the carved work thereof together they strike down with hatchet and hammers.

jps.text: And now all the carved work thereof together they strike down with hatchet and hammers.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁלְח֣וּ בָ֭אֵשׁ מִקְדָּשֶׁ֑ךָ לָ֝אָ֗רֶץ חִלְּל֥וּ מִֽשְׁכַּן־שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: They have set Thy sanctuary on fire; they have profaned the dwelling-place of Thy name even to the ground.

jps.text: They have set Thy sanctuary on fire; they have profaned the dwelling-place of Thy name even to the ground.

verses.hebrewText: אָמְר֣וּ בְ֭לִבָּם נִינָ֣ם יָ֑חַד שָׂרְפ֖וּ כָל־מֹועֲדֵי־אֵ֣ל בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: They said in their heart: 'Let us make havoc of them altogether'; they have burned up all the meeting-places of God in the land.

jps.text: They said in their heart: 'Let us make havoc of them altogether'; they have burned up all the meeting-places of God in the land.

verses.hebrewText: אֹֽותֹתֵ֗ינוּ לֹ֥א רָ֫אִ֥ינוּ אֵֽין־עֹ֥וד נָבִ֑יא וְלֹֽא־אִ֝תָּ֗נוּ יֹדֵ֥עַ עַד־מָֽה׃
verses.englishText: We see not our signs; there is no more any prophet; neither is there among us any that knoweth how long.

jps.text: We see not our signs; there is no more any prophet; neither is there among us any that knoweth how long.

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָתַ֣י אֱ֭לֹהִים יְחָ֣רֶף צָ֑ר יְנָ֘אֵ֤ץ אֹויֵ֖ב שִׁמְךָ֣ לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.englishText: How long, O God, shall the adversary reproach? Shall the enemy blaspheme Thy name for ever?

jps.text: How long, O God, shall the adversary reproach? Shall the enemy blaspheme Thy name for ever?

verses.hebrewText: לָ֤מָּה תָשִׁ֣יב יָ֭דְךָ וִֽימִינֶ֑ךָ מִקֶּ֖רֶב *חֹוקְךָ (חֽ͏ֵיקְךָ֣) כַלֵּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Why withdrawest Thou Thy hand, even Thy right hand? Draw it out of Thy bosom and consume them.

jps.text: Why withdrawest Thou Thy hand, even Thy right hand? Draw it out of Thy bosom and consume them.

verses.hebrewText: וֵ֭אלֹהִים מַלְכִּ֣י מִקֶּ֑דֶם פֹּעֵ֥ל יְ֝שׁוּעֹ֗ות בְּקֶ֣רֶב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Yet God is my King of old, working salvation in the midst of the earth.

jps.text: Yet God is my King of old, working salvation in the midst of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה פֹורַ֣רְתָּ בְעָזְּךָ֣ יָ֑ם שִׁבַּ֖רְתָּ רָאשֵׁ֥י תַ֝נִּינִ֗ים עַל־הַמָּֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst break the sea in pieces by Thy strength; Thou didst shatter the heads of the sea-monsters in the waters.

jps.text: Thou didst break the sea in pieces by Thy strength; Thou didst shatter the heads of the sea-monsters in the waters.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה רִ֭צַּצְתָּ רָאשֵׁ֣י לִוְיָתָ֑ן תִּתְּנֶ֥נּוּ מַ֝אֲכָ֗ל לְעָ֣ם לְצִיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst crush the heads of leviathan, Thou gavest him to be food to the folk inhabiting the wilderness.

jps.text: Thou didst crush the heads of leviathan, Thou gavest him to be food to the folk inhabiting the wilderness.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה בָ֭קַעְתָּ מַעְיָ֣ן וָנָ֑חַל אַתָּ֥ה הֹ֝ובַ֗שְׁתָּ נַהֲרֹ֥ות אֵיתָֽן׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst cleave fountain and brook; Thou driedst up ever-flowing rivers.

jps.text: Thou didst cleave fountain and brook; Thou driedst up ever-flowing rivers.

verses.hebrewText: לְךָ֣ יֹ֭ום אַף־לְךָ֥ לָ֑יְלָה אַתָּ֥ה הֲ֝כִינֹ֗ותָ מָאֹ֥ור וָשָֽׁמֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Thine is the day, Thine also the night; Thou hast established luminary and sun.

jps.text: Thine is the day, Thine also the night; Thou hast established luminary and sun.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה הִ֭צַּבְתָּ כָּל־גְּבוּלֹ֣ות אָ֑רֶץ קַ֥יִץ וָ֝חֹ֗רֶף אַתָּ֥ה יְצַרְתָּם׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast set all the borders of the earth; Thou hast made summer and winter.

jps.text: Thou hast set all the borders of the earth; Thou hast made summer and winter.

verses.hebrewText: זְכָר־זֹ֗את אֹ֭ויֵב חֵרֵ֣ף ׀ יְהוָ֑ה וְעַ֥ם נָ֝בָ֗ל נִֽאֲצ֥וּ שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Remember this, how the enemy hath reproached the LORD, and how a base people have blasphemed Thy name.

jps.text: Remember this, how the enemy hath reproached the LORD, and how a base people have blasphemed Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּתֵּ֣ן לְ֭חַיַּת נֶ֣פֶשׁ תֹּורֶ֑ךָ חַיַּ֥ת עֲ֝נִיֶּ֗יךָ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּ֥ח לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.englishText: O deliver not the soul of Thy turtle-dove unto the wild beast; forget not the life of Thy poor for ever.

jps.text: O deliver not the soul of Thy turtle-dove unto the wild beast; forget not the life of Thy poor for ever.

verses.hebrewText: הַבֵּ֥ט לַבְּרִ֑ית כִּ֥י מָלְא֥וּ מַחֲשַׁכֵּי־אֶ֝֗רֶץ נְאֹ֣ות חָמָֽס׃
verses.englishText: Look upon the covenant; for the dark places of the land are full of the habitations of violence.

jps.text: Look upon the covenant; for the dark places of the land are full of the habitations of violence.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יָשֹׁ֣ב דַּ֣ךְ נִכְלָ֑ם עָנִ֥י וְ֝אֶבְיֹ֗ון יְֽהַלְל֥וּ שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: O let not the oppressed turn back in confusion; let the poor and needy praise Thy name.

jps.text: O let not the oppressed turn back in confusion; let the poor and needy praise Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: קוּמָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים רִיבָ֣ה רִיבֶ֑ךָ זְכֹ֥ר חֶרְפָּתְךָ֥ מִנִּי־נָ֝בָ֗ל כָּל־הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O God, plead Thine own cause; remember Thy reproach all the day at the hand of the base man.

jps.text: Arise, O God, plead Thine own cause; remember Thy reproach all the day at the hand of the base man.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּ֭שְׁכַּח קֹ֣ול צֹרְרֶ֑יךָ שְׁאֹ֥ון קָ֝מֶ֗יךָ עֹלֶ֥ה תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: Forget not the voice of Thine adversaries, the tumult of those that rise up against Thee which ascendeth continually.

jps.text: Forget not the voice of Thine adversaries, the tumult of those that rise up against Thee which ascendeth continually.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵ֑ת מִזְמֹ֖ור לְאָסָ֣ף שִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of Asaph, a Song.

jps.text: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of Asaph, a Song.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֘ודִ֤ינוּ לְּךָ֨ ׀ אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים הֹ֭ודִינוּ וְקָרֹ֣וב שְׁמֶ֑ךָ סִ֝פְּר֗וּ נִפְלְאֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: We give thanks unto Thee, O God, we give thanks, and Thy name is near; men tell of Thy wondrous works.

jps.text: We give thanks unto Thee, O God, we give thanks, and Thy name is near; men tell of Thy wondrous works.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י אֶקַּ֣ח מֹועֵ֑ד אֲ֝נִ֗י מֵישָׁרִ֥ים אֶשְׁפֹּֽט׃
verses.englishText: 'When I take the appointed time, I Myself will judge with equity.

jps.text: 'When I take the appointed time, I Myself will judge with equity.

verses.hebrewText: נְֽמֹגִ֗ים אֶ֥רֶץ וְכָל־יֹשְׁבֶ֑יהָ אָנֹכִ֨י תִכַּ֖נְתִּי עַמּוּדֶ֣יהָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: When the earth and all the inhabitants thereof are dissolved, I Myself establish the pillars of it.' Selah

jps.text: When the earth and all the inhabitants thereof are dissolved, I Myself establish the pillars of it.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣רְתִּי לַֽ֭הֹולְלִים אַל־תָּהֹ֑לּוּ וְ֝לָרְשָׁעִ֗ים אַל־תָּרִ֥ימוּ קָֽרֶן׃
verses.englishText: I say unto the arrogant: 'Deal not arrogantly'; and to the wicked: 'Lift not up the horn.'

jps.text: I say unto the arrogant: 'Deal not arrogantly'; and to the wicked: 'Lift not up the horn.'

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תָּרִ֣ימוּ לַמָּרֹ֣ום קַרְנְכֶ֑ם תְּדַבְּר֖וּ בְצַוָּ֣אר עָתָֽק׃
verses.englishText: Lift not up your horn on high; speak not insolence with a haughty neck.

jps.text: Lift not up your horn on high; speak not insolence with a haughty neck.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א מִ֭מֹּוצָא וּמִֽמַּעֲרָ֑ב וְ֝לֹ֗א מִמִּדְבַּ֥ר הָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For neither from the east, nor from the west, nor yet from the wilderness, cometh lifting up.

jps.text: For neither from the east, nor from the west, nor yet from the wilderness, cometh lifting up.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֥ים שֹׁפֵ֑ט זֶ֥ה יַ֝שְׁפִּ֗יל וְזֶ֣ה יָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For God is judge; He putteth down one, and lifteth up another.

jps.text: For God is judge; He putteth down one, and lifteth up another.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י כֹ֪וס בְּֽיַד־יְהוָ֡ה וְיַ֤יִן חָמַ֨ר ׀ מָ֥לֵא מֶסֶךְ֮ וַיַּגֵּ֪ר מִ֫זֶּ֥ה אַךְ־שְׁ֭מָרֶיהָ יִמְצ֣וּ יִשְׁתּ֑וּ כֹּ֝֗ל רִשְׁעֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: For in the hand of the LORD there is a cup, with foaming wine, full of mixture, and He poureth out of the same; surely the dregs thereof, all the wicked of the earth shall drain them, and drink them.

jps.text: For in the hand of the LORD there is a cup, with foaming wine, full of mixture, and He poureth out of the same; surely the dregs thereof, all the wicked of the earth shall drain them, and drink them.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭אֲנִי אַגִּ֣יד לְעֹלָ֑ם אֲ֝זַמְּרָ֗ה לֵאלֹהֵ֥י יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, I will declare for ever, I will sing praises to the God of Jacob.

jps.text: But as for me, I will declare for ever, I will sing praises to the God of Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: וְכָל־קַרְנֵ֣י רְשָׁעִ֣ים אֲגַדֵּ֑עַ תְּ֝רֹומַ֗מְנָה קַֽרְנֹ֥ות צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: All the horns of the wicked also will I cut off; but the horns of the righteous shall be lifted up.

jps.text: All the horns of the wicked also will I cut off; but the horns of the righteous shall be lifted up.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ בִּנְגִינֹ֑ת מִזְמֹ֖ור לְאָסָ֣ף שִֽׁיר׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of Asaph, a Song.

jps.text: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of Asaph, a Song.

verses.hebrewText: נֹודָ֣ע בִּֽיהוּדָ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֑ים בְּ֝יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל גָּדֹ֥ול שְׁמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: In Judah is God known; His name is great in Israel.

jps.text: In Judah is God known; His name is great in Israel.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֣י בְשָׁלֵ֣ם סֻכֹּ֑ו וּמְעֹ֖ונָתֹ֣ו בְצִיֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: In Salem also is set His tabernacle, and His dwelling-place in Zion.

jps.text: In Salem also is set His tabernacle, and His dwelling-place in Zion.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֭מָּה שִׁבַּ֣ר רִשְׁפֵי־קָ֑שֶׁת מָגֵ֬ן וְחֶ֖רֶב וּמִלְחָמָ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: There He broke the fiery shafts of the bow; the shield, and the sword, and the battle. Selah

jps.text: There He broke the fiery shafts of the bow; the shield, and the sword, and the battle. Selah

verses.hebrewText: נָ֭אֹור אַתָּ֥ה אַדִּ֗יר מֵֽהַרְרֵי־טָֽרֶף׃
verses.englishText: Glorious art Thou and excellent, coming down from the mountains of prey.

jps.text: Glorious art Thou and excellent, coming down from the mountains of prey.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׁתֹּולְל֨וּ ׀ אַבִּ֣ירֵי לֵ֭ב נָמ֣וּ שְׁנָתָ֑ם וְלֹא־מָצְא֖וּ כָל־אַנְשֵׁי־חַ֣יִל יְדֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The stout-hearted are bereft of sense, they sleep their sleep; and none of the men of might have found their hands.

jps.text: The stout-hearted are bereft of sense, they sleep their sleep; and none of the men of might have found their hands.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭גַּעֲרָ֣תְךָ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֑ב נִ֝רְדָּ֗ם וְרֶ֣כֶב וָסֽוּס׃
verses.englishText: At Thy rebuke, O God of Jacob, they are cast into a dead sleep, the riders also and the horses.

jps.text: At Thy rebuke, O God of Jacob, they are cast into a dead sleep, the riders also and the horses.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה ׀ נֹ֥ורָא אַ֗תָּה וּמִֽי־יַעֲמֹ֥ד לְפָנֶ֗יךָ מֵאָ֥ז אַפֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou, even Thou, art terrible; and who may stand in Thy sight when once Thou art angry?

jps.text: Thou, even Thou, art terrible; and who may stand in Thy sight when once Thou art angry?

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭שָּׁמַיִם הִשְׁמַ֣עְתָּ דִּ֑ין אֶ֖רֶץ יָֽרְאָ֣ה וְשָׁקָֽטָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst cause sentence to be heard from heaven; the earth feared, and was still,

jps.text: Thou didst cause sentence to be heard from heaven; the earth feared, and was still,

verses.hebrewText: בְּקוּם־לַמִּשְׁפָּ֥ט אֱלֹהִ֑ים לְהֹושִׁ֖יעַ כָּל־עַנְוֵי־אֶ֣רֶץ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: When God arose to judgment, to save all the humble of the earth. Selah

jps.text: When God arose to judgment, to save all the humble of the earth. Selah

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חֲמַ֣ת אָדָ֣ם תֹּודֶ֑ךָּ שְׁאֵרִ֖ית חֵמֹ֣ת תַּחְגֹּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Surely the wrath of man shall praise Thee; the residue of wrath shalt Thou gird upon Thee.

jps.text: Surely the wrath of man shall praise Thee; the residue of wrath shalt Thou gird upon Thee.

verses.hebrewText: נִֽדֲר֣וּ וְשַׁלְּמוּ֮ לַיהוָ֪ה אֱ‍ֽלֹהֵ֫יכֶ֥ם כָּל־סְבִיבָ֑יו יֹובִ֥ילוּ שַׁ֝֗י לַמֹּורָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Vow, and pay unto the LORD your God; let all that are round about Him bring presents unto Him that is to be feared;

jps.text: Vow, and pay unto the LORD your God; let all that are round about Him bring presents unto Him that is to be feared;

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭בְצֹר ר֣וּחַ נְגִידִ֑ים נֹ֝ורָ֗א לְמַלְכֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: He minisheth the spirit of princes; He is terrible to the kings of the earth.

jps.text: He minisheth the spirit of princes; He is terrible to the kings of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ עַֽל־*יְדִיתוּן (יְדוּת֗וּן) לְאָסָ֥ף מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; for Jeduthun. A Psalm of Asaph.

jps.text: For the Leader; for Jeduthun. A Psalm of Asaph.

verses.hebrewText: קֹולִ֣י אֶל־אֱלֹהִ֣ים וְאֶצְעָ֑קָה קֹולִ֥י אֶל־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים וְהַאֲזִ֥ין אֵלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will lift up my voice unto God, and cry; I will lift up my voice unto God, that He may give ear unto me.

jps.text: I will lift up my voice unto God, and cry; I will lift up my voice unto God, that He may give ear unto me.

verses.hebrewText: בְּיֹ֥ום צָרָתִי֮ אֲדֹנָ֪י דָּ֫רָ֥שְׁתִּי יָדִ֤י ׀ לַ֣יְלָה נִ֭גְּרָה וְלֹ֣א תָפ֑וּג מֵאֲנָ֖ה הִנָּחֵ֣ם נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: In the day of my trouble I seek the Lord; with my hand uplifted, mine eye streameth in the night without ceasing; my soul refuseth to be comforted.

jps.text: In the day of my trouble I seek the Lord; with my hand uplifted, mine eye streameth in the night without ceasing; my soul refuseth to be comforted.

verses.hebrewText: אֶזְכְּרָ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים וְאֶֽהֱמָיָ֑ה אָשִׂ֓יחָה ׀ וְתִתְעַטֵּ֖ף רוּחִ֣י סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: When I think thereon, O God, I must moan; when I muse thereon, my spirit fainteth. Selah

jps.text: When I think thereon, O God, I must moan; when I muse thereon, my spirit fainteth. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭חַזְתָּ שְׁמֻרֹ֣ות עֵינָ֑י נִ֝פְעַ֗מְתִּי וְלֹ֣א אֲדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Thou holdest fast the lids of mine eyes; I am troubled, and cannot speak.

jps.text: Thou holdest fast the lids of mine eyes; I am troubled, and cannot speak.

verses.hebrewText: חִשַּׁ֣בְתִּי יָמִ֣ים מִקֶּ֑דֶם שְׁ֝נֹ֗ות עֹולָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: I have pondered the days of old, the years of ancient times.

jps.text: I have pondered the days of old, the years of ancient times.

verses.hebrewText: אֶֽזְכְּרָ֥ה נְגִינָתִ֗י בַּ֫לָּ֥יְלָה עִם־לְבָבִ֥י אָשִׂ֑יחָה וַיְחַפֵּ֥שׂ רוּחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: In the night I will call to remembrance my song; I will commune with mine own heart; and my spirit maketh diligent search:

jps.text: In the night I will call to remembrance my song; I will commune with mine own heart; and my spirit maketh diligent search:

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭לְעֹולָמִים יִזְנַ֥ח ׀ אֲדֹנָ֑י וְלֹֽא־יֹסִ֖יף לִרְצֹ֣ות עֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: 'Will the Lord cast off for ever? and will He be favourable no more?

jps.text: 'Will the Lord cast off for ever? and will He be favourable no more?

verses.hebrewText: הֶאָפֵ֣ס לָנֶ֣צַח חַסְדֹּ֑ו גָּ֥מַר אֹ֝֗מֶר לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: Is His mercy clean gone for ever? Is His promise come to an end for evermore?

jps.text: Is His mercy clean gone for ever? Is His promise come to an end for evermore?

verses.hebrewText: הֲשָׁכַ֣ח חַנֹּ֣ות אֵ֑ל אִם־קָפַ֥ץ בְּ֝אַ֗ף רַחֲמָ֥יו סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Hath God forgotten to be gracious? Hath He in anger shut up his compassions?' Selah

jps.text: Hath God forgotten to be gracious? Hath He in anger shut up his compassions?' Selah

verses.hebrewText: וָ֭אֹמַר חַלֹּ֣ותִי הִ֑יא שְׁ֝נֹ֗ות יְמִ֣ין עֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: And I say: 'This is my weakness, that the right hand of the Most High could change.

jps.text: And I say: 'This is my weakness, that the right hand of the Most High could change.

verses.hebrewText: *אַזְכִּיר (אֶזְכֹּ֥ור) מַֽעַלְלֵי־יָ֑הּ כִּֽי־אֶזְכְּרָ֖ה מִקֶּ֣דֶם פִּלְאֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will make mention of the deeds of the LORD; yea, I will remember Thy wonders of old.

jps.text: I will make mention of the deeds of the LORD; yea, I will remember Thy wonders of old.

verses.hebrewText: וְהָגִ֥יתִי בְכָל־פָּעֳלֶ֑ךָ וּֽבַעֲלִ֖ילֹותֶ֣יךָ אָשִֽׂיחָה׃
verses.englishText: I will meditate also upon all Thy work, and muse on Thy doings.'

jps.text: I will meditate also upon all Thy work, and muse on Thy doings.'

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭לֹהִים בַּקֹּ֣דֶשׁ דַּרְכֶּ֑ךָ מִי־אֵ֥ל גָּ֝דֹ֗ול כֵּֽאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: O God, Thy way is in holiness; who is a great god like unto God?

jps.text: O God, Thy way is in holiness; who is a great god like unto God?

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה הָ֭אֵל עֹ֣שֵׂה פֶ֑לֶא הֹודַ֖עְתָּ בָעַמִּ֣ים עֻזֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou art the God that doest wonders; Thou hast made known Thy strength among the peoples.

jps.text: Thou art the God that doest wonders; Thou hast made known Thy strength among the peoples.

verses.hebrewText: גָּאַ֣לְתָּ בִּזְרֹ֣ועַ עַמֶּ֑ךָ בְּנֵי־יַעֲקֹ֖ב וְיֹוסֵ֣ף סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast with Thine arm redeemed Thy people, the sons of Jacob and Joseph. Selah

jps.text: Thou hast with Thine arm redeemed Thy people, the sons of Jacob and Joseph. Selah

verses.hebrewText: רָ֘א֤וּךָ מַּ֨יִם ׀ אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים רָא֣וּךָ מַּ֣יִם יָחִ֑ילוּ אַ֝֗ף יִרְגְּז֥וּ תְהֹמֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: The waters saw Thee, O God; the waters saw Thee, they were in pain; the depths also trembled.

jps.text: The waters saw Thee, O God; the waters saw Thee, they were in pain; the depths also trembled.

verses.hebrewText: זֹ֤רְמוּ מַ֨יִם ׀ עָבֹ֗ות קֹ֖ול נָתְנ֣וּ שְׁחָקִ֑ים אַף־חֲ֝צָצֶ֗יךָ יִתְהַלָּֽכוּ׃
verses.englishText: The clouds flooded forth waters; the skies sent out a sound; Thine arrows also went abroad.

jps.text: The clouds flooded forth waters; the skies sent out a sound; Thine arrows also went abroad.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֤ול רַעַמְךָ֨ ׀ בַּגַּלְגַּ֗ל הֵאִ֣ירוּ בְרָקִ֣ים תֵּבֵ֑ל רָגְזָ֖ה וַתִּרְעַ֣שׁ הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: The voice of Thy thunder was in the whirlwind; the lightnings lighted up the world; the earth trembled and shook.

jps.text: The voice of Thy thunder was in the whirlwind; the lightnings lighted up the world; the earth trembled and shook.

verses.hebrewText: בַּיָּ֤ם דַּרְכֶּ֗ךָ *וּשְׁבִילֶיךָ (וּֽ֭שְׁבִֽילְךָ) בְּמַ֣יִם רַבִּ֑ים וְ֝עִקְּבֹותֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א נֹדָֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: Thy way was in the sea, and Thy path in the great waters, and Thy footsteps were not known.

jps.text: Thy way was in the sea, and Thy path in the great waters, and Thy footsteps were not known.

verses.hebrewText: נָחִ֣יתָ כַצֹּ֣אן עַמֶּ֑ךָ בְּֽיַד־מֹשֶׁ֥ה וְאַהֲרֹֽן׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst lead Thy people like a flock, by the hand of Moses and Aaron.

jps.text: Thou didst lead Thy people like a flock, by the hand of Moses and Aaron.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׂכִּ֗יל לְאָ֫סָ֥ף הַאֲזִ֣ינָה עַ֭מִּי תֹּורָתִ֑י הַטּ֥וּ אָ֝זְנְכֶ֗ם לְאִמְרֵי־פִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Maschil of Asaph. Give ear, O my people, to my teaching; incline your ears to the words of my mouth.

jps.text: Maschil of Asaph. Give ear, O my people, to my teaching; incline your ears to the words of my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: אֶפְתְּחָ֣ה בְמָשָׁ֣ל פִּ֑י אַבִּ֥יעָה חִ֝ידֹ֗ות מִנִּי־קֶֽדֶם׃
verses.englishText: I will open my mouth with a parable; I will utter dark sayings concerning days of old;

jps.text: I will open my mouth with a parable; I will utter dark sayings concerning days of old;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׁ֭מַעְנוּ וַנֵּדָעֵ֑ם וַ֝אֲבֹותֵ֗ינוּ סִפְּרוּ־לָֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: That which we have heard and known, and our fathers have told us,

jps.text: That which we have heard and known, and our fathers have told us,

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֤א נְכַחֵ֨ד ׀ מִבְּנֵיהֶ֗ם לְדֹ֥ור אַחֲרֹ֗ון מְֽ֭סַפְּרִים תְּהִלֹּ֣ות יְהוָ֑ה וֶעֱזוּזֹ֥ו וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: We will not hide from their children, telling to the generation to come the praises of the LORD, and His strength, and His wondrous works that He hath done.

jps.text: We will not hide from their children, telling to the generation to come the praises of the LORD, and His strength, and His wondrous works that He hath done.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֤קֶם עֵד֨וּת ׀ בְּֽיַעֲקֹ֗ב וְתֹורָה֮ שָׂ֤ם בְּיִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר צִ֭וָּה אֶת־אֲבֹותֵ֑ינוּ לְ֝הֹודִיעָ֗ם לִבְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: For He established a testimony in Jacob, and appointed a law in Israel, which He commanded our fathers, that they should make them known to their children;

jps.text: For He established a testimony in Jacob, and appointed a law in Israel, which He commanded our fathers, that they should make them known to their children;

verses.hebrewText: לְמַ֤עַן יֵדְע֨וּ ׀ דֹּ֣ור אַ֭חֲרֹון בָּנִ֣ים יִוָּלֵ֑דוּ יָ֝קֻ֗מוּ וִֽיסַפְּר֥וּ לִבְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: That the generation to come might know them, even the children that should be born; who should arise and tell them to their children,

jps.text: That the generation to come might know them, even the children that should be born; who should arise and tell them to their children,

verses.hebrewText: וְיָשִׂ֥ימוּ בֵֽאלֹהִ֗ים כִּ֫סְלָ֥ם וְלֹ֣א יִ֭שְׁכְּחוּ מַֽעַלְלֵי־אֵ֑ל וּמִצְוֹתָ֥יו יִנְצֹֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: That they might put their confidence in God, and not forget the works of God, but keep His commandments;

jps.text: That they might put their confidence in God, and not forget the works of God, but keep His commandments;

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹ֤א יִהְי֨וּ ׀ כַּאֲבֹותָ֗ם דֹּור֮ סֹורֵ֪ר וּמֹ֫רֶ֥ה דֹּ֭ור לֹא־הֵכִ֣ין לִבֹּ֑ו וְלֹא־נֶאֶמְנָ֖ה אֶת־אֵ֣ל רוּחֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And might not be as their fathers, a stubborn and rebellious generation; a generation that set not their heart aright, and whose spirit was not stedfast with God.

jps.text: And might not be as their fathers, a stubborn and rebellious generation; a generation that set not their heart aright, and whose spirit was not stedfast with God.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽנֵי־אֶפְרַ֗יִם נֹושְׁקֵ֥י רֹומֵי־קָ֑שֶׁת הָ֝פְכ֗וּ בְּיֹ֣ום קְרָֽב׃
verses.englishText: The children of Ephraim were as archers handling the bow, that turned back in the day of battle.

jps.text: The children of Ephraim were as archers handling the bow, that turned back in the day of battle.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֣א שָׁ֭מְרוּ בְּרִ֣ית אֱלֹהִ֑ים וּ֝בְתֹורָתֹ֗ו מֵאֲנ֥וּ לָלֶֽכֶת׃
verses.englishText: They kept not the covenant of God, and refused to walk in His law;

jps.text: They kept not the covenant of God, and refused to walk in His law;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשְׁכְּח֥וּ עֲלִילֹותָ֑יו וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו אֲשֶׁ֣ר הֶרְאָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they forgot His doings, and His wondrous works that He had shown them.

jps.text: And they forgot His doings, and His wondrous works that He had shown them.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֣גֶד אֲ֭בֹותָם עָ֣שָׂה פֶ֑לֶא בְּאֶ֖רֶץ מִצְרַ֣יִם שְׂדֵה־צֹֽעַן׃
verses.englishText: Marvellous things did He in the sight of their fathers, in the land of Egypt, in the field of Zoan.

jps.text: Marvellous things did He in the sight of their fathers, in the land of Egypt, in the field of Zoan.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֣קַע יָ֭ם וַיַּֽעֲבִירֵ֑ם וַֽיַּצֶּב־מַ֥יִם כְּמֹו־נֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: He cleaved the sea, and caused them to pass through; and He made the waters to stand as a heap.

jps.text: He cleaved the sea, and caused them to pass through; and He made the waters to stand as a heap.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּנְחֵ֣ם בֶּעָנָ֣ן יֹומָ֑ם וְכָל־הַ֝לַּ֗יְלָה בְּאֹ֣ור אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: By day also He led them with a cloud, and all the night with a light of fire.

jps.text: By day also He led them with a cloud, and all the night with a light of fire.

verses.hebrewText: יְבַקַּ֣ע צֻ֭רִים בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וַ֝יַּ֗שְׁקְ כִּתְהֹמֹ֥ות רַבָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He cleaved rocks in the wilderness, and gave them drink abundantly as out of the great deep.

jps.text: He cleaved rocks in the wilderness, and gave them drink abundantly as out of the great deep.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּוצִ֣א נֹוזְלִ֣ים מִסָּ֑לַע וַיֹּ֖ורֶד כַּנְּהָרֹ֣ות מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: He brought streams also out of the rock, and caused waters to run down like rivers.

jps.text: He brought streams also out of the rock, and caused waters to run down like rivers.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּוסִ֣יפוּ עֹ֖וד לַחֲטֹא־לֹ֑ו לַֽמְרֹ֥ות עֶ֝לְיֹ֗ון בַּצִּיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Yet went they on still to sin against Him, to rebel against the Most High in the desert.

jps.text: Yet went they on still to sin against Him, to rebel against the Most High in the desert.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְנַסּוּ־אֵ֥ל בִּלְבָבָ֑ם לִֽשְׁאָל־אֹ֥כֶל לְנַפְשָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: And they tried God in their heart by asking food for their craving.

jps.text: And they tried God in their heart by asking food for their craving.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיְדַבְּר֗וּ בֵּֽאלֹ֫הִ֥ים אָ֭מְרוּ הֲי֣וּכַל אֵ֑ל לַעֲרֹ֥ךְ שֻׁ֝לְחָ֗ן בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
