verses.englishText: Yea, they spoke against God; they said: 'Can God prepare a table in the wilderness?

jps.text: Yea, they spoke against God; they said: 'Can God prepare a table in the wilderness?

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤ן הִכָּה־צ֨וּר ׀ וַיָּז֣וּבוּ מַיִם֮ וּנְחָלִ֪ים יִ֫שְׁטֹ֥פוּ הֲגַם־לֶ֭חֶם י֣וּכַל תֵּ֑ת אִם־יָכִ֖ין שְׁאֵ֣ר לְעַמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He smote the rock, that waters gushed out, and streams overflowed; can He give bread also? or will He provide flesh for His people?'

jps.text: Behold, He smote the rock, that waters gushed out, and streams overflowed; can He give bread also? or will He provide flesh for His people?'

verses.hebrewText: לָכֵ֤ן ׀ שָׁמַ֥ע יְהוָ֗ה וַֽיִּתְעַבָּ֥ר וְ֭אֵשׁ נִשְּׂקָ֣ה בְיַעֲקֹ֑ב וְגַם־אַ֝֗ף עָלָ֥ה בְיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Therefore the LORD heard, and was wroth; and a fire was kindled against Jacob, and anger also went up against Israel;

jps.text: Therefore the LORD heard, and was wroth; and a fire was kindled against Jacob, and anger also went up against Israel;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א הֶ֭אֱמִינוּ בֵּאלֹהִ֑ים וְלֹ֥א בָ֝טְח֗וּ בִּֽישׁוּעָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Because they believed not in God, and trusted not in His salvation.

jps.text: Because they believed not in God, and trusted not in His salvation.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְצַ֣ו שְׁחָקִ֣ים מִמָּ֑עַל וְדַלְתֵ֖י שָׁמַ֣יִם פָּתָֽח׃
verses.englishText: And He commanded the skies above, and opened the doors of heaven;

jps.text: And He commanded the skies above, and opened the doors of heaven;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּמְטֵ֬ר עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם מָ֣ן לֶאֱכֹ֑ל וּדְגַן־שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם נָ֣תַן לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: And He caused manna to rain upon them for food, and gave them of the corn of heaven.

jps.text: And He caused manna to rain upon them for food, and gave them of the corn of heaven.

verses.hebrewText: לֶ֣חֶם אַ֭בִּירִים אָ֣כַל אִ֑ישׁ צֵידָ֬ה שָׁלַ֖ח לָהֶ֣ם לָשֹֽׂבַע׃
verses.englishText: Man did eat the bread of the mighty; He sent them provisions to the full.

jps.text: Man did eat the bread of the mighty; He sent them provisions to the full.

verses.hebrewText: יַסַּ֣ע קָ֭דִים בַּשָּׁמָ֑יִם וַיְנַהֵ֖ג בְּעֻזֹּ֣ו תֵימָֽן׃
verses.englishText: He caused the east wind to set forth in heaven; and by His power He brought on the south wind.

jps.text: He caused the east wind to set forth in heaven; and by His power He brought on the south wind.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּמְטֵ֬ר עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם כֶּעָפָ֣ר שְׁאֵ֑ר וּֽכְחֹ֥ול יַ֝מִּ֗ים עֹ֣וף כָּנָֽף׃
verses.englishText: He caused flesh also to rain upon them as the dust, and winged fowl as the sand of the seas;

jps.text: He caused flesh also to rain upon them as the dust, and winged fowl as the sand of the seas;

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּפֵּל בְּקֶ֣רֶב מַחֲנֵ֑הוּ סָ֝בִ֗יב לְמִשְׁכְּנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: And He let it fall in the midst of their camp, round about their dwellings.

jps.text: And He let it fall in the midst of their camp, round about their dwellings.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּאכְל֣וּ וַיִּשְׂבְּע֣וּ מְאֹ֑ד וְ֝תַֽאֲוָתָ֗ם יָבִ֥א לָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: So they did eat, and were well filled; and He gave them that which they craved.

jps.text: So they did eat, and were well filled; and He gave them that which they craved.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־זָר֥וּ מִתַּאֲוָתָ֑ם עֹ֝֗וד אָכְלָ֥ם בְּפִיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They were not estranged from their craving, their food was yet in their mouths,

jps.text: They were not estranged from their craving, their food was yet in their mouths,

verses.hebrewText: וְאַ֤ף אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ עָ֘לָ֤ה בָהֶ֗ם וַֽ֭יַּהֲרֹג בְּמִשְׁמַנֵּיהֶ֑ם וּבַחוּרֵ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל הִכְרִֽיעַ׃
verses.englishText: When the anger of God went up against them, and slew of the lustieth among them, and smote down the young men of Israel.

jps.text: When the anger of God went up against them, and slew of the lustieth among them, and smote down the young men of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־זֹ֭את חָֽטְאוּ־עֹ֑וד וְלֹֽא־הֶ֝אֱמִ֗ינוּ בְּנִפְלְאֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: For all this they sinned still, and believed not in His wondrous works.

jps.text: For all this they sinned still, and believed not in His wondrous works.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְכַל־בַּהֶ֥בֶל יְמֵיהֶ֑ם וּ֝שְׁנֹותָ֗ם בַּבֶּהָלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Therefore He ended their days as a breath, and their years in terror.

jps.text: Therefore He ended their days as a breath, and their years in terror.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־הֲרָגָ֥ם וּדְרָשׁ֑וּהוּ וְ֝שָׁ֗בוּ וְשִֽׁחֲרוּ־אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: When He slew them, then they would inquire after Him, and turn back and seek God earnestly.

jps.text: When He slew them, then they would inquire after Him, and turn back and seek God earnestly.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יִּזְכְּרוּ כִּֽי־אֱלֹהִ֣ים צוּרָ֑ם וְאֵ֥ל עֶ֝לְיֹון גֹּאֲלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they remembered that God was their Rock, and the Most High God their redeemer.

jps.text: And they remembered that God was their Rock, and the Most High God their redeemer.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְפַתּ֥וּהוּ בְּפִיהֶ֑ם וּ֝בִלְשֹׁונָ֗ם יְכַזְּבוּ־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: But they beguiled Him with their mouth, and lied unto Him with their tongue.

jps.text: But they beguiled Him with their mouth, and lied unto Him with their tongue.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭לִבָּם לֹא־נָכֹ֣ון עִמֹּ֑ו וְלֹ֥א נֶ֝אֶמְנ֗וּ בִּבְרִיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For their heart was not stedfast with Him, neither were they faithful in His covenant.

jps.text: For their heart was not stedfast with Him, neither were they faithful in His covenant.

verses.hebrewText: וְה֤וּא רַח֨וּם ׀ יְכַפֵּ֥ר עָוֹן֮ וְֽלֹא־יַ֫שְׁחִ֥ית וְ֭הִרְבָּה לְהָשִׁ֣יב אַפֹּ֑ו וְלֹֽא־יָ֝עִיר כָּל־חֲמָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: But He, being full of compassion, forgiveth iniquity, and destroyeth not; yea, many a time doth He turn His anger away, and doth not stir up all His wrath.

jps.text: But He, being full of compassion, forgiveth iniquity, and destroyeth not; yea, many a time doth He turn His anger away, and doth not stir up all His wrath.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יִּזְכֹּר כִּי־בָשָׂ֣ר הֵ֑מָּה ר֥וּחַ הֹ֝ולֵ֗ךְ וְלֹ֣א יָשֽׁוּב׃
verses.englishText: So He remembered that they were but flesh, a wind that passeth away, and cometh not again.

jps.text: So He remembered that they were but flesh, a wind that passeth away, and cometh not again.

verses.hebrewText: כַּ֭מָּה יַמְר֣וּהוּ בַמִּדְבָּ֑ר יַ֝עֲצִיב֗וּהוּ בִּֽישִׁימֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: How oft did they rebel against Him in the wilderness, and grieve Him in the desert!

jps.text: How oft did they rebel against Him in the wilderness, and grieve Him in the desert!

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּשׁ֣וּבוּ וַיְנַסּ֣וּ אֵ֑ל וּקְדֹ֖ושׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל הִתְווּ׃
verses.englishText: And still again they tried God, and set bounds to the Holy One of Israel.

jps.text: And still again they tried God, and set bounds to the Holy One of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־זָכְר֥וּ אֶת־יָדֹ֑ו יֹ֝֗ום אֲ‍ֽשֶׁר־פָּדָ֥ם מִנִּי־צָֽר׃
verses.englishText: They remembered not His hand, nor the day when He redeemed them from the adversary.

jps.text: They remembered not His hand, nor the day when He redeemed them from the adversary.

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֣ם בְּ֭מִצְרַיִם אֹֽתֹותָ֑יו וּ֝מֹופְתָ֗יו בִּשְׂדֵה־צֹֽעַן׃
verses.englishText: How He set His signs in Egypt, and His wonders in the field of Zoan;

jps.text: How He set His signs in Egypt, and His wonders in the field of Zoan;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּהֲפֹ֣ךְ לְ֭דָם יְאֹרֵיהֶ֑ם וְ֝נֹזְלֵיהֶ֗ם בַּל־יִשְׁתָּיֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: And turned their rivers into blood, so that they could not drink their streams.

jps.text: And turned their rivers into blood, so that they could not drink their streams.

verses.hebrewText: יְשַׁלַּ֬ח בָּהֶ֣ם עָ֭רֹב וַיֹּאכְלֵ֑ם וּ֝צְפַרְדֵּ֗עַ וַתַּשְׁחִיתֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: He sent among them swarms of flies, which devoured them; and frogs, which destroyed them.

jps.text: He sent among them swarms of flies, which devoured them; and frogs, which destroyed them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לֶחָסִ֣יל יְבוּלָ֑ם וִֽ֝יגִיעָ֗ם לָאַרְבֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He gave also their increase unto the caterpillar, and their labour unto the locust.

jps.text: He gave also their increase unto the caterpillar, and their labour unto the locust.

verses.hebrewText: יַהֲרֹ֣ג בַּבָּרָ֣ד גַּפְנָ֑ם וְ֝שִׁקְמֹותָ֗ם בַּֽחֲנָמַֽל׃
verses.englishText: He destroyed their vines with hail, and their sycamore-trees with frost.

jps.text: He destroyed their vines with hail, and their sycamore-trees with frost.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּסְגֵּ֣ר לַבָּרָ֣ד בְּעִירָ֑ם וּ֝מִקְנֵיהֶ֗ם לָרְשָׁפִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He gave over their cattle also to the hail, and their flocks to fiery bolts.

jps.text: He gave over their cattle also to the hail, and their flocks to fiery bolts.

verses.hebrewText: יְשַׁלַּח־בָּ֨ם ׀ חֲרֹ֬ון אַפֹּ֗ו עֶבְרָ֣ה וָזַ֣עַם וְצָרָ֑ה מִ֝שְׁלַ֗חַת מַלְאֲכֵ֥י רָעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He sent forth upon them the fierceness of His anger, wrath, and indignation, and trouble, a sending of messengers of evil.

jps.text: He sent forth upon them the fierceness of His anger, wrath, and indignation, and trouble, a sending of messengers of evil.

verses.hebrewText: יְפַלֵּ֥ס נָתִ֗יב לְאַ֫פֹּ֥ו לֹא־חָשַׂ֣ךְ מִמָּ֣וֶת נַפְשָׁ֑ם וְ֝חַיָּתָ֗ם לַדֶּ֥בֶר הִסְגִּֽיר׃
verses.englishText: He levelled a path for His anger; He spared not their soul from death, but gave their life over to the pestilence;

jps.text: He levelled a path for His anger; He spared not their soul from death, but gave their life over to the pestilence;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֣ךְ כָּל־בְּכֹ֣ור בְּמִצְרָ֑יִם רֵאשִׁ֥ית אֹ֝ונִ֗ים בְּאָהֳלֵי־חָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And smote all the first-born in Egypt, the first-fruits of their strength in the tents of Ham;

jps.text: And smote all the first-born in Egypt, the first-fruits of their strength in the tents of Ham;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּסַּ֣ע כַּצֹּ֣אן עַמֹּ֑ו וַֽיְנַהֲגֵ֥ם כַּ֝עֵ֗דֶר בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: But He made His own people to go forth like sheep, and guided them in the wilderness like a flock.

jps.text: But He made His own people to go forth like sheep, and guided them in the wilderness like a flock.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּנְחֵ֣ם לָ֭בֶטַח וְלֹ֣א פָחָ֑דוּ וְאֶת־אֹ֝ויְבֵיהֶ֗ם כִּסָּ֥ה הַיָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: And He led them safely, and they feared not; but the sea overwhelmed their enemies.

jps.text: And He led them safely, and they feared not; but the sea overwhelmed their enemies.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יְבִיאֵם אֶל־גְּב֣וּל קָדְשֹׁ֑ו הַר־זֶ֝֗ה קָנְתָ֥ה יְמִינֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And He brought them to His holy border, to the mountain, which His right hand had gotten.

jps.text: And He brought them to His holy border, to the mountain, which His right hand had gotten.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְגָ֤רֶשׁ מִפְּנֵיהֶ֨ם ׀ גֹּויִ֗ם וַֽ֭יַּפִּילֵם בְּחֶ֣בֶל נַחֲלָ֑ה וַיַּשְׁכֵּ֥ן בְּ֝אָהֳלֵיהֶ֗ם שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: He drove out the nations also before them, and allotted them for an inheritance by line, and made the tribes of Israel to dwell in their tents.

jps.text: He drove out the nations also before them, and allotted them for an inheritance by line, and made the tribes of Israel to dwell in their tents.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְנַסּ֣וּ וַ֭יַּמְרוּ אֶת־אֱלֹהִ֣ים עֶלְיֹ֑ון וְ֝עֵדֹותָ֗יו לֹ֣א שָׁמָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yet they tried and provoked God, the Most High, and kept not His testimonies;

jps.text: Yet they tried and provoked God, the Most High, and kept not His testimonies;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּסֹּ֣גוּ וַֽ֭יִּבְגְּדוּ כַּאֲבֹותָ֑ם נֶ֝הְפְּכ֗וּ כְּקֶ֣שֶׁת רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: But turned back, and dealt treacherously like their fathers; they were turned aside like a deceitful bow.

jps.text: But turned back, and dealt treacherously like their fathers; they were turned aside like a deceitful bow.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּכְעִיס֥וּהוּ בְּבָמֹותָ֑ם וּ֝בִפְסִילֵיהֶ֗ם יַקְנִיאֽוּהוּ׃
verses.englishText: For they provoked Him with their high places, and moved Him to jealousy with their graven images.

jps.text: For they provoked Him with their high places, and moved Him to jealousy with their graven images.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמַ֣ע אֱ֭לֹהִים וַֽיִּתְעַבָּ֑ר וַיִּמְאַ֥ס מְ֝אֹ֗ד בְּיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: God heard, and was wroth, and He greatly abhorred Israel;

jps.text: God heard, and was wroth, and He greatly abhorred Israel;

verses.englishText: And He forsook the tabernacle of Shiloh, the tent which He had made to dwell among men;

jps.text: And He forsook the tabernacle of Shiloh, the tent which He had made to dwell among men;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לַשְּׁבִ֣י עֻזֹּ֑ו וְֽתִפְאַרְתֹּ֥ו בְיַד־צָֽר׃
verses.englishText: And delivered His strength into captivity, and His glory into the adversary's hand.

jps.text: And delivered His strength into captivity, and His glory into the adversary's hand.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּסְגֵּ֣ר לַחֶ֣רֶב עַמֹּ֑ו וּ֝בְנַחֲלָתֹ֗ו הִתְעַבָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: He gave His people over also unto the sword; and was wroth with His inheritance.

jps.text: He gave His people over also unto the sword; and was wroth with His inheritance.

verses.hebrewText: בַּחוּרָ֥יו אָֽכְלָה־אֵ֑שׁ וּ֝בְתוּלֹתָ֗יו לֹ֣א הוּלָּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: Fire devoured their young men; and their virgins had no marriage-song.

jps.text: Fire devoured their young men; and their virgins had no marriage-song.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֭הֲנָיו בַּחֶ֣רֶב נָפָ֑לוּ וְ֝אַלְמְנֹתָ֗יו לֹ֣א תִבְכֶּֽינָה׃
verses.englishText: Their priests fell by the sword; and their widows made no lamentation.

jps.text: Their priests fell by the sword; and their widows made no lamentation.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּקַ֖ץ כְּיָשֵׁ֥ן ׀ אֲדֹנָ֑י כְּ֝גִבֹּ֗ור מִתְרֹונֵ֥ן מִיָּֽיִן׃
verses.englishText: Then the Lord awaked as one asleep, like a mighty man recovering from wine.

jps.text: Then the Lord awaked as one asleep, like a mighty man recovering from wine.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּךְ־צָרָ֥יו אָחֹ֑ור חֶרְפַּ֥ת עֹ֝ולָ֗ם נָ֣תַן לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: And He smote His adversaries backward; He put upon them a perpetual reproach.

jps.text: And He smote His adversaries backward; He put upon them a perpetual reproach.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יִּמְאַס בְּאֹ֣הֶל יֹוסֵ֑ף וּֽבְשֵׁ֥בֶט אֶ֝פְרַ֗יִם לֹ֣א בָחָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Moreover He abhorred the tent of Joseph, and chose not the tribe of Ephraim;

jps.text: Moreover He abhorred the tent of Joseph, and chose not the tribe of Ephraim;

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יִּבְחַר אֶת־שֵׁ֣בֶט יְהוּדָ֑ה אֶֽת־הַ֥ר צִ֝יֹּ֗ון אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָהֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: But chose the tribe of Judah, the mount Zion which He loved.

jps.text: But chose the tribe of Judah, the mount Zion which He loved.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּ֣בֶן כְּמֹו־רָ֭מִים מִקְדָּשֹׁ֑ו כְּ֝אֶ֗רֶץ יְסָדָ֥הּ לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And He built His sanctuary like the heights, like the earth which He hath founded for ever.

jps.text: And He built His sanctuary like the heights, like the earth which He hath founded for ever.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יִּבְחַר בְּדָוִ֣ד עַבְדֹּ֑ו וַ֝יִּקָּחֵ֗הוּ מִֽמִּכְלְאֹ֥ת צֹֽאן׃
verses.englishText: He chose David also His servant, and took him from the sheepfolds;

jps.text: He chose David also His servant, and took him from the sheepfolds;

verses.hebrewText: מֵאַחַ֥ר עָלֹ֗ות הֱ֫בִיאֹ֥ו לִ֭רְעֹות בְּיַעֲקֹ֣ב עַמֹּ֑ו וּ֝בְיִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל נַחֲלָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: From following the ewes that give suck He brought him, to be shepherd over Jacob His people, and Israel His inheritance.

jps.text: From following the ewes that give suck He brought him, to be shepherd over Jacob His people, and Israel His inheritance.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יִּרְעֵם כְּתֹ֣ם לְבָבֹ֑ו וּבִתְבוּנֹ֖ות כַּפָּ֣יו יַנְחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: So he shepherded them according to the integrity of his heart; and lead them by the skilfulness of his hands.

jps.text: So he shepherded them according to the integrity of his heart; and lead them by the skilfulness of his hands.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֡ים בָּ֤אוּ גֹויִ֨ם ׀ בְּֽנַחֲלָתֶ֗ךָ טִ֭מְּאוּ אֶת־הֵיכַ֣ל קָדְשֶׁ֑ךָ שָׂ֖מוּ אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֣͏ִם לְעִיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. O God, the heathen are come into Thine inheritance; they have defiled Thy holy temple; they have made Jerusalem into heaps.

jps.text: A Psalm of Asaph. O God, the heathen are come into Thine inheritance; they have defiled Thy holy temple; they have made Jerusalem into heaps.

verses.hebrewText: נָֽתְנ֡וּ אֶת־נִבְלַ֬ת עֲבָדֶ֗יךָ מַ֭אֲכָל לְעֹ֣וף הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם בְּשַׂ֥ר חֲ֝סִידֶ֗יךָ לְחַיְתֹו־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: They have given the dead bodies of Thy servants to be food unto the fowls of the heaven, the flesh of Thy saints unto the beasts of the earth.

jps.text: They have given the dead bodies of Thy servants to be food unto the fowls of the heaven, the flesh of Thy saints unto the beasts of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁפְכ֬וּ דָמָ֨ם ׀ כַּמַּ֗יִם סְֽבִ֘יבֹ֤ות יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם וְאֵ֣ין קֹובֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: They have shed their blood like water round about Jerusalem, with none to bury them.

jps.text: They have shed their blood like water round about Jerusalem, with none to bury them.

verses.hebrewText: הָיִ֣ינוּ חֶ֭רְפָּה לִשְׁכֵנֵ֑ינוּ לַ֥עַג וָ֝קֶ֗לֶס לִסְבִיבֹותֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: We are become a taunt to our neighbours, a scorn and derision to them that are round about us.

jps.text: We are become a taunt to our neighbours, a scorn and derision to them that are round about us.

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה תֶּאֱנַ֣ף לָנֶ֑צַח תִּבְעַ֥ר כְּמֹו־אֵ֝֗שׁ קִנְאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou be angry for ever? How long will Thy jealousy burn like fire?

jps.text: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou be angry for ever? How long will Thy jealousy burn like fire?

verses.hebrewText: שְׁפֹ֤ךְ חֲמָתְךָ֨ אֶֽל־הַגֹּויִם֮ אֲשֶׁ֪ר לֹא־יְדָ֫ע֥וּךָ וְעַ֥ל מַמְלָכֹ֑ות אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּ֝שִׁמְךָ֗ לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: Pour out Thy wrath upon the nations that know Thee not, and upon the kingdoms that call not upon Thy name.

jps.text: Pour out Thy wrath upon the nations that know Thee not, and upon the kingdoms that call not upon Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭י אָכַ֣ל אֶֽת־יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְֽאֶת־נָוֵ֥הוּ הֵשַֽׁמּוּ׃
verses.englishText: For they have devoured Jacob, and laid waste his habitation.

jps.text: For they have devoured Jacob, and laid waste his habitation.

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תִּזְכָּר־לָנוּ֮ עֲוֹנֹ֪ת רִאשֹׁ֫נִ֥ים מַ֭הֵר יְקַדְּמ֣וּנוּ רַחֲמֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י דַלֹּ֣ונוּ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Remember not against us the iniquities of our forefathers; let Thy compassions speedily come to meet us; for we are brought very low.

jps.text: Remember not against us the iniquities of our forefathers; let Thy compassions speedily come to meet us; for we are brought very low.

verses.hebrewText: עָזְרֵ֤נוּ ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י יִשְׁעֵ֗נוּ עַל־דְּבַ֥ר כְּבֹֽוד־שְׁמֶ֑ךָ וְהַצִּילֵ֥נוּ וְכַפֵּ֥ר עַל־חַ֝טֹּאתֵ֗ינוּ לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Help us, O God of our salvation, for the sake of the glory of Thy name; and deliver us, and forgive our sins, for Thy name's sake.

jps.text: Help us, O God of our salvation, for the sake of the glory of Thy name; and deliver us, and forgive our sins, for Thy name's sake.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֤מָּה ׀ יֹאמְר֣וּ הַגֹּויִם֮ אַיֵּ֪ה אֱ‍ֽלֹהֵ֫יהֶ֥ם יִוָּדַ֣ע *בַּגִּיִּים (בַּגֹּויִ֣ם) לְעֵינֵ֑ינוּ נִ֝קְמַ֗ת דַּֽם־עֲבָדֶ֥יךָ הַשָּׁפֽוּךְ׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore should the nations say: 'Where is their God?' Let the avenging of Thy servants' blood that is shed be made known among the nations in our sight.

jps.text: Wherefore should the nations say: 'Where is their God?' Let the avenging of Thy servants' blood that is shed be made known among the nations in our sight.

verses.hebrewText: תָּ֤בֹ֣וא לְפָנֶיךָ֮ אֶנְקַ֪ת אָ֫סִ֥יר כְּגֹ֥דֶל זְרֹועֲךָ֑ הֹ֝ותֵ֗ר בְּנֵ֣י תְמוּתָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let the groaning of the prisoner come before Thee; according to the greatness of Thy power set free those that are appointed to death;

jps.text: Let the groaning of the prisoner come before Thee; according to the greatness of Thy power set free those that are appointed to death;

verses.hebrewText: וְהָ֘שֵׁ֤ב לִשְׁכֵנֵ֣ינוּ שִׁ֭בְעָתַיִם אֶל־חֵיקָ֑ם חֶרְפָּ֘תָ֤ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר חֵרְפ֣וּךָ אֲדֹנֽ͏ָי׃
verses.englishText: And render unto our neighbours sevenfold into their bosom their reproach, wherewith they have reproached Thee, O Lord.

jps.text: And render unto our neighbours sevenfold into their bosom their reproach, wherewith they have reproached Thee, O Lord.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנַ֤חְנוּ עַמְּךָ֨ ׀ וְצֹ֥אן מַרְעִיתֶךָ֮ נֹ֤ודֶ֥ה לְּךָ֗ לְעֹ֫ולָ֥ם לְדֹ֥ר וָדֹ֑ר נְ֝סַפֵּ֗ר תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: So we that are Thy people and the flock of Thy pasture will give Thee thanks for ever; we will tell of Thy praise to all generations.

jps.text: So we that are Thy people and the flock of Thy pasture will give Thee thanks for ever; we will tell of Thy praise to all generations.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ אֶל־שֹׁשַׁנִּ֑ים עֵד֖וּת לְאָסָ֣ף מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim. A testimony. A Psalm of Asaph.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim. A testimony. A Psalm of Asaph.

verses.hebrewText: רֹ֘עֵ֤ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֨ל ׀ הַאֲזִ֗ינָה נֹהֵ֣ג כַּצֹּ֣אן יֹוסֵ֑ף יֹשֵׁ֖ב הַכְּרוּבִ֣ים הֹופִֽיעָה׃
verses.englishText: Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, Thou that leadest Joseph like a flock; Thou that art enthroned upon the cherubim, shine forth.

jps.text: Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, Thou that leadest Joseph like a flock; Thou that art enthroned upon the cherubim, shine forth.

verses.hebrewText: לִפְנֵ֤י אֶפְרַ֨יִם ׀ וּבִנְיָ֘מִ֤ן וּמְנַשֶּׁ֗ה עֹורְרָ֥ה אֶת־גְּבֽוּרָתֶ֑ךָ וּלְכָ֖ה לִישֻׁעָ֣תָה לָּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, stir up Thy might, and come to save us.

jps.text: Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, stir up Thy might, and come to save us.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֥ים הֲשִׁיבֵ֑נוּ וְהָאֵ֥ר פָּ֝נֶ֗יךָ וְנִוָּשֵֽׁעָה׃
verses.englishText: O God, restore us; and cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.

jps.text: O God, restore us; and cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים צְבָאֹ֑ות עַד־מָתַ֥י עָ֝שַׁ֗נְתָּ בִּתְפִלַּ֥ת עַמֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD God of hosts, how long wilt Thou be angry against the prayer of Thy people?

jps.text: O LORD God of hosts, how long wilt Thou be angry against the prayer of Thy people?

verses.hebrewText: הֶ֭אֱכַלְתָּם לֶ֣חֶם דִּמְעָ֑ה וַ֝תַּשְׁקֵ֗מֹו בִּדְמָעֹ֥ות שָׁלִֽישׁ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast fed them with the bread of tears, and given them tears to drink in large measure.

jps.text: Thou hast fed them with the bread of tears, and given them tears to drink in large measure.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשִׂימֵ֣נוּ מָ֭דֹון לִשְׁכֵנֵ֑ינוּ וְ֝אֹיְבֵ֗ינוּ יִלְעֲגוּ־לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Thou makest us a strife unto our neighbours; and our enemies mock as they please.

jps.text: Thou makest us a strife unto our neighbours; and our enemies mock as they please.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֣ים צְבָאֹ֣ות הֲשִׁיבֵ֑נוּ וְהָאֵ֥ר פָּ֝נֶ֗יךָ וְנִוָּשֵֽׁעָה׃
verses.englishText: O God of hosts, restore us; and cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.

jps.text: O God of hosts, restore us; and cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.

verses.hebrewText: גֶּ֭פֶן מִמִּצְרַ֣יִם תַּסִּ֑יעַ תְּגָרֵ֥שׁ גֹּ֝ויִ֗ם וַתִּטָּעֶֽהָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst pluck up a vine out of Egypt; Thou didst drive out the nations, and didst plant it.

jps.text: Thou didst pluck up a vine out of Egypt; Thou didst drive out the nations, and didst plant it.

verses.hebrewText: פִּנִּ֥יתָ לְפָנֶ֑יהָ וַתַּשְׁרֵ֥שׁ שָׁ֝רָשֶׁ֗יהָ וַתְּמַלֵּא־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst clear a place before it, and it took deep root, and filled the land.

jps.text: Thou didst clear a place before it, and it took deep root, and filled the land.

verses.hebrewText: כָּסּ֣וּ הָרִ֣ים צִלָּ֑הּ וַ֝עֲנָפֶ֗יהָ אַֽרְזֵי־אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: The mountains were covered with the shadow of it, and the mighty cedars with the boughs thereof.

jps.text: The mountains were covered with the shadow of it, and the mighty cedars with the boughs thereof.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשַׁלַּ֣ח קְצִירֶ֣הָ עַד־יָ֑ם וְאֶל־נָ֝הָ֗ר יֹֽונְקֹותֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: She sent out her branches unto the sea, and her shoots unto the River.

jps.text: She sent out her branches unto the sea, and her shoots unto the River.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭מָּה פָּרַ֣צְתָּ גְדֵרֶ֑יהָ וְ֝אָר֗וּהָ כָּל־עֹ֥בְרֵי דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: Why hast Thou broken down her fences, so that all they that pass by the way do pluck her?

jps.text: Why hast Thou broken down her fences, so that all they that pass by the way do pluck her?

verses.hebrewText: יְכַרְסְמֶ֣נָּֽה חֲזִ֣יר מִיָּ֑עַר וְזִ֖יז שָׂדַ֣י יִרְעֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: The boar out of the wood doth ravage it, that which moveth in the field feedeth on it.

jps.text: The boar out of the wood doth ravage it, that which moveth in the field feedeth on it.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֣ים צְבָאֹות֮ שֽׁ֫וּב־נָ֥א הַבֵּ֣ט מִשָּׁמַ֣יִם וּרְאֵ֑ה וּ֝פְקֹ֗ד גֶּ֣פֶן זֹֽאת׃
verses.englishText: O God of hosts, return, we beseech Thee; look from heaven, and behold, and be mindful of this vine,

jps.text: O God of hosts, return, we beseech Thee; look from heaven, and behold, and be mindful of this vine,

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭כַנָּה אֲשֶׁר־נָטְעָ֣ה יְמִינֶ֑ךָ וְעַל־בֵּ֝֗ן אִמַּ֥צְתָּה לָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: And of the stock which Thy right hand hath planted, and the branch that Thou madest strong for Thyself.

jps.text: And of the stock which Thy right hand hath planted, and the branch that Thou madest strong for Thyself.

verses.hebrewText: שְׂרֻפָ֣ה בָאֵ֣שׁ כְּסוּחָ֑ה מִגַּעֲרַ֖ת פָּנֶ֣יךָ יֹאבֵֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; they perish at the rebuke of Thy countenance.

jps.text: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; they perish at the rebuke of Thy countenance.

verses.hebrewText: תְּֽהִי־יָ֭דְךָ עַל־אִ֣ישׁ יְמִינֶ֑ךָ עַל־בֶּן־אָ֝דָ֗ם אִמַּ֥צְתָּ לָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Let Thy hand be upon the man of Thy right hand, upon the son of man whom Thou madest strong for Thyself.

jps.text: Let Thy hand be upon the man of Thy right hand, upon the son of man whom Thou madest strong for Thyself.

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹא־נָסֹ֥וג מִמֶּ֑ךָּ תְּ֝חַיֵּ֗נוּ וּבְשִׁמְךָ֥ נִקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: So shall we not turn back from Thee; quicken Thou us, and we will call upon Thy name.

jps.text: So shall we not turn back from Thee; quicken Thou us, and we will call upon Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: יְה֘וָ֤ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים צְבָאֹ֣ות הֲשִׁיבֵ֑נוּ הָאֵ֥ר פָּ֝נֶ֗יךָ וְנִוָּשֵֽׁעָה׃
verses.englishText: O LORD God of hosts, restore us; cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.

jps.text: O LORD God of hosts, restore us; cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ ׀ עַֽל־הַגִּתִּ֬ית לְאָסָֽף׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of Asaph.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of Asaph.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭רְנִינוּ לֵאלֹהִ֣ים עוּזֵּ֑נוּ הָ֝רִ֗יעוּ לֵאלֹהֵ֥י יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: Sing aloud unto God our strength; shout unto the God of Jacob.

jps.text: Sing aloud unto God our strength; shout unto the God of Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: שְֽׂאוּ־זִ֭מְרָה וּתְנוּ־תֹ֑ף כִּנֹּ֖ור נָעִ֣ים עִם־נָֽבֶל׃
verses.englishText: Take up the melody, and sound the timbrel, the sweet harp with the psaltery.

jps.text: Take up the melody, and sound the timbrel, the sweet harp with the psaltery.

verses.hebrewText: תִּקְע֣וּ בַחֹ֣דֶשׁ שֹׁופָ֑ר בַּ֝כֵּ֗סֶה לְיֹ֣ום חַגֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Blow the horn at the new moon, at the full moon for our feast-day.

jps.text: Blow the horn at the new moon, at the full moon for our feast-day.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י חֹ֣ק לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל ה֑וּא מִ֝שְׁפָּ֗ט לֵאלֹהֵ֥י יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: For it is a statute for Israel, an ordinance of the God of Jacob.

jps.text: For it is a statute for Israel, an ordinance of the God of Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֤דוּת ׀ בִּֽיהֹ֘וסֵ֤ף שָׂמֹ֗ו בְּ֭צֵאתֹו עַל־אֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם שְׂפַ֖ת לֹא־יָדַ֣עְתִּי אֶשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: He appointed it in Joseph for a testimony, when He went forth against the land of Egypt. The speech of one that I knew not did I hear:

jps.text: He appointed it in Joseph for a testimony, when He went forth against the land of Egypt. The speech of one that I knew not did I hear:

verses.hebrewText: הֲסִירֹ֣ותִי מִסֵּ֣בֶל שִׁכְמֹ֑ו כַּ֝פָּ֗יו מִדּ֥וּד תַּעֲבֹֽרְנָה׃
verses.englishText: 'I removed his shoulder from the burden; His hands were freed from the basket.

jps.text: 'I removed his shoulder from the burden; His hands were freed from the basket.

verses.hebrewText: בַּצָּרָ֥ה קָרָ֗אתָ וָאֲחַ֫לְּצֶ֥ךָּ אֶ֭עֶנְךָ בְּסֵ֣תֶר רַ֑עַם אֶבְחָֽנְךָ֨ עַל־מֵ֖י מְרִיבָ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst call in trouble, and I rescued thee; I answered thee in the secret place of thunder; I proved thee at the waters of Meribah. Selah

jps.text: Thou didst call in trouble, and I rescued thee; I answered thee in the secret place of thunder; I proved thee at the waters of Meribah. Selah

verses.hebrewText: שְׁמַ֣ע עַ֭מִּי וְאָעִ֣ידָה בָּ֑ךְ יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל אִם־תִּֽשְׁמַֽע־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Hear, O My people, and I will admonish thee: O Israel, if thou wouldest hearken unto Me!

jps.text: Hear, O My people, and I will admonish thee: O Israel, if thou wouldest hearken unto Me!

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יִהְיֶ֣ה בְ֭ךָ אֵ֣ל זָ֑ר וְלֹ֥א תִ֝שְׁתַּחֲוֶ֗ה לְאֵ֣ל נֵכָֽר׃
verses.englishText: There shall no strange god be in thee; neither shalt thou worship any foreign god.

jps.text: There shall no strange god be in thee; neither shalt thou worship any foreign god.

verses.hebrewText: אָנֹכִ֨י ׀ יְה֘וָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֗יךָ הַֽ֭מַּעַלְךָ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם הַרְחֶב־פִּ֝֗יךָ וַאֲמַלְאֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: I am the LORD thy God, who brought thee up out of the land of Egypt; open thy mouth wide, and I will fill it.

jps.text: I am the LORD thy God, who brought thee up out of the land of Egypt; open thy mouth wide, and I will fill it.

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹא־שָׁמַ֣ע עַמִּ֣י לְקֹולִ֑י וְ֝יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל לֹא־אָ֥בָה לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But My people hearkened not to My voice; and Israel would none of Me.

jps.text: But My people hearkened not to My voice; and Israel would none of Me.

verses.hebrewText: וָֽ֭אֲשַׁלְּחֵהוּ בִּשְׁרִיר֣וּת לִבָּ֑ם יֵ֝לְכ֗וּ בְּֽמֹועֲצֹותֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: So I let them go after the stubbornness of their heart, that they might walk in their own counsels.

jps.text: So I let them go after the stubbornness of their heart, that they might walk in their own counsels.

verses.hebrewText: ל֗וּ עַ֭מִּי שֹׁמֵ֣עַֽ לִ֑י יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל בִּדְרָכַ֥י יְהַלֵּֽכוּ׃
verses.englishText: Oh that My people would hearken unto Me, that Israel would walk in My ways!

jps.text: Oh that My people would hearken unto Me, that Israel would walk in My ways!

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭מְעַט אֹויְבֵיהֶ֣ם אַכְנִ֑יעַ וְעַ֥ל צָ֝רֵיהֶ֗ם אָשִׁ֥יב יָדִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I would soon subdue their enemies, and turn My hand against their adversaries.

jps.text: I would soon subdue their enemies, and turn My hand against their adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: מְשַׂנְאֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה יְכַֽחֲשׁוּ־לֹ֑ו וִיהִ֖י עִתָּ֣ם לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The haters of the LORD should dwindle away before Him; and their punishment should endure for ever.

jps.text: The haters of the LORD should dwindle away before Him; and their punishment should endure for ever.

verses.hebrewText: וֽ͏ַ֭יַּאֲכִילֵהוּ מֵחֵ֣לֶב חִטָּ֑ה וּ֝מִצּ֗וּר דְּבַ֣שׁ אַשְׂבִּיעֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: They should also be fed with the fat of wheat; and with honey out of the rock would I satisfy thee.'

jps.text: They should also be fed with the fat of wheat; and with honey out of the rock would I satisfy thee.'

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְאָ֫סָ֥ף אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים נִצָּ֥ב בַּעֲדַת־אֵ֑ל בְּקֶ֖רֶב אֱלֹהִ֣ים יִשְׁפֹּֽט׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. God standeth in the congregation of God; in the midst of the judges He judgeth:

jps.text: A Psalm of Asaph. God standeth in the congregation of God; in the midst of the judges He judgeth:

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָתַ֥י תִּשְׁפְּטוּ־עָ֑וֶל וּפְנֵ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תִּשְׂאוּ־סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: 'How long will ye judge unjustly, and respect the persons of the wicked? Selah

jps.text: 'How long will ye judge unjustly, and respect the persons of the wicked? Selah

verses.hebrewText: שִׁפְטוּ־דַ֥ל וְיָתֹ֑ום עָנִ֖י וָרָ֣שׁ הַצְדִּֽיקוּ׃
verses.englishText: Judge the poor and fatherless; do justice to the afflicted and destitute.

jps.text: Judge the poor and fatherless; do justice to the afflicted and destitute.

verses.hebrewText: פַּלְּטוּ־דַ֥ל וְאֶבְיֹ֑ון מִיַּ֖ד רְשָׁעִ֣ים הַצִּֽילוּ׃
verses.englishText: Rescue the poor and needy; deliver them out of the hand of the wicked.

jps.text: Rescue the poor and needy; deliver them out of the hand of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֤א יָֽדְע֨וּ ׀ וְלֹ֥א יָבִ֗ינוּ בַּחֲשֵׁכָ֥ה יִתְהַלָּ֑כוּ יִ֝מֹּ֗וטוּ כָּל־מֹ֥וסְדֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: They know not, neither do they understand; they go about in darkness; all the foundations of the earth are moved.

jps.text: They know not, neither do they understand; they go about in darkness; all the foundations of the earth are moved.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ‍ֽנִי־אָ֭מַרְתִּי אֱלֹהִ֣ים אַתֶּ֑ם וּבְנֵ֖י עֶלְיֹ֣ון כֻּלְּכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: I said: Ye are godlike beings, and all of you sons of the Most High.

jps.text: I said: Ye are godlike beings, and all of you sons of the Most High.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭כֵן כְּאָדָ֣ם תְּמוּת֑וּן וּכְאַחַ֖ד הַשָּׂרִ֣ים תִּפֹּֽלוּ׃
verses.englishText: Nevertheless ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes.'

jps.text: Nevertheless ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes.'

verses.hebrewText: קוּמָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים שָׁפְטָ֣ה הָאָ֑רֶץ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה תִ֝נְחַ֗ל בְּכָל־הַגֹּויִֽם׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O God, judge the earth; for Thou shalt possess all nations.

jps.text: Arise, O God, judge the earth; for Thou shalt possess all nations.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֖יר מִזְמֹ֣ור לְאָסָֽף׃
verses.englishText: A Song, a Psalm of Asaph.

jps.text: A Song, a Psalm of Asaph.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֥ים אַל־דֳּמִי־לָ֑ךְ אַל־תֶּחֱרַ֖שׁ וְאַל־תִּשְׁקֹ֣ט אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: O God, keep not Thou silence; hold not Thy peace, and be not still, O God.

jps.text: O God, keep not Thou silence; hold not Thy peace, and be not still, O God.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֣ה אֹ֭ויְבֶיךָ יֶהֱמָי֑וּן וּ֝מְשַׂנְאֶ֗יךָ נָ֣שְׂאוּ רֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.englishText: For, lo, Thine enemies are in an uproar; and they that hate Thee have lifted up the head.

jps.text: For, lo, Thine enemies are in an uproar; and they that hate Thee have lifted up the head.

verses.hebrewText: עַֽל־עַ֭מְּךָ יַעֲרִ֣ימוּ סֹ֑וד וְ֝יִתְיָעֲצ֗וּ עַל־צְפוּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: They hold crafty converse against Thy people, and take counsel against Thy treasured ones.

jps.text: They hold crafty converse against Thy people, and take counsel against Thy treasured ones.

verses.hebrewText: אָמְר֗וּ לְ֭כוּ וְנַכְחִידֵ֣ם מִגֹּ֑וי וְלֹֽא־יִזָּכֵ֖ר שֵֽׁם־יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל עֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: They have said: 'Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation; that the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance.'

jps.text: They have said: 'Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation; that the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance.'

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י נֹועֲצ֣וּ לֵ֣ב יַחְדָּ֑ו עָ֝לֶ֗יךָ בְּרִ֣ית יִכְרֹֽתוּ׃
verses.englishText: For they have consulted together with one consent; against Thee do they make a covenant;

jps.text: For they have consulted together with one consent; against Thee do they make a covenant;

verses.hebrewText: אָהֳלֵ֣י אֱ֭דֹום וְיִשְׁמְעֵאלִ֗ים מֹואָ֥ב וְהַגְרֽ͏ִים׃
verses.englishText: The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites; Moab, and the Hagrites;

jps.text: The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites; Moab, and the Hagrites;

verses.hebrewText: גְּבָ֣ל וְ֭עַמֹּון וַעֲמָלֵ֑ק פְּ֝לֶ֗שֶׁת עִם־יֹ֥שְׁבֵי צֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Gebal, and Ammon, and Amalek; Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;

jps.text: Gebal, and Ammon, and Amalek; Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־אַ֭שּׁוּר נִלְוָ֣ה עִמָּ֑ם הָ֤י֥וּ זְרֹ֖ועַ לִבְנֵי־לֹ֣וט סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Assyria also is joined with them; they have been an arm to the children of Lot. Selah

jps.text: Assyria also is joined with them; they have been an arm to the children of Lot. Selah

verses.hebrewText: עֲשֵֽׂה־לָהֶ֥ם כְּמִדְיָ֑ן כְּֽסִֽיסְרָ֥א כְ֝יָבִ֗ין בְּנַ֣חַל קִישֹֽׁון׃
verses.englishText: Do Thou unto them as unto Midian; as to Sisera, as to Jabin, at the brook Kishon;

jps.text: Do Thou unto them as unto Midian; as to Sisera, as to Jabin, at the brook Kishon;

verses.hebrewText: נִשְׁמְד֥וּ בְֽעֵין־דֹּ֑אר הָ֥יוּ דֹּ֝֗מֶן לָאֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who were destroyed at En-dor; they became as dung for the earth.

jps.text: Who were destroyed at En-dor; they became as dung for the earth.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁיתֵ֣מֹו נְ֭דִיבֵמֹו כְּעֹרֵ֣ב וְכִזְאֵ֑ב וּֽכְזֶ֥בַח וּ֝כְצַלְמֻנָּ֗ע כָּל־נְסִיכֵֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb, and like Zebah and Zalmunna all their princes;

jps.text: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb, and like Zebah and Zalmunna all their princes;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָ֭מְרוּ נִ֣ירֲשָׁה לָּ֑נוּ אֵ֝֗ת נְאֹ֣ות אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Who said: 'Let us take to ourselves in possession the habitations of God.'

jps.text: Who said: 'Let us take to ourselves in possession the habitations of God.'

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהַ֗י שִׁיתֵ֥מֹו כַגַּלְגַּ֑ל כְּ֝קַ֗שׁ לִפְנֵי־רֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: O my God, make them like the whirling dust; as stubble before the wind.

jps.text: O my God, make them like the whirling dust; as stubble before the wind.

verses.hebrewText: כְּאֵ֥שׁ תִּבְעַר־יָ֑עַר וּ֝כְלֶהָבָ֗ה תְּלַהֵ֥ט הָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: As the fire that burneth the forest, and as the flame that setteth the mountains ablaze;

jps.text: As the fire that burneth the forest, and as the flame that setteth the mountains ablaze;

verses.hebrewText: כֵּ֭ן תִּרְדְּפֵ֣ם בְּסַעֲרֶ֑ךָ וּבְסוּפָתְךָ֥ תְבַהֲלֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: So pursue them with Thy tempest, and affright them with Thy storm.

jps.text: So pursue them with Thy tempest, and affright them with Thy storm.

verses.hebrewText: מַלֵּ֣א פְנֵיהֶ֣ם קָלֹ֑ון וִֽיבַקְשׁ֖וּ שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Fill their faces with shame; that they may seek Thy name, O LORD.

jps.text: Fill their faces with shame; that they may seek Thy name, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֖שׁוּ וְיִבָּהֲל֥וּ עֲדֵי־עַ֗ד וְֽיַחְפְּר֥וּ וְיֹאבֵֽדוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and affrighted for ever; yea, let them be abashed and perish;

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and affrighted for ever; yea, let them be abashed and perish;

verses.hebrewText: וֽ͏ְיֵדְע֗וּ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֬ה שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהוָ֣ה לְבַדֶּ֑ךָ עֶ֝לְיֹ֗ון עַל־כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: That they may know that it is Thou alone whose name is the LORD, the Most High over all the earth.

jps.text: That they may know that it is Thou alone whose name is the LORD, the Most High over all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֥חַ עַֽל־הַגִּתִּ֑ית לִבְנֵי־קֹ֥רַח מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.

jps.text: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־יְּדִידֹ֥ות מִשְׁכְּנֹותֶ֗יךָ יְהוָ֥ה צְבָאֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: How lovely are Thy tabernacles, O LORD of hosts!

jps.text: How lovely are Thy tabernacles, O LORD of hosts!

verses.hebrewText: נִכְסְפָ֬ה וְגַם־כָּלְתָ֨ה ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ לְחַצְרֹ֪ות יְה֫וָ֥ה לִבִּ֥י וּבְשָׂרִ֑י יְ֝רַנְּנ֗וּ אֶ֣ל אֵֽל־חָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My soul yearneth, yea, even pineth for the courts of the LORD; my heart and my flesh sing for joy unto the living God.

jps.text: My soul yearneth, yea, even pineth for the courts of the LORD; my heart and my flesh sing for joy unto the living God.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־צִפֹּ֨ור ׀ מָ֪צְאָה בַ֡יִת וּדְרֹ֤ור ׀ קֵ֥ן לָהּ֮ אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֪תָה אֶפְרֹ֫חֶ֥יהָ אֶֽת־מִ֭זְבְּחֹותֶיךָ יְהוָ֣ה צְבָאֹ֑ות מַ֝לְכִּ֗י וֵאלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Yea, the sparrow hath found a house, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may lay her young; Thine altars, O LORD of hosts, my King, and my God — .

jps.text: Yea, the sparrow hath found a house, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may lay her young; Thine altars, O LORD of hosts, my King, and my God — .

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭שְׁרֵי יֹושְׁבֵ֣י בֵיתֶ֑ךָ עֹ֝֗וד יְֽהַלְל֥וּךָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Happy are they that dwell in Thy house, they are ever praising Thee. Selah

jps.text: Happy are they that dwell in Thy house, they are ever praising Thee. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֣י אָ֭דָם עֹֽוז־לֹ֥ו בָ֑ךְ מְ֝סִלֹּ֗ות בִּלְבָבָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man whose strength is in Thee; in whose heart are the highways.

jps.text: Happy is the man whose strength is in Thee; in whose heart are the highways.

verses.hebrewText: עֹבְרֵ֤י ׀ בְּעֵ֣מֶק הַ֭בָּכָא מַעְיָ֣ן יְשִׁית֑וּהוּ גַּם־בְּ֝רָכֹ֗ות יַעְטֶ֥ה מֹורֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Passing through the valley of Baca they make it a place of springs; yea, the early rain clotheth it with blessings.

jps.text: Passing through the valley of Baca they make it a place of springs; yea, the early rain clotheth it with blessings.

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֭לְכוּ מֵחַ֣יִל אֶל־חָ֑יִל יֵרָאֶ֖ה אֶל־אֱלֹהִ֣ים בְּצִיֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: They go from strength to strength, every one of them appeareth before God in Zion.

jps.text: They go from strength to strength, every one of them appeareth before God in Zion.

verses.hebrewText: יְה֘וָ֤ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים צְ֭בָאֹות שִׁמְעָ֣ה תְפִלָּתִ֑י הַאֲזִ֨ינָה אֱלֹהֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: O LORD God of hosts, hear my prayer; give ear, O God of Jacob. Selah

jps.text: O LORD God of hosts, hear my prayer; give ear, O God of Jacob. Selah

verses.hebrewText: מָ֭גִנֵּנוּ רְאֵ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְ֝הַבֵּ֗ט פְּנֵ֣י מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, O God our shield, and look upon the face of Thine anointed.

jps.text: Behold, O God our shield, and look upon the face of Thine anointed.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י טֹֽוב־יֹ֥ום בַּחֲצֵרֶ֗יךָ מֵ֫אָ֥לֶף בָּחַ֗רְתִּי הִ֭סְתֹּופֵף בְּבֵ֣ית אֱלֹהַ֑י מִ֝דּ֗וּר בְּאָהֳלֵי־רֶֽשַׁע׃
verses.englishText: For a day in Thy courts is better than a thousand; I had rather stand at the threshold of the house of my God, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness.

jps.text: For a day in Thy courts is better than a thousand; I had rather stand at the threshold of the house of my God, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שֶׁ֨מֶשׁ ׀ וּמָגֵן֮ יְהוָ֪ה אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים חֵ֣ן וְ֭כָבֹוד יִתֵּ֣ן יְהוָ֑ה לֹ֥א יִמְנַע־טֹ֝֗וב לַֽהֹלְכִ֥ים בְּתָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD God is a sun and a shield; the LORD giveth grace and glory; no good thing will He withhold from them that walk uprightly.

jps.text: For the LORD God is a sun and a shield; the LORD giveth grace and glory; no good thing will He withhold from them that walk uprightly.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה צְבָאֹ֑ות אַֽשְׁרֵ֥י אָ֝דָ֗ם בֹּטֵ֥חַ בָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD of hosts, happy is the man that trusteth in Thee.

jps.text: O LORD of hosts, happy is the man that trusteth in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֬חַ ׀ לִבְנֵי־קֹ֬רַח מִזְמֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.

verses.hebrewText: רָצִ֣יתָ יְהוָ֣ה אַרְצֶ֑ךָ שַׁ֝֗בְתָּ *שְׁבוּת (שְׁבִ֣ית) יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: LORD, Thou hast been favourable unto Thy land, Thou hast turned the captivity of Jacob.

jps.text: LORD, Thou hast been favourable unto Thy land, Thou hast turned the captivity of Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: נָ֭שָׂאתָ עֲוֹ֣ן עַמֶּ֑ךָ כִּסִּ֖יתָ כָל־חַטָּאתָ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast forgiven the iniquity of Thy people, Thou hast pardoned all their sin. Selah

jps.text: Thou hast forgiven the iniquity of Thy people, Thou hast pardoned all their sin. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אָסַ֥פְתָּ כָל־עֶבְרָתֶ֑ךָ הֱ֝שִׁיבֹ֗ותָ מֵחֲרֹ֥ון אַפֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast withdrawn all Thy wrath; Thou hast turned from the fierceness of Thine anger.

jps.text: Thou hast withdrawn all Thy wrath; Thou hast turned from the fierceness of Thine anger.

verses.hebrewText: שׁ֭וּבֵנוּ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׁעֵ֑נוּ וְהָפֵ֖ר כַּֽעַסְךָ֣ עִמָּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Restore us, O God of our salvation, and cause Thine indignation toward us to cease.

jps.text: Restore us, O God of our salvation, and cause Thine indignation toward us to cease.

verses.hebrewText: הַלְעֹולָ֥ם תֶּֽאֱנַף־בָּ֑נוּ תִּמְשֹׁ֥ךְ אַ֝פְּךָ֗ לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: Wilt Thou be angry with us for ever? Wilt Thou draw out Thine anger to all generations?

jps.text: Wilt Thou be angry with us for ever? Wilt Thou draw out Thine anger to all generations?

verses.hebrewText: הֽ͏ֲלֹא־אַ֭תָּה תָּשׁ֣וּב תְּחַיֵּ֑נוּ וְ֝עַמְּךָ֗ יִשְׂמְחוּ־בָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Wilt Thou not quicken us again, that Thy people may rejoice in Thee?

jps.text: Wilt Thou not quicken us again, that Thy people may rejoice in Thee?

verses.hebrewText: הַרְאֵ֣נוּ יְהוָ֣ה חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝יֶשְׁעֲךָ֗ תִּתֶּן־לָֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Show us Thy mercy, O LORD, and grant us Thy salvation.

jps.text: Show us Thy mercy, O LORD, and grant us Thy salvation.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׁמְעָ֗ה מַה־יְדַבֵּר֮ הָאֵ֪ל ׀ יְה֫וָ֥ה כִּ֤י ׀ יְדַבֵּ֬ר שָׁלֹ֗ום אֶל־עַמֹּ֥ו וְאֶל־חֲסִידָ֑יו וְֽאַל־יָשׁ֥וּבוּ לְכִסְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I will hear what God the LORD will speak; for He will speak peace unto His people, and to His saints; but let them not turn back to folly.

jps.text: I will hear what God the LORD will speak; for He will speak peace unto His people, and to His saints; but let them not turn back to folly.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֤ךְ ׀ קָרֹ֣וב לִירֵאָ֣יו יִשְׁעֹ֑ו לִשְׁכֹּ֖ן כָּבֹ֣וד בְּאַרְצֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Surely His salvation is nigh them that fear Him; that glory may dwell in our land.

jps.text: Surely His salvation is nigh them that fear Him; that glory may dwell in our land.

verses.hebrewText: חֶֽסֶד־וֶאֱמֶ֥ת נִפְגָּ֑שׁוּ צֶ֖דֶק וְשָׁלֹ֣ום נָשָֽׁקוּ׃
verses.englishText: Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed each other.

jps.text: Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed each other.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭מֶת מֵאֶ֣רֶץ תִּצְמָ֑ח וְ֝צֶ֗דֶק מִשָּׁמַ֥יִם נִשְׁקָֽף׃
verses.englishText: Truth springeth out of the earth; and righteousness hath looked down from heaven.

jps.text: Truth springeth out of the earth; and righteousness hath looked down from heaven.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־יְ֭הוָה יִתֵּ֣ן הַטֹּ֑וב וְ֝אַרְצֵ֗נוּ תִּתֵּ֥ן יְבוּלָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, the LORD will give that which is good; and our land shall yield her produce.

jps.text: Yea, the LORD will give that which is good; and our land shall yield her produce.

verses.hebrewText: צֶ֭דֶק לְפָנָ֣יו יְהַלֵּ֑ךְ וְיָשֵׂ֖ם לְדֶ֣רֶךְ פְּעָמָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Righteousness shall go before Him, and shall make His footsteps a way.

jps.text: Righteousness shall go before Him, and shall make His footsteps a way.

verses.hebrewText: תְּפִלָּ֗ה לְדָ֫וִ֥ד הַטֵּֽה־יְהוָ֣ה אָזְנְךָ֣ עֲנֵ֑נִי כִּֽי־עָנִ֖י וְאֶבְיֹ֣ון אָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: A Prayer of David. Incline Thine ear, O LORD, and answer me; for I am poor and needy.

jps.text: A Prayer of David. Incline Thine ear, O LORD, and answer me; for I am poor and needy.

verses.hebrewText: שָֽׁמְרָ֣ה נַפְשִׁי֮ כִּֽי־חָסִ֪יד אָ֥נִי הֹושַׁ֣ע עַ֭בְדְּךָ אַתָּ֣ה אֱלֹהַ֑י הַבֹּוטֵ֥חַ אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Keep my soul, for I am godly; O Thou my God, save Thy servant that trusteth in Thee.

jps.text: Keep my soul, for I am godly; O Thou my God, save Thy servant that trusteth in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֥נִי אֲדֹנָ֑י כִּ֥י אֵלֶ֥יךָ אֶ֝קְרָ֗א כָּל־הַיֹּֽום׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto me, O Lord; for unto Thee do I cry all the day.

jps.text: Be gracious unto me, O Lord; for unto Thee do I cry all the day.

verses.hebrewText: שַׂ֭מֵּחַ נֶ֣פֶשׁ עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֥י אֵלֶ֥יךָ אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י נַפְשִׁ֥י אֶשָּֽׂא׃
verses.englishText: Rejoice the soul of Thy servant; for unto Thee, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.

jps.text: Rejoice the soul of Thy servant; for unto Thee, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה אֲ֭דֹנָי טֹ֣וב וְסַלָּ֑ח וְרַב־חֶ֝֗סֶד לְכָל־קֹרְאֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thou, Lord, art good, and ready to pardon, and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon Thee.

jps.text: For Thou, Lord, art good, and ready to pardon, and plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon Thee.

verses.hebrewText: הַאֲזִ֣ינָה יְ֭הוָה תְּפִלָּתִ֑י וְ֝הַקְשִׁ֗יבָה בְּקֹ֣ול תַּחֲנוּנֹותָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Give ear, O LORD, unto my prayer; and attend unto the voice of my supplications.

jps.text: Give ear, O LORD, unto my prayer; and attend unto the voice of my supplications.

verses.hebrewText: בְּיֹ֣ום צָ֭רָתִ֥י אֶקְרָאֶ֗ךָּ כִּ֣י תַעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: In the day of my trouble I call upon Thee; for Thou wilt answer me.

jps.text: In the day of my trouble I call upon Thee; for Thou wilt answer me.

verses.hebrewText: אֵין־כָּמֹ֖וךָ בָאֱלֹהִ֥ים ׀ אֲדֹנָ֗י וְאֵ֣ין כְּֽמַעֲשֶֽׂיךָ׃
verses.englishText: There is none like unto Thee among the gods, O Lord, and there are no works like Thine.

jps.text: There is none like unto Thee among the gods, O Lord, and there are no works like Thine.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־גֹּויִ֤ם ׀ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֗יתָ יָבֹ֤ואוּ ׀ וְיִשְׁתַּחֲו֣וּ לְפָנֶ֣יךָ אֲדֹנָ֑י וִֽיכַבְּד֣וּ לִשְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: All nations whom Thou hast made shall come and prostrate themselves before Thee, O Lord; and they shall glorify Thy name.

jps.text: All nations whom Thou hast made shall come and prostrate themselves before Thee, O Lord; and they shall glorify Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־גָדֹ֣ול אַ֭תָּה וְעֹשֵׂ֣ה נִפְלָאֹ֑ות אַתָּ֖ה אֱלֹהִ֣ים לְבַדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art great, and doest wondrous things; Thou art God alone.

jps.text: For Thou art great, and doest wondrous things; Thou art God alone.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֘ורֵ֤נִי יְהוָ֨ה ׀ דַּרְכֶּ֗ךָ אֲהַלֵּ֥ךְ בַּאֲמִתֶּ֑ךָ יַחֵ֥ד לְ֝בָבִ֗י לְיִרְאָ֥ה שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Teach me, O LORD, Thy way, that I may walk in Thy truth; make one my heart to fear Thy name.

jps.text: Teach me, O LORD, Thy way, that I may walk in Thy truth; make one my heart to fear Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: אֹודְךָ֤ ׀ אֲדֹנָ֣י אֱ֭לֹהַי בְּכָל־לְבָבִ֑י וַאֲכַבְּדָ֖ה שִׁמְךָ֣ לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: I will thank Thee, O Lord my God, with my whole heart; and I will glorify Thy name for evermore.

jps.text: I will thank Thee, O Lord my God, with my whole heart; and I will glorify Thy name for evermore.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חַ֭סְדְּךָ גָּדֹ֣ול עָלָ֑י וְהִצַּ֥לְתָּ נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י מִשְּׁאֹ֥ול תַּחְתִּיּֽ͏ָה׃
verses.englishText: For great is Thy mercy toward me; and Thou hast delivered my soul from the lowest nether-world.

jps.text: For great is Thy mercy toward me; and Thou hast delivered my soul from the lowest nether-world.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ זֵ֘דִ֤ים קָֽמוּ־עָלַ֗י וַעֲדַ֣ת עָ֭רִיצִים בִּקְשׁ֣וּ נַפְשִׁ֑י וְלֹ֖א שָׂמ֣וּךָ לְנֶגְדָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: O God, the proud are risen up against me, and the company of violent men have sought after my soul, and have not set Thee before them.

jps.text: O God, the proud are risen up against me, and the company of violent men have sought after my soul, and have not set Thee before them.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה אֲ֭דֹנָי אֵל־רַח֣וּם וְחַנּ֑וּן אֶ֥רֶךְ אַ֝פַּ֗יִם וְרַב־חֶ֥סֶד וֶאֱמֶֽת׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O Lord, art a God full of compassion and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy and truth.

jps.text: But Thou, O Lord, art a God full of compassion and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy and truth.

verses.hebrewText: פְּנֵ֥ה אֵלַ֗י וְחָ֫נֵּ֥נִי תְּנָֽה־עֻזְּךָ֥ לְעַבְדֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝הֹושִׁ֗יעָה לְבֶן־אֲמָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: O turn unto me, and be gracious unto me; give Thy strength unto Thy servant, and save the son of Thy handmaid.

jps.text: O turn unto me, and be gracious unto me; give Thy strength unto Thy servant, and save the son of Thy handmaid.

verses.hebrewText: עֲשֵֽׂה־עִמִּ֥י אֹ֗ות לְטֹ֫ובָ֥ה וְיִרְא֣וּ שֹׂנְאַ֣י וְיֵבֹ֑שׁוּ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה יְ֝הוָ֗ה עֲזַרְתַּ֥נִי וְנִחַמְתָּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Work in my behalf a sign for good; that they that hate me may see it, and be put to shame, because Thou, LORD, hast helped me, and comforted me.

jps.text: Work in my behalf a sign for good; that they that hate me may see it, and be put to shame, because Thou, LORD, hast helped me, and comforted me.

verses.hebrewText: לִבְנֵי־קֹ֖רַח מִזְמֹ֣ור שִׁ֑יר יְ֝סוּדָתֹ֗ו בְּהַרְרֵי־קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of the sons of Korah; a Song. His foundation is in the holy mountains.

jps.text: A Psalm of the sons of Korah; a Song. His foundation is in the holy mountains.

verses.hebrewText: אֹהֵ֣ב יְ֭הוָה שַׁעֲרֵ֣י צִיֹּ֑ון מִ֝כֹּ֗ל מִשְׁכְּנֹ֥ות יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: The LORD loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.

jps.text: The LORD loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: נִ֭כְבָּדֹות מְדֻבָּ֣ר בָּ֑ךְ עִ֖יר הָאֱלֹהִ֣ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Glorious things are spoken of Thee, O city of God. Selah

jps.text: Glorious things are spoken of Thee, O city of God. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַזְכִּ֤יר ׀ רַ֥הַב וּבָבֶ֗ל לְֽיֹ֫דְעָ֥י הִנֵּ֤ה פְלֶ֣שֶׁת וְצֹ֣ור עִם־כּ֑וּשׁ זֶ֝֗ה יֻלַּד־שָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: 'I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon as among them that know Me; behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this one was born there.'

jps.text: 'I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon as among them that know Me; behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this one was born there.'

verses.hebrewText: וּֽלֲצִיֹּ֨ון ׀ יֵאָמַ֗ר אִ֣ישׁ וְ֭אִישׁ יֻלַּד־בָּ֑הּ וְה֖וּא יְכֹונְנֶ֣הָ עֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: But of Zion it shall be said: 'This man and that was born in her; and the Most High Himself doth establish her.'

jps.text: But of Zion it shall be said: 'This man and that was born in her; and the Most High Himself doth establish her.'

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה יִ֭סְפֹּר בִּכְתֹ֣וב עַמִּ֑ים זֶ֖ה יֻלַּד־שָׁ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD shall count in the register of the peoples: 'This one was born there.' Selah

jps.text: The LORD shall count in the register of the peoples: 'This one was born there.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: וְשָׁרִ֥ים כְּחֹלְלִ֑ים כָּֽל־מַעְיָנַ֥י בָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: And whether they sing or dance, all my thoughts are in Thee.

jps.text: And whether they sing or dance, all my thoughts are in Thee.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר מִזְמֹ֗ור לִבְנֵ֫י קֹ֥רַח לַמְנַצֵּ֣חַ עַל־מָחֲלַ֣ת לְעַנֹּ֑ות מַ֝שְׂכִּ֗יל לְהֵימָ֥ן הָאֶזְרָחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: A Song, a Psalm of the sons of Korah; for the Leader; upon Mahalath Leannoth. Maschil of Heman the Ezrahite.

jps.text: A Song, a Psalm of the sons of Korah; for the Leader; upon Mahalath Leannoth. Maschil of Heman the Ezrahite.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יְשׁוּעָתִ֑י יֹום־צָעַ֖קְתִּי בַלַּ֣יְלָה נֶגְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, God of my salvation, what time I cry in the night before Thee,

jps.text: O LORD, God of my salvation, what time I cry in the night before Thee,

verses.hebrewText: תָּבֹ֣וא לְ֭פָנֶיךָ תְּפִלָּתִ֑י הַטֵּֽה־אָ֝זְנְךָ֗ לְרִנָּתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let my prayer come before Thee, incline Thine ear unto my cry.

jps.text: Let my prayer come before Thee, incline Thine ear unto my cry.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שָֽׂבְעָ֣ה בְרָעֹ֣ות נַפְשִׁ֑י וְחַיַּ֗י לִשְׁאֹ֥ול הִגִּֽיעוּ׃
verses.englishText: For my soul is sated with troubles, and my life draweth nigh unto the grave.

jps.text: For my soul is sated with troubles, and my life draweth nigh unto the grave.

verses.hebrewText: נֶ֭חְשַׁבְתִּי עִם־יֹ֣ורְדֵי בֹ֑ור הָ֝יִ֗יתִי כְּגֶ֣בֶר אֵֽין־אֱיָֽל׃
verses.englishText: I am counted with them that go down into the pit; I am become as a man that hath no help;

jps.text: I am counted with them that go down into the pit; I am become as a man that hath no help;

verses.hebrewText: בַּמֵּתִ֗ים חָ֫פְשִׁ֥י כְּמֹ֤ו חֲלָלִ֨ים ׀ שֹׁ֥כְבֵי קֶ֗בֶר אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹ֣א זְכַרְתָּ֣ם עֹ֑וד וְ֝הֵ֗מָּה מִיָּדְךָ֥ נִגְזָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Set apart among the dead, like the slain that lie in the grave, whom Thou rememberest no more; and they are cut off from Thy hand.

jps.text: Set apart among the dead, like the slain that lie in the grave, whom Thou rememberest no more; and they are cut off from Thy hand.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁ֭תַּנִי בְּבֹ֣ור תַּחְתִּיֹּ֑ות בְּ֝מַחֲשַׁכִּ֗ים בִּמְצֹלֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast laid me in the nethermost pit, in dark places, in the deeps.

jps.text: Thou hast laid me in the nethermost pit, in dark places, in the deeps.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭לַי סָמְכָ֣ה חֲמָתֶ֑ךָ וְכָל־מִ֝שְׁבָּרֶ֗יךָ עִנִּ֥יתָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Thy wrath lieth hard upon me, and all Thy waves Thou pressest down. Selah

jps.text: Thy wrath lieth hard upon me, and all Thy waves Thou pressest down. Selah

verses.hebrewText: הִרְחַ֥קְתָּ מְיֻדָּעַ֗י מִ֫מֶּ֥נִּי שַׁתַּ֣נִי תֹועֵבֹ֣ות לָ֑מֹו כָּ֝לֻ֗א וְלֹ֣א אֵצֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast put mine acquaintance far from me; Thou hast made me an abomination unto them; I am shut up, and I cannot come forth.

jps.text: Thou hast put mine acquaintance far from me; Thou hast made me an abomination unto them; I am shut up, and I cannot come forth.

verses.hebrewText: עֵינִ֥י דָאֲבָ֗ה מִנִּ֫י עֹ֥נִי קְרָאתִ֣יךָ יְהוָ֣ה בְּכָל־יֹ֑ום שִׁטַּ֖חְתִּי אֵלֶ֣יךָ כַפָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Mine eye languisheth by reason of affliction; I have called upon Thee, O LORD, every day, I have spread forth my hands unto Thee.

jps.text: Mine eye languisheth by reason of affliction; I have called upon Thee, O LORD, every day, I have spread forth my hands unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: הֲלַמֵּתִ֥ים תַּעֲשֶׂה־פֶּ֑לֶא אִם־רְ֝פָאִ֗ים יָק֤וּמוּ ׀ יֹוד֬וּךָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Wilt Thou work wonders for the dead? Or shall the shades arise and give Thee thanks? Selah

jps.text: Wilt Thou work wonders for the dead? Or shall the shades arise and give Thee thanks? Selah

verses.hebrewText: הַיְסֻפַּ֣ר בַּקֶּ֣בֶר חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ אֱ֝מֽוּנָתְךָ֗ בָּאֲבַדֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: Shall Thy mercy be declared in the grave? or Thy faithfulness in destruction?

jps.text: Shall Thy mercy be declared in the grave? or Thy faithfulness in destruction?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיִוָּדַ֣ע בַּחֹ֣שֶׁךְ פִּלְאֶ֑ךָ וְ֝צִדְקָתְךָ֗ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ נְשִׁיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Shall Thy wonders be known in the dark? and Thy righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?

jps.text: Shall Thy wonders be known in the dark? and Thy righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ אֵלֶ֣יךָ יְהוָ֣ה שִׁוַּ֑עְתִּי וּ֝בַבֹּ֗קֶר תְּֽפִלָּתִ֥י תְקַדְּמֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: But as for me, unto Thee, O LORD, do I cry, and in the morning doth my prayer come to meet Thee.

jps.text: But as for me, unto Thee, O LORD, do I cry, and in the morning doth my prayer come to meet Thee.

verses.hebrewText: לָמָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה תִּזְנַ֣ח נַפְשִׁ֑י תַּסְתִּ֖יר פָּנֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: LORD, why castest Thou off my soul? Why hidest Thou Thy face from me?

jps.text: LORD, why castest Thou off my soul? Why hidest Thou Thy face from me?

verses.hebrewText: עָ֘נִ֤י אֲנִ֣י וְגֹוֵ֣עַ מִנֹּ֑עַר נָשָׂ֖אתִי אֵמֶ֣יךָ אָפֽוּנָה׃
verses.englishText: I am afflicted and at the point of death from my youth up; I have borne Thy terrors, I am distracted.

jps.text: I am afflicted and at the point of death from my youth up; I have borne Thy terrors, I am distracted.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭לַי עָבְר֣וּ חֲרֹונֶ֑יךָ בִּ֝עוּתֶ֗יךָ צִמְּתוּתֻֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thy fierce wrath is gone over me; Thy terrors have cut me off.

jps.text: Thy fierce wrath is gone over me; Thy terrors have cut me off.

verses.hebrewText: סַבּ֣וּנִי כַ֭מַּיִם כָּל־הַיֹּ֑ום הִקִּ֖יפוּ עָלַ֣י יָֽחַד׃
verses.englishText: They came round about me like water all the day; they compassed me about together.

jps.text: They came round about me like water all the day; they compassed me about together.

verses.hebrewText: הִרְחַ֣קְתָּ מִ֭מֶּנִּי אֹהֵ֣ב וָרֵ֑עַ מְֽיֻדָּעַ֥י מַחְשָֽׁךְ׃
verses.englishText: Friend and companion hast Thou put far from me, and mine acquaintance into darkness.

jps.text: Friend and companion hast Thou put far from me, and mine acquaintance into darkness.

verses.hebrewText: מַ֝שְׂכִּ֗יל לְאֵיתָ֥ן הָֽאֶזְרָחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Maschil of Ethan the Ezrahite.

jps.text: Maschil of Ethan the Ezrahite.

verses.hebrewText: חַֽסְדֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה עֹולָ֣ם אָשִׁ֑ירָה לְדֹ֥ר וָדֹ֓ר ׀ אֹודִ֖יעַ אֱמוּנָתְךָ֣ בְּפִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will sing of the mercies of the LORD for ever; to all generations will I make known Thy faithfulness with my mouth.

jps.text: I will sing of the mercies of the LORD for ever; to all generations will I make known Thy faithfulness with my mouth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אָמַ֗רְתִּי עֹ֭ולָם חֶ֣סֶד יִבָּנֶ֑ה שָׁמַ֓יִם ׀ תָּכִ֖ן אֱמוּנָתְךָ֣ בָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: For I have said: 'For ever is mercy built; in the very heavens Thou dost establish Thy faithfulness.

jps.text: For I have said: 'For ever is mercy built; in the very heavens Thou dost establish Thy faithfulness.

verses.hebrewText: כָּרַ֣תִּֽי בְ֭רִית לִבְחִירִ֑י נִ֝שְׁבַּ֗עְתִּי לְדָוִ֥ד עַבְדִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I have made a covenant with My chosen, I have sworn unto David My servant:

jps.text: I have made a covenant with My chosen, I have sworn unto David My servant:

verses.hebrewText: עַד־עֹ֭ולָם אָכִ֣ין זַרְעֶ֑ךָ וּבָנִ֨יתִי לְדֹר־וָדֹ֖ור כִּסְאֲךָ֣ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: For ever will I establish thy seed, and build up thy throne to all generations.' Selah

jps.text: For ever will I establish thy seed, and build up thy throne to all generations.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹ֘וד֤וּ שָׁמַ֣יִם פִּלְאֲךָ֣ יְהוָ֑ה אַף־אֱ֝מֽוּנָתְךָ֗ בִּקְהַ֥ל קְדֹשִֽׁים׃
verses.englishText: So shall the heavens praise Thy wonders, O LORD, Thy faithfulness also in the assembly of the holy ones.

jps.text: So shall the heavens praise Thy wonders, O LORD, Thy faithfulness also in the assembly of the holy ones.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י מִ֣י בַ֭שַּׁחַק יַעֲרֹ֣ךְ לַיהוָ֑ה יִדְמֶ֥ה לַ֝יהוָ֗ה בִּבְנֵ֥י אֵלִים׃
verses.englishText: For who in the skies can be compared unto the LORD, who among the sons of might can be likened unto the LORD,

jps.text: For who in the skies can be compared unto the LORD, who among the sons of might can be likened unto the LORD,

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣ל נַ֭עֲרָץ בְּסֹוד־קְדֹשִׁ֣ים רַבָּ֑ה וְ֝נֹורָ֗א עַל־כָּל־סְבִיבָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A God dreaded in the great council of the holy ones, and feared of all them that are about Him?

jps.text: A God dreaded in the great council of the holy ones, and feared of all them that are about Him?

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ אֱלֹ֘הֵ֤י צְבָאֹ֗ות מִֽי־כָֽמֹ֖וךָ חֲסִ֥ין ׀ יָ֑הּ וֶ֝אֱמֽוּנָתְךָ֗ סְבִיבֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD God of hosts, who is a mighty one, like unto Thee, O LORD? And Thy faithfulness is round about Thee.

jps.text: O LORD God of hosts, who is a mighty one, like unto Thee, O LORD? And Thy faithfulness is round about Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה מֹ֭ושֵׁל בְּגֵא֣וּת הַיָּ֑ם בְּשֹׂ֥וא גַ֝לָּ֗יו אַתָּ֥ה תְשַׁבְּחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou rulest the proud swelling of the sea; when the waves thereof arise, Thou stillest them.

jps.text: Thou rulest the proud swelling of the sea; when the waves thereof arise, Thou stillest them.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֤ה דִכִּ֣אתָ כֶחָלָ֣ל רָ֑הַב בִּזְרֹ֥ועַ עֻ֝זְּךָ֗ פִּזַּ֥רְתָּ אֹויְבֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst crush Rahab, as one that is slain; Thou didst scatter Thine enemies with the arm of Thy strength.

jps.text: Thou didst crush Rahab, as one that is slain; Thou didst scatter Thine enemies with the arm of Thy strength.

verses.hebrewText: לְךָ֣ שָׁ֭מַיִם אַף־לְךָ֥ אָ֑רֶץ תֵּבֵ֥ל וּ֝מְלֹאָ֗הּ אַתָּ֥ה יְסַדְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thine are the heavens, Thine also the earth; the world and the fulness thereof, Thou hast founded them.

jps.text: Thine are the heavens, Thine also the earth; the world and the fulness thereof, Thou hast founded them.

verses.hebrewText: צָפֹ֣ון וְ֭יָמִין אַתָּ֣ה בְרָאתָ֑ם תָּבֹ֥ור וְ֝חֶרְמֹ֗ון בְּשִׁמְךָ֥ יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: The north and the south, Thou hast created them; Tabor and Hermon rejoice in Thy name.

jps.text: The north and the south, Thou hast created them; Tabor and Hermon rejoice in Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: לְךָ֣ זְ֭רֹועַ עִם־גְּבוּרָ֑ה תָּעֹ֥ז יָ֝דְךָ֗ תָּר֥וּם יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thine is an arm with might; strong is Thy hand, and exalted is Thy right hand.

jps.text: Thine is an arm with might; strong is Thy hand, and exalted is Thy right hand.

verses.hebrewText: צֶ֣דֶק וּ֭מִשְׁפָּט מְכֹ֣ון כִּסְאֶ֑ךָ חֶ֥סֶד וֶ֝אֱמֶ֗ת יְֽקַדְּמ֥וּ פָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Thy throne; mercy and truth go before Thee.

jps.text: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Thy throne; mercy and truth go before Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֣י הָ֭עָם יֹודְעֵ֣י תְרוּעָ֑ה יְ֝הוָ֗ה בְּֽאֹור־פָּנֶ֥יךָ יְהַלֵּכֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the people that know the joyful shout; they walk, O LORD, in the light of Thy countenance.

jps.text: Happy is the people that know the joyful shout; they walk, O LORD, in the light of Thy countenance.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭שִׁמְךָ יְגִיל֣וּן כָּל־הַיֹּ֑ום וּבְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ יָרֽוּמוּ׃
verses.englishText: In Thy name do they rejoice all the day; and through Thy righteousness are they exalted.

jps.text: In Thy name do they rejoice all the day; and through Thy righteousness are they exalted.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־תִפְאֶ֣רֶת עֻזָּ֣מֹו אָ֑תָּה וּ֝בִרְצֹנְךָ֗ *תָּרִים (תָּר֥וּם) קַרְנֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For Thou art the glory of their strength; and in Thy favour our horn is exalted.

jps.text: For Thou art the glory of their strength; and in Thy favour our horn is exalted.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י לַֽ֭יהוָה מָֽגִנֵּ֑נוּ וְלִקְדֹ֖ושׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל מַלְכֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For of the LORD is our shield; and the Holy One of Israel is our king.

jps.text: For of the LORD is our shield; and the Holy One of Israel is our king.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֤ז דִּבַּ֥רְתָּֽ־בְחָ֡זֹון לַֽחֲסִידֶ֗יךָ וַתֹּ֗אמֶר שִׁוִּ֣יתִי עֵ֭זֶר עַל־גִּבֹּ֑ור הֲרִימֹ֖ותִי בָח֣וּר מֵעָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Then Thou spokest in vision to Thy godly ones, and saidst: 'I have laid help upon one that is mighty; I have exalted one chosen out of the people.

jps.text: Then Thou spokest in vision to Thy godly ones, and saidst: 'I have laid help upon one that is mighty; I have exalted one chosen out of the people.

verses.hebrewText: מָ֭צָאתִי דָּוִ֣ד עַבְדִּ֑י בְּשֶׁ֖מֶן קָדְשִׁ֣י מְשַׁחְתִּֽיו׃
verses.englishText: I have found David My servant; with My holy oil have I anointed him;

jps.text: I have found David My servant; with My holy oil have I anointed him;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָ֭דִי תִּכֹּ֣ון עִמֹּ֑ו אַף־זְרֹועִ֥י תְאַמְּצֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: With whom My hand shall be established; Mine arm also shall strengthen him.

jps.text: With whom My hand shall be established; Mine arm also shall strengthen him.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יַשִּׁ֣א אֹויֵ֣ב בֹּ֑ו וּבֶן־עַ֝וְלָ֗ה לֹ֣א יְעַנֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: The enemy shall not exact from him; nor the son of wickedness afflict him.

jps.text: The enemy shall not exact from him; nor the son of wickedness afflict him.

verses.hebrewText: וְכַתֹּותִ֣י מִפָּנָ֣יו צָרָ֑יו וּמְשַׂנְאָ֥יו אֶגֹּֽוף׃
verses.englishText: And I will beat to pieces his adversaries before him, and smite them that hate him.

jps.text: And I will beat to pieces his adversaries before him, and smite them that hate him.

verses.hebrewText: וֶֽאֶֽמוּנָתִ֣י וְחַסְדִּ֣י עִמֹּ֑ו וּ֝בִשְׁמִ֗י תָּר֥וּם קַרְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: But My faithfulness and My mercy shall be with him; and through My name shall his horn be exalted.

jps.text: But My faithfulness and My mercy shall be with him; and through My name shall his horn be exalted.

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׂמְתִּ֣י בַיָּ֣ם יָדֹ֑ו וּֽבַנְּהָרֹ֥ות יְמִינֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: I will set his hand also on the sea, and his right hand on the rivers.

jps.text: I will set his hand also on the sea, and his right hand on the rivers.

verses.hebrewText: ה֣וּא יִ֭קְרָאֵנִי אָ֣בִי אָ֑תָּה אֵ֝לִ֗י וְצ֣וּר יְשׁוּעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: He shall call unto Me: Thou art my Father, my God, and the rock of my salvation.

jps.text: He shall call unto Me: Thou art my Father, my God, and the rock of my salvation.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־אָ֭נִי בְּכֹ֣ור אֶתְּנֵ֑הוּ עֶ֝לְיֹ֗ון לְמַלְכֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: I also will appoint him first-born, the highest of the kings of the earth.

jps.text: I also will appoint him first-born, the highest of the kings of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭עֹולָ֗ם *אֶשְׁמֹור־ (אֶשְׁמָר)־לֹ֣ו חַסְדִּ֑י וּ֝בְרִיתִ֗י נֶאֱמֶ֥נֶת לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For ever will I keep for him My mercy, and My covenant shall stand fast with him.

jps.text: For ever will I keep for him My mercy, and My covenant shall stand fast with him.

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׂמְתִּ֣י לָעַ֣ד זַרְעֹ֑ו וְ֝כִסְאֹ֗ו כִּימֵ֥י שָׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: His seed also will I make to endure for ever, and his throne as the days of heaven.

jps.text: His seed also will I make to endure for ever, and his throne as the days of heaven.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־יַֽעַזְב֣וּ בָ֭נָיו תֹּורָתִ֑י וּ֝בְמִשְׁפָּטַ֗י לֹ֣א יֵלֵכֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: If his children forsake My law, and walk not in Mine ordinances;

jps.text: If his children forsake My law, and walk not in Mine ordinances;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־חֻקֹּתַ֥י יְחַלֵּ֑לוּ וּ֝מִצְוֹתַ֗י לֹ֣א יִשְׁמֹֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: If they profane My statutes, and keep not My commandments;

jps.text: If they profane My statutes, and keep not My commandments;

verses.hebrewText: וּפָקַדְתִּ֣י בְשֵׁ֣בֶט פִּשְׁעָ֑ם וּבִנְגָעִ֥ים עֲוֹנָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Then will I visit their transgression with the rod, and their iniquity with strokes.

jps.text: Then will I visit their transgression with the rod, and their iniquity with strokes.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭חַסְדִּי לֹֽא־אָפִ֣יר מֵֽעִמֹּ֑ו וְלֹֽא־אֲ֝שַׁקֵּ֗ר בֶּאֱמוּנָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But My mercy will I not break off from him, nor will I be false to My faithfulness.

jps.text: But My mercy will I not break off from him, nor will I be false to My faithfulness.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־אֲחַלֵּ֥ל בְּרִיתִ֑י וּמֹוצָ֥א שְׂ֝פָתַ֗י לֹ֣א אֲשַׁנֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: My covenant will I not profane, nor alter that which is gone out of My lips.

jps.text: My covenant will I not profane, nor alter that which is gone out of My lips.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭חַת נִשְׁבַּ֣עְתִּי בְקָדְשִׁ֑י אִֽם־לְדָוִ֥ד אֲכַזֵּֽב׃
verses.englishText: Once have I sworn by My holiness: Surely I will not be false unto David;

jps.text: Once have I sworn by My holiness: Surely I will not be false unto David;

verses.hebrewText: זַ֭רְעֹו לְעֹולָ֣ם יִהְיֶ֑ה וְכִסְאֹ֖ו כַשֶּׁ֣מֶשׁ נֶגְדִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: His seed shall endure for ever, and his throne as the sun before Me.

jps.text: His seed shall endure for ever, and his throne as the sun before Me.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭יָרֵחַ יִכֹּ֣ון עֹולָ֑ם וְעֵ֥ד בַּ֝שַּׁ֗חַק נֶאֱמָ֥ן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: It shall be established for ever as the moon; and be stedfast as the witness in sky.' Selah

jps.text: It shall be established for ever as the moon; and be stedfast as the witness in sky.' Selah

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה זָ֭נַחְתָּ וַתִּמְאָ֑ס הִ֝תְעַבַּ֗רְתָּ עִם־מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: But Thou hast cast off and rejected, Thou hast been wroth with Thine anointed.

jps.text: But Thou hast cast off and rejected, Thou hast been wroth with Thine anointed.

verses.hebrewText: נֵ֭אַרְתָּה בְּרִ֣ית עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ חִלַּ֖לְתָּ לָאָ֣רֶץ נִזְרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast abhorred the covenant of Thy servant; Thou hast profaned his crown even to the ground.

jps.text: Thou hast abhorred the covenant of Thy servant; Thou hast profaned his crown even to the ground.

verses.hebrewText: פָּרַ֥צְתָּ כָל־גְּדֵרֹתָ֑יו שַׂ֖מְתָּ מִבְצָרָ֣יו מְחִתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast broken down all his fences; Thou hast brought his strongholds to ruin.

jps.text: Thou hast broken down all his fences; Thou hast brought his strongholds to ruin.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁ֭סֻּהוּ כָּל־עֹ֣בְרֵי דָ֑רֶךְ הָיָ֥ה חֶ֝רְפָּ֗ה לִשְׁכֵנֽ͏ָיו׃
verses.englishText: All that pass by the way spoil him; he is become a taunt to his neighbours.

jps.text: All that pass by the way spoil him; he is become a taunt to his neighbours.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭רִימֹותָ יְמִ֣ין צָרָ֑יו הִ֝שְׂמַ֗חְתָּ כָּל־אֹויְבָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast exalted the right hand of his adversaries; Thou hast made all his enemies to rejoice.

jps.text: Thou hast exalted the right hand of his adversaries; Thou hast made all his enemies to rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: אַף־תָּ֭שִׁיב צ֣וּר חַרְבֹּ֑ו וְלֹ֥א הֲ֝קֵימֹתֹ֗ו בַּמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Yea, Thou turnest back the edge of his sword, and hast not made him to stand in the battle.

jps.text: Yea, Thou turnest back the edge of his sword, and hast not made him to stand in the battle.

verses.hebrewText: הִשְׁבַּ֥תָּ מִטְּהָרֹ֑ו וְ֝כִסְאֹ֗ו לָאָ֥רֶץ מִגַּֽרְתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast made his brightness to cease, and cast his throne down to the ground.

jps.text: Thou hast made his brightness to cease, and cast his throne down to the ground.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭קְצַרְתָּ יְמֵ֣י עֲלוּמָ֑יו הֶֽעֱטִ֨יתָ עָלָ֖יו בּוּשָׁ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: The days of his youth hast Thou shortened; Thou hast covered him with shame. Selah

jps.text: The days of his youth hast Thou shortened; Thou hast covered him with shame. Selah

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה תִּסָּתֵ֣ר לָנֶ֑צַח תִּבְעַ֖ר כְּמֹו־אֵ֣שׁ חֲמָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou hide Thyself for ever? How long shall Thy wrath burn like fire?

jps.text: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou hide Thyself for ever? How long shall Thy wrath burn like fire?

verses.hebrewText: זְכָר־אֲנִ֥י מֶה־חָ֑לֶד עַל־מַה־שָּׁ֝֗וְא בָּרָ֥אתָ כָל־בְּנֵי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: O remember how short my time is; for what vanity hast Thou created all the children of men!

jps.text: O remember how short my time is; for what vanity hast Thou created all the children of men!

verses.hebrewText: מִ֤י גֶ֣בֶר יִֽ֭חְיֶה וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֶה־מָּ֑וֶת יְמַלֵּ֨ט נַפְשֹׁ֖ו מִיַּד־שְׁאֹ֣ול סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: What man is he that liveth and shall not see death, that shall deliver his soul from the power of the grave? Selah

jps.text: What man is he that liveth and shall not see death, that shall deliver his soul from the power of the grave? Selah

verses.hebrewText: אַיֵּ֤ה ׀ חֲסָדֶ֖יךָ הָרִאשֹׁנִ֥ים ׀ אֲדֹנָ֑י נִשְׁבַּ֥עְתָּ לְ֝דָוִ֗ד בֶּאֱמוּנָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Where are Thy former mercies, O Lord, which Thou didst swear unto David in Thy faithfulness?

jps.text: Where are Thy former mercies, O Lord, which Thou didst swear unto David in Thy faithfulness?

verses.hebrewText: זְכֹ֣ר אֲ֭דֹנָי חֶרְפַּ֣ת עֲבָדֶ֑יךָ שְׂאֵתִ֥י בְ֝חֵיקִ֗י כָּל־רַבִּ֥ים עַמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: Remember, Lord, the taunt of Thy servants; how I do bear in my bosom the taunt of so many peoples;

jps.text: Remember, Lord, the taunt of Thy servants; how I do bear in my bosom the taunt of so many peoples;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר חֵרְפ֖וּ אֹויְבֶ֥יךָ ׀ יְהוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר חֵ֝רְפ֗וּ עִקְּבֹ֥ות מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Wherewith Thine enemies have taunted, O LORD, wherewith they have taunted the footsteps of Thine anointed.

jps.text: Wherewith Thine enemies have taunted, O LORD, wherewith they have taunted the footsteps of Thine anointed.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֖וּךְ יְהוָ֥ה לְ֝עֹולָ֗ם אָ֘מֵ֥ן ׀ וְאָמֵֽן׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD for evermore. Amen, and Amen.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD for evermore. Amen, and Amen.

verses.hebrewText: תְּפִלָּה֮ לְמֹשֶׁ֪ה אִֽישׁ־הָאֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים אֲ‍ֽדֹנָ֗י מָעֹ֣ון אַ֭תָּה הָיִ֥יתָ לָּ֗נוּ בְּדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: BOOK IV A Prayer of Moses the man of God. Lord, Thou hast been our dwelling-place in all generations.

jps.text: BOOK IV A Prayer of Moses the man of God. Lord, Thou hast been our dwelling-place in all generations.

verses.hebrewText: בְּטֶ֤רֶם ׀ הָ֘רִ֤ים יֻלָּ֗דוּ וַתְּחֹ֣ולֵֽל אֶ֣רֶץ וְתֵבֵ֑ל וּֽמֵעֹולָ֥ם עַד־עֹ֝ולָ֗ם אַתָּ֥ה אֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Before the mountains were brought forth, or ever Thou hadst formed the earth and the world, even from everlasting to everlasting, Thou art God.

jps.text: Before the mountains were brought forth, or ever Thou hadst formed the earth and the world, even from everlasting to everlasting, Thou art God.

verses.hebrewText: תָּשֵׁ֣ב אֱ֭נֹושׁ עַד־דַּכָּ֑א וַ֝תֹּ֗אמֶר שׁ֣וּבוּ בְנֵי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou turnest man to contrition; and sayest: 'Return, ye children of men.'

jps.text: Thou turnest man to contrition; and sayest: 'Return, ye children of men.'

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֶ֪לֶף שָׁנִ֡ים בְּֽעֵינֶ֗יךָ כְּיֹ֣ום אֶ֭תְמֹול כִּ֣י יַעֲבֹ֑ר וְאַשְׁמוּרָ֥ה בַלָּֽיְלָה׃
verses.englishText: For a thousand years in Thy sight are but as yesterday when it is past, and as a watch in the night.

jps.text: For a thousand years in Thy sight are but as yesterday when it is past, and as a watch in the night.

verses.hebrewText: זְ֭רַמְתָּם שֵׁנָ֣ה יִהְי֑וּ בַּ֝בֹּ֗קֶר כֶּחָצִ֥יר יַחֲלֹֽף׃
verses.englishText: Thou carriest them away as with a flood; they are as a sleep; in the morning they are like grass which groweth up.

jps.text: Thou carriest them away as with a flood; they are as a sleep; in the morning they are like grass which groweth up.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭בֹּקֶר יָצִ֣יץ וְחָלָ֑ף לָ֝עֶ֗רֶב יְמֹולֵ֥ל וְיָבֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: In the morning it flourisheth, and groweth up; in the evening it is cut down, and withereth.

jps.text: In the morning it flourisheth, and groweth up; in the evening it is cut down, and withereth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־כָלִ֥ינוּ בְאַפֶּ֑ךָ וּֽבַחֲמָתְךָ֥ נִבְהָֽלְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For we are consumed in Thine anger, and by Thy wrath are we hurried away.

jps.text: For we are consumed in Thine anger, and by Thy wrath are we hurried away.

verses.hebrewText: *שַׁתָּ (שַׁתָּ֣ה) עֲוֹנֹתֵ֣ינוּ לְנֶגְדֶּ֑ךָ עֲ֝לֻמֵ֗נוּ לִמְאֹ֥ור פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast set our iniquities before Thee, our secret sins in the light of Thy countenance.

jps.text: Thou hast set our iniquities before Thee, our secret sins in the light of Thy countenance.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י כָל־יָ֭מֵינוּ פָּנ֣וּ בְעֶבְרָתֶ֑ךָ כִּלִּ֖ינוּ שָׁנֵ֣ינוּ כְמֹו־הֶֽגֶה׃
verses.englishText: For all our days are passed away in Thy wrath; we bring our years to an end as a tale that is told.

jps.text: For all our days are passed away in Thy wrath; we bring our years to an end as a tale that is told.

verses.hebrewText: יְמֵֽי־שְׁנֹותֵ֨ינוּ בָהֶ֥ם שִׁבְעִ֪ים שָׁנָ֡ה וְאִ֤ם בִּגְבוּרֹ֨ת ׀ שְׁמֹ֘ונִ֤ים שָׁנָ֗ה וְ֭רָהְבָּם עָמָ֣ל וָאָ֑וֶן כִּי־גָ֥ז חִ֝֗ישׁ וַנָּעֻֽפָה׃
