verses.englishText: The days of our years are threescore years and ten, or even by reason of strength fourscore years; yet is their pride but travail and vanity; for it is speedily gone, and we fly away.

jps.text: The days of our years are threescore years and ten, or even by reason of strength fourscore years; yet is their pride but travail and vanity; for it is speedily gone, and we fly away.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יֹ֭ודֵעַ עֹ֣ז אַפֶּ֑ךָ וּ֝כְיִרְאָתְךָ֗ עֶבְרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Who knoweth the power of Thine anger, and Thy wrath according to the fear that is due unto Thee?

jps.text: Who knoweth the power of Thine anger, and Thy wrath according to the fear that is due unto Thee?

verses.hebrewText: לִמְנֹ֣ות יָ֭מֵינוּ כֵּ֣ן הֹודַ֑ע וְ֝נָבִ֗א לְבַ֣ב חָכְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: So teach us to number our days, that we may get us a heart of wisdom.

jps.text: So teach us to number our days, that we may get us a heart of wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: שׁוּבָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה עַד־מָתָ֑י וְ֝הִנָּחֵ֗ם עַל־עֲבָדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Return, O LORD; how long? And let it repent Thee concerning Thy servants.

jps.text: Return, O LORD; how long? And let it repent Thee concerning Thy servants.

verses.hebrewText: שַׂבְּעֵ֣נוּ בַבֹּ֣קֶר חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ וּֽנְרַנְּנָ֥ה וְ֝נִשְׂמְחָ֗ה בְּכָל־יָמֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: O satisfy us in the morning with Thy mercy; that we may rejoice and be glad all our days.

jps.text: O satisfy us in the morning with Thy mercy; that we may rejoice and be glad all our days.

verses.hebrewText: שַׂ֭מְּחֵנוּ כִּימֹ֣ות עִנִּיתָ֑נוּ שְׁ֝נֹ֗ות רָאִ֥ינוּ רָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Make us glad according to the days wherein Thou hast afflicted us, according to the years wherein we have seen evil.

jps.text: Make us glad according to the days wherein Thou hast afflicted us, according to the years wherein we have seen evil.

verses.hebrewText: יֵרָאֶ֣ה אֶל־עֲבָדֶ֣יךָ פָעֳלֶ֑ךָ וַ֝הֲדָרְךָ֗ עַל־בְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let Thy work appear unto Thy servants, and Thy glory upon their children.

jps.text: Let Thy work appear unto Thy servants, and Thy glory upon their children.

verses.hebrewText: וִיהִ֤י ׀ נֹ֤עַם אֲדֹנָ֥י אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ עָ֫לֵ֥ינוּ וּמַעֲשֵׂ֣ה יָ֭דֵינוּ כֹּונְנָ֥ה עָלֵ֑ינוּ וּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֥ה יָ֝דֵ֗ינוּ כֹּונְנֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: And let the graciousness of the Lord our God be upon us; establish Thou also upon us the work of our hands; yea, the work of our hands establish Thou it.

jps.text: And let the graciousness of the Lord our God be upon us; establish Thou also upon us the work of our hands; yea, the work of our hands establish Thou it.

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֭שֵׁב בְּסֵ֣תֶר עֶלְיֹ֑ון בְּצֵ֥ל שַׁ֝דַּ֗י יִתְלֹונָֽן׃
verses.englishText: O thou that dwellest in the covert of the Most High, and abidest in the shadow of the Almighty;

jps.text: O thou that dwellest in the covert of the Most High, and abidest in the shadow of the Almighty;

verses.hebrewText: אֹמַ֗ר לַֽ֭יהוָה מַחְסִ֣י וּמְצוּדָתִ֑י אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אֶבְטַח־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: I will say of the LORD, who is my refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust,

jps.text: I will say of the LORD, who is my refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust,

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ה֣וּא יַ֭צִּֽילְךָ מִפַּ֥ח יָק֗וּשׁ מִדֶּ֥בֶר הַוֹּֽות׃
verses.englishText: That He will deliver thee from the snare of the fowler, and from the noisome pestilence.

jps.text: That He will deliver thee from the snare of the fowler, and from the noisome pestilence.

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֶבְרָתֹ֨ו ׀ יָ֣סֶךְ לָ֭ךְ וְתַֽחַת־כְּנָפָ֣יו תֶּחְסֶ֑ה צִנָּ֖ה וְֽסֹחֵרָ֣ה אֲמִתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He will cover thee with His pinions, and under His wings shalt thou take refuge; His truth is a shield and a buckler.

jps.text: He will cover thee with His pinions, and under His wings shalt thou take refuge; His truth is a shield and a buckler.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־תִ֭ירָא מִפַּ֣חַד לָ֑יְלָה מֵ֝חֵ֗ץ יָע֥וּף יֹומָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt not be afraid of the terror by night, nor of the arrow that flieth by day;

jps.text: Thou shalt not be afraid of the terror by night, nor of the arrow that flieth by day;

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭דֶּבֶר בָּאֹ֣פֶל יַהֲלֹ֑ךְ מִ֝קֶּ֗טֶב יָשׁ֥וּד צָהֳרָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Of the pestilence that walketh in darkness, nor of the destruction that wasteth at noonday.

jps.text: Of the pestilence that walketh in darkness, nor of the destruction that wasteth at noonday.

verses.hebrewText: יִפֹּ֤ל מִצִּדְּךָ֨ ׀ אֶ֗לֶף וּרְבָבָ֥ה מִימִינֶ֑ךָ אֵ֝לֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א יִגָּֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: A thousand may fall at Thy side, and ten thousand at Thy right hand; it shall not come nigh thee.

jps.text: A thousand may fall at Thy side, and ten thousand at Thy right hand; it shall not come nigh thee.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭ק בְּעֵינֶ֣יךָ תַבִּ֑יט וְשִׁלֻּמַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Only with thine eyes shalt thou behold, and see the recompense of the wicked.

jps.text: Only with thine eyes shalt thou behold, and see the recompense of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה יְהוָ֣ה מַחְסִ֑י עֶ֝לְיֹ֗ון שַׂ֣מְתָּ מְעֹונֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For thou hast made the LORD who is my refuge, even the Most High, thy habitation.

jps.text: For thou hast made the LORD who is my refuge, even the Most High, thy habitation.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־תְאֻנֶּ֣ה אֵלֶ֣יךָ רָעָ֑ה וְ֝נֶ֗גַע לֹא־יִקְרַ֥ב בְּאָהֳלֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: There shall no evil befall thee, neither shall any plague come nigh thy tent.

jps.text: There shall no evil befall thee, neither shall any plague come nigh thy tent.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י מַ֭לְאָכָיו יְצַוֶּה־לָּ֑ךְ לִ֝שְׁמָרְךָ֗ בְּכָל־דְּרָכֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: For He will give His angels charge over thee, to keep thee in all thy ways.

jps.text: For He will give His angels charge over thee, to keep thee in all thy ways.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כַּפַּ֥יִם יִשָּׂא֑וּנְךָ פֶּן־תִּגֹּ֖ף בָּאֶ֣בֶן רַגְלֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: They shall bear thee upon their hands, lest thou dash thy foot against a stone.

jps.text: They shall bear thee upon their hands, lest thou dash thy foot against a stone.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־שַׁ֣חַל וָפֶ֣תֶן תִּדְרֹ֑ךְ תִּרְמֹ֖ס כְּפִ֣יר וְתַנִּֽין׃
verses.englishText: Thou shalt tread upon the lion and asp; the young lion and the serpent shalt thou trample under feet.

jps.text: Thou shalt tread upon the lion and asp; the young lion and the serpent shalt thou trample under feet.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י בִ֣י חָ֭שַׁק וַאֲפַלְּטֵ֑הוּ אֲ֝שַׂגְּבֵ֗הוּ כִּֽי־יָדַ֥ע שְׁמִֽי׃
verses.englishText: 'Because he hath set his love upon Me, therefore will I deliver him; I will set him on high, because he hath known My name.

jps.text: 'Because he hath set his love upon Me, therefore will I deliver him; I will set him on high, because he hath known My name.

verses.hebrewText: יִקְרָאֵ֨נִי ׀ וְֽאֶעֱנֵ֗הוּ עִמֹּֽו־אָנֹכִ֥י בְצָרָ֑ה אֲ֝חַלְּצֵ֗הוּ וַֽאֲכַבְּדֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: He shall call upon Me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will rescue him, and bring him to honour.

jps.text: He shall call upon Me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will rescue him, and bring him to honour.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֣רֶךְ יָ֭מִים אַשְׂבִּיעֵ֑הוּ וְ֝אַרְאֵ֗הוּ בִּֽישׁוּעָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: With long life will I satisfy him, and make Him to behold My salvation.'

jps.text: With long life will I satisfy him, and make Him to behold My salvation.'

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֥ור שִׁ֗יר לְיֹ֣ום הַשַּׁבָּֽת׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm, a Song. For the sabbath day.

jps.text: A Psalm, a Song. For the sabbath day.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב לְהֹדֹ֥ות לַיהוָ֑ה וּלְזַמֵּ֖ר לְשִׁמְךָ֣ עֶלְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: It is a good thing to give thanks unto the LORD, and to sing praises unto Thy name, O Most High;

jps.text: It is a good thing to give thanks unto the LORD, and to sing praises unto Thy name, O Most High;

verses.hebrewText: לְהַגִּ֣יד בַּבֹּ֣קֶר חַסְֽדֶּ֑ךָ וֶ֝אֱמֽוּנָתְךָ֗ בַּלֵּילֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: To declare Thy lovingkindness in the morning, and Thy faithfulness in the night seasons,

jps.text: To declare Thy lovingkindness in the morning, and Thy faithfulness in the night seasons,

verses.hebrewText: עֲ‍ֽלֵי־עָ֭שֹׂור וַעֲלֵי־נָ֑בֶל עֲלֵ֖י הִגָּיֹ֣ון בְּכִנֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: With an instrument of ten strings, and with the psaltery; with a solemn sound upon the harp.

jps.text: With an instrument of ten strings, and with the psaltery; with a solemn sound upon the harp.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שִׂמַּחְתַּ֣נִי יְהוָ֣ה בְּפָעֳלֶ֑ךָ בְּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֖י יָדֶ֣יךָ אֲרַנֵּֽן׃
verses.englishText: For Thou, LORD, hast made me glad through Thy work; I will exult in the works of Thy hands.

jps.text: For Thou, LORD, hast made me glad through Thy work; I will exult in the works of Thy hands.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־גָּדְל֣וּ מַעֲשֶׂ֣יךָ יְהוָ֑ה מְ֝אֹ֗ד עָמְק֥וּ מַחְשְׁבֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: How great are Thy works, O LORD! Thy thoughts are very deep.

jps.text: How great are Thy works, O LORD! Thy thoughts are very deep.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽישׁ־בַּ֭עַר לֹ֣א יֵדָ֑ע וּ֝כְסִ֗יל לֹא־יָבִ֥ין אֶת־זֹֽאת׃
verses.englishText: A brutish man knoweth not, neither doth a fool understand this.

jps.text: A brutish man knoweth not, neither doth a fool understand this.

verses.hebrewText: בִּפְרֹ֤חַ רְשָׁעִ֨ים ׀ כְּמֹ֥ו עֵ֗שֶׂב וַ֭יָּצִיצוּ כָּל־פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן לְהִשָּֽׁמְדָ֥ם עֲדֵי־עַֽד׃
verses.englishText: When the wicked spring up as the grass, and when all the workers of iniquity do flourish; it is that they may be destroyed for ever.

jps.text: When the wicked spring up as the grass, and when all the workers of iniquity do flourish; it is that they may be destroyed for ever.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֥ה מָרֹ֗ום לְעֹלָ֥ם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O LORD, art on high for evermore.

jps.text: But Thou, O LORD, art on high for evermore.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י הִנֵּ֪ה אֹיְבֶ֡יךָ ׀ יְֽהוָ֗ה כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֣ה אֹיְבֶ֣יךָ יֹאבֵ֑דוּ יִ֝תְפָּרְד֗וּ כָּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: For, lo, Thine enemies, O LORD, for, lo, Thine enemies shall perish: all the workers of iniquity shall be scattered.

jps.text: For, lo, Thine enemies, O LORD, for, lo, Thine enemies shall perish: all the workers of iniquity shall be scattered.

verses.hebrewText: וַתָּ֣רֶם כִּרְאֵ֣ים קַרְנִ֑י בַּ֝לֹּתִ֗י בְּשֶׁ֣מֶן רַעֲנָֽן׃
verses.englishText: But my horn hast Thou exalted like the horn of the wild-ox; I am anointed with rich oil.

jps.text: But my horn hast Thou exalted like the horn of the wild-ox; I am anointed with rich oil.

verses.hebrewText: וַתַּבֵּ֥ט עֵינִ֗י בְּשׁ֫וּרָ֥י בַּקָּמִ֖ים עָלַ֥י מְרֵעִ֗ים תִּשְׁמַ֥עְנָה אָזְנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Mine eye also hath gazed on them that lie in wait for me, mine ears have heard my desire of the evil-doers that rise up against me.

jps.text: Mine eye also hath gazed on them that lie in wait for me, mine ears have heard my desire of the evil-doers that rise up against me.

verses.hebrewText: צַ֭דִּיק כַּתָּמָ֣ר יִפְרָ֑ח כְּאֶ֖רֶז בַּלְּבָנֹ֣ון יִשְׂגֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: The righteous shall flourish like the palm-tree; he shall grow like a cedar in Lebanon.

jps.text: The righteous shall flourish like the palm-tree; he shall grow like a cedar in Lebanon.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁ֭תוּלִים בְּבֵ֣ית יְהוָ֑ה בְּחַצְרֹ֖ות אֱלֹהֵ֣ינוּ יַפְרִֽיחוּ׃
verses.englishText: Planted in the house of the LORD, they shall flourish in the courts of our God.

jps.text: Planted in the house of the LORD, they shall flourish in the courts of our God.

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֖וד יְנוּב֣וּן בְּשֵׂיבָ֑ה דְּשֵׁנִ֖ים וְרַֽעֲנַנִּ֣ים יִהְיֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: They shall still bring forth fruit in old age; they shall be full of sap and richness;

jps.text: They shall still bring forth fruit in old age; they shall be full of sap and richness;

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭הַגִּיד כִּֽי־יָשָׁ֣ר יְהוָ֑ה צ֝וּרִ֗י וְֽלֹא־*עֹלָתָה (עַוְלָ֥תָה) בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To declare that the LORD is upright, my Rock, in whom there is no unrighteousness.

jps.text: To declare that the LORD is upright, my Rock, in whom there is no unrighteousness.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה מָלָךְ֮ גֵּא֪וּת לָ֫בֵ֥שׁ לָבֵ֣שׁ יְ֭הוָה עֹ֣ז הִתְאַזָּ֑ר אַף־תִּכֹּ֥ון תֵּ֝בֵ֗ל בַּל־תִּמֹּֽוט׃
verses.englishText: The LORD reigneth; He is clothed in majesty; the LORD is clothed, He hath girded Himself with strength; yea, the world is established, that it cannot be moved.

jps.text: The LORD reigneth; He is clothed in majesty; the LORD is clothed, He hath girded Himself with strength; yea, the world is established, that it cannot be moved.

verses.hebrewText: נָכֹ֣ון כִּסְאֲךָ֣ מֵאָ֑ז מֵֽעֹולָ֣ם אָֽתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Thy throne is established of old; Thou art from everlasting.

jps.text: Thy throne is established of old; Thou art from everlasting.

verses.hebrewText: נָשְׂא֤וּ נְהָרֹ֨ות ׀ יְֽהוָ֗ה נָשְׂא֣וּ נְהָרֹ֣ות קֹולָ֑ם יִשְׂא֖וּ נְהָרֹ֣ות דָּכְיָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their roaring.

jps.text: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their roaring.

verses.hebrewText: מִקֹּלֹ֨ות ׀ מַ֤יִם רַבִּ֗ים אַדִּירִ֣ים מִשְׁבְּרֵי־יָ֑ם אַדִּ֖יר בַּמָּרֹ֣ום יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Above the voices of many waters, the mighty breakers of the sea, the LORD on high is mighty.

jps.text: Above the voices of many waters, the mighty breakers of the sea, the LORD on high is mighty.

verses.hebrewText: עֵֽדֹתֶ֨יךָ ׀ נֶאֶמְנ֬וּ מְאֹ֗ד לְבֵיתְךָ֥ נַאֲוָה־קֹ֑דֶשׁ יְ֝הוָ֗ה לְאֹ֣רֶךְ יָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Thy testimonies are very sure, holiness becometh Thy house, O LORD, for evermore.

jps.text: Thy testimonies are very sure, holiness becometh Thy house, O LORD, for evermore.

verses.hebrewText: אֵל־נְקָמֹ֥ות יְהוָ֑ה אֵ֖ל נְקָמֹ֣ות הֹופִֽיַע׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, Thou God to whom vengeance belongeth, Thou God to whom vengeance belongeth, shine forth.

jps.text: O LORD, Thou God to whom vengeance belongeth, Thou God to whom vengeance belongeth, shine forth.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭נָּשֵׂא שֹׁפֵ֣ט הָאָ֑רֶץ הָשֵׁ֥ב גְּ֝מ֗וּל עַל־גֵּאִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Lift up Thyself, Thou Judge of the earth; render to the proud their recompense.

jps.text: Lift up Thyself, Thou Judge of the earth; render to the proud their recompense.

verses.hebrewText: עַד־מָתַ֖י רְשָׁעִ֥ים ׀ יְהוָ֑ה עַד־מָ֝תַ֗י רְשָׁעִ֥ים יַעֲלֹֽזוּ׃
verses.englishText: LORD, how long shall the wicked, how long shall the wicked exult?

jps.text: LORD, how long shall the wicked, how long shall the wicked exult?

verses.hebrewText: יַבִּ֣יעוּ יְדַבְּר֣וּ עָתָ֑ק יִֽ֝תְאַמְּר֗וּ כָּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: They gush out, they speak arrogancy; all the workers of iniquity bear themselves loftily.

jps.text: They gush out, they speak arrogancy; all the workers of iniquity bear themselves loftily.

verses.hebrewText: עַמְּךָ֣ יְהוָ֣ה יְדַכְּא֑וּ וְֽנַחֲלָתְךָ֥ יְעַנּֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: They crush Thy people, O LORD, and afflict Thy heritage.

jps.text: They crush Thy people, O LORD, and afflict Thy heritage.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭לְמָנָה וְגֵ֣ר יַהֲרֹ֑גוּ וִֽיתֹומִ֣ים יְרַצֵּֽחוּ׃
verses.englishText: They slay the widow and the stranger, and murder the fatherless.

jps.text: They slay the widow and the stranger, and murder the fatherless.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יֹּ֣אמְרוּ לֹ֣א יִרְאֶה־יָּ֑הּ וְלֹא־יָ֝בִ֗ין אֱלֹהֵ֥י יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: And they say: 'The LORD will not see, neither will the God of Jacob give heed.'

jps.text: And they say: 'The LORD will not see, neither will the God of Jacob give heed.'

verses.hebrewText: בִּ֭ינוּ בֹּעֲרִ֣ים בָּעָ֑ם וּ֝כְסִילִ֗ים מָתַ֥י תַּשְׂכִּֽילוּ׃
verses.englishText: Consider, ye brutish among the people; and ye fools, when will ye understand?

jps.text: Consider, ye brutish among the people; and ye fools, when will ye understand?

verses.hebrewText: הֲנֹ֣טַֽע אֹ֖זֶן הֲלֹ֣א יִשְׁמָ֑ע אִֽם־יֹ֥צֵֽר עַ֝֗יִן הֲלֹ֣א יַבִּֽיט׃
verses.englishText: He that planted the ear, shall He not hear? He that formed the eye, shall He not see?

jps.text: He that planted the ear, shall He not hear? He that formed the eye, shall He not see?

verses.hebrewText: הֲיֹסֵ֣ר גֹּ֭ויִם הֲלֹ֣א יֹוכִ֑יחַ הַֽמְלַמֵּ֖ד אָדָ֣ם דָּֽעַת׃
verses.englishText: He that instructeth nations, shall not He correct? even He that teacheth man knowledge?

jps.text: He that instructeth nations, shall not He correct? even He that teacheth man knowledge?

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה יֹ֭דֵעַ מַחְשְׁבֹ֣ות אָדָ֑ם כִּי־הֵ֥מָּה הָֽבֶל׃
verses.englishText: The LORD knoweth the thoughts of man, that they are vanity.

jps.text: The LORD knoweth the thoughts of man, that they are vanity.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֤י ׀ הַגֶּ֣בֶר אֲשֶׁר־תְּיַסְּרֶ֣נּוּ יָּ֑הּ וּֽמִתֹּורָתְךָ֥ תְלַמְּדֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man whom Thou instructest, O LORD, and teachest out of Thy law;

jps.text: Happy is the man whom Thou instructest, O LORD, and teachest out of Thy law;

verses.hebrewText: לְהַשְׁקִ֣יט לֹ֖ו מִ֣ימֵי רָ֑ע עַ֤ד יִכָּרֶ֖ה לָרָשָׁ֣ע שָֽׁחַת׃
verses.englishText: That Thou mayest give him rest from the days of evil, until the pit be digged for the wicked.

jps.text: That Thou mayest give him rest from the days of evil, until the pit be digged for the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־יִטֹּ֣שׁ יְהוָ֣ה עַמֹּ֑ו וְ֝נַחֲלָתֹ֗ו לֹ֣א יַעֲזֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD will not cast off His people, neither will He forsake His inheritance.

jps.text: For the LORD will not cast off His people, neither will He forsake His inheritance.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עַד־צֶ֭דֶק יָשׁ֣וּב מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וְ֝אַחֲרָ֗יו כָּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: For right shall return unto justice, and all the upright in heart shall follow it.

jps.text: For right shall return unto justice, and all the upright in heart shall follow it.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽי־יָק֣וּם לִ֭י עִם־מְרֵעִ֑ים מִֽי־יִתְיַצֵּ֥ב לִ֝י עִם־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Who will rise up for me against the evil-doers? Who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?

jps.text: Who will rise up for me against the evil-doers? Who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?

verses.hebrewText: לוּלֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה עֶזְרָ֣תָה לִּ֑י כִּמְעַ֓ט ׀ שָֽׁכְנָ֖ה דוּמָ֣ה נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Unless the LORD had been my help, my soul had soon dwelt in silence.

jps.text: Unless the LORD had been my help, my soul had soon dwelt in silence.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אָ֭מַרְתִּי מָ֣טָה רַגְלִ֑י חַסְדְּךָ֥ יְ֝הוָ֗ה יִסְעָדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: If I say: 'My foot slippeth', Thy mercy, O LORD, holdeth me up.

jps.text: If I say: 'My foot slippeth', Thy mercy, O LORD, holdeth me up.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרֹ֣ב שַׂרְעַפַּ֣י בְּקִרְבִּ֑י תַּ֝נְחוּמֶ֗יךָ יְֽשַׁעַשְׁע֥וּ נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: When my cares are many within me, Thy comforts delight my soul.

jps.text: When my cares are many within me, Thy comforts delight my soul.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭יְחָבְרְךָ כִּסֵּ֣א הַוֹּ֑ות יֹצֵ֖ר עָמָ֣ל עֲלֵי־חֹֽק׃
verses.englishText: Shall the seat of wickedness have fellowship with Thee, which frameth mischief by statute?

jps.text: Shall the seat of wickedness have fellowship with Thee, which frameth mischief by statute?

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭גֹודּוּ עַל־נֶ֣פֶשׁ צַדִּ֑יק וְדָ֖ם נָקִ֣י יַרְשִֽׁיעוּ׃
verses.englishText: They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous, and condemn innocent blood.

jps.text: They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous, and condemn innocent blood.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֬י יְהוָ֣ה לִ֣י לְמִשְׂגָּ֑ב וֵ֝אלֹהַ֗י לְצ֣וּר מַחְסִֽי׃
verses.englishText: But the LORD hath been my high tower, and my God the rock of my refuge.

jps.text: But the LORD hath been my high tower, and my God the rock of my refuge.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֤שֶׁב עֲלֵיהֶ֨ם ׀ אֶת־אֹונָ֗ם וּבְרָעָתָ֥ם יַצְמִיתֵ֑ם יַ֝צְמִיתֵ֗ם יְהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: And He hath brought upon them their own iniquity, and will cut them off in their own evil; the LORD our God will cut them off.

jps.text: And He hath brought upon them their own iniquity, and will cut them off in their own evil; the LORD our God will cut them off.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭כוּ נְרַנְּנָ֣ה לַיהוָ֑ה נָ֝רִ֗יעָה לְצ֣וּר יִשְׁעֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: O come, let us sing unto the LORD; let us shout for joy to the Rock of our salvation.

jps.text: O come, let us sing unto the LORD; let us shout for joy to the Rock of our salvation.

verses.hebrewText: נְקַדְּמָ֣ה פָנָ֣יו בְּתֹודָ֑ה בִּ֝זְמִרֹ֗ות נָרִ֥יעַֽ לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving, let us shout for joy unto Him with psalms.

jps.text: Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving, let us shout for joy unto Him with psalms.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֣ל גָּדֹ֣ול יְהוָ֑ה וּמֶ֥לֶךְ גָּ֝דֹ֗ול עַל־כָּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD is a great God, and a great King above all gods;

jps.text: For the LORD is a great God, and a great King above all gods;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּ֭יָדֹו מֶחְקְרֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְתֹועֲפֹ֖ות הָרִ֣ים לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: In whose hand are the depths of the earth; the heights of the mountains are His also.

jps.text: In whose hand are the depths of the earth; the heights of the mountains are His also.

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־לֹ֣ו הַ֭יָּם וְה֣וּא עָשָׂ֑הוּ וְ֝יַבֶּ֗שֶׁת יָדָ֥יו יָצָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: The sea is His, and He made it; and His hands formed the dry land.

jps.text: The sea is His, and He made it; and His hands formed the dry land.

verses.hebrewText: בֹּ֭אוּ נִשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֣ה וְנִכְרָ֑עָה נִ֝בְרְכָ֗ה לִֽפְנֵי־יְהוָ֥ה עֹשֵֽׂנוּ׃
verses.englishText: O come, let us bow down and bend the knee; let us kneel before the LORD our Maker;

jps.text: O come, let us bow down and bend the knee; let us kneel before the LORD our Maker;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֘י ה֤וּא אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וַאֲנַ֤חְנוּ עַ֣ם מַ֭רְעִיתֹו וְצֹ֣אן יָדֹ֑ו הַ֝יֹּ֗ום אִֽם־בְּקֹלֹ֥ו תִשְׁמָֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: For He is our God, and we are the people of His pasture, and the flock of His hand. To-day, if ye would but hearken to His voice!

jps.text: For He is our God, and we are the people of His pasture, and the flock of His hand. To-day, if ye would but hearken to His voice!

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּקְשׁ֣וּ לְ֭בַבְכֶם כִּמְרִיבָ֑ה כְּיֹ֥ום מַ֝סָּ֗ה בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: 'Harden not your heart, as at Meribah, as in the day of Massah in the wilderness;

jps.text: 'Harden not your heart, as at Meribah, as in the day of Massah in the wilderness;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִ֭סּוּנִי אֲבֹותֵיכֶ֑ם בְּ֝חָנ֗וּנִי גַּם־רָא֥וּ פָעֳלֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: When your fathers tried Me, proved Me, even though they saw My work.

jps.text: When your fathers tried Me, proved Me, even though they saw My work.

verses.hebrewText: אַרְבָּ֘עִ֤ים שָׁנָ֨ה ׀ אָ֘ק֤וּט בְּדֹ֗ור וָאֹמַ֗ר עַ֤ם תֹּעֵ֣י לֵבָ֣ב הֵ֑ם וְ֝הֵ֗ם לֹא־יָדְע֥וּ דְרָכָֽי׃
verses.englishText: For forty years was I wearied with that generation, and said: It is a people that do err in their heart, and they have not known My ways;

jps.text: For forty years was I wearied with that generation, and said: It is a people that do err in their heart, and they have not known My ways;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־נִשְׁבַּ֥עְתִּי בְאַפִּ֑י אִם־יְ֝בֹא֗וּן אֶל־מְנוּחָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore I swore in My wrath, that they should not enter into My rest.'

jps.text: Wherefore I swore in My wrath, that they should not enter into My rest.'

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֣ירוּ לַ֭יהוָה שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֑שׁ שִׁ֥ירוּ לַ֝יהוָ֗ה כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: O sing unto the LORD a new song; sing unto the LORD, all the earth.

jps.text: O sing unto the LORD a new song; sing unto the LORD, all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֣ירוּ לַ֭יהוָה בָּרֲכ֣וּ שְׁמֹ֑ו בַּשְּׂר֥וּ מִיֹּֽום־לְ֝יֹ֗ום יְשׁוּעָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Sing unto the LORD, bless His name; proclaim His salvation from day to day.

jps.text: Sing unto the LORD, bless His name; proclaim His salvation from day to day.

verses.hebrewText: סַפְּר֣וּ בַגֹּויִ֣ם כְּבֹודֹ֑ו בְּכָל־הָֽ֝עַמִּ֗ים נִפְלְאֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Declare His glory among the nations, His marvellous works among all the peoples.

jps.text: Declare His glory among the nations, His marvellous works among all the peoples.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֥י גָ֘דֹ֤ול יְהוָ֣ה וּמְהֻלָּ֣ל מְאֹ֑ד נֹורָ֥א ה֝֗וּא עַל־כָּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.

jps.text: For great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ׀ כָּל־אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָעַמִּ֣ים אֱלִילִ֑ים וַֽ֝יהוָ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: For all the gods of the peoples are things of nought; but the LORD made the heavens.

jps.text: For all the gods of the peoples are things of nought; but the LORD made the heavens.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד־וְהָדָ֥ר לְפָנָ֑יו עֹ֥ז וְ֝תִפְאֶ֗רֶת בְּמִקְדָּשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Honour and majesty are before Him; strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.

jps.text: Honour and majesty are before Him; strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.

verses.hebrewText: הָב֣וּ לַ֭יהוָה מִשְׁפְּחֹ֣ות עַמִּ֑ים הָב֥וּ לַ֝יהוָ֗ה כָּבֹ֥וד וָעֹֽז׃
verses.englishText: Ascribe unto the LORD, ye kindreds of the peoples, ascribe unto the LORD glory and strength.

jps.text: Ascribe unto the LORD, ye kindreds of the peoples, ascribe unto the LORD glory and strength.

verses.hebrewText: הָב֣וּ לַ֭יהוָה כְּבֹ֣וד שְׁמֹ֑ו שְׂאֽוּ־מִ֝נְחָ֗ה וּבֹ֥אוּ לְחַצְרֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Ascribe unto the LORD the glory due unto His name; bring an offering, and come into His courts.

jps.text: Ascribe unto the LORD the glory due unto His name; bring an offering, and come into His courts.

verses.hebrewText: הִשְׁתַּחֲו֣וּ לַ֭יהוָה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹ֑דֶשׁ חִ֥ילוּ מִ֝פָּנָ֗יו כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: O worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness; tremble before Him, all the earth.

jps.text: O worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness; tremble before Him, all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: אִמְר֤וּ בַגֹּויִ֨ם ׀ יְה֘וָ֤ה מָלָ֗ךְ אַף־תִּכֹּ֣ון תֵּ֭בֵל בַּל־תִּמֹּ֑וט יָדִ֥ין עַ֝מִּ֗ים בְּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Say among the nations: 'The LORD reigneth.' The world also is established that it cannot be moved; He will judge the peoples with equity.

jps.text: Say among the nations: 'The LORD reigneth.' The world also is established that it cannot be moved; He will judge the peoples with equity.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂמְח֣וּ הַ֭שָּׁמַיִם וְתָגֵ֣ל הָאָ֑רֶץ יִֽרְעַ֥ם הַ֝יָּ֗ם וּמְלֹאֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof;

jps.text: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof;

verses.hebrewText: יַעֲלֹ֣ז שָׂ֭דַי וְכָל־אֲשֶׁר־בֹּ֑ו אָ֥ז יְ֝רַנְּנ֗וּ כָּל־עֲצֵי־יָֽעַר׃
verses.englishText: Let the field exult; and all that is therein; then shall all the trees of the wood sing for joy;

jps.text: Let the field exult; and all that is therein; then shall all the trees of the wood sing for joy;

verses.hebrewText: לִפְנֵ֤י יְהוָ֨ה ׀ כִּ֬י בָ֗א כִּ֥י בָא֮ לִשְׁפֹּ֪ט הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ יִשְׁפֹּֽט־תֵּבֵ֥ל בְּצֶ֑דֶק וְ֝עַמִּ֗ים בֶּאֱמוּנָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Before the LORD, for He is come; for He is come to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples in His faithfulness.

jps.text: Before the LORD, for He is come; for He is come to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples in His faithfulness.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה מָ֭לָךְ תָּגֵ֣ל הָאָ֑רֶץ יִ֝שְׂמְח֗וּ אִיִּ֥ים רַבִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD reigneth; let the earth rejoice; let the multitude of isles be glad.

jps.text: The LORD reigneth; let the earth rejoice; let the multitude of isles be glad.

verses.hebrewText: עָנָ֣ן וַעֲרָפֶ֣ל סְבִיבָ֑יו צֶ֥דֶק וּ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט מְכֹ֣ון כִּסְאֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Clouds and darkness are round about Him; righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.

jps.text: Clouds and darkness are round about Him; righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֭שׁ לְפָנָ֣יו תֵּלֵ֑ךְ וּתְלַהֵ֖ט סָבִ֣יב צָרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A fire goeth before Him, and burneth up His adversaries round about.

jps.text: A fire goeth before Him, and burneth up His adversaries round about.

verses.hebrewText: הֵאִ֣ירוּ בְרָקָ֣יו תֵּבֵ֑ל רָאֲתָ֖ה וַתָּחֵ֣ל הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: His lightnings lighted up the world; the earth saw, and trembled.

jps.text: His lightnings lighted up the world; the earth saw, and trembled.

verses.hebrewText: הָרִ֗ים כַּדֹּונַ֗ג נָ֭מַסּוּ מִלִּפְנֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה מִ֝לִּפְנֵ֗י אֲדֹ֣ון כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the LORD, at the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.

jps.text: The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the LORD, at the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.

verses.hebrewText: הִגִּ֣ידוּ הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם צִדְקֹ֑ו וְרָא֖וּ כָל־הָעַמִּ֣ים כְּבֹודֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The heavens declared His righteousness, and all the peoples saw His glory.

jps.text: The heavens declared His righteousness, and all the peoples saw His glory.

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֤שׁוּ ׀ כָּל־עֹ֬בְדֵי פֶ֗סֶל הַמִּֽתְהַלְלִ֥ים בָּאֱלִילִ֑ים הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ־לֹ֝ו כָּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Ashamed be all they that serve graven images, that boast themselves of things of nought; bow down to Him, all ye gods.

jps.text: Ashamed be all they that serve graven images, that boast themselves of things of nought; bow down to Him, all ye gods.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמְעָ֬ה וַתִּשְׂמַ֨ח ׀ צִיֹּ֗ון וַ֭תָּגֵלְנָה בְּנֹ֣ות יְהוּדָ֑ה לְמַ֖עַן מִשְׁפָּטֶ֣יךָ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Zion heard and was glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoiced; because of Thy judgments, O LORD.

jps.text: Zion heard and was glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoiced; because of Thy judgments, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֤ה יְהוָ֗ה עֶלְיֹ֥ון עַל־כָּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ מְאֹ֥ד נַ֝עֲלֵ֗יתָ עַל־כָּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For Thou, LORD, art most high above all the earth; Thou art exalted far above all gods.

jps.text: For Thou, LORD, art most high above all the earth; Thou art exalted far above all gods.

verses.hebrewText: אֹהֲבֵ֥י יְהוָ֗ה שִׂנְא֫וּ רָ֥ע שֹׁ֭מֵר נַפְשֹׁ֣ות חֲסִידָ֑יו מִיַּ֥ד רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יַצִּילֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: O ye that love the LORD, hate evil; He preserveth the souls of His saints; He delivered them out of the hand of the wicked.

jps.text: O ye that love the LORD, hate evil; He preserveth the souls of His saints; He delivered them out of the hand of the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֖ור זָרֻ֣עַ לַצַּדִּ֑יק וּֽלְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵ֥ב שִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.

jps.text: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂמְח֣וּ צַ֭דִּיקִים בַּֽיהוָ֑ה וְ֝הֹוד֗וּ לְזֵ֣כֶר קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Be glad in the LORD, ye righteous; and give thanks to His holy name.

jps.text: Be glad in the LORD, ye righteous; and give thanks to His holy name.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֡ור שִׁ֤ירוּ לַֽיהוָ֨ה ׀ שִׁ֣יר חָ֭דָשׁ כִּֽי־נִפְלָאֹ֣ות עָשָׂ֑ה הֹושִֽׁיעָה־לֹּ֥ו יְ֝מִינֹ֗ו וּזְרֹ֥ועַ קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm. O sing unto the LORD a new song; for He hath done marvellous things; His right hand, and His holy arm, hath wrought salvation for Him.

jps.text: A Psalm. O sing unto the LORD a new song; for He hath done marvellous things; His right hand, and His holy arm, hath wrought salvation for Him.

verses.hebrewText: הֹודִ֣יעַ יְ֭הוָה יְשׁוּעָתֹ֑ו לְעֵינֵ֥י הַ֝גֹּויִ֗ם גִּלָּ֥ה צִדְקָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath made known His salvation; His righteousness hath He revealed in the sight of the nations.

jps.text: The LORD hath made known His salvation; His righteousness hath He revealed in the sight of the nations.

verses.hebrewText: זָ֘כַ֤ר חַסְדֹּ֨ו ׀ וֶֽאֱ‌ֽמוּנָתֹו֮ לְבֵ֪ית יִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל רָא֥וּ כָל־אַפְסֵי־אָ֑רֶץ אֵ֝֗ת יְשׁוּעַ֥ת אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: He hath remembered His mercy and His faithfulness toward the house of Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

jps.text: He hath remembered His mercy and His faithfulness toward the house of Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

verses.hebrewText: הָרִ֣יעוּ לַֽ֭יהוָה כָּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ פִּצְח֖וּ וְרַנְּנ֣וּ וְזַמֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: Shout unto the LORD, all the earth; break forth and sing for joy, yea, sing praises.

jps.text: Shout unto the LORD, all the earth; break forth and sing for joy, yea, sing praises.

verses.hebrewText: זַמְּר֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה בְּכִנֹּ֑ור בְּ֝כִנֹּ֗ור וְקֹ֣ול זִמְרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Sing praises unto the LORD with the harp; with the harp and the voice of melody.

jps.text: Sing praises unto the LORD with the harp; with the harp and the voice of melody.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭חֲצֹ֣צְרֹות וְקֹ֣ול שֹׁופָ֑ר הָ֝רִ֗יעוּ לִפְנֵ֤י ׀ הַמֶּ֬לֶךְ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: With trumpets and sound of the horn shout ye before the King, the LORD.

jps.text: With trumpets and sound of the horn shout ye before the King, the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְעַ֣ם הַ֭יָּם וּמְלֹאֹ֑ו תֵּ֝בֵ֗ל וְיֹ֣שְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein;

jps.text: Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein;

verses.hebrewText: נְהָרֹ֥ות יִמְחֲאוּ־כָ֑ף יַ֝֗חַד הָרִ֥ים יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let the floods clap their hands; let the mountains sing for joy together;

jps.text: Let the floods clap their hands; let the mountains sing for joy together;

verses.hebrewText: לִֽפְֽנֵי־יְהוָ֗ה כִּ֥י בָא֮ לִשְׁפֹּ֪ט הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ יִשְׁפֹּֽט־תֵּבֵ֥ל בְּצֶ֑דֶק וְ֝עַמִּ֗ים בְּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Before the LORD, for He is come to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with equity.

jps.text: Before the LORD, for He is come to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with equity.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה מָ֭לָךְ יִרְגְּז֣וּ עַמִּ֑ים יֹשֵׁ֥ב כְּ֝רוּבִ֗ים תָּנ֥וּט הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD reigneth; let the peoples tremble; He is enthroned upon the cherubim; let the earth quake.

jps.text: The LORD reigneth; let the peoples tremble; He is enthroned upon the cherubim; let the earth quake.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה בְּצִיֹּ֣ון גָּדֹ֑ול וְרָ֥ם ה֝֗וּא עַל־כָּל־הָֽעַמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is great in Zion; and He is high above all the peoples.

jps.text: The LORD is great in Zion; and He is high above all the peoples.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּ שִׁ֭מְךָ גָּדֹ֥ול וְנֹורָ֗א קָדֹ֥ושׁ הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: Let them praise Thy name as great and awful; Holy is He.

jps.text: Let them praise Thy name as great and awful; Holy is He.

verses.hebrewText: וְעֹ֥ז מֶלֶךְ֮ מִשְׁפָּ֪ט אָ֫הֵ֥ב אַ֭תָּה כֹּונַ֣נְתָּ מֵישָׁרִ֑ים מִשְׁפָּ֥ט וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה בְּיַעֲקֹ֤ב ׀ אַתָּ֬ה עָשִֽׂיתָ׃
verses.englishText: The strength also of the king who loveth justice — Thou hast established equity, Thou hast executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.

jps.text: The strength also of the king who loveth justice — Thou hast established equity, Thou hast executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.

verses.hebrewText: רֹֽומְמ֡וּ יְה֘וָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְֽ֭הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לַהֲדֹ֥ם רַגְלָ֗יו קָדֹ֥ושׁ הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: Exalt ye the LORD our God, and prostrate yourselves at His footstool; Holy is He.

jps.text: Exalt ye the LORD our God, and prostrate yourselves at His footstool; Holy is He.

verses.hebrewText: מֹ֘שֶׁ֤ה וְאַהֲרֹ֨ן ׀ בְּֽכֹהֲנָ֗יו וּ֭שְׁמוּאֵל בְּקֹרְאֵ֣י שְׁמֹ֑ו קֹרִ֥אים אֶל־יְ֝הוָ֗ה וְה֣וּא יַעֲנֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Moses and Aaron among His priests, and Samuel among them that call upon His name, did call upon the LORD, and He answered them.

jps.text: Moses and Aaron among His priests, and Samuel among them that call upon His name, did call upon the LORD, and He answered them.

verses.hebrewText: בְּעַמּ֣וּד עָ֭נָן יְדַבֵּ֣ר אֲלֵיהֶ֑ם שָׁמְר֥וּ עֵ֝דֹתָ֗יו וְחֹ֣ק נָֽתַן־לָֽמֹו׃
verses.englishText: He spoke unto them in the pillar of cloud; they kept His testimonies, and the statute that He gave them.

jps.text: He spoke unto them in the pillar of cloud; they kept His testimonies, and the statute that He gave them.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵינוּ֮ אַתָּ֪ה עֲנִ֫יתָ֥ם אֵ֣ל נֹ֭שֵׂא הָיִ֣יתָ לָהֶ֑ם וְ֝נֹקֵ֗ם עַל־עֲלִילֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: O LORD our God, Thou didst answer them; a forgiving God wast Thou unto them, though Thou tookest vengeance of their misdeeds.

jps.text: O LORD our God, Thou didst answer them; a forgiving God wast Thou unto them, though Thou tookest vengeance of their misdeeds.

verses.hebrewText: רֹֽומְמ֡וּ יְה֘וָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְ֭הִֽשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְהַ֣ר קָדְשֹׁ֑ו כִּֽי־קָ֝דֹ֗ושׁ יְהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Exalt ye the LORD our God, and worship at His holy hill; for the LORD our God is holy.

jps.text: Exalt ye the LORD our God, and worship at His holy hill; for the LORD our God is holy.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֥ור לְתֹודָ֑ה הָרִ֥יעוּ לַ֝יהוָ֗ה כָּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of thanksgiving. Shout unto the LORD, all the earth.

jps.text: A Psalm of thanksgiving. Shout unto the LORD, all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: עִבְד֣וּ אֶת־יְהוָ֣ה בְּשִׂמְחָ֑ה בֹּ֥אוּ לְ֝פָנָ֗יו בִּרְנָנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Serve the LORD with gladness; come before His presence with singing.

jps.text: Serve the LORD with gladness; come before His presence with singing.

verses.hebrewText: דְּע֗וּ כִּֽי־יְהוָה֮ ה֤וּא אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים הֽוּא־עָ֭שָׂנוּ *וְלֹא (וְלֹ֣ו) אֲנַ֑חְנוּ עַ֝מֹּ֗ו וְצֹ֣אן מַרְעִיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Know ye that the LORD He is God; it is He that hath made us, and we our His, His people, and the flock of His pasture.

jps.text: Know ye that the LORD He is God; it is He that hath made us, and we our His, His people, and the flock of His pasture.

verses.hebrewText: בֹּ֤אוּ שְׁעָרָ֨יו ׀ בְּתֹודָ֗ה חֲצֵרֹתָ֥יו בִּתְהִלָּ֑ה הֹֽודוּ־לֹ֝֗ו בָּרֲכ֥וּ שְׁמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, and into His courts with praise; give thanks unto Him, and bless His name.

jps.text: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, and into His courts with praise; give thanks unto Him, and bless His name.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־טֹ֣וב יְ֭הֹוָה לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְעַד־דֹּ֥ר וָ֝דֹ֗ר אֱמוּנָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD is good; His mercy endureth for ever; and His faithfulness unto all generations.

jps.text: For the LORD is good; His mercy endureth for ever; and His faithfulness unto all generations.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֗ד מִ֫זְמֹ֥ור חֶֽסֶד־וּמִשְׁפָּ֥ט אָשִׁ֑ירָה לְךָ֖ יְהוָ֣ה אֲזַמֵּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. I will sing of mercy and justice; unto Thee, O LORD, will I sing praises.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. I will sing of mercy and justice; unto Thee, O LORD, will I sing praises.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׂכִּ֤ילָה ׀ בְּדֶ֬רֶךְ תָּמִ֗ים מָ֭תַי תָּבֹ֣וא אֵלָ֑י אֶתְהַלֵּ֥ךְ בְּתָם־לְ֝בָבִ֗י בְּקֶ֣רֶב בֵּיתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will give heed unto the way of integrity; Oh when wilt Thou come unto me? I will walk within my house in the integrity of my heart.

jps.text: I will give heed unto the way of integrity; Oh when wilt Thou come unto me? I will walk within my house in the integrity of my heart.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־אָשִׁ֨ית ׀ לְנֶ֥גֶד עֵינַ֗י דְּֽבַר־בְּלִ֫יָּ֥עַל עֲשֹֽׂה־סֵטִ֥ים שָׂנֵ֑אתִי לֹ֖א יִדְבַּ֣ק בִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will set no base thing before mine eyes; I hate the doing of things crooked; it shall not cleave unto me.

jps.text: I will set no base thing before mine eyes; I hate the doing of things crooked; it shall not cleave unto me.

verses.hebrewText: לֵבָ֣ב עִ֭קֵּשׁ יָס֣וּר מִמֶּ֑נִּי רָ֝֗ע לֹ֣א אֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: A perverse heart shall depart from me; I will know no evil thing.

jps.text: A perverse heart shall depart from me; I will know no evil thing.

verses.hebrewText: *מְלֹושְׁנִי (מְלָשְׁנִ֬י) בַסֵּ֨תֶר ׀ רֵעֵהוּ֮ אֹותֹ֪ו אַ֫צְמִ֥ית גְּֽבַהּ־עֵ֭ינַיִם וּרְחַ֣ב לֵבָ֑ב אֹ֝תֹ֗ו לֹ֣א אוּכָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Whoso slandereth his neighbour in secret, him will I destroy; whoso is haughty of eye and proud of heart, him will I not suffer.

jps.text: Whoso slandereth his neighbour in secret, him will I destroy; whoso is haughty of eye and proud of heart, him will I not suffer.

verses.hebrewText: עֵינַ֤י ׀ בְּנֶֽאֶמְנֵי־אֶרֶץ֮ לָשֶׁ֪בֶת עִמָּ֫דִ֥י הֹ֭לֵךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ תָּמִ֑ים ה֝֗וּא יְשָׁרְתֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Mine eyes are upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; he that walketh in a way of integrity, he shall minister unto me.

jps.text: Mine eyes are upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; he that walketh in a way of integrity, he shall minister unto me.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־יֵשֵׁ֨ב ׀ בְּקֶ֥רֶב בֵּיתִי֮ עֹשֵׂ֪ה רְמִ֫יָּ֥ה דֹּבֵ֥ר שְׁקָרִ֑ים לֹֽא־יִ֝כֹּ֗ון לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽי׃
verses.englishText: He that worketh deceit shall not dwell within my house; he that speaketh falsehood shall not be established before mine eyes.

jps.text: He that worketh deceit shall not dwell within my house; he that speaketh falsehood shall not be established before mine eyes.

verses.hebrewText: לַבְּקָרִ֗ים אַצְמִ֥ית כָּל־רִשְׁעֵי־אָ֑רֶץ לְהַכְרִ֥ית מֵֽעִיר־יְ֝הוָ֗ה כָּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Morning by morning will I destroy all the wicked of the land; to cut off all the workers of iniquity from the city of the LORD.

jps.text: Morning by morning will I destroy all the wicked of the land; to cut off all the workers of iniquity from the city of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: תְּ֭פִלָּה לְעָנִ֣י כִֽי־יַעֲטֹ֑ף וְלִפְנֵ֥י יְ֝הוָ֗ה יִשְׁפֹּ֥ךְ שִׂיחֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A Prayer of the afflicted, when he fainteth, and poureth out his complaint before the LORD.

jps.text: A Prayer of the afflicted, when he fainteth, and poureth out his complaint before the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה שִׁמְעָ֣ה תְפִלָּתִ֑י וְ֝שַׁוְעָתִ֗י אֵלֶ֥יךָ תָבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, hear my prayer, and let my cry come unto Thee.

jps.text: O LORD, hear my prayer, and let my cry come unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּסְתֵּ֬ר פָּנֶ֨יךָ ׀ מִמֶּנִּי֮ בְּיֹ֪ום צַ֫ר לִ֥י הַטֵּֽה־אֵלַ֥י אָזְנֶ֑ךָ בְּיֹ֥ום אֶ֝קְרָ֗א מַהֵ֥ר עֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Hide not Thy face from me in the day of my distress; incline Thine ear unto me; in the day when I call answer me speedily.

jps.text: Hide not Thy face from me in the day of my distress; incline Thine ear unto me; in the day when I call answer me speedily.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־כָל֣וּ בְעָשָׁ֣ן יָמָ֑י וְ֝עַצְמֹותַ֗י כְּמֹו־קֵ֥ד נִחָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: For my days are consumed like smoke, and my bones are burned as a hearth.

jps.text: For my days are consumed like smoke, and my bones are burned as a hearth.

verses.hebrewText: הוּכָּֽה־כָ֭עֵשֶׂב וַיִּבַ֣שׁ לִבִּ֑י כִּֽי־שָׁ֝כַ֗חְתִּי מֵאֲכֹ֥ל לַחְמִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My heart is smitten like grass, and withered; for I forget to eat my bread.

jps.text: My heart is smitten like grass, and withered; for I forget to eat my bread.

verses.hebrewText: מִקֹּ֥ול אַנְחָתִ֑י דָּבְקָ֥ה עַ֝צְמִ֗י לִבְשָׂרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: By reason of the voice of my sighing my bones cleave to my flesh.

jps.text: By reason of the voice of my sighing my bones cleave to my flesh.

verses.hebrewText: דָּ֭מִיתִי לִקְאַ֣ת מִדְבָּ֑ר הָ֝יִ֗יתִי כְּכֹ֣וס חֳרָבֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: I am like a pelican of the wilderness; I am become as an owl of the waste places.

jps.text: I am like a pelican of the wilderness; I am become as an owl of the waste places.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁקַ֥דְתִּי וָאֶֽהְיֶ֑ה כְּ֝צִפֹּ֗ור בֹּודֵ֥ד עַל־גָּֽג׃
verses.englishText: I watch, and am become like a sparrow that is alone upon the housetop.

jps.text: I watch, and am become like a sparrow that is alone upon the housetop.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־הַ֭יֹּום חֵרְפ֣וּנִי אֹויְבָ֑י מְ֝הֹולָלַ֗י בִּ֣י נִשְׁבָּֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: Mine enemies taunt me all the day; they that are mad against me do curse by me.

jps.text: Mine enemies taunt me all the day; they that are mad against me do curse by me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־אֵ֭פֶר כַּלֶּ֣חֶם אָכָ֑לְתִּי וְ֝שִׁקֻּוַ֗י בִּבְכִ֥י מָסָֽכְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mingled my drink with weeping,

jps.text: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mingled my drink with weeping,

verses.hebrewText: מִפְּנֵֽי־זַֽעַמְךָ֥ וְקִצְפֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֥י נְ֝שָׂאתַ֗נִי וַתַּשְׁלִיכֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Because of Thine indignation and Thy wrath; for Thou hast taken me up, and cast me away.

jps.text: Because of Thine indignation and Thy wrath; for Thou hast taken me up, and cast me away.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭מַי כְּצֵ֣ל נָט֑וּי וַ֝אֲנִ֗י כָּעֵ֥שֶׂב אִיבָֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: My days are like a lengthening shadow; and I am withered like grass.

jps.text: My days are like a lengthening shadow; and I am withered like grass.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֣ה יְ֭הוָה לְעֹולָ֣ם תֵּשֵׁ֑ב וְ֝זִכְרְךָ֗ לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O LORD, sittest enthroned for ever; and Thy name is unto all generations.

jps.text: But Thou, O LORD, sittest enthroned for ever; and Thy name is unto all generations.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה תָ֭קוּם תְּרַחֵ֣ם צִיֹּ֑ון כִּי־עֵ֥ת לְ֝חֶֽנְנָ֗הּ כִּי־בָ֥א מֹועֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: Thou wilt arise, and have compassion upon Zion; for it is time to be gracious unto her, for the appointed time is come.

jps.text: Thou wilt arise, and have compassion upon Zion; for it is time to be gracious unto her, for the appointed time is come.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־רָצ֣וּ עֲ֭בָדֶיךָ אֶת־אֲבָנֶ֑יהָ וְֽאֶת־עֲפָרָ֥הּ יְחֹנֵֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For Thy servants take pleasure in her stones, and love her dust.

jps.text: For Thy servants take pleasure in her stones, and love her dust.

verses.hebrewText: וְיִֽירְא֣וּ גֹ֭ויִם אֶת־שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה וְֽכָל־מַלְכֵ֥י הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ אֶת־כְּבֹודֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: So the nations will fear the name of the LORD, and all the kings of the earth Thy glory;

jps.text: So the nations will fear the name of the LORD, and all the kings of the earth Thy glory;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־בָנָ֣ה יְהוָ֣ה צִיֹּ֑ון נִ֝רְאָ֗ה בִּכְבֹודֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: When the LORD hath built up Zion, when He hath appeared in His glory;

jps.text: When the LORD hath built up Zion, when He hath appeared in His glory;

verses.hebrewText: פָּ֭נָה אֶל־תְּפִלַּ֣ת הָעַרְעָ֑ר וְלֹֽא־בָ֝זָ֗ה אֶת־תְּפִלָּתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: When He hath regarded the prayer of the destitute, and hath not despised their prayer.

jps.text: When He hath regarded the prayer of the destitute, and hath not despised their prayer.

verses.hebrewText: תִּכָּ֣תֶב זֹ֭את לְדֹ֣ור אַחֲרֹ֑ון וְעַ֥ם נִ֝בְרָ֗א יְהַלֶּל־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: This shall be written for the generation to come; and a people which shall be created shall praise the LORD.

jps.text: This shall be written for the generation to come; and a people which shall be created shall praise the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִ֭שְׁקִיף מִמְּרֹ֣ום קָדְשֹׁ֑ו יְ֝הוָ֗ה מִשָּׁמַ֤יִם ׀ אֶל־אֶ֬רֶץ הִבִּֽיט׃
verses.englishText: For He hath looked down from the height of His sanctuary; from heaven did the LORD behold the earth;

jps.text: For He hath looked down from the height of His sanctuary; from heaven did the LORD behold the earth;

verses.hebrewText: לִ֭שְׁמֹעַ אֶנְקַ֣ת אָסִ֑יר לְ֝פַתֵּ֗חַ בְּנֵ֣י תְמוּתָֽה׃
verses.englishText: To hear the groaning of the prisoner; to loose those that are appointed to death;

jps.text: To hear the groaning of the prisoner; to loose those that are appointed to death;

verses.hebrewText: לְסַפֵּ֣ר בְּ֭צִיֹּון שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה וּ֝תְהִלָּתֹ֗ו בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.englishText: That men may tell of the name of the LORD in Zion, and His praise in Jerusalem;

jps.text: That men may tell of the name of the LORD in Zion, and His praise in Jerusalem;

verses.hebrewText: בְּהִקָּבֵ֣ץ עַמִּ֣ים יַחְדָּ֑ו וּ֝מַמְלָכֹ֗ות לַעֲבֹ֥ד אֶת־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: When the peoples are gathered together, and the kingdoms, to serve the LORD.

jps.text: When the peoples are gathered together, and the kingdoms, to serve the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: עִנָּ֖ה בַדֶּ֥רֶךְ *כֹּחֹו (כֹּחִ֗י) קִצַּ֥ר יָמָֽי׃
verses.englishText: He weakened my strength in the way; He shortened my days.

jps.text: He weakened my strength in the way; He shortened my days.

verses.hebrewText: אֹמַ֗ר אֵלִ֗י אַֽל־תַּ֭עֲלֵנִי בַּחֲצִ֣י יָמָ֑י בְּדֹ֖ור דֹּורִ֣ים שְׁנֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I say: 'O my God, take me not away in the midst of my days, Thou whose years endure throughout all generations.

jps.text: I say: 'O my God, take me not away in the midst of my days, Thou whose years endure throughout all generations.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭פָנִים הָאָ֣רֶץ יָסַ֑דְתָּ וּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֖ה יָדֶ֣יךָ שָׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Of old Thou didst lay the foundation of the earth; and the heavens are the work of Thy hands.

jps.text: Of old Thou didst lay the foundation of the earth; and the heavens are the work of Thy hands.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֤מָּה ׀ יֹאבֵדוּ֮ וְאַתָּ֪ה תַ֫עֲמֹ֥ד וְ֭כֻלָּם כַּבֶּ֣גֶד יִבְל֑וּ כַּלְּב֖וּשׁ תַּחֲלִיפֵ֣ם וֽ͏ְיַחֲלֹֽפוּ׃
verses.englishText: They shall perish, but Thou shalt endure; yea, all of them shall wax old like a garment; as a vesture shalt Thou change them, and they shall pass away;

jps.text: They shall perish, but Thou shalt endure; yea, all of them shall wax old like a garment; as a vesture shalt Thou change them, and they shall pass away;

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּה־ה֑וּא וּ֝שְׁנֹותֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א יִתָּֽמּוּ׃
verses.englishText: But Thou art the selfsame, and Thy years shall have no end.

jps.text: But Thou art the selfsame, and Thy years shall have no end.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵֽי־עֲבָדֶ֥יךָ יִשְׁכֹּ֑ונוּ וְ֝זַרְעָ֗ם לְפָנֶ֥יךָ יִכֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: The children of Thy servants shall dwell securely, and their seed shall be established before Thee.'

jps.text: The children of Thy servants shall dwell securely, and their seed shall be established before Thee.'

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֙ד ׀ בָּרֲכִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָ֑ה וְכָל־קְ֝רָבַ֗י אֶת־שֵׁ֥ם קָדְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Bless the LORD, O my soul; and all that is within me, bless His holy name.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Bless the LORD, O my soul; and all that is within me, bless His holy name.

verses.hebrewText: בָּרֲכִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָ֑ה וְאַל־תִּ֝שְׁכְּחִ֗י כָּל־גְּמוּלָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all His benefits;

jps.text: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all His benefits;

verses.hebrewText: הַסֹּלֵ֥חַ לְכָל־עֲוֹנֵ֑כִי הָ֝רֹפֵ֗א לְכָל־תַּחֲלֻאָֽיְכִי׃
verses.englishText: Who forgiveth all thine iniquity; who healeth all Thy diseases;

jps.text: Who forgiveth all thine iniquity; who healeth all Thy diseases;

verses.hebrewText: הַגֹּואֵ֣ל מִשַּׁ֣חַת חַיָּ֑יְכִי הַֽ֝מְעַטְּרֵ֗כִי חֶ֣סֶד וְרַחֲמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Who redeemeth Thy life from the pit; who encompasseth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;

jps.text: Who redeemeth Thy life from the pit; who encompasseth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;

verses.hebrewText: הַמַּשְׂבִּ֣יַע בַּטֹּ֣וב עֶדְיֵ֑ךְ תִּתְחַדֵּ֖שׁ כַּנֶּ֣שֶׁר נְעוּרָֽיְכִי׃
verses.englishText: Who satisfieth thine old age with good things; so that Thy youth is renewed like the eagle.

jps.text: Who satisfieth thine old age with good things; so that Thy youth is renewed like the eagle.

verses.hebrewText: עֹשֵׂ֣ה צְדָקֹ֣ות יְהוָ֑ה וּ֝מִשְׁפָּטִ֗ים לְכָל־עֲשׁוּקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD executeth righteousness, and acts of justice for all that are oppressed.

jps.text: The LORD executeth righteousness, and acts of justice for all that are oppressed.

verses.hebrewText: יֹודִ֣יעַ דְּרָכָ֣יו לְמֹשֶׁ֑ה לִבְנֵ֥י יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל עֲלִילֹֽותָיו׃
verses.englishText: He made known His ways unto Moses, His doings unto the children of Israel.

jps.text: He made known His ways unto Moses, His doings unto the children of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: רַח֣וּם וְחַנּ֣וּן יְהוָ֑ה אֶ֖רֶךְ אַפַּ֣יִם וְרַב־חָֽסֶד׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is full of compassion and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.

jps.text: The LORD is full of compassion and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־לָנֶ֥צַח יָרִ֑יב וְלֹ֖א לְעֹולָ֣ם יִטֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: He will not always contend; neither will He keep His anger for ever.

jps.text: He will not always contend; neither will He keep His anger for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֣א כַ֭חֲטָאֵינוּ עָ֣שָׂה לָ֑נוּ וְלֹ֥א כַ֝עֲוֹנֹתֵ֗ינוּ גָּמַ֥ל עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: He hath not dealt with us after our sins, nor requited us according to our iniquities.

jps.text: He hath not dealt with us after our sins, nor requited us according to our iniquities.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י כִגְבֹ֣הַּ שָׁ֭מַיִם עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ גָּבַ֥ר חַ֝סְדֹּ֗ו עַל־יְרֵאָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is His mercy toward them that fear Him.

jps.text: For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is His mercy toward them that fear Him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּרְחֹ֣ק מִ֭זְרָח מִֽמַּֽעֲרָ֑ב הִֽרְחִ֥יק מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ אֶת־פְּשָׁעֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath He removed our transgressions from us.

jps.text: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath He removed our transgressions from us.

verses.hebrewText: כְּרַחֵ֣ם אָ֭ב עַל־בָּנִ֑ים רִחַ֥ם יְ֝הוָ֗ה עַל־יְרֵאָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Like as a father hath compassion upon his children, so hath the LORD compassion upon them that fear Him.

jps.text: Like as a father hath compassion upon his children, so hath the LORD compassion upon them that fear Him.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־ה֖וּא יָדַ֣ע יִצְרֵ֑נוּ זָ֝כ֗וּר כִּי־עָפָ֥ר אֲנָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: For He knoweth our frame; He remembereth that we are dust.

jps.text: For He knoweth our frame; He remembereth that we are dust.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭נֹושׁ כֶּחָצִ֣יר יָמָ֑יו כְּצִ֥יץ הַ֝שָּׂדֶ֗ה כֵּ֣ן יָצִֽיץ׃
verses.englishText: As for man, his days are as grass; as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.

jps.text: As for man, his days are as grass; as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י ר֣וּחַ עָֽבְרָה־בֹּ֣ו וְאֵינֶ֑נּוּ וְלֹא־יַכִּירֶ֖נּוּ עֹ֣וד מְקֹומֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof knoweth it no more.

jps.text: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof knoweth it no more.

verses.hebrewText: וְחֶ֤סֶד יְהוָ֙ה ׀ מֵעֹולָ֣ם וְעַד־עֹ֭ולָם עַל־יְרֵאָ֑יו וְ֝צִדְקָתֹ֗ו לִבְנֵ֥י בָנִֽים׃
verses.englishText: But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear Him, and His righteousness unto children's children;

jps.text: But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear Him, and His righteousness unto children's children;

verses.hebrewText: לְשֹׁמְרֵ֥י בְרִיתֹ֑ו וּלְזֹכְרֵ֥י פִ֝קֻּדָ֗יו לַעֲשֹׂותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: To such as keep His covenant, and to those that remember His precepts to do them.

jps.text: To such as keep His covenant, and to those that remember His precepts to do them.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה בַּ֭שָּׁמַיִם הֵכִ֣ין כִּסְאֹ֑ו וּ֝מַלְכוּתֹ֗ו בַּכֹּ֥ל מָשָֽׁלָה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath established His throne in the heavens; and His kingdom ruleth over all.

jps.text: The LORD hath established His throne in the heavens; and His kingdom ruleth over all.

verses.hebrewText: בָּרֲכ֥וּ יְהוָ֗ה מַלְאָ֫כָ֥יו גִּבֹּ֣רֵי כֹ֭חַ עֹשֵׂ֣י דְבָרֹ֑ו לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗עַ בְּקֹ֣ול דְּבָרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Bless the LORD, ye angels of His, ye mighty in strength, that fulfil His word, hearkening unto the voice of His word.

jps.text: Bless the LORD, ye angels of His, ye mighty in strength, that fulfil His word, hearkening unto the voice of His word.

verses.hebrewText: בָּרֲכ֣וּ יְ֭הוָה כָּל־צְבָאָ֑יו מְ֝שָׁרְתָ֗יו עֹשֵׂ֥י רְצֹונֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Bless the LORD, all ye His hosts; ye ministers of His, that do His pleasure.

jps.text: Bless the LORD, all ye His hosts; ye ministers of His, that do His pleasure.

verses.hebrewText: בָּרֲכ֤וּ יְהוָ֙ה ׀ כָּֽל־מַעֲשָׂ֗יו בְּכָל־מְקֹמֹ֥ות מֶמְשַׁלְתֹּ֑ו בָּרֲכִ֥י נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י אֶת־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Bless the LORD, all ye His works, in all places of His dominion; bless the LORD, O my soul.

jps.text: Bless the LORD, all ye His works, in all places of His dominion; bless the LORD, O my soul.

verses.hebrewText: בָּרֲכִ֥י נַפְשִׁ֗י אֶת־יְה֫וָ֥ה יְהוָ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהַי גָּדַ֣לְתָּ מְּאֹ֑ד הֹ֭וד וְהָדָ֣ר לָבָֽשְׁתָּ׃
verses.englishText: Bless the LORD, O my soul. O LORD my God, Thou art very great; Thou art clothed with glory and majesty.

jps.text: Bless the LORD, O my soul. O LORD my God, Thou art very great; Thou art clothed with glory and majesty.

verses.hebrewText: עֹֽטֶה־אֹ֭ור כַּשַּׂלְמָ֑ה נֹוטֶ֥ה שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם כַּיְרִיעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who coverest Thyself with light as with a garment, who stretchest out the heavens like a curtain;

jps.text: Who coverest Thyself with light as with a garment, who stretchest out the heavens like a curtain;

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥מְקָרֶֽה בַמַּ֗יִם עֲ‍ֽלִיֹּ֫ותָ֥יו הַשָּׂם־עָבִ֥ים רְכוּבֹ֑ו הַֽ֝מְהַלֵּ֗ךְ עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רֽוּחַ׃
verses.englishText: Who layest the beams of Thine upper chambers in the waters, who makest the clouds Thy chariot, who walkest upon the wings of the wind;

jps.text: Who layest the beams of Thine upper chambers in the waters, who makest the clouds Thy chariot, who walkest upon the wings of the wind;

verses.hebrewText: עֹשֶׂ֣ה מַלְאָכָ֣יו רוּחֹ֑ות מְ֝שָׁרְתָ֗יו אֵ֣שׁ לֹהֵֽט׃
verses.englishText: Who makest winds Thy messengers, the flaming fire Thy ministers.

jps.text: Who makest winds Thy messengers, the flaming fire Thy ministers.

verses.hebrewText: יָֽסַד־אֶ֭רֶץ עַל־מְכֹונֶ֑יהָ בַּל־תִּ֝מֹּ֗וט עֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: Who didst establish the earth upon its foundations, that it should not be moved for ever and ever;

jps.text: Who didst establish the earth upon its foundations, that it should not be moved for ever and ever;

verses.hebrewText: תְּ֭הֹום כַּלְּב֣וּשׁ כִּסִּיתֹ֑ו עַל־הָ֝רִ֗ים יַֽעַמְדוּ־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst cover it with the deep as with a vesture; the waters stood above the mountains.

jps.text: Thou didst cover it with the deep as with a vesture; the waters stood above the mountains.

verses.hebrewText: מִן־גַּעֲרָ֣תְךָ֣ יְנוּס֑וּן מִן־קֹ֥ול רַֽ֝עַמְךָ֗ יֵחָפֵזֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: At Thy rebuke they fled, at the voice of Thy thunder they hasted away —

jps.text: At Thy rebuke they fled, at the voice of Thy thunder they hasted away —

verses.hebrewText: יַעֲל֣וּ הָ֭רִים יֵרְד֣וּ בְקָעֹ֑ות אֶל־מְ֝קֹ֗ום זֶ֤ה ׀ יָסַ֬דְתָּ לָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The mountains rose, the valleys sank down — unto the place which Thou hadst founded for them;

jps.text: The mountains rose, the valleys sank down — unto the place which Thou hadst founded for them;

verses.hebrewText: גְּֽבוּל־שַׂ֭מְתָּ בַּל־יֽ͏ַעֲבֹר֑וּן בַּל־יְ֝שׁוּב֗וּן לְכַסֹּ֥ות הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst set a bound which they should not pass over, that they might not return to cover the earth.

jps.text: Thou didst set a bound which they should not pass over, that they might not return to cover the earth.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽמְשַׁלֵּ֣חַ מַ֭עְיָנִים בַּנְּחָלִ֑ים בֵּ֥ין הָ֝רִ֗ים יְהַלֵּכֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Who sendest forth springs into the valleys; they run between the mountains;

jps.text: Who sendest forth springs into the valleys; they run between the mountains;

verses.hebrewText: יַ֭שְׁקוּ כָּל־חַיְתֹ֣ו שָׂדָ֑י יִשְׁבְּר֖וּ פְרָאִ֣ים צְמָאָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They give drink to every beast of the field, the wild asses quench their thirst.

jps.text: They give drink to every beast of the field, the wild asses quench their thirst.

verses.hebrewText: עֲ֭לֵיהֶם עֹוף־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם יִשְׁכֹּ֑ון מִבֵּ֥ין עֳ֝פָאיִ֗ם יִתְּנוּ־קֹֽול׃
verses.englishText: Beside them dwell the fowl of the heaven, from among the branches they sing.

jps.text: Beside them dwell the fowl of the heaven, from among the branches they sing.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׁקֶ֣ה הָ֭רִים מֵעֲלִיֹּותָ֑יו מִפְּרִ֥י מַ֝עֲשֶׂ֗יךָ תִּשְׂבַּ֥ע הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Who waterest the mountains from Thine upper chambers; the earth is full of the fruit of Thy works.

jps.text: Who waterest the mountains from Thine upper chambers; the earth is full of the fruit of Thy works.

verses.hebrewText: מַצְמִ֤יחַ חָצִ֨יר ׀ לַבְּהֵמָ֗ה וְ֭עֵשֶׂב לַעֲבֹדַ֣ת הָאָדָ֑ם לְהֹ֥וצִיא לֶ֝֗חֶם מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Who causeth the grass to spring up for the cattle, and herb for the service of man; to bring forth bread out of the earth,

jps.text: Who causeth the grass to spring up for the cattle, and herb for the service of man; to bring forth bread out of the earth,

verses.hebrewText: וְיַ֤יִן ׀ יְשַׂמַּ֬ח לְֽבַב־אֱנֹ֗ושׁ לְהַצְהִ֣יל פָּנִ֣ים מִשָּׁ֑מֶן וְ֝לֶ֗חֶם לְֽבַב־אֱנֹ֥ושׁ יִסְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, making the face brighter than oil, and bread that stayeth man's heart.

jps.text: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, making the face brighter than oil, and bread that stayeth man's heart.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭שְׂבְּעוּ עֲצֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה אַֽרְזֵ֥י לְ֝בָנֹ֗ון אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָטָֽע׃
verses.englishText: The trees of the LORD have their fill, the cedars of Lebanon, which He hath planted;

jps.text: The trees of the LORD have their fill, the cedars of Lebanon, which He hath planted;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֭ם צִפֳּרִ֣ים יְקַנֵּ֑נוּ חֲ֝סִידָ֗ה בְּרֹושִׁ֥ים בֵּיתָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Wherein the birds make their nests; as for the stork, the fir-trees are her house.

jps.text: Wherein the birds make their nests; as for the stork, the fir-trees are her house.

verses.hebrewText: הָרִ֣ים הַ֭גְּבֹהִים לַיְּעֵלִ֑ים סְ֝לָעִ֗ים מַחְסֶ֥ה לַֽשְׁפַנִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: The high mountains are for the wild goats; the rocks are a refuge for the conies.

jps.text: The high mountains are for the wild goats; the rocks are a refuge for the conies.

verses.hebrewText: עָשָׂ֣ה יָ֭רֵחַ לְמֹועֲדִ֑ים שֶׁ֝֗מֶשׁ יָדַ֥ע מְבֹואֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Who appointedst the moon for seasons; the sun knoweth his going down.

jps.text: Who appointedst the moon for seasons; the sun knoweth his going down.

verses.hebrewText: תָּֽשֶׁת־חֹ֭שֶׁךְ וִ֣יהִי לָ֑יְלָה בֹּֽו־תִ֝רְמֹ֗שׂ כָּל־חַיְתֹו־יָֽעַר׃
verses.englishText: Thou makest darkness, and it is night, wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.

jps.text: Thou makest darkness, and it is night, wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭כְּפִירִים שֹׁאֲגִ֣ים לַטָּ֑רֶף וּלְבַקֵּ֖שׁ מֵאֵ֣ל אָכְלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their food from God.

jps.text: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their food from God.

verses.hebrewText: תִּזְרַ֣ח הַ֭שֶּׁמֶשׁ יֵאָסֵפ֑וּן וְאֶל־מְ֝עֹונֹתָ֗ם יִרְבָּצֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: The sun ariseth, they slink away, and couch in their dens.

jps.text: The sun ariseth, they slink away, and couch in their dens.

verses.hebrewText: יֵצֵ֣א אָדָ֣ם לְפָעֳלֹ֑ו וְֽלַעֲבֹ֖דָתֹ֣ו עֲדֵי־עָֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: Man goeth forth unto his work and to his labour until the evening.

jps.text: Man goeth forth unto his work and to his labour until the evening.

verses.hebrewText: מָֽה־רַבּ֬וּ מַעֲשֶׂ֨יךָ ׀ יְֽהוָ֗ה כֻּ֭לָּם בְּחָכְמָ֣ה עָשִׂ֑יתָ מָלְאָ֥ה הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ קִנְיָנֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: How manifold are Thy works, O LORD! In wisdom hast Thou made them all; the earth is full of Thy creatures.

jps.text: How manifold are Thy works, O LORD! In wisdom hast Thou made them all; the earth is full of Thy creatures.

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֤ה ׀ הַיָּ֥ם גָּדֹול֮ וּרְחַ֪ב יָ֫דָ֥יִם שָֽׁם־רֶ֭מֶשׂ וְאֵ֣ין מִסְפָּ֑ר חַיֹּ֥ות קְ֝טַנֹּ֗ות עִם־גְּדֹלֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Yonder sea, great and wide, therein are creeping things innumerable, living creatures, both small and great.

jps.text: Yonder sea, great and wide, therein are creeping things innumerable, living creatures, both small and great.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֭ם אֳנִיֹּ֣ות יְהַלֵּכ֑וּן לִ֝וְיָתָ֗ן זֶֽה־יָצַ֥רְתָּ לְשַֽׂחֶק־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: There go the ships; there is leviathan, whom Thou hast formed to sport therein.

jps.text: There go the ships; there is leviathan, whom Thou hast formed to sport therein.

verses.hebrewText: כֻּ֭לָּם אֵלֶ֣יךָ יְשַׂבֵּר֑וּן לָתֵ֖ת אָכְלָ֣ם בְּעִתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: All of them wait for Thee, that Thou mayest give them their food in due season.

jps.text: All of them wait for Thee, that Thou mayest give them their food in due season.

verses.hebrewText: תִּתֵּ֣ן לָ֭הֶם יִלְקֹט֑וּן תִּפְתַּ֥ח יָֽ֝דְךָ֗ יִשְׂבְּע֥וּן טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: Thou givest it unto them, they gather it; Thou openest Thy hand, they are satisfied with good.

jps.text: Thou givest it unto them, they gather it; Thou openest Thy hand, they are satisfied with good.

verses.hebrewText: תַּסְתִּ֥יר פָּנֶיךָ֮ יִֽבָּהֵ֫ל֥וּן תֹּסֵ֣ף ר֭וּחָם יִגְוָע֑וּן וְֽאֶל־עֲפָרָ֥ם יְשׁוּבֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: Thou hidest Thy face, they vanish; Thou withdrawest their breath, they perish, and return to their dust.

jps.text: Thou hidest Thy face, they vanish; Thou withdrawest their breath, they perish, and return to their dust.

verses.hebrewText: תְּשַׁלַּ֣ח ר֭וּחֲךָ יִבָּרֵא֑וּן וּ֝תְחַדֵּ֗שׁ פְּנֵ֣י אֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thou sendest forth Thy spirit, they are created; and Thou renewest the face of the earth.

jps.text: Thou sendest forth Thy spirit, they are created; and Thou renewest the face of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִ֤י כְבֹ֣וד יְהוָ֣ה לְעֹולָ֑ם יִשְׂמַ֖ח יְהוָ֣ה בְּמַעֲשָֽׂיו׃
verses.englishText: May the glory of the LORD endure for ever; let the LORD rejoice in His works!

jps.text: May the glory of the LORD endure for ever; let the LORD rejoice in His works!

verses.hebrewText: הַמַּבִּ֣יט לָ֭אָרֶץ וַתִּרְעָ֑ד יִגַּ֖ע בֶּהָרִ֣ים וֽ͏ְיֶעֱשָֽׁנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Who looketh on the earth, and it trembleth; He toucheth the mountains, and they smoke.

jps.text: Who looketh on the earth, and it trembleth; He toucheth the mountains, and they smoke.

verses.hebrewText: אָשִׁ֣ירָה לַיהוָ֣ה בְּחַיָּ֑י אֲזַמְּרָ֖ה לֵאלֹהַ֣י בְּעֹודִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will sing unto the LORD as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have any being.

jps.text: I will sing unto the LORD as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have any being.

verses.hebrewText: יֶעֱרַ֣ב עָלָ֣יו שִׂיחִ֑י אָ֝נֹכִ֗י אֶשְׂמַ֥ח בַּיהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let my musing be sweet unto Him; as for me, I will rejoice in the LORD.

jps.text: Let my musing be sweet unto Him; as for me, I will rejoice in the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יִתַּ֤מּוּ חַטָּאִ֨ים ׀ מִן־הָאָ֡רֶץ וּרְשָׁעִ֤ים ׀ עֹ֤וד אֵינָ֗ם בָּרֲכִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָ֗ה הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Let sinners cease out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless the LORD, O my soul. Hallelujah.

jps.text: Let sinners cease out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless the LORD, O my soul. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד֣וּ לַ֭יהוָה קִרְא֣וּ בִּשְׁמֹ֑ו הֹודִ֥יעוּ בָ֝עַמִּ֗ים עֲלִילֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: O give thanks unto the LORD, call upon His name; make known His doings among the peoples.

jps.text: O give thanks unto the LORD, call upon His name; make known His doings among the peoples.

verses.hebrewText: שִֽׁירוּ־לֹ֖ו זַמְּרוּ־לֹ֑ו שִׂ֝֗יחוּ בְּכָל־נִפְלְאֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Sing unto Him, sing praises unto Him; speak ye of all His marvellous works.

jps.text: Sing unto Him, sing praises unto Him; speak ye of all His marvellous works.

verses.hebrewText: הִֽ֭תְהַלְלוּ בְּשֵׁ֣ם קָדְשֹׁ֑ו יִ֝שְׂמַ֗ח לֵ֤ב ׀ מְבַקְשֵׁ֬י יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Glory ye in His holy name; let the heart of them rejoice that seek the LORD.

jps.text: Glory ye in His holy name; let the heart of them rejoice that seek the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: דִּרְשׁ֣וּ יְהוָ֣ה וְעֻזֹּ֑ו בַּקְּשׁ֖וּ פָנָ֣יו תָּמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: Seek ye the LORD and His strength; seek His face continually.

jps.text: Seek ye the LORD and His strength; seek His face continually.

verses.hebrewText: זִכְר֗וּ נִפְלְאֹותָ֥יו אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֑ה מֹ֝פְתָ֗יו וּמִשְׁפְּטֵי־פִֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Remember His marvellous works that He hath done, His wonders, and the judgments of His mouth;

jps.text: Remember His marvellous works that He hath done, His wonders, and the judgments of His mouth;

verses.hebrewText: זֶ֭רַע אַבְרָהָ֣ם עַבְדֹּ֑ו בְּנֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב בְּחִירָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: O ye seed of Abraham His servant, ye children of Jacob, His chosen ones.

jps.text: O ye seed of Abraham His servant, ye children of Jacob, His chosen ones.

verses.hebrewText: ה֭וּא יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ בְּכָל־הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ מִשְׁפָּטָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He is the LORD our God; His judgments are in all the earth.

jps.text: He is the LORD our God; His judgments are in all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: זָכַ֣ר לְעֹולָ֣ם בְּרִיתֹ֑ו דָּבָ֥ר צִ֝וָּ֗ה לְאֶ֣לֶף דֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: He hath remembered His covenant for ever, the word which He commanded to a thousand generations;

jps.text: He hath remembered His covenant for ever, the word which He commanded to a thousand generations;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר כָּ֭רַת אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֑ם וּשְׁב֖וּעָתֹ֣ו לְיִשְׂחָֽק׃
verses.englishText: The covenant which He made with Abraham, and His oath unto Isaac;

jps.text: The covenant which He made with Abraham, and His oath unto Isaac;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּֽעֲמִידֶ֣הָ לְיַעֲקֹ֣ב לְחֹ֑ק לְ֝יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל בְּרִ֣ית עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And He established it unto Jacob for a statute, to Israel for an everlasting covenant;

jps.text: And He established it unto Jacob for a statute, to Israel for an everlasting covenant;

verses.hebrewText: לֵאמֹ֗ר לְךָ֗ אֶתֵּ֥ן אֶת־אֶֽרֶץ־כְּנָ֑עַן חֶ֝֗בֶל נַחֲלַתְכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Saying: 'Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance.'

jps.text: Saying: 'Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance.'

verses.hebrewText: בִּֽ֭הְיֹותָם מְתֵ֣י מִסְפָּ֑ר כִּ֝מְעַ֗ט וְגָרִ֥ים בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: When they were but a few men in number. Yea, very few, and sojourners in it,

jps.text: When they were but a few men in number. Yea, very few, and sojourners in it,

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יִּתְהַלְּכוּ מִגֹּ֣וי אֶל־גֹּ֑וי מִ֝מַּמְלָכָ֗ה אֶל־עַ֥ם אַחֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: And when they went about from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people,

jps.text: And when they went about from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people,

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־הִנִּ֣יחַ אָדָ֣ם לְעָשְׁקָ֑ם וַיֹּ֖וכַח עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם מְלָכִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He suffered no man to do them wrong, yea, for their sake He reproved kings:

jps.text: He suffered no man to do them wrong, yea, for their sake He reproved kings:

verses.hebrewText: אַֽל־תִּגְּע֥וּ בִמְשִׁיחָ֑י וְ֝לִנְבִיאַי אַל־תָּרֵֽעוּ׃
verses.englishText: 'Touch not Mine anointed ones, and do My prophets no harm.'

jps.text: 'Touch not Mine anointed ones, and do My prophets no harm.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּקְרָ֣א רָ֭עָב עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ כָּֽל־מַטֵּה־לֶ֥חֶם שָׁבָֽר׃
verses.englishText: And He called a famine upon the land; He broke the whole staff of bread.

jps.text: And He called a famine upon the land; He broke the whole staff of bread.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁלַ֣ח לִפְנֵיהֶ֣ם אִ֑ישׁ לְ֝עֶ֗בֶד נִמְכַּ֥ר יֹוסֵֽף׃
verses.englishText: He sent a man before them; Joseph was sold for a servant;

jps.text: He sent a man before them; Joseph was sold for a servant;

verses.hebrewText: עִנּ֣וּ בַכֶּ֣בֶל *רַגְלָיו (רַגְלֹ֑ו) בַּ֝רְזֶ֗ל בָּ֣אָה נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: His feet they hurt with fetters, his person was laid in iron;

jps.text: His feet they hurt with fetters, his person was laid in iron;

verses.hebrewText: עַד־עֵ֥ת בֹּֽא־דְבָרֹ֑ו אִמְרַ֖ת יְהוָ֣ה צְרָפָֽתְהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Until the time that his word came to pass, the word of the LORD tested him.

jps.text: Until the time that his word came to pass, the word of the LORD tested him.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֣לַח מֶ֭לֶךְ וַיַתִּירֵ֑הוּ מֹשֵׁ֥ל עַ֝מִּ֗ים וַֽיְפַתְּחֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the peoples, and set him free.

jps.text: The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the peoples, and set him free.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂמֹ֣ו אָדֹ֣ון לְבֵיתֹ֑ו וּ֝מֹשֵׁ֗ל בְּכָל־קִנְיָנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his possessions;

jps.text: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his possessions;

verses.hebrewText: לֶאְסֹ֣ר שָׂרָ֣יו בְּנַפְשֹׁ֑ו וּזְקֵנָ֥יו יְחַכֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: To bind his princes at his pleasure, and teach his elders wisdom.

jps.text: To bind his princes at his pleasure, and teach his elders wisdom.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּבֹ֣א יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל מִצְרָ֑יִם וְ֝יַעֲקֹ֗ב גָּ֣ר בְּאֶֽרֶץ־חָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Israel also came into Egypt; and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.

jps.text: Israel also came into Egypt; and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֶּ֣פֶר אֶת־עַמֹּ֣ו מְאֹ֑ד וַ֝יַּֽעֲצִמֵהוּ מִצָּרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: And He increased His people greatly, and made them too mighty for their adversaries.

jps.text: And He increased His people greatly, and made them too mighty for their adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: הָפַ֣ךְ לִ֭בָּם לִשְׂנֹ֣א עַמֹּ֑ו לְ֝הִתְנַכֵּ֗ל בַּעֲבָדָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He turned their heart to hate His people, to deal craftily with His servants.

jps.text: He turned their heart to hate His people, to deal craftily with His servants.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֭לַח מֹשֶׁ֣ה עַבְדֹּ֑ו אַ֝הֲרֹ֗ן אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּֽחַר־בֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: He sent Moses His servant, and Aaron whom He had chosen.

jps.text: He sent Moses His servant, and Aaron whom He had chosen.

verses.hebrewText: שָֽׂמוּ־בָ֭ם דִּבְרֵ֣י אֹתֹותָ֑יו וּ֝מֹפְתִ֗ים בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They wrought among them His manifold signs, and wonders in the land of Ham.

jps.text: They wrought among them His manifold signs, and wonders in the land of Ham.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֣לַֽח חֹ֭שֶׁךְ וַיַּחְשִׁ֑ךְ וְלֹֽא־מָ֝ר֗וּ אֶת־*דְּבָרָוו (דְּבָרֹֽו)׃
verses.englishText: He sent darkness, and it was dark; and they rebelled not against His word.

jps.text: He sent darkness, and it was dark; and they rebelled not against His word.

verses.hebrewText: הָפַ֣ךְ אֶת־מֵימֵיהֶ֣ם לְדָ֑ם וַ֝יָּ֗מֶת אֶת־דְּגָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish.

jps.text: He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁרַ֣ץ אַרְצָ֣ם צְפַרְדְּעִ֑ים בְּ֝חַדְרֵ֗י מַלְכֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their land swarmed with frogs, in the chambers of their kings.

jps.text: Their land swarmed with frogs, in the chambers of their kings.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭מַר וַיָּבֹ֣א עָרֹ֑ב כִּ֝נִּ֗ים בְּכָל־גְּבוּלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He spoke, and there came swarms of flies, and gnats in all their borders.

jps.text: He spoke, and there came swarms of flies, and gnats in all their borders.

verses.hebrewText: נָתַ֣ן גִּשְׁמֵיהֶ֣ם בָּרָ֑ד אֵ֖שׁ לֶהָבֹ֣ות בְּאַרְצָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.

jps.text: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֣ךְ גַּ֭פְנָם וּתְאֵנָתָ֑ם וַ֝יְשַׁבֵּ֗ר עֵ֣ץ גְּבוּלָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He smote their vines also and their fig-trees; and broke the trees of their borders.

jps.text: He smote their vines also and their fig-trees; and broke the trees of their borders.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭מַר וַיָּבֹ֣א אַרְבֶּ֑ה וְ֝יֶ֗לֶק וְאֵ֣ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: He spoke, and the locust came, and the canker-worm without number,

jps.text: He spoke, and the locust came, and the canker-worm without number,

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣אכַל כָּל־עֵ֣שֶׂב בְּאַרְצָ֑ם וַ֝יֹּ֗אכַל פְּרִ֣י אַדְמָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And did eat up every herb in their land, and did eat up the fruit of their ground.

jps.text: And did eat up every herb in their land, and did eat up the fruit of their ground.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֣ךְ כָּל־בְּכֹ֣ור בְּאַרְצָ֑ם רֵ֝אשִׁ֗ית לְכָל־אֹונָֽם׃
verses.englishText: He smote also all the first-born in their land, the first-fruits of all their strength.

jps.text: He smote also all the first-born in their land, the first-fruits of all their strength.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יֹּוצִיאֵם בְּכֶ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֑ב וְאֵ֖ין בִּשְׁבָטָ֣יו כֹּושֵֽׁל׃
verses.englishText: And He brought them forth with silver and gold; and there was none that stumbled among His tribes.

jps.text: And He brought them forth with silver and gold; and there was none that stumbled among His tribes.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂמַ֣ח מִצְרַ֣יִם בְּצֵאתָ֑ם כִּֽי־נָפַ֖ל פַּחְדָּ֣ם עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Egypt was glad when they departed; for the fear of them had fallen upon them.

jps.text: Egypt was glad when they departed; for the fear of them had fallen upon them.

verses.hebrewText: פָּרַ֣שׂ עָנָ֣ן לְמָסָ֑ךְ וְ֝אֵ֗שׁ לְהָאִ֥יר לָֽיְלָה׃
verses.englishText: He spread a cloud for a screen; and fire to give light in the night.

jps.text: He spread a cloud for a screen; and fire to give light in the night.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁאַ֣ל וַיָּבֵ֣א שְׂלָ֑ו וְלֶ֥חֶם שָׁ֝מַ֗יִם יַשְׂבִּיעֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: They asked, and He brought quails, and gave them in plenty the bread of heaven.

jps.text: They asked, and He brought quails, and gave them in plenty the bread of heaven.

verses.hebrewText: פָּ֣תַח צ֭וּר וַיָּז֣וּבוּ מָ֑יִם הָ֝לְכ֗וּ בַּצִּיֹּ֥ות נָהָֽר׃
verses.englishText: He opened the rock, and waters gushed out; they ran, a river in the dry places.

jps.text: He opened the rock, and waters gushed out; they ran, a river in the dry places.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־זָ֭כַר אֶת־דְּבַ֣ר קָדְשֹׁ֑ו אֶֽת־אַבְרָהָ֥ם עַבְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: For He remembered His holy word unto Abraham His servant;

jps.text: For He remembered His holy word unto Abraham His servant;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּוצִ֣א עַמֹּ֣ו בְשָׂשֹׂ֑ון בְּ֝רִנָּ֗ה אֶת־בְּחִירָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: And He brought forth His people with joy, His chosen ones with singing.

jps.text: And He brought forth His people with joy, His chosen ones with singing.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לָ֭הֶם אַרְצֹ֣ות גֹּויִ֑ם וַעֲמַ֖ל לְאֻמִּ֣ים יִירָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: And He gave them the lands of the nations, and they took the labour of the peoples in possession;

jps.text: And He gave them the lands of the nations, and they took the labour of the peoples in possession;

verses.hebrewText: בַּעֲב֤וּר ׀ יִשְׁמְר֣וּ חֻ֭קָּיו וְתֹורֹתָ֥יו יִנְצֹ֗רוּ הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: That they might keep His statutes, and observe His laws. Hallelujah.

jps.text: That they might keep His statutes, and observe His laws. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽלְלוּיָ֨הּ ׀ הֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה כִּי־טֹ֑וב כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. O give thanks unto the LORD; for He is good; for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: Hallelujah. O give thanks unto the LORD; for He is good; for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֗י יְ֭מַלֵּל גְּבוּרֹ֣ות יְהוָ֑ה יַ֝שְׁמִ֗יעַ כָּל־תְּהִלָּתֹֽו׃
