verses.englishText: Who can express the mighty acts of the LORD, or make all His praise to be heard?

jps.text: Who can express the mighty acts of the LORD, or make all His praise to be heard?

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭שְׁרֵי שֹׁמְרֵ֣י מִשְׁפָּ֑ט עֹשֵׂ֖ה צְדָקָ֣ה בְכָל־עֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: Happy are they that keep justice, that do righteousness at all times.

jps.text: Happy are they that keep justice, that do righteousness at all times.

verses.hebrewText: זָכְרֵ֣נִי יְ֭הוָה בִּרְצֹ֣ון עַמֶּ֑ךָ פָּ֝קְדֵ֗נִי בִּישׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Remember me, O LORD, when Thou favourest Thy people; O think of me at Thy salvation;

jps.text: Remember me, O LORD, when Thou favourest Thy people; O think of me at Thy salvation;

verses.hebrewText: לִרְאֹ֤ות ׀ בְּטֹ֘ובַ֤ת בְּחִירֶ֗יךָ לִ֭שְׂמֹחַ בְּשִׂמְחַ֣ת גֹּויֶ֑ךָ לְ֝הִתְהַלֵּ֗ל עִם־נַחֲלָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: That I may behold the prosperity of Thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of Thy nation, that I may glory with Thine inheritance.

jps.text: That I may behold the prosperity of Thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of Thy nation, that I may glory with Thine inheritance.

verses.hebrewText: חָטָ֥אנוּ עִם־אֲבֹותֵ֗ינוּ הֶעֱוִ֥ינוּ הִרְשָֽׁעְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: We have sinned with our fathers, we have done iniquitously, we have dealt wickedly.

jps.text: We have sinned with our fathers, we have done iniquitously, we have dealt wickedly.

verses.hebrewText: אֲבֹ֘ותֵ֤ינוּ בְמִצְרַ֨יִם ׀ לֹא־הִשְׂכִּ֬ילוּ נִפְלְאֹותֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א זָ֭כְרוּ אֶת־רֹ֣ב חֲסָדֶ֑יךָ וַיַּמְר֖וּ עַל־יָ֣ם בְּיַם־סֽוּף׃
verses.englishText: Our fathers in Egypt gave no heed unto Thy wonders; they remembered not the multitude of Thy mercies; but were rebellious at the sea, even at the Red Sea.

jps.text: Our fathers in Egypt gave no heed unto Thy wonders; they remembered not the multitude of Thy mercies; but were rebellious at the sea, even at the Red Sea.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יֹּושִׁיעֵם לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֹ֑ו לְ֝הֹודִ֗יעַ אֶת־גְּבוּרָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Nevertheless He saved them for His name's sake, that He might make His mighty power to be known.

jps.text: Nevertheless He saved them for His name's sake, that He might make His mighty power to be known.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּגְעַ֣ר בְּיַם־ס֭וּף וֽ͏ַיֶּחֱרָ֑ב וַיֹּולִיכֵ֥ם בַּ֝תְּהֹמֹ֗ות כַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: And He rebuked the Red Sea, and it was dried up; and He led them through the depths, as through a wilderness.

jps.text: And He rebuked the Red Sea, and it was dried up; and He led them through the depths, as through a wilderness.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יֹּושִׁיעֵם מִיַּ֣ד שֹׂונֵ֑א וַ֝יִּגְאָלֵ֗ם מִיַּ֥ד אֹויֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: And He saved them from the hand of him that hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.

jps.text: And He saved them from the hand of him that hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְכַסּוּ־מַ֥יִם צָרֵיהֶ֑ם אֶחָ֥ד מֵ֝הֶ֗ם לֹ֣א נֹותָֽר׃
verses.englishText: And the waters covered their adversaries; there was not one of them left.

jps.text: And the waters covered their adversaries; there was not one of them left.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּאֲמִ֥ינוּ בִדְבָרָ֑יו יָ֝שִׁ֗ירוּ תְּהִלָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Then believed they His words; they sang His praise.

jps.text: Then believed they His words; they sang His praise.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽ֭הֲרוּ שָׁכְח֣וּ מַעֲשָׂ֑יו לֹֽא־חִ֝כּ֗וּ לַעֲצָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: They soon forgot His works; they waited not for His counsel;

jps.text: They soon forgot His works; they waited not for His counsel;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְאַוּ֣וּ תַ֭אֲוָה בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וַיְנַסּוּ־אֵ֝֗ל בִּֽישִׁימֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tried God in the desert.

jps.text: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tried God in the desert.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לָ֭הֶם שֶׁאֱלָתָ֑ם וַיְשַׁלַּ֖ח רָזֹ֣ון בְּנַפְשָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: And He gave them their request; but sent leanness into their soul.

jps.text: And He gave them their request; but sent leanness into their soul.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְקַנְא֣וּ לְ֭מֹשֶׁה בַּֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה לְ֝אַהֲרֹ֗ן קְדֹ֣ושׁ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: They were jealous also of Moses in the camp, and of Aaron the holy one of the LORD.

jps.text: They were jealous also of Moses in the camp, and of Aaron the holy one of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: תִּפְתַּח־אֶ֭רֶץ וַתִּבְלַ֣ע דָּתָ֑ן וַ֝תְּכַ֗ס עַל־עֲדַ֥ת אֲבִירָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.

jps.text: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּבְעַר־אֵ֥שׁ בַּעֲדָתָ֑ם לֶ֝הָבָ֗ה תְּלַהֵ֥ט רְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And a fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.

jps.text: And a fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.

verses.hebrewText: יַעֲשׂוּ־עֵ֥גֶל בְּחֹרֵ֑ב וַ֝יִּשְׁתַּחֲו֗וּ לְמַסֵּכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshipped a molten image.

jps.text: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshipped a molten image.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּמִ֥ירוּ אֶת־כְּבֹודָ֑ם בְּתַבְנִ֥ית שֹׁ֝֗ור אֹכֵ֥ל עֵֽשֶׂב׃
verses.englishText: Thus they exchanged their glory for the likeness of an ox that eateth grass.

jps.text: Thus they exchanged their glory for the likeness of an ox that eateth grass.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֭כְחוּ אֵ֣ל מֹושִׁיעָ֑ם עֹשֶׂ֖ה גְדֹלֹ֣ות בְּמִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: They forgot God their saviour, who had done great things in Egypt;

jps.text: They forgot God their saviour, who had done great things in Egypt;

verses.hebrewText: נִ֭פְלָאֹות בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חָ֑ם נֹ֝ורָאֹ֗ות עַל־יַם־סֽוּף׃
verses.englishText: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, terrible things by the Red Sea.

jps.text: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, terrible things by the Red Sea.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר לְֽהַשְׁמִ֫ידָ֥ם לוּלֵ֡י מֹ֘שֶׁ֤ה בְחִירֹ֗ו עָמַ֣ד בַּפֶּ֣רֶץ לְפָנָ֑יו לְהָשִׁ֥יב חֲ֝מָתֹ֗ו מֵֽהַשְׁחִֽית׃
verses.englishText: Therefore He said that He would destroy them, had not Moses His chosen stood before Him in the breach, to turn back His wrath, lest He should destroy them.

jps.text: Therefore He said that He would destroy them, had not Moses His chosen stood before Him in the breach, to turn back His wrath, lest He should destroy them.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽ֭יִּמְאֲסוּ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ חֶמְדָּ֑ה לֹֽא־הֶ֝אֱמִ֗ינוּ לִדְבָרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Moreover, they scorned the desirable land, they believed not His word;

jps.text: Moreover, they scorned the desirable land, they believed not His word;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּרָגְנ֥וּ בְאָהֳלֵיהֶ֑ם לֹ֥א שָׁ֝מְע֗וּ בְּקֹ֣ול יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And they murmured in their tents, they hearkened not unto the voice of the LORD.

jps.text: And they murmured in their tents, they hearkened not unto the voice of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשָּׂ֣א יָדֹ֣ו לָהֶ֑ם לְהַפִּ֥יל אֹ֝ותָ֗ם בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Therefore He swore concerning them, that He would overthrow them in the wilderness;

jps.text: Therefore He swore concerning them, that He would overthrow them in the wilderness;

verses.hebrewText: וּלְהַפִּ֣יל זַ֭רְעָם בַּגֹּויִ֑ם וּ֝לְזָרֹותָ֗ם בָּאֲרָצֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: And that He would cast out their seed among the nations, and scatter them in the lands.

jps.text: And that He would cast out their seed among the nations, and scatter them in the lands.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יִּצָּ֣מְדוּ לְבַ֣עַל פְּעֹ֑ור וַ֝יֹּאכְל֗וּ זִבְחֵ֥י מֵתִֽים׃
verses.englishText: They joined themselves also unto Baal of Peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.

jps.text: They joined themselves also unto Baal of Peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּכְעִיסוּ בְּמַֽעַלְלֵיהֶ֑ם וַתִּפְרָץ־בָּ֝֗ם מַגֵּפָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thus they provoked Him with their doings, and the plague broke in upon them.

jps.text: Thus they provoked Him with their doings, and the plague broke in upon them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּעֲמֹ֣ד פִּֽ֭ינְחָס וַיְפַלֵּ֑ל וַ֝תֵּעָצַ֗ר הַמַּגֵּפָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Then stood up Phinehas, and wrought judgment, and so the plague was stayed.

jps.text: Then stood up Phinehas, and wrought judgment, and so the plague was stayed.

verses.hebrewText: וַתֵּחָ֣שֶׁב לֹ֭ו לִצְדָקָ֑ה לְדֹ֥ר וָ֝דֹ֗ר עַד־עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And that was counted unto him for righteousness, unto all generations for ever.

jps.text: And that was counted unto him for righteousness, unto all generations for ever.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּקְצִיפוּ עַל־מֵ֥י מְרִיבָ֑ה וַיֵּ֥רַע לְ֝מֹשֶׁ֗ה בַּעֲבוּרָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They angered Him also at the waters of Meribah, and it went ill with Moses because of them;

jps.text: They angered Him also at the waters of Meribah, and it went ill with Moses because of them;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִמְר֥וּ אֶת־רוּחֹ֑ו וַ֝יְבַטֵּ֗א בִּשְׂפָתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: For they embittered his spirit, and he spoke rashly with his lips.

jps.text: For they embittered his spirit, and he spoke rashly with his lips.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא־הִ֭שְׁמִידוּ אֶת־הָֽעַמִּ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר אָמַ֖ר יְהוָ֣ה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They did not destroy the peoples, as the LORD commanded them;

jps.text: They did not destroy the peoples, as the LORD commanded them;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְעָרְב֥וּ בַגֹּויִ֑ם וַֽ֝יִּלְמְד֗וּ מַֽעֲשֵׂיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: But mingled themselves with the nations, and learned their works;

jps.text: But mingled themselves with the nations, and learned their works;

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּעַבְד֥וּ אֶת־עֲצַבֵּיהֶ֑ם וַיִּהְי֖וּ לָהֶ֣ם לְמֹוקֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: And they served their idols, which became a snare unto them;

jps.text: And they served their idols, which became a snare unto them;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּזְבְּח֣וּ אֶת־בְּ֭נֵיהֶם וְאֶת־בְּנֹֽותֵיהֶ֗ם לַשֵּֽׁדִים׃
verses.englishText: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto demons,

jps.text: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto demons,

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּֽשְׁפְּכ֨וּ דָ֪ם נָקִ֡י דַּם־בְּנֵ֘יהֶ֤ם וּֽבְנֹותֵיהֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר זִ֭בְּחוּ לַעֲצַבֵּ֣י כְנָ֑עַן וַתֶּחֱנַ֥ף הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ בַּדָּמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan; and the land was polluted with blood.

jps.text: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan; and the land was polluted with blood.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּטְמְא֥וּ בְמַעֲשֵׂיהֶ֑ם וַ֝יִּזְ֗נוּ בְּמַֽעַלְלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thus were they defiled with their works, and went astray in their doings.

jps.text: Thus were they defiled with their works, and went astray in their doings.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּֽחַר־אַ֣ף יְהוָ֣ה בְּעַמֹּ֑ו וַ֝יְתָעֵ֗ב אֶת־נַחֲלָתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Therefore was the wrath of the LORD kindled against His people, and He abhorred His inheritance.

jps.text: Therefore was the wrath of the LORD kindled against His people, and He abhorred His inheritance.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְּנֵ֥ם בְּיַד־גֹּויִ֑ם וַֽיִּמְשְׁל֥וּ בָ֝הֶ֗ם שֹׂנְאֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: And He gave them into the hand of the nations; and they that hated them ruled over them.

jps.text: And He gave them into the hand of the nations; and they that hated them ruled over them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּלְחָצ֥וּם אֹויְבֵיהֶ֑ם וַ֝יִּכָּנְע֗וּ תַּ֣חַת יָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were subdued under their hand.

jps.text: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were subdued under their hand.

verses.hebrewText: פְּעָמִ֥ים רַבֹּ֗ות יַצִּ֫ילֵ֥ם וְ֭הֵמָּה יַמְר֣וּ בַעֲצָתָ֑ם וַ֝יָּמֹ֗כּוּ בַּעֲוֹנָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Many times did He deliver them; but they were rebellious in their counsel, and sank low through their iniquity.

jps.text: Many times did He deliver them; but they were rebellious in their counsel, and sank low through their iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יַּרְא בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם בְּ֝שָׁמְעֹ֗ו אֶת־רִנָּתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Nevertheless He looked upon their distress, when He heard their cry;

jps.text: Nevertheless He looked upon their distress, when He heard their cry;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּזְכֹּ֣ר לָהֶ֣ם בְּרִיתֹ֑ו וַ֝יִּנָּחֵ֗ם כְּרֹ֣ב *חַסְדֹּו (חֲסָדָֽיו)׃
verses.englishText: And He remembered for them His covenant, and repented according to the multitude of His mercies.

jps.text: And He remembered for them His covenant, and repented according to the multitude of His mercies.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן אֹותָ֣ם לְרַחֲמִ֑ים לִ֝פְנֵ֛י כָּל־שֹׁובֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: He made them also to be pitied of all those that carried them captive.

jps.text: He made them also to be pitied of all those that carried them captive.

verses.hebrewText: הֹושִׁיעֵ֨נוּ ׀ יְה֘וָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ וְקַבְּצֵנוּ֮ מִֽן־הַגֹּ֫ויִ֥ם לְ֭הֹדֹות לְשֵׁ֣ם קָדְשֶׁ֑ךָ לְ֝הִשְׁתַּבֵּ֗חַ בִּתְהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Save us, O LORD our God, and gather us from among the nations, that we may give thanks unto Thy holy name, that we may triumph in Thy praise.

jps.text: Save us, O LORD our God, and gather us from among the nations, that we may give thanks unto Thy holy name, that we may triumph in Thy praise.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֤וּךְ־יְהוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֵ֪י יִשְׂרָאֵ֡ל מִן־הָ֤עֹולָ֨ם ׀ וְעַ֬ד הָעֹולָ֗ם וְאָמַ֖ר כָּל־הָעָ֥ם אָמֵ֗ן הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting even to everlasting, and let all the people say: 'Amen.' Hallelujah.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting even to everlasting, and let all the people say: 'Amen.' Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הֹד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה כִּי־טֹ֑וב כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: BOOK V 'O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.'

jps.text: BOOK V 'O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.'

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֭אמְרוּ גְּאוּלֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר גְּ֝אָלָ֗ם מִיַּד־צָֽר׃
verses.englishText: So let the redeemed of the LORD say, whom He hath redeemed from the hand of the adversary;

jps.text: So let the redeemed of the LORD say, whom He hath redeemed from the hand of the adversary;

verses.hebrewText: וּֽמֵאֲרָצֹ֗ות קִ֫בְּצָ֥ם מִמִּזְרָ֥ח וּמִֽמַּעֲרָ֑ב מִצָּפֹ֥ון וּמִיָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: And gathered them out of the lands, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the sea.

jps.text: And gathered them out of the lands, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the sea.

verses.hebrewText: תָּע֣וּ בַ֭מִּדְבָּר בִּישִׁימֹ֣ון דָּ֑רֶךְ עִ֥יר מֹ֝ושָׁ֗ב לֹ֣א מָצָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way; they found no city of habitation.

jps.text: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way; they found no city of habitation.

verses.hebrewText: רְעֵבִ֥ים גַּם־צְמֵאִ֑ים נַ֝פְשָׁ֗ם בָּהֶ֥ם תִּתְעַטָּֽף׃
verses.englishText: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.

jps.text: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּצְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם מִ֝מְּצֽוּקֹותֵיהֶ֗ם יַצִּילֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Then they cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He delivered them out of their distresses.

jps.text: Then they cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He delivered them out of their distresses.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֭יּֽ͏ַדְרִיכֵם בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ יְשָׁרָ֑ה לָ֝לֶ֗כֶת אֶל־עִ֥יר מֹושָֽׁב׃
verses.englishText: And He led them by a straight way, that they might go to a city of habitation.

jps.text: And He led them by a straight way, that they might go to a city of habitation.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

jps.text: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־הִ֭שְׂבִּיעַ נֶ֣פֶשׁ שֹׁקֵקָ֑ה וְנֶ֥פֶשׁ רְ֝עֵבָה מִלֵּא־טֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: For He hath satisfied the longing soul, and the hungry soul He hath filled with good.

jps.text: For He hath satisfied the longing soul, and the hungry soul He hath filled with good.

verses.hebrewText: יֹ֭שְׁבֵי חֹ֣שֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָ֑וֶת אֲסִירֵ֖י עֳנִ֣י וּבַרְזֶֽל׃
verses.englishText: Such as sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron —

jps.text: Such as sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron —

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִמְר֥וּ אִמְרֵי־אֵ֑ל וַעֲצַ֖ת עֶלְיֹ֣ון נָאָֽצוּ׃
verses.englishText: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and contemned the counsel of the Most High.

jps.text: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and contemned the counsel of the Most High.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּכְנַ֣ע בֶּעָמָ֣ל לִבָּ֑ם כָּ֝שְׁל֗וּ וְאֵ֣ין עֹזֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Therefore He humbled their heart with travail, they stumbled, and there was none to help —

jps.text: Therefore He humbled their heart with travail, they stumbled, and there was none to help —

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּזְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם מִ֝מְּצֻֽקֹותֵיהֶ֗ם יֹושִׁיעֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them out of their distresses.

jps.text: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them out of their distresses.

verses.hebrewText: יֹֽ֭וצִיאֵם מֵחֹ֣שֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָ֑וֶת וּמֹוסְרֹ֖ותֵיהֶ֣ם יְנַתֵּֽק׃
verses.englishText: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and broke their bands in sunder.

jps.text: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and broke their bands in sunder.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

jps.text: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־שִׁ֭בַּר דַּלְתֹ֣ות נְחֹ֑שֶׁת וּבְרִיחֵ֖י בַרְזֶ֣ל גִּדֵּֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: For He hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.

jps.text: For He hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ֭וִלִים מִדֶּ֣רֶךְ פִּשְׁעָ֑ם וּֽ֝מֵעֲוֹֽנֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יִתְעַנּֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: Crazed because of the way of their transgression, and afflicted because of their iniquities —

jps.text: Crazed because of the way of their transgression, and afflicted because of their iniquities —

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־אֹ֭כֶל תְּתַעֵ֣ב נַפְשָׁ֑ם וַ֝יַּגִּ֗יעוּ עַד־שַׁ֥עֲרֵי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.englishText: Their soul abhorred all manner of food, and they drew near unto the gates of death —

jps.text: Their soul abhorred all manner of food, and they drew near unto the gates of death —

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּזְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם מִ֝מְּצֻֽקֹותֵיהֶ֗ם יֹושִׁיעֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them out of their distresses;

jps.text: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them out of their distresses;

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁלַ֣ח דְּ֭בָרֹו וְיִרְפָּאֵ֑ם וִֽ֝ימַלֵּ֗ט מִשְּׁחִיתֹותָֽם׃ ׆
verses.englishText: He sent His word, and healed them, and delivered them from their graves.

jps.text: He sent His word, and healed them, and delivered them from their graves.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃ ׆
verses.englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

jps.text: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭יִזְבְּחוּ זִבְחֵ֣י תֹודָ֑ה וִֽיסַפְּר֖וּ מַעֲשָׂ֣יו בְּרִנָּֽה׃ ׆
verses.englishText: And let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare His works with singing.

jps.text: And let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare His works with singing.

verses.hebrewText: יֹורְדֵ֣י הַ֭יָּם בָּאֳנִיֹּ֑ות עֹשֵׂ֥י מְ֝לָאכָ֗ה בְּמַ֣יִם רַבִּֽים׃ ׆
verses.englishText: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters —

jps.text: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters —

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֣מָּה רָ֭אוּ מַעֲשֵׂ֣י יְהוָ֑ה וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו בִּמְצוּלָֽה׃ ׆
verses.englishText: These saw the works of the LORD, and His wonders in the deep;

jps.text: These saw the works of the LORD, and His wonders in the deep;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר וַֽ֭יַּעֲמֵד ר֣וּחַ סְעָרָ֑ה וַתְּרֹומֵ֥ם גַּלָּֽיו׃ ׆
verses.englishText: For He commanded, and raised the stormy wind, which lifted up the waves thereof;

jps.text: For He commanded, and raised the stormy wind, which lifted up the waves thereof;

verses.hebrewText: יַעֲל֣וּ שָׁ֭מַיִם יֵרְד֣וּ תְהֹומֹ֑ות נַ֝פְשָׁ֗ם בְּרָעָ֥ה תִתְמֹוגָֽג׃
verses.englishText: They mounted up to the heaven, they went down to the deeps; their soul melted away because of trouble;

jps.text: They mounted up to the heaven, they went down to the deeps; their soul melted away because of trouble;

verses.hebrewText: יָחֹ֣וגּוּ וְ֭יָנוּעוּ כַּשִּׁכֹּ֑ור וְכָל־חָ֝כְמָתָ֗ם תִּתְבַּלָּֽע׃
verses.englishText: They reeled to and fro, and staggered like a drunken man, and all their wisdom was swallowed up —

jps.text: They reeled to and fro, and staggered like a drunken man, and all their wisdom was swallowed up —

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּצְעֲק֣וּ אֶל־יְ֭הוָה בַּצַּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם וּֽ֝מִמְּצֽוּקֹתֵיהֶ֗ם יֹוצִיאֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He brought them out of their distresses.

jps.text: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, and He brought them out of their distresses.

verses.hebrewText: יָקֵ֣ם סְ֭עָרָה לִדְמָמָ֑ה וַ֝יֶּחֱשׁ֗וּ גַּלֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: He made the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof were still.

jps.text: He made the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof were still.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשְׂמְח֥וּ כִֽי־יִשְׁתֹּ֑קוּ וַ֝יַּנְחֵ֗ם אֶל־מְחֹ֥וז חֶפְצָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Then were they glad because they were quiet, and He led them unto their desired haven.

jps.text: Then were they glad because they were quiet, and He led them unto their desired haven.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה חַסְדֹּ֑ו וְ֝נִפְלְאֹותָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

jps.text: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!

verses.hebrewText: וִֽ֭ירֹמְמוּהוּ בִּקְהַל־עָ֑ם וּבְמֹושַׁ֖ב זְקֵנִ֣ים יְהַלְלֽוּהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them exalt Him also in the assembly of the people, and praise Him in the seat of the elders.

jps.text: Let them exalt Him also in the assembly of the people, and praise Him in the seat of the elders.

verses.hebrewText: יָשֵׂ֣ם נְהָרֹ֣ות לְמִדְבָּ֑ר וּמֹצָ֥אֵי מַ֝֗יִם לְצִמָּאֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, and watersprings into a thirsty ground;

jps.text: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, and watersprings into a thirsty ground;

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֣רֶץ פְּ֭רִי לִמְלֵחָ֑ה מֵ֝רָעַ֗ת יֹ֣שְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: A fruitful land into a salt waste, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.

jps.text: A fruitful land into a salt waste, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.

verses.hebrewText: יָשֵׂ֣ם מִ֭דְבָּר לַֽאֲגַם־מַ֑יִם וְאֶ֥רֶץ צִ֝יָּ֗ה לְמֹצָ֥אֵי מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: He turneth a wilderness into a pool of water, and a dry land into watersprings.

jps.text: He turneth a wilderness into a pool of water, and a dry land into watersprings.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣ושֶׁב שָׁ֣ם רְעֵבִ֑ים וַ֝יְכֹונְנ֗וּ עִ֣יר מֹושָֽׁב׃
verses.englishText: And there He maketh the hungry to dwell, and they establish a city of habitation;

jps.text: And there He maketh the hungry to dwell, and they establish a city of habitation;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּזְרְע֣וּ שָׂ֭דֹות וַיִּטְּע֣וּ כְרָמִ֑ים וַ֝יַּעֲשׂ֗וּ פְּרִ֣י תְבֽוּאָה׃
verses.englishText: And sow fields, and plant vineyards, which yield fruits of increase.

jps.text: And sow fields, and plant vineyards, which yield fruits of increase.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְבָרֲכֵ֣ם וַיִּרְבּ֣וּ מְאֹ֑ד וּ֝בְהֶמְתָּ֗ם לֹ֣א יַמְעִֽיט׃
verses.englishText: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly, and suffereth not their cattle to decrease.

jps.text: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly, and suffereth not their cattle to decrease.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּמְעֲט֥וּ וַיָּשֹׁ֑חוּ מֵעֹ֖צֶר רָעָ֣ה וְיָגֹֽון׃ ׆
verses.englishText: Again, they are minished and dwindle away through oppression of evil and sorrow.

jps.text: Again, they are minished and dwindle away through oppression of evil and sorrow.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁפֵ֣ךְ בּ֭וּז עַל־נְדִיבִ֑ים וַ֝יַּתְעֵ֗ם בְּתֹ֣הוּ לֹא־דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: He poureth contempt upon princes, and causeth them to wander in the waste, where there is no way.

jps.text: He poureth contempt upon princes, and causeth them to wander in the waste, where there is no way.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְשַׂגֵּ֣ב אֶבְיֹ֣ון מֵעֹ֑ונִי וַיָּ֥שֶׂם כַּ֝צֹּ֗אן מִשְׁפָּחֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Yet setteth He the needy on high from affliction, and maketh his families like a flock.

jps.text: Yet setteth He the needy on high from affliction, and maketh his families like a flock.

verses.hebrewText: יִרְא֣וּ יְשָׁרִ֣ים וְיִשְׂמָ֑חוּ וְכָל־עַ֝וְלָ֗ה קָ֣פְצָה פִּֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: The upright see it, and are glad; and all iniquity stoppeth her mouth.

jps.text: The upright see it, and are glad; and all iniquity stoppeth her mouth.

verses.hebrewText: מִי־חָכָ֥ם וְיִשְׁמָר־אֵ֑לֶּה וְ֝יִתְבֹּֽונְנ֗וּ חַֽסְדֵ֥י יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Whoso is wise, let him observe these things, and let them consider the mercies of the LORD.

jps.text: Whoso is wise, let him observe these things, and let them consider the mercies of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֖יר מִזְמֹ֣ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: A Song, a Psalm of David.

jps.text: A Song, a Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: נָכֹ֣ון לִבִּ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים אָשִׁ֥ירָה וַ֝אֲזַמְּרָ֗ה אַף־כְּבֹודִֽי׃
verses.englishText: My heart is steadfast, O God; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises, even with my glory.

jps.text: My heart is steadfast, O God; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises, even with my glory.

verses.hebrewText: ע֭וּרָֽה הַנֵּ֥בֶל וְכִנֹּ֗ור אָעִ֥ירָה שָּֽׁחַר׃
verses.englishText: Awake, psaltery and harp; I will awake the dawn.

jps.text: Awake, psaltery and harp; I will awake the dawn.

verses.hebrewText: אֹודְךָ֖ בָעַמִּ֥ים ׀ יְהוָ֑ה וַ֝אֲזַמֶּרְךָ֗ בַּל־אֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, O LORD, among the peoples; and I will sing praises unto Thee among the nations.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto Thee, O LORD, among the peoples; and I will sing praises unto Thee among the nations.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־גָדֹ֣ול מֵֽעַל־שָׁמַ֣יִם חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ וְֽעַד־שְׁחָקִ֥ים אֲמִתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thy mercy is great above the heavens, and Thy truth reacheth unto the skies.

jps.text: For Thy mercy is great above the heavens, and Thy truth reacheth unto the skies.

verses.hebrewText: ר֣וּמָה עַל־שָׁמַ֣יִם אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְעַ֖ל כָּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ כְּבֹודֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; and Thy glory be above all the earth.

jps.text: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; and Thy glory be above all the earth.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭מַעַן יֵחָלְצ֣וּן יְדִידֶ֑יךָ הֹושִׁ֖יעָה יְמִֽינְךָ֣ וַעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: That Thy beloved may be delivered, save with Thy right hand, and answer me.

jps.text: That Thy beloved may be delivered, save with Thy right hand, and answer me.

verses.hebrewText: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ דִּבֶּ֥ר בְּקָדְשֹׁ֗ו אֶעְלֹ֥זָה אֲחַלְּקָ֥ה שְׁכֶ֑ם וְעֵ֖מֶק סֻכֹּ֣ות אֲמַדֵּֽד׃
verses.englishText: God spoke in His holiness, that I would exult; that I would divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.

jps.text: God spoke in His holiness, that I would exult; that I would divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.

verses.hebrewText: לִ֤י גִלְעָ֨ד ׀ לִ֤י מְנַשֶּׁ֗ה וְ֭אֶפְרַיִם מָעֹ֣וז רֹאשִׁ֑י יְ֝הוּדָ֗ה מְחֹקְקִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Gilead is mine, Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the defence of my head; Judah is my sceptre.

jps.text: Gilead is mine, Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the defence of my head; Judah is my sceptre.

verses.hebrewText: מֹואָ֤ב ׀ סִ֬יר רַחְצִ֗י עַל־אֱ֭דֹום אַשְׁלִ֣יךְ נַעֲלִ֑י עֲלֵֽי־פְ֝לֶ֗שֶׁת אֶתְרֹועָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Moab is my washpot; upon Edom do I cast my shoe; over Philistia do I cry aloud.

jps.text: Moab is my washpot; upon Edom do I cast my shoe; over Philistia do I cry aloud.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֣י יֹ֭בִלֵנִי עִ֣יר מִבְצָ֑ר מִ֖י נָחַ֣נִי עַד־אֱדֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who will lead me unto Edom?

jps.text: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who will lead me unto Edom?

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹֽא־אֱלֹהִ֥ים זְנַחְתָּ֑נוּ וְֽלֹא־תֵצֵ֥א אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים בְּצִבְאֹתֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Hast not Thou cast us off, O God? and Thou goest not forth, O God, with our hosts?

jps.text: Hast not Thou cast us off, O God? and Thou goest not forth, O God, with our hosts?

verses.hebrewText: הָֽבָה־לָּ֣נוּ עֶזְרָ֣ת מִצָּ֑ר וְ֝שָׁ֗וְא תְּשׁוּעַ֥ת אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Give us help against the adversary; for vain is the help of man.

jps.text: Give us help against the adversary; for vain is the help of man.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּֽאלֹהִ֥ים נַעֲשֶׂה־חָ֑יִל וְ֝ה֗וּא יָב֥וּס צָרֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Through God we shall do valiantly; for He it is that will tread down our adversaries.

jps.text: Through God we shall do valiantly; for He it is that will tread down our adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִ֣ד מִזְמֹ֑ור אֱלֹהֵ֥י תְ֝הִלָּתִ֗י אַֽל־תֶּחֱרַֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. O God of my praise, keep not silence;

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. O God of my praise, keep not silence;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י פִ֪י רָשָׁ֡ע וּֽפִי־מִ֭רְמָה עָלַ֣י פָּתָ֑חוּ דִּבְּר֥וּ אִ֝תִּ֗י לְשֹׁ֣ון שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of deceit have they opened against me; they have spoken unto me with a lying tongue.

jps.text: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of deceit have they opened against me; they have spoken unto me with a lying tongue.

verses.hebrewText: וְדִבְרֵ֣י שִׂנְאָ֣ה סְבָב֑וּנִי וַיִּֽלָּחֲמ֥וּנִי חִנָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: They compassed me about also with words of hatred, and fought against me without a cause.

jps.text: They compassed me about also with words of hatred, and fought against me without a cause.

verses.hebrewText: תַּֽחַת־אַהֲבָתִ֥י יִשְׂטְנ֗וּנִי וַאֲנִ֥י תְפִלָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: In return for my love they are my adversaries; but I am all prayer.

jps.text: In return for my love they are my adversaries; but I am all prayer.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֘שִׂ֤ימוּ עָלַ֣י רָ֭עָה תַּ֣חַת טֹובָ֑ה וְ֝שִׂנְאָ֗ה תַּ֣חַת אַהֲבָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And they have laid upon me evil for good, and hatred for my love:

jps.text: And they have laid upon me evil for good, and hatred for my love:

verses.hebrewText: הַפְקֵ֣ד עָלָ֣יו רָשָׁ֑ע וְ֝שָׂטָ֗ן יַעֲמֹ֥ד עַל־יְמִינֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'Set Thou a wicked man over him; and let an adversary stand at his right hand.

jps.text: 'Set Thou a wicked man over him; and let an adversary stand at his right hand.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭הִשָּׁ֣פְטֹו יֵצֵ֣א רָשָׁ֑ע וּ֝תְפִלָּתֹ֗ו תִּהְיֶ֥ה לַֽחֲטָאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: When he is judged, let him go forth condemned; and let his prayer be turned into sin.

jps.text: When he is judged, let him go forth condemned; and let his prayer be turned into sin.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽהְיֽוּ־יָמָ֥יו מְעַטִּ֑ים פְּ֝קֻדָּתֹ֗ו יִקַּ֥ח אַחֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Let his days be few; let another take his charge.

jps.text: Let his days be few; let another take his charge.

verses.hebrewText: יִֽהְיוּ־בָנָ֥יו יְתֹומִ֑ים וְ֝אִשְׁתֹּו אַלְמָנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

jps.text: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

verses.hebrewText: וְנֹ֤ועַ יָנ֣וּעוּ בָנָ֣יו וְשִׁאֵ֑לוּ וְ֝דָרְשׁ֗וּ מֵחָרְבֹותֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let his children be vagabonds, and beg; and let them seek their bread out of their desolate places.

jps.text: Let his children be vagabonds, and beg; and let them seek their bread out of their desolate places.

verses.hebrewText: יְנַקֵּ֣שׁ נֹ֭ושֶׁה לְכָל־אֲשֶׁר־לֹ֑ו וְיָבֹ֖זּוּ זָרִ֣ים יְגִיעֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let the creditor distrain all that he hath; and let strangers make spoil of his labour.

jps.text: Let the creditor distrain all that he hath; and let strangers make spoil of his labour.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יְהִי־לֹ֖ו מֹשֵׁ֣ךְ חָ֑סֶד וְֽאַל־יְהִ֥י חֹ֝ונֵ֗ן לִיתֹומָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Let there be none to extend kindness unto him; neither let there be any to be gracious unto his fatherless children.

jps.text: Let there be none to extend kindness unto him; neither let there be any to be gracious unto his fatherless children.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִֽי־אַחֲרִיתֹ֥ו לְהַכְרִ֑ית בְּדֹ֥ור אַ֝חֵ֗ר יִמַּ֥ח שְׁמָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let his posterity be cut off; in the generation following let their name be blotted out.

jps.text: Let his posterity be cut off; in the generation following let their name be blotted out.

verses.hebrewText: יִזָּכֵ֤ר ׀ עֲוֹ֣ן אֲ֭בֹתָיו אֶל־יְהוָ֑ה וְחַטַּ֥את אִ֝מֹּ֗ו אַל־תִּמָּֽח׃
verses.englishText: Let the iniquity of his fathers be brought to remembrance unto the LORD; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.

jps.text: Let the iniquity of his fathers be brought to remembrance unto the LORD; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.

verses.hebrewText: יִהְי֣וּ נֶֽגֶד־יְהוָ֣ה תָּמִ֑יד וְיַכְרֵ֖ת מֵאֶ֣רֶץ זִכְרָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let them be before the LORD continually, that He may cut off the memory of them from the earth.

jps.text: Let them be before the LORD continually, that He may cut off the memory of them from the earth.

verses.hebrewText: יַ֗עַן אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹ֥א זָכַר֮ עֲשֹׂ֪ות חָ֥סֶד וַיִּרְדֹּ֡ף אִישׁ־עָנִ֣י וְ֭אֶבְיֹון וְנִכְאֵ֨ה לֵבָ֬ב לְמֹותֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: Because that he remembered not to do kindness, but persecuted the poor and needy man, and the broken in heart he was ready to slay.

jps.text: Because that he remembered not to do kindness, but persecuted the poor and needy man, and the broken in heart he was ready to slay.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֶּאֱהַ֣ב קְ֭לָלָה וַתְּבֹואֵ֑הוּ וְֽלֹא־חָפֵ֥ץ בִּ֝בְרָכָ֗ה וַתִּרְחַ֥ק מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, he loved cursing, and it came unto him; and he delighted not in blessing, and it is far from him.

jps.text: Yea, he loved cursing, and it came unto him; and he delighted not in blessing, and it is far from him.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּלְבַּ֥שׁ קְלָלָ֗ה כְּמַ֫דֹּ֥ו וַתָּבֹ֣א כַמַּ֣יִם בְּקִרְבֹּ֑ו וְ֝כַשֶּׁ֗מֶן בְּעַצְמֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He clothed himself also with cursing as with his raiment, and it is come into his inward parts like water, and like oil into his bones.

jps.text: He clothed himself also with cursing as with his raiment, and it is come into his inward parts like water, and like oil into his bones.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהִי־לֹ֖ו כְּבֶ֣גֶד יַעְטֶ֑ה וּ֝לְמֵ֗זַח תָּמִ֥יד יַחְגְּרֶֽהָ׃
verses.englishText: Let it be unto him as the garment which he putteth on, and for the girdle wherewith he is girded continually.'

jps.text: Let it be unto him as the garment which he putteth on, and for the girdle wherewith he is girded continually.'

verses.hebrewText: זֹ֤את פְּעֻלַּ֣ת שֹׂ֭טְנַי מֵאֵ֣ת יְהוָ֑ה וְהַדֹּבְרִ֥ים רָ֝֗ע עַל־נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: This would mine adversaries effect from the LORD, and they that speak evil against my soul.

jps.text: This would mine adversaries effect from the LORD, and they that speak evil against my soul.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַתָּ֤ה ׀ יְה֘וִ֤ה אֲדֹנָ֗י עֲ‍ֽשֵׂה־אִ֭תִּי לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֶ֑ךָ כִּי־טֹ֥וב חַ֝סְדְּךָ֗ הַצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: But Thou, O GOD the Lord, deal with me for Thy name's sake; because Thy mercy is good, deliver Thou me.

jps.text: But Thou, O GOD the Lord, deal with me for Thy name's sake; because Thy mercy is good, deliver Thou me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְיֹ֣ון אָנֹ֑כִי וְ֝לִבִּ֗י חָלַ֥ל בְּקִרְבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.

jps.text: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.

verses.hebrewText: כְּצֵל־כִּנְטֹותֹ֥ו נֶהֱלָ֑כְתִּי נִ֝נְעַ֗רְתִּי כָּֽאַרְבֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: I am gone like the shadow when it lengtheneth; I am shaken off as the locust.

jps.text: I am gone like the shadow when it lengtheneth; I am shaken off as the locust.

verses.hebrewText: בִּ֭רְכַּי כָּשְׁל֣וּ מִצֹּ֑ום וּ֝בְשָׂרִ֗י כָּחַ֥שׁ מִשָּֽׁמֶן׃
verses.englishText: My knees totter through fasting; and my flesh is lean, and hath no fatness.

jps.text: My knees totter through fasting; and my flesh is lean, and hath no fatness.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ הָיִ֣יתִי חֶרְפָּ֣ה לָהֶ֑ם יִ֝רְא֗וּנִי יְנִיע֥וּן רֹאשָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: I am become also a taunt unto them; when they see me, they shake their head.

jps.text: I am become also a taunt unto them; when they see me, they shake their head.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭זְרֵנִי יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑י הֹ֭ושִׁיעֵ֣נִי כְחַסְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Help me, O LORD my God; O save me according to Thy mercy;

jps.text: Help me, O LORD my God; O save me according to Thy mercy;

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭יֵדְעוּ כִּי־יָ֣דְךָ זֹּ֑את אַתָּ֖ה יְהוָ֣ה עֲשִׂיתָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: That they may know that this is Thy hand; that Thou, LORD, hast done it.

jps.text: That they may know that this is Thy hand; that Thou, LORD, hast done it.

verses.hebrewText: יְקַֽלְלוּ־הֵמָּה֮ וְאַתָּ֪ה תְבָ֫רֵ֥ךְ קָ֤מוּ ׀ וַיֵּבֹ֗שׁוּ וְֽעַבְדְּךָ֥ יִשְׂמָֽח׃
verses.englishText: Let them curse, but bless Thou; when they arise, they shall be put to shame, but Thy servant shall rejoice.

jps.text: Let them curse, but bless Thou; when they arise, they shall be put to shame, but Thy servant shall rejoice.

verses.hebrewText: יִלְבְּשׁ֣וּ שֹׂוטְנַ֣י כְּלִמָּ֑ה וְיַעֲט֖וּ כַמְעִ֣יל בָּשְׁתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Mine adversaries shall be clothed with confusion, and shall put on their own shame as a robe.

jps.text: Mine adversaries shall be clothed with confusion, and shall put on their own shame as a robe.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֘ודֶ֤ה יְהוָ֣ה מְאֹ֣ד בְּפִ֑י וּבְתֹ֖וךְ רַבִּ֣ים אֲהַֽלְלֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.englishText: I will give great thanks unto the LORD with my mouth; yea, I will praise Him among the multitude;

jps.text: I will give great thanks unto the LORD with my mouth; yea, I will praise Him among the multitude;

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יַ֭עֲמֹד לִימִ֣ין אֶבְיֹ֑ון לְ֝הֹושִׁ֗יעַ מִשֹּׁפְטֵ֥י נַפְשֹֽׁו׃
verses.englishText: Because He standeth at the right hand of the needy, to save him from them that judge his soul.

jps.text: Because He standeth at the right hand of the needy, to save him from them that judge his soul.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֗ד מִ֫זְמֹ֥ור נְאֻ֤ם יְהוָ֨ה ׀ לַֽאדֹנִ֗י שֵׁ֥ב לִֽימִינִ֑י עַד־אָשִׁ֥ית אֹ֝יְבֶ֗יךָ הֲדֹ֣ם לְרַגְלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. The LORD saith unto my lord: 'Sit thou at My right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.'

jps.text: A Psalm of David. The LORD saith unto my lord: 'Sit thou at My right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.'

verses.hebrewText: מַטֵּֽה־עֻזְּךָ֗ יִשְׁלַ֣ח יְ֭הוָה מִצִּיֹּ֑ון רְ֝דֵ֗ה בְּקֶ֣רֶב אֹיְבֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: The rod of Thy strength the LORD will send out of Zion: 'Rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.'

jps.text: The rod of Thy strength the LORD will send out of Zion: 'Rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.'

verses.hebrewText: עַמְּךָ֣ נְדָבֹת֮ בְּיֹ֪ום חֵ֫ילֶ֥ךָ בְּֽהַדְרֵי־קֹ֖דֶשׁ מֵרֶ֣חֶם מִשְׁחָ֑ר לְ֝ךָ֗ טַ֣ל יַלְדֻתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thy people offer themselves willingly in the day of thy warfare; in adornments of holiness, from the womb of the dawn, thine is the dew of thy youth.

jps.text: Thy people offer themselves willingly in the day of thy warfare; in adornments of holiness, from the womb of the dawn, thine is the dew of thy youth.

verses.hebrewText: נִשְׁבַּ֤ע יְהוָ֨ה ׀ וְלֹ֥א יִנָּחֵ֗ם אַתָּֽה־כֹהֵ֥ן לְעֹולָ֑ם עַל־דִּ֝בְרָתִ֗י מַלְכִּי־צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath sworn, and will not repent: 'Thou art a priest for ever after the manner of Melchizedek.'

jps.text: The LORD hath sworn, and will not repent: 'Thou art a priest for ever after the manner of Melchizedek.'

verses.hebrewText: אֲדֹנָ֥י עַל־יְמִֽינְךָ֑ מָחַ֖ץ בְּיֹום־אַפֹּ֣ו מְלָכִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The Lord at thy right hand doth crush kings in the day of His wrath.

jps.text: The Lord at thy right hand doth crush kings in the day of His wrath.

verses.hebrewText: יָדִ֣ין בַּ֭גֹּויִם מָלֵ֣א גְוִיֹּ֑ות מָ֥חַץ רֹ֝֗אשׁ עַל־אֶ֥רֶץ רַבָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: He will judge among the nations; He filleth it with dead bodies, He crusheth the head over a wide land.

jps.text: He will judge among the nations; He filleth it with dead bodies, He crusheth the head over a wide land.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭נַּחַל בַּדֶּ֣רֶךְ יִשְׁתֶּ֑ה עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן יָרִ֥ים רֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.englishText: He will drink of the brook in the way; therefore will he lift up the head.

jps.text: He will drink of the brook in the way; therefore will he lift up the head.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ אֹודֶ֣ה יְ֭הוָה בְּכָל־לֵבָ֑ב בְּסֹ֖וד יְשָׁרִ֣ים וְעֵדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. I will give thanks unto the LORD with my whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the congregation.

jps.text: Hallelujah. I will give thanks unto the LORD with my whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the congregation.

verses.hebrewText: גְּ֭דֹלִים מַעֲשֵׂ֣י יְהוָ֑ה דְּ֝רוּשִׁ֗ים לְכָל־חֶפְצֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The works of the LORD are great, sought out of all them that have delight therein.

jps.text: The works of the LORD are great, sought out of all them that have delight therein.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד־וְהָדָ֥ר פָּֽעֳלֹ֑ו וְ֝צִדְקָתֹ֗ו עֹמֶ֥דֶת לָעַֽד׃
verses.englishText: His work is glory and majesty; and His righteousness endureth for ever.

jps.text: His work is glory and majesty; and His righteousness endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: זֵ֣כֶר עָ֭שָׂה לְנִפְלְאֹתָ֑יו חַנּ֖וּן וְרַח֣וּם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He hath made a memorial for His wonderful works; the LORD is gracious and full of compassion.

jps.text: He hath made a memorial for His wonderful works; the LORD is gracious and full of compassion.

verses.hebrewText: טֶ֭רֶף נָתַ֣ן לִֽירֵאָ֑יו יִזְכֹּ֖ר לְעֹולָ֣ם בְּרִיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He hath given food unto them that fear Him; He will ever be mindful of His covenant.

jps.text: He hath given food unto them that fear Him; He will ever be mindful of His covenant.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֣חַ מַ֭עֲשָׂיו הִגִּ֣יד לְעַמֹּ֑ו לָתֵ֥ת לָ֝הֶ֗ם נַחֲלַ֥ת גֹּויִֽם׃
verses.englishText: He hath declared to His people the power of His works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.

jps.text: He hath declared to His people the power of His works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.

verses.hebrewText: מַעֲשֵׂ֣י יָ֭דָיו אֱמֶ֣ת וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט נֶ֝אֱמָנִ֗ים כָּל־פִּקּוּדָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: The works of His hands are truth and justice; all His precepts are sure.

jps.text: The works of His hands are truth and justice; all His precepts are sure.

verses.hebrewText: סְמוּכִ֣ים לָעַ֣ד לְעֹולָ֑ם עֲ֝שׂוּיִ֗ם בֶּאֱמֶ֥ת וְיָשָֽׁר׃
verses.englishText: They are established for ever and ever, they are done in truth and uprightness.

jps.text: They are established for ever and ever, they are done in truth and uprightness.

verses.hebrewText: פְּד֤וּת ׀ שָׁ֘לַ֤ח לְעַמֹּ֗ו צִוָּֽה־לְעֹולָ֥ם בְּרִיתֹ֑ו קָדֹ֖ושׁ וְנֹורָ֣א שְׁמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He hath sent redemption unto His people; He hath commanded His covenant for ever; Holy and awful is His name.

jps.text: He hath sent redemption unto His people; He hath commanded His covenant for ever; Holy and awful is His name.

verses.hebrewText: רֵ֘אשִׁ֤ית חָכְמָ֨ה ׀ יִרְאַ֬ת יְהוָ֗ה שֵׂ֣כֶל טֹ֖וב לְכָל־עֹשֵׂיהֶ֑ם תְּ֝הִלָּתֹ֗ו עֹמֶ֥דֶת לָעַֽד׃
verses.englishText: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; a good understanding have all they that do thereafter; His praise endureth for ever.

jps.text: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; a good understanding have all they that do thereafter; His praise endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ אַשְׁרֵי־אִ֭ישׁ יָרֵ֣א אֶת־יְהוָ֑ה בְּ֝מִצְוֹתָ֗יו חָפֵ֥ץ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Happy is the man that feareth the LORD, that delighteth greatly in His commandments.

jps.text: Hallelujah. Happy is the man that feareth the LORD, that delighteth greatly in His commandments.

verses.hebrewText: גִּבֹּ֣ור בָּ֭אָרֶץ יִהְיֶ֣ה זַרְעֹ֑ו דֹּ֭ור יְשָׁרִ֣ים יְבֹרָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: His seed shall be mighty upon earth; the generation of the upright shall be blessed.

jps.text: His seed shall be mighty upon earth; the generation of the upright shall be blessed.

verses.hebrewText: הֹון־וָעֹ֥שֶׁר בְּבֵיתֹ֑ו וְ֝צִדְקָתֹ֗ו עֹמֶ֥דֶת לָעַֽד׃
verses.englishText: Wealth and riches are in his house; and his merit endureth for ever.

jps.text: Wealth and riches are in his house; and his merit endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: זָ֘רַ֤ח בַּחֹ֣שֶׁךְ אֹ֖ור לַיְשָׁרִ֑ים חַנּ֖וּן וְרַח֣וּם וְצַדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: Unto the upright He shineth as a light in the darkness, gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.

jps.text: Unto the upright He shineth as a light in the darkness, gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽוב־אִ֭ישׁ חֹונֵ֣ן וּמַלְוֶ֑ה יְכַלְכֵּ֖ל דְּבָרָ֣יו בְּמִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: Well is it with the man that dealeth graciously and lendeth, that ordereth his affairs rightfully.

jps.text: Well is it with the man that dealeth graciously and lendeth, that ordereth his affairs rightfully.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־לְעֹולָ֥ם לֹא־יִמֹּ֑וט לְזֵ֥כֶר עֹ֝ולָ֗ם יִהְיֶ֥ה צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.englishText: For he shall never be moved; the righteous shall be had in everlasting remembrance.

jps.text: For he shall never be moved; the righteous shall be had in everlasting remembrance.

verses.hebrewText: מִשְּׁמוּעָ֣ה רָ֭עָה לֹ֣א יִירָ֑א נָכֹ֥ון לִ֝בֹּ֗ו בָּטֻ֥חַ בַּיהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings; his heart is stedfast, trusting in the LORD.

jps.text: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings; his heart is stedfast, trusting in the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: סָמ֣וּךְ לִ֭בֹּו לֹ֣א יִירָ֑א עַ֖ד אֲשֶׁר־יִרְאֶ֣ה בְצָרָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, until he gaze upon his adversaries.

jps.text: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, until he gaze upon his adversaries.

verses.hebrewText: פִּזַּ֤ר ׀ נָ֘תַ֤ן לָאֶבְיֹונִ֗ים צִ֭דְקָתֹו עֹמֶ֣דֶת לָעַ֑ד קַ֝רְנֹ֗ו תָּר֥וּם בְּכָבֹֽוד׃
verses.englishText: He hath scattered abroad, he hath given to the needy; his righteousness endureth for ever; his horn shall be exalted in honour.

jps.text: He hath scattered abroad, he hath given to the needy; his righteousness endureth for ever; his horn shall be exalted in honour.

verses.hebrewText: רָ֘שָׁ֤ע יִרְאֶ֨ה ׀ וְכָעָ֗ס שִׁנָּ֣יו יַחֲרֹ֣ק וְנָמָ֑ס תַּאֲוַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֹּאבֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: The wicked shall see it, and be vexed; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away; the desire of the wicked shall perish.

jps.text: The wicked shall see it, and be vexed; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away; the desire of the wicked shall perish.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ הַ֭לְלוּ עַבְדֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה הֽ͏ַ֝לְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁ֥ם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Praise, O ye servants of the LORD, praise the name of the LORD.

jps.text: Hallelujah. Praise, O ye servants of the LORD, praise the name of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִ֤י שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֣ה מְבֹרָ֑ךְ מֵֽ֝עַתָּ֗ה וְעַד־עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the name of the LORD from this time forth and for ever.

jps.text: Blessed be the name of the LORD from this time forth and for ever.

verses.hebrewText: מִמִּזְרַח־שֶׁ֥מֶשׁ עַד־מְבֹואֹ֑ו מְ֝הֻלָּ֗ל שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: From the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof the LORD'S name is to be praised.

jps.text: From the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof the LORD'S name is to be praised.

verses.hebrewText: רָ֖ם עַל־כָּל־גֹּויִ֥ם ׀ יְהוָ֑ה עַ֖ל הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם כְּבֹודֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is high above all nations, His glory is above the heavens.

jps.text: The LORD is high above all nations, His glory is above the heavens.

verses.hebrewText: מִ֭י כַּיהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ הַֽמַּגְבִּיהִ֥י לָשָֽׁבֶת׃
verses.englishText: Who is like unto the LORD our God, that is enthroned on high,

jps.text: Who is like unto the LORD our God, that is enthroned on high,

verses.hebrewText: הַֽמַּשְׁפִּילִ֥י לִרְאֹ֑ות בַּשָּׁמַ֥יִם וּבָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: That looketh down low upon heaven and upon the earth?

jps.text: That looketh down low upon heaven and upon the earth?

verses.hebrewText: מְקִֽימִ֣י מֵעָפָ֣ר דָּ֑ל מֵֽ֝אַשְׁפֹּ֗ת יָרִ֥ים אֶבְיֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Who raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth up the needy out of the dunghill;

jps.text: Who raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth up the needy out of the dunghill;

verses.hebrewText: לְהֹושִׁיבִ֥י עִם־נְדִיבִ֑ים עִ֝֗ם נְדִיבֵ֥י עַמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: That He may set him with princes, even with the princes of His people.

jps.text: That He may set him with princes, even with the princes of His people.

verses.hebrewText: מֹֽושִׁיבִ֨י ׀ עֲקֶ֬רֶת הַבַּ֗יִת אֵֽם־הַבָּנִ֥ים שְׂמֵחָ֗ה הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Who maketh the barren woman to dwell in her house as a joyful mother of children. Hallelujah.

jps.text: Who maketh the barren woman to dwell in her house as a joyful mother of children. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: בְּצֵ֣את יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם בֵּ֥ית יַ֝עֲקֹ֗ב מֵעַ֥ם לֹעֵֽז׃
verses.englishText: When Israel came forth out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language;

jps.text: When Israel came forth out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language;

verses.hebrewText: הָיְתָ֣ה יְהוּדָ֣ה לְקָדְשֹׁ֑ו יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל מַמְשְׁלֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Judah became His sanctuary, Israel His dominion.

jps.text: Judah became His sanctuary, Israel His dominion.

verses.hebrewText: הַיָּ֣ם רָ֭אָה וַיָּנֹ֑ס הַ֝יַּרְדֵּ֗ן יִסֹּ֥ב לְאָחֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: The sea saw it, and fled; the Jordan turned backward.

jps.text: The sea saw it, and fled; the Jordan turned backward.

verses.hebrewText: הֶֽ֭הָרִים רָקְד֣וּ כְאֵילִ֑ים גְּ֝בָעֹ֗ות כִּבְנֵי־צֹֽאן׃
verses.englishText: The mountains skipped like rams, the hills like young sheep.

jps.text: The mountains skipped like rams, the hills like young sheep.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־לְּךָ֣ הַ֭יָּם כִּ֣י תָנ֑וּס הַ֝יַּרְדֵּ֗ן תִּסֹּ֥ב לְאָחֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: What aileth thee, O thou sea, that thou fleest? thou Jordan, that thou turnest backward?

jps.text: What aileth thee, O thou sea, that thou fleest? thou Jordan, that thou turnest backward?

verses.hebrewText: הֶֽ֭הָרִים תִּרְקְד֣וּ כְאֵילִ֑ים גְּ֝בָעֹ֗ות כִּבְנֵי־צֹֽאן׃
verses.englishText: Ye mountains, that ye skip like rams; ye hills, like young sheep?

jps.text: Ye mountains, that ye skip like rams; ye hills, like young sheep?

verses.hebrewText: מִלִּפְנֵ֣י אָ֭דֹון ח֣וּלִי אָ֑רֶץ מִ֝לִּפְנֵ֗י אֱלֹ֣והַּ יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob;

jps.text: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob;

verses.hebrewText: הַהֹפְכִ֣י הַצּ֣וּר אֲגַם־מָ֑יִם חַ֝לָּמִ֗ישׁ לְמַעְיְנֹו־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Who turned the rock into a pool of water, the flint into a fountain of waters.

jps.text: Who turned the rock into a pool of water, the flint into a fountain of waters.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֤א לָ֥נוּ יְהוָ֗ה לֹ֫א לָ֥נוּ כִּֽי־לְ֭שִׁמְךָ תֵּ֣ן כָּבֹ֑וד עַל־חַ֝סְדְּךָ֗ עַל־אֲמִתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Not unto us, O LORD, not unto us, but unto Thy name give glory, for Thy mercy, and for Thy truth's sake.

jps.text: Not unto us, O LORD, not unto us, but unto Thy name give glory, for Thy mercy, and for Thy truth's sake.

verses.hebrewText: לָ֭מָּה יֹאמְר֣וּ הַגֹּויִ֑ם אַיֵּה־נָ֝֗א אֱלֹהֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Wherefore should the nations say: 'Where is now their God?'

jps.text: Wherefore should the nations say: 'Where is now their God?'

verses.hebrewText: וֵֽאלֹהֵ֥ינוּ בַשָּׁמָ֑יִם כֹּ֭ל אֲשֶׁר־חָפֵ֣ץ עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: But our God is in the heavens; whatsoever pleased Him He hath done.

jps.text: But our God is in the heavens; whatsoever pleased Him He hath done.

verses.hebrewText: עֲ‍ֽ֭צַבֵּיהֶם כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֑ב מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗ה יְדֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men's hands.

jps.text: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men's hands.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּֽה־לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ עֵינַ֥יִם לָ֝הֶ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;

jps.text: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;

verses.hebrewText: אָזְנַ֣יִם לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יִשְׁמָ֑עוּ אַ֥ף לָ֝הֶ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יְרִיחֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: They have ears, but they hear not; noses have they, but they smell not;

jps.text: They have ears, but they hear not; noses have they, but they smell not;

verses.hebrewText: יְדֵיהֶ֤ם ׀ וְלֹ֬א יְמִישׁ֗וּן רַ֭גְלֵיהֶם וְלֹ֣א יְהַלֵּ֑כוּ לֹֽא־יֶ֝הְגּ֗וּ בִּגְרֹונָֽם׃
verses.englishText: They have hands, but they handle not; feet have they, but they walk not; neither speak they with their throat.

jps.text: They have hands, but they handle not; feet have they, but they walk not; neither speak they with their throat.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭מֹוהֶם יִהְי֣וּ עֹשֵׂיהֶ֑ם כֹּ֭ל אֲשֶׁר־בֹּטֵ֣חַ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They that make them shall be like unto them; yea, every one that trusteth in them.

jps.text: They that make them shall be like unto them; yea, every one that trusteth in them.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל בְּטַ֣ח בַּיהוָ֑ה עֶזְרָ֖ם וּמָגִנָּ֣ם הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: O Israel, trust thou in the LORD! He is their help and their shield!

jps.text: O Israel, trust thou in the LORD! He is their help and their shield!

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ית אַ֭הֲרֹן בִּטְח֣וּ בַיהוָ֑ה עֶזְרָ֖ם וּמָגִנָּ֣ם הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: O house of Aaron, trust ye in the LORD! He is their help and their shield!

jps.text: O house of Aaron, trust ye in the LORD! He is their help and their shield!

verses.hebrewText: יִרְאֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה בִּטְח֣וּ בַיהוָ֑ה עֶזְרָ֖ם וּמָגִנָּ֣ם הֽוּא׃
verses.englishText: Ye that fear the LORD, trust in the LORD! He is their help and their shield.

jps.text: Ye that fear the LORD, trust in the LORD! He is their help and their shield.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָה֮ זְכָרָ֪נוּ יְבָ֫רֵ֥ךְ יְ֭בָרֵךְ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יְ֝בָרֵ֗ךְ אֶת־בֵּ֥ית אַהֲרֹֽן׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath been mindful of us, He will bless — He will bless the house of Israel; He will bless the house of Aaron.

jps.text: The LORD hath been mindful of us, He will bless — He will bless the house of Israel; He will bless the house of Aaron.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭בָרֵךְ יִרְאֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה הַ֝קְּטַנִּ֗ים עִם־הַגְּדֹלִֽים׃
verses.englishText: He will bless them that fear the LORD, both small and great.

jps.text: He will bless them that fear the LORD, both small and great.

verses.hebrewText: יֹסֵ֣ף יְהוָ֣ה עֲלֵיכֶ֑ם עֲ֝לֵיכֶ֗ם וְעַל־בְּנֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The LORD increase you more and more, you and your children.

jps.text: The LORD increase you more and more, you and your children.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרוּכִ֣ים אַ֭תֶּם לַיהוָ֑ה עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be ye of the LORD who made heaven and earth.

jps.text: Blessed be ye of the LORD who made heaven and earth.

verses.hebrewText: הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם שָׁ֭מַיִם לַיהוָ֑ה וְ֝הָאָ֗רֶץ נָתַ֥ן לִבְנֵי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The heavens are the heavens of the LORD; but the earth hath He given to the children of men.

jps.text: The heavens are the heavens of the LORD; but the earth hath He given to the children of men.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֣א הַ֭מֵּתִים יְהַֽלְלוּ־יָ֑הּ וְ֝לֹ֗א כָּל־יֹרְדֵ֥י דוּמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The dead praise not the LORD, neither any that go down into silence;

jps.text: The dead praise not the LORD, neither any that go down into silence;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲנַ֤חְנוּ ׀ נְבָ֘רֵ֤ךְ יָ֗הּ מֵֽעַתָּ֥ה וְעַד־עֹולָ֗ם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: But we will bless the LORD from this time forth and for ever. Hallelujah.

jps.text: But we will bless the LORD from this time forth and for ever. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭הַבְתִּי כִּֽי־יִשְׁמַ֥ע ׀ יְהוָ֑ה אֶת־קֹ֝ולִ֗י תַּחֲנוּנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I love that the LORD should hear my voice and my supplications.

jps.text: I love that the LORD should hear my voice and my supplications.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הִטָּ֣ה אָזְנֹ֣ו לִ֑י וּבְיָמַ֥י אֶקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Because He hath inclined His ear unto me, therefore will I call upon Him all my days.

jps.text: Because He hath inclined His ear unto me, therefore will I call upon Him all my days.

verses.hebrewText: אֲפָפ֤וּנִי ׀ חֶבְלֵי־מָ֗וֶת וּמְצָרֵ֣י שְׁאֹ֣ול מְצָא֑וּנִי צָרָ֖ה וְיָגֹ֣ון אֶמְצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: The cords of death compassed me, and the straits of the nether-world got hold upon me; I found trouble and sorrow.

jps.text: The cords of death compassed me, and the straits of the nether-world got hold upon me; I found trouble and sorrow.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְשֵֽׁם־יְהוָ֥ה אֶקְרָ֑א אָנָּ֥ה יְ֝הוָ֗ה מַלְּטָ֥ה נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: But I called upon the name of the LORD: 'I beseech thee, O LORD, deliver my soul.'

jps.text: But I called upon the name of the LORD: 'I beseech thee, O LORD, deliver my soul.'

verses.hebrewText: חַנּ֣וּן יְהֹוָ֣ה וְצַדִּ֑יק וֵ֖אלֹהֵ֣ינוּ מְרַחֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: Gracious is the LORD, and righteous; yea, our God is compassionate.

jps.text: Gracious is the LORD, and righteous; yea, our God is compassionate.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁמֵ֣ר פְּתָאיִ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה דַּ֝לֹּותִ֗י וְלִ֣י יְהֹושִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD preserveth the simple; I was brought low, and He saved me.

jps.text: The LORD preserveth the simple; I was brought low, and He saved me.

verses.hebrewText: שׁוּבִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי לִמְנוּחָ֑יְכִי כִּֽי־יְ֝הוָ֗ה גָּמַ֥ל עָלָֽיְכִי׃
verses.englishText: Return, O my soul, unto Thy rest; for the LORD hath dealt bountifully with thee.

jps.text: Return, O my soul, unto Thy rest; for the LORD hath dealt bountifully with thee.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י חִלַּ֥צְתָּ נַפְשִׁ֗י מִ֫מָּ֥וֶת אֶת־עֵינִ֥י מִן־דִּמְעָ֑ה אֶת־רַגְלִ֥י מִדֶּֽחִי׃
verses.englishText: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from stumbling.

jps.text: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from stumbling.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭תְהַלֵּךְ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה בְּ֝אַרְצֹ֗ות הַֽחַיִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: I shall walk before the LORD in the lands of the living.

jps.text: I shall walk before the LORD in the lands of the living.

verses.hebrewText: הֶ֭אֱמַנְתִּי כִּ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר אֲ֝נִ֗י עָנִ֥יתִי מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: I trusted even when I spoke: 'I am greatly afflicted.'

jps.text: I trusted even when I spoke: 'I am greatly afflicted.'

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭נִי אָמַ֣רְתִּי בְחָפְזִ֑י כָּֽל־הָאָדָ֥ם כֹּזֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: I said in my haste: 'All men are liars.'

jps.text: I said in my haste: 'All men are liars.'

verses.hebrewText: מָֽה־אָשִׁ֥יב לַיהוָ֑ה כָּֽל־תַּגְמוּלֹ֥והִי עָלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: How can I repay unto the LORD all His bountiful dealings toward me?

jps.text: How can I repay unto the LORD all His bountiful dealings toward me?

verses.hebrewText: כֹּוס־יְשׁוּעֹ֥ות אֶשָּׂ֑א וּבְשֵׁ֖ם יְהוָ֣ה אֶקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: I will lift up the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of the LORD.

jps.text: I will lift up the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: נְ֭דָרַי לַיהוָ֣ה אֲשַׁלֵּ֑ם נֶגְדָה־נָּ֝֗א לְכָל־עַמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: My vows will I pay unto the LORD, yea, in the presence of all His people.

jps.text: My vows will I pay unto the LORD, yea, in the presence of all His people.

verses.hebrewText: יָ֭קָר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה הַ֝מָּ֗וְתָה לַחֲסִידָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Precious in the sight of the LORD is the death of His saints.

jps.text: Precious in the sight of the LORD is the death of His saints.

verses.hebrewText: אֽ͏ָנָּ֣ה יְהוָה֮ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֪י עַ֫בְדֶּ֥ךָ אֲ‍ֽנִי־עַ֭בְדְּךָ בֶּן־אֲמָתֶ֑ךָ פִּ֝תַּ֗חְתָּ לְמֹוסֵרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I beseech Thee, O LORD, for I am Thy servant; I am Thy servant, the son of Thy handmaid; Thou hast loosed my bands.

jps.text: I beseech Thee, O LORD, for I am Thy servant; I am Thy servant, the son of Thy handmaid; Thou hast loosed my bands.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽךָ־אֶ֭זְבַּח זֶ֣בַח תֹּודָ֑ה וּבְשֵׁ֖ם יְהוָ֣ה אֶקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the LORD.

jps.text: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: נְ֭דָרַי לַיהוָ֣ה אֲשַׁלֵּ֑ם נֶגְדָה־נָּ֝֗א לְכָל־עַמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: I will pay my vows unto the LORD, yea, in the presence of all His people;

jps.text: I will pay my vows unto the LORD, yea, in the presence of all His people;

verses.hebrewText: בְּחַצְרֹ֤ות ׀ בֵּ֤ית יְהוָ֗ה בְּֽתֹ֘וכֵ֤כִי יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: In the courts of the LORD'S house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Hallelujah.

jps.text: In the courts of the LORD'S house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽלְל֣וּ אֶת־יְ֭הוָה כָּל־גֹּויִ֑ם שַׁ֝בְּח֗וּהוּ כָּל־הָאֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: O praise the LORD, all ye nations; laud Him, all ye peoples.

jps.text: O praise the LORD, all ye nations; laud Him, all ye peoples.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֥י גָ֘בַ֤ר עָלֵ֨ינוּ ׀ חַסְדֹּ֗ו וֶֽאֱמֶת־יְהוָ֥ה לְעֹולָ֗ם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: For His mercy is great toward us; and the truth of the LORD endureth for ever. Hallelujah.

jps.text: For His mercy is great toward us; and the truth of the LORD endureth for ever. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה כִּי־טֹ֑וב כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: 'O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.'

jps.text: 'O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.'

verses.hebrewText: יֹֽאמַר־נָ֥א יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: So let Israel now say, for His mercy endureth for ever,

jps.text: So let Israel now say, for His mercy endureth for ever,

verses.hebrewText: יֹֽאמְרוּ־נָ֥א בֵֽית־אַהֲרֹ֑ן כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: So let the house of Aaron now say, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: So let the house of Aaron now say, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: יֹֽאמְרוּ־נָ֭א יִרְאֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: So let them now that fear the LORD say, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: So let them now that fear the LORD say, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: מִֽן־הַ֭מֵּצַ֥ר קָרָ֣אתִי יָּ֑הּ עָנָ֖נִי בַמֶּרְחָ֣ב יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Out of my straits I called upon the LORD; He answered me with great enlargement.

jps.text: Out of my straits I called upon the LORD; He answered me with great enlargement.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה לִ֭י לֹ֣א אִירָ֑א מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה לִ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is for me; I will not fear; what can man do unto me?

jps.text: The LORD is for me; I will not fear; what can man do unto me?

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֣ה לִ֭י בְּעֹזְרָ֑י וַ֝אֲנִ֗י אֶרְאֶ֥ה בְשֹׂנְאָֽי׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is for me as my helper; and I shall gaze upon them that hate me.

jps.text: The LORD is for me as my helper; and I shall gaze upon them that hate me.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב לַחֲסֹ֥ות בַּיהוָ֑ה מִ֝בְּטֹ֗חַ בָּאָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: It is better to take refuge in the LORD than to trust in man.

jps.text: It is better to take refuge in the LORD than to trust in man.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֗וב לַחֲסֹ֥ות בַּיהוָ֑ה מִ֝בְּטֹ֗חַ בִּנְדִיבִֽים׃
verses.englishText: It is better to take refuge in the LORD than to trust in princes.

jps.text: It is better to take refuge in the LORD than to trust in princes.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־גֹּויִ֥ם סְבָב֑וּנִי בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְ֝הוָ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲמִילַֽם׃
verses.englishText: All nations compass me about; verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.

jps.text: All nations compass me about; verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.

verses.hebrewText: סַבּ֥וּנִי גַם־סְבָב֑וּנִי בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְ֝הוָ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲמִילַֽם׃
verses.englishText: They compass me about, yea, they compass me about; verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.

jps.text: They compass me about, yea, they compass me about; verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.

verses.hebrewText: סַבּ֤וּנִי כִדְבֹורִ֗ים דֹּ֭עֲכוּ כְּאֵ֣שׁ קֹוצִ֑ים בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְ֝הוָ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲמִילַֽם׃
verses.englishText: They compass me about like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns; verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.

jps.text: They compass me about like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns; verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.

verses.hebrewText: דַּחֹ֣ה דְחִיתַ֣נִי לִנְפֹּ֑ל וַ֖יהוָ֣ה עֲזָרָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Thou didst thrust sore at me that I might fall; but the LORD helped me.

jps.text: Thou didst thrust sore at me that I might fall; but the LORD helped me.

verses.hebrewText: עָזִּ֣י וְזִמְרָ֣ת יָ֑הּ וַֽיְהִי־לִ֝֗י לִֽישׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is my strength and song; and He is become my salvation.

jps.text: The LORD is my strength and song; and He is become my salvation.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֤ול ׀ רִנָּ֬ה וִֽישׁוּעָ֗ה בְּאָהֳלֵ֥י צַדִּיקִ֑ים יְמִ֥ין יְ֝הוָה עֹ֣שָׂה חָֽיִל׃
verses.englishText: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous; the right hand of the LORD doeth valiantly.

jps.text: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous; the right hand of the LORD doeth valiantly.

verses.hebrewText: יְמִ֣ין יְ֭הוָה רֹומֵמָ֑ה יְמִ֥ין יְ֝הוָה עֹ֣שָׂה חָֽיִל׃
verses.englishText: The right hand of the LORD is exalted; the right hand of the LORD doeth valiantly.

jps.text: The right hand of the LORD is exalted; the right hand of the LORD doeth valiantly.

verses.hebrewText: לֹֽא אָמ֥וּת כִּי־אֶֽחְיֶ֑ה וַ֝אֲסַפֵּ֗ר מַֽעֲשֵׂ֥י יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the LORD.

jps.text: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יַסֹּ֣ר יִסְּרַ֣נִּי יָּ֑הּ וְ֝לַמָּ֗וֶת לֹ֣א נְתָנָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath chastened me sore; but He hath not given me over unto death.

jps.text: The LORD hath chastened me sore; but He hath not given me over unto death.

verses.hebrewText: פִּתְחוּ־לִ֥י שַׁעֲרֵי־צֶ֑דֶק אָֽבֹא־בָ֝ם אֹודֶ֥ה יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Open to me the gates of righteousness; I will enter into them, I will give thanks unto the LORD.

jps.text: Open to me the gates of righteousness; I will enter into them, I will give thanks unto the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: זֶֽה־הַשַּׁ֥עַר לַיהוָ֑ה צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים יָבֹ֥אוּ בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: This is the gate of the LORD; the righteous shall enter into it.

jps.text: This is the gate of the LORD; the righteous shall enter into it.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֭ודְךָ כִּ֣י עֲנִיתָ֑נִי וַתְּהִי־לִ֝֗י לִֽישׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, for Thou hast answered me, and art become my salvation.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto Thee, for Thou hast answered me, and art become my salvation.

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭בֶן מָאֲס֣וּ הַבֹּונִ֑ים הָ֝יְתָ֗ה לְרֹ֣אשׁ פִּנָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: The stone which the builders rejected is become the chief corner-stone.

jps.text: The stone which the builders rejected is become the chief corner-stone.

verses.hebrewText: מֵאֵ֣ת יְ֭הוָה הָ֣יְתָה זֹּ֑את הִ֖יא נִפְלָ֣את בְּעֵינֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: This is the LORD'S doing; it is marvellous in our eyes.

jps.text: This is the LORD'S doing; it is marvellous in our eyes.

verses.hebrewText: זֶה־הַ֭יֹּום עָשָׂ֣ה יְהוָ֑ה נָגִ֖ילָה וְנִשְׂמְחָ֣ה בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: This is the day which the LORD hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.

jps.text: This is the day which the LORD hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.

verses.hebrewText: אָנָּ֣א יְ֭הוָה הֹושִׁ֘יעָ֥ה נָּ֑א אָֽנָּ֥א יְ֝הוָ֗ה הַצְלִ֘יחָ֥ה נָּֽא׃
verses.englishText: We beseech Thee, O LORD, save now! We beseech Thee, O LORD, make us now to prosper!

jps.text: We beseech Thee, O LORD, save now! We beseech Thee, O LORD, make us now to prosper!

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֣וּךְ הַ֭בָּא בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה בֵּ֝רַֽכְנוּכֶ֗ם מִבֵּ֥ית יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the LORD; we bless you out of the house of the LORD.

jps.text: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the LORD; we bless you out of the house of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֤ל ׀ יְהוָה֮ וַיָּ֪אֶר לָ֥נוּ אִסְרוּ־חַ֥ג בַּעֲבֹתִ֑ים עַד־קַ֝רְנֹ֗ות הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is God, and hath given us light; order the festival procession with boughs, even unto the horns of the altar.

jps.text: The LORD is God, and hath given us light; order the festival procession with boughs, even unto the horns of the altar.

verses.hebrewText: אֵלִ֣י אַתָּ֣ה וְאֹודֶ֑ךָּ אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אֲרֹומְמֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: Thou art my God, and I will give thanks unto Thee; Thou art my God, I will exalt Thee.

jps.text: Thou art my God, and I will give thanks unto Thee; Thou art my God, I will exalt Thee.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה כִּי־טֹ֑וב כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֥י תְמִֽימֵי־דָ֑רֶךְ הַֽ֝הֹלְכִ֗ים בְּתֹורַ֥ת יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: ALEPH. Happy are they that are upright in the way, who walk in the law of the LORD.

jps.text: ALEPH. Happy are they that are upright in the way, who walk in the law of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭שְׁרֵי נֹצְרֵ֥י עֵדֹתָ֗יו בְּכָל־לֵ֥ב יִדְרְשֽׁוּהוּ׃
verses.englishText: Happy are they that keep His testimonies, that seek Him with the whole heart.

jps.text: Happy are they that keep His testimonies, that seek Him with the whole heart.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭ף לֹֽא־פָעֲל֣וּ עַוְלָ֑ה בִּדְרָכָ֥יו הָלָֽכוּ׃
verses.englishText: Yea, they do no unrighteousness; they walk in His ways.

jps.text: Yea, they do no unrighteousness; they walk in His ways.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭תָּה צִוִּ֥יתָה פִקֻּדֶ֗יךָ לִשְׁמֹ֥ר מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast ordained Thy precepts, that we should observe them diligently.

jps.text: Thou hast ordained Thy precepts, that we should observe them diligently.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֭חֲלַי יִכֹּ֥נוּ דְרָכָ֗י לִשְׁמֹ֥ר חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Oh that my ways were directed to observe Thy statutes!

jps.text: Oh that my ways were directed to observe Thy statutes!

verses.hebrewText: אָ֥ז לֹא־אֵבֹ֑ושׁ בְּ֝הַבִּיטִ֗י אֶל־כָּל־מִצְוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Then should I not be ashamed, when I have regard unto all Thy commandments.

jps.text: Then should I not be ashamed, when I have regard unto all Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֭ודְךָ בְּיֹ֣שֶׁר לֵבָ֑ב בְּ֝לָמְדִ֗י מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee with uprightness of heart, when I learn Thy righteous ordinances.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto Thee with uprightness of heart, when I learn Thy righteous ordinances.

verses.hebrewText: אֶת־חֻקֶּ֥יךָ אֶשְׁמֹ֑ר אַֽל־תַּעַזְבֵ֥נִי עַד־מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: I will observe Thy statutes; O forsake me not utterly.

jps.text: I will observe Thy statutes; O forsake me not utterly.

verses.hebrewText: בַּמֶּ֣ה יְזַכֶּה־נַּ֭עַר אֶת־אָרְחֹ֑ו לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ר כִּדְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: BETH. Wherewithal shall a young man keep his way pure? By taking heed thereto according to Thy word.

jps.text: BETH. Wherewithal shall a young man keep his way pure? By taking heed thereto according to Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־לִבִּ֥י דְרַשְׁתִּ֑יךָ אַל־תַּ֝שְׁגֵּ֗נִי מִמִּצְוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: With my whole heart have I sought Thee; O let me not err from Thy commandments.

jps.text: With my whole heart have I sought Thee; O let me not err from Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: בְּ֭לִבִּי צָפַ֣נְתִּי אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ לְ֝מַ֗עַן לֹ֣א אֶֽחֱטָא־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: Thy word have I laid up in my heart, that I might not sin against Thee.

jps.text: Thy word have I laid up in my heart, that I might not sin against Thee.

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֖וּךְ אַתָּ֥ה יְהוָ֗ה לַמְּדֵ֥נִי חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Blessed art Thou, O LORD; teach me Thy statutes.

jps.text: Blessed art Thou, O LORD; teach me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: בִּשְׂפָתַ֥י סִפַּ֑רְתִּי כֹּ֝֗ל מִשְׁפְּטֵי־פִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: With my lips have I told all the ordinances of Thy mouth.

jps.text: With my lips have I told all the ordinances of Thy mouth.

verses.hebrewText: בְּדֶ֖רֶךְ עֵדְוֹתֶ֥יךָ שַׂ֗שְׂתִּי כְּעַ֣ל כָּל־הֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: I have rejoiced in the way of Thy testimonies, as much as in all riches.

jps.text: I have rejoiced in the way of Thy testimonies, as much as in all riches.

verses.hebrewText: בְּפִקֻּדֶ֥יךָ אָשִׂ֑יחָה וְ֝אַבִּ֗יטָה אֹרְחֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will meditate in Thy precepts, and have respect unto Thy ways.

jps.text: I will meditate in Thy precepts, and have respect unto Thy ways.

verses.hebrewText: בְּחֻקֹּתֶ֥יךָ אֶֽשְׁתַּעֲשָׁ֑ע לֹ֭א אֶשְׁכַּ֣ח דְּבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will delight myself in Thy statutes; I will not forget Thy word.

jps.text: I will delight myself in Thy statutes; I will not forget Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: גְּמֹ֖ל עַֽל־עַבְדְּךָ֥ אֶֽחְיֶ֗ה וְאֶשְׁמְרָ֥ה דְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: GIMEL. Deal bountifully with Thy servant that I may live, and I will observe Thy word.

jps.text: GIMEL. Deal bountifully with Thy servant that I may live, and I will observe Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: גַּל־עֵינַ֥י וְאַבִּ֑יטָה נִ֝פְלָאֹ֗ות מִתֹּורָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Open Thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of Thy law.

jps.text: Open Thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: גֵּ֣ר אָנֹכִ֣י בָאָ֑רֶץ אַל־תַּסְתֵּ֥ר מִ֝מֶּ֗נִּי מִצְוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I am a sojourner in the earth; hide not Thy commandments from me.

jps.text: I am a sojourner in the earth; hide not Thy commandments from me.

verses.hebrewText: גָּרְסָ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֣י לְתַאֲבָ֑ה אֶֽל־מִשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ בְכָל־עֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto Thine ordinances at all times.

jps.text: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto Thine ordinances at all times.

verses.hebrewText: גָּ֭עַרְתָּ זֵדִ֣ים אֲרוּרִ֑ים הַ֝שֹּׁגִים מִמִּצְוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, that do err from Thy commandments.

jps.text: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, that do err from Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֣ל מֵֽ֭עָלַי חֶרְפָּ֣ה וָב֑וּז כִּ֖י עֵדֹתֶ֣יךָ נָצָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Take away from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept Thy testimonies.

jps.text: Take away from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: גַּ֤ם יָֽשְׁב֣וּ שָׂ֭רִים בִּ֣י נִדְבָּ֑רוּ עַ֝בְדְּךָ֗ יָשִׂ֥יחַ בְּחֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Even though princes sit and talk against me, thy servant doth meditate in Thy statutes.

jps.text: Even though princes sit and talk against me, thy servant doth meditate in Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: גַּֽם־עֵ֭דֹתֶיךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָ֗י אַנְשֵׁ֥י עֲצָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Yea, Thy testimonies are my delight, they are my counsellors.

jps.text: Yea, Thy testimonies are my delight, they are my counsellors.

verses.hebrewText: דָּֽבְקָ֣ה לֶעָפָ֣ר נַפְשִׁ֑י חַ֝יֵּ֗נִי כִּדְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: DALETH. My soul cleaveth unto the dust; quicken Thou me according to Thy word.

jps.text: DALETH. My soul cleaveth unto the dust; quicken Thou me according to Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: דְּרָכַ֣י סִ֭פַּרְתִּי וַֽתַּעֲנֵ֗נִי לַמְּדֵ֥נִי חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I told of my ways, and Thou didst answer me; teach me Thy statutes.

jps.text: I told of my ways, and Thou didst answer me; teach me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּֽרֶךְ־פִּקּוּדֶ֥יךָ הֲבִינֵ֑נִי וְ֝אָשִׂ֗יחָה בְּנִפְלְאֹותֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Make me to understand the way of Thy precepts, that I may talk of Thy wondrous works.

jps.text: Make me to understand the way of Thy precepts, that I may talk of Thy wondrous works.

verses.hebrewText: דָּלְפָ֣ה נַ֭פְשִׁי מִתּוּגָ֑ה קַ֝יְּמֵ֗נִי כִּדְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: My soul melteth away for heaviness; sustain me according unto Thy word.

jps.text: My soul melteth away for heaviness; sustain me according unto Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּֽרֶךְ־שֶׁ֭קֶר הָסֵ֣ר מִמֶּ֑נִּי וְֽתֹורָתְךָ֥ חָנֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Remove from me the way of falsehood; and grant me Thy law graciously.

jps.text: Remove from me the way of falsehood; and grant me Thy law graciously.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּֽרֶךְ־אֱמוּנָ֥ה בָחָ֑רְתִּי מִשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ שִׁוִּֽיתִי׃
verses.englishText: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; Thine ordinances have I set before me.

jps.text: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; Thine ordinances have I set before me.

verses.hebrewText: דָּבַ֥קְתִּי בְעֵֽדְוֹתֶ֑יךָ יְ֝הוָ֗ה אַל־תְּבִישֵֽׁנִי׃
verses.englishText: I cleave unto Thy testimonies; O LORD, put me not to shame.

jps.text: I cleave unto Thy testimonies; O LORD, put me not to shame.

verses.hebrewText: דֶּֽרֶךְ־מִצְוֹתֶ֥יךָ אָר֑וּץ כִּ֖י תַרְחִ֣יב לִבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will run the way of Thy commandments, for Thou dost enlarge my heart.

jps.text: I will run the way of Thy commandments, for Thou dost enlarge my heart.

verses.hebrewText: הֹורֵ֣נִי יְ֭הוָה דֶּ֥רֶךְ חֻקֶּ֗יךָ וְאֶצְּרֶ֥נָּה עֵֽקֶב׃
verses.englishText: HE. Teach me, O LORD, the way of Thy statutes; and I will keep it at every step.

jps.text: HE. Teach me, O LORD, the way of Thy statutes; and I will keep it at every step.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭בִינֵנִי וְאֶצְּרָ֥ה תֹֽורָתֶ֗ךָ וְאֶשְׁמְרֶ֥נָּה בְכָל־לֵֽב׃
verses.englishText: Give me understanding, that I keep Thy law and observe it with my whole heart.

jps.text: Give me understanding, that I keep Thy law and observe it with my whole heart.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֭דְרִיכֵנִי בִּנְתִ֣יב מִצְוֹתֶ֑יךָ כִּי־בֹ֥ו חָפָֽצְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Make me to tread in the path of Thy commandments; for therein do I delight.

jps.text: Make me to tread in the path of Thy commandments; for therein do I delight.
