verses.hebrewText: הַט־לִ֭בִּי אֶל־עֵדְוֹתֶ֗יךָ וְאַ֣ל אֶל־בָּֽצַע׃
verses.englishText: Incline my heart unto Thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.

jps.text: Incline my heart unto Thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.

verses.hebrewText: הַעֲבֵ֣ר עֵ֭ינַי מֵרְאֹ֣ות שָׁ֑וְא בִּדְרָכֶ֥ךָ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity, and quicken me in Thy ways.

jps.text: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity, and quicken me in Thy ways.

verses.hebrewText: הָקֵ֣ם לְ֭עַבְדְּךָ אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ אֲ֝שֶׁ֗ר לְיִרְאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Confirm Thy word unto Thy servant, which pertaineth unto the fear of Thee.

jps.text: Confirm Thy word unto Thy servant, which pertaineth unto the fear of Thee.

verses.hebrewText: הַעֲבֵ֣ר חֶ֭רְפָּתִי אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָגֹ֑רְתִּי כִּ֖י מִשְׁפָּטֶ֣יךָ טֹובִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Turn away my reproach which I dread; for Thine ordinances are good.

jps.text: Turn away my reproach which I dread; for Thine ordinances are good.

verses.hebrewText: הִ֭נֵּה תָּאַ֣בְתִּי לְפִקֻּדֶ֑יךָ בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֥ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Behold, I have longed after Thy precepts; quicken me in Thy righteousness.

jps.text: Behold, I have longed after Thy precepts; quicken me in Thy righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: וִֽיבֹאֻ֣נִי חֲסָדֶ֣ךָ יְהוָ֑ה תְּ֝שֽׁוּעָתְךָ֗ כְּאִמְרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: VAV. Let Thy mercies also come unto me, O LORD, even Thy salvation, according to Thy word;

jps.text: VAV. Let Thy mercies also come unto me, O LORD, even Thy salvation, according to Thy word;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶֽעֱנֶ֣ה חֹרְפִ֣י דָבָ֑ר כִּֽי־בָ֝טַחְתִּי בִּדְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: That I may have an answer for him that taunteth me; for I trust in Thy word.

jps.text: That I may have an answer for him that taunteth me; for I trust in Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאַל־תַּצֵּ֬ל מִפִּ֣י דְבַר־אֱמֶ֣ת עַד־מְאֹ֑ד כִּ֖י לְמִשְׁפָּטֶ֣ךָ יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I hope in Thine ordinances;

jps.text: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I hope in Thine ordinances;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶשְׁמְרָ֖ה תֹורָתְךָ֥ תָמִ֗יד לְעֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: So shall I observe Thy law continually for ever and ever;

jps.text: So shall I observe Thy law continually for ever and ever;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶתְהַלְּכָ֥ה בָרְחָבָ֑ה כִּ֖י פִקֻּדֶ֣יךָ דָרָֽשְׁתִּי׃
verses.englishText: And I will walk at ease, for I have sought Thy precepts;

jps.text: And I will walk at ease, for I have sought Thy precepts;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲדַבְּרָ֣ה בְ֭עֵדֹתֶיךָ נֶ֥גֶד מְלָכִ֗ים וְלֹ֣א אֵבֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: I will also speak of Thy testimonies before kings, and will not be ashamed.

jps.text: I will also speak of Thy testimonies before kings, and will not be ashamed.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶשְׁתַּֽעֲשַׁ֥ע בְּמִצְוֹתֶ֗יךָ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָהָֽבְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: And I will delight myself in Thy commandments, which I have loved.

jps.text: And I will delight myself in Thy commandments, which I have loved.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶשָּֽׂא־כַפַּ֗י אֶֽל־מִ֭צְוֹתֶיךָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר אָהָ֗בְתִּי וְאָשִׂ֥יחָה בְחֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will lift up my hands also unto Thy commandments, which I have loved; and I will meditate in Thy statutes.

jps.text: I will lift up my hands also unto Thy commandments, which I have loved; and I will meditate in Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: זְכֹר־דָּבָ֥ר לְעַבְדֶּ֑ךָ עַ֝֗ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִֽחַלְתָּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: ZAIN. Remember the word unto Thy servant, because Thou hast made me to hope.

jps.text: ZAIN. Remember the word unto Thy servant, because Thou hast made me to hope.

verses.hebrewText: זֹ֣את נֶחָמָתִ֣י בְעָנְיִ֑י כִּ֖י אִמְרָתְךָ֣ חִיָּֽתְנִי׃
verses.englishText: This is my comfort in my affliction, that Thy word hath quickened me.

jps.text: This is my comfort in my affliction, that Thy word hath quickened me.

verses.hebrewText: זֵ֭דִים הֱלִיצֻ֣נִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד מִ֝תֹּֽורָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א נָטִֽיתִי׃
verses.englishText: The proud have had me greatly in derision; yet have I not turned aside from Thy law.

jps.text: The proud have had me greatly in derision; yet have I not turned aside from Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: זָ֘כַ֤רְתִּי מִשְׁפָּטֶ֖יךָ מֵעֹולָ֥ם ׀ יְהוָ֗ה וָֽאֶתְנֶחָֽם׃
verses.englishText: I have remembered Thine ordinances which are of old, O LORD, and have comforted myself.

jps.text: I have remembered Thine ordinances which are of old, O LORD, and have comforted myself.

verses.hebrewText: זַלְעָפָ֣ה אֲ֭חָזַתְנִי מֵרְשָׁעִ֑ים עֹ֝זְבֵ֗י תֹּורָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Burning indignation hath taken hold upon me, because of the wicked that forsake Thy law.

jps.text: Burning indignation hath taken hold upon me, because of the wicked that forsake Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: זְ֭מִרֹות הָֽיוּ־לִ֥י חֻקֶּ֗יךָ בְּבֵ֣ית מְגוּרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.

jps.text: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.

verses.hebrewText: זָ֘כַ֤רְתִּי בַלַּ֣יְלָה שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהוָ֑ה וָֽ֝אֶשְׁמְרָ֗ה תֹּורָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have remembered Thy name, O LORD, in the night, and have observed Thy law.

jps.text: I have remembered Thy name, O LORD, in the night, and have observed Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: זֹ֥את הָֽיְתָה־לִּ֑י כִּ֖י פִקֻּדֶ֣יךָ נָצָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: This I have had, that I have kept Thy precepts.

jps.text: This I have had, that I have kept Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: חֶלְקִ֖י יְהוָ֥ה אָמַ֗רְתִּי לִשְׁמֹ֥ר דְּבָרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: HETH. My portion is the LORD, I have said that I would observe Thy words.

jps.text: HETH. My portion is the LORD, I have said that I would observe Thy words.

verses.hebrewText: חִלִּ֣יתִי פָנֶ֣יךָ בְכָל־לֵ֑ב חָ֝נֵּ֗נִי כְּאִמְרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have entreated Thy favour with my whole heart; be gracious unto me according to Thy word.

jps.text: I have entreated Thy favour with my whole heart; be gracious unto me according to Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: חִשַּׁ֥בְתִּי דְרָכָ֑י וָאָשִׁ֥יבָה רַ֝גְלַ֗י אֶל־עֵדֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I considered my ways, and turned my feet unto Thy testimonies.

jps.text: I considered my ways, and turned my feet unto Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: חַ֭שְׁתִּי וְלֹ֣א הִתְמַהְמָ֑הְתִּי לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ר מִצְוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I made haste, and delayed not, to observe Thy commandments.

jps.text: I made haste, and delayed not, to observe Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: חֶבְלֵ֣י רְשָׁעִ֣ים עִוְּדֻ֑נִי תֹּֽ֝ורָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: The bands of the wicked have enclosed me; but I have not forgotten Thy law.

jps.text: The bands of the wicked have enclosed me; but I have not forgotten Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: חֲצֹֽות־לַ֗יְלָה אָ֭קוּם לְהֹודֹ֣ות לָ֑ךְ עַ֝֗ל מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: At midnight I will rise to give thanks unto Thee because of Thy righteous ordinances.

jps.text: At midnight I will rise to give thanks unto Thee because of Thy righteous ordinances.

verses.hebrewText: חָבֵ֣ר אָ֭נִי לְכָל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר יְרֵא֑וּךָ וּ֝לְשֹׁמְרֵ֗י פִּקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I am a companion of all them that fear Thee, and of them that observe Thy precepts.

jps.text: I am a companion of all them that fear Thee, and of them that observe Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: חַסְדְּךָ֣ יְ֭הוָה מָלְאָ֥ה הָאָ֗רֶץ חֻקֶּ֥יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: The earth, O LORD, is full of Thy mercy; teach me Thy statutes.

jps.text: The earth, O LORD, is full of Thy mercy; teach me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: טֹ֭וב עָשִׂ֣יתָ עִֽם־עַבְדְּךָ֑ יְ֝הוָ֗ה כִּדְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: TETH. Thou hast dealt well with Thy servant, O LORD, according unto Thy word.

jps.text: TETH. Thou hast dealt well with Thy servant, O LORD, according unto Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: ט֤וּב טַ֣עַם וָדַ֣עַת לַמְּדֵ֑נִי כִּ֖י בְמִצְוֹתֶ֣יךָ הֶאֱמָֽנְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Teach me good discernment and knowledge; for I have believed Thy commandments.

jps.text: Teach me good discernment and knowledge; for I have believed Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: טֶ֣רֶם אֶ֭עֱנֶה אֲנִ֣י שֹׁגֵ֑ג וְ֝עַתָּ֗ה אִמְרָתְךָ֥ שָׁמָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Before I was afflicted, I did err; but now I observe Thy word.

jps.text: Before I was afflicted, I did err; but now I observe Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: טֹוב־אַתָּ֥ה וּמֵטִ֗יב לַמְּדֵ֥נִי חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou art good, and doest good; teach me Thy statutes.

jps.text: Thou art good, and doest good; teach me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: טָפְל֬וּ עָלַ֣י שֶׁ֣קֶר זֵדִ֑ים אֲ֝נִ֗י בְּכָל־לֵ֤ב ׀ אֱצֹּ֬ר פִּקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: The proud have forged a lie against me; but I with my whole heart will keep Thy precepts.

jps.text: The proud have forged a lie against me; but I with my whole heart will keep Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: טָפַ֣שׁ כַּחֵ֣לֶב לִבָּ֑ם אֲ֝נִ֗י תֹּורָתְךָ֥ שִֽׁעֲשָֽׁעְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Their heart is gross like fat; but I delight in Thy law.

jps.text: Their heart is gross like fat; but I delight in Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽוב־לִ֥י כִֽי־עֻנֵּ֑יתִי לְ֝מַ֗עַן אֶלְמַ֥ד חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, in order that I might learn Thy statutes.

jps.text: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, in order that I might learn Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: טֹֽוב־לִ֥י תֹֽורַת־פִּ֑יךָ מֵ֝אַלְפֵ֗י זָהָ֥ב וָכָֽסֶף׃
verses.englishText: The law of Thy mouth is better unto me than thousands of gold and silver.

jps.text: The law of Thy mouth is better unto me than thousands of gold and silver.

verses.hebrewText: יָדֶ֣יךָ עָ֭שׂוּנִי וַֽיְכֹונְנ֑וּנִי הֲ֝בִינֵ֗נִי וְאֶלְמְדָ֥ה מִצְוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: JOD. Thy hands have made me and fashioned me; give me understanding, that I may learn Thy commandments.

jps.text: JOD. Thy hands have made me and fashioned me; give me understanding, that I may learn Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭רֵאֶיךָ יִרְא֣וּנִי וְיִשְׂמָ֑חוּ כִּ֖י לִדְבָרְךָ֣ יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: They that fear Thee shall see me and be glad, because I have hope in Thy word.

jps.text: They that fear Thee shall see me and be glad, because I have hope in Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: יָדַ֣עְתִּי יְ֭הוָה כִּי־צֶ֣דֶק מִשְׁפָּטֶ֑יךָ וֶ֝אֱמוּנָ֗ה עִנִּיתָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I know, O LORD, that Thy judgments are righteous, and that in faithfulness Thou hast afflicted me.

jps.text: I know, O LORD, that Thy judgments are righteous, and that in faithfulness Thou hast afflicted me.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִי־נָ֣א חַסְדְּךָ֣ לְנַחֲמֵ֑נִי כְּאִמְרָתְךָ֥ לְעַבְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let, I pray Thee, Thy lovingkindness be ready to comfort me, according to Thy promise unto Thy servant.

jps.text: Let, I pray Thee, Thy lovingkindness be ready to comfort me, according to Thy promise unto Thy servant.

verses.hebrewText: יְבֹא֣וּנִי רַחֲמֶ֣יךָ וְאֶֽחְיֶ֑ה כִּי־תֹֽ֝ורָתְךָ֗ שַֽׁעֲשֻׁעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Let Thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live; for Thy law is my delight.

jps.text: Let Thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live; for Thy law is my delight.

verses.hebrewText: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ זֵ֭דִים כִּי־שֶׁ֣קֶר עִוְּת֑וּנִי אֲ֝נִ֗י אָשִׂ֥יחַ בְּפִקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let the proud be put to shame, for they have distorted my cause with falsehood; but I will meditate in Thy precepts.

jps.text: Let the proud be put to shame, for they have distorted my cause with falsehood; but I will meditate in Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: יָשׁ֣וּבוּ לִ֣י יְרֵאֶ֑יךָ *וְיָדְעוּ (וְ֝יֹדְעֵ֗י) עֵדֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let those that fear Thee return unto me, and they that know Thy testimonies.

jps.text: Let those that fear Thee return unto me, and they that know Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִֽי־לִבִּ֣י תָמִ֣ים בְּחֻקֶּ֑יךָ לְ֝מַ֗עַן לֹ֣א אֵבֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: Let my heart be undivided in Thy statutes, in order that I may not be put to shame.

jps.text: Let my heart be undivided in Thy statutes, in order that I may not be put to shame.

verses.hebrewText: כָּלְתָ֣ה לִתְשׁוּעָתְךָ֣ נַפְשִׁ֑י לִדְבָרְךָ֥ יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: CAPH. My soul pineth for Thy salvation; in Thy word do I hope.

jps.text: CAPH. My soul pineth for Thy salvation; in Thy word do I hope.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל֣וּ עֵ֭ינַי לְאִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ לֵ֝אמֹ֗ר מָתַ֥י תְּֽנַחֲמֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Mine eyes fail for Thy word, saying: 'When wilt Thou comfort me?'

jps.text: Mine eyes fail for Thy word, saying: 'When wilt Thou comfort me?'

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־הָ֭יִיתִי כְּנֹ֣אד בְּקִיטֹ֑ור חֻ֝קֶּ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: For I am become like a wine-skin in the smoke; yet do I not forget Thy statutes.

jps.text: For I am become like a wine-skin in the smoke; yet do I not forget Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: כַּמָּ֥ה יְמֵֽי־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ מָתַ֬י תַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה בְרֹדְפַ֣י מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.englishText: How many are the days of Thy servant? When wilt Thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?

jps.text: How many are the days of Thy servant? When wilt Thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?

verses.hebrewText: כָּֽרוּ־לִ֣י זֵדִ֣ים שִׁיחֹ֑ות אֲ֝שֶׁ֗ר לֹ֣א כְתֹורָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: The proud have digged pits for me, which is not according to Thy law.

jps.text: The proud have digged pits for me, which is not according to Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־מִצְוֹתֶ֥יךָ אֱמוּנָ֑ה שֶׁ֖קֶר רְדָפ֣וּנִי עָזְרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: All Thy commandments are faithful; they persecute me for nought; help Thou me.

jps.text: All Thy commandments are faithful; they persecute me for nought; help Thou me.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֭מְעַט כִּלּ֣וּנִי בָאָ֑רֶץ וַ֝אֲנִ֗י לֹא־עָזַ֥בְתִּי פִקֻּודֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: They had almost consumed me upon earth; but as for me, I forsook not Thy precepts.

jps.text: They had almost consumed me upon earth; but as for me, I forsook not Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: כְּחַסְדְּךָ֥ חַיֵּ֑נִי וְ֝אֶשְׁמְרָ֗ה עֵד֥וּת פִּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Quicken me after Thy lovingkindness, and I will observe the testimony of Thy mouth.

jps.text: Quicken me after Thy lovingkindness, and I will observe the testimony of Thy mouth.

verses.hebrewText: לְעֹולָ֥ם יְהוָ֑ה דְּ֝בָרְךָ֗ נִצָּ֥ב בַּשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: LAMED. For ever, O LORD, Thy word standeth fast in heaven.

jps.text: LAMED. For ever, O LORD, Thy word standeth fast in heaven.

verses.hebrewText: לְדֹ֣ר וָ֭דֹר אֱמֽוּנָתֶ֑ךָ כֹּונַ֥נְתָּ אֶ֝֗רֶץ וַֽתַּעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Thy faithfulness is unto all generations; Thou hast established the earth, and it standeth.

jps.text: Thy faithfulness is unto all generations; Thou hast established the earth, and it standeth.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽ֭מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ עָמְד֣וּ הַיֹּ֑ום כִּ֖י הַכֹּ֣ל עֲבָדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: They stand this day according to Thine ordinances; for all things are Thy servants.

jps.text: They stand this day according to Thine ordinances; for all things are Thy servants.

verses.hebrewText: לוּלֵ֣י תֹ֭ורָתְךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָ֑י אָ֝֗ז אָבַ֥דְתִּי בְעָנְיִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Unless Thy law had been my delight, I should then have perished in mine affliction.

jps.text: Unless Thy law had been my delight, I should then have perished in mine affliction.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭עֹולָם לֹא־אֶשְׁכַּ֣ח פִּקּוּדֶ֑יךָ כִּ֥י בָ֝֗ם חִיִּיתָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I will never forget Thy precepts; for with them Thou hast quickened me.

jps.text: I will never forget Thy precepts; for with them Thou hast quickened me.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽךָ־אֲ֭נִי הֹושִׁיעֵ֑נִי כִּ֖י פִקּוּדֶ֣יךָ דָרָֽשְׁתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I am Thine, save me; for I have sought Thy precepts.

jps.text: I am Thine, save me; for I have sought Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: לִ֤י קִוּ֣וּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים לְאַבְּדֵ֑נִי עֵ֝דֹתֶ֗יךָ אֶתְבֹּונָֽן׃
verses.englishText: The wicked have waited for me to destroy me; but I will consider Thy testimonies.

jps.text: The wicked have waited for me to destroy me; but I will consider Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽכָל תִּ֭כְלָה רָאִ֣יתִי קֵ֑ץ רְחָבָ֖ה מִצְוָתְךָ֣ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: I have seen an end to every purpose; but Thy commandment is exceeding broad.

jps.text: I have seen an end to every purpose; but Thy commandment is exceeding broad.

verses.hebrewText: מָֽה־אָהַ֥בְתִּי תֹורָתֶ֑ךָ כָּל־הַ֝יֹּ֗ום הִ֣יא שִׂיחָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: MEM. O how love I Thy law! It is my meditation all the day.

jps.text: MEM. O how love I Thy law! It is my meditation all the day.

verses.hebrewText: מֵ֭אֹ֣יְבַי תְּחַכְּמֵ֣נִי מִצְוֹתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם הִיא־לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Thy commandments make me wiser than mine enemies: for they are ever with me.

jps.text: Thy commandments make me wiser than mine enemies: for they are ever with me.

verses.hebrewText: מִכָּל־מְלַמְּדַ֥י הִשְׂכַּ֑לְתִּי כִּ֥י עֵ֝דְוֹתֶ֗יךָ שִׂ֣יחָה לִֽֿי׃
verses.englishText: I have more understanding than all my teachers; for Thy testimonies are my meditation.

jps.text: I have more understanding than all my teachers; for Thy testimonies are my meditation.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְּקֵנִ֥ים אֶתְבֹּונָ֑ן כִּ֖י פִקּוּדֶ֣יךָ נָצָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I understand more than mine elders, because I have keep Thy precepts.

jps.text: I understand more than mine elders, because I have keep Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: מִכָּל־אֹ֣רַח רָ֭ע כָּלִ֣אתִי רַגְלָ֑י לְ֝מַ֗עַן אֶשְׁמֹ֥ר דְּבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have refrained my feet from every evil way, in order that I might observe Thy word.

jps.text: I have refrained my feet from every evil way, in order that I might observe Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: מִמִּשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ לֹא־סָ֑רְתִּי כִּֽי־אַ֝תָּ֗ה הֹורֵתָֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: I have not turned aside from Thine ordinances; for Thou hast instructed me.

jps.text: I have not turned aside from Thine ordinances; for Thou hast instructed me.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־נִּמְלְצ֣וּ לְ֭חִכִּי אִמְרָתֶ֗ךָ מִדְּבַ֥שׁ לְפִֽי׃
verses.englishText: How sweet are Thy words unto my palate! yea, sweeter than honey to my mouth!

jps.text: How sweet are Thy words unto my palate! yea, sweeter than honey to my mouth!

verses.hebrewText: מִפִּקּוּדֶ֥יךָ אֶתְבֹּונָ֑ן עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן שָׂנֵ֤אתִי ׀ כָּל־אֹ֬רַח שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: From Thy precepts I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way.

jps.text: From Thy precepts I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way.

verses.hebrewText: נֵר־לְרַגְלִ֥י דְבָרֶ֑ךָ וְ֝אֹ֗ור לִנְתִיבָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: NUN. Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.

jps.text: NUN. Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.

verses.hebrewText: נִשְׁבַּ֥עְתִּי וָאֲקַיֵּ֑מָה לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ר מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, to observe Thy righteous ordinances.

jps.text: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, to observe Thy righteous ordinances.

verses.hebrewText: נַעֲנֵ֥יתִי עַד־מְאֹ֑ד יְ֝הוָ֗ה חַיֵּ֥נִי כִדְבָרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I am afflicted very much; quicken me, O LORD, according unto Thy word.

jps.text: I am afflicted very much; quicken me, O LORD, according unto Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: נִדְבֹ֣ות פִּ֭י רְצֵה־נָ֣א יְהוָ֑ה וּֽמִשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Accept, I beseech Thee, the freewill-offerings of my mouth, O LORD, and teach me Thine ordinances.

jps.text: Accept, I beseech Thee, the freewill-offerings of my mouth, O LORD, and teach me Thine ordinances.

verses.hebrewText: נַפְשִׁ֣י בְכַפִּ֣י תָמִ֑יד וְ֝תֹֽורָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: My soul is continually in my hand; yet have I not forgotten Thy law.

jps.text: My soul is continually in my hand; yet have I not forgotten Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: נָתְנ֬וּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים פַּ֣ח לִ֑י וּ֝מִפִּקּוּדֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א תָעִֽיתִי׃
verses.englishText: The wicked have laid a snare for me; yet went I not astray from Thy precepts.

jps.text: The wicked have laid a snare for me; yet went I not astray from Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: נָחַ֣לְתִּי עֵדְוֹתֶ֣יךָ לְעֹולָ֑ם כִּֽי־שְׂשֹׂ֖ון לִבִּ֣י הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.englishText: Thy testimonies have I taken as a heritage for ever; for they are the rejoicing of my heart.

jps.text: Thy testimonies have I taken as a heritage for ever; for they are the rejoicing of my heart.

verses.hebrewText: נָטִ֣יתִי לִ֭בִּי לַעֲשֹׂ֥ות חֻקֶּ֗יךָ לְעֹולָ֥ם עֵֽקֶב׃
verses.englishText: I have inclined my heart to perform Thy statutes, for ever, at every step.

jps.text: I have inclined my heart to perform Thy statutes, for ever, at every step.

verses.hebrewText: סֵעֲפִ֥ים שָׂנֵ֑אתִי וְֽתֹורָתְךָ֥ אָהָֽבְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: SAMECH. I hate them that are of a double mind; but Thy law do I love.

jps.text: SAMECH. I hate them that are of a double mind; but Thy law do I love.

verses.hebrewText: סִתְרִ֣י וּמָגִנִּ֣י אָ֑תָּה לִדְבָרְךָ֥ יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Thou art my covert and my shield; in Thy word do I hope.

jps.text: Thou art my covert and my shield; in Thy word do I hope.

verses.hebrewText: סֽוּרוּ־מִמֶּ֥נִּי מְרֵעִ֑ים וְ֝אֶצְּרָ֗ה מִצְוֹ֥ת אֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Depart from me, ye evildoers; that I may keep the commandments of my God.

jps.text: Depart from me, ye evildoers; that I may keep the commandments of my God.

verses.hebrewText: סָמְכֵ֣נִי כְאִמְרָתְךָ֣ וְאֶֽחְיֶ֑ה וְאַל־תְּ֝בִישֵׁ֗נִי מִשִּׂבְרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Uphold me according unto Thy word, that I may live; and put me not to shame in my hope.

jps.text: Uphold me according unto Thy word, that I may live; and put me not to shame in my hope.

verses.hebrewText: סְעָדֵ֥נִי וְאִוָּשֵׁ֑עָה וְאֶשְׁעָ֖ה בְחֻקֶּ֣יךָ תָמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: Support Thou me, and I shall be saved; and I will occupy myself with Thy statutes continually.

jps.text: Support Thou me, and I shall be saved; and I will occupy myself with Thy statutes continually.

verses.hebrewText: סָ֭לִיתָ כָּל־שֹׁוגִ֣ים מֵחֻקֶּ֑יךָ כִּי־שֶׁ֝֗קֶר תַּרְמִיתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast made light of all them that err from Thy statutes; for their deceit is vain.

jps.text: Thou hast made light of all them that err from Thy statutes; for their deceit is vain.

verses.hebrewText: סִגִ֗ים הִשְׁבַּ֥תָּ כָל־רִשְׁעֵי־אָ֑רֶץ לָ֝כֵ֗ן אָהַ֥בְתִּי עֵדֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth like dross; therefore I love Thy testimonies.

jps.text: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth like dross; therefore I love Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: סָמַ֣ר מִפַּחְדְּךָ֣ בְשָׂרִ֑י וּֽמִמִּשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ יָרֵֽאתִי׃
verses.englishText: My flesh shuddereth for fear of Thee; and I am afraid of Thy judgments.

jps.text: My flesh shuddereth for fear of Thee; and I am afraid of Thy judgments.

verses.hebrewText: עָ֭שִׂיתִי מִשְׁפָּ֣ט וָצֶ֑דֶק בַּל־תַּ֝נִּיחֵ֗נִי לְעֹֽשְׁקָֽי׃
verses.englishText: AIN. I have done justice and righteousness; leave me not to mine oppressors.

jps.text: AIN. I have done justice and righteousness; leave me not to mine oppressors.

verses.hebrewText: עֲרֹ֣ב עַבְדְּךָ֣ לְטֹ֑וב אַֽל־יַעַשְׁקֻ֥נִי זֵדִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Be surety for Thy servant for good; let not the proud oppress me.

jps.text: Be surety for Thy servant for good; let not the proud oppress me.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֭ינַי כָּל֣וּ לִֽישׁוּעָתֶ֑ךָ וּלְאִמְרַ֥ת צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Mine eyes fail for Thy salvation, and for Thy righteous word.

jps.text: Mine eyes fail for Thy salvation, and for Thy righteous word.

verses.hebrewText: עֲשֵׂ֖ה עִם־עַבְדְּךָ֥ כְחַסְדֶּ֗ךָ וְחֻקֶּ֥יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Deal with Thy servant according unto Thy mercy, and teach me Thy statutes.

jps.text: Deal with Thy servant according unto Thy mercy, and teach me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: עַבְדְּךָ־אָ֥נִי הֲבִינֵ֑נִי וְ֝אֵדְעָ֗ה עֵדֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I am Thy servant, give me understanding, that I may know Thy testimonies.

jps.text: I am Thy servant, give me understanding, that I may know Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֭ת לַעֲשֹׂ֣ות לַיהוָ֑ה הֵ֝פֵ֗רוּ תֹּורָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: It is time for the LORD to work; they have made void Thy law.

jps.text: It is time for the LORD to work; they have made void Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֭ן אָהַ֣בְתִּי מִצְוֹתֶ֑יךָ מִזָּהָ֥ב וּמִפָּֽז׃
verses.englishText: Therefore I love Thy commandments above gold, yea, above fine gold.

jps.text: Therefore I love Thy commandments above gold, yea, above fine gold.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ כָּל־פִּקּ֣וּדֵי כֹ֣ל יִשָּׁ֑רְתִּי כָּל־אֹ֖רַח שֶׁ֣קֶר שָׂנֵֽאתִי׃
verses.englishText: Therefore I esteem all Thy precepts concerning all things to be right; every false way I hate.

jps.text: Therefore I esteem all Thy precepts concerning all things to be right; every false way I hate.

verses.hebrewText: פְּלָאֹ֥ות עֵדְוֹתֶ֑יךָ עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן נְצָרָ֥תַם נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: PE. Thy testimonies are wonderful; therefore doth my soul keep them.

jps.text: PE. Thy testimonies are wonderful; therefore doth my soul keep them.

verses.hebrewText: פֵּ֖תַח דְּבָרֶ֥יךָ יָאִ֗יר מֵבִ֥ין פְּתָיִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The opening of Thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple.

jps.text: The opening of Thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple.

verses.hebrewText: פִּֽי־פָ֭עַרְתִּי וָאֶשְׁאָ֑פָה כִּ֖י לְמִצְוֹתֶ֣יךָ יָאָֽבְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I opened wide my mouth, and panted; for I longed for Thy commandments.

jps.text: I opened wide my mouth, and panted; for I longed for Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: פְּנֵה־אֵלַ֥י וְחָנֵּ֑נִי כְּ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט לְאֹהֲבֵ֥י שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Turn Thee towards me, and be gracious unto me, as is Thy wont to do unto those that love Thy name.

jps.text: Turn Thee towards me, and be gracious unto me, as is Thy wont to do unto those that love Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: פְּ֭עָמַי הָכֵ֣ן בְּאִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ וְֽאַל־תַּשְׁלֶט־בִּ֥י כָל־אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Order my footsteps by Thy word; and let not any iniquity have dominion over me.

jps.text: Order my footsteps by Thy word; and let not any iniquity have dominion over me.

verses.hebrewText: פְּ֭דֵנִי מֵעֹ֣שֶׁק אָדָ֑ם וְ֝אֶשְׁמְרָ֗ה פִּקּוּדֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Redeem me from the oppression of man, and I will observe Thy precepts.

jps.text: Redeem me from the oppression of man, and I will observe Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: פָּ֭נֶיךָ הָאֵ֣ר בְּעַבְדֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝לַמְּדֵ֗נִי אֶת־חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Make Thy face to shine upon Thy servant; and teach me Thy statutes.

jps.text: Make Thy face to shine upon Thy servant; and teach me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: פַּלְגֵי־מַ֭יִם יָרְד֣וּ עֵינָ֑י עַ֝֗ל לֹא־שָׁמְר֥וּ תֹורָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Mine eyes run down with rivers of water, because they observe not Thy law.

jps.text: Mine eyes run down with rivers of water, because they observe not Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: צַדִּ֣יק אַתָּ֣ה יְהוָ֑ה וְ֝יָשָׁ֗ר מִשְׁפָּטֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: TZADE. Righteous art Thou, O LORD, and upright are Thy judgments.

jps.text: TZADE. Righteous art Thou, O LORD, and upright are Thy judgments.

verses.hebrewText: צִ֭וִּיתָ צֶ֣דֶק עֵדֹתֶ֑יךָ וֶֽאֱמוּנָ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast commanded Thy testimonies in righteousness and exceeding faithfulness.

jps.text: Thou hast commanded Thy testimonies in righteousness and exceeding faithfulness.

verses.hebrewText: צִמְּתַ֥תְנִי קִנְאָתִ֑י כִּֽי־שָׁכְח֖וּ דְבָרֶ֣יךָ צָרָֽי׃
verses.englishText: My zeal hath undone me, because mine adversaries have forgotten Thy words.

jps.text: My zeal hath undone me, because mine adversaries have forgotten Thy words.

verses.hebrewText: צְרוּפָ֖ה אִמְרָתְךָ֥ מְאֹ֗ד וְֽעַבְדְּךָ֥ אֲהֵבָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Thy word is tried to the uttermost, and Thy servant loveth it.

jps.text: Thy word is tried to the uttermost, and Thy servant loveth it.

verses.hebrewText: צָעִ֣יר אָנֹכִ֣י וְנִבְזֶ֑ה פִּ֝קֻּדֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I am small and despised; yet have I not forgotten Thy precepts.

jps.text: I am small and despised; yet have I not forgotten Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: צִדְקָתְךָ֣ צֶ֣דֶק לְעֹולָ֑ם וְֽתֹורָתְךָ֥ אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.englishText: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and Thy law is the truth.

jps.text: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and Thy law is the truth.

verses.hebrewText: צַר־וּמָצֹ֥וק מְצָא֑וּנִי מִ֝צְוֹתֶ֗יךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Trouble and anguish have overtaken me; yet Thy commandments are my delight.

jps.text: Trouble and anguish have overtaken me; yet Thy commandments are my delight.

verses.hebrewText: צֶ֖דֶק עֵדְוֹתֶ֥יךָ לְעֹולָ֗ם הֲבִינֵ֥נִי וְאֶחְיֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: Thy testimonies are righteous for ever; give me understanding, and I shall live.

jps.text: Thy testimonies are righteous for ever; give me understanding, and I shall live.

verses.hebrewText: קָרָ֣אתִי בְכָל־לֵ֭ב עֲנֵ֥נִי יְהוָ֗ה חֻקֶּ֥יךָ אֶצֹּֽרָה׃
verses.englishText: KOPH. I have called with my whole heart; answer me, O LORD; I will keep Thy statutes.

jps.text: KOPH. I have called with my whole heart; answer me, O LORD; I will keep Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: קְרָאתִ֥יךָ הֹושִׁיעֵ֑נִי וְ֝אֶשְׁמְרָ֗ה עֵדֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have called Thee, save me, and I will observe Thy testimonies.

jps.text: I have called Thee, save me, and I will observe Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: קִדַּ֣מְתִּי בַ֭נֶּשֶׁף וָאֲשַׁוֵּ֑עָה *לִדְבָרֶיךָ (לִדְבָרְךָ֥) יִחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I rose early at dawn, and cried; I hoped in Thy word.

jps.text: I rose early at dawn, and cried; I hoped in Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: קִדְּמ֣וּ עֵ֭ינַי אַשְׁמֻרֹ֑ות לָ֝שִׂ֗יחַ בְּאִמְרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Mine eyes forestalled the night-watches, that I might meditate in Thy word.

jps.text: Mine eyes forestalled the night-watches, that I might meditate in Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֭ולִי שִׁמְעָ֣ה כְחַסְדֶּ֑ךָ יְ֝הוָ֗ה כְּֽמִשְׁפָּטֶ֥ךָ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Hear my voice according unto Thy lovingkindness; quicken me, O LORD, as Thou art wont.

jps.text: Hear my voice according unto Thy lovingkindness; quicken me, O LORD, as Thou art wont.

verses.hebrewText: קָ֭רְבוּ רֹדְפֵ֣י זִמָּ֑ה מִתֹּורָתְךָ֥ רָחָֽקוּ׃
verses.englishText: They draw nigh that follow after wickedness; they are far from Thy law.

jps.text: They draw nigh that follow after wickedness; they are far from Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: קָרֹ֣וב אַתָּ֣ה יְהוָ֑ה וְֽכָל־מִצְוֹתֶ֥יךָ אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.englishText: Thou art nigh, O LORD; and all Thy commandments are truth.

jps.text: Thou art nigh, O LORD; and all Thy commandments are truth.

verses.hebrewText: קֶ֣דֶם יָ֭דַעְתִּי מֵעֵדֹתֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם יְסַדְתָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Of old have I known from Thy testimonies that Thou hast founded them for ever.

jps.text: Of old have I known from Thy testimonies that Thou hast founded them for ever.

verses.hebrewText: רְאֵֽה־עָנְיִ֥י וְחַלְּצֵ֑נִי כִּי־תֹֽ֝ורָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: RESH. O see mine affliction, and rescue me; for I do not forget Thy law.

jps.text: RESH. O see mine affliction, and rescue me; for I do not forget Thy law.

verses.hebrewText: רִיבָ֣ה רִ֭יבִי וּגְאָלֵ֑נִי לְאִמְרָתְךָ֥ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Plead Thou my cause, and redeem me; quicken me according to Thy word.

jps.text: Plead Thou my cause, and redeem me; quicken me according to Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: רָחֹ֣וק מֵרְשָׁעִ֣ים יְשׁוּעָ֑ה כִּֽי־חֻ֝קֶּיךָ לֹ֣א דָרָֽשׁוּ׃
verses.englishText: Salvation is far from the wicked; for they seek not Thy statutes.

jps.text: Salvation is far from the wicked; for they seek not Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: רַחֲמֶ֖יךָ רַבִּ֥ים ׀ יְהוָ֑ה כְּֽמִשְׁפָּטֶ֥יךָ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Great are Thy compassions, O LORD; quicken me as Thou art wont.

jps.text: Great are Thy compassions, O LORD; quicken me as Thou art wont.

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭בִּים רֹדְפַ֣י וְצָרָ֑י מֵ֝עֵדְוֹתֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א נָטִֽיתִי׃
verses.englishText: Many are my persecutors and mine adversaries; yet have I not turned aside from Thy testimonies.

jps.text: Many are my persecutors and mine adversaries; yet have I not turned aside from Thy testimonies.

verses.hebrewText: רָאִ֣יתִי בֹ֭גְדִים וָֽאֶתְקֹוטָ֑טָה אֲשֶׁ֥ר אִ֝מְרָתְךָ֗ לֹ֣א שָׁמָֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: I beheld them that were faithless, and strove with them; because they observed not Thy word.

jps.text: I beheld them that were faithless, and strove with them; because they observed not Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: רְ֭אֵה כִּי־פִקּוּדֶ֣יךָ אָהָ֑בְתִּי יְ֝הוָ֗ה כְּֽחַסְדְּךָ֥ חַיֵּֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: O see how I love Thy precepts; quicken me, O LORD, according to Thy lovingkindness.

jps.text: O see how I love Thy precepts; quicken me, O LORD, according to Thy lovingkindness.

verses.hebrewText: רֹאשׁ־דְּבָרְךָ֥ אֱמֶ֑ת וּ֝לְעֹולָ֗ם כָּל־מִשְׁפַּ֥ט צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: The beginning of Thy word is truth; and all Thy righteous ordinance endureth for ever.

jps.text: The beginning of Thy word is truth; and all Thy righteous ordinance endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂ֭רִים רְדָפ֣וּנִי חִנָּ֑ם *וּמִדְּבָרֶיךָ (וּ֝מִדְּבָרְךָ֗) פָּחַ֥ד לִבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: SCHIN. Princes have persecuted me without a cause; but my heart standeth in awe of Thy words.

jps.text: SCHIN. Princes have persecuted me without a cause; but my heart standeth in awe of Thy words.

verses.hebrewText: שָׂ֣שׂ אָ֭נֹכִֽי עַל־אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ כְּ֝מֹוצֵ֗א שָׁלָ֥ל רָֽב׃
verses.englishText: I rejoice at Thy word, as one that findeth great spoil.

jps.text: I rejoice at Thy word, as one that findeth great spoil.

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֣קֶר שָׂ֭נֵאתִי וַאֲתַעֵ֑בָה תֹּורָתְךָ֥ אָהָֽבְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I hate and abhor falsehood; Thy law do I love.

jps.text: I hate and abhor falsehood; Thy law do I love.

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֣בַע בַּ֭יֹּום הִלַּלְתִּ֑יךָ עַ֝֗ל מִשְׁפְּטֵ֥י צִדְקֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Seven times a day do I praise Thee, because of Thy righteous ordinances.

jps.text: Seven times a day do I praise Thee, because of Thy righteous ordinances.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁלֹ֣ום רָ֭ב לְאֹהֲבֵ֣י תֹורָתֶ֑ךָ וְאֵֽין־לָ֥מֹו מִכְשֹֽׁול׃
verses.englishText: Great peace have they that love Thy law; and there is no stumbling for them.

jps.text: Great peace have they that love Thy law; and there is no stumbling for them.

verses.hebrewText: שִׂבַּ֣רְתִּי לִֽישׁוּעָתְךָ֣ יְהוָ֑ה וּֽמִצְוֹתֶ֥יךָ עָשִֽׂיתִי׃
verses.englishText: I have hoped for Thy salvation, O LORD, and have done Thy commandments.

jps.text: I have hoped for Thy salvation, O LORD, and have done Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: שָֽׁמְרָ֣ה נַ֭פְשִׁי עֵדֹתֶ֑יךָ וָאֹהֲבֵ֥ם מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: My soul hath observed Thy testimonies; and I love them exceedingly.

jps.text: My soul hath observed Thy testimonies; and I love them exceedingly.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמַ֣רְתִּי פִ֭קּוּדֶיךָ וְעֵדֹתֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י כָל־דְּרָכַ֣י נֶגְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I have observed Thy precepts and Thy testimonies; for all my ways are before Thee.

jps.text: I have observed Thy precepts and Thy testimonies; for all my ways are before Thee.

verses.hebrewText: תִּקְרַ֤ב רִנָּתִ֣י לְפָנֶ֣יךָ יְהוָ֑ה כִּדְבָרְךָ֥ הֲבִינֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: TAV. Let my cry come near before Thee, O LORD; give me understanding according to Thy word.

jps.text: TAV. Let my cry come near before Thee, O LORD; give me understanding according to Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: תָּבֹ֣וא תְּחִנָּתִ֣י לְפָנֶ֑יךָ כְּ֝אִמְרָתְךָ֗ הַצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Let my supplication come before Thee; deliver me according to Thy word.

jps.text: Let my supplication come before Thee; deliver me according to Thy word.

verses.hebrewText: תַּבַּ֣עְנָה שְׂפָתַ֣י תְּהִלָּ֑ה כִּ֖י תְלַמְּדֵ֣נִי חֻקֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Let my lips utter praise: because Thou teachest me Thy statutes.

jps.text: Let my lips utter praise: because Thou teachest me Thy statutes.

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֣עַן לְ֭שֹׁונִי אִמְרָתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֖י כָל־מִצְוֹתֶ֣יךָ צֶּֽדֶק׃
verses.englishText: Let my tongue sing of Thy word; for all Thy commandments are righteousness.

jps.text: Let my tongue sing of Thy word; for all Thy commandments are righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהִֽי־יָדְךָ֥ לְעָזְרֵ֑נִי כִּ֖י פִקּוּדֶ֣יךָ בָחָֽרְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: Let Thy hand be ready to help me; for I have chosen Thy precepts.

jps.text: Let Thy hand be ready to help me; for I have chosen Thy precepts.

verses.hebrewText: תָּאַ֣בְתִּי לִֽישׁוּעָתְךָ֣ יְהוָ֑ה וְ֝תֹֽורָתְךָ֗ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I have longed for Thy salvation, O LORD; and Thy law is my delight.

jps.text: I have longed for Thy salvation, O LORD; and Thy law is my delight.

verses.hebrewText: תְּֽחִי־נַ֭פְשִׁי וּֽתְהַֽלְלֶ֑ךָּ וּֽמִשְׁפָּטֶ֥ךָ יַעֲזְרֻֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Let my soul live, and it shall praise Thee; and let Thine ordinances help me.

jps.text: Let my soul live, and it shall praise Thee; and let Thine ordinances help me.

verses.hebrewText: תָּעִ֗יתִי כְּשֶׂ֣ה אֹ֭בֵד בַּקֵּ֣שׁ עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֥י מִ֝צְוֹתֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek Thy servant; for I have not forgotten Thy commandments.

jps.text: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek Thy servant; for I have not forgotten Thy commandments.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות אֶל־יְ֭הוָה בַּצָּרָ֣תָה לִּ֑י קָ֝רָ֗אתִי וֽ͏ַיַּעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. In my distress I called unto the LORD, and He answered me.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. In my distress I called unto the LORD, and He answered me.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה הַצִּ֣ילָה נַ֭פְשִׁי מִשְּׂפַת־שֶׁ֑קֶר מִלָּשֹׁ֥ון רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, deliver my soul from lying lips, from a deceitful tongue.

jps.text: O LORD, deliver my soul from lying lips, from a deceitful tongue.

verses.hebrewText: מַה־יִּתֵּ֣ן לְ֭ךָ וּמַה־יֹּסִ֥יף לָ֗ךְ לָשֹׁ֥ון רְמִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: What shall be given unto thee, and what shall be done more unto thee, thou deceitful tongue?

jps.text: What shall be given unto thee, and what shall be done more unto thee, thou deceitful tongue?

verses.hebrewText: חִצֵּ֣י גִבֹּ֣ור שְׁנוּנִ֑ים עִ֝֗ם גַּחֲלֵ֥י רְתָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of broom.

jps.text: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of broom.

verses.hebrewText: אֹֽויָה־לִ֭י כִּי־גַ֣רְתִּי מֶ֑שֶׁךְ שָׁ֝כַ֗נְתִּי עִֽם־אָהֳלֵ֥י קֵדָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Woe is me, that I sojourn with Meshech, that I dwell beside the tents of Kedar!

jps.text: Woe is me, that I sojourn with Meshech, that I dwell beside the tents of Kedar!

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭בַּת שָֽׁכְנָה־לָּ֣הּ נַפְשִׁ֑י עִ֝֗ם שֹׂונֵ֥א שָׁלֹֽום׃
verses.englishText: My soul hath full long had her dwelling with him that hateth peace.

jps.text: My soul hath full long had her dwelling with him that hateth peace.

verses.hebrewText: אֲ‍ֽנִי־שָׁ֭לֹום וְכִ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר הֵ֝֗מָּה לַמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I am all peace; but when I speak, they are for war.

jps.text: I am all peace; but when I speak, they are for war.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר לַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות אֶשָּׂ֣א עֵ֭ינַי אֶל־הֶהָרִ֑ים מֵ֝אַ֗יִן יָבֹ֥א עֶזְרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up mine eyes unto the mountains: from whence shall my help come?

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up mine eyes unto the mountains: from whence shall my help come?

verses.hebrewText: עֶ֭זְרִי מֵעִ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: My help cometh from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.

jps.text: My help cometh from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־יִתֵּ֣ן לַמֹּ֣וט רַגְלֶ֑ךָ אַל־יָ֝נ֗וּם שֹֽׁמְרֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved; He that keepeth thee will not slumber.

jps.text: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved; He that keepeth thee will not slumber.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֣ה לֹֽא־יָ֭נוּם וְלֹ֣א יִישָׁ֑ן שֹׁ֝ומֵ֗ר יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: Behold, He that keepeth Israel doth neither slumber nor sleep.

jps.text: Behold, He that keepeth Israel doth neither slumber nor sleep.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה שֹׁמְרֶ֑ךָ יְהוָ֥ה צִ֝לְּךָ֗ עַל־יַ֥ד יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is thy keeper; the LORD is thy shade upon thy right hand.

jps.text: The LORD is thy keeper; the LORD is thy shade upon thy right hand.

verses.hebrewText: יֹומָ֗ם הַשֶּׁ֥מֶשׁ לֹֽא־יַכֶּ֗כָּה וְיָרֵ֥חַ בַּלָּֽיְלָה׃
verses.englishText: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.

jps.text: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה יִשְׁמָרְךָ֥ מִכָּל־רָ֑ע יִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ר אֶת־נַפְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD shall keep thee from all evil; He shall keep thy soul.

jps.text: The LORD shall keep thee from all evil; He shall keep thy soul.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה יִשְׁמָר־צֵאתְךָ֥ וּבֹואֶ֑ךָ מֵֽ֝עַתָּ֗ה וְעַד־עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The LORD shall guard thy going out and thy coming in, from this time forth and for ever.

jps.text: The LORD shall guard thy going out and thy coming in, from this time forth and for ever.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲלֹ֗ות לְדָ֫וִ֥ד שָׂ֭מַחְתִּי בְּאֹמְרִ֣ים לִ֑י בֵּ֖ית יְהוָ֣ה נֵלֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. I rejoiced when they said unto me: 'Let us go unto the house of the LORD.'

jps.text: A Song of Ascents; of David. I rejoiced when they said unto me: 'Let us go unto the house of the LORD.'

verses.hebrewText: עֹ֭מְדֹות הָי֣וּ רַגְלֵ֑ינוּ בִּ֝שְׁעָרַ֗יִךְ יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.englishText: Our feet are standing within thy gates, O Jerusalem;

jps.text: Our feet are standing within thy gates, O Jerusalem;

verses.hebrewText: יְרוּשָׁלַ֥͏ִם הַבְּנוּיָ֑ה כְּ֝עִ֗יר שֶׁחֻבְּרָה־לָּ֥הּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Jerusalem, that art builded as a city that is compact together;

jps.text: Jerusalem, that art builded as a city that is compact together;

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁשָּׁ֨ם עָל֪וּ שְׁבָטִ֡ים שִׁבְטֵי־יָ֭הּ עֵד֣וּת לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לְ֝הֹדֹ֗ות לְשֵׁ֣ם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Whither the tribes went up, even the tribes of the LORD, as a testimony unto Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the LORD.

jps.text: Whither the tribes went up, even the tribes of the LORD, as a testimony unto Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שָׁ֨מָּה ׀ יָשְׁב֣וּ כִסְאֹ֣ות לְמִשְׁפָּ֑ט כִּ֝סְאֹ֗ות לְבֵ֣ית דָּוִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: For there were set thrones for judgment, the thrones of the house of David.

jps.text: For there were set thrones for judgment, the thrones of the house of David.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁ֭אֲלוּ שְׁלֹ֣ום יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם יִ֝שְׁלָ֗יוּ אֹהֲבָֽיִךְ׃
verses.englishText: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem; may they prosper that love thee.

jps.text: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem; may they prosper that love thee.

verses.hebrewText: יְהִֽי־שָׁלֹ֥ום בְּחֵילֵ֑ךְ שַׁ֝לְוָ֗ה בְּאַרְמְנֹותָֽיִךְ׃
verses.englishText: Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces.

jps.text: Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭מַעַן אַחַ֣י וְרֵעָ֑י אֲדַבְּרָה־נָּ֖א שָׁלֹ֣ום בָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For my brethren and companions' sakes, I will now say: 'Peace be within thee.'

jps.text: For my brethren and companions' sakes, I will now say: 'Peace be within thee.'

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭מַעַן בֵּית־יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ אֲבַקְשָׁ֖ה טֹ֣וב לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God I will seek thy good.

jps.text: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God I will seek thy good.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות אֵ֭לֶיךָ נָשָׂ֣אתִי אֶת־עֵינַ֑י הַ֝יֹּשְׁבִ֗י בַּשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. Unto Thee I lift up mine eyes, O Thou that art enthroned in the heavens.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. Unto Thee I lift up mine eyes, O Thou that art enthroned in the heavens.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֨ה כְעֵינֵ֪י עֲבָדִ֡ים אֶל־יַ֤ד אֲ‍ֽדֹונֵיהֶ֗ם כְּעֵינֵ֣י שִׁפְחָה֮ אֶל־יַ֪ד גְּבִ֫רְתָּ֥הּ כֵּ֣ן עֵ֭ינֵינוּ אֶל־יְהוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ עַ֝֗ד שֶׁיְּחָנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Behold, as the eyes of servants unto the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes look unto the LORD our God, until He be gracious unto us.

jps.text: Behold, as the eyes of servants unto the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes look unto the LORD our God, until He be gracious unto us.

verses.hebrewText: חָנֵּ֣נוּ יְהוָ֣ה חָנֵּ֑נוּ כִּֽי־רַ֝֗ב שָׂבַ֥עְנוּ בֽוּז׃
verses.englishText: Be gracious unto us, O LORD, be gracious unto us; for we are full sated with contempt.

jps.text: Be gracious unto us, O LORD, be gracious unto us; for we are full sated with contempt.

verses.hebrewText: רַבַּת֮ שָֽׂבְעָה־לָּ֪הּ נַ֫פְשֵׁ֥נוּ הַלַּ֥עַג הַשַּׁאֲנַנִּ֑ים הַ֝בּ֗וּז לִגְאֵ֥יֹונִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Our soul is full sated with the scorning of those that are at ease, and with the contempt of the proud oppressors.

jps.text: Our soul is full sated with the scorning of those that are at ease, and with the contempt of the proud oppressors.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲלֹ֗ות לְדָ֫וִ֥ד לוּלֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה שֶׁהָ֣יָה לָ֑נוּ יֹֽאמַר־נָ֝א יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. 'If it had not been the LORD who was for us', let Israel now say;

jps.text: A Song of Ascents; of David. 'If it had not been the LORD who was for us', let Israel now say;

verses.hebrewText: לוּלֵ֣י יְ֭הוָה שֶׁהָ֣יָה לָ֑נוּ בְּק֖וּם עָלֵ֣ינוּ אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: 'If it had not been the LORD who was for us, when men rose up against us,

jps.text: 'If it had not been the LORD who was for us, when men rose up against us,

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭זַי חַיִּ֣ים בְּלָע֑וּנוּ בַּחֲרֹ֖ות אַפָּ֣ם בָּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then they had swallowed us up alive, when their wrath was kindled against us;

jps.text: Then they had swallowed us up alive, when their wrath was kindled against us;

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭זַי הַמַּ֣יִם שְׁטָפ֑וּנוּ נַ֝֗חְלָה עָבַ֥ר עַל־נַפְשֵֽׁנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul;

jps.text: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul;

verses.hebrewText: אֲ֭זַי עָבַ֣ר עַל־נַפְשֵׁ֑נוּ הַ֝מַּ֗יִם הַזֵּֽידֹונִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.'

jps.text: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.'

verses.hebrewText: בָּר֥וּךְ יְהוָ֑ה שֶׁלֹּ֥א נְתָנָ֥נוּ טֶ֝֗רֶף לְשִׁנֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.

verses.hebrewText: נַפְשֵׁ֗נוּ כְּצִפֹּ֥ור נִמְלְטָה֮ מִפַּ֪ח יֹ֫וקְשִׁ֥ים הַפַּ֥ח נִשְׁבָּ֗ר וַאֲנַ֥חְנוּ נִמְלָֽטְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers; the snare is broken, and we are escaped.

jps.text: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers; the snare is broken, and we are escaped.

verses.hebrewText: עֶ֭זְרֵנוּ בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Our help is in the name of the LORD, who made heaven and earth.

jps.text: Our help is in the name of the LORD, who made heaven and earth.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות הַבֹּטְחִ֥ים בַּיהוָ֑ה כְּֽהַר־צִיֹּ֥ון לֹא־יִ֝מֹּ֗וט לְעֹולָ֥ם יֵשֵֽׁב׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. They that trust in the LORD are as mount Zion, which cannot be moved, but abideth for ever.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. They that trust in the LORD are as mount Zion, which cannot be moved, but abideth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽרוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם הָרִים֮ סָבִ֪יב לָ֥הּ וַ֭יהוָה סָבִ֣יב לְעַמֹּ֑ו מֵ֝עַתָּ֗ה וְעַד־עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the LORD is round about His people, from this time forth and for ever.

jps.text: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the LORD is round about His people, from this time forth and for ever.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י לֹ֪א יָנ֡וּחַ שֵׁ֤בֶט הָרֶ֗שַׁע עַל֮ גֹּורַ֪ל הַֽצַּדִּ֫יקִ֥ים לְמַ֡עַן לֹא־יִשְׁלְח֖וּ הַצַּדִּיקִ֨ים בְּעַוְלָ֬תָה יְדֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the rod of wickedness shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; that the righteous put not forth their hands unto iniquity.

jps.text: For the rod of wickedness shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; that the righteous put not forth their hands unto iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: הֵיטִ֣יבָה יְ֭הוָה לַטֹּובִ֑ים וְ֝לִֽישָׁרִ֗ים בְּלִבֹּותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Do good, O LORD, unto the good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.

jps.text: Do good, O LORD, unto the good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.

verses.hebrewText: וְהַמַּטִּ֤ים עַֽקַלְקַלֹּותָ֗ם יֹולִיכֵ֣ם יְ֭הוָה אֶת־פֹּעֲלֵ֣י הָאָ֑וֶן שָׁ֝לֹ֗ום עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: But as for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, the LORD will lead them away with the workers of iniquity. Peace be upon Israel.

jps.text: But as for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, the LORD will lead them away with the workers of iniquity. Peace be upon Israel.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות בְּשׁ֣וּב יְ֭הוָה אֶת־שִׁיבַ֣ת צִיֹּ֑ון הָ֝יִ֗ינוּ כְּחֹלְמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. When the LORD brought back those that returned to Zion, we were like unto them that dream.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. When the LORD brought back those that returned to Zion, we were like unto them that dream.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֤ז יִמָּלֵ֪א שְׂחֹ֡וק פִּינוּ֮ וּלְשֹׁונֵ֪נוּ רִ֫נָּ֥ה אָ֭ז יֹאמְר֣וּ בַגֹּויִ֑ם הִגְדִּ֥יל יְ֝הוָ֗ה לַעֲשֹׂ֥ות עִם־אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.englishText: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing; then said they among the nations: 'The LORD hath done great things with these.'

jps.text: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing; then said they among the nations: 'The LORD hath done great things with these.'

verses.hebrewText: הִגְדִּ֣יל יְ֭הוָה לַעֲשֹׂ֥ות עִמָּ֗נוּ הָיִ֥ינוּ שְׂמֵחִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD hath done great things with us; we are rejoiced.

jps.text: The LORD hath done great things with us; we are rejoiced.

verses.hebrewText: שׁוּבָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה אֶת־*שְׁבוּתֵנוּ (שְׁבִיתֵ֑נוּ) כַּאֲפִיקִ֥ים בַּנֶּֽגֶב׃
verses.englishText: Turn our captivity, O LORD, as the streams in the dry land.

jps.text: Turn our captivity, O LORD, as the streams in the dry land.

verses.hebrewText: הַזֹּרְעִ֥ים בְּדִמְעָ֗ה בְּרִנָּ֥ה יִקְצֹֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.

jps.text: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.

verses.hebrewText: הָ֘לֹ֤וךְ יֵלֵ֨ךְ ׀ וּבָכֹה֮ נֹשֵׂ֪א מֶֽשֶׁךְ־הַ֫זָּ֥רַע בֹּֽא־יָבֹ֥וא בְרִנָּ֑ה נֹ֝שֵׂ֗א אֲלֻמֹּתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Though he goeth on his way weeping that beareth the measure of seed, he shall come home with joy, bearing his sheaves.

jps.text: Though he goeth on his way weeping that beareth the measure of seed, he shall come home with joy, bearing his sheaves.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּֽעֲלֹ֗ות לִשְׁלֹ֫מֹ֥ה אִם־יְהוָ֤ה ׀ לֹא־יִבְנֶ֬ה בַ֗יִת שָׁ֤וְא ׀ עָמְל֣וּ בֹונָ֣יו בֹּ֑ו אִם־יְהוָ֥ה לֹֽא־יִשְׁמָר־עִ֝֗יר שָׁ֤וְא ׀ שָׁקַ֬ד שֹׁומֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents; of Solomon. Except the LORD build the house, they labour in vain that build it; except the LORD keep the city, the watchman waketh but in vain.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents; of Solomon. Except the LORD build the house, they labour in vain that build it; except the LORD keep the city, the watchman waketh but in vain.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤וְא לָכֶ֨ם ׀ מַשְׁכִּ֪ימֵי ק֡וּם מְאַֽחֲרֵי־שֶׁ֗בֶת אֹ֭כְלֵי לֶ֣חֶם הָעֲצָבִ֑ים כֵּ֤ן יִתֵּ֖ן לִֽידִידֹ֣ו שֵׁנָֽא׃
verses.englishText: It is vain for you that ye rise early, and sit up late, ye that eat the bread of toil; so He giveth unto His beloved in sleep.

jps.text: It is vain for you that ye rise early, and sit up late, ye that eat the bread of toil; so He giveth unto His beloved in sleep.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֤ה נַחֲלַ֣ת יְהוָ֣ה בָּנִ֑ים שָׂ֝כָ֗ר פְּרִ֣י הַבָּֽטֶן׃
verses.englishText: Lo, children are a heritage of the LORD; the fruit of the womb is a reward.

jps.text: Lo, children are a heritage of the LORD; the fruit of the womb is a reward.

verses.hebrewText: כְּחִצִּ֥ים בְּיַד־גִּבֹּ֑ור כֵּ֝֗ן בְּנֵ֣י הַנְּעוּרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: As arrows in the hand of a mighty man, so are the children of one's youth.

jps.text: As arrows in the hand of a mighty man, so are the children of one's youth.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֤י הַגֶּ֗בֶר אֲשֶׁ֤ר מִלֵּ֥א אֶת־אַשְׁפָּתֹ֗ו מֵ֫הֶ֥ם לֹֽא־יֵבֹ֑שׁוּ כִּֽי־יְדַבְּר֖וּ אֶת־אֹויְבִ֣ים בַּשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them; they shall not be put to shame, when they speak with their enemies in the gate.

jps.text: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them; they shall not be put to shame, when they speak with their enemies in the gate.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות אַ֭שְׁרֵי כָּל־יְרֵ֣א יְהוָ֑ה הַ֝הֹלֵ֗ךְ בִּדְרָכָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. Happy is every one that feareth the LORD, that walketh in His ways.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. Happy is every one that feareth the LORD, that walketh in His ways.

verses.hebrewText: יְגִ֣יעַ כַּ֭פֶּיךָ כִּ֣י תֹאכֵ֑ל אַ֝שְׁרֶ֗יךָ וְטֹ֣וב לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: When thou eatest the labour of thy hands, happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.

jps.text: When thou eatest the labour of thy hands, happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׁתְּךָ֤ ׀ כְּגֶ֥פֶן פֹּרִיָּה֮ בְּיַרְכְּתֵ֪י בֵ֫יתֶ֥ךָ בָּ֭נֶיךָ כִּשְׁתִלֵ֣י זֵיתִ֑ים סָ֝בִ֗יב לְשֻׁלְחָנֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine, in the innermost parts of thy house; thy children like olive plants, round about thy table.

jps.text: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine, in the innermost parts of thy house; thy children like olive plants, round about thy table.

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּ֣ה כִי־כֵ֭ן יְבֹ֥רַךְ גָּ֗בֶר יְרֵ֣א יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Behold, surely thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the LORD.

jps.text: Behold, surely thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יְבָרֶכְךָ֥ יְהוָ֗ה מִצִּ֫יֹּ֥ון וּ֭רְאֵה בְּט֣וּב יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם כֹּ֝֗ל יְמֵ֣י חַיֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD bless thee out of Zion; and see thou the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life;

jps.text: The LORD bless thee out of Zion; and see thou the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life;

verses.hebrewText: וּרְאֵֽה־בָנִ֥ים לְבָנֶ֑יךָ שָׁ֝לֹ֗ום עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And see thy children's children. Peace be upon Israel!

jps.text: And see thy children's children. Peace be upon Israel!

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות רַ֭בַּת צְרָר֣וּנִי מִנְּעוּרַ֑י יֹֽאמַר־נָ֝א יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. 'Much have they afflicted me from my youth up', let Israel now say;

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. 'Much have they afflicted me from my youth up', let Israel now say;

verses.hebrewText: רַ֭בַּת צְרָר֣וּנִי מִנְּעוּרָ֑י גַּ֝ם לֹא־יָ֥כְלוּ לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: 'Much have they afflicted me from my youth up; but they have not prevailed against me.

jps.text: 'Much have they afflicted me from my youth up; but they have not prevailed against me.

verses.hebrewText: עַל־גַּ֭בִּי חָרְשׁ֣וּ חֹרְשִׁ֑ים הֶ֝אֱרִ֗יכוּ *לְמַעֲנֹותָם (לְמַעֲנִיתָֽם)׃
verses.englishText: The plowers plowed upon my back; they made long their furrows.

jps.text: The plowers plowed upon my back; they made long their furrows.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֥ה צַדִּ֑יק קִ֝צֵּ֗ץ עֲבֹ֣ות רְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is righteous; He hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.'

jps.text: The LORD is righteous; He hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.'

verses.hebrewText: יֵ֭בֹשׁוּ וְיִסֹּ֣גוּ אָחֹ֑ור כֹּ֝֗ל שֹׂנְאֵ֥י צִיֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: Let them be ashamed and turned backward, all they that hate Zion.

jps.text: Let them be ashamed and turned backward, all they that hate Zion.

verses.hebrewText: יִ֭הְיוּ כַּחֲצִ֣יר גַּגֹּ֑ות שֶׁקַּדְמַ֖ת שָׁלַ֣ף יָבֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: Let them be as the grass upon the housetops, which withereth afore it springeth up;

jps.text: Let them be as the grass upon the housetops, which withereth afore it springeth up;

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁלֹּ֤א מִלֵּ֖א כַפֹּ֥ו קֹוצֵ֗ר וְחִצְנֹ֥ו מְעַמֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Wherewith the reaper filleth not his hand, nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom.

jps.text: Wherewith the reaper filleth not his hand, nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom.

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹ֤א אָֽמְר֨וּ ׀ הָעֹבְרִ֗ים בִּרְכַּֽת־יְהוָ֥ה אֲלֵיכֶ֑ם בֵּרַ֥כְנוּ אֶ֝תְכֶ֗ם בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Neither do they that go by say: 'The blessing of the LORD be upon you; we bless you in the name of the LORD.'

jps.text: Neither do they that go by say: 'The blessing of the LORD be upon you; we bless you in the name of the LORD.'

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲלֹ֑ות מִמַּעֲמַקִּ֖ים קְרָאתִ֣יךָ יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. Out of the depths have I called Thee, O LORD.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. Out of the depths have I called Thee, O LORD.

verses.hebrewText: אֲדֹנָי֮ שִׁמְעָ֪ה בְקֹ֫ולִ֥י תִּהְיֶ֣ינָה אָ֭זְנֶיךָ קַשֻּׁבֹ֑ות לְ֝קֹ֗ול תַּחֲנוּנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Lord, hearken unto my voice; let Thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications.

jps.text: Lord, hearken unto my voice; let Thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־עֲוֹנֹ֥ות תִּשְׁמָר־יָ֑הּ אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י מִ֣י יַעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: If Thou, LORD, shouldest mark iniquities, O Lord, who could stand?

jps.text: If Thou, LORD, shouldest mark iniquities, O Lord, who could stand?

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־עִמְּךָ֥ הַסְּלִיחָ֑ה לְ֝מַ֗עַן תִּוָּרֵֽא׃
verses.englishText: For with Thee there is forgiveness, that Thou mayest be feared.

jps.text: For with Thee there is forgiveness, that Thou mayest be feared.

verses.hebrewText: קִוִּ֣יתִי יְ֭הוָה קִוְּתָ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י וְֽלִדְבָרֹ֥ו הֹוחָֽלְתִּי׃
verses.englishText: I wait for the LORD, my soul doth wait, and in His word do I hope.

jps.text: I wait for the LORD, my soul doth wait, and in His word do I hope.

verses.hebrewText: נַפְשִׁ֥י לַֽאדֹנָ֑י מִשֹּׁמְרִ֥ים לַ֝בֹּ֗קֶר שֹׁמְרִ֥ים לַבֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: My soul waiteth for the Lord, more than watchmen for the morning; yea, more than watchmen for the morning.

jps.text: My soul waiteth for the Lord, more than watchmen for the morning; yea, more than watchmen for the morning.

verses.hebrewText: יַחֵ֥ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אֶל־יְה֫וָה כִּֽי־עִם־יְהוָ֥ה הַחֶ֑סֶד וְהַרְבֵּ֖ה עִמֹּ֣ו פְדֽוּת׃
verses.englishText: O Israel, hope in the LORD; for with the LORD there is mercy, and with Him is plenteous redemption.

jps.text: O Israel, hope in the LORD; for with the LORD there is mercy, and with Him is plenteous redemption.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭הוּא יִפְדֶּ֣ה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִ֝כֹּ֗ל עֲוֹנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: And He will redeem Israel from all his iniquities.

jps.text: And He will redeem Israel from all his iniquities.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּֽעֲלֹ֗ות לְדָ֫וִ֥ד יְהוָ֤ה ׀ לֹא־גָבַ֣הּ לִ֭בִּי וְלֹא־רָמ֣וּ עֵינַ֑י וְלֹֽא־הִלַּ֓כְתִּי ׀ בִּגְדֹלֹ֖ות וּבְנִפְלָאֹ֣ות מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. LORD, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty; neither do I exercise myself in things too great, or in things too wonderful for me.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents; of David. LORD, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty; neither do I exercise myself in things too great, or in things too wonderful for me.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־לֹ֤א שִׁוִּ֨יתִי ׀ וְדֹומַ֗מְתִּי נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י כְּ֭גָמֻל עֲלֵ֣י אִמֹּ֑ו כַּגָּמֻ֖ל עָלַ֣י נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; like a weaned child with his mother; my soul is with me like a weaned child.

jps.text: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; like a weaned child with his mother; my soul is with me like a weaned child.

verses.hebrewText: יַחֵ֣ל יִ֝שְׂרָאֵל אֶל־יְהוָ֑ה מֵֽ֝עַתָּ֗ה וְעַד־עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: O Israel, hope in the LORD from this time forth and for ever.

jps.text: O Israel, hope in the LORD from this time forth and for ever.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות זְכֹור־יְהוָ֥ה לְדָוִ֑ד אֵ֝ת כָּל־עֻנֹּותֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. LORD, remember unto David all his affliction;

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. LORD, remember unto David all his affliction;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִ֭שְׁבַּע לַיהוָ֑ה נָ֝דַ֗ר לַאֲבִ֥יר יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: How he swore unto the LORD, and vowed unto the Mighty One of Jacob:

jps.text: How he swore unto the LORD, and vowed unto the Mighty One of Jacob:

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אָ֭בֹא בְּאֹ֣הֶל בֵּיתִ֑י אִם־אֶ֝עֱלֶ֗ה עַל־עֶ֥רֶשׂ יְצוּעָֽי׃
verses.englishText: 'Surely I will not come into the tent of my house, nor go up into the bed that is spread for me;

jps.text: 'Surely I will not come into the tent of my house, nor go up into the bed that is spread for me;

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶתֵּ֣ן שְׁנַ֣ת לְעֵינָ֑י לְֽעַפְעַפַּ֥י תְּנוּמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, nor slumber to mine eyelids;

jps.text: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, nor slumber to mine eyelids;

verses.hebrewText: עַד־אֶמְצָ֣א מָ֭קֹום לַיהוָ֑ה מִ֝שְׁכָּנֹ֗ות לַאֲבִ֥יר יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.englishText: Until I find out a place for the LORD, a dwelling-place for the Mighty One of Jacob.'

jps.text: Until I find out a place for the LORD, a dwelling-place for the Mighty One of Jacob.'

verses.hebrewText: הִנֵּֽה־שְׁמַֽעֲנ֥וּהָ בְאֶפְרָ֑תָה מְ֝צָאנ֗וּהָ בִּשְׂדֵי־יָֽעַר׃
verses.englishText: Lo, we heard of it as being in Ephrath; we found it in the field of the wood.

jps.text: Lo, we heard of it as being in Ephrath; we found it in the field of the wood.

verses.hebrewText: נָבֹ֥ואָה לְמִשְׁכְּנֹותָ֑יו נִ֝שְׁתַּחֲוֶ֗ה לַהֲדֹ֥ם רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Let us go into His dwelling-place; let us worship at His footstool.

jps.text: Let us go into His dwelling-place; let us worship at His footstool.

verses.hebrewText: קוּמָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה לִמְנוּחָתֶ֑ךָ אַ֝תָּ֗ה וַאֲרֹ֥ון עֻזֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Arise, O LORD, unto Thy resting-place; Thou, and the ark of Thy strength.

jps.text: Arise, O LORD, unto Thy resting-place; Thou, and the ark of Thy strength.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּהֲנֶ֥יךָ יִלְבְּשׁוּ־צֶ֑דֶק וַחֲסִידֶ֥יךָ יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let Thy priests be clothed with righteousness; and let Thy saints shout for joy.

jps.text: Let Thy priests be clothed with righteousness; and let Thy saints shout for joy.

verses.hebrewText: בַּ֭עֲבוּר דָּוִ֣ד עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ אַל־תָּ֝שֵׁ֗ב פְּנֵ֣י מְשִׁיחֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: For Thy servant David's sake turn not away the face of Thine anointed.

jps.text: For Thy servant David's sake turn not away the face of Thine anointed.

verses.hebrewText: נִשְׁבַּֽע־יְהוָ֨ה ׀ לְדָוִ֡ד אֱמֶת֮ לֹֽא־יָשׁ֪וּב מִ֫מֶּ֥נָּה מִפְּרִ֥י בִטְנְךָ֑ אָ֝שִׁ֗ית לְכִסֵּא־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD swore unto David in truth; He will not turn back from it: 'Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne.

jps.text: The LORD swore unto David in truth; He will not turn back from it: 'Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne.

verses.hebrewText: אִֽם־יִשְׁמְר֬וּ בָנֶ֨יךָ ׀ בְּרִיתִי֮ וְעֵדֹתִ֥י זֹ֗ו אֲלַ֫מְּדֵ֥ם גַּם־בְּנֵיהֶ֥ם עֲדֵי־עַ֑ד יֵ֝שְׁב֗וּ לְכִסֵּא־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: If thy children keep My covenant and My testimony that I shall teach them, their children also for ever shall sit upon thy throne.'

jps.text: If thy children keep My covenant and My testimony that I shall teach them, their children also for ever shall sit upon thy throne.'

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־בָחַ֣ר יְהוָ֣ה בְּצִיֹּ֑ון אִ֝וָּ֗הּ לְמֹושָׁ֥ב לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD hath chosen Zion; He hath desired it for His habitation:

jps.text: For the LORD hath chosen Zion; He hath desired it for His habitation:

verses.hebrewText: זֹאת־מְנוּחָתִ֥י עֲדֵי־עַ֑ד פֹּֽה־אֵ֝שֵׁ֗ב כִּ֣י אִוִּתִֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: 'This is My resting-place for ever; here will I dwell; for I have desired it.

jps.text: 'This is My resting-place for ever; here will I dwell; for I have desired it.

verses.hebrewText: צֵ֭ידָהּ בָּרֵ֣ךְ אֲבָרֵ֑ךְ אֶ֝בְיֹונֶ֗יהָ אַשְׂבִּ֥יעַֽ לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: I will abundantly bless her provision; I will give her needy bread in plenty.

jps.text: I will abundantly bless her provision; I will give her needy bread in plenty.

verses.hebrewText: וְֽ֭כֹהֲנֶיהָ אַלְבִּ֣ישׁ יֶ֑שַׁע וַ֝חֲסִידֶ֗יהָ רַנֵּ֥ן יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Her priests also will I clothe with salvation; and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.

jps.text: Her priests also will I clothe with salvation; and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁ֤ם אַצְמִ֣יחַ קֶ֣רֶן לְדָוִ֑ד עָרַ֥כְתִּי נֵ֝֗ר לִמְשִׁיחִֽי׃
verses.englishText: There will I make a horn to shoot up unto David, there have I ordered a lamp for Mine anointed.

jps.text: There will I make a horn to shoot up unto David, there have I ordered a lamp for Mine anointed.

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֭ויְבָיו אַלְבִּ֣ישׁ בֹּ֑שֶׁת וְ֝עָלָ֗יו יָצִ֥יץ נִזְרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: His enemies will I clothe with shame; but upon himself shall his crown shine.'

jps.text: His enemies will I clothe with shame; but upon himself shall his crown shine.'

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֥יר הַֽמַּעֲלֹ֗ות לְדָ֫וִ֥ד הִנֵּ֣ה מַה־טֹּ֭וב וּמַה־נָּעִ֑ים שֶׁ֖בֶת אַחִ֣ים גַּם־יָֽחַד׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!

jps.text: A Song of Ascents; of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!

verses.hebrewText: כַּשֶּׁ֤מֶן הַטֹּ֨וב ׀ עַל־הָרֹ֗אשׁ יֹרֵ֗ד עַֽל־הַזָּקָ֥ן זְקַֽן־אַהֲרֹ֑ן שֶׁ֝יֹּרֵ֗ד עַל־פִּ֥י מִדֹּותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: It is like the precious oil upon the head, coming down upon the beard; even Aaron's beard, that cometh down upon the collar of his garments;

jps.text: It is like the precious oil upon the head, coming down upon the beard; even Aaron's beard, that cometh down upon the collar of his garments;

verses.hebrewText: כְּטַל־חֶרְמֹ֗ון שֶׁיֹּרֵד֮ עַל־הַרְרֵ֪י צִ֫יֹּ֥ון כִּ֤י שָׁ֨ם ׀ צִוָּ֣ה יְ֭הוָה אֶת־הַבְּרָכָ֑ה חַ֝יִּ֗ים עַד־הָעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Like the dew of Hermon, that cometh down upon the mountains of Zion; for there the LORD commanded the blessing, even life for ever.

jps.text: Like the dew of Hermon, that cometh down upon the mountains of Zion; for there the LORD commanded the blessing, even life for ever.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲלֹ֥ות הִנֵּ֤ה ׀ בָּרֲכ֣וּ אֶת־יְ֭הוָה כָּל־עַבְדֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה הָעֹמְדִ֥ים בְּבֵית־יְ֝הוָ֗ה בַּלֵּילֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: A Song of Ascents. Behold, bless ye the LORD, all ye servants of the LORD, that stand in the house of the LORD in the night seasons.

jps.text: A Song of Ascents. Behold, bless ye the LORD, all ye servants of the LORD, that stand in the house of the LORD in the night seasons.

verses.hebrewText: שְׂאֽוּ־יְדֵכֶ֥ם קֹ֑דֶשׁ וּ֝בָרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary, and bless ye the LORD.

jps.text: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary, and bless ye the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: יְבָרֶכְךָ֣ יְ֭הוָה מִצִּיֹּ֑ון עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD bless thee out of Zion; even He that made heaven and earth.

jps.text: The LORD bless thee out of Zion; even He that made heaven and earth.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ הַֽ֭לְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה הֽ͏ַ֝לְלוּ עַבְדֵ֥י יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Praise ye the name of the LORD; give praise, O ye servants of the LORD,

jps.text: Hallelujah. Praise ye the name of the LORD; give praise, O ye servants of the LORD,

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֣֭עֹֽמְדִים בְּבֵ֣ית יְהוָ֑ה בְּ֝חַצְרֹ֗ות בֵּ֣ית אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Ye that stand in the house of the LORD, in the courts of the house of our God.

jps.text: Ye that stand in the house of the LORD, in the courts of the house of our God.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭לְלוּ־יָהּ כִּי־טֹ֣וב יְהוָ֑ה זַמְּר֥וּ לִ֝שְׁמֹ֗ו כִּ֣י נָעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Praise ye the LORD, for the LORD is good; sing praises unto His name, for it is pleasant.

jps.text: Praise ye the LORD, for the LORD is good; sing praises unto His name, for it is pleasant.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יַעֲקֹ֗ב בָּחַ֣ר לֹ֣ו יָ֑הּ יִ֝שְׂרָאֵ֗ל לִסְגֻלָּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD hath chosen Jacob unto Himself, and Israel for His own treasure.

jps.text: For the LORD hath chosen Jacob unto Himself, and Israel for His own treasure.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֲנִ֣י יָ֭דַעְתִּי כִּי־גָדֹ֣ול יְהוָ֑ה וַ֝אֲדֹנֵ֗ינוּ מִכָּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: For I know that the LORD is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.

jps.text: For I know that the LORD is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֤ל אֲשֶׁר־חָפֵ֥ץ יְהוָ֗ה עָ֫שָׂ֥ה בַּשָּׁמַ֥יִם וּבָאָ֑רֶץ בַּ֝יַּמִּ֗ים וְכָל־תְּהֹומֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Whatsoever the LORD pleased, that hath He done, in heaven and in earth, in the seas and in all deeps;

jps.text: Whatsoever the LORD pleased, that hath He done, in heaven and in earth, in the seas and in all deeps;

verses.hebrewText: מַֽעֲלֶ֣ה נְשִׂאִים֮ מִקְצֵ֪ה הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ בְּרָקִ֣ים לַמָּטָ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה מֹֽוצֵא־ר֝וּחַ מֵאֹֽוצְרֹותָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Who causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; He maketh lightnings for the rain; He bringeth forth the wind out of His treasuries.

jps.text: Who causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; He maketh lightnings for the rain; He bringeth forth the wind out of His treasuries.

verses.hebrewText: שֶֽׁ֭הִכָּה בְּכֹורֵ֣י מִצְרָ֑יִם מֵ֝אָדָ֗ם עַד־בְּהֵמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who smote the first-born of Egypt, both of man and beast.

jps.text: Who smote the first-born of Egypt, both of man and beast.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁלַ֤ח ׀ אֹתֹ֣ות וּ֭מֹפְתִים בְּתֹוכֵ֣כִי מִצְרָ֑יִם בְּ֝פַרְעֹ֗ה וּבְכָל־עֲבָדָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: He sent signs and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.

jps.text: He sent signs and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.

verses.hebrewText: שֶֽׁ֭הִכָּה גֹּויִ֣ם רַבִּ֑ים וְ֝הָרַ֗ג מְלָכִ֥ים עֲצוּמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Who smote many nations, and slew mighty kings:

jps.text: Who smote many nations, and slew mighty kings:

verses.hebrewText: לְסִיחֹ֤ון ׀ מֶ֤לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֗י וּ֭לְעֹוג מֶ֣לֶךְ הַבָּשָׁ֑ן וּ֝לְכֹ֗ל מַמְלְכֹ֥ות כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.englishText: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan;

jps.text: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan;

verses.hebrewText: וְנָתַ֣ן אַרְצָ֣ם נַחֲלָ֑ה נַ֝חֲלָ֗ה לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל עַמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And gave their land for a heritage, a heritage unto Israel His people.

jps.text: And gave their land for a heritage, a heritage unto Israel His people.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה שִׁמְךָ֣ לְעֹולָ֑ם יְ֝הוָ֗ה זִכְרְךָ֥ לְדֹר־וָדֹֽר׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, Thy name endureth for ever; thy memorial, O LORD, throughout all generations.

jps.text: O LORD, Thy name endureth for ever; thy memorial, O LORD, throughout all generations.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־יָדִ֣ין יְהוָ֣ה עַמֹּ֑ו וְעַל־עֲ֝בָדָ֗יו יִתְנֶחָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD will judge His people, and repent Himself for His servants.

jps.text: For the LORD will judge His people, and repent Himself for His servants.

verses.hebrewText: עֲצַבֵּ֣י הַ֭גֹּויִם כֶּ֣סֶף וְזָהָ֑ב מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗ה יְדֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of men's hands.

jps.text: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of men's hands.

verses.hebrewText: פֶּֽה־לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יְדַבֵּ֑רוּ עֵינַ֥יִם לָ֝הֶ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יִרְאֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;

jps.text: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;

verses.hebrewText: אָזְנַ֣יִם לָ֭הֶם וְלֹ֣א יַאֲזִ֑ינוּ אַ֝֗ף אֵין־יֶשׁ־ר֥וּחַ בְּפִיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They have ears, but they hear not; neither is there any breath in their mouths.

jps.text: They have ears, but they hear not; neither is there any breath in their mouths.

verses.hebrewText: כְּ֭מֹוהֶם יִהְי֣וּ עֹשֵׂיהֶ֑ם כֹּ֭ל אֲשֶׁר־בֹּטֵ֣חַ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: They that make them shall be like unto them; yea, every one that trusteth in them.

jps.text: They that make them shall be like unto them; yea, every one that trusteth in them.

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ית יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל בָּרֲכ֣וּ אֶת־יְהוָ֑ה בֵּ֥ית אַ֝הֲרֹ֗ן בָּרֲכ֥וּ אֶת־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: O house of Israel, bless ye the LORD; O house of Aaron, bless ye the LORD;

jps.text: O house of Israel, bless ye the LORD; O house of Aaron, bless ye the LORD;

verses.hebrewText: בֵּ֣ית הַ֭לֵּוִי בָּרֲכ֣וּ אֶת־יְהוָ֑ה יִֽרְאֵ֥י יְ֝הוָ֗ה בָּרֲכ֥וּ אֶת־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: O house of Levi, bless ye the LORD; ye that fear the LORD, bless ye the LORD.

jps.text: O house of Levi, bless ye the LORD; ye that fear the LORD, bless ye the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: בָּ֘ר֤וּךְ יְהוָ֨ה ׀ מִצִּיֹּ֗ון שֹׁ֘כֵ֤ן יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Blessed be the LORD out of Zion, who dwelleth at Jerusalem. Hallelujah.

jps.text: Blessed be the LORD out of Zion, who dwelleth at Jerusalem. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הֹוד֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה כִּי־טֹ֑וב כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֭ודוּ לֵֽאלֹהֵ֣י הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O give thanks unto the God of gods, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: O give thanks unto the God of gods, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֭ודוּ לַאֲדֹנֵ֣י הָאֲדֹנִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעֹלָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O give thanks unto the Lord of lords, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: O give thanks unto the Lord of lords, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְעֹ֘שֵׂ֤ה נִפְלָאֹ֣ות גְּדֹלֹ֣ות לְבַדֹּ֑ו כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him who alone doeth great wonders, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: To Him who alone doeth great wonders, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְעֹשֵׂ֣ה הַ֭שָּׁמַיִם בִּתְבוּנָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him that by understanding made the heavens, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: To Him that by understanding made the heavens, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְרֹקַ֣ע הָ֭אָרֶץ עַל־הַמָּ֑יִם כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him that spread forth the earth above the waters, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: To Him that spread forth the earth above the waters, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭עֹשֵׂה אֹורִ֣ים גְּדֹלִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him that made great lights, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: To Him that made great lights, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: אֶת־הַ֭שֶּׁמֶשׁ לְמֶמְשֶׁ֣לֶת בַּיֹּ֑ום כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The sun to rule by day, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: The sun to rule by day, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: אֶת־הַיָּרֵ֣חַ וְ֭כֹוכָבִים לְמֶמְשְׁלֹ֣ות בַּלָּ֑יְלָה כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The moon and stars to rule by night, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: The moon and stars to rule by night, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְמַכֵּ֣ה מִ֭צְרַיִם בִּבְכֹורֵיהֶ֑ם כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him that smote Egypt in their first-born, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: To Him that smote Egypt in their first-born, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּוצֵ֣א יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל מִתֹּוכָ֑ם כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And brought out Israel from among them, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: And brought out Israel from among them, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: בְּיָ֣ד חֲ֭זָקָה וּבִזְרֹ֣ועַ נְטוּיָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: With a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: With a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְגֹזֵ֣ר יַם־ס֭וּף לִגְזָרִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him who divided the Red Sea in sunder, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: To Him who divided the Red Sea in sunder, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וְהֶעֱבִ֣יר יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל בְּתֹוכֹ֑ו כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וְנִ֘עֵ֤ר פַּרְעֹ֣ה וְחֵילֹ֣ו בְיַם־ס֑וּף כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְמֹולִ֣יךְ עַ֭מֹּו בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him that led His people through the wilderness, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: To Him that led His people through the wilderness, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭מַכֵּה מְלָכִ֣ים גְּדֹלִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: To Him that smote great kings; for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: To Him that smote great kings; for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וֽ͏ַ֭יַּהֲרֹג מְלָכִ֣ים אַדִּירִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And slew mighty kings, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: And slew mighty kings, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: לְ֭סִיחֹון מֶ֣לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֑י כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Sihon king of the Amorites, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: Sihon king of the Amorites, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וּ֭לְעֹוג מֶ֣לֶךְ הַבָּשָׁ֑ן כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And Og king of Bashan, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: And Og king of Bashan, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וְנָתַ֣ן אַרְצָ֣ם לְנַחֲלָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And gave their land for a heritage, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: And gave their land for a heritage, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: נַ֭חֲלָה לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל עַבְדֹּ֑ו כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Even a heritage unto Israel His servant, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: Even a heritage unto Israel His servant, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: שֶׁ֭בְּשִׁפְלֵנוּ זָ֣כַר לָ֑נוּ כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Who remembered us in our low estate, for His mercy endureth for ever;

jps.text: Who remembered us in our low estate, for His mercy endureth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּפְרְקֵ֥נוּ מִצָּרֵ֑ינוּ כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: And hath delivered us from our adversaries, for His mercy endureth for ever.
