jps.text: And hath delivered us from our adversaries, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: נֹתֵ֣ן לֶ֭חֶם לְכָל־בָּשָׂ֑ר כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Who giveth food to all flesh, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: Who giveth food to all flesh, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֭ודוּ לְאֵ֣ל הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם כִּ֖י לְעֹולָ֣ם חַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: O give thanks unto the God of heaven, for His mercy endureth for ever.

jps.text: O give thanks unto the God of heaven, for His mercy endureth for ever.

verses.hebrewText: עַ֥ל נַהֲרֹ֨ות ׀ בָּבֶ֗ל שָׁ֣ם יָ֭שַׁבְנוּ גַּם־בָּכִ֑ינוּ בְּ֝זָכְרֵ֗נוּ אֶת־צִיֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down, yea, we wept, when we remembered Zion.

jps.text: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down, yea, we wept, when we remembered Zion.

verses.hebrewText: עַֽל־עֲרָבִ֥ים בְּתֹוכָ֑הּ תָּ֝לִ֗ינוּ כִּנֹּרֹותֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Upon the willows in the midst thereof we hanged up our harps.

jps.text: Upon the willows in the midst thereof we hanged up our harps.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י שָׁ֨ם שְֽׁאֵל֪וּנוּ שֹׁובֵ֡ינוּ דִּבְרֵי־שִׁ֭יר וְתֹולָלֵ֣ינוּ שִׂמְחָ֑ה שִׁ֥ירוּ לָ֝֗נוּ מִשִּׁ֥יר צִיֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: For there they that led us captive asked of us words of song, and our tormentors asked of us mirth: 'Sing us one of the songs of Zion.'

jps.text: For there they that led us captive asked of us words of song, and our tormentors asked of us mirth: 'Sing us one of the songs of Zion.'

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֗יךְ נָשִׁ֥יר אֶת־שִׁיר־יְהוָ֑ה עַ֝֗ל אַדְמַ֥ת נֵכָֽר׃
verses.englishText: How shall we sing the LORD'S song in a foreign land?

jps.text: How shall we sing the LORD'S song in a foreign land?

verses.hebrewText: אִֽם־אֶשְׁכָּחֵ֥ךְ יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם תִּשְׁכַּ֥ח יְמִינֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: If I forget thee, O Jerusalem, let my right hand forget her cunning.

jps.text: If I forget thee, O Jerusalem, let my right hand forget her cunning.

verses.hebrewText: תִּדְבַּ֥ק־לְשֹׁונִ֨י ׀ לְחִכִּי֮ אִם־לֹ֪א אֶ֫זְכְּרֵ֥כִי אִם־לֹ֣א אַ֭עֲלֶה אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֑͏ִם עַ֝֗ל רֹ֣אשׁ שִׂמְחָתֽ͏ִי׃
verses.englishText: Let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth, if I remember thee not; if I set not Jerusalem above my chiefest joy.

jps.text: Let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth, if I remember thee not; if I set not Jerusalem above my chiefest joy.

verses.hebrewText: זְכֹ֤ר יְהוָ֨ה ׀ לִבְנֵ֬י אֱדֹ֗ום אֵת֮ יֹ֤ום יְֽרוּשָׁ֫לָ֥͏ִם הָ֭אֹ֣מְרִים עָ֤רוּ ׀ עָ֑רוּ עַ֝֗ד הַיְסֹ֥וד בָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Remember, O LORD, against the children of Edom the day of Jerusalem; who said: 'Rase it, rase it, even to the foundation thereof.'

jps.text: Remember, O LORD, against the children of Edom the day of Jerusalem; who said: 'Rase it, rase it, even to the foundation thereof.'

verses.hebrewText: בַּת־בָּבֶ֗ל הַשְּׁד֫וּדָ֥ה אַשְׁרֵ֥י שֶׁיְשַׁלֶּם־לָ֑ךְ אֶת־גְּ֝מוּלֵ֗ךְ שֶׁגָּמַ֥לְתְּ לָֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: O daughter of Babylon, that art to be destroyed; happy shall he be, that repayeth thee as thou hast served us.

jps.text: O daughter of Babylon, that art to be destroyed; happy shall he be, that repayeth thee as thou hast served us.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֤י ׀ שֶׁיֹּאחֵ֓ז וְנִפֵּ֬ץ אֶֽת־עֹ֝לָלַ֗יִךְ אֶל־הַסָּֽלַע׃
verses.englishText: Happy shall he be, that taketh and dasheth thy little ones against the rock.

jps.text: Happy shall he be, that taketh and dasheth thy little ones against the rock.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ אֹודְךָ֥ בְכָל־לִבִּ֑י נֶ֖גֶד אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֲזַמְּרֶֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. I will give Thee thanks with my whole heart, in the presence of the mighty will I sing praises unto Thee.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. I will give Thee thanks with my whole heart, in the presence of the mighty will I sing praises unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶ֨ה אֶל־הֵיכַ֪ל קָדְשְׁךָ֡ וְאֹ֘ודֶ֤ה אֶת־שְׁמֶ֗ךָ עַל־חַסְדְּךָ֥ וְעַל־אֲמִתֶּ֑ךָ כִּֽי־הִגְדַּ֥לְתָּ עַל־כָּל־שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ אִמְרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: I will bow down toward Thy holy temple, and give thanks unto Thy name for Thy mercy and for Thy truth; for Thou hast magnified Thy word above all Thy name.

jps.text: I will bow down toward Thy holy temple, and give thanks unto Thy name for Thy mercy and for Thy truth; for Thou hast magnified Thy word above all Thy name.

verses.hebrewText: בְּיֹ֣ום קָ֭רָֽאתִי וַֽתַּעֲנֵ֑נִי תַּרְהִבֵ֖נִי בְנַפְשִׁ֣י עֹֽז׃
verses.englishText: In the day that I called, Thou didst answer me; Thou didst encourage me in my soul with strength.

jps.text: In the day that I called, Thou didst answer me; Thou didst encourage me in my soul with strength.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּךָ יְ֭הוָה כָּל־מַלְכֵי־אָ֑רֶץ כִּ֥י שָׁ֝מְע֗וּ אִמְרֵי־פִֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: All the kings of the earth shall give Thee thanks, O LORD, for they have heard the words of Thy mouth.

jps.text: All the kings of the earth shall give Thee thanks, O LORD, for they have heard the words of Thy mouth.

verses.hebrewText: וְ֭יָשִׁירוּ בְּדַרְכֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה כִּ֥י גָ֝דֹ֗ול כְּבֹ֣וד יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Yea, they shall sing of the ways of the LORD; for great is the glory of the LORD.

jps.text: Yea, they shall sing of the ways of the LORD; for great is the glory of the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: כִּי־רָ֣ם יְ֭הוָה וְשָׁפָ֣ל יִרְאֶ֑ה וְ֝גָבֹ֗הַּ מִמֶּרְחָ֥ק יְיֵדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: For though the LORD be high, yet regardeth He the lowly, and the haughty He knoweth from afar.

jps.text: For though the LORD be high, yet regardeth He the lowly, and the haughty He knoweth from afar.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֵלֵ֤ךְ ׀ בְּקֶ֥רֶב צָרָ֗ה תְּחַ֫יֵּ֥נִי עַ֤ל אַ֣ף אֹ֖יְבַי תִּשְׁלַ֣ח יָדֶ֑ךָ וְתֹ֖ושִׁיעֵ֣נִי יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, Thou quickenest me; Thou stretchest forth Thy hand against the wrath of mine enemies, and Thy right hand doth save me.

jps.text: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, Thou quickenest me; Thou stretchest forth Thy hand against the wrath of mine enemies, and Thy right hand doth save me.

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָה֮ יִגְמֹ֪ר בַּ֫עֲדִ֥י יְ֭הוָה חַסְדְּךָ֣ לְעֹולָ֑ם מַעֲשֵׂ֖י יָדֶ֣יךָ אַל־תֶּֽרֶף׃
verses.englishText: The LORD will accomplish that which concerneth me; Thy mercy, O LORD, endureth for ever; forsake not the work of Thine own hands.

jps.text: The LORD will accomplish that which concerneth me; Thy mercy, O LORD, endureth for ever; forsake not the work of Thine own hands.

verses.hebrewText: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִ֣ד מִזְמֹ֑ור יְהוָ֥ה חֲ֝קַרְתַּ֗נִי וַתֵּדָֽע׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. O LORD, Thou hast searched me, and known me.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. O LORD, Thou hast searched me, and known me.

verses.hebrewText: אַתָּ֣ה יָ֭דַעְתָּ שִׁבְתִּ֣י וְקוּמִ֑י בַּ֥נְתָּה לְ֝רֵעִ֗י מֵרָחֹֽוק׃
verses.englishText: Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, Thou understandest my thought afar off.

jps.text: Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, Thou understandest my thought afar off.

verses.hebrewText: אָרְחִ֣י וְרִבְעִ֣י זֵרִ֑יתָ וְֽכָל־דְּרָכַ֥י הִסְכַּֽנְתָּה׃
verses.englishText: Thou measurest my going about and my lying down, and art acquainted with all my ways.

jps.text: Thou measurest my going about and my lying down, and art acquainted with all my ways.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵ֣ין מִ֭לָּה בִּלְשֹׁונִ֑י הֵ֥ן יְ֝הוָ֗ה יָדַ֥עְתָּ כֻלָּֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: For there is not a word in my tongue, but, lo, O LORD, Thou knowest it altogether.

jps.text: For there is not a word in my tongue, but, lo, O LORD, Thou knowest it altogether.

verses.hebrewText: אָחֹ֣ור וָקֶ֣דֶם צַרְתָּ֑נִי וַתָּ֖שֶׁת עָלַ֣י כַּפֶּֽכָה׃
verses.englishText: Thou hast hemmed me in behind and before, and laid Thy hand upon me.

jps.text: Thou hast hemmed me in behind and before, and laid Thy hand upon me.

verses.hebrewText: *פִּלְאִיָּה (פְּלִ֣יאָֽה) דַ֣עַת מִמֶּ֑נִּי נִ֝שְׂגְּבָ֗ה לֹא־א֥וּכַֽל לָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; too high, I cannot attain unto it.

jps.text: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; too high, I cannot attain unto it.

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭נָ֥ה אֵלֵ֣ךְ מֵרוּחֶ֑ךָ וְ֝אָ֗נָה מִפָּנֶ֥יךָ אֶבְרָֽח׃
verses.englishText: Whither shall I go from Thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from Thy presence?

jps.text: Whither shall I go from Thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from Thy presence?

verses.hebrewText: אִם־אֶסַּ֣ק שָׁ֭מַיִם שָׁ֣ם אָ֑תָּה וְאַצִּ֖יעָה שְּׁאֹ֣ול הִנֶּֽךָּ׃
verses.englishText: If I ascend up into heaven, Thou art there; if I make my bed in the nether-world, behold, Thou art there.

jps.text: If I ascend up into heaven, Thou art there; if I make my bed in the nether-world, behold, Thou art there.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשָּׂ֥א כַנְפֵי־שָׁ֑חַר אֶ֝שְׁכְּנָ֗ה בְּאַחֲרִ֥ית יָֽם׃
verses.englishText: If I take the wings of the morning, and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea;

jps.text: If I take the wings of the morning, and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea;

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־שָׁ֭ם יָדְךָ֣ תַנְחֵ֑נִי וְֽתֹאחֲזֵ֥נִי יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: Even there would Thy hand lead me, and Thy right hand would hold me.

jps.text: Even there would Thy hand lead me, and Thy right hand would hold me.

verses.hebrewText: וָ֭אֹמַר אַךְ־חֹ֣שֶׁךְ יְשׁוּפֵ֑נִי וְ֝לַ֗יְלָה אֹ֣ור בַּעֲדֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: And if I say: 'Surely the darkness shall envelop me, and the light about me shall be night';

jps.text: And if I say: 'Surely the darkness shall envelop me, and the light about me shall be night';

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־חֹשֶׁךְ֮ לֹֽא־יַחְשִׁ֪יךְ מִ֫מֶּ֥ךָ וְ֭לַיְלָה כַּיֹּ֣ום יָאִ֑יר כַּ֝חֲשֵׁיכָ֗ה כָּאֹורָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Even the darkness is not too dark for Thee, but the night shineth as the day; the darkness is even as the light.

jps.text: Even the darkness is not too dark for Thee, but the night shineth as the day; the darkness is even as the light.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה קָנִ֣יתָ כִלְיֹתָ֑י תְּ֝סֻכֵּ֗נִי בְּבֶ֣טֶן אִמִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: For Thou hast made my reins; Thou hast knit me together in my mother's womb.

jps.text: For Thou hast made my reins; Thou hast knit me together in my mother's womb.

verses.hebrewText: אֹֽודְךָ֗ עַ֤ל כִּ֥י נֹורָאֹ֗ות נִ֫פְלֵ֥יתִי נִפְלָאִ֥ים מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ וְ֝נַפְשִׁ֗י יֹדַ֥עַת מְאֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; wonderful are Thy works; and that my soul knoweth right well.

jps.text: I will give thanks unto Thee, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; wonderful are Thy works; and that my soul knoweth right well.

verses.hebrewText: לֹא־נִכְחַ֥ד עָצְמִ֗י מִ֫מֶּ֥ךָּ אֲשֶׁר־עֻשֵּׂ֥יתִי בַסֵּ֑תֶר רֻ֝קַּ֗מְתִּי בְּֽתַחְתִּיֹּ֥ות אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: My frame was not hidden from Thee, when I was made in secret, and curiously wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.

jps.text: My frame was not hidden from Thee, when I was made in secret, and curiously wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.

verses.hebrewText: גָּלְמִ֤י ׀ רָ֘א֤וּ עֵינֶ֗יךָ וְעַֽל־סִפְרְךָ֮ כֻּלָּ֪ם יִכָּ֫תֵ֥בוּ יָמִ֥ים יֻצָּ֑רוּ *וְלֹא (וְלֹ֖ו) אֶחָ֣ד בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Thine eyes did see mine unformed substance, and in Thy book they were all written — even the days that were fashioned, when as yet there was none of them.

jps.text: Thine eyes did see mine unformed substance, and in Thy book they were all written — even the days that were fashioned, when as yet there was none of them.

verses.hebrewText: וְלִ֗י מַה־יָּקְר֣וּ רֵעֶ֣יךָ אֵ֑ל מֶ֥ה עָ֝צְמוּ רָאשֵׁיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: How weighty also are Thy thoughts unto me, O God! How great is the sum of them!

jps.text: How weighty also are Thy thoughts unto me, O God! How great is the sum of them!

verses.hebrewText: אֶ֭סְפְּרֵם מֵחֹ֣ול יִרְבּ֑וּן הֱ֝קִיצֹ֗תִי וְעֹודִ֥י עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: If I would count them, they are more in number than the sand; were I to come to the end of them, I would still be with Thee.

jps.text: If I would count them, they are more in number than the sand; were I to come to the end of them, I would still be with Thee.

verses.hebrewText: אִם־תִּקְטֹ֖ל אֱלֹ֥והַּ ׀ רָשָׁ֑ע וְאַנְשֵׁ֥י דָ֝מִ֗ים ס֣וּרוּ מֶֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: If Thou but wouldest slay the wicked, O God — depart from me therefore, ye men of blood;

jps.text: If Thou but wouldest slay the wicked, O God — depart from me therefore, ye men of blood;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֹ֭אמְרֻךָ לִמְזִמָּ֑ה נָשֻׂ֖א לַשָּׁ֣וְא עָרֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Who utter Thy name with wicked thought, they take it for falsehood, even Thine enemies —

jps.text: Who utter Thy name with wicked thought, they take it for falsehood, even Thine enemies —

verses.hebrewText: הֲלֹֽוא־מְשַׂנְאֶ֖יךָ יְהוָ֥ה ׀ אֶשְׂנָ֑א וּ֝בִתְקֹומְמֶ֗יךָ אֶתְקֹוטָֽט׃
verses.englishText: Do not I hate them, O LORD, that hate Thee? And do not I strive with those that rise up against Thee?

jps.text: Do not I hate them, O LORD, that hate Thee? And do not I strive with those that rise up against Thee?

verses.hebrewText: תַּכְלִ֣ית שִׂנְאָ֣ה שְׂנֵאתִ֑ים לְ֝אֹויְבִ֗ים הָ֣יוּ לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I hate them with utmost hatred; I count them mine enemies.

jps.text: I hate them with utmost hatred; I count them mine enemies.

verses.hebrewText: חָקְרֵ֣נִי אֵ֭ל וְדַ֣ע לְבָבִ֑י בְּ֝חָנֵ֗נִי וְדַ֣ע שַׂרְעַפָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: Search me, O God, and know my heart, try me, and know my thoughts;

jps.text: Search me, O God, and know my heart, try me, and know my thoughts;

verses.hebrewText: וּרְאֵ֗ה אִם־דֶּֽרֶךְ־עֹ֥צֶב בִּ֑י וּ֝נְחֵ֗נִי בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And see if there be any way in me that is grievous, and lead me in the way everlasting.

jps.text: And see if there be any way in me that is grievous, and lead me in the way everlasting.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ מִזְמֹ֥ור לְדָוִֽד׃
verses.englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

jps.text: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.

verses.hebrewText: חַלְּצֵ֣נִי יְ֭הוָה מֵאָדָ֣ם רָ֑ע מֵאִ֖ישׁ חֲמָסִ֣ים תִּנְצְרֵֽנִי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me, O LORD, from the evil man; preserve me from the violent man;

jps.text: Deliver me, O LORD, from the evil man; preserve me from the violent man;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר חָשְׁב֣וּ רָעֹ֣ות בְּלֵ֑ב כָּל־יֹ֝֗ום יָג֥וּרוּ מִלְחָמֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Who devise evil things in their heart; every day do they stir up wars.

jps.text: Who devise evil things in their heart; every day do they stir up wars.

verses.hebrewText: שָֽׁנֲנ֣וּ לְשֹׁונָם֮ כְּֽמֹו־נָ֫חָ֥שׁ חֲמַ֥ת עַכְשׁ֑וּב תַּ֖חַת שְׂפָתֵ֣ימֹו סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: They have sharpened their tongue like a serpent; vipers' venom is under their lips. Selah

jps.text: They have sharpened their tongue like a serpent; vipers' venom is under their lips. Selah

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמְרֵ֤נִי יְהוָ֨ה ׀ מִ֘ידֵ֤י רָשָׁ֗ע מֵאִ֣ישׁ חֲמָסִ֣ים תִּנְצְרֵ֑נִי אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָ֝שְׁב֗וּ לִדְחֹ֥ות פְּעָמָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Keep me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from the violent man; who have purposed to make my steps slip.

jps.text: Keep me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from the violent man; who have purposed to make my steps slip.

verses.hebrewText: טָֽמְנֽוּ־גֵאִ֨ים ׀ פַּ֡ח לִ֗י וַחֲבָלִ֗ים פָּ֣רְשׂוּ רֶ֭שֶׁת לְיַד־מַעְגָּ֑ל מֹקְשִׁ֖ים שָֽׁתוּ־לִ֣י סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: The proud have hid a snare for me, and cords; they have spread a net by the wayside; they have set gins for me. Selah

jps.text: The proud have hid a snare for me, and cords; they have spread a net by the wayside; they have set gins for me. Selah

verses.hebrewText: אָמַ֣רְתִּי לַ֭יהוָה אֵ֣לִי אָ֑תָּה הַאֲזִ֥ינָה יְ֝הוָ֗ה קֹ֣ול תַּחֲנוּנָֽי׃
verses.englishText: I have said unto the LORD: 'Thou art my God'; give ear, O LORD, unto the voice of my supplications.

jps.text: I have said unto the LORD: 'Thou art my God'; give ear, O LORD, unto the voice of my supplications.

verses.hebrewText: יְהֹוִ֣ה אֲ֭דֹנָי עֹ֣ז יְשׁוּעָתִ֑י סַכֹּ֥תָה לְ֝רֹאשִׁ֗י בְּיֹ֣ום נָֽשֶׁק׃
verses.englishText: O GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, who hast screened my head in the day of battle,

jps.text: O GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, who hast screened my head in the day of battle,

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּתֵּ֣ן יְ֭הוָה מַאֲוַיֵּ֣י רָשָׁ֑ע זְמָמֹ֥ו אַל־תָּ֝פֵ֗ק יָר֥וּמוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; further not his evil device, so that they exalt themselves. Selah

jps.text: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; further not his evil device, so that they exalt themselves. Selah

verses.hebrewText: רֹ֥אשׁ מְסִבָּ֑י עֲמַ֖ל שְׂפָתֵ֣ימֹו *יְכַסּוּמֹו (יְכַסֵּֽמֹו)׃
verses.englishText: As for the head of those that compass me about, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.

jps.text: As for the head of those that compass me about, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.

verses.hebrewText: *יָמִיטוּ (יִמֹּ֥וטוּ) עֲלֵיהֶ֗ם גֶּֽחָ֫לִ֥ים בָּאֵ֥שׁ יַפִּלֵ֑ם בְּ֝מַהֲמֹרֹ֗ות בַּֽל־יָקֽוּמוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let burning coals fall upon them; let them be cast into the fire, into deep pits, that they rise not up again.

jps.text: Let burning coals fall upon them; let them be cast into the fire, into deep pits, that they rise not up again.

verses.hebrewText: אִ֥ישׁ לָשֹׁון֮ בַּל־יִכֹּ֪ון בָּ֫אָ֥רֶץ אִישׁ־חָמָ֥ס רָ֑ע יְ֝צוּדֶ֗נּוּ לְמַדְחֵפֹֽת׃
verses.englishText: A slanderer shall not be established in the earth; the violent and evil man shall be hunted with thrust upon thrust.

jps.text: A slanderer shall not be established in the earth; the violent and evil man shall be hunted with thrust upon thrust.

verses.hebrewText: *יָדַעְתָּ (יָדַ֗עְתִּי) כִּֽי־יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה יְ֭הוָה דִּ֣ין עָנִ֑י מִ֝שְׁפַּ֗ט אֶבְיֹנִֽים׃
verses.englishText: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the poor, and the right of the needy.

jps.text: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the poor, and the right of the needy.

verses.hebrewText: אַ֣ךְ צַ֭דִּיקִים יֹוד֣וּ לִשְׁמֶ֑ךָ יֵשְׁב֥וּ יְ֝שָׁרִ֗ים אֶת־פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.englishText: Surely the righteous shall give thanks unto Thy name; the upright shall dwell in Thy presence.

jps.text: Surely the righteous shall give thanks unto Thy name; the upright shall dwell in Thy presence.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְדָ֫וִ֥ד יְהוָ֣ה קְ֭רָאתִיךָ ח֣וּשָׁה לִּ֑י הַאֲזִ֥ינָה קֹ֝ולִ֗י בְּקָרְאִי־לָֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. LORD, I have called Thee; make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I call unto Thee.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. LORD, I have called Thee; make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I call unto Thee.

verses.hebrewText: תִּכֹּ֤ון תְּפִלָּתִ֣י קְטֹ֣רֶת לְפָנֶ֑יךָ מַֽשְׂאַ֥ת כַּ֝פַּ֗י מִנְחַת־עָֽרֶב׃
verses.englishText: Let my prayer be set forth as incense before Thee, the lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice.

jps.text: Let my prayer be set forth as incense before Thee, the lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁיתָ֣ה יְ֭הוָה שָׁמְרָ֣ה לְפִ֑י נִ֝צְּרָ֗ה עַל־דַּ֥ל שְׂפָתָֽי׃
verses.englishText: Set a guard, O LORD, to my mouth; keep watch at the door of my lips.

jps.text: Set a guard, O LORD, to my mouth; keep watch at the door of my lips.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תַּט־לִבִּ֨י לְדָבָ֪ר ׀ רָ֡ע לְהִתְעֹ֘ולֵ֤ל עֲלִלֹ֨ות ׀ בְּרֶ֗שַׁע אֶת־אִישִׁ֥ים פֹּֽעֲלֵי־אָ֑וֶן וּבַל־אֶ֝לְחַ֗ם בְּמַנְעַמֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Incline not my heart to any evil thing, to be occupied in deeds of wickedness with men that work iniquity; and let me not eat of their dainties.

jps.text: Incline not my heart to any evil thing, to be occupied in deeds of wickedness with men that work iniquity; and let me not eat of their dainties.

verses.hebrewText: יֶֽהֶלְמֵֽנִי־צַדִּ֨יק ׀ חֶ֡סֶד וְֽיֹוכִיחֵ֗נִי שֶׁ֣מֶן רֹ֭אשׁ אַל־יָנִ֣י רֹאשִׁ֑י כִּי־עֹ֥וד וּ֝תְפִלָּתִ֗י בְּרָעֹותֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let the righteous smite me in kindness, and correct me; oil so choice let not my head refuse; for still is my prayer because of their wickedness.

jps.text: Let the righteous smite me in kindness, and correct me; oil so choice let not my head refuse; for still is my prayer because of their wickedness.

verses.hebrewText: נִשְׁמְט֣וּ בִֽידֵי־סֶ֭לַע שֹׁפְטֵיהֶ֑ם וְשָׁמְע֥וּ אֲ֝מָרַ֗י כִּ֣י נָעֵֽמוּ׃
verses.englishText: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock; and they shall hear my words, that they are sweet.

jps.text: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock; and they shall hear my words, that they are sweet.

verses.hebrewText: כְּמֹ֤ו פֹלֵ֣חַ וּבֹקֵ֣עַ בָּאָ֑רֶץ נִפְזְר֥וּ עֲ֝צָמֵ֗ינוּ לְפִ֣י שְׁאֹֽול׃
verses.englishText: As when one cleaveth and breaketh up the earth, our bones are scattered at the grave's mouth.

jps.text: As when one cleaveth and breaketh up the earth, our bones are scattered at the grave's mouth.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י אֵלֶ֨יךָ ׀ יְהוִ֣ה אֲדֹנָ֣י עֵינָ֑י בְּכָ֥ה חָ֝סִ֗יתִי אַל־תְּעַ֥ר נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: For mine eyes are unto Thee, O GOD the Lord; in Thee have I taken refuge, O pour not out my soul.

jps.text: For mine eyes are unto Thee, O GOD the Lord; in Thee have I taken refuge, O pour not out my soul.

verses.hebrewText: שָׁמְרֵ֗נִי מִ֣ידֵי פַ֭ח יָ֣קְשׁוּ לִ֑י וּ֝מֹקְשֹׁ֗ות פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.englishText: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me, and from the gins of the workers of iniquity.

jps.text: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me, and from the gins of the workers of iniquity.

verses.hebrewText: יִפְּל֣וּ בְמַכְמֹרָ֣יו רְשָׁעִ֑ים יַ֥חַד אָ֝נֹכִ֗י עַֽד־אֶעֱבֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, whilst I withal escape.

jps.text: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, whilst I withal escape.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׂכִּ֥יל לְדָוִ֑ד בִּהְיֹותֹ֖ו בַמְּעָרָ֣ה תְפִלָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Maschil of David, when he was in the cave; a Prayer.

jps.text: Maschil of David, when he was in the cave; a Prayer.

verses.hebrewText: קֹ֭ולִי אֶל־יְהוָ֣ה אֶזְעָ֑ק קֹ֝ולִ֗י אֶל־יְהוָ֥ה אֶתְחַנָּֽן׃
verses.englishText: With my voice I cry unto the LORD; with my voice I make supplication unto the LORD.

jps.text: With my voice I cry unto the LORD; with my voice I make supplication unto the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: אֶשְׁפֹּ֣ךְ לְפָנָ֣יו שִׂיחִ֑י צָ֝רָתִ֗י לְפָנָ֥יו אַגִּֽיד׃
verses.englishText: I pour out my complaint before Him, I declare before Him my trouble;

jps.text: I pour out my complaint before Him, I declare before Him my trouble;

verses.hebrewText: בְּהִתְעַטֵּ֬ף עָלַ֨י ׀ רוּחִ֗י וְאַתָּה֮ יָדַ֪עְתָּ נְֽתִיבָ֫תִ֥י בְּאֹֽרַח־ז֥וּ אֲהַלֵּ֑ךְ טָמְנ֖וּ פַ֣ח לִֽי׃
verses.englishText: When my spirit fainteth within me — Thou knowest my path — in the way wherein I walk have they hidden a snare for me.

jps.text: When my spirit fainteth within me — Thou knowest my path — in the way wherein I walk have they hidden a snare for me.

verses.hebrewText: הַבֵּ֤יט יָמִ֨ין ׀ וּרְאֵה֮ וְאֵֽין־לִ֪י מַ֫כִּ֥יר אָבַ֣ד מָנֹ֣וס מִמֶּ֑נִּי אֵ֖ין דֹּורֵ֣שׁ לְנַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Look on my right hand, and see, for there is no man that knoweth me; I have no way to flee; no man careth for my soul.

jps.text: Look on my right hand, and see, for there is no man that knoweth me; I have no way to flee; no man careth for my soul.

verses.hebrewText: זָעַ֥קְתִּי אֵלֶ֗יךָ יְה֫וָ֥ה אָ֭מַרְתִּי אַתָּ֣ה מַחְסִ֑י חֶ֝לְקִ֗י בְּאֶ֣רֶץ הַֽחַיִּים׃
verses.englishText: I have cried unto Thee, O LORD; I have said: 'Thou art my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.'

jps.text: I have cried unto Thee, O LORD; I have said: 'Thou art my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.'

verses.hebrewText: הַקְשִׁ֤יבָה ׀ אֶֽל־רִנָּתִי֮ כִּֽי־דַלֹּ֪ותִ֫י מְאֹ֥ד הַצִּילֵ֥נִי מֵרֹדְפַ֑י כִּ֖י אָמְצ֣וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.englishText: Attend unto my cry; for I am brought very low; deliver me from my persecutors; for they are too strong for me.

jps.text: Attend unto my cry; for I am brought very low; deliver me from my persecutors; for they are too strong for me.

verses.hebrewText: הֹ֘וצִ֤יאָה מִמַּסְגֵּ֨ר ׀ נַפְשִׁי֮ לְהֹודֹ֪ות אֶת־שְׁ֫מֶ֥ךָ בִּ֭י יַכְתִּ֣רוּ צַדִּיקִ֑ים כִּ֖י תִגְמֹ֣ל עָלֽ͏ָי׃
verses.englishText: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may give thanks unto Thy name; the righteous shall crown themselves because of me; for Thou wilt deal bountifully with me.

jps.text: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may give thanks unto Thy name; the righteous shall crown themselves because of me; for Thou wilt deal bountifully with me.

verses.hebrewText: מִזְמֹ֗ור לְדָ֫וִ֥ד יְהוָ֤ה ׀ שְׁמַ֬ע תְּפִלָּתִ֗י הַאֲזִ֥ינָה אֶל־תַּחֲנוּנַ֑י בֶּאֱמֻנָתְךָ֥ עֲ֝נֵ֗נִי בְּצִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. O LORD, hear my prayer, give ear to my supplications; in Thy faithfulness answer me, and in Thy righteousness.

jps.text: A Psalm of David. O LORD, hear my prayer, give ear to my supplications; in Thy faithfulness answer me, and in Thy righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַל־תָּבֹ֣וא בְ֭מִשְׁפָּט אֶת־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹֽא־יִצְדַּ֖ק לְפָנֶ֣יךָ כָל־חָֽי׃
verses.englishText: And enter not into judgment with Thy servant; for in Thy sight shall no man living be justified.

jps.text: And enter not into judgment with Thy servant; for in Thy sight shall no man living be justified.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֥י רָ֘דַ֤ף אֹויֵ֨ב ׀ נַפְשִׁ֗י דִּכָּ֣א לָ֭אָרֶץ חַיָּתִ֑י הֹושִׁיבַ֥נִי בְ֝מַחֲשַׁכִּ֗ים כְּמֵתֵ֥י עֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; he hath crushed my life down to the ground; he hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.

jps.text: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; he hath crushed my life down to the ground; he hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּתְעַטֵּ֣ף עָלַ֣י רוּחִ֑י בְּ֝תֹוכִ֗י יִשְׁתֹּומֵ֥ם לִבִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: And my spirit fainteth within me; my heart within me is appalled.

jps.text: And my spirit fainteth within me; my heart within me is appalled.

verses.hebrewText: זָ֘כַ֤רְתִּי יָמִ֨ים ׀ מִקֶּ֗דֶם הָגִ֥יתִי בְכָל־פָּעֳלֶ֑ךָ בְּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֖ה יָדֶ֣יךָ אֲשֹׂוחֵֽחַ׃
verses.englishText: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all Thy doing; I muse on the work of Thy hands.

jps.text: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all Thy doing; I muse on the work of Thy hands.

verses.hebrewText: פֵּרַ֣שְׂתִּי יָדַ֣י אֵלֶ֑יךָ נַפְשִׁ֓י ׀ כְּאֶֽרֶץ־עֲיֵפָ֖ה לְךָ֣ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.englishText: I spread forth my hands unto Thee; my soul thirsteth after Thee, as a weary land. Selah

jps.text: I spread forth my hands unto Thee; my soul thirsteth after Thee, as a weary land. Selah

verses.hebrewText: מַ֘הֵ֤ר עֲנֵ֨נִי ׀ יְהוָה֮ כָּלְתָ֪ה ר֫וּחִ֥י אַל־תַּסְתֵּ֣ר פָּנֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּ֑נִּי וְ֝נִמְשַׁ֗לְתִּי עִם־יֹ֥רְדֵי בֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Answer me speedily, O LORD, my spirit faileth; hide not Thy face from me; lest I become like them that go down into the pit.

jps.text: Answer me speedily, O LORD, my spirit faileth; hide not Thy face from me; lest I become like them that go down into the pit.

verses.hebrewText: הַשְׁמִ֘יעֵ֤נִי בַבֹּ֨קֶר ׀ חַסְדֶּךָ֮ כִּֽי־בְךָ֪ בָ֫טָ֥חְתִּי הֹודִיעֵ֗נִי דֶּֽרֶךְ־ז֥וּ אֵלֵ֑ךְ כִּֽי־אֵ֝לֶיךָ נָשָׂ֥אתִי נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Cause me to hear Thy lovingkindness in the morning, for in Thee do I trust; cause me to know the way wherein I should walk, for unto Thee have I lifted up my soul.

jps.text: Cause me to hear Thy lovingkindness in the morning, for in Thee do I trust; cause me to know the way wherein I should walk, for unto Thee have I lifted up my soul.

verses.hebrewText: הַצִּילֵ֖נִי מֵאֹיְבַ֥י ׀ יְהוָ֗ה אֵלֶ֥יךָ כִסִּֽתִי׃
verses.englishText: Deliver me from mine enemies, O LORD; with Thee have I hidden myself.

jps.text: Deliver me from mine enemies, O LORD; with Thee have I hidden myself.

verses.hebrewText: לַמְּדֵ֤נִי ׀ לַֽעֲשֹׂ֣ות רְצֹונֶךָ֮ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֪ה אֱלֹ֫והָ֥י רוּחֲךָ֥ טֹובָ֑ה תַּ֝נְחֵ֗נִי בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִישֹֽׁור׃
verses.englishText: Teach me to do Thy will, for Thou art my God; let Thy good spirit lead me in an even land.

jps.text: Teach me to do Thy will, for Thou art my God; let Thy good spirit lead me in an even land.

verses.hebrewText: לְמַֽעַן־שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהוָ֣ה תְּחַיֵּ֑נִי בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֓ ׀ תֹוצִ֖יא מִצָּרָ֣ה נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: For Thy name's sake, O LORD, quicken me; in Thy righteousness bring my soul out of trouble.

jps.text: For Thy name's sake, O LORD, quicken me; in Thy righteousness bring my soul out of trouble.

verses.hebrewText: וּֽבְחַסְדְּךָ֮ תַּצְמִ֪ית אֹ֫יְבָ֥י וְֽ֭הַאֲבַדְתָּ כָּל־צֹרֲרֵ֣י נַפְשִׁ֑י כִּ֝֗י אֲנִ֣י עַבְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.englishText: And in Thy mercy cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that harass my soul; for I am Thy servant.

jps.text: And in Thy mercy cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that harass my soul; for I am Thy servant.

verses.hebrewText: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ בָּ֘ר֤וּךְ יְהוָ֨ה ׀ צוּרִ֗י הַֽמְלַמֵּ֣ד יָדַ֣י לַקְרָ֑ב אֶ֝צְבְּעֹותַ֗י לַמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of David. Blessed be the LORD my Rock, who traineth my hands for war, and my fingers for battle;

jps.text: A Psalm of David. Blessed be the LORD my Rock, who traineth my hands for war, and my fingers for battle;

verses.hebrewText: חַסְדִּ֥י וּמְצוּדָתִי֮ מִשְׂגַּבִּ֪י וּֽמְפַלְטִ֫י לִ֥י מָ֭גִנִּי וּבֹ֣ו חָסִ֑יתִי הָרֹודֵ֖ד עַמִּ֣י תַחְתָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: My lovingkindness, and my fortress, my high tower, and my deliverer; my shield, and He in whom I take refuge; who subdueth my people under me.

jps.text: My lovingkindness, and my fortress, my high tower, and my deliverer; my shield, and He in whom I take refuge; who subdueth my people under me.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽהוָ֗ה מָה־אָ֭דָם וַתֵּדָעֵ֑הוּ בֶּן־אֱ֝נֹ֗ושׁ וַֽתְּחַשְּׁבֵֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: LORD, what is man, that Thou takest knowledge of him? or the son of man, that Thou makest account of him?

jps.text: LORD, what is man, that Thou takest knowledge of him? or the son of man, that Thou makest account of him?

verses.hebrewText: אָ֭דָם לַהֶ֣בֶל דָּמָ֑ה יָ֝מָ֗יו כְּצֵ֣ל עֹובֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Man is like unto a breath; his days are as a shadow that passeth away.

jps.text: Man is like unto a breath; his days are as a shadow that passeth away.

verses.hebrewText: יְ֭הוָה הַט־שָׁמֶ֣יךָ וְתֵרֵ֑ד גַּ֖ע בֶּהָרִ֣ים וֽ͏ְיֶעֱשָֽׁנוּ׃
verses.englishText: O LORD, bow Thy heavens, and come down; touch the mountains, that they may smoke.

jps.text: O LORD, bow Thy heavens, and come down; touch the mountains, that they may smoke.

verses.hebrewText: בְּרֹ֣וק בָּ֭רָק וּתְפִיצֵ֑ם שְׁלַ֥ח חִ֝צֶּ֗יךָ וּתְהֻמֵּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Cast forth lightning, and scatter them; send out Thine arrows, and discomfit them.

jps.text: Cast forth lightning, and scatter them; send out Thine arrows, and discomfit them.

verses.hebrewText: שְׁלַ֥ח יָדֶ֗יךָ מִמָּ֫רֹ֥ום פְּצֵ֣נִי וְ֭הַצִּילֵנִי מִמַּ֣יִם רַבִּ֑ים מִ֝יַּ֗ד בְּנֵ֣י נֵכָֽר׃
verses.englishText: Stretch forth Thy hands from on high; rescue me, and deliver me out of many waters, out of the hand of strangers;

jps.text: Stretch forth Thy hands from on high; rescue me, and deliver me out of many waters, out of the hand of strangers;

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֣ר פִּ֭יהֶם דִּבֶּר־שָׁ֑וְא וִֽ֝ימִינָ֗ם יְמִ֣ין שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: Whose mouth speaketh falsehood, and their right hand is a right hand of lying.

jps.text: Whose mouth speaketh falsehood, and their right hand is a right hand of lying.

verses.hebrewText: אֱ‍ֽלֹהִ֗ים שִׁ֣יר חָ֭דָשׁ אָשִׁ֣ירָה לָּ֑ךְ בְּנֵ֥בֶל עָ֝שֹׂ֗ור אֲזַמְּרָה־לָּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: O God, I will sing a new song unto Thee, upon a psaltery of ten strings will I sing praises unto Thee;

jps.text: O God, I will sing a new song unto Thee, upon a psaltery of ten strings will I sing praises unto Thee;

verses.hebrewText: הַנֹּותֵ֥ן תְּשׁוּעָ֗ה לַמְּלָ֫כִ֥ים הַ֭פֹּוצֶה אֶת־דָּוִ֥ד עַבְדֹּ֗ו מֵחֶ֥רֶב רָעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Who givest salvation unto kings, who rescuest David Thy servant from the hurtful sword.

jps.text: Who givest salvation unto kings, who rescuest David Thy servant from the hurtful sword.

verses.hebrewText: פְּצֵ֥נִי וְהַצִּילֵנִי֮ מִיַּ֪ד בְּֽנֵי־נֵ֫כָ֥ר אֲשֶׁ֣ר פִּ֭יהֶם דִּבֶּר־שָׁ֑וְא וִֽ֝ימִינָ֗ם יְמִ֣ין שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.englishText: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hand of strangers, whose mouth speaketh falsehood, and their right hand is a right hand of lying.

jps.text: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hand of strangers, whose mouth speaketh falsehood, and their right hand is a right hand of lying.

verses.hebrewText: אֲשֶׁ֤ר בָּנֵ֨ינוּ ׀ כִּנְטִעִים֮ מְגֻדָּלִ֪ים בִּֽנְעוּרֵ֫יהֶ֥ם בְּנֹותֵ֥ינוּ כְזָוִיֹּ֑ת מְ֝חֻטָּבֹ֗ות תַּבְנִ֥ית הֵיכָֽל׃
verses.englishText: We whose sons are as plants grown up in their youth; whose daughters are as corner-pillars carved after the fashion of a palace;

jps.text: We whose sons are as plants grown up in their youth; whose daughters are as corner-pillars carved after the fashion of a palace;

verses.hebrewText: מְזָוֵ֣ינוּ מְלֵאִים֮ מְפִיקִ֥ים מִזַּ֗ן אֶ֫ל־זַ֥ן צֹאונֵ֣נוּ מַ֭אֲלִיפֹות מְרֻבָּבֹ֗ות בְּחוּצֹותֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Whose garners are full, affording all manner of store; whose sheep increase by thousands and ten thousands in our fields;

jps.text: Whose garners are full, affording all manner of store; whose sheep increase by thousands and ten thousands in our fields;

verses.hebrewText: אַלּוּפֵ֗ינוּ מְֽסֻבָּ֫לִ֥ים אֵֽין־פֶּ֭רֶץ וְאֵ֣ין יֹוצֵ֑את וְאֵ֥ין צְ֝וָחָ֗ה בִּרְחֹבֹתֵֽינוּ׃
verses.englishText: Whose oxen are well laden; with no breach, and no going forth, and no outcry in our broad places;

jps.text: Whose oxen are well laden; with no breach, and no going forth, and no outcry in our broad places;

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֣י הָ֭עָם שֶׁכָּ֣כָה לֹּ֑ו אַֽשְׁרֵ֥י הָ֝עָ֗ם שֶׁיֲהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Happy is the people that is in such a case. Yea, happy is the people whose God is the LORD.

jps.text: Happy is the people that is in such a case. Yea, happy is the people whose God is the LORD.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהִלָּ֗ה לְדָ֫וִ֥ד אֲרֹומִמְךָ֣ אֱלֹוהַ֣י הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וַאֲבָרֲכָ֥ה שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ לְעֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: A Psalm of praise; of David. I will extol Thee, my God, O King; and I will bless Thy name for ever and ever.

jps.text: A Psalm of praise; of David. I will extol Thee, my God, O King; and I will bless Thy name for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: בְּכָל־יֹ֥ום אֲבָרֲכֶ֑ךָּ וַאֲהַלְלָ֥ה שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ לְעֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: Every day will I bless Thee; and I will praise Thy name for ever and ever.

jps.text: Every day will I bless Thee; and I will praise Thy name for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: גָּ֘דֹ֤ול יְהוָ֣ה וּמְהֻלָּ֣ל מְאֹ֑ד וְ֝לִגְדֻלָּתֹ֗ו אֵ֣ין חֵֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; and His greatness is unsearchable.

jps.text: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; and His greatness is unsearchable.

verses.hebrewText: דֹּ֣ור לְ֭דֹור יְשַׁבַּ֣ח מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ וּגְב֖וּרֹתֶ֣יךָ יַגִּֽידוּ׃
verses.englishText: One generation shall laud Thy works to another, and shall declare Thy mighty acts.

jps.text: One generation shall laud Thy works to another, and shall declare Thy mighty acts.

verses.hebrewText: הֲ֭דַר כְּבֹ֣וד הֹודֶ֑ךָ וְדִבְרֵ֖י נִפְלְאֹותֶ֣יךָ אָשִֽׂיחָה׃
verses.englishText: The glorious splendour of Thy majesty, and Thy wondrous works, will I rehearse.

jps.text: The glorious splendour of Thy majesty, and Thy wondrous works, will I rehearse.

verses.hebrewText: וֶעֱז֣וּז נֹורְאֹתֶ֣יךָ יֹאמֵ֑רוּ *וּגְדוּלֹּתֶיךָ (וּגְדוּלָּתְךָ֥) אֲסַפְּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.englishText: And men shall speak of the might of Thy tremendous acts; and I will tell of Thy greatness.

jps.text: And men shall speak of the might of Thy tremendous acts; and I will tell of Thy greatness.

verses.hebrewText: זֵ֣כֶר רַב־טוּבְךָ֣ יַבִּ֑יעוּ וְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.englishText: They shall utter the fame of Thy great goodness, and shall sing of Thy righteousness.

jps.text: They shall utter the fame of Thy great goodness, and shall sing of Thy righteousness.

verses.hebrewText: חַנּ֣וּן וְרַח֣וּם יְהוָ֑ה אֶ֥רֶךְ אַ֝פַּ֗יִם וּגְדָל־חָֽסֶד׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.

jps.text: The LORD is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.

verses.hebrewText: טֹוב־יְהוָ֥ה לַכֹּ֑ל וְ֝רַחֲמָ֗יו עַל־כָּל־מַעֲשָֽׂיו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is good to all; and His tender mercies are over all His works.

jps.text: The LORD is good to all; and His tender mercies are over all His works.

verses.hebrewText: יֹוד֣וּךָ יְ֭הוָה כָּל־מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ וַ֝חֲסִידֶ֗יךָ יְבָרֲכֽוּכָה׃
verses.englishText: All Thy works shall praise Thee, O LORD; and Thy saints shall bless Thee.

jps.text: All Thy works shall praise Thee, O LORD; and Thy saints shall bless Thee.

verses.hebrewText: כְּבֹ֣וד מַלְכוּתְךָ֣ יֹאמֵ֑רוּ וּגְבוּרָתְךָ֥ יְדַבֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.englishText: They shall speak of the glory of Thy kingdom, and talk of Thy might;

jps.text: They shall speak of the glory of Thy kingdom, and talk of Thy might;

verses.hebrewText: לְהֹודִ֤יעַ ׀ לִבְנֵ֣י הָ֭אָדָם גְּבוּרֹתָ֑יו וּ֝כְבֹ֗וד הֲדַ֣ר מַלְכוּתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: To make known to the sons of men His mighty acts, and the glory of the majesty of His kingdom.

jps.text: To make known to the sons of men His mighty acts, and the glory of the majesty of His kingdom.

verses.hebrewText: מַֽלְכוּתְךָ֗ מַלְכ֥וּת כָּל־עֹֽלָמִ֑ים וּ֝מֶֽמְשֶׁלְתְּךָ֗ בְּכָל־דֹּ֥ור וָדֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Thy kingdom is a kingdom for all ages, and Thy dominion endureth throughout all generations.

jps.text: Thy kingdom is a kingdom for all ages, and Thy dominion endureth throughout all generations.

verses.hebrewText: סֹומֵ֣ךְ יְ֭הוָה לְכָל־הַנֹּפְלִ֑ים וְ֝זֹוקֵ֗ף לְכָל־הַכְּפוּפִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all those that are bowed down.

jps.text: The LORD upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all those that are bowed down.

verses.hebrewText: עֵֽינֵי־כֹ֭ל אֵלֶ֣יךָ יְשַׂבֵּ֑רוּ וְאַתָּ֤ה נֹֽותֵן־לָהֶ֖ם אֶת־אָכְלָ֣ם בְּעִתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The eyes of all wait for Thee, and Thou givest them their food in due season.

jps.text: The eyes of all wait for Thee, and Thou givest them their food in due season.

verses.hebrewText: פֹּותֵ֥חַ אֶת־יָדֶ֑ךָ וּמַשְׂבִּ֖יעַ לְכָל־חַ֣י רָצֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: Thou openest Thy hand, and satisfiest every living thing with favour.

jps.text: Thou openest Thy hand, and satisfiest every living thing with favour.

verses.hebrewText: צַדִּ֣יק יְ֭הוָה בְּכָל־דְּרָכָ֑יו וְ֝חָסִ֗יד בְּכָל־מַעֲשָֽׂיו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is righteous in all His ways, and gracious in all His works.

jps.text: The LORD is righteous in all His ways, and gracious in all His works.

verses.hebrewText: קָרֹ֣וב יְ֭הוָה לְכָל־קֹרְאָ֑יו לְכֹ֤ל אֲשֶׁ֖ר יִקְרָאֻ֣הוּ בֶאֱמֶֽת׃
verses.englishText: The LORD is nigh unto all them that call upon Him, to all that call upon Him in truth.

jps.text: The LORD is nigh unto all them that call upon Him, to all that call upon Him in truth.

verses.hebrewText: רְצֹון־יְרֵאָ֥יו יַעֲשֶׂ֑ה וְֽאֶת־שַׁוְעָתָ֥ם יִ֝שְׁמַ֗ע וְיֹושִׁיעֵֽם׃
verses.englishText: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear Him; He also will hear their cry, and will save them.

jps.text: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear Him; He also will hear their cry, and will save them.

verses.hebrewText: שֹׁומֵ֣ר יְ֭הוָה אֶת־כָּל־אֹהֲבָ֑יו וְאֵ֖ת כָּל־הָרְשָׁעִ֣ים יַשְׁמִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: The LORD preserveth all them that love Him; but all the wicked will He destroy.

jps.text: The LORD preserveth all them that love Him; but all the wicked will He destroy.

verses.hebrewText: תְּהִלַּ֥ת יְהוָ֗ה יְֽדַבֶּ֫ר־פִּ֥י וִיבָרֵ֣ךְ כָּל־בָּ֭שָׂר שֵׁ֥ם קָדְשֹׁ֗ו לְעֹולָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.englishText: My mouth shall speak the praise of the LORD; and let all flesh bless His holy name for ever and ever.

jps.text: My mouth shall speak the praise of the LORD; and let all flesh bless His holy name for ever and ever.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽלְלוּ־יָ֡הּ הַלְלִ֥י נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י אֶת־יְהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Praise the LORD, O my soul.

jps.text: Hallelujah. Praise the LORD, O my soul.

verses.hebrewText: אֲהַלְלָ֣ה יְהוָ֣ה בְּחַיָּ֑י אֲזַמְּרָ֖ה לֵֽאלֹהַ֣י בְּעֹודִֽי׃
verses.englishText: I will praise the LORD while I live; I will sing praises unto my God while I have my being.

jps.text: I will praise the LORD while I live; I will sing praises unto my God while I have my being.

verses.hebrewText: אַל־תִּבְטְח֥וּ בִנְדִיבִ֑ים בְּבֶן־אָדָ֓ם ׀ שֶׁ֤אֵֽין לֹ֥ו תְשׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Put not your trust in princes, nor in the son of man, in whom there is no help.

jps.text: Put not your trust in princes, nor in the son of man, in whom there is no help.

verses.hebrewText: תֵּצֵ֣א ר֭וּחֹו יָשֻׁ֣ב לְאַדְמָתֹ֑ו בַּיֹּ֥ום הַ֝ה֗וּא אָבְד֥וּ עֶשְׁתֹּנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his dust; in that very day his thoughts perish.

jps.text: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his dust; in that very day his thoughts perish.

verses.hebrewText: אַשְׁרֵ֗י שֶׁ֤אֵ֣ל יַעֲקֹ֣ב בְּעֶזְרֹ֑ו שִׂ֝בְרֹ֗ו עַל־יְהוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: Happy is he whose help is the God of Jacob, whose hope is in the LORD his God,

jps.text: Happy is he whose help is the God of Jacob, whose hope is in the LORD his God,

verses.hebrewText: עֹשֶׂ֤ה ׀ שָׁ֘מַ֤יִם וָאָ֗רֶץ אֶת־הַיָּ֥ם וְאֶת־כָּל־אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֑ם הַשֹּׁמֵ֖ר אֱמֶ֣ת לְעֹולָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that in them is; who keepeth truth for ever;

jps.text: Who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that in them is; who keepeth truth for ever;

verses.hebrewText: עֹשֶׂ֤ה מִשְׁפָּ֨ט ׀ לָעֲשׁוּקִ֗ים נֹתֵ֣ן לֶ֭חֶם לָרְעֵבִ֑ים יְ֝הוָ֗ה מַתִּ֥יר אֲסוּרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Who executeth justice for the oppressed; who giveth bread to the hungry. The LORD looseth the prisoners;

jps.text: Who executeth justice for the oppressed; who giveth bread to the hungry. The LORD looseth the prisoners;

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ פֹּ֘קֵ֤חַ עִוְרִ֗ים יְ֭הוָה זֹקֵ֣ף כְּפוּפִ֑ים יְ֝הוָ֗ה אֹהֵ֥ב צַדִּיקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: The LORD openeth the eyes of the blind; the LORD raiseth up them that are bowed down; the LORD loveth the righteous;

jps.text: The LORD openeth the eyes of the blind; the LORD raiseth up them that are bowed down; the LORD loveth the righteous;

verses.hebrewText: יְהוָ֤ה ׀ שֹׁ֘מֵ֤ר אֶת־גֵּרִ֗ים יָתֹ֣ום וְאַלְמָנָ֣ה יְעֹודֵ֑ד וְדֶ֖רֶךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים יְעַוֵּֽת׃
verses.englishText: The LORD preserveth the strangers; He upholdeth the fatherless and the widow; but the way of the wicked He maketh crooked.

jps.text: The LORD preserveth the strangers; He upholdeth the fatherless and the widow; but the way of the wicked He maketh crooked.

verses.hebrewText: יִמְלֹ֤ךְ יְהוָ֨ה ׀ לְעֹולָ֗ם אֱלֹהַ֣יִךְ צִ֭יֹּון לְדֹ֥ר וָדֹ֗ר הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD will reign for ever, Thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Hallelujah.

jps.text: The LORD will reign for ever, Thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ כִּי־טֹ֖וב זַמְּרָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ כִּֽי־נָ֝עִים נָאוָ֥ה תְהִלָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah; for it is good to sing praises unto our God; for it is pleasant, and praise is comely.

jps.text: Hallelujah; for it is good to sing praises unto our God; for it is pleasant, and praise is comely.

verses.hebrewText: בֹּונֵ֣ה יְרוּשָׁלַ֣͏ִם יְהוָ֑ה נִדְחֵ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל יְכַנֵּֽס׃
verses.englishText: The LORD doth build up Jerusalem, He gathereth together the dispersed of Israel;

jps.text: The LORD doth build up Jerusalem, He gathereth together the dispersed of Israel;

verses.hebrewText: הָ֭רֹפֵא לִשְׁב֣וּרֵי לֵ֑ב וּ֝מְחַבֵּ֗שׁ לְעַצְּבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Who healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.

jps.text: Who healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.

verses.hebrewText: מֹונֶ֣ה מִ֭סְפָּר לַכֹּוכָבִ֑ים לְ֝כֻלָּ֗ם שֵׁמֹ֥ות יִקְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: He counteth the number of the stars; He giveth them all their names.

jps.text: He counteth the number of the stars; He giveth them all their names.

verses.hebrewText: גָּדֹ֣ול אֲדֹונֵ֣ינוּ וְרַב־כֹּ֑חַ לִ֝תְבוּנָתֹ֗ו אֵ֣ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.englishText: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power; His understanding is infinite.

jps.text: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power; His understanding is infinite.

verses.hebrewText: מְעֹודֵ֣ד עֲנָוִ֣ים יְהוָ֑ה מַשְׁפִּ֖יל רְשָׁעִ֣ים עֲדֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: The LORD upholdeth the humble; He bringeth the wicked down to the ground.

jps.text: The LORD upholdeth the humble; He bringeth the wicked down to the ground.

verses.hebrewText: עֱנ֣וּ לַיהוָ֣ה בְּתֹודָ֑ה זַמְּר֖וּ לֵאלֹהֵ֣ינוּ בְכִנֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: Sing unto the LORD with thanksgiving, sing praises upon the harp unto our God;

jps.text: Sing unto the LORD with thanksgiving, sing praises upon the harp unto our God;

verses.hebrewText: הַֽמְכַסֶּ֬ה שָׁמַ֨יִם ׀ בְּעָבִ֗ים הַמֵּכִ֣ין לָאָ֣רֶץ מָטָ֑ר הַמַּצְמִ֖יחַ הָרִ֣ים חָצִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh the mountains to spring with grass.

jps.text: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh the mountains to spring with grass.

verses.hebrewText: נֹותֵ֣ן לִבְהֵמָ֣ה לַחְמָ֑הּ לִבְנֵ֥י עֹ֝רֵ֗ב אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִקְרָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: He giveth to the beast his food, and to the young ravens which cry.

jps.text: He giveth to the beast his food, and to the young ravens which cry.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֤א בִגְבוּרַ֣ת הַסּ֣וּס יֶחְפָּ֑ץ לֹֽא־בְשֹׁוקֵ֖י הָאִ֣ישׁ יִרְצֶֽה׃
verses.englishText: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse; He taketh no pleasure in the legs of a man.

jps.text: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse; He taketh no pleasure in the legs of a man.

verses.hebrewText: רֹוצֶ֣ה יְ֭הוָה אֶת־יְרֵאָ֑יו אֶת־הַֽמְיַחֲלִ֥ים לְחַסְדֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: The LORD taketh pleasure in them that fear Him, in those that wait for His mercy.

jps.text: The LORD taketh pleasure in them that fear Him, in those that wait for His mercy.

verses.hebrewText: שַׁבְּחִ֣י יְ֭רוּשָׁלַ͏ִם אֶת־יְהוָ֑ה הַֽלְלִ֖י אֱלֹהַ֣יִךְ צִיֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: Glorify the LORD, O Jerusalem; praise thy God, O Zion.

jps.text: Glorify the LORD, O Jerusalem; praise thy God, O Zion.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חִ֭זַּק בְּרִיחֵ֣י שְׁעָרָ֑יִךְ בֵּרַ֖ךְ בָּנַ֣יִךְ בְּקִרְבֵּֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: For He hath made strong the bars of thy gates; He hath blessed thy children within thee.

jps.text: For He hath made strong the bars of thy gates; He hath blessed thy children within thee.

verses.hebrewText: הַשָּׂם־גְּבוּלֵ֥ךְ שָׁלֹ֑ום חֵ֥לֶב חִ֝טִּ֗ים יַשְׂבִּיעֵֽךְ׃
verses.englishText: He maketh thy borders peace; He giveth thee in plenty the fat of wheat.

jps.text: He maketh thy borders peace; He giveth thee in plenty the fat of wheat.

verses.hebrewText: הַשֹּׁלֵ֣חַ אִמְרָתֹ֣ו אָ֑רֶץ עַד־מְ֝הֵרָ֗ה יָר֥וּץ דְּבָרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: He sendeth out His commandment upon earth; His word runneth very swiftly.

jps.text: He sendeth out His commandment upon earth; His word runneth very swiftly.

verses.hebrewText: הַנֹּתֵ֣ן שֶׁ֣לֶג כַּצָּ֑מֶר כְּ֝פֹ֗ור כָּאֵ֥פֶר יְפַזֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: He giveth snow like wool; He scattereth the hoar-frost like ashes.

jps.text: He giveth snow like wool; He scattereth the hoar-frost like ashes.

verses.hebrewText: מַשְׁלִ֣יךְ קַֽרְחֹ֣ו כְפִתִּ֑ים לִפְנֵ֥י קָ֝רָתֹ֗ו מִ֣י יַעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.englishText: He casteth forth His ice like crumbs; who can stand before His cold?

jps.text: He casteth forth His ice like crumbs; who can stand before His cold?

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׁלַ֣ח דְּבָרֹ֣ו וְיַמְסֵ֑ם יַשֵּׁ֥ב ר֝וּחֹ֗ו יִזְּלוּ־מָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: He sendeth forth His word, and melteth them; He causeth His wind to blow, and the waters flow.

jps.text: He sendeth forth His word, and melteth them; He causeth His wind to blow, and the waters flow.

verses.hebrewText: מַגִּ֣יד *דְּבָרֹו (דְּבָרָ֣יו) לְיַעֲקֹ֑ב חֻקָּ֥יו וּ֝מִשְׁפָּטָ֗יו לְיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: He declareth His word unto Jacob, His statutes and His ordinances unto Israel.

jps.text: He declareth His word unto Jacob, His statutes and His ordinances unto Israel.

verses.hebrewText: לֹ֘א עָ֤שָׂה כֵ֨ן ׀ לְכָל־גֹּ֗וי וּמִשְׁפָּטִ֥ים בַּל־יְדָע֗וּם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: He hath not dealt so with any nation; and as for His ordinances, they have not known them. Hallelujah.

jps.text: He hath not dealt so with any nation; and as for His ordinances, they have not known them. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ הַֽלְל֣וּ אֶת־יְ֭הוָה מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֑יִם הֽ͏ַ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בַּמְּרֹומִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Praise ye the LORD from the heavens; praise Him in the heights.

jps.text: Hallelujah. Praise ye the LORD from the heavens; praise Him in the heights.

verses.hebrewText: הֽ͏ַלְל֥וּהוּ כָל־מַלְאָכָ֑יו הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ כָּל־*צְבָאֹו (צְבָאָֽיו)׃
verses.englishText: Praise ye Him, all His angels; praise ye Him, all His hosts.

jps.text: Praise ye Him, all His angels; praise ye Him, all His hosts.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭לְלוּהוּ שֶׁ֣מֶשׁ וְיָרֵ֑חַ הַ֝לְל֗וּהוּ כָּל־כֹּ֥וכְבֵי אֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: Praise ye Him, sun and moon; praise Him, all ye stars of light.

jps.text: Praise ye Him, sun and moon; praise Him, all ye stars of light.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭לְלוּהוּ שְׁמֵ֣י הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם וְ֝הַמַּ֗יִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ מֵעַ֬ל הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Praise Him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that are above the heavens.

jps.text: Praise Him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that are above the heavens.

verses.hebrewText: יְֽ֭הַֽלְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁ֣ם יְהוָ֑ה כִּ֤י ה֭וּא צִוָּ֣ה וְנִבְרָֽאוּ׃
verses.englishText: Let them praise the name of the LORD; for He commanded, and they were created.

jps.text: Let them praise the name of the LORD; for He commanded, and they were created.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּעֲמִידֵ֣ם לָעַ֣ד לְעֹולָ֑ם חָק־נָ֝תַ֗ן וְלֹ֣א יַעֲבֹֽור׃
verses.englishText: He hath also established them for ever and ever; He hath made a decree which shall not be transgressed.

jps.text: He hath also established them for ever and ever; He hath made a decree which shall not be transgressed.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽלְל֣וּ אֶת־יְ֭הוָה מִן־הָאָ֑רֶץ תַּ֝נִּינִ֗ים וְכָל־תְּהֹמֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: Praise the LORD from the earth, ye sea-monsters, and all deeps;

jps.text: Praise the LORD from the earth, ye sea-monsters, and all deeps;

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣שׁ וּ֭בָרָד שֶׁ֣לֶג וְקִיטֹ֑ור ר֥וּחַ סְ֝עָרָ֗ה עֹשָׂ֥ה דְבָרֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Fire and hail, snow and vapour, stormy wind, fulfilling His word;

jps.text: Fire and hail, snow and vapour, stormy wind, fulfilling His word;

verses.hebrewText: הֶהָרִ֥ים וְכָל־גְּבָעֹ֑ות עֵ֥ץ פְּ֝רִ֗י וְכָל־אֲרָזִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Mountains and all hills, fruitful trees and all cedars;

jps.text: Mountains and all hills, fruitful trees and all cedars;

verses.hebrewText: הַֽחַיָּ֥ה וְכָל־בְּהֵמָ֑ה רֶ֝֗מֶשׂ וְצִפֹּ֥ור כָּנָֽף׃
verses.englishText: Beasts and all cattle, creeping things and winged fowl;

jps.text: Beasts and all cattle, creeping things and winged fowl;

verses.hebrewText: מַלְכֵי־אֶ֭רֶץ וְכָל־לְאֻמִּ֑ים שָׂ֝רִ֗ים וְכָל־שֹׁ֥פְטֵי אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: Kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all judges of the earth;

jps.text: Kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all judges of the earth;

verses.hebrewText: בַּחוּרִ֥ים וְגַם־בְּתוּלֹ֑ות זְ֝קֵנִ֗ים עִם־נְעָרֽ͏ִים׃
verses.englishText: Both young men and maidens, old men and children;

jps.text: Both young men and maidens, old men and children;

verses.hebrewText: יְהַלְל֤וּ ׀ אֶת־שֵׁ֬ם יְהוָ֗ה כִּֽי־נִשְׂגָּ֣ב שְׁמֹ֣ו לְבַדֹּ֑ו הֹ֝ודֹ֗ו עַל־אֶ֥רֶץ וְשָׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for His name alone is exalted; His glory is above the earth and heaven.

jps.text: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for His name alone is exalted; His glory is above the earth and heaven.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֤רֶם קֶ֨רֶן ׀ לְעַמֹּ֡ו תְּהִלָּ֤ה לְֽכָל־חֲסִידָ֗יו לִבְנֵ֣י יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל עַֽם־קְרֹבֹ֗ו הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: And He hath lifted up a horn for His people, a praise for all His saints, even for the children of Israel, a people near unto Him. Hallelujah.

jps.text: And He hath lifted up a horn for His people, a praise for all His saints, even for the children of Israel, a people near unto Him. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ שִׁ֣ירוּ לַֽ֭יהוָה שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֑שׁ תְּ֝הִלָּתֹ֗ו בִּקְהַ֥ל חֲסִידִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Sing unto the LORD a new song, and His praise in the assembly of the saints.

jps.text: Hallelujah. Sing unto the LORD a new song, and His praise in the assembly of the saints.

verses.hebrewText: יִשְׂמַ֣ח יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל בְּעֹשָׂ֑יו בְּנֵֽי־צִ֝יֹּ֗ון יָגִ֥ילוּ בְמַלְכָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let Israel rejoice in his Maker; let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

jps.text: Let Israel rejoice in his Maker; let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

verses.hebrewText: יְהַֽלְל֣וּ שְׁמֹ֣ו בְמָחֹ֑ול בְּתֹ֥ף וְ֝כִנֹּ֗ור יְזַמְּרוּ־לֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Let them praise His name in the dance; let them sing praises unto Him with the timbrel and harp.

jps.text: Let them praise His name in the dance; let them sing praises unto Him with the timbrel and harp.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־רֹוצֶ֣ה יְהוָ֣ה בְּעַמֹּ֑ו יְפָאֵ֥ר עֲ֝נָוִ֗ים בִּישׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: For the LORD taketh pleasure in His people; He adorneth the humble with salvation.

jps.text: For the LORD taketh pleasure in His people; He adorneth the humble with salvation.

verses.hebrewText: יַעְלְז֣וּ חֲסִידִ֣ים בְּכָבֹ֑וד יְ֝רַנְּנ֗וּ עַל־מִשְׁכְּבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let the saints exult in glory; let them sing for joy upon their beds.

jps.text: Let the saints exult in glory; let them sing for joy upon their beds.

verses.hebrewText: רֹומְמֹ֣ות אֵ֭ל בִּגְרֹונָ֑ם וְחֶ֖רֶב פִּֽיפִיֹּ֣ות בְּיָדָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Let the high praises of God be in their mouth, and a two-edged sword in their hand;

jps.text: Let the high praises of God be in their mouth, and a two-edged sword in their hand;

verses.hebrewText: לַעֲשֹׂ֣ות נְ֭קָמָה בַּגֹּויִ֑ם תֹּֽ֝וכֵחֹ֗ת בַּל־אֻמִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: To execute vengeance upon the nations, and chastisements upon the peoples;

jps.text: To execute vengeance upon the nations, and chastisements upon the peoples;

verses.hebrewText: לֶאְסֹ֣ר מַלְכֵיהֶ֣ם בְּזִקִּ֑ים וְ֝נִכְבְּדֵיהֶ֗ם בְּכַבְלֵ֥י בַרְזֶֽל׃
verses.englishText: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

jps.text: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

verses.hebrewText: לַעֲשֹׂ֤ות בָּהֶ֨ם ׀ מִשְׁפָּ֬ט כָּת֗וּב הָדָ֣ר ה֭וּא לְכָל־חֲסִידָ֗יו הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: To execute upon them the judgment written; He is the glory of all His saints. Hallelujah.

jps.text: To execute upon them the judgment written; He is the glory of all His saints. Hallelujah.

verses.hebrewText: הַ֥לְלוּ יָ֨הּ ׀ הַֽלְלוּ־אֵ֥ל בְּקָדְשֹׁ֑ו הֽ͏ַ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בִּרְקִ֥יעַ עֻזֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: Hallelujah. Praise God in His sanctuary; praise Him in the firmament of His power.

jps.text: Hallelujah. Praise God in His sanctuary; praise Him in the firmament of His power.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽלְל֥וּהוּ בִגְבוּרֹתָ֑יו הֽ͏ַ֝לְל֗וּהוּ כְּרֹ֣ב גֻּדְלֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Praise Him for His mighty acts; praise Him according to His abundant greatness.

jps.text: Praise Him for His mighty acts; praise Him according to His abundant greatness.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭לְלוּהוּ בְּתֵ֣קַע שֹׁופָ֑ר הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בְּנֵ֣בֶל וְכִנֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: Praise Him with the blast of the horn; praise Him with the psaltery and harp.

jps.text: Praise Him with the blast of the horn; praise Him with the psaltery and harp.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽ֭לְלוּהוּ בְתֹ֣ף וּמָחֹ֑ול הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בְּמִנִּ֥ים וְעוּגָֽב׃
verses.englishText: Praise Him with the timbrel and dance; praise Him with stringed instruments and the pipe.

jps.text: Praise Him with the timbrel and dance; praise Him with stringed instruments and the pipe.

verses.hebrewText: הַֽלְל֥וּהוּ בְצִלְצְלֵי־שָׁ֑מַע הַֽ֝לְל֗וּהוּ בְּֽצִלְצְלֵ֥י תְרוּעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Praise Him with the loud-sounding cymbals; praise Him with the clanging cymbals.

jps.text: Praise Him with the loud-sounding cymbals; praise Him with the clanging cymbals.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֣ל הַ֭נְּשָׁמָה תְּהַלֵּ֥ל יָ֗הּ הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃
verses.englishText: Let every thing that hath breath praise the LORD. Hallelujah.

jps.text: Let every thing that hath breath praise the LORD. Hallelujah.
